translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage.
translations.reference: ISchistosomiasis (iBilharzia) Uhlolojikelele: ISchistosomiasis yisifo sobumpofu esiholela ekuguleni okungapheli. Ukutheleleka kutholakala lapho abantu behlangana namanzi ahlanzekile ahlaselwe amafomu ezibungu (icercariae) yama-flukes egazi ayisimungulu, aziwa ngokuthi ama-schistosome. Izikelemu ezindala ezincane ezincane zihlala emithanjeni ekhipha umgudu womchamo kanye namathumbu. Iningi lamaqanda eziwabekelayo avaleleke ezicutshini futhi ukusabela komzimba kuwo kungabangela umonakalo omkhulu.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubhekana nobuchule ngobulazwe (Bilharzia): Ubulazwe buwubhubhane obubangelwa ukukhubazeka okwedlule. Umuntu uthola leli nkinga uma ethintana namanzi amnene ahlanganiswe ngama-larvae (cercariae) ezilwanyana ezibulalayo ezihlala emzimbeni, ezaziwa njenge-schistosomes. Izilwanyana ezinkulu ezincane zihlala emithonjeni yegazi egqamile ehlanganisa umgudu wokuhlaziywa kanye nezimbovane. Iningi le-eggs ezilayelwa zivalelwe ezicini zomzimba, futhi ukuphenduka kwemiphakathi yomzimba kulolu lwazi kungabangela umonakalo omkhulu.

translations.source: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.
translations.reference: ISchistosomiasis ihlasela abantu abacishe babe yizigidi ezingama-240 emhlabeni wonke, futhi abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingama-700 bahlala ezindaweni ezinesifo. Ukutheleleka kwandile ezindaweni ezishisayo nezishisayo, emiphakathini empofu engenamanzi aphuzwayo kanye nezindlu zangasese ezanele. I-Urogenital schistosomiasis ibangelwa iSchistosoma haematobium kanye neschistosomiasis yamathumbu yinoma yiziphi izinto eziphilayo iS. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, neS. mekongi. Izigidi ezimbalwa zabantu emhlabeni wonke zihlushwa ukugula okubi kakhulu ngenxa ye-schistosomiasis. Isu leWHO ekusetshenzisweni kwemithi ye-anthelminthic manje lenza kube nokwenzeka ukulawula ischistosomiasis emiphakathini empofu nencishwe amathuba, ngokuhambisana nokungenelela okulwa nelymphatic filariasis, i-onchocerciasis kanye ne-helminthiasis edluliselwa emhlabathini.
translations.hypothesis: I-schistosomiasis ithinta cishe izigidi ezingu-240 zabantu emhlabeni jikelele, futhi abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-700 batholakala ezindaweni ezithintekile yalesi sifo. Lesi sifo sivame kakhulu ezindaweni ezishisayo nezishisayo, ezimiphakathini emincane engabizi amanzi agcwele futhi enobudlelwane obuhle. I-schistosomiasis yamasu kanye nezimbovane ibangelwa yi-Schistosoma haematobium, kanti i-schistosomiasis yegastrintestinal ibangelwa ngazinye zalezi zinto ezibulalayo: i-S. guineensis, i-S. intercalatum, i-S. mansoni, i-S. japonicum, kanye ne-S. mekongi. Amagidi ezinkulungwane zabantu emhlabeni jikelele athinte kakhulu ngalesi sifo. Uhlelo lwe-WHO mayelana nokusetshenziswa kwezindlela zokwelapha ezibulalayo manje kwenza kube nokwenzeka ukulawula i-schistosomiasis ezimiphakathini emincane futhi engabizi, ngokubambisana nezindlela zokuphikiswa kwe-lymphatic filariasis, i-onchocerciasis, kanye ne-helminthiasis edluliselwa ngomhlaba.

translations.source: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.
translations.reference: Ezindaweni ezitholakala kakhulu, ukugula okubi kakhulu ngenxa yeschistosomiasis kungavinjelwa ngokwelashwa njalo kwamaqembu asengozini okuhloswe ngawo ngokusekelwe ekuxilongweni komphakathi okusekelwe emaqenjini abalindi. IPraziquantel inikezwe ngokuphephile ngokuhlanganyela ne-albendazole ne-ivermectin, ezindaweni lapho le mithi isetshenziswe khona ngokuhlukana ukuze kuvinjelwe ukwelapha ngamakhemikhali. Izimpawu: Izimpawu zeschistosomiasis zibangelwa ukusabela komzimba emaqandeni ezikelemu. Ischistosomiasis yamathumbu ingabangela ubuhlungu besisu, isifo sohudo, kanye negazi endle. Ukwanda kwesibindi kuvamile ezimweni ezithuthukile, futhi kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nokunqwabelana koketshezi emgodini we-peritoneal kanye nomfutho wegazi ophezulu emithanjeni yegazi yesisu.
translations.hypothesis: Kulezindawo ezinkulu lapho kukhona ukugcwaliseka okukhulu kwe-schistosomiasis, ukugula okukhulu okubangelwa yileli nkinga kungagwenywa ngokwelashwa njalo kwamaqembu ayingozi, okuhlosiwe ngokuya ngokuqinisekiswa komphakathi okususelwe emaqenjini okuhlola. I-Praziquantel isetshenziswa ngokuphephile kanye ne-albendazole kanye ne-ivermectin, ezindaweni lapho lezi zindlela zasetshenziswa ngazinye ekwelashweni lokugwazwa. Izimpawu: Izimpawu ze-schistosomiasis zibangelwa ukuthi umzimba uphendulele izikhukhula zezilwane ezincibilikisayo. I-schistosomiasis yengqikithi ingadala ubuhlungu ebuswini, ukugula, nomdlavuza ogcwele igazi. Ukukhulu kwegeja kuvamile ezimweni ezithuthukile, futhi kuvamise ukuhlotshaniswa nokuhlanganiswa kwamanzi kagesi eliphakathi nomzimba kanye nokunyuka kwegazi ezintubeni zombili zombili zombili.

translations.source: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.
translations.reference: Ezimweni ezinjalo kungase kube nokwandiswa kobende. Isibonakaliso sakudala se-urogenital schistosomiasis yi-hematuria (igazi emchameni). IFibrosis yesinye kanye ne-ureter, kanye nokulimala kwezinso ngezinye izikhathi kutholakala ezimeni ezithuthukile. Umdlavuza wesinye ungenye inkinga engenzeka ezigabeni zakamuva. Kwabesifazane, ischistosomiasis ye-urogenital ingase ibe nezilonda ezithweni zangasese, ukopha esithweni sangasese, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi, namaqhuqhuva kwi-vulva.
translations.hypothesis: Kulolu hlobo, kungase futhi kube nokukhulu kwebhayisi. Isibonakaliso esivamile se-schistosomiasis yamasu kanye nomdlavuza yi-haematuria (igazi egwini). Ukukhishwa kwe-fibrosis kwebhayisi kanye ne-ureter, kanye nokulimala kwe-kidini, kungabonwa ezimweni ezithile ezithuthukile. Ukugula komdlavuza webhayisi kuyinto enye yezinkinga ezengiphakathi kulezi zimo ezisafudlana. Kwabesifazane, i-schistosomiasis yamasu kanye nomdlavuza ingabonakala ngamachashazi ezimpilo, ukugwinya kwegazi emgodini, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuxhumana ngokocansi, kanye namathiphu endaweni yamasu.

translations.source: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: Kwabesilisa, ischistosomiasis ye-urogenital ingabangela ukugula kwamaseminal vesicles, iprostate, nezinye izitho. Lesi sifo singase sibe neminye imiphumela yesikhathi eside engenakulungiseka, kuhlanganise nokungazali. Imiphumela yezomnotho nezempilo yeschistosomiasis mikhulu futhi lesi sifo sikhubaza ngaphezu kokusibulalayo. Ezinganeni, ischistosomiasis ingabangela i-anemia, ukuntenga kanye nekhono elinciphile lokufunda, nakuba imiphumela ngokuvamile ihlehliswa ngokwelashwa. Ukwelashwa: IPraziquantel iwukwelashwa okunconyiwe kuzo zonke izinhlobo ze-schistosomiasis.
translations.hypothesis: Ku-mabhuloho, ukugula okubandakanya izimbungulu zokwenza izingane kanye ne-prostate kungabangela izinkinga eziningi ezihlobene nalezi zimbungulu nezinye izimo zombili. Lesi sifo singase futhi sibangele ezinye izinto ezimbi ezilamuhlaza futhi azilungiseki, okuhlanganisa ukungakwazi ukuba nodadewabo. Izimpilo nezinombolo zezomnotho ezibangelwa yalesi sifo zinkulu kakhulu, futhi lesi sifo kubangela ukulahlekelwa kwamandla kunokuba kubangele ukufa. Ezinganeni, ukugula okubandakanya izimbungulu kungabangela ukwehla kwegazi, ukuncipha kokukhula kanye nokwehla kakhulu ekufundeni, nakuba lezi zimpilo zivamise ukulungiswa ngokwelashwa. Ukwelashwa: I-Praziquantel yindlela yokwelashwa enconyiwe yazo zonke izinhlobo zalesi sifo.

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.
translations.reference: Iyasebenza, iphephile, futhi inezindleko eziphansi. Ngisho noma ukuphinda kutheleleke ngemva kokwelashwa, ingozi yokuba nesifo esinzima iyancipha futhi ihlehliswe lapho ukwelashwa kuqaliswa futhi kuphindwa ebuntwaneni. Ukulawulwa kweSchistosomiasis kwenziwe ngempumelelo eminyakeni engama-40 edlule emazweni amaningana, okuhlanganisa iBrazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, njll. EBurundi, eBurkina Faso, eGhana, eNiger, eRwanda, eSierra Leone, e-United Republic of Tanzania, naseYemen, kube nokwenzeka ukukhuphula ukwelashwa kwe-schistosomiasis kuye ezingeni likazwelonke futhi kube nomthelela kulesi sifo eminyakeni embalwa. Ukuhlolwa kwesimo sokudlulisela kuyadingeka emazweni amaningana.
translations.hypothesis: Kuyindlela efanele, ephephile, futhi engabizi. Nakuba ukubandakanyeka kabusha kungase kwenzeke ngemuva kokwelashwa, ingozi yokuthuthuka kwezifo ezinkulu yehliswa futhi ngisho nokuguqulelwa uma ukwelashwa kuqala futhi kukhutshazwe ebudlezini. Ukulawulwa kwe-schistosomiasis kuye kwenziwa ngempumelelo eminyakeni engama-40 edlule ezweni eliningana, okubalwa kuzo iBrazil, iCambodia, iChina, i-Egypt, i-Mauritius, i-Islamic Republic of Iran, i-Oman, i-Jordan, i-Saudi Arabia, i-Morocco, i-Tunisia, njll. Emazweni afana ne-Burundi, i-Burkina Faso, i-Ghana, i-Niger, i-Rwanda, i-Sierra Leone, i-United Republic of Tanzania, kanye ne-Yemen, kungenzeka ukwandisa ukwelashwa kwe-schistosomiasis kuze kufike ezingeni kazwelonke futhi kukhukhule umthelela kwezifo ezimbalwa. Ukuhlaziywa kwesimo sokudluliselwa kudingeka ezweni eliningana.

translations.source: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.reference: Eminyakeni eyi-10 edlule, kube nokukhushulwa kwemikhankaso yokwelashwa emazweni amaningi aseSub-Saharan, lapho iningi lalabo abasengozini lihlala khona.
translations.hypothesis: Kule minyaka eyishumi edlule, kukhulisiwe izinhlelo zokwelashwa eziningi ezweni eliningana e-Afrika esempumalanga nase-Afrika eseningizimu, lapho abaningi abathintekayo bahlala khona.

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.reference: Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kwezempilo Uhlolojikelele: Ukuzinakekela kuyikhono labantu ngabanye, imindeni kanye nemiphakathi ukukhuthaza impilo, ukuvimbela izifo, ukulondoloza impilo, nokubhekana nokugula nokukhubazeka ngosizo noma ngaphandle kokusekelwa umsebenzi wezempilo.Okwamanje abantu abayizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-3.6 - ingxenye yomhlaba - ukuntula ukufinyelela ezinsizeni zezempilo ezibalulekile. IWHO incoma ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kuwo wonke amazwe kanye nesizinda sezomnotho, njengendlela ebucayi yokufinyelela ukunakekelwa kwezempilo emhlabeni wonke, ukukhuthaza impilo, ukugcina umhlaba uphephile, kanye nokusiza abasengozini. Ukuzinakekela kubona abantu njengabantu abakhuthele ekuphatheni ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kwabo, ezindaweni ezihlanganisa ukukhuthazwa kwezempilo; ukuvimbela nokulawula izifo; ukuzelapha; ukuhlinzeka ngokunakekelwa kubantu abondliwayo, kanye nokuvuselela, okuhlanganisa nokunakekelwa kwepalliative. Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kusekelwe ebufakazini, amathuluzi ekhwalithi asekela ukuzinakekela.
translations.hypothesis: Ukunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu kwezempilo: Incazelo: Ukunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu kuyikhono labantu, emikhaya kanye nemiphakathi ukukhuthaza impilo, ukuvimbela izifo, ukugcina impilo, kanye nokubhekana nezifo nezinkinga zempilo, ngaphandle noma ngokusetshenziswa kosizo ochwepheshe bezempilo. Okwamanje, abantu abayi-3.6 billion – ingxenye yomhlaba – abanalo ukufinyelela kulezi zinsizakalo ezibalulekile zezempilo. I-WHO incoma ukunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu kuzo zonke izifunda kanye nezimo zezomnotho, njengendlela ebalulekile yokufinyelela ekufinyeleleni kuzo zonke izidingo zezempilo, ukukhuthaza impilo, ukugcina umhlaba uphephile, nokusiza labo abangamandla. Ukunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu kubona abantu njengabalulekile ekulawuleni kwezokunakekelwa kwabo, ezindaweni ezifana nokukhuthazwa kwempilo; ukuvikelwa nokulawulwa kwezifo; ukutshala iziyalo; ukunakekela labo abadinga usizo, kanye nokulungiswa, okubalwa nokunakekelwa okuyisikhathi esifushane. Izindlela zokunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu ziyithuluzi elisekelwe ezindinganisweni kanye nekhwalithi elisekela ukunakekelwa komuntu ngomuntu.

translations.source: They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health
translations.reference: Kubandakanya imithi, ukwelulekwa, ukuxilonga kanye/noma ubuchwepheshe bedijithali okungafinyelelwa ngokugcwele noma ingxenye ngaphandle kwezinsizakalo zezempilo ezisemthethweni. Ngokuya ngokungenelela, zingasetshenziswa ngokugadwa noma ngaphandle kokugadwa ngabasebenzi bezempilo. Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kunga: ukuhlomisa abantu ngabanye kanye nemiphakathi ukuthi baphathe impilo kanye nenhlalakahle yabo ukuqinisa izikhungo zikazwelonke ngokusetshenziswa kahle kwezinsiza zasekhaya kwezempilo
translations.hypothesis: Zihlanganisa imithi, ukwelulekwa, ukuhlaziywa kanye/noma ubuchwepheshe bendawo ezifanele ukuthi kusebenziswe ngokugcwele noma ngokwengxenye ngaphandle kwezinsizakalo zezempilo ezisemthethweni. Kuye ngohlelo olusetshenziswa, kungasetshenziswa ngaphandle noma ngaphansi kokubhekwa ngqo kwezisebenzi zezempilo. Izindlela zokuzinakekela zingenza: ukunika amandla abantu kanye nemiphakathi ukuthi zilawule impilo yazo kanye nokuziphilisa, kanye nokukhuthaza izikhungo zikazwelonke ngokusebenzisa kahle izinsiza zendawo zempilo.

translations.source: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.
translations.reference: ngcono ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuyisisekelo (PHC) futhi kube negalelo ekuzuzeni i-UHC Indlela yokwenza: Indlela egxile kubantu Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kusekela izidingo namalungelo abantu ngabanye ngendlela egxile kubantu esekelwe emalungelweni abantu kanye nokulingana kobulili. Lena indlela ephelele yempilo kanye nenhlalakahle yomuntu ngamunye, kucatshangelwa izimo zakhe, izidingo kanye nezifiso empilweni yakhe yonke, kanye nendawo ahlala kuyo. Ukuzinakekela kungamandla abantu ngabanye okuvimbela nokwelapha izifo ngokwabo, esimweni sendawo evumayo ephephile nesekelayo. Ayithathi indawo yesistimu yokunakekelwa kwezempilo, kodwa kunalokho inikeza izinketho ezengeziwe kanye nezinketho zokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Thuthukisa ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ezibalulekile (PHC) futhi senze isabelo ekufinyelelweni kwezempilo kubantu bonke (UHC). Indlela ebalulekile: Le ndlela igxile kubantu, futhi ihlose ukuxhasa izidingo nezinketho zabantu ngendlela ebalulekile, esuselwa kumalungelo abantu kanye nobumbano bezimpilo. Lesi yindlela ephelele yokunakekela impilo kanye nokuziphilisa komuntu ngamunye, ehlanganisa izimo zabo, izidingo kanye nezifiso zabo kuyo yonke impilo yabo, kanye nendawo abaphila kuyo. Ukuzinakekela ngempilo kuyindlela abantu abanayo yokuvimbela nokwelapha izifo ngokwabo, kulo msebenzi onamandla futhi onakekelayo. Akuyona ukuthi kuthatha indawo yohlelo lwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo, kodwa kunikeza izinketho eziningi kakhulu zokunakekelwa kwezempilo.

translations.source: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context
translations.reference: Ukungenelela okutholakalayo, okufinyelelekayo, okuthengekayo, okwamukelekayo kanye nekhwalithi enhle kuyizici ezibalulekile zokuthuthukisa nokuvikela ilungelo labantu lezempilo. Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kungenza ngcono ukusebenza kahle kokulethwa kwezinsiza zezempilo, ukufinyeleleka kanye nokuhlinzekwa kwabantu. Lokhu kudinga imithetho nezinqubomgomo ezisekelayo, ukuxhaswa ngezimali kwezempilo, imikhiqizo esezingeni eliphezulu elawulwayo nokungenelela, kanye nemfundo ekhuthaza ukubamba iqhaza kwabantu ngabanye, kanye nobumfihlo kanye nokugcinwa kuyimfihlo. Ukucatshangelwa kwamalungelo abantu kusiza ekwehliseni udlame, ukuphoqelela, ukucwaswa kanye nokucwasa ngokwenza ngcono indlela umuntu ngamunye asebenzisa ngayo ilungelo lakhe lezempilo, ulwazi, kanye nokuthatha izinqumo ezimele. Isimo esiphuthumayo
translations.hypothesis:
Izindlela zokunakekelwa komuntu ngamunye ezitholakalayo, ezifinyelelekayo, ezithengekayo, ezifanele kanye nezisezingeni eliphezulu ziyingxenye ebalulekile yokukhuthaza nokuvikela ilungelo labantu lokunakekelwa kwezempilo. Izindlela zokunakekelwa komuntu ngamunye zingathuthukisa ukusebenza kahle kwenkonzo yezempilo, ukufinyelela kuyo kanye nokufakwa kuyo. Lokhu kudinga imithetho nezinqubomgomo ezisekela, ukuxhaswa kwezimali zezempilo, imikhiqizo kanye nezindlela ezihlanzekile, kanye nemfundo ekhuthaza ukubamba iqhaza kwabantu, kanye nobumfihlo. Ukucatshangelwa kwamalungelo abantu kusiza ukunciphisa ubugebengu, ukucindezelwa, ukuhlukunyezwa kanye nokuhlukumezwa ngokuthuthukisa ukusebenzisa yilowo muntu ngamunye amalungelo awo ezempilo, ulwazi, kanye nokwenza izinqumo ngobunye.

Isimo esiphuthumayo.

translations.source: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: Ubhadane nezinkinga zobuntuEzimweni lapho izinhlelo zezempilo ezikhona zinwetshiwe, kuvame ukuba nesidingo esingakaze sibonwe kubantu nemiphakathi yokuphatha impilo yabo. Amasu amasha adlulela ngale kwempendulo evamile yomkhakha wezempilo adingeka ngokushesha njengoba: irekhodi labantu abayizigidi ezingama-274 njengamanje badinga usizo losizo kanye nokuvikelwa kanye nokuqubuka kwezifo kuwusongo lomhlaba wonke okungenani abantu abayizigidi ezingama-400 emhlabeni wonke abakwazi ukufinyelela izinsiza zezempilo ezibaluleke kakhulu. Umuntu oyedwa kwabayi-5 emhlabeni manje usezinkingeni zokusiza abantu, lapho izinhlelo zezempilo ziphonselwa inselelo ukuletha izinsiza ezibalulekile.
translations.hypothesis:
Izifo ezibulalayo kanye nezimo zensiza yomphakathi:

Ezimweni lapho izinhlelo zezempilo ezikhona zikhona kakhulu, kuvamise ukuba khona isidingo esingajwayelekile kubantu kanye nemiphakathi ukuthi zilawule impilo yazo. Kudingeka izindlela ezintsha ezidlule ngaphezu yempendulo ejwayelekile yomkhakha wezempilo, ngoba: abantu abangu-274 million abangu-274 million basebenza manje badinga usizo lwezinsiza kanye nokuvikelwa, futhi ukuqhuma kwezifo kubekwa njengesigameko esiyingozi emhlabeni wonke, kanti abantu abangama-400 million emhlabeni wonke abanandaba nokufinyelela ezinsizakalweni zezempilo ezibalulekile. Kwabantu abangu-1 ku-5 bomphakathi womhlaba, manje bayaphila ezimweni zensiza yomphakathi, lapho izinhlelo zezempilo zibhekene nezinkinga zokuhlinzeka ngezinsizakalo ezibalulekile.

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: Ukungenelela kokuzinakekela kunganikeza izinketho ezibalulekile, ezengeziwe esikhungweni sezempilo esivamile- noma izinsizakalo ezisekelwe kubasebenzi bezempilo, njengengxenye yohlelo lwezempilo olusekelayo. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu phakathi nobhubhane olufana neCOVID-19, lapho ukuzehlukanisa bodwa kanye nezinyathelo zokuqhela ngokomzimba zenza kube nzima kakhulu ukuthi abantu bathole izinsiza zabo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezijwayelekile kanye nemithi kanye nezinhlelo zezempilo zikazwelonke zingaphazamiseka. IWHO ihlanganisa ukungenelela kokuzinakekela njengezinyathelo eziza kuqala ekuqondiseni ukusebenza ekugcineni izinsiza zezempilo ezibalulekile kumongo weCOVID-19.
translations.hypothesis: Izindlela zokunakekelwa komuntu ngamunye zinganikeza izinketho ezibalulekile nezengeziwe ezisebenzisanayo, ngaphandle kwezinsizakalo ezijwayelekile ezihlinzekwa ezikhungweni zezempilo noma ngabahlengikazi bezempilo, njengengxenye yohlelo lwezempilo oluxhasayo. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu ngesikhathi sendlela yobhubhane efana ne-COVID-19, lapho ukuhlukaniswa komuntu ngamunye kanye nezindlela zokugcina ukubheka kwezakhamuzi zivimbele ukuthi abantu bathole izinsizakalo zabo ezijwayelekile zezempilo kanye nemithi, futhi izinhlelo zezempilo zikazwelonke zingaguqulelwa. I-WHO ifaka izindlela zokunakekelwa komuntu ngamunye njengozinga obalulekile ezinkokotheni zokusebenza mayelana nokugcina izinsizakalo ezibalulekile zezempilo ngesikhathi se-COVID-19.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.
translations.reference: ISepsis Uhlolojikelele: ISepsis yisimo esisongela ukuphila esivela lapho ukuphendula komzimba ekuthelelekeni kubangela ukulimala kwezicubu nezitho zawo. Ngokuvamile kuyindlela yokugcina evamile yokufa ezifweni eziningi ezithathelwanayo emhlabeni wonke. Kubandakanya ukungasebenzi kahle kwezitho ezibangelwa ukusabela okungahambi kahle kosokhaya ekuthelelekeni futhi uma kungabonakali kusenesikhathi futhi kulawulwe ngokushesha, kungaholela ekushayweni kwe-septic, ukwehluleka kwezitho eziningi nokufa. Nakuba ukulinganisa okunembile komthwalo we-epidemiological we-sepsis kunzima ukukuqinisekisa, incwadi yakamuva yesayensi ibike ukuthi i-sepsis ithinta abantu abalinganiselwa ezigidini ezingu-49 futhi ibangela ukufa kwezigidi ezingu-11 emhlabeni jikelele minyaka yonke.
translations.hypothesis: Incazelo ye-Sepsis: I-Sepsis yisimo esiyingozi kakhulu esiphuma lapho umzimba, empendleni yokulwa nokugula, udala umonakalo ezimpilweni zakhe kanye nezimo zangaphakathi. Kuyinto ejwayelekile eholela ekufeni kwezifo eziningi ezisabalalayo emhlabeni jikelele. Kubandakanya ukusebenza okungavamile kwezimo zangaphakathi okubangelwa ukuthi umzimba uphethe ngokungalungile ukulwa nokugula, futhi uma kungabhekiwe ngokushesha futhi kungalungiswa ngokushesha, kungaholela kwi-septic shock, ukwehluleka kwezimo zangaphakathi eziningi, kanye nokufa. Nakuba kunzima ukuthola inani eliqondile lokuthi kangaki abantu abathintekile yi-sepsis emhlabeni jikelele, incwadi yezemfundo esanda kukhishwa ibike ukuthi i-sepsis ithinta cishe izigidi ezingu-49 zabantu futhi ibangele izigidi ezingu-11 zokufa emhlabeni jikelele minyaka yonke.

translations.source: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.
translations.reference: Esimweni somphakathi, i-sepsis ivame ukuvela njengokuwohloka komtholampilo kwezifo ezivamile nezingavinjelwa. ISepsis ivame ukuvela ezifweni ezitholakala ezindaweni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo, okungenye yezenzakalo ezimbi kakhulu phakathi nokulethwa kokunakekelwa futhi ezithinta amakhulu ezigidi zeziguli emhlabeni wonke unyaka nonyaka. Uma isepsis iqala ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, ngenkathi noma ngemva kokubeletha, noma ngemva kokukhipha isisu, ibizwa ngokuthi imaternal sepsis. ISepsis ezinganeni ezisanda kuzalwa ibizwa ngokuthi ineonatal sepsis. Naphezu kokuvikeleka kakhulu, i-sepsis kamama kanye ne-neonatal isaqhubeka nokuba yimbangela enkulu yokufa kwabesifazane abakhulelwe kanye nezinsana ezisanda kuzalwa.
translations.hypothesis: Kule ndawo yomphakathi, i-sepsis ivame ukubonakala njengokuguquka kabi kwezifo ezivamile kanye nezifo ezingalungiswanga. I-sepsis futhi ivame ukubangelwa izifo ezitholwe ezikhungweni zezempilo, okuyinto yezimo eziyingozi ezivame kakhulu ngesikhathi kokunakekelwa, futhi zithinta izigidi ezinkulu zabagulayo emhlabeni jikelele minyaka yonke. Uma i-sepsis ivela ngesikhathi kukaMama, ngesikhathi noma ngemuva kokubeletha, noma ngemuva kokuhlaliswa, ibizwa ngokuthi i-sepsis yama-mama. I-sepsis ebabini abasha ibizwa ngokuthi i-sepsis yezintombazane. Nakuba ingalungiswa kalula, i-sepsis yama-mama kanye neyezintombazane iyaqhubeka nokuba yimbangela enkulu yobula kuma-mama kanye nezingane ezintombazane.

translations.source: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.
translations.reference: Izimpawu: ISepsis iyisimo esiphuthumayo sezokwelapha futhi sidinga ukunakwa ngokushesha ukuze kuvinjelwe ezinye izinkinga noma ukufa. Ingase yethule izimpawu eziyisixwayiso ezahlukene kanye nezimpawu ngezinye izikhathi, ezinye zazo ezingase zidale ukungaqondakali nezinye izimo. Ukutheleleka ngeseptic kungase kubangele imfiva, kodwa kungase futhi kubangele izinga lokushisa eliphansi lomzimba, amakhaza kanye nokuqhaqhazela. Kungase kube nobunzima bokuphefumula noma ukuphefumula ngokushesha, kanye nokwenyuka kwesilinganiso senhliziyo, noma ngokuphambene ukushaya kwenhliziyo okubuthakathaka nomfutho wegazi ophansi. Kungabangela ukuphuma komchamo omncane, kanye nesikhumba esinombala oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, esinamabala noma esiphaphathekile ngendlela engavamile, kanye nesimo sengqondo esishintshile.
translations.hypothesis: Izimpawu: I-sepsis iyinkinga yezokwelashwa edinga ukunakekelwa ngokushesha ukuze kuvikelwe ukuba kubekezelelwe izinkinga eziningi noma ukufa. Ingase ibonise izimpawu ezahlukene ngesikhathi esihlukene, okuthi ezinye zazo zingadala ukuthi kucatshangelwe ukuthi umuntu unesifo olunye. Ukuguguleka okubangelwe yi-sepsis kungadala ukushisa, kodwa kungadala futhi ukwehla kwezinga lokushisa lomzimba, ukuba umzimba ube mnqumane futhi ube nomu, kanye nokudlala. Kungase kube nokuba kunzima ukuphefumula noma ukuphefumula ngokushesha, kanye nokuba ngokushesha kwezinhliziyo, noma ngakho-ke ukuthi inhliziyo ibambe kancane kanye nokwehla kwengcungcungwane yegazi. Kungase kube nokwehla kokukhipha ubuphi, kanye nokuba nesikhumba esibomvu, esinombala, noma esibomvu kakhulu, kanye nokuguquka kwesimo sengqondo.

translations.source: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.reference: Okokugcina, kungase kubangele ubuhlungu obukhulu bomzimba noma ukungakhululeki, okwenza kube lula ukudidanisa umkhuhlane noma ushevu wokudla. Ezinganeni, isepsis ingase ibonakale ngokuphefumula okusheshayo, ukudlikizeka, isikhumba esiphaphathekile, ukukhathala noma ubunzima bokuvuka noma ukuzwa kubanda ngendlela engavamile lapho uthintwa. Ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-5, kungase kubangele ubunzima bokudla, ukuhlanza okuphindaphindiwe noma ukuntula ukuchama. Ukusola isepsis nokwenza ngokushesha kubalulekile ukuze kuqashelwe kusenesikhathi nokuxilongwa. Ukwelashwa: Ukuhlonzwa kusenesikhathi kwezimpawu kanye nokusungulwa ngesikhathi kokuphathwa komtholampilo okufanele kuyizici ezibalulekile zokunciphisa ubungozi nomthelela we-sepsis.
translations.hypothesis: Ekugcineni, kungabangela ubuhlungu obukhulu noma ukungakhululeki emzimbeni, okwenza kube lula ukuthi kucatshangelwe njengomdlavuza noma ukudla okubilisiwe. Kwabantfwana, i-sepsis ingabonakala ngokuphefumula ngokushesha kakhulu, ukugqolozela, isikhumba esibomvu, ukungabi nakho ukuhlala ukumelene, noma ukuthi kunzima ukuvukela noma ukuba umzimba umane ube mnene kakhulu. Kwabantfwana abangaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu, kungabangela ukuthi kube nzima ukudla, ukuvuvukala okunjalo, noma ukuthi umzimba ungadlali. Ukuba kunokuba kukhona i-sepsis nokuthi kuthathwe izinyathelo ngokushesha kubalulekile ukuze kutholwe ngokushesha nokuxilongwa. Ukwelashwa: Ukutholwa kwesikhathi esifushane kwalezi zimpawu kanye nokusetshenziswa kwesikhathi esifushane kwezokwelashwa ezifanele zibalulekile ekunciphiseni ingozi nomthelela we-sepsis.

translations.source: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: Ukutholwa kwamanye amabiomarker, njengeC reactive protein neprocalcitonin, kungasebenza ngempumelelo ekuxilongeni isimo. Ngemuva kokuqaphela kusenesikhathi, ukuxilonga ukusiza ukukhomba imbangela yokutheleleka okuholela kusepsis kubalulekile ukuqondisa ukwelashwa okuhlosiwe kwe-antimicrobial. Ukwelashwa okufanelekile kwe-antimicrobial (isibonelo, ama-antibiotics kanye nama-antifungal) kufanele kunikezwe lingakapheli ihora elilodwa lokukhonjwa kwe-sepsis. Ukumelana ne-Antimicrobial (AMR) kungabeka engcupheni ukuphathwa komtholampilo kwesepsis ngoba ukwelashwa okunamandla okulwa namagciwane kuvame ukudingeka. Ukuvuselela uketshezi kwangaphambi kwesikhathi kubalulekile esigabeni sokuqala futhi ama-vasopressors angadingeka ukuze kuthuthukiswe futhi kugcinwe ukugcwaliswa kwezicubu.
translations.hypothesis: Ukutholwa kwezinye izimpawu ezibalulekile, ezifana ne-C reactive protein kanye ne-procalcitonin, kungaba nesiphozi ekuxilongweni kwalesi simo. Ngemuva kokubona ngokushesha ukuthi kukhona okungalungile, ukuhlaziywa okuyisizo ekutholeni igciwane esebangela ukugugulela okuholayo ekugqwileni (sepsis) kubalulekile ukuze kukhonzwe ukwelashwa ngemithi egcwele. Ukwelashwa ngemithi egcwele efanele (ngokwesibonelo, ama-antibhayotiki kanye nama-antifungal) kufanele kunikezwe ngaphakathi kwamahora ayi-1 ngemuva kokutholwa kwe-sepsis. Ukumelwa kwemithi egcwele (AMR) kungenza kube nzima ukulawula ukwelashwa kwe-sepsis ngoba okuvamile ukuthi kudingeka ukwelashwa ngama-antibhayotiki ngaphandle kokuhlaziywa okujulile. Ukunikeza amanzi ngokushesha kubalulekile esigabeni sokuqala, futhi kungase kudingeke ukusebenzisa imithi ethuthukisa ukuhamba kwegazi ukuze kuthuthukiswe futhi kugcinwe ukufinyelela kwegazi ezimpilweni.

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: Kunezinyathelo ezimbili eziyinhloko zokuvimbela isepsis: Ukuvimbela ukudluliselwa kwemicrobial kanye nokutheleleka Ukuvimbela ukutheleleka okuguqukela kusepsis Emphakathini, ukuvimbela isepsis kusiza ngokusetshenziswa kwezinqubo zokuhlanzeka ezisebenzayo, ukuthuthukisa ukuthuthwa kwendle kanye nekhwalithi yamanzi kanye nokutholakala, ukunikeza ukufinyelela emithini yokugoma, ikakhulukazi kulabo abasengozini enkulu, kanye nokudla okufanele, okuhlanganisa ukuncelisa izingane ezisanda kuzalwa. Ukuvimbela ezikhungweni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo kuncike ezinhlelweni zokuvikela nokulawula ukutheleleka (i-IPC), izindlela ezisebenzayo zokuhlanzeka, kanye nemishini ehlanzekile, esebenza kahle.
translations.hypothesis: Kunezinyathelo ezimbili ezinkulu zokuqapha uketshezi: Ukugwema ukudluliselwa kwamagciwane kanye nokugaywa, kanye nokugwema ukuthi ukugaywa kushintshe uketshezi. Kule ndawo yomphakathi, ukugwema uketshezi kususwa ngokusetshenziswa kwezinqubo zokuhlanzeka ezifanele, ukuthuthukisa ukuhlanzeka kanye nokukhulisa ikhwalithi yamanzi kanye nokufinyeleleka kwawo, ukuhlinzeka ngemikhuba yokugaywa, ikakhulukazi kulabo abanezinkinga ezinkulu, kanye nokudla okunempilo, okubalwa nokudlisa ngobisi kwabasha. Ukugwema uketshezi ezikhungweni zezempilo kuxhomekile ezinhlelweni zokuqapha nokulawula ukugaywa (IPC), kwezinqubo zokuhlanzeka ezifanele, kanye nezinsiza ezihlanzekile ezisebenza kahle.

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.reference: Impilo yezocansi Uhlolojikelele: Impilo yocansi iyisisekelo empilweni nasenhlalakahleni yabantu ngabanye, abashadikazi kanye nemindeni, nasekuthuthukisweni kwezenhlalo nezomnotho emiphakathini kanye namazwe. Impilo yezocansi, uma ibhekwa njengokuqinisekisa, idinga indlela eyakhayo nehloniphekile kwezocansi kanye nobudlelwano bocansi, kanye nethuba lokuba nesipiliyoni socansi esijabulisayo nesiphephile, esingenalo ukucindezelwa, ukucwaswa kanye nodlame. Amandla abesilisa nabesifazane okuzuza impilo nenhlalakahle yocansi kuncike ekutheni: ukufinyelela olwazini oluphelele, lwekhwalithi enhle mayelana nocansi kanye nezocansi;
translations.hypothesis: Ubuzwelakwazi bezempilo yengqondo: Ubuzwelakwazi bezempilo yengqondo bunokubaluleka kakhulu empilweni kanye nokuziphatha kabusha kwabantu,abezihlobo kanye nemindeni, kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwezomthethosisekelo kanye nezezomnotho kwephulo kanye namazwe. Ukubhekana nobuzwelakwazi bezempilo yengqondo ngendlela enhle, kudinga indlela ekhuthazayo nenokuhlonipha mayelana nokuziphatha kanye nezibopho zengqondo, kanye nokwazi ukuba nezinhlobo zezimpilo zengqondo ezijabulisayo nezephephile, ngaphandle kokuqeqeshwa, ukuhlukunyezwa kanye nokulwa. Ukuthi abesilisa nabesifazane bakwazi ukufinyelela kubuzwelakwazi bezempilo yengqondo nokuziphatha kabusha kuxhomekile kulokhu: ukufinyelela kolwazi olunzulu, oluhle mayelana nokuziphatha kanye nokuziphatha kabusha;

translations.source: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:
translations.reference: ulwazi ngobungozi abangase babhekane nabo kanye nokuba sengozini kwabo emiphumeleni emibi yocansi olungavikelekile; ikhono lokuthola usizo lwezempilo lwezocansi; ukuhlala endaweni eqinisekisa futhi ekhuthaza impilo yezocansi. Izinkinga eziphathelene nempilo yocansi zibanzi, futhi zifaka phakathi ukukhetha ubulili kanye nobunikazi bobulili, ukuveza ucansi, ubudlelwano, kanye nenjabulo. Zihlanganisa nemiphumela engemihle noma izimo ezifana nalezi:
translations.hypothesis: ulwazi mayelana nezingozi abangaba nakho kanye nokuba yini okwenza bangase bangabi nomngudu uma bengazilindeleli ezimpilweni zabo zokuziphatha; ikhono lokufinyelela ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ezihlobene nokuziphatha; ukuhlala endaweni eqinisekisa futhi ethuthukisa impilo yezempilo. Izinkinga ezihlobene nezempilo zokuziphatha zibanengi, futhi zihlanganisa ukukhuthazwa kwezimpilo, ubudoda, ubuhlobo, kanye nokujabulela. Zifaka nazo imiphumela emibi noma izimo ezifana ne:

translations.source: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.reference: ukutheleleka ngegciwane lesandulela ngculazi (HIV), izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi (STIs) kanye nezifo zemigudu yokuzala (RTIs) kanye nemiphumela yazo emibi (njengomdlavuza nokungazali); ukukhulelwa nokukhipha isisu okungahlosiwe; ukungasebenzi kahle kocansi; udlame locansi; futhi imikhuba eyingozi (njengokucwiywa kwezitho zangasese zabesifazane, iFGM).
translations.hypothesis: izifo ezibangelwa yi-human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), izifo ezitholakala ngokuxhumana ngobudlelwane (STIs), kanye nezifo zezingubo zombili (RTIs) kanye nemiphumela emibi yazo (njenge-kansi kanye nokungakwazi ukuba nodaka); ukukhulelwa okungahleliwe kanye nokugaywa; izinkinga ezihlobene nobuhle; ubhondisi obuhlobene nobuhle; kanye nezindlela eziyingozi (njengokulimaza izinsilwane zasemakhosini, i-FGM).

translations.source: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.
translations.reference: Izincazelo: IWHO ibisebenza endaweni yezempilo yezocansi kusukela okungenani ku-1974, lapho izingxoxo zekomiti lochwepheshe zaphumela ekushicilelweni kombiko wezobuchwepheshe onesihloko esithi "Imfundo nokwelashwa ngobulili bomuntu" (WHO, 1975). Kusukela ngo-2000, iPan American Health Organization (PAHO) kanye neWHO bahlanganisa izingxoxo eziningi zochwepheshe ukuze kubuyekezwe amagama kanye nokuhlonza izinketho zezinhlelo. Isiphetho sale mihlangano kwaba Ukubonisana Kwezobuchwepheshe ngo-2002, lapho kwathuthukiswa khona izincazelo zokusebenza zamagama abalulekile ahlobene nempilo yezocansi ngezansi. Ubulili: Ubulili bubhekisela ezicini eziphilayo ezichaza abantu njengabesifazane noma abesilisa. Nakuba lawa maqoqo ezici zebhayoloji awahlukani, njengoba kunabantu abanakho kokubili, bavame ukuhlukanisa abantu njengabesilisa nabesifazane.
translations.hypothesis: Incazelo: I-WHO ibezisebenza kule ndawo yezempilo yangobuciko kusukela ngobunikazi ka-1974, lapho izinqubo zomkhankaso wekilasi labasebenzi ziholile ekushicilelweni kwengxenye yobuchwepheshe ethi "Ukufundisa nokwelashwa empilweni yangobuciko" (WHO, 1975). Kusukela ngo-2000, i-Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) kanye ne-WHO zibophezele imihlangano eminingi yabasebenzi ukuze kuhlolwe amagama kanye nokutholwa kwezindlela zohlelo. Umphumela wale mihlangano kwakuyinkenketho yobuchwepheshe ngo-2002, lapho kwakukhishwa khona izincazelo ezisetshenziswa kakhulu zamagama ezibaluleke kakhulu ezihlobene nezempilo yangobuciko ezikhonjiwe ngezansi. Ubuciko: Ubuciko bufundisa izici zombili ezichaza abantu njengabesifazane noma abafana. Nakuba lezi ziqoqo zezici zombili azihlukani ngokuphelele, njengoba kunabantu abanezinto ezombili, zihluke kakhulu abantu njengabafana nabesifazane.

translations.source: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Ekusetshenzisweni okujwayelekile ezilimini eziningi, igama elithi ucansi livamise ukusetshenziselwa ukusho “imisebenzi yocansi”, kodwa ngezinjongo zobuchwepheshe kumongo wezocansi kanye nezingxoxo zempilo yezocansi, incazelo engenhla iyakhethwa. Impilo yezocansi Ngokwencazelo yamanje yokusebenza, impilo yezocansi ithi:“…isimo senhlalakahle yomzimba, yemizwa, yengqondo nenhlalo maqondana nocansi; akukhona nje ukungabibikho kwezifo, ukungasebenzi noma ubuthakathaka. Impilo yezocansi idinga indlela eyakhayo nehloniphekile kwezocansi kanye nobudlelwano bocansi, kanye nethuba lokuba nesipiliyoni socansi esijabulisayo nesiphephile, esingenalo ukucindezelwa, ukucwaswa kanye nodlame. Ukuze impilo yezocansi izuzwe futhi igcinwe, amalungelo ocansi abo bonke abantu kufanele ahlonishwe, avikelwe futhi agcwaliseke.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis: Ngokuvamile, ezilimi eziningi, igama "sex" liyasetshenziswa ukuthi kusho "umsebenzi sex," kodwa ngenhloso yobuchwepheshe kumasu ezengxoxo mayelana nobuhle bendawo kanye nezempilo yendawo, leliqiniso elingenhla kuyona elithakazelekayo. Ubuhle bendawo. Ngokusho kwelinye lamahlelo okusebenza, ubuhle bendawo buwukuthi: "...isimo sempilo yomzimba, yengqondo, yomzwelo kanye nomphakathi mayelana bendawo; akuyona nje ukuthi akukhona ukugula, ukungasebenzi noma ukukhubazeka. Ubuhle bendawo kudinga indlela enhle nehloniphekile mayelana bendawo kanye nezibopho zendawo, kanye nokwazi ukuba nezinhlelo zendawo ezijabulisayo nezephephile, ngaphandle kokuqeqeshwa, ukuhlukunyezwa kanye nokuhlaselwa. Ukuze kubuyiswe futhi kugcinwe ubuhle bendawo, amalungelo bendawo wonke umuntu kufanele ahlonishwe, avikelwe futhi agcwaliswe." (WHO, 2006a)

translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Ezocansi: Impilo yocansi ayinakuchazwa, iqondwe noma yenziwe ukuthi isebenze ngaphandle kokucatshangelwa okubanzi ngocansi, okuyisisekelo sokuziphatha okubalulekile nemiphumela ehlobene nempilo yocansi. Incazelo esebenzayo yocansi ithi:“…isici esiyinhloko sokuba umuntu kukho konke ukuphila okuhlanganisa ubulili, ukuhlonza ubulili kanye nezindima, ukukhetha ubulili, inkanuko, injabulo, ukusondelana nokuzala. Ubulili bubonakala futhi buvezwa ngemicabango, amaphupho, izifiso, izinkolelo, izimo zengqondo, izindinganiso, ukuziphatha, imikhuba, indima kanye nobudlelwane. Nakuba ubulili bungabandakanya zonke lezi zilinganiso, akuzona zonke ezihlala zinolwazi noma zivezwa. Ubulili buthonywa ukuxhumana kwezinto eziphilayo, ezengqondo, ezenhlalo, ezomnotho, ezombusazwe, ezamasiko, ezomthetho, ezomlando, ezenkolo nezingokomoya.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis: Ukukhulelwa: Impilo yobudlelwano bentuthuko ayikwazi ukuchazwa, ukuhlonzwane noma ukusetshenziswa ngaphandle kokubheka okubanzi ukukhulelwa, okuyinto esemthethweni yobudlelwano bentuthuko. Ubuchule obusebenzayo mayelana nokukhulelwa buwukuthi: "...ingxenye ebalulekile yokuphila komuntu yonke impilo, ehlanganisa ubudlelwano bentuthuko, ukuhlonza ngobudlelwano, izindlela zokukhulelwa, ukuthanda, injabulo, ukuxhumana kanye nokuzalwa. Ukukhulelwa kuhlanganiswa nezimiso, iziphoze, izifiso, imibono, imibono, amanani, izindlela, ezindlela, izindima kanye nezibopho. Nakuba ukukhulelwa kungafaka zonke lezi zici, hhayi zonke zazo ezihlanganisiwe njalo noma zikhombiswe. Ukukhulelwa kuthonywe ukuhlangana kwezinto ezibalulekile, ezifana nezinto eziyizibonelo, ezengqondo, ezomphakathi, ezomnotho, ezombusho, ezamasiko, ezomthetho, ezomlando, ezomdabu kanye nezinto ezinkolo." (WHO, 2006a)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.reference: Amalungelo ezocansi: Kukhona ukuvumelana okukhulayo kokuthi impilo yezocansi ngeke izuzwe futhi igcinwe ngaphandle kokuhlonipha, nokuvikelwa, kwamalungelo abantu athile. Incazelo yokusebenza yamalungelo ocansi enikezwe ngezansi ingumnikelo engxoxweni eqhubekayo ngamalungelo abantu ahlobene nempilo yezocansi. Ukusetshenziswa kwamalungelo abantu akhona kwezocansi kanye nempilo yezocansi ahlanganisa amalungelo ocansi. Amalungelo ocansi avikela wonke amalungelo abantu okufeza nokuveza ubulili babo futhi bajabulele impilo yezocansi, ngokuhlonishwa okufanele kwamalungelo abanye futhi ngaphakathi kohlaka lokuvikela ukucwaswa." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“Ukugcwaliseka kwempilo yezocansi kuboshelwe ezingeni amalungelo abantu ahlonitshwa ngalo, avikelwe futhi agcwaliseke ngalo.
translations.hypothesis: Izimpahla zombili: Kukhona ukubambisana okukhulayo ukuthi impilo yombili ayikwazi ukufinyelelwa noma ukugcinwa ngaphandle kokuhlonipha nokuvikelwa kwamanye amalungelo abantu. Incazelo esebenziswayo yezimpahla zombili, ebonisiwe ngezansi, iyisikhuthazo ekuxoxeni oluqhubekayo mayelana namalungelo abantu ahlobene nempilo yombili. Ukusetshenziswa kwamalungelo abantu akhona ezindlini zombili kanye nempilo yombili kubanga izimpahla zombili. Izimpahla zombili zivikela amalungelo wonke umuntu ukuthi angene kanye nokwazisa ubuhlobo bakhe, futhi ujabulele impilo yombili, kuhlosiwe amalungelo omunye umuntu, futhi ngaphakathi kwesikhungo sokuvikelwa ekuhlukumezini." (WHO, 2006a, ibuyekeziwe ngo-2010) "Ukufinyelelwa kwempilo yombili kuhlobene nomlingo owenziwa ngamalungelo abantu, okuhlosiwe, okuvikelwe, futhi okufinyelelwe.

translations.source: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination
translations.reference: Amalungelo ocansi ahlanganisa amalungelo athile abantu asevele aqashelwa emibhalweni yamazwe ngamazwe neyesifunda yamalungelo abantu kanye neminye imibhalo yokuvumelana nasemithethweni kazwelonke. Amalungelo abalulekile ekufezekisweni kwempilo yezocansi ahlanganisa: Amalungelo abalulekile ekufezekisweni kwempilo yezocansi ahlanganisa: Amalungelo abalulekile ekufezekisweni kwempilo yezocansi ahlanganisa: amalungelo okulingana nokungabandlululi
translations.hypothesis: Amalungelo ezihlobene nobuhle obucindezelwe zifaka ezinye izinto ezibalulekile zamafa ezivele ziqashelwe ezincutshebenzisweni zamazwe ngamazwe kanye nezifunda mayelana namalungelo abantu, kanye nezinye izincutshebenziswa ezivumelaniswe kuzo, kanye emthethweni kazwelonke. Amalungelo abalulekile ekufinyeleleni ebangeni lobuhle obucindezelwe afaka: amalungelo obulungiswa kanye nokungahlukaniswa.

translations.source: the right to be free from torture or to cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment the right to privacy the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage with the free and full consent of the intending spouses, and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children
translations.reference: ilungelo lokukhululeka ekuhlushweni noma ekuphathweni ngendlela enonya, engenabuntu noma eyehlisa isithunzi ilungelo lobumfihlo amalungelo ezingeni eliphezulu lezempilo elifinyelelekayo (kuhlanganise nempilo yezocansi) kanye nokuphepha komphakathi ilungelo lokushada nokusungula umndeni nokungena emshadweni ngemvume ekhululekile negcwele yalabo abafuna umshado, kanye nokulingana emshadweni nasekuhlakazweni. ilungelo lokunquma inombolo kanye nesikhala sezingane zomuntu
translations.hypothesis: ilungelo lokuhlala ngaphandle kokugwetshwa noma ukwelashwa ngendlela engcolile, engcono, noma edonsakalayo, kanye nokuhlehliswa ngendlela engcolile; ilungelo lokuhlala ngobumfihlo; amalungelo okuphila ngendlela enhle kakhulu ngempilo (okubalwa nakho impilo yobudlelwane) kanye nokunakekelwa komphakathi; ilungelo lokushada nokwakha umndeni, kanye nokushada ngemvumo okhululekile futhi ophelele wabo bobabili abashadile, kanye nokulinganiselwa ngaphakathi nomshado kanye nangesikhathi kuhlaliswa komshado; ilungelo lokunquma inani kanye nokuhlukaniswa kwabantwana.

translations.source: the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: “Human rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.” (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.reference: amalungelo olwazi, kanye nemfundo amalungelo enkululeko yokubeka imibono neyokuveza, kanye ilungelo lokuthola ikhambi elisebenzayo lokwephulwa kwamalungelo ayisisekelo. Ukusebenzisa amalungelo abantu ngendlela efanele kudinga ukuthi bonke abantu bahloniphe amalungelo abanye. Izinkinga: "Amalungelo abantu ahlinzeka ngohlaka lwezomthetho lwamazwe ngamazwe lapho izidingo zempilo yezocansi nokuzala kanye nezifiso zabo bonke abantu kungacatshangelwa khona." (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.hypothesis: amalungelo olwazi, kanye nemfundo; amalungelo wokukhuluma nokwazisa imibono, kanye nelungelo lokuthola usizo olusebenzayo uma amalungelo ayisisekelo alulamiwe. Ukusebenzisa kahle amalungelo abantu kudinga ukuthi wonke umuntu ahloniphe amalungelo abanye. Izindaba: "Amalungelo abantu nika ndlela yomthetho kazwelonke ngaphakathi kwakho okungenzeka ukucatshangelwa kuzo izidingo kanye nezifiso zezempilo yobudlova kanye nokuzalwa zabantu bonke." (GRUSKIN, 2005)

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.reference: Eminyakeni yamuva nje, amathuluzi wamazwe ngamazwe wamalungelo abantu abelokhu esetshenziswa kakhulu ukweseka nokuthuthukisa izimangalo zomthetho zabantu ngabanye kanye nemiphakathi yonke ukuze ohulumeni bezwe bazoqinisekisa ukuhlonishwa, ukuvikelwa kanye nokugcwaliseka kwamalungelo abo ezempilo zocansi nokuzala (Cook et al., 2003) . Izincazelo ezisebenzayo kanye nohlaka lwezinhlelo olwethulwa lapha lusekelwe emalungelweni abantu aqashelwa umhlaba wonke futhi lunikeza indlela esekelwe kumalungelo ekuhlelweni kwezempilo yezocansi. Izakhi zomqondo ezibalulekile zempilo yezocansi zibalwe ngezansi. Izakhi zomqondo ezibalulekile zempilo yezocansi Uma kubukwa ngokuphelele futhi kahle:
translations.hypothesis: Nengozi yamuva, izimiso zamazwe ngamazwe mayelana namalungelo abantu zisetshenziswa kakhulu ukuvuselela futhi kukhuliswe izicelo ezinkolo zabantu ngabanye kanye namphakathi yonke, ukuze izikhumulo zombuso zaziqinisekise ukuhlonishwa, ukukhutshwa kanye nokugcotshwa kwamalungelo abo ezempilo yangasese kanye nokuzalwa (Cook nobanethi, 2003). Izincazelo ezisebenzayo kanye nohlelo lokusebenza olubonisiwe lapha kususelwe ezimisele ezaziwa ngamazwe ngamazwe mayelana namalungelo abantu, futhi kunikeza indlela esekelwe kumalungelo yokusebenza ezempilweni yangasese. Izinto ezibalulekile zengqondo mayelana nezempilo yangasese zibalwe ngezansi. Izinto ezibalulekile zengqondo mayelana nezempilo yangasese Uma kubukwa ngokuphelele nangendlela enhle:

translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.reference: Impilo yocansi imayelana nokuphila kahle, hhayi nje ukungabibikho kwezifo. Impilo yocansi ibandakanya inhlonipho, ukuphepha kanye nokukhululeka ekubandlululweni nasentumeni. Impilo yezocansi incike ekugcwalisekeni kwamalungelo abantu athile. Impilo yezocansi ibalulekile kuyo yonke impilo yomuntu, hhayi kuphela kulabo abaseminyakeni yokuzala, kodwa nakubo bobabili abasha nasebekhulile. Impilo yezocansi ivezwa ngocansi oluhlukene kanye nezindlela zokukhuluma ngocansi.
translations.hypothesis: Impilo yobudlelwano ayihlobene kuphela nokuthi umuntu ungakhululeki ezifo, kodwa futhi ihlobene nokuba nokuziphatha kahle. Impilo yobudlelwano ifaka ukuhlonipha, ukuphepha, kanye nokukhululeka ekuhlukumezini nasebulimini. Impilo yobudlelwano idinga ukuthi amalungelo abantu athuthukiswe. Impilo yobudlelwano ibalulekile kuwo wonke ubudlelwane bomuntu, hhayi kuphela kulabo abasebudlezweni bokuzala, kodwa futhi kubo bobabili abasha kanye labo abadala. Impilo yobudlelwano ibonakala ngezindlela ezihlukahlukene zobudlelwano kanye nezindlela ezihlukahlukene zokubonisa ubudlelwano.

translations.source: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.reference: Impilo yezocansi ithonywa kakhulu yimikhuba yobulili, izindima, okulindelekile kanye nokuguquguquka kwamandla. Impilo yezocansi idinga ukuqondwa ngaphakathi kwezimo ezithile zezenhlalo, ezomnotho nezepolitiki.
translations.hypothesis: Impilo yobudlelwano yezempilo yobunjalo kuthonywa kakhulu yiinqubo yobudlelwano, izindima, okulindelekile kanye namandla. Impilo yobudlelwano kufanele yaqondwa ngaphakathi kwezimo ezithile zomphakathi, ezomnotho kanye nezombusazwe.

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi (STIs) Uhlolojikelele: Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi (STIs) zisakazwa kakhulu ngokuthintana nocansi olungavikelekile. Ezinye izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi zingatheleleka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, ukubeletha nokuncelisa kanye nangegazi elinegciwane noma imikhiqizo yegazi. Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi zinomthelela omkhulu empilweni. Uma zingelashwa, zingaholela emiphumeleni emibi kakhulu ehlanganisa isifo sezinzwa nenhliziyo, ukungazali, ukukhulelwa kwe-ectopic, ukuzala umntwana oshonile, kanye nokwanda kwengozi yesifo sengculazi iHuman Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.hypothesis: Izifo ezitholakala ngokuxhumana (STIs): Izifo ezitholakala ngokuxhumana (STIs) zikhishwa kakhulu ngokuxhumana ngaphandle kwesivikelo. Ezinye izifo ezitholakala ngokuxhumana zingaphinde zitholakale ngesikhathi kukaMama, ekuzalweni kanye nokudlulisela ngobisi, kanye ngobuso noma imikhiqizo yobuso egunyaziwe. Izifo ezitholakala ngokuxhumana zinezimpembelelo ezinkulu empilweni. Uma zingalungiswa, zingaholela ezinkingeni ezinkulu, okubalwa kuzo izifo zengqondo kanye nezifo zenhliziyo, ukungakwazi ukuba nodaka, ukukhulelwa okungavamile, ukufa kwengane ezalweni, kanye nokukhuliswa kwengozi ye-Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Zibuye zihlotshaniswe nokucwaswa, udlame lwasekhaya, futhi kuthinta izinga lempilo. Iningi lamaSTI alinazo izimpawu. Uma bekhona izimpawu ezivamile zezifo ezithathelwana ngocansi ukuphuma komchamo esithweni sangasese sangasese noma urethra, isilonda esithweni sangasese kanye nobuhlungu obungezansi besisu. Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi ezijwayeleke kakhulu futhi ezelaphekayo yitrichomonas, ichlamydia, igonorrhea kanye nesyphilis. Ukwanda ngokushesha kokumelana nama-antimicrobial kuwusongo olukhulayo lwegonorrhoea engelapheki.
translations.hypothesis: Nazo zifakazelwe nokukhishwa kwenguquko yomuntu, ukuhlushwa kwezindlu kanye nomthelela emqondweni wempilo. Iningi yezifo ezisondzwayo azinalutho olubonakalayo. Uma ezikhona, izimpawu ezivamile zezifo ezisondzwayo zifaka ukukhishwa kwe-vaginal noma kwe-urethra, izilonda ezindaweni zokuziphatha kanye nobunyembezi obunzima ehlombe eliphansi. Izifo ezisondzwayo ezivamile nezilindelekile ukwelashwa yi-trichomonas, i-chlamydia, i-gonorrhoea kanye ne-syphilis. Ukukhula okusheshayo kwe-antibiotic resistance kubanga ingozi enkulu kwi-gonorrhoea engalindelekile ukwelashwa.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi ezihlanganisa iHIV, igenital herpes simplex virus (HSV), iviral hepatitis B, ihuman papillomavirus (HPV) kanye neHuman T-lymphotropic Virus hlobo 1 (HTLV-1) azikho noma zinezinketho zokwelashwa ezilinganiselwe. Imishanguzo yokugoma iHepatitis B iyatholakala ukuze kuvinjwe izifo ezingaholela emdlavuzeni wesibindi kanye neHPV ukuvikela umdlavuza womlomo wesibeletho. IHIV, iHSV kanye neHTLV-1 izifo zempilo yonke: kuHIV neHSV kunemithi yokwelapha engacindezela igciwane, kodwa okwamanje awekho amakhambi kunoma iyiphi yalezi zifo zocansi ezibangelwa amagciwane. Amakhondomu asetshenziswa ngendlela efanele futhi engashintshi ayizindlela ezisebenzayo zokuvikela izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi neHIV. Ukuhlolwa ngokuhlonza kusenesikhathi kwabantu abanezifo ezithathelana ngokocansi kanye nabalingani babo bocansi kunikeza ithuba elingcono kakhulu lokwelashwa okusebenzayo kanye nokuvimbela izinkinga kanye nokutheleleka okuqhubekayo.
translations.hypothesis: Izifo ezisabalalayo ezihlobene nobudlova, ezifana ne-HIV, i-genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), i-viral hepatitis B, i-human papillomavirus (HPV) kanye ne-human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1), ayinazo noma zinezindlela ezimbalwa zokwelashwa. Kukhona izivakashi zokuqapha i-hepatitis B ukuvimbela ukutolwa okungaholela kwe-cancer yenhliziyo, kanye ne-HPV ukuvimbela i-cancer yomlomo. I-HIV, i-HSV kanye ne-HTLV-1 ziyizifo ezihlala phakade: kwe-HIV kanye ne-HSV, kukhona ukwelashwa okungaphazamisa ukusasazeka kwevirus, kodwa okwamanje, akukho ukwelashwa okuyisixazululo kunoma yiziphi lezi zifo ezisabalalayo ezihlobene nobudlova. Amakhaphesi asetshenziswa ngendlela efanele futhi njalo ayindlela efanele yokuvikela ezifweni ezisabalalayo kanye ne-HIV. Ukuhlola nokuqinisekisa ngokushesha abantu abanezifo ezisabalalayo ezihlobene nobudlova kanye nabalingani babo bezimpilo kunikeza ithuba elihle kakhulu kokwelashwa ngempumelelo kanye nokuvimbela izinkinga nokusasazeka okwengeziwe.

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Izimpawu: Umuntu angaba neSTI ngaphandle kokuba nezimpawu ezisobala zesifo. Uma zikhona, izimpawu ezivamile zeSTI zihlanganisa: ukuphuma okungavamile kwesitho sangasese sowesifazane, ukuphuma komchamo, izilonda ezithweni zangasese nezigaxa, nobuhlungu obungezansi besisu. Izimpawu zezifo ezithathelana ngokocansi ezithile yilezi: Igonorrhea kanye nokutheleleka kwechlamydial Lezi zifo ezithathelwana ngocansi zibanga icervicitis kwabesifazane, i-urethritis emadodeni kanye nezifo ezithathelwanayo, okuhlanganisa ukubonakaliswa kwerectal kanye ne-oropharyngeal.
translations.hypothesis: Izimpawu: Umuntu angase ube nesifo esithathelwayo (STI) ngaphandle kokuba nezimpawu ezibonakalayo zesifo. Uma zikhona, izimpawu ezivamile zesifo esithathelwayo zifaka: ukukhishwa kwe-vaginal okungajwayelekile, ukukhishwa kwe-urethra, amagciwane nezinto ezicibilisi ezindaweni zombili, kanye nobunyembezi obunzima ehlombe eliphansi. Izimpawu zezifo ezithathelwayo ezithile zifaka: i-Gonorrhoea kanye nokutshiswa yi-chlamydia. Lezi zifo ezithathelwayo zibangela ukutshiswa kwegciwane emkhakheni kazimele (cervicitis) kwabesifazane, ukutshiswa kwegciwane emkhakheni wokuhlola (urethritis) kwabantu, kanye nezifo eziningi ezindaweni ngaphandle yezokwakheka, okuhlanganisa nezimpawu ezibalweni kanye nezilunga zengqikithi.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Izimpawu ezijwayelekile zihlanganisa ukuphuma kwesitho sangasese sowesifazane noma somthondo kanye nokushiswa ukuchama. Izinsana zomama abangenwe yilesi sifo zingangenwa yineonatal conjunctivitis (amehlo abomvu) ngenxa yokuchayeka kumaSTI ngesikhathi sokubeletha. Ukutheleleka kwerectal kanye nepharyngeal kungase kube i-asymptomatic. ISyphilis: isyphilis ngokuvamile ayinazimpawu, lapho izimpawu zenzeka, isyphilis eyinhloko iveza njengesilonda sodwa, esingenabuhlungu. Isyphilis yesibili ingase ibonakale njengezilonda ezivamile ezithinta isikhumba, ulwelwesi lwamafinyila kanye nelymph node kuhlanganise nokuqubuka kwakudala ezintendeni zezandla nasematheni ezinyawo.
translations.hypothesis: Izimpawu ezivamile zifaka ukukhishwa kwe-discharge emgodini noma emlungwini, kanye nokudabuka ngesikhathi kokuphuza. Amantombazane azalwe ngomama abagulile angathola ukugula kwamehlo (amehlo amabomvu) ngenxa yokutshelwa yi-STIs ngesikhathi kokuzalwa ngomgodi. Ukugula kwe-rectum kanye nomlomo kungaba ngaphandle kwezimpawu. I-Syphilis: I-Syphilis ivamise ukungabi nezimpawu, kodwa uma ezikhona, i-syphilis eqalayo ibonakala njengomgodi omude, ongenalutho. I-syphilis yesibili ingabonakala njengezimpawu ezikhudlwana ezithinta isikhumba, izimbobo zangaphakathi nomdlavuza, okuhlanganisa ukugqama okujwayelekile ezandleni nasezinyaweni.

translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: ILatent syphilis ayinazimpawu futhi ibonakala ngeserology eqondile yesyphilis. ITrichomoniasis: Izimpawu ezivame kakhulu zihlanganisa ukuphuma okungavamile kwesitho sangasese sowesifazane esibomvu, ukulunywa kanye nokuya ocansini okubuhlungu. IGenital herpes simplex virus (HSV) IHSV ivame ukuvela njengezilonda ezibuhlungu, ama-vesicles noma izilonda ezithweni zangasese zangaphandle nasemlonyeni. iHSV yeSymptomatic Genital yisimo sempilo yonke esingabonakala ngokuphindaphinda kwezimpawu.
translations.hypothesis: I-syphilis ekhululekile ayibonisi izimpawu futhi ibonakala ngokuthi ukuhlolwa kwe-syphilis kubonise ukuthi umuntu ugugile. I-Trichomoniasis: Izimpawu ezivamile zihlanganisa ukugqoka okungavamile kwe-vaginal, ukuba nokuba red i-vulva, ukudida kanye nokuxineka ngesikhathi kuxhumane. I-genital herpes simplex virus (HSV): I-HSV ivamise ukubonakala njengezifo ezibuhlungu, amabala amancane noma izifo ezilimele ezisendaweni yangaphandle yezinsilwane zombili kanye nomuthi. I-HSV engempawu yindlela yobungo kanye engenziwa njalo, futhi ingabonakala ngezimpawu ezivela njalo.

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: IHuman T-lymphotropic Virus uhlobo 1 (HTLV-1) Ngokujwayelekile i-asymptomatic, uhlobo olungapheli lwe-HTLV-1 lungabangela isifo esinzima, okuhlanganisa iT-cell leukemia/lymphoma (ATL) yabantu abadala kanye nesimo sesimiso sezinzwa esiqhubekayo esaziwa ngokuthi iHTLV-1-associated myelopathy noma itropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Ukwelashwa: Ukwelashwa okusebenzayo okwamanje kuyatholakala kuma-STI ambalwa. Izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi ezintathu zebhaktheriya (ichlamydia, igonorrhea kanye nogcunsula) kanye neSTI eyodwa eyisinambuzane (itrichomoniasis) ngokuvamile ziyelapheka ngemithi ekhona, esebenzayo yomthamo owodwa noma yomthamo omningi wemithi elwa namagciwane. Ngezifo ezithathelwana ngocansi ezibangelwa amagciwane (HIV, HSV kanye ne-HTLV-1), imithi ephumelela kakhulu etholakalayo yimithi elwa namagciwane noma i-anti-cancer (esimeni se-HTLV-1), engakwazi ukulawula ukuhamba kwezifo, nakuba ingakwazi ukwelapha lezi zintathu. izifo.
translations.hypothesis: I-virus yezifo zombili ethiwa yi-HTLV-1 (Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1) ngokuvamile ayibonisi izimpawu, kodwa ingxenye edlule kakhulu ye-HTLV-1 ingadala izifo ezinkulu, okubalwa kuzo i-leukaemia/lymphoma yamaseli adala (ATL) kanye nesimo esithuthukayo senhliziyo esibizwa nge-HTLV-1-associated myelopathy noma i-tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Ukwelashwa: Kukhona ukwelashwa okunamandla okutholakala ezimweni eziningi zokudlula kwezifo. Izifo ezintathu ezidlalelwa ngamabhakthiriya (i-chlamydia, i-gonorrhoea kanye ne-syphilis) kanye nesifo esisodwa esidlalelwa ngamaparasitha (i-trichomoniasis) ngokuvamile kuhlaliswa ngamakhambi athile, ngamakhambi amaningi, atholakalayo. Kwezifo ezidlaliswa ngama-virus (i-HIV, i-HSV kanye ne-HTLV-1), imithi etholakala engcono kakhulu yi-antivirals noma imithi yokulwa nokugula (ngamacala e-HTLV-1), engashintsha ukuhamba kwezifo, nakuba ayikwazi ukulalisisa lezi zifo ezintathu.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ukumelana nemithi elwa namagciwane i-Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) kuma-antibiotics asetshenziselwa ukwelapha izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi, ikakhulukazi i-gonorrhoea, kukhule ngokushesha eminyakeni yamuva futhi kwehlise imiphumela yokwelapha eyimpumelelo. Imiphumela evela ohlelweni lwamanje lweGonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) ikhombisa izitayela zamazinga aphezulu okumelana nequinolone, okwandayo ukumelana ne-azithromycin kanye nokuvela kokumelana kwe-extended-spectrum cephalosporins.
