Ukuvela kokuncishiswa kokungenwa yigonorrhea kumacephalosporins anwetshiwe, kanye namazinga aphezulu okumelana namapenicillin, amasulfonamides, amatetracyclines, amaquinolones namamacrolides kwenza igonorrhea ibe isidalwa esimelana nezidakamizwa eziningi. I-AMR yezinye izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi, nakuba ingajwayelekile kangako, iphinde ibe khona, okwenza ukuvimbela nokwelashwa ngokushesha kube bucayi. Ukuze welaphe ngokwanele izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi kubalulekile ukuphuza ama-antimicrobial afanelekile, nesilinganiso esifanele kanye nesikhathi seSTI ethize ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukwelashwa okwanele noma ukwelashwa, kanye nokuvimbela ukukhula kokungazweli kwamagciwane.
translations.hypothesis: Ukumelana kwamakhambi (AMR) amakhambi asebenziswayo ekwelashweni kwezifo ezithathelwanayo, ikakhulukazi i-gonorrhoea, kukhulile ngokushesha eminyakeni yamuva futhi kunciphise imiphumela yokwelashwa engcono. Imiphumela ohlelweni lwamanje lwe-Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) ibonisa ukuthi kukhona izinga eliphezulu lokumelana kwamakhambi e-quinolone, ukukhula kokumelana kwamakhambi e-azithromycin, kanye nokuvameka kokumelana kwamakhambi e-extended-spectrum cephalosporins. Ukwanda kokumelana kwe-gonorrhoea kwamakhambi e-extended-spectrum cephalosporins, kanye nezinto ezazi kakade zokuthi kukhona izinga eliphezulu lokumelana kwamakhambi kwamapensilini, ama-sulphonamides, ama-tetracyclines, ama-quinolones kanye nama-macrolides, kwenza i-gonorrhoea ibe yinto engamelana namakhambi amaningi. Ukumelana kwamakhambi kwezinye izifo ezithathelwanayo, nakuba kungavamile, kukhona futhi, ngakho-ke ukwazisa kanye nokwelashwa ngokushesha kubalulekile. Ukwelashwa kahle kwezifo ezithathelwanayo, kubalulekile ukuthatha amakhambi afanele, ngedosi elungile kanye nesikhathi esifanele, ngokuya ngohlobo lwesifo esithathelwanayo, ukuqinisekisa ukwelashwa noma ukululama okwanele, kanye nokuvimbela ukwanda kokumelana kwamakhambi.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Ingxibongo Uhlolojikelele: Ingxibongo yisifo esithathelwanayo esibangelwa igciwane levariola, ilungu lomndeni we-orthopoxvirus. Kwakungesinye sezifo ezibhubhisa kakhulu ezaziwayo isintu futhi sabangela ukufa kwezigidi ngaphambi kokuba siqedwe. Kukholakala ukuthi ikhona okungenani iminyaka engu-3000. Umuthi wokugomela ingxibongo, owasungulwa ngu-Edward Jenner ngo-1796, wawuwumgomo wokuqala oyimpumelelo ukwenziwa.
translations.hypothesis: Incazelo ye-Smallpox: I-Smallpox yigciwane elithile elisabalalayo elibangelwa yi-virus eyayizwa ngokuthi i-variola, eyisikhungo somndeni we-orthopoxvirus. Kwakuyingxenye yezifo ezimbi kakhulu ezaziwa ngabantu futhi ibangele ukufa kwamiliyoni ngaphambi kokuthi yaphothwa. Kucatshangwa ukuthi ibilapho okungenani iminyaka eyi-3000. Igisi le-smallpox, eyakhiwa ngu-Edward Jenner ngonyaka ka-1796, yayingugisi lokuqala olwaphumelela ukudluliselwa.

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Ubone ukuthi obisi abake babamba umkhuhlane wenkomo abazange babambe ingxibongo futhi wabonisa ukuthi ukujova okufanayo kungasetshenziswa ukuvimbela ingxibongo kwabanye abantu. IWorld Health Organization yethula uhlelo oluqinile lokuqeda ingxibongo ngo-1967. Ukugonywa okusabalele kanye nokugadwa kwenziwa emhlabeni wonke iminyaka eminingana. Icala lemvelo lokugcina elaziwayo laliseSomalia ngo-1977. Ngo-1980 iWHO yamemezela ukuthi ingxibongo isiqediwe - ukuphela kwesifo esithathelwanayo ukufeza lo mehluko.
translations.hypothesis: Ubonile ukuthi abasematshini abaye ngaphambilini bathintekwa yintukutana yamasuka abangawohlwa yintukutana yamasipuni, futhi wakhombisa ukuthi ukufakelwa okufanayo kungasetshenziswa ukuvimbela intukutana yamasipuni kubantu abanye. Uhlelo lweHhovisi Lomhlaba Lempilo (WHO) lwasungula uhlelo olukhulu lokususa intukutana yamasipuni ngo-1967. Ukugaywa kanye nokugadwa kwenziwa kulo lonke elasekuphileni iminyaka eminingi. Icala elokugcina elaziwa eliwomile kwakuyi-Somalia ngonyaka ka-1977. Ngo-1980, i-WHO yasho ukuthi intukutana yamasipuni isusiwe – ngobubhada obuyiwo kuphela obugcine lolu hlonipho.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Lokhu kuhlala kuphakathi kwempumelelo yezempilo yomphakathi ephawuleka kakhulu futhi ejulile emlandweni. Izimpawu: Izimpawu zokuqala zengxibongo zihlanganisa ukushisa okukhulu, ukukhathala nobuhlungu obukhulu emhlane, futhi kancane kancane, ubuhlungu besisu nokuhlanza. Ezinsukwini ezimbili kuya kwezingu-3 kamuva igciwane likhiqiza ukuqubuka kwesici esinamaqhuqhuva agcwele uketshezi olucacile, kamuva olugcwala ubomvu futhi ekugcineni lube noqweqwe oluyoma luwe. Ukuqubuka kuqala ebusweni nasezandleni, bese kudlulela kuwo wonke umzimba. Izilonda ziyakhula kulwelwesi lwamafinyila ekhaleni nasemlonyeni futhi zibe nesilonda ngokushesha ngemva kokwakheka.
translations.hypothesis: Lokhu kuyisakhumbuzo esikhulu kakhulu kanye nomphumela omkhulu kakhulu kwezempilo yomphakathi emlandweni. Izimpawu: Izimpawu zokuqala zalesi sifo zifaka ukushisa okukhulu, ukukhathazeka kanye nobunyembezi obunzulu, futhi ngamanye amasimo, ubuhlungu behlombe kanye nokugula. Ngemuva kwamahora amabili kuya kwezintathu, igciwane lidala ukugqama okuhlukile okunesigaxa esigcwele uketshezi olucace, okuthi kamuva ligcwele uketshezi futhi ekugcineni kudalwe isikhumba esomileyo esilayishi. Ukugqama kuqala ebusweni nasezandleni, bese kuthuthwa emzimbeni wonke. Izifo zithuthuka ezindaweni ezinezimbobo zomsipha zomenzi kanye nomu, futhi zidlala ngokushesha ngemuva kokwakhiwa.

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ingxibongo isakazwa isuka kumuntu iye komunye ngamaconsi athelelekayo lapho usondelana nabantu abanalesi sifo abanezimpawu zalesi sifo, noma kwezinye izimo ngezingubo ezingcolile kanye nezingubo zokulala. Inesikhathi sokufukamela esiyizinsuku eziyisi-7-17 ngemuva kokuchayeka futhi ithathelwana kuphela uma umkhuhlane uqala. Abantu bahlala bethelelana kuze kuqhume utwayi lokugcina. Ingxibongo yabulala abantu abangafika ku-30%.Ikhadi lokuqaphela ingxibongo yeWHO Impendulo yeWHO: Isikhathi kusukela ekuqothulweni sichazwe yinkulumompikiswano ende neyinkimbinkimbi egxile ekubhujisweni kwesitoko sokugcina esisele segciwane le-variola eliphilayo.
translations.hypothesis: I-smallpox idluliselwa kusuka komuntu kuphinde kumunye ngokusetshenziswa kwezicubu ezithile ezitholakala emzimbeni ngesikhathi umuntu esondelene nabantu abagulwe ngalesi sifo, noma ngamanye amathuba ngempahla egulwe kanye nezintambo. Inesikhathi sokuhlaziywa esingu-7 kuya ku-17 izinsuku ngemuva kokutshengwa, futhi umuntu uyaba yigugu kuphela uma ethola ubushwa. Abantu bayasihleleka kuze kube yilapho zonke izikhumba ziba zilahlekile. I-smallpox yayiyingozi kuye kwaba ngu-30% yezimo. Ikhati yokuqashelwa kwe-smallpox ye-WHO: Impendulo ye-WHO: Isikhathi esidlule ukususwa kwalesi sifo sikhonjiswe yingxoxo ende futhi eyinkimbinkimbi egxile ekulahleni kwezikhathi zokugcina zevirusi yevariola ebukhoma.

translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: Ngo-1996, eMhlanganweni Wezempilo Womhlaba wama-49, Amazwe Angamalungu anquma ukuthi lesi sitoko sicekelwe phansi ngo-June 1999, futhi kuphela ukuvumela amasampula amancane ukuba agcinwe ngenjongo yocwaningo kumalabhorethri amabili aqokiwe avikelekile - eyodwa e-United States kanye neyodwa eRussia. Inhlangano. Ukugcinwa kwesikhashana kwezitokwe ezikhona zegciwane le-variola kusetshenziselwa ucwaningo olwengeziwe olubalulekile, oluqondiswe yiKomidi Lokweluleka le-Variola Virus Research. Leli qembu lihlangana njalo ngonyaka. IHhovisi likaNobhala Wengxibongo yeWHO elizinze ekomkhulu leWHO liqondisa yonke imisebenzi ehlobene nokuqeda ingxibongo kanye nangemuva kokuqeda. Lokhu kufaka phakathi ukwengamela ucwaningo oluvunyelwe ngegciwane le-variola eliphilayo ukuze kuthuthukiswe izindlela eziphikisayo ezifana nomuthi wokugoma nezidambisigciwane.
translations.hypothesis: Ngo-1996, kwi-mhlangano yengu-49 ye-World Health Assembly, izizwe ezilunga senze isinqumo sokuthi leli zikhwama kufanele liqhutshwe ngonyanga kaJuni ka-1999, futhi kuphela amasamphula amancane agcinwe ukuze asetshenziswe ocwaningweni ezilabhorethri ezimbili ezikhethiwe nezikhunjulwe – eyodwa e-United States kanye nelinye e-Russian Federation. Ukugcinwa kwesikhathi esifushane sezikhwama ezikhona ze-variola virus kusetshenziselwa ucwaningo olubalulekile olwengeziwe, olubhekwa yiKomidi Eloleka Mayelana Nocwaningo lwe-Variola Virus. Leli qembu ihlangana ngonyaka ngamunye. I-WHO Smallpox Secretariat, egxile kwi-WHO Headquarters, ilawula yonke imisebenzi ehlobene nokususwa kwe-smallpox kanye nemisebenzi yangemuva kokususwa. Lokhu kufaka ukulawulwa kocwaningo oluvunyelwe olusebenzisa i-variola virus ebukhoma ukuze kuthuthukiswe izindlela zokwelapha, njengezivini kanye nezinto ezilwa nama-virus.

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:
translations.reference: Kusukela esikhathini sokuqedwa, imithi yokugoma ephephile kanye nokwelashwa okuqondile kuye kwathuthukiswa ingxibongo nezifo ezihlobene nazo ezifana nenkawu. Ihhovisi likaNobhala nalo linesibopho sokulungela izimo eziphuthumayo futhi lilawula inqwaba yezimo eziphuthumayo zomuthi wokugomela ingxibongo esimweni esingenakwenzeka ukuthi isifo siphinde sivele. Ihhovisi likaNobhala lilawula ukuhlolwa kwebiosafety kanye nebiosecurity kwezindawo zokugcina amagciwane evariola ezigunyaziwe njengoba kugunyazwe uMkhandlu Wezempilo Womhlaba, futhi iqinisekisa ukubika kwaminyaka yonke Emikhandlwini Ebusayo yeWHO. I-Smartpox Secretariat isekela iWHO Archives ekulondolozeni umlando womhlaba wonke wengxibongo kanye nokubhala phansi izifundo ezitholwe ekuqedeni ngempumelelo ingxibongo. Izindima nemisebenzi yamanje yeWHO Smallpox Secretariat ihlanganisa:
translations.hypothesis: Kusukela ngesikhathi sokugcina kuleli nkinga, kuthuthukiswe izifo zokugoma eziphephile kanye nezindlela zokwelapha ezithile zefu elibizwa nge-smallpox kanye nezifo ezihlobene nayo, njenge-monkeypox. I-Secretariat iphinde ibaluleke ekulungiseleleni izimo eziphuthumayo futhi iphatha isitokhu sezifo zokugoma ezisetshenziselwa ukugoma ngemuva kokuba kungenzeka ukuthi leli nkinga libuyele. I-Secretariat iphatha ukuhlolwa kwezokuphepha kwezinto eziphilayo kanye nokuvikelwa kwezinto eziphilayo ezindaweni ezigunyaziwe zokugcina ama-virus ahlanganiswe ne-variola, njengoba kufunwa yi-World Health Assembly, futhi iqinisekisa ukuthi kunikwa imibiko yaminyaka yonke ezikhungweni eziholayo ze-WHO. I-Smallpox Secretariat isiza i-WHO Archives ekulondolozweni kolwazi lwemvelo mayelana nefu elibizwa nge-smallpox kanye nokubhalwa kwemfundo efundwe ekugcineni kuleli nkinga. Izindima nezibopho zamanje ze-WHO Smallpox Secretariat zifaka:

translations.source: Variola virus research and development of countermeasures organizing annual meetings of the WHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) coordinating review of research proposals for work with variola virus through the ACVVR managing relationships with the two variola virus repositories (which are also WHO Collaborating Centres) recording, processing and monitoring requests from researchers for variola virus DNA from the 2 repositories under specific rules
translations.reference: Ucwaningo lwegciwane leVariola kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwezinyathelo zokulwa ukuhlela imihlangano yaminyaka yonke yeWHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) ukuxhumanisa ukubuyekezwa kweziphakamiso zocwaningo zokusebenza nge-variola virus ngeACVVR ukuphatha ubudlelwano nezinqolobane ezimbili zegciwane le-variola (eziphinde ziyizikhungo ezisebenzisana neWHO) ukurekhoda, ukucubungula kanye nokuqapha izicelo ezivela kubacwaningi be-variola virus DNA kusuka kumakhosombe we-2 ngaphansi kwemithetho ethile
translations.hypothesis: Ucwaningo lwe-virus i-Variola kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwezindlela zokwelapha, kanye nokuhlela imihlangano yonyaka yeKomidi Eloleka le-WHO mayelana nocwaningo lwe-virus i-Variola (ACVVR), ukuhlela ukuhlaziywa kwezicelo zocwaningo zokusebenza ne-virus i-Variola nge-ACVVR, ukuphatha ubudlelwano nezindawo ezimbili ezigcinela i-virus i-Variola (ezisikhungo sezokufundisa ze-WHO), ukubhalisa, ukuhlaziya nokulalela izicelo ezivela kubafundi mayelana ne-DNA ye-virus i-Variola ezindaweni ezimbili, ngemithetho ethile.

translations.source: conducting biennial biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the 2 global variola virus repositories developing normative guidance regarding research on variola virus DNA and related matters Emergency preparedness and response coordinating and preparing normative guidance on development and use of medical countermeasures for orthopoxviruses developing preparedness and response strategies, and tools to implement preparedness measures
translations.reference: ukwenza ukuhlolwa kwe-biosafety kanye ne-biosecurity ezindaweni ezi-2 zomhlaba jikelele zevariola virus ukuthuthukisa isiqondiso esivamile mayelana nocwaningo nge-variola virus DNA kanye nezindaba ezihlobene Ukulungela izimo eziphuthumayo kanye nokusabela ukuxhumanisa nokulungiselela isiqondiso esijwayelekile ekuthuthukisweni nasekusetshenzisweni kwezinyathelo zezokwelapha zama-orthopoxviruses ukuthuthukisa amasu okulungela nokuphendula, kanye namathuluzi okusebenzisa izinyathelo zokulungela
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlola njalo, ngeminyaka emibili, ukuthi ukuphepha kwezinto eziphilayo kanye nokuvikelwa kwezinto eziphilayo kulandelelwana, kwiindawo ezimbili zombango womhlaza we-variola. Ukuthuthukisa imiyalelo ebandakanyayo mayelana nencwadi yocwaningo ye-DNA yomhlaza we-variola kanye nezinye izinto ezihlobene. Ukulungiselela kanye nokuphendula ezimweni eziphuthumayo. Ukuhlela kanye nokulungiselela imiyalelo ebandakanyayo mayelana nokuthuthukiswa nokusetshenziswa kwezindlela zokwelapha ezilandelayo zama-orthopoxvirus. Ukuthuthukisa izinqubo zokulungiselela kanye nokuphendula, kanye nezinsiza zokusetshenziswa kwezinqubo zokulungiselela.

translations.source: maintaining and managing the smallpox global vaccine stockpile coordinating development of a laboratory network for orthopoxvirus detection and diagnostics developing normative guidance and response strategies for human monkeypox and other orthopoxviruses supporting capacity-building and developing training materials contributing to global health security initiatives
translations.reference: ukugcina nokuphatha isitokwe somgomo wengxibongo emhlabeni wonke ukuxhumanisa ukuthuthukiswa kwenethiwekhi yaselabhorethri yokuthola i-orthopoxvirus kanye nokuxilongwa ukuthuthukisa isiqondiso esivamile kanye namasu okuphendula inkawu yabantu namanye ama-orthopoxvirus ukusekela ukwakhiwa kwamandla nokuthuthukisa izinto zokuqeqesha ukufaka isandla ezinhlelweni zokuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni jikelele
translations.hypothesis: ukugcina nokulawula isitashini sezivakinyo zomhlaba jikelele ezisetshenziselwa ukwelapha ubutshaxaza, ukuhlela ukwakhiwa kenethiwekhi yezilabhorethri yokutholwa nokuhlaziywa kwe-orthopoxvirus, ukuthuthukisa imihlahlandlela nemizamo yokuphendula ezinkinga ezihlobene ne-monkeypox yabantu kanye nezinye izivirisi ze-orthopoxvirus, ukusekela ukukhuliswa kwamakhono nokuthuthukiswa kwezinto zokufundisa, kanye nokubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuvikeleka kwezempilo zomhlaba.

translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.
translations.reference: Ukugcina umlando wengxibongo yomhlaba wonke ukwengamela izinqolobane zoHlelo Lokuqedwa Kwengxibongo ngokubambisana neWHO Archives kanye neWHO Library okuholela ezingxoxweni zenqubomgomo kanye nemicimbi yesikhumbuzo emayelana nokuqedwa kwengxibongo ukubika minyaka yonke kuWHO Executive Board kanye neWorld Health Assembly IHhovisi likaNobhala liphinde lihlanganise futhi lilawule uxhaso lwezimali lwalemsebenzi kanye nemicimbi yesikhashana njengoba kudingeka njengokubonisana kwezobuchwepheshe nokuqeqeshwa.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulondoloza umlando womhlaba wonke mayelana ne-smallpox, ukuqondisa imininingwane yephrojekthi yokususa i-smallpox ngokubambisana ne-WHO Archives kanye ne-WHO Library, ukuphatha izingxoxo zombusazwe kanye nemikhosi yokukhumbula mayelana nokususa i-smallpox, nokubika ngonyaka eBhodi Eliqondile le-WHO kanye ne-World Health Assembly. I-Secretariat iphinde yenze ukuthi izimali zitholakale futhi ziphathwe kulezi zinhlelo kanye nemikhosi ehlukile njengoba kudingeka, njengezokubonisana kwezobuchwepheshe kanye nokufundisa.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.
translations.reference: ISnakebite envenoming Uhlolojikelele: iSnakebite envenoming yisifo esingase sibe yingozi empilweni esibangelwa ubuthi lapho elunywa inyoka enesihlungu. i-envenoming ingabangelwa futhi ukufuthwa ngobuthi emehlweni yizinhlobo ezithile zezinyoka ezikwazi ukukhafula ubuthi njengendlela yokuzivikela. Imizamo eyanele yesikhathi esidlule yokulawula ukusabalala kwenyoka ikhiqize idatha ehlukene, enganembile ye-epidemiological. Izisulu eziningi aziyi ezikhungweni zezempilo noma ezibhedlela kunalokho zithembele ekwelashweni kwesintu.
translations.hypothesis: Ukugaywa yisilinga: Ukugaywa yisilinga kuyimbangela yobungozi engase ibangele ukufa, ebangelwa izinto ezinobuthi ezisetshenziswa yisilinga elibulalayo. Ukugaywa kungabangelwa futhi ukuthi isilinga lithule isilwane esinobuthi emehlweni, okwenzeka kwezilunga ezithile zesilinga ezisebenzisa lesi simo njengendlela zokuzivikela. Imizamo yangaphambilini engcono kangaka yokulawula ukugaywa yisilinga ihilele imininingwane ephazimekayo futhi engaqondakali mayelana nokusabalala kwalesi sifo. Abaningi abagaywe abavakasheli izikhungo zezempilo noma izibhedlela, kodwa baphinde bathembele ezindleleni zokwelapha zamadala.

translations.source: However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: Kodwa ke, imininingwane etholakalayo ikhombisa ukuthi abantu abayizigidi ezi-4.5–5.4 balunywa izinyoka minyaka yonke. Kulokhu, bangu-1.8-2.7 miliyoni abanesifo somtholampilo kanti abangu-81 000 kuya ku-138 000 bashona ngenxa yezinkinga. Amaqembu asengozini enkulu ahlanganisa abasebenzi bezolimo basezindaweni zasemakhaya, abelusi, abadobi, abazingeli, izingane ezisebenzayo, abantu abahlala ezindlini ezingakhiwe kahle kanye nalabo abangenayo imfundo nokunakekelwa kwezempilo okulinganiselwe. Ukugula nokufa kwenzeka kaningi phakathi kwentsha futhi izingane zisengozini enkulu yokufa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abesifazane baba nezithiyo ezengeziwe zokuthola usizo lwezokwelapha kwamanye amasiko futhi abesifazane abakhulelwe basengozini enkulu.
translations.hypothesis: Noma kunjalo, idatha etholakala ibonisa ukuthi cishe ama-4.5 kuya ku-5.4 million abantu badlwadwa ngamasipha ngonyaka. Kulo lonke lobubanzi, ama-1.8 kuya ku-2.7 million bathuthuka ngobugwayi bempilo, kanti abanye abangu-81 000 kuya ku-138 000 bashona ngenxa yezinkinga. Izikhunga ezithintekayo kakhulu zifaka abasebenzi basekhaya abasezilalini, abahloli, abafishi, abafuzi, izingane ezisebenza, abantu abahlala ezindlini ezakhiwe ngendlela engcono, kanye nalabo abanokufinyelela okulinganiselwe emfundweni nasekwelizwe. Izifo kanye nokufa zivame kakhulu phakathi kweentombazane kanye nezingane, futhi izingane zibamba kakhulu ukufa ngemva kokugula. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amakhosikazi ahlangabezana nezinkinga eziningi ekufinyeleleni ekwelashweni kwezokwelapha ezimweni ezithile, futhi abafazi abakhulelwe bayingxenye eyingozi kakhulu.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.
translations.reference: Inkinga eqhubekayo ekhawulela ukufinyelela ekwelashweni okuphephile, okusebenzayo kwe-antivenin ezifundeni eziningi, futhi ikakhulukazi iSub-Saharan Africa, ingenye yezinto ezinomthelela ekwakhekeni kokufuna usizo ngemithi yendabuko. Izimpawu: Ukulunywa noma isihlungu esifuthwe ezinyokaneni ezinobuthi kungabangela uchungechunge lwezimo eziphuthumayo ezibucayi nezibucayi. Ukutheleleka ezinhlotsheni ezihlukene zezinyoka kungabangela izimpawu ezihlukene, ezinye ezimbi kakhulu kunezinye. Lokhu kwenza ukulungiswa kwama-antivenin alungile kube inkinga eqhubekayo. I-envenoming ingabangela ukukhubazeka okukhulu okungase kuvimbele ukuphefumula, okwenza ukunakekelwa kwezokwelapha ngokushesha kube bucayi.
translations.hypothesis: Inkinga eqhubekayo ekhawuleza ukufinyelela ekwelashweni eliphephile futhi elisebenza kakhulu lokulwa nezilwane ezibhubhisi eziningi, ikakhulukazi e-Afrika esenyakatho ne-Afrika esempumalanga, ingenye yezinto ezibangela ukuthi abantu bathembe ukwelashwa ngemithi yendabuko. Izimpawu: Ukugcotshwa noma ukusatshalaliswa kweziqu ezivela ezilwaneni ezibhubhisi zingadala izimo eziningi eziphilile nezibucayi kwezempilo. Ukugcotshwa kwezilwane ezihlukahlukene zingadala izimpawu ezihlukahlukene, ezinye ezibucayi kakhulu kunezinye. Lokhu kwenza ukulungiselela kwezindlela zokwelashwa ezifanele kube inkinga eqhubekayo. Ukugcotshwa kungadala ukuphazamiseka okukhulu kwegeja, okungase kulethe ukuthi umuntu akwazi ukuphefumula, ngakho-ke ukunakekelwa kwezokwelapha ngokushesha kubalulekile.

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.
translations.reference: Abantu bangase futhi babe nenkinga yokopha okungaholela ekopheni okubulalayo noma ukwehluleka kwezinso okungenakulungiseka. Ukucekelwa phansi okukhulu kwezicubu zendawo nakho kungase kwenzeke, okungaholela ekukhubazekeni unomphela ngisho nokunqunywa kwesitho. Izingane zisengozini enkulu yemiphumela emibi ngenxa yesisindo somzimba esiphansi kunabantu abadala. Ukufa okuningi kanye nemiphumela emibi ngenxa yokulunywa yizinyoka kungavinjelwa ngokuphelele ngokwenza ama-antivenin aphephile futhi asebenzayo atholakale kabanzi futhi afinyeleleke, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezisengozini enkulu. Izinqamuleli zezinyoka zekhwalithi ephezulu ukuphela kwendlela yokwelapha esebenzayo yokuvimbela noma ukubuyisela emuva iningi lemiphumela enobuthi yokulunywa yizinyoka.
translations.hypothesis: Abantu bangase futhi bathole izinkinga zokudlwengula ezingaholela ekuguqulweni okuyingozi noma ekuphazeni okuphazimekayo kwe-kidney. Ukulimali okukhulu kwezicubu endaweni yangakho mayelana kungaphinde kwenzeke, okungaholela ekulimeni okuphazimekayo ngisho nokususa izingxenye zomzimba. Izingane zinomkhawulo omkhulu wokuba zithinteke kakhulu ngenxa yobunzima bomzimba obuncane uma kuqhathaniswa nabantu abadala. Kungenzeka ukuthi kungenzeki ukufa kanye nemiphumela emikhulu evela ekugayeni kwezinye izilwane esikhathini esikhulu ngokwenza ukwelashwa okuphephile kanye nokusebenza kahle, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezinengozi. Ukwelashwa okusebenza kahle kwezinye izilwane kuyinto kuphela elinganelisa ekugwetshweni noma ekulungiseni imiphumela eminingi emibi evela ekugayeni kwezinye izilwane.

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: Ukwelashwa: Ama-antivenin enyoka ayizindlela zokwelapha ezisebenzayo zokuvimbela noma ukubuyisela emuva iningi lemiphumela eyingozi yokulunywa yinyoka futhi afakwe ohlwini lweWHO lwemithi ebalulekile. Ukutholakala kanye nokufinyeleleka kwalawa ma-antivenin, kanye nokuqwashisa ngezindlela eziyinhloko zokuvimbela phakathi kwemiphakathi kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo, izindlela ezingcono kakhulu zokukhawulela imiphumela emibi kanye nokufa okubangelwa yizinyoka. Ngemva kokulunywa yinyoka okusolakala ukuthi inobuthi, landela lezi zinyathelo: Suka ngokushesha endaweni lapho ukuluma kwenzeke khona. Susa noma yini eqinile endaweni elunywayo ukuze ugweme ukulimala uma kwenzeka ukuvuvukala.
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa: Izinto zokwelapha ezivikela izilwane esibhakabhakeni ziyinto efaneleka kakhulu ekugwetshweni noma ekulungiseni imiphumela eminingi emibi yobuso obubangelwa yizilwane esibhakabhakeni, futhi zifakiwe ohlwini lwezinto zokwelapha ezibalulekile ze-WHO. Ukutholakala kanye nokufinyelela kwalezi zinto zokwelapha, kanye nokukhuthaza ukuqwashisa ngendlela yokuvikela ekuqaleni phakathi komphakathi kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo, yindlela engcono kakhulu yokunciphisa imiphumela emibi kanye nokufa okuholelwe yobuso obubangelwa yizilwane esibhakabhakeni. Ngemuva kokugcotshwa yisilwane esibhakabhaka okuthi kucatshangwa ukuthi linosisindo, landela lezi zinyathelo: Yeka ngokushesha endaweni lapho ugcotshwe khona. Yisa noma yini ephezulu eseduze ngengxenye yomzimba egcotshwe ukuvimbela umonakalo uma kukhula.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).
translations.reference: Qinisekisa isisulu, njengoba ukulunywa izinyoka eziningi ezinobuthi akubangeli ukufa ngokushesha. Misa umuntu ngokuphelele futhi umhambise esikhungweni sezempilo ngokushesha okukhulu Ukufaka ingcindezi endaweni yokuluma ngephedi yokucindezela kungase kulungele kwezinye izimo. Gwema izindlela zosizo lokuqala noma imithi yesintu. IParacetamol ingase inikezwe ubuhlungu bendawo (okungaba nzima kakhulu).
translations.hypothesis: Qaphela umuntu obilwele, ngoba okuningi okubiliwe kwezinja ezibhubhisa akubangele ukufa ngokushesha. Vimbela umuntu ngokuphelele futhi mhlakulele esikhungweni sezempilo ngokushesha okukhulu. Ukufaka ingcindezi endaweni yokubiliwa ngendwangu engcindezi kungase kube lufanele kwezinye zimo. Gwema izindlela zokusiza zendabuko noma imithi yezimpilo. I-Paracetamol inganikezwa ukuze kuncishiswe ubuhlungu bendawo (okungaba bukhulu).

translations.source: Vomiting may occur, so place the person on their left side in the recovery position. Closely monitor airway and breathing and be ready to resuscitate if necessary
translations.reference: Ukuhlanza kungase kwenzeke, ngakho ke beka umuntu ohlangothini lwakhe lwesobunxele endaweni yokululama. Gada eduze kwendlela yokuphefumula nokuphefumula futhi ulungele ukuvuselela uma kunesidingo
translations.hypothesis: Ukugula kungase kwenzeke, ngakho beka umuntu ngakwesokunxele kwaso endaweni ephephile. Baphaphe kakhulu ukuthi impilo yabo ihlale kahle nokuthi bayiphefumula, futhi bubelele ukuthi bayokwenza ukwelashwa uma kudingeka.

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness.
translations.reference: IHelminthiases edluliselwa emhlabathini Uhlolojikelele: Ukutheleleka kweSoil-transmitted helminth (STH) kuphakathi kwezifo ezivame kakhulu emhlabeni wonke futhi kuthinta imiphakathi empofu kakhulu nentula kakhulu. Atheleleka ngamaqanda akhona endle yabantu abuye angcolise umhlabathi ezindaweni lapho ukuthuthwa kwendle kungalungile. Izinhlobo eziyinhloko ezithelela abantu izikelemu eziyindilinga (Ascaris lumbricoides), umswane (Trichuris trichiura) kanye nezikelemu (Necator americanus kanye ne-Ancylostoma duodenale). Izikelemu zamathumbu ziveza izimpawu eziningi ezihlanganisa ukuvela kwamathumbu (uhudo, ubuhlungu besisu), ukugula okujwayelekile kanye nokuba buthakathaka.
translations.hypothesis: Ukugwaya kwezindlu kanye nemilambo: Ukugwaya kwezindlu kanye nemilambo (STH) kungelinye lamabhukhimende ayinxenye enkulu kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele, futhi kuthinta imiphakathi engabantu abancane kakhulu kanye nalabo abanempilo engcono. Kutholakala ngezinkukhu ezifumaneka ezimpungwini zabantu, ezifaka umhlabathini ezindaweni lapho ukuhlanza kungenzela. Izinhlobo ezinkulu ezithinta abantu zifaka i-roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), i-whipworm (Trichuris trichiura), kanye ne-hookworms (Necator americanus kanye ne-Ancylostoma duodenale). Amabhukhimende egazi adala izimpawu eziningi, okubalwa kuzo ukukhathazeka kwegazi (ukugula, ubuhlungu behlazo), ukungcola kanye nokwehla kwamandla.

translations.source: Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled;
translations.reference: Izikelemu zehookworms zidala ukulahleka kwegazi okungapheli emathunjini okuholela ku-anemia. Amahelminths adluliselwa emhlabathini asakazwa ngamaqanda adluliselwa endle yabantu abanaleli gciwane. Izikelemu zabantu abadala zihlala emathunjini lapho zikhiqiza izinkulungwane zamaqanda usuku ngalunye. Ezindaweni ezingenazo izindlu zokukhucululwa kwendle ezanele, la maqanda angcolisa umhlabathi. Lokhu kungenzeka ngezindlela eziningi: amaqanda ahlanganiswe nemifino adliwa lapho imifino ingaphekwa ngokucophelela, igezwe noma ingahlutshiwe;
translations.hypothesis: Amakhukhu abanga izinkinga ezihlala zikhona ezibanga ukulahleka kwegazi ngaphakathi kwezinqubo zokugaya, okubangela ukukhishwa kwegazi. Izimpuku ezithuthwa yomhlaba ziyathuthwa ngamaqanda ahlaliswa ezimpungwini zabantu abagulwe. Izimpuku ezindala zihlala ezinkubeni, lapho zikhiqiza izinkulungwane zamaqanda ngosuku ngosuku. Ezindaweni ezinganalo ukuhlanza okufanele, lawa maqanda agwema umhlaba. Lokhu kungenzeka ngezindlela eziningi: amaqanda ahambiswe nezitshalo ayatholakala uma izitshalo azilutshwalwa, ziwashwe, noma zivalwe kahle ngaphambi kokudliwa.

translations.source: eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development.
translations.reference: amaqanda adliwa emithonjeni yamanzi angcolile; amaqanda adliwa yizingane ezidlala emhlabathini onamagciwane bese zifaka izandla emlonyeni zingawagezi. Izimpawu: Ukugula kuhlobene nenani lezikelemu ezihlala echwebeni. Abantu abanezifo zokuqina kokukhanya (izikelemu ezimbalwa) ngokuvamile abaphathwa yilesi sifo. Ukutheleleka okunzima kakhulu kungabangela izinhlobonhlobo zezimpawu ezihlanganisa ukuvela kwamathumbu (uhudo nobuhlungu besisu), ukungondleki, ukugula okujwayelekile kanye nokuba buthakathaka, kanye nokukhubazeka kokukhula nokukhula komzimba.
translations.hypothesis: Amapulangwe afakwa ngomgudu ogcwele imikhukhwini, noma ngabantfwana abadlala emhlabathini ogcwele imikhukhwini, bese bengafaki izandla zabo ezimeni ngaphandle kokuzihlanza. Izimpawu: Ubukhulu bomdlavuza buxhomekile nenani lemikhukhwini egodokile emzimbeni. Abantu abanomdlavuza omncane (abanemikhukhwini embalwa) ngempela abathinteki yilo mdlavuza. Imidlavuza enkulu ingadala izimpawu eziningi, okubalwa kuzo ukukhathazeka kwezinzwa (ukugula nokukhathazeka kwesisu), ukuntuleka kokudla, ukukhathazeka okujwayelekile kanye nokungamandla, kanye nokuthintwa kokuphila nokukhula komzimba.

translations.source: Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas.
translations.reference: Amagciwane anamandla aphezulu kakhulu angabangela ukuvinjelwa kwamathumbu okufanele aphathwe ngokuhlinzwa. I-S. stercoralis ingase ibangele izifo zesikhumba kanye negastro-intestinal futhi yaziwa nangokuthi ihlotshaniswa nokungondleki okungapheli ezinganeni. Esimeni sokuncipha kokuzivikela komzimba, iparasite ingabangela ihyperinfection/dissemination syndrome ehlala ibulala uma ingelapheki ngokushesha nangendlela efanele futhi ngokuvamile ebulalayo naphezu kokwelashwa. Ngo-2001, izihambeli zoMhlangano Wezempilo Womhlaba wonke zavumelana ngazwi linye isinqumo (WHA54.19) esinxusa amazwe anesifo esiwumqedazwe ukuthi aqale ukulwa nezikelemu, ikakhulukazi isifo sohudo kanye ne-helminths edluliselwa emhlabathini. Isu lokulawula izifo ze-helminth ezidluliselwa emhlabathini ukulawula izifo ngokwelashwa ngezikhathi ezithile kwabantu abasengozini abahlala ezindaweni ezihlala njalo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuguguleka okunzulu kakhulu kungaholela ekubangeleni ukuthi ugazi lungavimbeleki, okudinga ukwelashwa ngokuchithwa. I-S. stercoralis ingabangela izinkinga zesikhumba kanye nezinkinga zengane, futhi nabasebenzi bayo abazi ukuthi ihlobene nokuntshontshontsha okuphakeme kwezingane. Uma amandla omzimba womuntu afiphile, leli pharasithi lingabangela isimo esibucayi esibizwa nge-"hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome" esihlulekile uma lingalungiswa ngokushesha nangendlela efanele, futhi kakhulu kungabulala umuntu ngisho noma elashwe. Nango-2001, abaholi ababehleli kwi-World Health Assembly bamvuma ngobuningi ngophumela (WHA54.19) obucela izifunda ezithintekile ukuthi baqale ukubhekana ngokungafani nezilwane ezihlala emhlabathini, ikakhulukazi i-schistosomiasis kanye nezilwane ezihlala emhlabathini ezidlulisa izifo. Uhlelo lokulawula ukuguguleka kwezilwane ezihlala emhlabathini ezidlulisa izifo ukulawula izinkinga zempilo ngokwelashwa njalo labantu abanezinkinga ezikhulisiwe abahlala ezifundeni ezithintekile.

translations.source: People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: Abantu abasengozini yilaba: izingane zasenkulisa izingane zesikole abesifazane abaneminyaka yobudala yokuzala (kuhlanganise nabesifazane abakhulelwe ku-trimester yesibili neyesithathu kanye nabesifazane abancelisayo) abantu abadala emisebenzini ethile engcuphe kakhulu njengabacoshi betiye noma abavukuzi.
translations.hypothesis: Abantu abanezela lokugula abalandelayo: izingane ezincane ezangaphambi kwezikole, izingane ezifundayo, abesifazane abanobubanzi bokwazisa (okubalwa phakathi kwabo abafake kagesi kanye nababesifazane abakhulelwe kwi-trimesta yesibili kanye yesithathu, kanye nababesifazane abanempilo yezingane), kanye nabantu abadala ezikhundleni ezithile ezinengozi ephezulu, njengezintsha zethiye noma abomimi.

translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines –albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) – are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.
translations.reference: UkwelashwaImithi etuswa yiWHO – i-albendazole (400 mg) kanye ne-mebendazole (500 mg) – iyasebenza, ayibizi futhi kulula ukuyinikezwa yizisebenzi ezingezona ezokwelashwa (isb. othisha). Adlule ekuhlolweni okubanzi kokuphepha futhi asetshenziswe ezigidini zabantu abanemiphumela engemihle embalwa noma emincane. Kokubili i-albendazole ne-mebendazole inikelwa ezindlini zezempilo zikazwelonke ngeWHO kuwo wonke amazwe anesifo ukuze zelashwe zonke izingane ezisafunda. I-Ivermectin yokulawula kwe-S. stercoralis kulindeleke ukuthi itholakale ngentengo ethengekayo kusukela ngo-2021.
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa: Imithi eyethulwe yi-WHO – i-albendazole (400 mg) kanye ne-mebendazole (500 mg) – iyasebenza, ibucayi futhi kulula ukuyiphatha ngabantu abangochwepheshe bezokwelapha (ngokwesibonelo, othisha). Iyehlele ukuhlolwa okubanzi kwezokuphepha futhi isetshenzisiwe ezigidimidi zabantu ngempumelelo, ngamaphutha amancane. Kokubili i-albendazole ne-mebendazole zinikezwa ezikhungweni zikazwelonke zezempilo nge-WHO kuzo zonke izifunda ezithintekile ukuze kwelashwe wonke amalungu omndeni asebenzisa izikole. Kucatshangwa ukuthi i-ivermectin, esetshenziselwa ukulawula i-S. stercoralis, izotholakala ngentengo engabizi kusukela ngo-2021.

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year – one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour – a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030.
translations.reference: Ukubeletha umtwana oseshonile Uhlolojikelele: Ingane eshona ngemva kwamasonto angu-28 ekhulelwe, kodwa ngaphambi noma ngesikhathi sokuzalwa, ibhekwa njengokuzalwa ishonile. Cishe kunabantwana abazalwa beshonile ababalelwa ezigidini ezi-2 minyaka yonke - olulodwa njalo ngemizuzwana eyi-16. Ngaphezu kwama-40% akho konke ukubeletha kwenzeka ngesikhathi sokubeletha - ukulahlekelwa okungagwenywa ngekhwalithi ethuthukisiwe nokunakekelwa okuhloniphekile ngesikhathi sokubeletha okuhlanganisa ukuqapha okujwayelekile kanye nokufinyelela ngesikhathi ekunakekelweni okuphuthumayo uma kudingeka. Ukuthola umntwana oshonile ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa noma ebeletha kuyinhlekelele engasingathwanga ngokwanele kuma-ajenda omhlaba, izinqubomgomo nezinhlelo ezixhaswa ngemali. Kunezindleko ezingokwengqondo, ikakhulukazi kwabesifazane nemindeni yabo, njengokudangala komama, imiphumela yezezimali kanye nemiphumela yezomnotho, kanye nokucwaswa kanye nokungamukeleki. okuhlosiwe emhlabeni wonke kwabantwana abazalwa beshonile abayi-12 noma ngaphansi kwekota yesithathu (sekwephuzile) kubantwana abayi-1,000 sebephelele kuwo wonke amazwe ngo-2030.
translations.hypothesis: Incazelo mayelana nokufa kwengane emkhathini: Ingane eyashona ngemuva kwamawiki angama-28 yokukhulelwa, kodwa ngaphambi noma ngesikhathi kokuzalwa, ibalwa njengengane eyishone emkhathini. Kunama-millioni angu-2 cishe engane eyishoni emkhathini minyaka yonke – enye ngamasekhondi ayi-16. Ngaphezu kuka-40% yazo zonke izigameko zokufa kwengane emkhathini zenzeka ngesikhathi sokubeletha – ukulahlekelwa okungagwenywa ngokuthuthukiswa kwekhwalithi kanye nokunakekelwa okunenhle ngesikhathi sokubeletha, okubandakanya ukuhlola njalo kanye nokufinyelela ngokushesha ekunakekelweni kwezokubeletha ezimeni eziphuthumayo uma kudingeka. Ukuhlanganiswa kwengane emkhathini ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa noma sokubeletha kuyinto engokungathiwa, futhi ayitholwe ukunakekelwa okwanele ezinhlelweni, ezimitheni kanye nezinhlelo ezixhaswe ngemali emhlabeni jikelele. Kunemali engenakuqondwa, ikakhulukazi kwabesifazane kanye nemindeni yabo, njengokudabuka kwabesifazane, imiphumela yezimali kanye nemiphumela ezomnotho, kanye nokuhlukunyezwa kanye namagugu. Ngo-2014, i-World Health Assembly yamukele i-Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), ehlanganisa umgomo womhlaba wonke wokuthi kufike ku-12 noma ngaphansi kwezinguquko zokufa kwengane emkhathini kuleli zisimu lesithathu (ngokugcina) ngabantu abayi-1000 abazalwa ngakunye ezweni ngakunye ngonyaka ka-2030.

translations.source: In 2021, 139 mainly high-income and upper middle-income countries had met this target, but 56 countries will not each the ENAP target by 2030 if further efforts are not made. If current trends continue, 15.9 million babies will be stillborn; nearly half of these (7.7 million, 48%) will occur in sub-Saharan Africa. Causes: With quality health care throughout pregnancy and childbirth, most stillbirths are preventable. The major causes of stillbirth include pregnancy and childbirth-related complications, prolonged pregnancy, maternal infections such as malaria, syphilis and HIV, maternal conditions especially hypertension, and diabetes, and fetal growth restriction (when an unborn baby is unable to achieve its growth potential and therefore smaller than it should be). Congenital abnormalities are responsible for less than 10% of stillbirths reported nationally in high-income countries and the exact proportion in low-income settings is unknown due to limitations in diagnostics.
translations.reference: Ngo-2021, amazwe angu-139 ikakhulukazi anemali engenayo ephezulu kanye naphezulu anemali engenayo emaphakathi ayefinyelele lokhu kuhlosiwe, kodwa amazwe angu-56 ngeke ngalinye libe nethagethi ye-ENAP ngo-2030 uma ingenziwa eminye imizamo. Uma izimo zamanje ziqhubeka, izingane eziyizigidi ezingu-15.9 zizozalwa zishonile; cishe isigamu salokhu (izigidi ezingu-7.7, 48%) zizokwenzeka eSub-Saharan Africa. Izimbangela: Ngokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuseqophelweni lonke ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kanye nokubeletha, ukubeletha okuningi kuyagwemeka. Izimbangela eziyinhloko zokubeletha ingane eshonile zihlanganisa izinkinga eziphathelene nokukhulelwa nokubeletha, ukukhulelwa isikhathi eside, izifo zikamama ezinjengomalaleveva, ugcunsula kanye ne-HIV, izimo zomama ikakhulukazi umfutho wegazi ophakeme, nesifo sikashukela, kanye nokuvinjelwa ukukhula kombungu (lapho usana olungakazalwa lungakwazi ukufinyelela amandla ayo okukhula ngakho ke kuncane kunalokho obekufanele kube yikona). Ukungajwayelekile kokuzalwa kuyimbangela engaphansi kuka-10% yezingane ezizalwa zishonile ezibikwe kuzwelonke emazweni anemali engenayo ephezulu futhi ingxenye yangempela yezilungiselelo zabantu abahola kancane ayaziwa ngenxa yemikhawulo ekuxilongweni.
translations.hypothesis: Ngo-2021, amazwe ayi-139, amaningi awo anezimali ezinkulu kanye namazinga aphakathi aphezulu, ayehlela lo mgomo. Kodwa-ke, amazwe ayi-56 ngeke afeze umgomo we-ENAP ngowe-2030 uma imizamo eyengeziwe ingenziwa. Uma izimo ezijabulisayo ziqukuzwa, izigidi ezingu-15.9 zezingane zizobizwa emva kokuzalwa; cishe ingxenye yalezi (izigidi ezingu-7.7, okuthiwa yi-48%) kuzoba kwi-Afrika esenyakatho nezempumalanga. Imisebenzi: Ngokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuhle ngaso kuzo zombili izikhathi zokukhulelwa nokuzalwa, kungenzeka ukuthi kungenzeki ukubizwa kwezingane emva kokuzalwa. Imisebenzi emikhulu yokubizwa kwezingane emva kokuzalwa ifaka ukuhlaziywa kwezempilo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa nokuzalwa, ukukhulelwa okude, ukugugulelwa kwabanye abantu, njenge-malaria, i-syphilis kanye ne-HIV, izimo zabanye abantu ikakhulukazi i-hypertension (ukwandisa kwegazi) kanye ne-diabetes, kanye nokunciphisa ukukhula kwezingane (lapho ingane engakatholi ukukhula kwayo futhi ngaleyo ndlela ibanga kunalokho okumele ibe). Izinkinga ezazalelwe ngaphakathi zibanga ngaphansi kuka-10% wemibizwa yezingane emva kokuzalwa ebhodokswe ezweni, futhi inani eliqondile kulezo zindawo ezinamazinga aphansi zimali alwazi ngenxa yokuqhelelwa kokuhlaziywa.

translations.source: Factors related to age of the mother and practicing smoking can also increase the risk of maternal disease and stillbirth. Stillbirths can be prevented through family planning to avoid unwanted pregnancies, good health and nutrition prior to and during pregnancy, quality and respectful antenatal and childbirth care including adequate skilled health personnel including midwives. Syphilis treatment in pregnancy could also prevent an estimated 200 000 stillbirths, while fetal heart rate monitoring and labour surveillance and prompt interventions when needed are crucial for preventing 832 000 intrapartum stillbirths and reducing neonatal deaths. Stillbirths are strongly linked to adverse social and economic determinants of health. Prevention and responsive care need to be integrated across the continuum of maternal health care, and beyond.
translations.reference: Izinto ezihlobene nobudala bukamama nokuzijwayeza ukubhema nakho kungandisa ingozi yesifo sikamama kanye nokubeletha. Ukubeletha kungavinjelwa ngokuhlela umndeni ukuze kugwenywe ukukhulelwa okungafunwa, impilo enhle kanye nokudla okunomsoco ngaphambi nangesikhathi sokukhulelwa, ukunakekelwa kwekhwalithi nenhlonipho ngesikhathi sokubeletha kanye nokubeletha okuhlanganisa nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe abafanelekayo kuhlanganise nababelethisi. Ukwelashwa ngogcunsula ekukhulelweni kungase futhi kuvimbele ukubeletha okulinganiselwa ku-200 000, kuyilapho ukuqapha izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo yengane kanye nokugadwa komsebenzi kanye nokungenelela ngokushesha lapho kudingeka kubalulekile ekuvimbeleni ukubeletha okungama-832 000 phakathi kokubeletha kanye nokunciphisa ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. Ukubeletha kuxhumene kakhulu nezinqumo ezingezinhle zezenhlalo nezomnotho zezempilo. Ukuvimbela nokunakekelwa okusabelayo kufanele kuhlanganiswe ekunakekelweni kwezempilo komama, nangale kwalokho.
translations.hypothesis: Izinto ezihlobene neminyaka yomama kanye nokutshala uthu ukuholela ekukhuliseni ingozi yezifo zomama kanye nokuguguleka kwengane ezalwe. Ukuguguleka kwengane kungagwenywa ngokuhlela umndeni ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa okungafuneki, ukunakekelwa okuhle kanye nokudla okufanele ngaphambi nangaphakathi kokukhulelwa, ukunakekelwa okuhle kanye okunenhle ngaphambi kokubeletha kanye nokubeletha, okubandakanya abahlengikazi kanye nabanye ochwepheshe bezempilo abanekhono. Ukwelashwa kwe-syphilis ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kungaphinde kuvimbele ukuguguleka kwengane cishe ezi-200,000, kuyilapho ukugadiwa kwesilinganiso sempilo yengane kanye nokugadwa kokubeletha kanye nokwelashwa ngokushesha uma kudingeka kubalulekile ekugwenyeni ukuguguleka kwengane cishe ezi-832,000 kanye nokunciphisa ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. Ukuguguleka kwengane kuhlobene kakhulu nezimo eyingozi kwezempilo ezingokomoya nasezomnotho. Ukugwenywa nokunakekelwa okuyisikhuthazo kudinga ukuhlanganiswa kulo lonke uhlelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo zomama, kanye nangaphandle kwalokho.

translations.source: This includes respectful and supportive care in the event of a death. Listening to the experiences and voices of women and their communities is essential to help address issues of stigma associated with stillbirth. WHO response: More needs to be done to integrate stillbirth prevention within global and national agendas for high quality health care for women, adolescents, and babies. Through the Global Strategy for Women's, Children's and Adolescents Health 2016–2030 and implementing the recommendations of the Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), WHO is working to end preventable stillbirths, as part of efforts to improve maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health. Most stillbirths do not receive a birth certificate and are not registered.
translations.reference: Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukunakekelwa ngenhlonipho nokusekela uma kwenzeka ushona. Ukulalela okwenzekayo kanye namazwi abantu besifazane nemiphakathi yabo kubalulekile ukusiza ukubhekana nezinkinga zokucwaswa okuhambisana nokuzala umntwana oshonile. Impendulo yeWHO: Kuningi okudingeka kwenziwe ukuze kuhlanganiswe ukuvimbela ukubeletha phakathi kwe-ajenda yomhlaba wonke neyezwe yokunakekelwa kwezempilo okusezingeni eliphezulu kwabesifazane, intsha, kanye nezingane. Ngesu Lomhlaba Wonke Lezempilo Zabesifazane, Zezingane kanye Nentsha 2016–2030 nokusebenzisa izincomo ze-All Newborn Action Plan (2014), iWHO isebenzela ukuqeda ukubeletha okungavinjelwa, njengengxenye yemizamo yokuthuthukisa impilo kamama, usana, ingane kanye nentsha. Iningi lalabo abazalwa beshonile abazitholi izincwadi zokuzalwa futhi ababhalisiwe.
translations.hypothesis: Lokhu kufaka ukunakekelwa okunenhle futhi okunoxhaso ngesikhathi sokufa. Ukulalela okuhlangenwe nakho kanye nezwi zabesifazane kanye nemiphakathi yabo kubalulekile ekuxazululeni izinkinga zokuhlukunyezwa ezihlobene nokufa kwengane engakazalwa. Impendulo ye-WHO: Kufanele kwenziwe okuningi ukuze kuhlanganiswe ukweluleka kokuvimbela ukufa kwengane engakazalwa ezinhlelweni zamazwe ngamazwe kanye nezifunda zendawo zokuphatha ezinhle kwezokwelapha zabesifazane, abasha, kanye nezingane. Ngesikhathi esikhulu sezokwelapha zabesifazane, izingane kanye nabasha sango-2016 kuya ku-2030 kanye nokusebenza ngokuqinile kwezincomo ze-Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), i-WHO isebenza ukugcina ukufa kwengane engakazalwa okungenzeka, njengengxenye yomzamo wokuthuthukisa impilo yomama, yezingane, yezingane kanye yabasha. Kakhulu ukufa kwengane engakazalwa akutholwa umbhalo wokuzalwa futhi akubhaliswe.

translations.source: Improving systems for reporting births and neonatal deaths is a matter of human rights and a prerequisite for reducing stillbirths. In addition, there is a need to strengthen routine health information systems to accurately capture and report stillbirths for monitoring and improving the quality of care. WHO provides tools to help countries improve their data on both stillbirths and neonatal deaths. WHO also has guidance to help countries review and investigate individual deaths so they can recommend and implement solutions to prevent similar ones in the future and a standard classification system for perinatal deaths (ICD-PM). WHO and UNICEF are supporting a call for collective action to end preventable stillbirths by:
translations.reference: Ukwenza ngcono izinhlelo zokubika ukuzalwa kanye nokufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa kuyindaba yamalungelo abantu kanye nemfuneko yokunciphisa ukubeletha. Ukwengeza, kunesidingo sokuqinisa izinhlelo zolwazi lwezempilo olujwayelekile ukuze kuthathwe ngokunembile futhi kubikwe izingane ezizalwa zishonile ukuze kuqashwe futhi kwenziwe ngcono izinga lokunakekelwa. IWHO ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi okusiza amazwe ukuthi athuthukise idatha yawo kukho kokubili ukubeletha nokufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. IWHO futhi inesiqondiso sokusiza amazwe ukuthi abuyekeze futhi aphenye ukufa komuntu ngamunye ukuze akwazi ukuncoma futhi asebenzise izixazululo zokuvimbela okufanayo esikhathini esizayo kanye nohlelo olujwayelekile lokuhlukanisa ukufa kokubeletha (ICD-PM). IWHO kanye ne-UNICEF bayaseseka ikhwelo lokuthi kuthathwe izinyathelo ezihlangene zokuqeda ukubeletha okungavinjelwa ngokuthi:
translations.hypothesis: Ukuthuthukisa izinhlelo zokubika okuzalwa kanye nezifo zezingane ezincane ezifele zisikhathi esifushane kuyinkinga yamalungelo abantu futhi kuyinto ebalulekile ekunciphiseni ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kudingeka ukukhuthaza izinhlelo zolwazi lwezempilo ezijwayelekile ukuze kutholwe kanye nokubikwa ngokuqinile kwezifo zezingane ezisanda kuzalwa ezifele, ukuze kuhlalele futhi kuthuthukiswe ikhwalithi yokunakekelwa. I-WHO inezinsiza ezisiza izifunda ukuthuthukisa idatha yazo mayelana nokufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa kanye nezifo zezingane ezincane ezifele. I-WHO nayo inemihlahlandlela esiza izifunda ukuhlola nezindaba ngazo zonke izifo zengane ezifele ukuze zikwazi ukuncoma nokusebenzisa izixazululo zokuqeda izifo ezifanayo esikhathini esizayo, kanye nohlelo oluqondile lokuhlukanisa izifo ezithinta izikhathi zokuzalwa (i-ICD-PM). I-WHO kanye ne-UNICEF zisebenzisa ukukhuthaza ukusebenzisana ukuze kufezwe ukugcina izifo zezingane ezisanda kuzalwa ezifele ezengabe zifezeka ngokwenza:

translations.source: increasing awareness and reducing stigma supporting bereaved women and families strengthening health systems to provide high-quality care nationalizing and localizing stillbirth targets improving measurement of stillbirths to enhance evidence and knowledge.
translations.reference: ukwandisa ukuqwashisa nokunciphisa ukucwaswa ukweseka abesifazane nemindeni eshonelwe ukuqinisa izinhlelo zezempilo ukuze zinikeze ukunakekelwa kwekhwalithi ephezulu ukwenza kube kuzwelonke kanye nokwenza izindawo okuhloswe ngazo ukubeletha umtwana oseshonile ukwenza ngcono ukukalwa kwezingane ezizalwa zishonile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ubufakazi nolwazi.
translations.hypothesis: Ukukhulisa ukuqwashiswa nokunciphisa ukuhlukunyezwa, ukusekela abafazi namakhaya agxile, ukuqinisa izinhlelo zezempilo ukuze zinikeze ukunakekelwa okusezingeni eliphezulu, ukwenza izinhloso zokulala kwezithombe zibe zombuso kanye nezindawo, ukuthuthukisa ukubalwa kokulala kwezithombe ukuze kukhuliswe ubufakazi nolwazi.

translations.source: Substandard and falsified medical products Overview: Up to two billion people around the world lack access to necessary medicines, vaccines, medical devices including in vitro diagnostics, and other health products, which creates a vacuum that is too often filled by substandard and falsified products. This problem is growing as global supply chains become more complex, meaning products manufactured in one country may be packaged in a second country and distributed across borders to be marketed or sold to consumers in a third. The growth of e-commerce also contributes to this trend by making it easier to purchase medicines online, often from unauthorized sources. WHO has identified this issue one of the urgent health challenges for the next decade given that more than one in ten medicines in low- and middle-income countries are estimated to be substandard or falsified.
translations.reference: Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi futhi engamanga Uhlolojikelele: Abantu abangafika ezigidini eziyizinkulungwane ezimbili emhlabeni jikelele abanakho ukufinyelela emithini edingekayo, imigomo, izinsiza zezokwelapha ezihlanganisa ukuxilongwa kwe-in vitro, neminye imikhiqizo yezempilo, okudala isikhala esivamise ukugcwaliswa ngemikhiqizo esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga. Le nkinga iyakhula njengoba amaketanga okuhlinzeka emhlabeni wonke eba yinkimbinkimbi, okusho ukuthi imikhiqizo ekhiqizwa ezweni elilodwa ingase ihlanganiswe ezweni lesibili futhi isatshalaliswe emingceleni ukuze idayiswe noma ithengiswe kubathengi ngengxenye yesithathu. Ukukhula kwe-e-commerce nakho kunomthelela kulo mkhuba ngokwenza kube lula ukuthenga imithi ku-inthanethi, ngokuvamile ivela emithonjeni engagunyaziwe. IWHO ihlonze lolu daba njengenye yezinselelo eziphuthumayo zezempilo kule minyaka eyishumi ezayo uma kubhekwa ukuthi imithi engaphezu kowodwa kweyishumi emazweni anemali engenayo ephansi noma ephakathi ilinganiselwa ukuthi isezingeni eliphansi noma engamanga.
translations.hypothesis: Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engemthetho: Isibuyekezo: Abantu abafika kwezibiliyoni ezimbili emhlabeni abanandaba nokufinyelela ezimpahla zezokwelapha ezibalulekile, ezifakelwe, amadivayisi ezokwelapha, okuhlanganisa nezindlela zokuhlazwa zangaphakathi, kanye nezinye izinto eziholisa impilo, okubangela ukuthi kukhule ukusetshenziswa kwemikhiqizo engcono futhi engemthetho. Le nkinga iyakhula njengoba izikhungo zokuthengisa emhlabeni ziba yindlela eziyinkimbinkimbi, okusho ukuthi imikhiqizo eyenziwe ezweni elilodwa ingabanjwa kwelinye izwe futhi idistributhe phakathi kwezizwe ukuze ithengiswe noma ithengwe kubathengi ezweni lesithathu. Ukukhula kwe-e-commerce nalo kugxile kule ndlela ngokwenza kube lula ukuthenga izimpahla zezokwelapha ku-inthanethi, ezivela ezintweni eziningi ezingagunyazwe. I-WHO ithole ukuthi le nkinga ingenye yezinkinga ezinkulu zempilo ezidinga ukuxazululwa kule minyaka elandelayo, ngoba kunokuba ngaphezu kwesinye kwezithenjwa ezilishumi zezokwelapha ezweni elinamandla alinganiselwe kanye nalelizwe eliphakathi, okuthiwa zingcono noma engemthetho.

translations.source: No country remains untouched from this issue, and WHO has received reports of substandard or falsified medical medicines, vaccines and in vitro diagnostics from all regions of the world. Both generic and innovator medicines can be falsified, ranging from very expensive products for cancer to very inexpensive products for treatment of pain. WHO Member States have agreed on a comprehensive global strategy focused on prevention, detection and response to move towards achieving increased access to quality, safe, effective and quality medical products. Impact: Substandard and falsified medical products create many problems for both the individual taking the medicine and for families, the larger society, health care system and supply chain. When medicines do not work the way they should, they can fail to treat or prevent disease, contribute to antimicrobial resistance, waste precious resources and lead to a loss of confidence in medicines and distrust of healthcare providers.
translations.reference: Alikho izwe elihlala lingakathintwa kulolu daba, futhi iWHO ithole imibiko yemithi yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi noma engamanga, imigomo kanye nokuxilongwa kwe-in vitro okuvela kuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Yomibili imithi ejwayelekile kanye nentsha ingenziwa amanga, kusukela emikhiqizweni ebiza kakhulu yomdlavuza kuye emikhiqizweni engabizi kakhulu yokwelapha izinhlungu. Amazwe Angamalungu eWHO avumelene ngesu eliphelele lomhlaba wonke eligxile ekuvimbeleni, ekuhlonzeni nasekuphenduleni ukuze kufinyeleleke ekufinyeleleni okunyukile emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphezulu, ephephile, ephumelelayo nesezingeni eliphezulu. Umthelela: Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga idala izinkinga eziningi kubo bobabili umuntu ophuza umuthi kanye nemindeni, umphakathi omkhulu, uhlelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo kanye nochungechunge lokuhlinzeka. Uma imithi ingasebenzi ngendlela okufanele isebenze ngayo, ingahluleka ukwelapha noma ukuvimbela izifo, ibe nomthelela ekwandeni kwemithi elwa namagciwane, imoshe izinsiza eziyigugu futhi iholele ekulahlekelweni ukuzethemba emithini kanye nokungathembani abahlinzeki bezempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Akukho izwe elingathinteki yale nkinga, futhi i-WHO ithole imibiko mayelana nezinto zokwelapha, izivakashi kanye nezinto zokuhlaziywa zokwelapha ezingcono noma ezifakezelwe ezivela kuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Kokubili izinto zokwelapha ezijwayelekile kanye nalezo ezintsha zingafakwa, kusukela ezintweni ezibizayo kakhulu ezisetshenziselwa ukwelapha umdlavuza kuya kwezinto ezibucayi kakhulu ezisetshenziselwa ukwelapha ubuhlungu. Izizwe ezilungu ze-WHO zivumile ngohlelo olunzulu lomhlaba wonke olugxile ekwenzeni ngcono, ekutholeni kanye nempendulo ukuze kufinyelelwe ekufinyeleleni okukhulu kwezinto zokwelapha ezisezingeni eliphezulu, eziphephile, ezisebenza futhi ezifanele. Umthelela: Izinto zokwelapha ezingcono noma ezifakezelwe zidlala izindaba eziningi kokubili kumuntu osetshenzisa lezi zinto kanye nomndeni, umphakathi omkhulu, uhlelo lwezokwelapha kanye nomucono wokusabalalisa. Uma izinto zokwelapha zingasebenzi ngendlela okufanele, zingase zingalweli noma zivimbe ukuguguleka, zifake isandla ekuxazululeni ukuhlomuka kwezinto ezibulala amagciwane, zilahle izinsiza ezibalulekile futhi ziholele ekulahlekelweni kwithemba kwezinto zokwelapha kanye nokungathokozeli kwabathwelisi bezokwelapha.

translations.source: This can have a negative socioeconomic impact, contributing to related loss in productivity and adding expenses to the individual and national health system. They are most likely to reach patients in situations where there is constrained access to quality and safe medical products, poor governance and weak technical capacity. Although this issue impacts all countries, countries where there are weak or non-existent regulatory systems bear the greatest burden of substandard and falsified medical products. In an increasingly globalized world, no one country has sufficient resources and capacity to deal with this issue in isolation. Through global systems and processes such as the WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System and WHO Member State Mechanism,
translations.reference: Lokhu kungaba nomthelela omubi kwezenhlalo-mnotho, kube nomthelela ekulahlekeni okuhlobene nokukhiqiza kanye nokwengeza izindleko ohlelweni lwezempilo lomuntu ngamunye kanye nolwezwe lonke. Kungenzeka kakhulu ukuthi bafinyelele iziguli ezimeni lapho kunokuvinjelwa ukufinyelela emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphezulu nephephile, ukubusa okungekuhle kanye namandla obuchwepheshe abuthakathaka. Nakuba le nkinga ithinta wonke amazwe, amazwe lapho kunezinhlelo zokulawula ezibuthaka noma ezingekho khona anomthwalo omkhulu wemikhiqizo yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga. Emhlabeni owandayo womhlaba wonke, alikho izwe elinezinsiza ezanele namandla okubhekana nalolu daba lilodwa. Ngezinhlelo nezinqubo zomhlaba wonke ezifana neWHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System kanye neWHO Member State Mechanism,
translations.hypothesis: Lokhu kungaba nomthelela omubi kwezomnotho nezomphakathi, okungabangela ukwehla kakhulu ekukhiqizeni kanye nokwengezwa kwezindleko ezinkolo kanye nohlelo lwezempilo lwendawu yonke. Kungenzeka ukuthi labo abenza lokhu bafike ezigebengwini lapho kunokungatholakali kokulula kwezinto zokwelapha ezisezingeni eliphezulu futhi eziphephile, lapho ukulawulwa kungenzalo futhi amakhono obuchwepheshe ebukhali. Nakuba le nkinga ithinta yonke amazwe, amazwe anamasistimu okulawulwa ayimbi noma agcine ukungabi khona anobunzima obukhulu kakhulu ngezinto zokwelapha ezimbi kanye nezodluliselwe. Emhlabeni olandelelanayo kakhulu, akukho mnyango oyedwa onamasebe afanele kanye namandla okubhekana nalolu daba ngaphandle. Ngokusetshenziswa kwezinhlelo kanye nezinqubo zomhlaba wonke, ezifana nohlelo lwe-WHO lokuqapha nokulalela lomhlaba wonke kanye nohlelo lwezizwe ezilunga ze-WHO,

translations.source: Member States are working together to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Amazwe Angamalungu asebenzisana ukuze avimbele, ahlonze futhi aphendule emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha esezingeni eliphansi nengamanga.
translations.hypothesis: Izizwe ezilungu zisebenzisana ukukuvimbela, ukukwazisa kanye nokuphendula izinto zokwelapha ezingcono futhi ezingamanga.

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Ukuvimbela ukuzibulala Uhlolojikelele: Bangaphezu kuka-700 000 abantu abafa ngokuzibulala minyaka yonke. Ngokuzibulala ngakunye, kulinganiselwa ukuthi kunemizamo yokuzibulala engaphezu kuka-20. Ukuzibulala kungenzeka kunoma yisiphi isigaba sempilo nakuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Ngo-2019, ukuzibulala bekuyimbangela yesine yokufa kwabantu abaneminyaka engu-15-29 emhlabeni jikelele, kanti u-77% wabo bonke abantu abazibulalayo kwenzeka emazweni anemali engenayo ephansi naphakathi.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulwa nokubulala ngokuzibulala: Ngaphezu kuka-700 000 abantu badlula emhlabeni ngenyanga ngenxa yokubulala ngokuzibulala. Kuyo yonke into yokubulala ngokuzibulala, kulinganiselwa ukuthi kunama-20+ okuzama ukubulala ngokuzibulala. Ukubulala ngokuzibulala kungenzeka nganoma yisiphi isikhathi empilweni kanye kuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba. Ngo-2019, ukubulala ngokuzibulala kwakuyimbangela yesine enkulu yobulala phakathi kwabantu abaneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-29 kulo lonke elasekuprisini, futhi u-77% wazo zonke izifo zokubulala ngokuzibulala zenzeke ezweni elinamandla ezomnotho aphansi nezwe elinamandla ezomnotho aphephile.

translations.source: Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies.
translations.reference: Cishe u-20% wabantu abazibulalayo emhlabeni wonke ngenxa yokuzifaka ubuthi ngesibulala-zinambuzane. Nakuba ukuxhumana phakathi kokuzibulala kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo (ikakhulukazi, ukudangala nokuphazamiseka kokusetshenziswa kotshwala) kanye nomzamo wangaphambilini wokuzibulala kusungulwe kahle emazweni anemali engenayo ephezulu, ukuzibulala okuningi kwenzeka ngokuxhamazela ezikhathini zobunzima. Ezinye izici eziyingozi zokuzibulala zihlanganisa isipiliyoni sokulahlekelwa, isizungu, ukubandlululwa, ukuhlukana kobudlelwane, izinkinga zezimali, ubuhlungu obungapheli nokugula, udlame, ukuhlukumeza, nezingxabano noma ezinye izimo eziphuthumayo zobuntu. Ukucwaswa okuhambisana nezimo zempilo yengqondo nokuzibulala kusho ukuthi abantu abaningi abacabanga ngokuzibulala abalufuni usizo. Ukuzibulala nemizamo yokuzibulala inomthelela omubi othinta imindeni, abangani, ozakwethu, imiphakathi kanye nemiphakathi.
translations.hypothesis: Cishe amaphesenti ayi-20 wazo zonke izifo zokubulala ngokuzibulala zaba ngempumela yokuphuza izinto eziyingozi ezisetshenziswa emzimbeni. Nakuba ubuhlobo phakathi kwezifo zokubulala ngokuzibulala kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo (ikakhulukazi, ukucindezeleka kanye nezinkinga zokusebenzisa utshwala) kanye nokuzama kokubulala ngaphambilini kukhulunywe ngako kakhulu ezweni elinamandla ezomnotho, eziningi zezifo zokubulala ngokuzibulala zenzeka ngokushesha ngesikhathi sezinkinga. Ezinye izinto ezingeza ukuthi umuntu angazibulala zifaka ukuhlazwa, ukuba wedwa, ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuhlukana nomlingani, izinkinga zezimali, ubuhlungu obuqhubekayo kanye nezifo, ukuhlushwa, ukusetshenziswa, kanye nezinkinga noma ezinye izimo eziphuthumayo. Ukucatshangwa kwezimo zempilo yengqondo kanye nokubulala ngokuzibulala kusho ukuthi abaningi abacabanga ngokuzibulala abafuni ukuthola usizo. Izifo zokubulala ngokuzibulala kanye nokuzama kokubulala ngokuzibulala zinezimpempepho ezithinta imindeni, abangani, abafowabo, imiphakathi kanye nezinhlanga.

translations.source: Suicide: facts and figures globally Suicide worldwide in 2019 report LIVE LIFE: an implementation guide for suicide prevention in countries Prevention: Much can be done at individual, community and national levels to prevent suicide and suicide attempts. WHO’s LIVE LIFE approach recommends four effective, evidence-based key interventions which should be included in every national response to suicide:
translations.reference: Ukuzibulala: amaqiniso nezibalo emhlabeni jikelele Ukuzibulala emhlabeni wonke kubikwa ngo-2019 LIVE LIFE: umhlahlandlela wokuqalisa wokuvimbela ukuzibulala emazweni Ukuvimbela: Kuningi okungenziwa ezingeni lomuntu ngamunye, emphakathini kanye nakuzwelonke ukuvimbela ukuzibulala kanye nemizamo yokuzibulala. Indlela yeWHO's LIVE LIFE incoma ukungenelela okune okusebenzayo, okusekelwe ebufakazini okufanele kufakwe kuzo zonke izimpendulo zezwe zokuzibulala:
translations.hypothesis: Ukubulala izinja: amanothi nezibalo emhlabeni jikelele. Umbiko wokubulala izinja emhlabeni jikelele ngo-2019. LIVE LIFE: umhlahlandlela wokusebenzisa ezindleleni zokuqapha ukubulala izinja ezweni ngako. Ukuvikelwa: Kungenziwa okuningi ezingeni lomuntu ngamunye, komphakathi kanye nezwe ukuvikelwa kokuqashwa kanye nezinkinga zokuzibulala. Indlela ye-LIVE LIFE ye-WHO incoma izindlela ezine ezibalulekile, ezisekelwe ezibonakalisiwe, okufanele zifakwe kunoma yilona msebenzi kazwelonke wokulwa nokubulala izinja:

translations.source: limit access to the means of suicide interact with the media for responsible reporting of suicide foster socio-emotional life skills in adolescents early identify, assess, manage and follow up anyone who is affected by suicidal behaviours. The foundational pillars of the interventions are situation analysis, multisectoral collaboration, awareness raising, capacity building, financing, surveillance, monitoring and evaluation.
translations.reference: nciphisa ukufinyelela ezindleleni zokuzibulala xhumana nabezindaba ngokubika ngokuzibulala thuthukisa amakhono empilo yezenhlalo nemizwa entsheni bona kusenesikhathi, ahlole, aphathe futhi alandelele noma ubani othintwa imikhuba yokuzibulala. Izinsika eziyisisekelo zalokhu kungenelela wukuhlaziya isimo, ukusebenzisana kwezinhlaka eziningi, ukuqwashisa, ukuhlonyiswa ngamakhono, ukuxhasa ngezimali, ukugadwa, ukuqapha kanye nokuhlola.
translations.hypothesis: Qinisekisa ukuthi kunconywa ukunciphisa ukufinyelela ezindleleni zokubulala. Xhumana nezindaba ukuze kukhuthazwe ukubika okufanele mayelana nokubulala. Khuthaza amakhono ezimpilo nomoya kubantombazane. Khombisa, hlazi, phatha, futhi landele ukuthi ngubani otholekile ngemikhuba yokuzibulala. Izakhiwo ezibalulekile zalokhu kufakelwa zifaka ukuhlaziywa kwesimo, ukubambisana kwezikhungo eziningi, ukukhuthaza ukuqwashisa, ukwakhiwa kwamakhono, ukuxhaswa kwezimali, ukugadwa, ukulaleliswa, kanye nokuhlolwa.

translations.source: Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: Imizamo yokuvimbela ukuzibulala idinga ukubambisana nokusebenzisana phakathi kwemikhakha eminingi, okuhlanganisa ezempilo, imfundo, abasebenzi, ezolimo, ibhizinisi, ubulungiswa, umthetho, ukuvikela, ezombusazwe kanye nabezindaba. Ukuvimbela ukuzibulala ngokuvamile akuxazululwa ngokwanele ngenxa yokucwaswa kanye nokuntula ukwazi ukuthi ukuzibulala kuyinkinga enkulu yezempilo yomphakathi. Imiphakathi nayo idlala indima ebalulekile ekuvimbeleni ukuzibulala. Ikhithi yamathuluzi yokuxoxisana nomphakathi weWHO iqondisa imiphakathi ekuhlonzeni izinto ezibalulekile futhi isebenzise imisebenzi ngokwezimo zendawo. Impendulo yeWHO: Ukuphuthuma kokuthatha isinyathelo ukuvimbela ukuzibulala kuye kwaqashelwa futhi kwabekwa eqhulwini emazingeni aphezulu.
translations.hypothesis: Imizamo yokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela idinga ukuhlanganyela nokusebenzisana phakathi kwezikhungo eziningi, okubalwa phakathi kwazo ezempilo, zemfundo, zabasebenzi, zezolimo, zebhizinisi, ezobulungiswa, zomthetho, zokuvikelwa, zombuso kanye nezokuxhumana. Okuningi ngaleso sikhathi, ukubulala ngokuzimela akuhlelweni kahle ngenxa yobunzulu kanye nokuntuleka kokwaziswa ngalokho ukubulala ngokuzimela okuyinto enobungozi enkulisweni yomphakathi. Imiphakathi nayo idlala indima ebalulekile ekuvikeleni ukubulala ngokuzimela. Ithuluzi lokuhlanganyela lomphakathi le-WHO liyasiza imiphakathi ukuthi iqinise ukuthi yini okufanele ibhekwe kuqala kanye nokwenza izinto ngokuya ngesimo sendawo. Impendulo ye-WHO: Ububuleko bokuthatha izinyathelo zokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela kubonakaliswe futhi kubalwe njengento ebalulekile ezingeni eliphezulu.

translations.source: The reduction of suicide rates in countries is an indicator in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (the only indicator for mental health), WHO’s General Programme of Work and WHO’s Comprehensive Mental Health Action Plan 2013–2030. The first WHO world suicide report, Preventing suicide: a global imperative, published in 2014, aimed to increase awareness of the public health significance of suicide and suicide attempts and make suicide prevention a public health priority.
