Governments are encouraged to implement WHO’s LIVE LIFE package of effective and evidence-based key interventions for suicide prevention, and to develop or strengthen comprehensive national suicide prevention strategies in a multisectoral public health approach. National leadership and coordination on suicide prevention are further supported by the publication of National suicide prevention strategies: progress, examples and indicators. Recognizing that data and statistics are necessary for advocacy and decision-making, WHO published Suicide worldwide in 2019: Global Health Estimates.
translations.reference: Ukwehliswa kwamazinga okuzibulala emazweni kuyinkomba ku-UN Sustainable Development Goals (okuwukuphela kwenkomba yezempilo yengqondo), Uhlelo Olujwayelekile Lomsebenzi LweWHO kanye NoHlelo Olubanzi Lwezenzo Zezempilo Yengqondo lweWHO luka-2013–2030. Umbiko wokuqala weWHO wokuzibulala emhlabeni wonke, Ukuvimbela ukuzibulala: imfuneko yomhlaba wonke, eyanyatheliswa ngo-2014, okuhloswe ngayo ukwandisa ukuqwashisa ngokubaluleka kwezempilo yomphakathi kwemizamo yokuzibulala nokuzibulala nokwenza ukuvimbela ukuzibulala kube yinto ehamba phambili yezempilo yomphakathi. Ohulumeni bayakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise iphakethe leWHO LIVE LIFE lokungenelela okubalulekile okusekelwe ebufakazini ukuze kuvinjelwe ukuzibulala, futhi bathuthukise noma baqinise amasu aphelele kazwelonke okuvimbela ukuzibulala ngendlela yezempilo yomphakathi ehlanganisa izigaba eziningi. Ubuholi bukazwelonke kanye nokuxhumana ekuvimbeleni ukuzibulala kusekelwa ngokwengeziwe ukushicilelwa kwamasu kazwelonke okuvimbela ukuzibulala: inqubekelaphambili, izibonelo nezinkomba. Ibona ukuthi idatha nezibalo ziyadingeka ekukhulumeni nasekuthathweni kwezinqumo, iWHO yashicilela Ukuzibulala emhlabeni wonke ngo-2019: Izilinganiso Zezempilo Zomhlaba.
translations.hypothesis: Ukunciphisa izinombolo zokubulala ngokuzimela ezweni ngalinye kuyindlela yokuthi umhlaba uphumelele izinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezisengxenyeni ye-UN (eyiyona ndlela kuphela yokuhlola impilo yengqondo), kanye nohlelo olubanzi lokuSebenza lwe-WHO kanye nohlelo lwe-WHO olubanzi lokusebenza empilweni yengqondo ngomnyaka ka-2013 kuya ku-2030. Ingxenye yokuqala yomhlolokhono womhlaba wonke we-WHO mayelana nokubulala ngokuzimela, ethi "Ukuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela: okubalulekile emhlabeni wonke," eyayikhishiwe ngonyaka ka-2014, ihlose ukwandisa ukuqwashwa ngobubanzi bokubulala ngokuzimela kanye nezinkinga ezihlobene nako empilweni yomphakathi, futhi ukwenza ukuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela kube yinto ebalulekile empilweni yomphakathi. Amabhizinisi anconywa ukuthi asebenzise uhlelo lwe-WHO oluthi "LIVE LIFE" olunezindlela ezisebenza futhi ezisekelwe ezincwadini ezibalulekile zokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela, kanye nokuthuthukisa noma ukukhulisa izinhlelo ezibanzi zokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela ezweni, ngendlela ehambisana nemikhakha eminingi empilweni yomphakathi. Ubuholi kanye nokuhlela ezweni ngalinye mayelana nokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela kuxhaswe ngeminye imihlahlandlela, efaka izinhlelo ezibanzi zokuvimbela ukubulala ngokuzimela ezweni: ukuqhubeka, izibonelo kanye nezinkomba. Ngokwazi ukuthi imininingwane kanye nezibalo zidingekile ekukhuthazeni kanye nokwenza izinqumo, i-WHO ikhishwe umbiko mayelana nokubulala ngokuzimela emhlabeni jikelele ngonyaka ka-2019, okuthiwa "Global Health Estimates."

translations.source: WHO’s vision is a world where death by suicide is no longer a leading cause of death and where people who are attempting or thinking about suicide feel comfortable seeking help which is provided capably and respectfully to all.
translations.reference: Umbono weWHO wumhlaba lapho ukufa ngokuzibulala kungaseyona imbangela ehamba phambili yokufa nalapho abantu abazama noma abacabanga ukuzibulala bezizwa bekhululekile ukufuna usizo olunikezwa ngokusemandleni nangenhlonipho kubo bonke.
translations.hypothesis: Umbono we-WHO uwusikhathi esikhuluma lapho ukufa ngenxa yokuzibulala akuyona ingxenye enkulu yezinkinga zokufa, futhi lapho abantu abazama noma abacabanga ngokuzibulala bazizwa benelukuluku lokufuna usizo, okuhlinzekwa ngendlela efanele futhi enenhlanhla kubo bonke.

translations.source: Sustainable development Overview: Sustainable development is a broad term to describe policies, projects and investments that provide benefits today without sacrificing environmental, social and personal health in the future. These policies are often described as green because they focus on limiting the impact of development on the environment. However, the benefits of sustainable development are also felt across a wide cross section of human health and well-being, including reductions in pollution- and environment-related disease, improved health outcomes and decreased stress. As the threats of climate change become increasingly important, win-win strategies for mitigation, health improvement and cost savings offer a range of advantages for various stakeholders.
translations.reference: Ukuthuthuka okungashabalali Uhlolojikelele: Intuthuko esimeme yigama elibanzi elichaza izinqubomgomo, amaphrojekthi kanye nokutshalwa kwezimali okuhlinzeka ngezinzuzo namuhla ngaphandle kokudela impilo yemvelo, yezenhlalo kanye neyomuntu siqu esikhathini esizayo. Lezi zinqubomgomo zivame ukuchazwa njengeziluhlaza ngenxa yokuthi zigxile ekunciphiseni umthelela wentuthuko endaweni ezungezile. Kodwa ke, izinzuzo zentuthuko esimeme nazo zizwakala engxenyeni ebanzi yezempilo kanye nenhlalakahle yabantu, okuhlanganisa ukunciphisa ukungcola- kanye nezifo ezihlobene nemvelo, imiphumela yezempilo ethuthukisiwe kanye nokuncipha kokucindezeleka. Njengoba izinsongo zokuguquguquka kwesimo sezulu zibaluleka ngokwandayo, amasu aphumelelayo okunciphisa, ukuthuthukiswa kwezempilo kanye nokongiwa kwezindleko kunikeza izinzuzo eziningi kubabambiqhaza abahlukahlukene.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuthuthukiswa okulinganiselwe: Ukuthuthukiswa okulinganiselwe kuyindlebe ebanzi esetshenziselwa ukuchaza imigomo, amaphrojekthi kanye nezimali ezihlinzeka ngamabhonasi namuhla ngaphandle kokulahla impilo yezempilo, yomphakathi kanye yomuntu esikhathini esizayo. Le migomo evamise ukubizwa ngokuthi "eyama-"phuzi" ngoba igxile ekunciphiseni umthelela wokuthuthukiswa emhlabathini. Kodwa, izinzuzo zokuthuthukiswa okulinganiselwe zizwa nakho ezindaweni eziningi zempilo kanye nokuziphatha kwabantu, okubalwa ukuncipha kwezifo ezihlobene nokungcola kanye nomhlaba, ukuthuthukiswa kwempilo kanye nokuncipha kwengcindezi. Njengoba izingozi zoshintsho lwekilayithi ziba nobubanzi obukhulu, izinqubo ezihle kakhulu zokunciphisa, ukuthuthukiswa kwempilo kanye nokonga izindleko zinikeza izinzuzo ezahlukene kubafakazi abahlukene.

translations.source: For example, greener health care operations can generate patient and worker health benefits while also saving energy, mitigating climate risks and creating long-term cost savings. The World Health Organization is committed to pursuing sustainable development in all its work to help protect the people of tomorrow from the health growing health risks of today. Impact: Many sustainable development strategies can offer significant wins for health, climate and the environment, and the benefits can be seen almost immediately. For example, many health and development goals can be achieved simultaneously by tackling air pollution, which is responsible for an estimated 7 million premature deaths annually. Polluting emissions include powerful short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—particularly black carbon, ozone and methane—which are very harmful to health but have only brief atmospheric lifetimes.
translations.reference: Isibonelo, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuluhlaza kungakhiqiza izinzuzo zezempilo zesiguli kanye nabasebenzi kuyilapho futhi konga amandla, kunciphisa izingozi zesimo sezulu futhi kudala ukonga izindleko zesikhathi eside. IWorld Health Organisation izibophezele ekuphishekeleni intuthuko esimeme kuwo wonke umsebenzi wayo wokusiza ukuvikela abantu bakusasa ezingozini zezempilo ezikhulayo zanamuhla. Umthelela: Amasu amaningi entuthuko esimeme anganikeza izinzuzo ezibalulekile kwezempilo, isimo sezulu kanye nemvelo, futhi izinzuzo zingabonakala ngokushesha. Isibonelo, izinhloso eziningi zezempilo nentuthuko zingafinyelelwa ngesikhathi esisodwa ngokubhekana nokungcoliswa komoya, okuyimbangela yokufa okulinganiselwa ezigidini ezingu-7 ngaphambi kwesikhathi ngonyaka. Ukukhishwa okungcolisayo kuhlanganisa izinto ezingcolisa umoya zesikhashana esifushane (SLCPs)—ikakhulukazi ikhabhoni emnyama, i-ozone nemethane—eziyingozi kakhulu empilweni kodwa ezinokuphila okufushane nje komkhathi.
translations.hypothesis: Ngokwesibonelo, ukuthi izikhungo zempilo zisebenze ngendlela eco-friendly, kungathuthukisa impilo yeziguli kanye nabasebenzi, kuyilapho kugcinwa amandla, kuncishiswe izingozi ezibalasweni kanye nokonga izindleko kakhulu kakhulu. Uhlelo Lwamazwe Ngamazwe Lempilo (World Health Organization) lizibophezele ekuthuthukiseni ngendlela elingqubuzana, kuzo zonke izinto ezikwenzayo, ukuze kusizwe ukuvikela abantu besikhathi esizayo ezinkingeni zempilo ezikhulayo namuhla. Umphumela: Izinhlelo eziningi zokuthuthukiswa ngendlela elingqubuzana zingaba nomthelela omkhulu empilweni, ezibalasweni kanye nomhlaba, futhi lezi zinzuzo zingabonwa ngokushesha kakhulu. Ngokwesibonelo, inhloso eziningi zempilo kanye nokuthuthukiswa zingafinyezelwa ngasikhathi esisodwa ngokulwa nokungcola komoya, okubalwa ukuthi kubanga ukufa okungenasikhathi esilinganiselwe cishe ngamashumi ayisikhombisa ngonyaka. Ukungcola okukhishwa kulo kuhlanganisa izinto ezibulalayo ezibalasweni ezisheshayo (SLCPs)—ikakhulukazi i-carbon emnyama, i-ozone kanye ne-methane—ezimbi kakhulu empilweni, kodwa zinomjikelezo omfushane kakhulu emkhathini.

translations.source: Transport policies and investments that favour clean public transport, along with walking and cycling, can have a dramatic impact on air quality. This can reduce multiple health risks at the same time, including stroke, heart attack, lung disease and some cancers. They can also reduce the estimated 1.25 million deaths annually from traffic injury, while also improving access to health services, particularly in densely populated areas. Sustainable development housing policies can further reduce emissions through considerations such as building siting and land use, choices of construction materials, design features and ventilation and energy. WHO response: WHO’s work is guided by the Sustainable Development Goals, particularly Goal 3: “Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.”
translations.reference: Izinqubomgomo zezokuthutha nokutshalwa kwezimali okuvuna izithuthi zomphakathi ezihlanzekile, kanye nokuhamba ngezinyawo nokuhamba ngamabhayisikili, kungaba nomthelela omkhulu kwikhwalithi yomoya. Lokhu kunganciphisa izingozi eziningi zempilo ngesikhathi esisodwa, okuhlanganisa isifo sohlangothi, isifo senhliziyo, isifo samaphaphu kanye neminye imidlavuza. Bangakwazi futhi ukunciphisa inani lokufa okulinganiselwa ezigidini ezingu-1.25 ngonyaka ngenxa yokulimala komgwaqo, kuyilapho bethuthukisa ukufinyelela ezinsizeni zezempilo, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezinabantu abaningi. Izinqubomgomo zezindlu ezithuthukile zingaqhubeka nokunciphisa ukukhishwa kwekhabhoni ngokucabangela okufana nezindawo zokwakha kanye nokusetshenziswa komhlaba, ukukhetha kwezinto zokwakha, izici zemiklamo kanye nokukhipha umoya namandla. Impendulo yeWHO: Umsebenzi weWHO uqondiswa izinjongo Zokuthuthukiswa Okusimeme, ikakhulukazi umgomo 3: “Ukuqinisekisa ukuphila okunempilo futhi ukhuthaze inhlalakahle yabo bonke ubudala.”
translations.hypothesis: Izinqubomgomo zokuhamba nezindleko ezikhuthaza ukuhamba komphakathi okunokhahlelo, kanye nokuhamba ngezinyawo kanye nokugibela amabhayisikili, zingaba nomthelela omkhulu kakhulu ekubeni komoya. Lokhu kunganciphisa izingozi eziningi zezempilo ngesikhathi esisodwa, okubalwa kuzo ukugula kwezinhlangothi, ukushaywa kwehlazo, ukugula kwezimpumulo kanye nezinye izifo zombili. Kunganciphisa futhi ukubalwa kwezigidi ezingu-1.25 zombili abantu abagulwa ngonyaka ngenxa yezinazo zokuhamba, kuyilapho kuthuthukisa futhi ukufinyelela kulezi zinsizakalo zezempilo, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezinezakhiwo eziningi. Izinqubomgomo zokwakhiwa ezisondelene nokuthuthukiswa okusimeme zinganciphisa ukukhishwa kwezinto eziyingozi ngendlela yokucabangela izinto ezifana nokubekwa kwakhiwo, ukusetshenziswa komhlaba, ukukhethwa kwezinto zokwakha, ukuklanywa, kanye nokunemba kanye nomsebenzi kagesi. Impendulo ye-WHO: Umsebenzi we-WHO uholwa ngamajele e-Sustainable Development Goals, ikakhulukazi nge-Goal 3: "Qinisekisa ukuphila okunempilo futhi kuthuthukise ukufaneleka kwabo bonke, ngaso sonke isikhathi."

translations.source: The Goals inform projects and policies across the Organization, including guidelines on housing, urban development, transportation systems and health care delivery. For example, the WHO Housing and health guidelines, first published in 2018, highlight the increasing impact of housing conditions on human health in light of urban growth, climate and demographic changes. The guidelines provide Member States, partners and the public with evidence-based recommendations relevant to inadequate living space (crowding), low and high indoor temperatures, injury hazards in the home, and accessibility of housing for people with functional impairments. The Urban Health Initiative (UHI) also focuses on ways for cities to enable good health by catalysing effective action on urban air pollution and short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—saving lives by linking health, environment and sustainable development. WHO also collaborates with the Climate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) on the Breathe Life campaign, which aims to cut air pollution and reduce the 7 million premature deaths annually that it causes.
translations.reference: Izinjongo zazisa amaphrojekthi nezinqubomgomo kuyo yonke iNhlangano, okuhlanganisa imihlahlandlela mayelana nezindlu, ukuthuthukiswa kwamadolobha, izinhlelo zokuthutha kanye nokulethwa kokunakekelwa kwezempilo. Isibonelo, imihlahlandlela yeWHO Yezindlu kanye nezempilo, eyanyatheliswa okokuqala ngo-2018, iqokomisa umthelela okhulayo wezimo zezindlu empilweni yabantu ngenxa yokukhula kwedolobha, isimo sezulu kanye nezinguquko zabantu. Imihlahlandlela ihlinzeka Amazwe Angamalungu, ozakwethu kanye nomphakathi izincomo ezisekelwe ebufakazini ezifanele ngendawo yokuhlala enganele (ukugcwala), izinga lokushisa eliphansi neliphezulu lasendlini, izingozi zokulimala ekhaya, kanye nokufinyeleleka kwezindlu zabantu abanokukhubazeka kokusebenza. I-Urban Health Initiative (UHI) iphinde igxile ezindleleni zamadolobha zokwenza impilo enhle ngokugqugquzela isenzo esisebenzayo ekungcoleni komoya wasemadolobheni kanye nokungcola kwesimo sezulu esiphila isikhathi esifushane okuyishort-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—ukusindisa izimpilo ngokuxhumanisa impilo, imvelo nentuthuko esimeme. IWHO iphinde ibambisane neClimate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) emkhankasweni weBreathe Life, ohlose ukunqamula ukungcoliswa komoya kanye nokunciphisa ukufa kwabantu ngaphambi kwesikhathi abayizigidi eziyi-7 minyaka yonke okubangwayo.
translations.hypothesis: Le mizamo ihlela iziphrojekthi nezinqubomgomo kulo wonke umgomo, okubalwa kulo imihlahlandlela mayelana nokuhlala, ukuthuthukiswa kwedolobha, izinhlelo zokuhamba kanye nokunikezwa kwezinsizakalo zezempilo. Ngokwesibonelo, imihlahlandlela ye-WHO mayelana nokuhlala kanye nezempilo, eyashicilelwa okokuqala ngo-2018, igcizelela ukukhula kwempemba yezimo zokuhlala empilweni yabantu, ngokuya ngokukhula kwedolobha, ushintsho lwemvelo kanye nezinguquko zombanzi. Le mihlahlandlela ihlinzeka izizwe ezilunga, abalingani kanye nomphakathi ngeminye iminye yezeluleko ezisekelwe ezincwadini ezifanele ezihlobene nendawo yokuhlala enganele (ukugcwaliswa), izinga eliphansi neliphezulu lokushisa ngaphakathi, izingozi zokulimala ekhaya, kanye nokufinyeleleka kwezindlu kubantu abanokukhubazeka. Uhlelo lwe-Urban Health Initiative (UHI) futhi ligxile ezindleleni zamadolobha zokwenza impilo ibe ngcono ngokukhuthaza izenzo ezisebenzayo mayelana nokungcola komoya edolobheni kanye nezinto ezibulala umoya ezisheshayo (i-SLCPs) - ukulondoloza impilo ngokuxhumanisa impilo, imvelo kanye nokuthuthukiswa okusimeme. I-WHO futhi isebenza ngokubambisana ne-Climate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) kwi-kampeni i-"Breathe Life," okuhloswe kuyo ukunciphisa ukungcola komoya futhi kuncishiswe ukufa okungamanga okuyi-7 million ngonyaka okubangelwa yilo.

translations.source: Syphilis Overview: Syphilis is a bacterial sexually transmitted infection (STI) caused by Treponema pallidum which results in substantial morbidity and mortality, and it is curable. Syphilis is transmitted through sexual contact with the infectious lesions, via blood transfusion or from a pregnant woman to her fetus. Mother-to-child transmission of syphilis is usually devastating to the fetus in cases that were not detected or treated sufficiently early in pregnancy. Maternal syphilis, when untreated, treated late or not treated with penicillin, results in adverse birth outcomes (ABOs) estimated in 50−80% of cases, depending on the stage of syphilis.
translations.reference: Ugcunsula Uhlolojikelele: I-syphilis isifo esithathelwana ngocansi segciwane (STI) esibangelwa i-Treponema pallidum esiholela ekuguleni okukhulu nokufa, futhi siyelapheka. ISyphilis isakazwa ngokuthintana ngokocansi nezilonda ezithathelwanayo, ngokumpontshelwa igazi noma isuka kowesifazane okhulelwe iye embungwini wakhe. Ukusulelana ngogcunsula kusuka kumama kuya enganeni kuvame ukulimaza umbungu ezimeni ezingazange zibonwe noma zingelashwe ngokwanele ekuqaleni kokukhulelwa. Isyphilis kamama, lapho ingelashwa, yelashwa sekwephuzile noma ingelashwa ngepenicillin, iphumela emiphumeleni yokuzalwa engemihle i-adverse birth outcomes (ABOs) elinganiselwa ku-50−80% wezigameko, kuye ngesigaba sogcunsula.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubuyekezwa kwe-Syphilis: I-Syphilis yigciwane elidluliselwa ngokoxinisa (STI) edinga ukwelashwa, ebangelwa yi-Treponema pallidum. Le gciwane idinga ukwelashwa futhi ingabangela izinkinga ezinkulu kanye nokufa. I-Syphilis idluliselwa ngokuxhumana ngokoxinisa, ngokusetshenziswa kwegazi, noma kusukela kumama okhulelwe ezinganeni zakhe. Ukudluliselwa kwe-syphilis kusukela kumama ezinganeni zabo kuvame ukuba nomthelela omubi kakhulu ezinganeni uma kungatholakali noma kungwelashwe ngokushesha kakhulu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa. Uma i-syphilis kumama ingwelashwe, welashwe kamuva, noma ingwelashwe nge-penicillin, ingabangela izinkinga ezinkulu ekuzalweni (ABOs) ezimweni eziningi (cishe ku-50-80%), kuye ngesigaba se-syphilis.

translations.source: These ABOs are often severe and include stillbirth (most commonly), neonatal death, prematurity, low birth weight, and congenitally infected infants. Syphilis can be prevented through safer sex practices including the correct and consistent use of condoms. Many people with syphilis do not have any symptoms or have only minor symptoms that go unnoticed. Identifying infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes including congenital syphilis. Screening can be done using rapid tests that can provide results in less than 20 minutes, allowing for immediate treatment.
translations.reference: Lawa ma-ABO avame ukuba nzima futhi ahlanganisa ukubeletha (ikakhulukazi), ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, ngaphambi kwesikhathi, ukuzalwa okunesisindo esiphansi, kanye nezinsana ezizalwa nazo. ISyphilis ingavinjelwa ngokusebenzisa izinqubo zocansi eziphephile ezihlanganisa ukusetshenziswa okufanele nokungaguquguquki kwamakhondomu. Abantu abaningi abanogcunsula abanazo izimpawu noma banezimpawu ezincane kuphela ezinganakwa. Ukuhlonza ukutheleleka ngokuhlolwa kwaselabhorethri kanye nokwelashwa kwamacala amahle kuzovimbela ukudluliselwa okuqhubekayo kanye nemiphumela yokukhulelwa engemihle kuhlanganise nogcunsula wokuzalwa. Ukuhlolwa kungenziwa kusetshenziswa ukuhlola okusheshayo okunganikeza imiphumela ngaphansi kwemizuzu engama-20, okuvumela ukwelashwa ngokushesha.
translations.hypothesis: Lezi zifo ze-ABO zivame ukuba yizinto ezinkulu futhi zihlanganisa ukufa kwengane engazalwa (okuyinto evamile kakhulu), ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, ukuzalwa ngaphambi kosuku olufanele, ukuba nenani eliphansi kwesisindo sokuzalwa, kanye nezingane ezizalwe zinesifo. Ukugula ngesifo esibucayi kungagwenywa ngokusebenzisa izindlela eziphephile zokuxhumana, okuhlanganisa ukusetshenziswa okufanele nokulinganiselwe kwezinto zokuvikela. Abaningi abantu abagulwa ngesifo esibucayi abanazo izimpawu, noma banazo izimpawu ezincane ezibonakala. Ukutholwa kwalesi sifo ngemitholampilo kanye nokwelashwa kwabagulwa kuzoholela ekwenzeni ukuthi isifo lingatsalwe futhi kuvinjelwe imiphumela emibi yokukhulelwa, okuhlanganisa ukugula ngesifo esibucayi. Ukuhlaziywa kungenziwa kusetshenziswa ukuhlolwa okusheshayo okungahlinzeka ngemiphumela ngaphansi kwamaminithi ayi-20, okwenza ukwelashwa kube mashesho.

translations.source: When untreated, syphilis lasts many years and goes through different stages. Treatment for syphilis is done with injectable penicillin benzathine, with 1 to 3 doses depending on the stage of the disease. Only penicillin can prevent congenital syphilis. Treatment with penicillin has been hampered by periodic and prolonged shortages of benzathine penicillin in numerous countries, including high-, low- and middle-income countries. Symptoms: Many people with syphilis do not present symptoms or do not perceive them.
translations.reference: Uma ungelashwa, ugcunsula uhlala iminyaka eminingi futhi udlula ezigabeni ezihlukene. Ukwelashwa kwe-syphilis kwenziwa nge-penicillin yomjovo i-benzathine, ngemithamo engu-1 kuya kwemi-3 kuye ngesigaba sesifo. Ipenicillin kuphela engavimbela ugcunsula wokuzalwa. Ukwelashwa nge-penicillin kuye kwaphazanyiswa ukushoda ngezikhathi ezithile kanye nesikhathi eside kwebenzathine penicillin emazweni amaningi, kuhlanganise namazwe anemali engenayo ephezulu, ephansi naphakathi. Izimpawu: Abantu abaningi abanogcunsula abazibonisi izimpawu noma abaziboni.
translations.hypothesis: Uma engalungiswa, ukugula okuthiwa i-syphilis kugcina iminyaka eminingi futhi kuhlanganisa izigaba ezahlukene. Ukwelashwa kwe-syphilis kwenziwa ngokusetshenziswa kwe-penicillin benzathine edluliselwa ngokusetshenziswa kwe-syringe, kanti amadosi angaphakathi koku-3 kuxhomekile esigabeni somdlavuza. Kupenicillin kuphela okwenza kube nokwazi ukuvimbela i-syphilis engaphakanyisweni. Ukwelashwa nge-penicillin kuye kwethulwe izinkinga ngenxa yokuntuleka okuphindaphindiwe nokude kwe-benzathine penicillin ezweni eliningi, okubalwa nezifunda eziphezulu, eziphansi kanye nazo ezephesheya. Izimpawu: Abantu abaningi abagulwa nge-syphilis ababonisa izimpawu noma abazibheki.

translations.source: Untreated, syphilis lasts many years and is characterized into different stages. Sexual transmission typically occurs during early stages, i.e., up to 2 years after infection. During the initial phase (primary syphilis), which lasts on average 21 days, a solitary, painless, usually hard and round sore (chancre) appears at the site of inoculation (contact), often in the vagina, penis or anus (but it may also be extra-genital) and may go unnoticed. The chancre heals with or without treatment within 3 to 10 weeks. If untreated, the disease progresses to the secondary stage.
translations.reference: Uma ungalashwa, ugcunsula uthatha iminyaka eminingi futhi ubonakala ngezigaba ezahlukene. Ukusulelana ngokocansi kuvame ukuvela ezigabeni zokuqala, okungukuthi, kuze kufike eminyakeni emi-2 ngemva kokutheleleka. Esigabeni sokuqala (ugcunsula oyinhloko), esihlala ngokwesilinganiso izinsuku ezingama-21, isilonda esisodwa, esingenabuhlungu, ngokuvamile esiqinile nesiyindilinga (chancre) sivela endaweni yokujova (ukuthintwa), ngokuvamile esithweni sangasese, epipini noma endunu kungase futhi kube ngaphandle kwesitho sobulili) futhi kungase kungabonakali. Ichancre yelapheka ngokwelashwa noma ngaphandle kokwelashwa phakathi kwamaviki ama-3 kuya kwayi-10. Uma singelashwa, lesi sifo sidlulela esigabeni sesibili.
translations.hypothesis: Uma engalungiswa, isifo esibizwa nge-syphilis lingahlala iminyaka eminingi futhi linemithetho ehlukene. Ukudluliselwa ngokombungane ngokuvamile kwenzeka ngesikhathi samaphuzu okuqala, okungukuthi, kuze kube yiminyaka emibili ngemuva kokutholakala kwesifo. Ngaphakathi kwesigaba sokuqala (i-syphilis eyisikhathi sokuqala), okuhlala izinsuku eziyi-21 ngokwesilinganiso, kubonakala uphinde omuhle, ongabubuli, futhi ngokuvamile oqinile futhi ogijimile (i-chancre) endaweni lapho kutholwe khona isifo (ukuxhumana), njengoba kungenzeka kwi-vagina, i-penisi noma i-anus (kodwa kungaba nakwezinye izindawo ngaphandle kwezombungane) futhi kungase kungabheki. I-chancre iyaphefumula ngaphandle kokwelashwa noma ngelokwelashwa ngaphakathi kwamawingu angu-3 kuya ku-10. Uma engalungiswa, isifo siqhubeka esigabeni sesibili.

translations.source: Secondary syphilis is characterized by a rash that can vary widely and mimic other infectious or non-infectious conditions, but characteristically affects the palms and soles. The rash is non-itchy and can be minimal enough to be overlooked. In warm and moist areas of the body, such as the anus and labia, large white or grey raised lesions may develop at the location of the primary chancre (condyloma lata). The symptoms and signs of secondary syphilis spontaneously resolve, even without treatment. Without treatment, the latent stage starts.
translations.reference: Isyphilis yesibili ibonakala ngokuqubuka okungahlukahluka kakhulu futhi kulingise ezinye izimo ezithathelwanayo noma ezingatheleleki, kodwa ngokuphawulekayo kuthinta izintende nezinyawo. Ukuqubuka akulume futhi kungaba kuncane ngokwanele ukuba kunganakwa. Ezindaweni ezifudumele nezimanzi zomzimba, njenge-anus kanye ne-labia, izilonda ezinkulu ezimhlophe noma ezimpunga eziphakanyisiwe zingase zikhule endaweni yechancre eyinhloko (condyloma lata). Izimpawu nezimpawu zesyphilis yesibili ziyazixazulula ngokuzenzekelayo, ngisho nangaphandle kokwelashwa. Ngaphandle kokwelashwa, isigaba esicashile siqala.
translations.hypothesis: ISifo esibucayi se-syphilis sikhonjiswa yizinto ezibomvu ezangcolile ezangahluka kakhulu futhi zingafana nezimo eziningi ezibulalayo noma ezingabulali, kodwa ngokuvamile zithinta izandla nezinyawo. Lezi zinto ezibomvu azibuthisi futhi zingaba zimbalwa kangangokuthi zingabonakali. Ezindaweni ezifudumele nezimanzi zomzimba, njengendawo yangemuva kanye nezimpumulo, zingase zivele izinto ezinkulu ezimhlophe noma ezigqamile endaweni lapho kuye kwaba yisifo esiqalayo (condyloma lata). Izimpawu nezibonakaliso zesifo esibucayi se-syphilis ziyakhululeka ngokuzenzakalela, ngisho nangaphandle kokwelashwa. Ngaphandle kokwelashwa, isigaba esifihliwe siqala.

translations.source: Latent syphilis presents no clinical symptoms or signs and the treatment is different from the early phase. After years or decades without treatment, neurological and cardiovascular diseases among others may occur. Treatment: Syphilis diagnosis is based on the person’s history, physical examination, laboratory testing and sometimes radiology, as symptoms are not common or noticeable. Identifying asymptomatic infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes, including congenital syphilis. Laboratory tests for syphilis include direct detection of T. pallidum or indirect methods such as serology.
translations.reference: Isyphilis equbisile ayivezi zimpawu zomtholampilo noma izimpawu futhi ukwelashwa kuhlukile kwesigaba sokuqala. Ngemva kweminyaka noma amashumi eminyaka ngaphandle kokwelashwa, izifo zezinzwa nenhliziyo phakathi kwabanye zingase zenzeke. Ukwelashwa: Ukuxilongwa kwesyphilis kusekelwe emlandweni womuntu, ukuhlolwa komzimba, ukuhlolwa kwaselabhorethri futhi ngezinye izikhathi iradiology, njengoba izimpawu zingavamile noma zingabonakali. Ukuhlonza ukutheleleka nge-asymptomatic ngokusebenzisa izivivinyo zaselabhorethri kanye nokwelashwa kwamacala amahle kuzovimbela ukudluliselwa okuqhubekayo kanye nemiphumela yokukhulelwa engemihle, kuhlanganise necongenital syphilis. Ukuhlolwa kwaselabhorethri kwesyphilis kufaka phakathi ukutholwa okuqondile kwe-T. pallidum noma izindlela ezingaqondile njengeserology.
translations.hypothesis: Ukugula ngesifo esibandayo okungalukhombiswanga akubonisi zimpawu noma izimpawu zokwelashwa, futhi ukwelashwa kuhluke kuleli qopheka lokuqala. Ngemuva kweminyaka noma amashumi anyanga ngaphandle kokwelashwa, izifo zengqondo kanye nezifo zekhadi, phakathi kwezinye, zingase zivele. Ukwelashwa: Ukuxilongwa kwesifo esibandayo kususwa ngomlando womuntu, ukuhlolwa komzimba, ukuhlolwa ezilabhorethri, kanye ngezinye izikhathi nge-radiology, njengoba izimpawu azijwayelekile noma ezibonakalayo. Ukutholwa kokugula okungalukhombiswanga ngokuhlolwa ezilabhorethri kanye nokwelashwa kwabagulayo abatholwe ukuthi bagula kuzovimbela ukusasazeka okwengeziwe kanye nemiphumela emibi yokukhulelwa, okubalwa ukugula ngesifo esibandayo okuzalwe ngaphakathi. Ukuhlolwa ezilabhorethri kwesifo esibandayo kubandakanya ukutholwa okuyiqondile kwe-T. pallidum noma izindlela ezibonakalayo, njenge-serology.

translations.source: Rapid screening and diagnostic tests are also available and can provide results in less than 20 minutes, facilitating immediate treatment initiation. WHO recommends syphilis to be treated with injectable penicillin (benzathine penicillin G) with 1 or 3 doses, depending on the stage of the disease. WHO has detailed treatment guidelines for syphilis, and one specifically for the screening and treatment of syphilis in pregnancy. Congenital syphilis There are currently no diagnostic tests for congenital syphilis.
translations.reference: Ukuhlolwa okusheshayo nokuhlolwa kokuxilonga nakho kuyatholakala futhi kunganikeza imiphumela ngaphansi kwemizuzu engama-20, kube lula ukuqaliswa kokwelashwa ngokushesha. IWHO incoma ukuthi ugcunsula welashwe ngomjovo wepenicillin (benzathine penicillin G) ngomthamo owodwa noma emi-3, kuye ngesigaba sesifo. IWHO ineziqondiso ezinemininingwane yokwelapha ugcunsula, kanye neyokuhlolelwa kanye nokwelashwa kogcunsula ekukhulelweni. ICongenital syphilis Okwamanje azikho izivivinyo zokuxilonga ze-syphilis yokuzalwa.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlolwa okusheshayo kanye nokuhlaziywa kwezifo kuyatholakala futhi kunganikeza imiphumela ngaphansi kwamaminithi ayi-20, okwenza kube lula ukuqala ukwelashwa ngokushesha. I-WHO incoma ukuthi i-syphilis elashwe ngokusetshenziswa kwe-penicillin edluliselwa ngokusetshezelwa (i-benzathine penicillin G) ngamadosi ayodwa noma amathathu, ngokuya ngesimo sesifo. I-WHO inemihlahlandlela enemininingwane yokwelashwa ye-syphilis, futhi enye ikhethe kakhulu yokuhlolwa nokwelashwa kwe-syphilis ekhubazekile. I-Syphilis ekhubazekile okwamanje ayikho ukuhlolwa kwezifo kwe-syphilis ekhubazekile.

translations.source: All live or stillborn infants of women with syphilis should be examined for evidence of congenital syphilis. Live-born infants should be examined and tested at birth to define treatment requirement. When indicated, also at monthly intervals for 3 months until the infant’s serology are, and remain, negative, as maternal antibodies can be passively transmitted to the baby during pregnancy.
translations.reference: Zonke izinsana eziphilayo noma ezizalwa sezishonile zabesifazane abanogcunsula kufanele zihlolwe ukuze kutholwe ubufakazi bogcunsula abazalwa nabo. Izingane ezizalwa ziphila kufanele zihlolwe futhi zihlolwe lapho zizalwa ukuze kuchazwe isidingo sokwelashwa. Uma kukhonjisiwe, futhi ngezikhathi zanyanga zonke izinyanga ezingu-3 kuze kube yilapho i-serology yosana, futhi ihlala, ingalungile, njengoba amasosha omzimba kamama angadluliselwa kumntwana ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa.
translations.hypothesis: Wonke ama-infanti aphilayo noma alashwe ngemuva kokuzalwa, ezalelwe ngabafazi abanoluthi, kufanele ahlolwe ukuze kubonwe ukuthi anoluthi obuthakathazayo. Ama-infanti aphilayo kufanele ahlolwe futhi avivinjelwe ngesikhathi sokuzalwa ukuze kutholwe ukuthi kudingeka ukwelashwa yini. Uma kudingeka, kufanele futhi bahlolwe njalo ngenyanga cishe izinyanga ezintathu kuze kube yilapho ukuhlolwa kwegesi yegazi yendawo yengane kungabonakali ukuthi kunoluthi, ngoba ama-antibodi omama angadluliselwa ngokuqondile kumntwana ngesikhathi komama elithwale.

translations.source: Taeniasis and cysticercosis Overview: Infection with the tapeworm Taenia solium can result in two distinct conditions: taeniasis and cysticercosis. Taeniasis is the intestinal infection with the tapeworm and it occurs when a person eats raw or undercooked, infected pork. Taeniasis has no major impact on human health. However, tapeworm eggs pass in the faeces of the tapeworm carrier and in the absence of a proper sanitation may contaminate the environment.
translations.reference: ITaeniasis kanye ne-cysticercosis Uhlolojikelele: Ukutheleleka nge-tapeworm i-Taenia solium kungabangela izimo ezimbili ezihlukene: itaeniasis kanye necysticercosis. ITaeniasis isifo samathumbu esinezikelemu futhi kwenzeka lapho umuntu edla ingulube eluhlaza noma engaphekiwe kahle, enegciwane. ITaeniasis ayinawo umthelela omkhulu empilweni yomuntu. Kodwa ke, amaqanda esikelemu adlula endle yalowo ophethe izikelemu futhi uma kungekho ukukhucululwa kwendle okufanele kungangcolisa imvelo.
translations.hypothesis: Taeniasis kanye ne-cysticercosis: Ukugaywa yi-tapeworm ethi yi-Taenia solium kungaholela ezimweni ezimbili ezihlukile: i-taeniasis kanye ne-cysticercosis. I-taeniasis yukuqeqeshwa kwe-tapeworm ezinswini, futhi kwenzeka lapho umuntu edla inyama yengulube engenamanzi noma engaluhlosiwe, egaywe. I-taeniasis ayinazo izimpilo ezinkulu ezibangela ukukhathazeka kubantu. Kodwa-ke, amagugu e-tapeworm adlule ezimpungwini zalowo ogaywe yi-tapeworm, futhi uma kungenzeki ukuhlanza kahle, kungahlanza imvelo.

translations.source: While tapeworm eggs are infective for pigs, T. solium eggs may also infect humans if they are ingested by a person (via the fecal-oral route, or by ingesting contaminated food or water). Ingestion of tapeworm eggs causes infection with the larval parasite in the tissues such as muscles, skin, eyes and the central nervous system (human cysticercosis), with possible devastating effects on health. When cysts develop in the brain, the condition is referred to as neurocysticercosis. Symptoms: Taeniasis is usually characterized by mild and non-specific symptoms associated to an intestinal infection (abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhoea, etc.). These symptoms may continue until the tapeworm dies following treatment, otherwise it may live for years.
translations.reference: Nakuba amaqanda e-tapeworm ehlasela izingulube, amaqanda e-T. solium angase atheleleke kubantu uma emukelwe ngumuntu (ngomzila we-fecal-oral, noma ngokudla ukudla noma amanzi angcolile). Ukungenwa amaqanda ezikelemu kubangela ukutheleleka nge-parasite yezibungu ezicutshini ezinjengezicubu, isikhumba, amehlo kanye nesimiso sezinzwa esimaphakathi (human cysticercosis), okungaba nemiphumela elimazayo empilweni. Lapho amacysts ekhula ebuchosheni, lesi simo sibizwa ngokuthi ineurocysticercosis. Izimpawu: ITaeniasis ivamise ukubonakala ngezimpawu ezithambile nezingaqondile ezihambisana nokutheleleka kwamathumbu (ubuhlungu besisu, isicanucanu, isifo sohudo, njll.). Lezi zimpawu zingaqhubeka kuze kube yilapho isikelemu siyafa ngemva kokwelashwa, ngaphandle kwalokho singaphila iminyaka.
translations.hypothesis: Nakuba amakhuni ezilwane ezinkukhu angathinta izinkukhu, amakhuni e-T. solium angaphinde athinte abantu uma afakelwa umuntu (ngendlela yokufakwa kwezinto ezisuka emgqeni, noma ngokufakwa kwezinto ezitshaliwe kakhukhuni noma emanzini). Ukufakwa kwamakhuni ezilwane ezinkukhu kungaholela ekugwetshweni ngobugwayi obuncane ezimpilweni, njengamathambo, isikhumba, amehlo kanye nenhliziyo yezincebe (ukugwetshwa kwezinkukhu kwezinto ezifikelwe ngaphakathi kwezinto eziphilayo emzimbeni wabantu), okungase kube nomthelela omubi kakhulu empilweni. Uma izinto ezifikelwe ngaphakathi kwezinto eziphilayo zithuthuka ekuhlangeni, lesi simo kubizwa ngokuthi i-neurocysticercosis. Izimpawu: Ukugwetshwa kwezilwane ezinkukhu ngokuvamile kubonakala ngezimpawu ezincane futhi ezingacacile ezihlobene nokugwetshwa kwezinto ezisuka emgqeni (ukungakhathazeka kwegazi, ukugula, ukugula, njll.). Lezi zimpawu zingaqhubeka kuze kube yilapho isilwane esinkukhu sishona ngemuva kokwelashwa, ngaphandle kwalokho, singahlala iminyaka.

translations.source: For cysticercosis, the incubation period is variable, and infected people may remain asymptomatic for years. In some endemic regions, infected people may develop visible or palpable nodules (a small solid bump or node which is solid that can be detected by touch) beneath the skin. Neurocysticercosis is associated with a variety of signs and symptoms depending on the number, size, stage and location of the pathological changes as well as the host’s immune response and the parasite’s genotype, but it can also be clinically asymptomatic. Symptoms may include chronic headaches, blindness, seizures (epilepsy if they are recurrent), hydrocephalus, meningitis, dementia and symptoms caused by lesions occupying spaces of the central nervous system. Treatment: The treatment of taeniasis by Taenia solium is important to prevent neurocysticercosis and as a tool to assist in controlling or stopping the parasite transmission cycle.
translations.reference: Ngecysticercosis, isikhathi sokufukamela siyahlukahluka, futhi abantu abangenwe yileli gciwane bangase bahlale bengabonakali iminyaka. Kwezinye izifunda ezitholakala kuphela, abantu abanaleli gciwane bangase babe namaqhuqhuva abonakalayo noma aphathekayo (iqhubu elincane eliqinile noma inode eqinile engabonwa ngokuthintwa) ngaphansi kwesikhumba. INeurocysticercosis ihlotshaniswa nezinhlobonhlobo zezimpawu nezimpawu kuye ngenombolo, usayizi, isigaba kanye nendawo yezinguquko ze-pathological kanye nokusabela kokuzivikela komzimba obambe iqhaza kanye ne-genotype ye-parasite, kodwa futhi ingaba i-asymptomatic emtholampilo. Izimpawu zingase zihlanganisa ubuhlungu bekhanda obungapheli, ukungaboni, ukuquleka (isithuthwane uma siphindaphinda), ihydrocephalus, imeningitis, ukuwohloka komqondo kanye nezimpawu ezibangelwa izilonda ezithatha izikhala zesimiso sezinzwa esimaphakathi. Ukwelashwa: Ukwelashwa kwetaeniasis ngeTaenia solium kubalulekile ukuvimbela ineurocysticercosis futhi njengethuluzi lokusiza ekulawuleni noma ekumiseni umjikelezo wokudluliselwa kwezinambuzane.
translations.hypothesis: Ngenxa yalesi sifo esibizwa ngokuthi cysticercosis, isikhathi esingasetshenziswa ngaphambi kokuvela kwesimpumulo siyahluka, futhi abantu abagulwe bangase bangabonakali benesifo iminyaka eminingi. Kwezinye izindawo ezithile, abantu abagulwe bangase bathole amabhulogi abonakalayo noma atholakalayo (amabhulogi amancane, aqinile angabonwa ngokuthinta) ngaphansi kwesikhumba. I-neurocysticercosis ihlobene nezimpawu eziningi kuye ngobuningi, usayizi, isigaba kanye nendawo yoshintsho obuhle, kanye nomswakama wemiphumela yomzimba kanye nohlobo lwegesi, kodwa ingase futhi ingabonakali kakhulu. Izimpawu zingafaka ukuba nesikhathi eside, ukulahleka kokubona, ukugulukiswa (ukugulukiswa okuphindaphindiwe kungase kube ukugulukiswa kwe-epilepsy), i-hydrocephalus, i-meningitis, ukulahleka kwengqondo kanye nezimpawu ezibangelwa ukulimala okugcwele izindawo zengqondo. Ukwelashwa: Ukwelashwa kwalesi sifo esibizwa ngokuthi taeniasis esibangelwa yi-Taenia solium kubalulekile ukuvimbela i-neurocysticercosis futhi njengendlela yokusiza ekulawuleni noma ekuyekiseni ukusakazeka kwalesi gesi.

translations.source: The treatment can be done on an individual bases, or as Mass Drug Administration depending on the local circumstances and the control approaches being implemented. Taeniasis can be treated using anthelmintics (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). In neurocysticercosis, since the destruction of cysts may lead to an inflammatory response, specialised treatment of active disease is required and may include long courses with high doses of anthelmintic, as well as supporting therapy with corticosteroids and/or anti-epileptic drugs, and possibly surgery. The dosage and the duration of treatment can vary greatly and depend mainly on the number, size, location and developmental stage of the cysts, their surrounding inflammatory edema, acuteness and severity of clinical symptoms or signs.
translations.reference: Ukwelashwa kungenziwa ezisekelweni zomuntu ngamunye, noma njengokuphathwa kwezidakamizwa ezinkulu kuye ngezimo zendawo kanye nezindlela zokulawula ezisetshenziswayo. ITaeniasis ingelashwa kusetshenziswa anthelmintics (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). Kuneurocysticercosis, njengoba ukubhujiswa kwamacysts kungase kuholele ekuphenduleni kokuvuvukala, ukwelashwa okukhethekile kwesifo esisebenzayo kuyadingeka futhi kungase kuhlanganise izifundo ezinde ezinemithamo ephezulu ye-anthelmintic, kanye nokwesekwa kokwelashwa ngecorticosteroids kanye/noma izidakamizwa zokulwa nesithuthwane, futhi ngokunokwenzeka ukuhlinzwa. Umthamo kanye nobude besikhathi sokwelashwa kungahluka kakhulu futhi kuncike ikakhulukazi enanini, ubukhulu, indawo kanye nesigaba sokukhula samacysts, i-edema yawo yokuvuvukala ezungezile, ukushuba kanye nokuqina kwezimpawu zomtholampilo noma izimpawu.
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa kungenziwa ngabanye abantu, noma ngendlela yokunikeza imithi kubantu abaningi, kuye ngesimo sendawo kanye nezindlela zokulawula ezisetshenziswa. UTaeniasis ungwelashwa ngemithi eyayisa amagciwane (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). Kwi-neurocysticercosis, njengoba ukulahlekelwa kwamagciwane kungaholela ekuphendulweni kwasempilweni, kudingeka ukwelashwa okukhethekile kwesifo esikhona, okungase kubandakanye ukwelashwa okude ngemithi eyayisa amagciwane kakhulu, kanye nokwelashwa okwesekayo ngama-corticosteroids kanye/noma ngemithi egwema ukugqwashuka, kanye nengabe nokuxazululwa ngokuchithwa. Idosi kanye nomfuthi wokwelashwa kungahluka kakhulu futhi kuncike kakhulu enanini, usayizi, indawo kanye nesigaba sokukhula kwamagciwane, ukukhukhuma okubalulekile okuzungezile, ukukhuthazeka kanye nobunzima bezimpawu noma izimpawu zokwelashwa.

translations.source: Tetanus Overview: Tetanus is a serious illness contracted through exposure to the spores of the bacterium, Clostridium tetani, which live in soil, saliva, dust and manure. The bacteria can enter the body through a deep cuts, wounds or burns affecting the nervous system. The infection leads to painful muscle contractions, particularly of the jaw and neck muscle, and is commonly known as “lockjaw”. People of all ages can get tetanus but the disease is particularly common and serious in newborn babies and their mothers when the mother is unprotected from tetanus by the vaccine, tetanus toxoid.
translations.reference: I-Tetanus Uhlolojikelele: Itetanus yisifo esiyingozi esitholwa ngokuchayeka ezinhlamvu zebacterium, iClostridium tetani, ezihlala emhlabathini, amathe, uthuli kanye nomquba. Amagciwane angangena emzimbeni ngokusikeka okujulile, amanxeba noma ukusha okuthinta isimiso sezinzwa. Ukutheleleka kuholela ekufinyezweni kwemisipha okubuhlungu, ikakhulukazi emhlathini nasentanyeni, futhi ngokuvamile kwaziwa ngokuthi "ilockjaw". Abantu bayo yonke iminyaka bangathola itetanus kodwa lesi sifo sivame kakhulu futhi siyingozi ezinganeni ezisanda kuzalwa kanye nomama bazo lapho umama engavikelekile kutetanus ngomgomo, itetanus toxoid.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubuyekezwa kwe-Tetanus: I-tetanus yigciwane elithule esithathelwa yizinto ezitholwe ezinswini zombuthano i-Clostridium tetani, ezihlala emhlabathini, emgqeni, uthuli kanye nomphunga. Lezi zigciwane zingangena ngaphakathi komzimba ngokusetshenziswa kwemigcutshe emikhulu, izilonda noma ukushiswa, kanti zithinta uhlelo lwegazi. Le gciwane iholela ekuguqukweni kabi kwamathambo, ikakhulukazi emgodini nasegameni, futhi ngokuvamile ibizwa ngokuthi "ukubhecelela." Abantu basekhulwini eliphakeme bangathola i-tetanus, kodwa-ke leli gciwane livame kakhulu futhi libuthakathaka kakhulu ezinganeni ezisanda kuzalwa kanye nomama wabo, ikakhulukazi uma umama akulondolozwanga ngovakijini we-tetanus, i-tetanus toxoid.

translations.source: Tetanus occurring during pregnancy or within 6 weeks of the end of pregnancy is called maternal tetanus, while tetanus occurring within the first 28 days of life is called neonatal tetanus. The disease remains an important public health problem in many parts of the world, but especially in low-income countries or districts, where immunization coverage is low and unclean birth practices are common. WHO estimates that in 2018 (the latest year for which estimates are available), 25 000 newborns died from neonatal tetanus, 88% reduction from the situation in 2000. Symptoms: Nearly all cases of tetanus occur in people who have never been vaccinated or in adults who have not kept up to date on their booster shots. Signs and symptoms of tetanus appear anytime from 3 to 21 days after tetanus bacteria enter the body through a wound.
translations.reference: Itetanus eyenzeka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa noma emasontweni ayisi-6 ekupheleni kokukhulelwa ibizwa ngokuthi yi-tetanus kamama, kanti itetanus eyenzeka ezinsukwini zokuqala ezingu-28 zokuphila ibizwa ngokuthi itetanus yengane. Lesi sifo sihlala siyinkinga yezempilo yomphakathi ebalulekile ezingxenyeni eziningi zomhlaba, kodwa ikakhulukazi emazweni anemali ephansi noma ezifundeni, lapho ukugonywa kuphansi futhi izindlela zokuzalwa ezingcolile zivamile. IWHO ilinganisela ukuthi ngo-2018 (unyaka wakamuva lapho izilinganiso zitholakala), izingane ezisanda kuzalwa ezingu-25 000 zabulawa yitetanus esanda kuzalwa, ukwehla okungama-88% esimweni sango-2000. Izimpawu: Cishe zonke izehlakalo zetetanus zenzeka kubantu abangakaze bagonywe noma kubantu abadala abangazange bahlale benolwazi lwakamuva ngezithombe zabo ezikhuthazayo. Izimpawu nezimpawu zetetanus zivela noma nini kusukela ezinsukwini ezi-3 kuya kwezingu-21 ngemva kokuba amagciwane etetanus engene emzimbeni ngesilonda.
translations.hypothesis: UTetanusi ovela ngesikhathi kukaMama noma ngaphakathi kwamahora angu-6 ngemuva kokuphothulwa uyabizwa ngokuthi utetanusi kaMama, kanti utetanusi ovela ngaphakathi kwamalanga ayi-28 okokuqala empilweni uyabizwa ngokuthi utetanusi wezinsana. Lesi sifo isalokhu siba yinkinga ebalulekile kwezempilo zomphakathi ezindaweni eziningi emhlabeni, kodwa ikakhulukazi ezizweni nezifunda ezinezimali ezincane, lapho ukufakelwa kwezindlela zokuvikela ziphansi futhi lapho izindlela zokuphothulwa ezingahleliwe ziba yinto evamile. I-WHO ibalase ukuthi ngo-2018 (ububusi bakamuva lapho ukubalwa kwatholakala khona), izinsana ezingu-25,000 zife ngalesi sifo, okuyisilinganiso esinciphile ngo-88% uma kuqhathaniswa nesimo ngonyaka ka-2000. Izimpawu: Cishe kuzo zonke izingxenye zalesi sifo, zitholakala kubantu abangakaze bafakelwe noma kubantu abadala abangazange bagcine nokufakelwa kwezindlela zokuvikela. Izimpawu zalesi sifo zivela noma nini kusukela kumalanga angu-3 kuya kwangu-21 ngemuva kokuthi amagciwane e-tetanus afake ngaphakathi komzimba ngomgodi.

translations.source: Most cases occur within 14 days. Symptoms can include: jaw cramping or the inability to open the mouth muscle spasms often in the back, abdomen and extremities sudden painful muscle spasms often triggered by sudden noises
translations.reference: Izigameko eziningi zenzeka phakathi nezinsuku eziyi-14. Izimpawu zingabandakanya: umhlathi noma ukungakwazi ukuvula umlomo ama-muscle spasms ngokuvamile ngemuva, isisu kanye namaphethelo imisipha ebuhlungu engazelelwe ngokuvamile ebangelwa imisindo engazelelwe
translations.hypothesis: Iminye yalezi zifo ingaqala ngaphakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-14. Izimpawu zingafaka: ukuba nesikhunta esibuhlungu noma ukungakwazi ukuvula umlomo, ukuqhekeka kwamathambo, okungenzeka kakhulu emuva, ehlombe kanye nezimpumulo, kanye nokuguquka okukhulu kwamathambo okubuhlungu, okungenzeka ukuthi kudalwe yizinsizwalo ezikhungathekile.

translations.source: trouble swallowing seizures headache fever and sweating changes in blood pressure or fast heart rate.
translations.reference: inkinga yokugwinya ukuquleka ukuphathwa ikhanda umkhuhlane nokujuluka izinguquko kumfutho wegazi noma ukushaya kwenhliziyo okusheshayo.
translations.hypothesis: ukukhubazeka kokudla, ukuguquka kwezimpilo (izimpungushe), ubuhlungu kwi-kilasi, ukushisa nomswakama, ukuguquka kwephreshashe yegazi noma ukushaywa kwezinhliziyo okukhulu.

translations.source: In neonatal tetanus, symptoms include muscle spasms, which are often preceded by the newborn’s inability to suck or breastfeed, and excessive crying. Tetanus is diagnosed on the basis of clinical features and does not require laboratory confirmation. Tetanus requires treatment in a medical facility, often in a referral hospital. People who recover from tetanus do not have natural immunity and can be infected again and therefore need to be immunized. Prevention: Tetanus can be prevented through immunization with tetanus-toxoid-containing vaccines (TTCV), which are included in routine immunization programmes globally and administered during antenatal care contacts.
translations.reference: Kutetanus yosana olusanda kuzalwa, izimpawu zifaka ukugedla kwemisipha, okuvame ukwandulelwa ukungakwazi komntwana ukuncela noma ukuncelisa, kanye nokukhala ngokweqile. Itetanus itholakala ngesisekelo sezici zomtholampilo futhi ayidingi ukuqinisekiswa kwelabhorethri. Itetanus idinga ukwelashwa endaweni yezokwelapha, ngokuvamile esibhedlela sokudlulisela. Abantu abelulama ku-tetanus abanawo amandla okuzivikela emvelo futhi bangatheleleka futhi ngakho ke badinga ukugonywa. Ukuvimbela: Itetanus ingavinjelwa ngokugonywa ngemithi yokugoma equkethe itetanus-toxoid-containing vaccines (TTCV), efakwe ezinhlelweni zokugoma ezijwayelekile emhlabeni jikelele futhi inikezwe ngesikhathi sokuxhumana nokunakekelwa kwabakhulelwe.
translations.hypothesis: Kwi-tetanus yezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, izimpawu zihlanganisa ukubamba kwezigceme, okufakelwe ngokuvamile ukuthi ingane ayikwazi ukutshisa noma ukudlala ngobisi, kanye nokukhala okuningi. I-tetanus itholwe ngokusekelwe kwezimpawu zokwelashwa futhi ayidingi ukuqinisekiswa ngohlaziyo ezilabhorethri. I-tetanus idinga ukwelashwa esikhungweni sezokwelapha, njengalesi sikhangiso, kakhulu esibhedlela esikhulu. Abantu abaphulukile kwi-tetanus abanalo ukumelana ngendlela yendalo futhi bangagugwa futhi, ngakho-ke kudingeka ukuthi bafakelwe. Ukuvimbela: I-tetanus ingavikelwa ngokufakelwa ngamakhambi athile (TTCV) athiwe nge-tetanus-toxoid, okufakiwe ezinhlelweni ezivamile zokufakelwa emhlabeni jikelele futhi zifakelwa ngesikhathi kokunakekelwa kwabesifazane ngaphambi kokubeletha.

translations.source: To be protected throughout life, WHO recommends that an individual receives 6 doses (3 primary plus 3 booster doses) of TTCV. The 3-dose primary series should begin as early as 6 weeks of age, with subsequent doses given with a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses. The 3 booster doses should preferably be given during the second year of life (12–23 months), at 4–7 years of age, and at 9–15 years of age. Ideally, there should be at least 4 years between booster doses. There are many kinds of vaccines used to protect against tetanus: diphtheria and tetanus (DT) vaccinesdiphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis (whooping cough) (DTaP) vaccinestetanus and diphtheria (Td) vaccinestetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis (Tdap) vaccines.
translations.reference: Ukuze uvikelwe kukho konke ukuphila, iWHO incoma ukuthi umuntu ngamunye athole imithamo engu-6 (imithamo emi-3 eyinhloko kanye nemi-3 ye-booster) yeTTCV. Uchungechunge oluyinhloko lwemithamo emi-3 kufanele luqale ekuqaleni kwamasonto ayi-6 ubudala, imithamo elandelayo inikezwe ngesikhawu esincane samaviki ama-4 phakathi kwemithamo. Imithamo emi-3 ye-booster kufanele inikezwe phakathi nonyaka wesibili wokuphila (izinyanga eziyi-12-23), ineminyaka engu-4-7 ubudala, kanye neminyaka engu-9-15 ubudala. Ngokufanelekile, kufanele okungenani kube neminyaka emi-4 phakathi kwemithamo ye-booster. Kunezinhlobo eziningi zemithi yokugoma esetshenziselwa ukuvikela itetanus: imigomo yediphtheria kanye netetanus (DT) idiphtheria, itetanus, nepertussis (ukukhwehlela) (DTaP) vaccinestetanus kanye ne-diphtheria (Td) vaccinestetanus, diphtheria, ne-pertussis (Tdap) imigomo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuvikelwa ngaso kuzo zonke izikhathi zempilo, i-WHO incoma ukuthi umuntu afake amadosi ayi-6 (amadosi ama-3 ayisisekelo kanye namadosi ama-3 okwengezwa). Le madosi ama-3 ayisisekelo kufanele aqale ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka, ngesikhathi umuntu uneminyaka engu-6, kanti amadosi alandelayo kufanele afakwe ngesikhathi esincane seminyaka emi-4 phakathi kwamadosi ngalinye. Le madosi ama-3 okwengezwa kufanele, uma kungenzeki, afakwe ngonyaka wesibili wempilo (ngeminye yezinyanga ezingu-12 kuya kweziyi-23), ngesikhathi umuntu uneminyaka engu-4 kuya kweyi-7, kanye ngesikhathi umuntu uneminyaka engu-9 kuya kweyi-15. Ngokufanelekile, kufanele kube neminyaka engaphansi kwayi-4 phakathi kwamadosi okwengezwa. Kunezinhlobonhlobo zezivakashi ezisetshenziselwa ukuvikelwa kwezifo ezifana ne-tetanus: izivakashi ze-diphtheria kanye ne-tetanus (DT), izivakashi ze-diphtheria, i-tetanus, kanye ne-pertussis (ukungabula) (DTaP), izivakashi ze-tetanus kanye ne-diphtheria (Td), kanye nezivakashi ze-tetanus, i-diphtheria, kanye ne-pertussis (Tdap).

translations.source: Neonatal tetanus can be prevented by immunizing women of reproductive age with TTCV, either during pregnancy or outside of pregnancy. Additionally, robust medical practices can also prevent tetanus disease including clean delivery and cord care during childbirth, and proper wound care for surgical and dental procedures.
translations.reference: Itetanus esanda kuzalwa ingavinjelwa ngokugoma abesifazane abaseminyakeni yokuzala ngeTTCV, kungaba ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa noma ngaphandle kokukhulelwa. Ukwengeza, izinqubo zezokwelapha eziqinile zingase futhi zivikele isifo setetanus okuhlanganisa ukulethwa okuhlanzekile nokunakekelwa kwentambo ngesikhathi sokubeletha, nokunakekelwa okufanele kwenxeba ngezinqubo zokuhlinzwa nezinyo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukugwembezi kwezempilo kubantfwana abasha kungagwenywa ngokugcwalisa amakhambi amakhulu emakhadini ezempilo kwabesifazane abanobubanzi bokuzala ngomuthi i-TTCV, ngisho noma ngesikhathi bokukhulelwa noma ngaphandle kokukhulelwa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuhle kungagcina futhi ukugwembezi kwezempilo, okubalwa ukuhlanzeka ngesikhathi kokubeletha kanye nokunakekelwa kwentambo yomzimba, kanye nokunakekelwa okufanele kwazo zonke izifo ezibangelwa ukusika kanye nezindlela zokwelashwa zamazinyo.

translations.source: Tick-borne encephalitis Overview: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) is an important cause of viral infections of the central nervous system in eastern, central, northern and increasingly western European countries, and in northern China, Mongolia, and the Russian Federation. Tick-borne encephalitis virus is a member of the family Flaviviridae. Approximately 10 000–12 000 clinical cases of tick-borne encephalitis are reported each year, but this figure is believed to be significantly lower than the actual total number of clinical cases. The vast majority of infections with the virus result from infected ticks, which often remain firmly attached to the skin for days.
translations.reference: I-encephalitis ephethwe umkhaza (Tick-borne encephalitis) Uhlolojikelele: I-encephalitis ethwala umkhaza okuyiTick-borne encephalitis (TBE) iyimbangela ebalulekile yokutheleleka ngegciwane ohlelweni lwezinzwa olumaphakathi emazweni asempumalanga, enkabeni, asenyakatho kanye nasanda ngokwandayo entshonalanga ye-Europe, nasenyakatho yeChina, iMongolia, kanye neRussian Federation. Igciwane le-encephalitis elithwala umkhaza liyilungu lomndeni wakwaFlaviviridae. Cishe izigameko ezingu-10 000–12 000 zomtholampilo ze-encephalitis ezithwalwa umkhaza zibikwa unyaka ngamunye, kodwa lesi sibalo kukholakala ukuthi siphansi kakhulu kunengqikithi yenani langempela lamacala omtholampilo. Izifo eziningi ezinaleli gciwane zibangelwa imikhaza ethelelekile, evame ukuhlala iqinile esikhumbeni izinsuku eziningi.
translations.hypothesis: I-encephalitis ekhishwa yizinduku: I-encephalitis ekhishwa yizinduku (TBE) iyimbangela ebalulekile yezifo zombutho ezithinta uhlelo lobuchopho ezweni lase-Yurophu elingaphansi, elingaphakathi, elingasekukhulu, kanye nalokho okukhulayo ezweni lase-Yurophu elingasempumalanga, kanye naseChina enyakatho, e-Mongolia, kanye neRiphabhlikhi yaseRussia. I-virus ye-encephalitis ekhishwa yizinduku iyingxenye yomndeni we-Flaviviridae. Cishe amanye amakhilomitha ayi-10 000–12 000 zamacala ezifo ze-encephalitis ekhishwa yizinduku kubikwa minyaka yonke, kodwa kucatshangwa ukuthi lolu hluphume luncane kakhulu kunenani langempela lamacala ezifo. Iningi lezifo ezibangelwa yile virus zivela ezindukwini ezithintekile, ezivamise ukuhlala zinamandla esikhunjini izinsuku eziningi.

translations.source: On rare occasions, infection can result from consumption of unpasteurized milk from infect goats, sheep or cows. People come in contact with the ticks during outdoor activities in forested areas up to an altitude of about 2000 meters. There is no direct person-to-person transmission. Symptoms: Most infections remain asymptomatic. In case of clinical illness, the incubation period for tick-borne encephalitis lasts 2–28 days (most commonly 7–14 days) and is followed by 1–8 days of general cold symptoms, such as fatigue, headache and general malaise, usually combined with fever of ≥38 °C.
translations.reference: Ezikhathini ezingavamile, ukutheleleka kungavela ngokuphuza ubisi olungagcotshwanga oluvela ezimbuzini, izimvu noma izinkomo. Abantu bahlangana nemikhaza ngesikhathi semisebenzi yangaphandle ezindaweni ezinamahlathi afinyelela ukuphakama okungamamitha angama-2000. Akukho ukudluliswa okuqondile komuntu kuya kumuntu. Izimpawu: Ukutheleleka okuningi kuhlala kungabonakali. Esimeni sokugula okusemtholampilo, isikhathi sokufukamela se-encephalitis ethwalwa umkhaza sithatha izinsuku ezingu-2-28 (imvamisa izinsuku ezingu-7-14) futhi silandelwa izinsuku ezingu-1-8 zezimpawu ezijwayelekile zomkhuhlane, njengokukhathala, ikhanda elibuhlungu kanye nokugula okuvamile, ngokuvamile. kuhlanganiswe nemfiva engu-≥38 °C.
translations.hypothesis: Ngezikhathi ezimbalwa, ukuguguleka kungahlelwa ukutshala kombuso ongahlanzwa ovela ezinkombeni, ezilimi noma ezinkunzi ezigugulekile. Abantu bathinteka ngalezi zinto ezincibilikisa ngesikhathi bezokufundisa ngaphandle ezindaweni zezitshalo, kude kube phakathi kwamamitha angu-2000. Akukho ukudluliselwa okwembulunga kuphakathi kwabantu. Izimpawu: Kakhulu ukuguguleka akubonakali. Uma kukhona ukuguguleka okubonakalayo, isikhathi sokuhlomula sokuguguleka esivela ezintweni ezincibilikisa sithatha izinsuku ezingu-2–28 (ngokuvamile izinsuku ezingu-7–14) futhi kulandelwa izinsuku ezingu-1–8 zezimpawu ezivamile zokuguguleka, ezifana nokukhathazeka, ukuba nesikhathi eside, kanye nokungajwayelekile, ngokuvamile kuhlanganiswe nochungechunge olungaphezu kwamajaji angu-38 °C.

translations.source: After an asymptomatic interval of 1–20 days up to 15% of patients experience a second phase of the disease characterized by fever frequently exceeding 40 °C and signs of central nervous system involvement, such as meningitis (e.g. fever, headache, and a stiff neck), encephalitis (e.g., drowsiness, confusion, and sensory disturbances), myelitis or radiculitis. Encephalitis developing during this second phase may result in paralysis, permanent sequelae or death. About 1% of cases with neurological pathologies may die; higher fatality rates have been reported from the Russian federation, which may be related to a different virus subtype. Severity of illness increases with age of the patient, but fatalities have been reported from all age groups. There is no specific treatment for tick-borne encephalitis.
translations.reference: Ngemuva kokuphumula okungabonakali kwezinsuku ezingu-1-20 kufika ku-15% weziguli ziba nesigaba sesibili sesifo esibonakala ngemfiva evamise ukudlula ku-40 °C kanye nezimpawu zokuthinteka kwesimiso sezinzwa esimaphakathi, njenge-meningitis (isb. imfiva, ikhanda elibuhlungu, nokuqina. intamo), i-encephalitis (isb, ukozela, ukudideka, nokuphazamiseka kwezinzwa), imyelitis noma iradiculitis. Ukukhula kwe-encephalitis phakathi nalesi sigaba sesibili kungase kubangele ukukhubazeka, isequelae unomphela noma ukufa. Cishe i-1% yamacala ane-neurological pathologies angafa; amazinga okufa aphezulu abikiwe evela kumfelandawonye waseRussia, okungenzeka ahlotshaniswe nohlobo oluncane lwegciwane oluhlukile. Ubunzima bokugula buyanda ngokuya ngeminyaka yesiguli, kodwa ukufa kuye kwabikwa kuzo zonke izinhlobo zeminyaka. Akukho ukwelashwa okuqondile kwe-encephalitis ephethwe umkhaza.
translations.hypothesis: Ngemva kwesikhathi esingavamile esingabonakali esidlule izinsuku ezingu-1 kuya kweziyi-1, amaphesenti angu-15 wabagulaphansi angase bathole isigaba sesibili sesifo, esiqukatha ukushisa okuphakeme kakhulu kakhulu kuka-40 °C kanye nezimpawu zokuba khona kwezinkinga ezinkolo, njenge-meningitis (ngokwesibonelo, ukushisa, ubuhlungu kwi-hlathi, kanye nommese wehlathi), i-encephalitis (ngokwesibonelo, ukulala, ukuhlazwa, kanye nezinkinga ezizwakalayo), i-myelitis noma i-radiculitis. I-encephalitis evela kulesi sigaba sesibili ingaholela ekungeni kwengxenye yomzimba, imiphumela engapheli, noma ukufa. Cishe amaphesenti angu-1 yamacala anezinkinga zezinkolo angase afile; kukhutshwe ngombala ophezulu kakhulu eRussia, okungenzeka kube ngenxa yohlobo oluhlukile lwegciwane. Ubukhulu besifo kukhula ngokukhula kabadlule, kodwa kukhutshwe ngombala kuyo yonke iminyaka. Akukho ukwelashwa okuthile kwe-encephalitis edluliselwa ngamatshiza.

translations.source: Prevention: People can protect themselves from ticks by wearing appropriate clothing, including long trousers and closed footwear, when hiking or camping in countries or areas at risk. The whole body should be inspected daily and attached ticks removed as soon as possible. The consumption of unpasteurized dairy products should also be avoided in those areas. Immunization offers the most effective protection. Currently, there are 4 widely used vaccines of assured quality:
translations.reference: Ukuvimbela: Abantu bangazivikela emikhazani ngokugqoka izingubo ezifanele, okuhlanganisa ibhulukwe elide nezicathulo ezivaliwe, lapho beqwala izintaba noma bekanise emazweni noma ezindaweni ezisengozini. Umzimba wonke kufanele uhlolwe nsuku zonke futhi imikhaza enamathiselwe ikhishwe ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka. Ukusetshenziswa kwemikhiqizo yobisi engasetshenziswanga kufanele futhi kugwenywe kulezo zindawo. Ukugoma kunikeza isivikelo esisebenza kahle kakhulu. Njengamanje, kunemithi yokugoma emi-4 esetshenziswa kabanzi yekhwalithi eqinisekisiwe:
translations.hypothesis: Ukweluleka: Abantu bangazivikela ezinkukwini ngokugqoka izingubo ezifanele, okubalwa izikhakha ezinde kanye nezimpahla zokugqoka ezivalekile, uma behamba noma bayokudlala ngaphandle ezindaweni noma ezweni elingeseki. Wonke umzimba kufanele uhlolwe nsuku zonke, futhi izinkukwini ezibambelele kufanele zisuswe ngokushesha okukhulu. Ukudla okungenziwa ukuhlanzwa, njengezinto ezitholwe ezinkukwini, kufanele kugwenywe kulezo zindawo. Ukugaywa ngobudlova kuyindlela ekhuthazwayo kakhulu yokuvikela. Njengamanje, kunemivotho emi-4 esetshenziswa kakhulu futhi enekhwalithi eqinisekisiwe:

translations.source: FSME-Immun and Encepur, manufactured in Austria and Germany respectively, and based on European strains of the virus; and TBE-Moscow and EnceVir, manufactured in the Russian Federation and based on Far-Eastern strains. The 4 vaccines are considered to be safe and effective. In areas where the disease is highly endemic, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children. Ticks also transmit Borreliosis (Lyme disease), which is a bacterial infection.
translations.reference: iFSME-Immun ne-Encepur, ekhiqizwa e-Austria naseGermany ngokulandelana, futhi isekelwe ezinhlotsheni zegciwane zase-Europe; futhi iTBE-Moscow ne-EnceVir, ekhiqizwa e-Russian Federation futhi isekelwe ezinhlobonhlobo ze-Far-Eastern. Imithi yokugoma emi-4 ithathwa njengephephile futhi isebenza ngempumelelo. Ezindaweni lapho lesi sifo sigcwele khona kakhulu, iWHO itusa ukuba kugonywe kuzo zonke izinhlobo zeminyaka, kuhlanganise nezingane. Imikhaza iphinde idlulisele iBorreliosis (iLyme disease), okuyisifo esibangelwa amagciwane.
translations.hypothesis: IFomu le-FSME-Immun ne-Encepur, ezilwenziwe e-Austria naseJalimane, ezisekelwe ezinhlotsheni zombutho zaseYurophu; kanye ne-TBE-Moscow ne-EnceVir, ezilwenziwe eRussia, ezisekelwe ezinhlotsheni zombutho zaseMpumalanga ye-Far. Lezi zivini ezine zibhekwa njengeziphephile futhi zisebenza. Ezindaweni lapho lesi sifo sikhona kakhulu, i-WHO incoma ukuthi ukugaywa kufanele kunikezwe kuzo zonke izigaba zeminikazi, okubalwa nezingane. Amagqubu futhi adlala indima ekusaseni kwe-Borreliosis (isifo se-Lyme), okuyinto ukwelapheka kwebakthiriya.

translations.source: TBE vaccination is not effective against this disease, which however is treatable with antimicrobials.
translations.reference: Ukugonywa kweTBE akusebenzi ukulwa nalesi sifo, kodwa esilapheka ngama-antimicrobial.
translations.hypothesis: Ukugqashwa nge-TBE akusebenzi ekulweni nalolu bhubhane, kodwa-ke lungalaliswa ngamakhambi ahlukahlukene.

translations.source: Tobacco Overview: Nicotine contained in tobacco is highly addictive and tobacco use is a major risk factor for cardiovascular and respiratory diseases, over 20 different types or subtypes of cancer, and many other debilitating health conditions. Every year, more than 8 million people die from tobacco use. Most tobacco-related deaths occur in low- and middle-income countries, which are often targets of intensive tobacco industry interference and marketing. Tobacco can also be deadly for non-smokers.
translations.reference: Ugwayi Uhlolojikelele: iNicotine equkethwe kugwayi iyalutha kakhulu futhi ukusetshenziswa kukagwayi kuyingozi enkulu yezifo zenhliziyo nemithambo yegazi, izinhlobo ezingaphezu kwama-20 ezihlukene noma izinhlobo ezincane zomdlavuza, nezinye izimo eziningi zempilo eziwohlozayo. Unyaka ngamunye, abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-8 bayafa ngenxa yokubhema ugwayi. Ukufa okuningi okuhlobene nogwayi kwenzeka emazweni anemali ephansi nephakathi, ngokuvamile okuyizisulu zokugxambukela kwemboni kagwayi nokumaketha. Ugwayi ungaba yingozi nakubantu abangabhemi.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubuyekezwa ngomthethizo: I-nicotine efumanekayo emthethizweni iyenza umuntu angenele kakhulu, futhi ukusetshenziswa komthethizo kubanga izingozi ezinkulu zokugula kwezinhliziyo kanye nemiphakathi, izinhlobo eziningi kakhulu zokugula kakhulu (ngaphezu kuka-20), kanye nezinye izimo eziningi ezimbalwa zempilo ezimenzela umuntu. Unyaka ngunye, abantu abangaphezu kuka-8 million bayashona ngenxa yokusetshenziswa komthethizo. Kakhulu ukufa okuhlobene nomthethizo kuye kwenziwa ezweni elinamandla ezomnotho aphansi kanye nasezweni elinamandla ezomnotho aphephile, ezivame ukuba yizihloko zokuhlukumezeka okukhulu kanye nokumaketha komthethizo. Umthethizo ungaba nomthelela onobungozi nakwabantu abangashisi.

translations.source: Second-hand smoke exposure has also been implicated in adverse health outcomes, causing 1.2 million deaths annually. Nearly half of all children breathe air polluted by tobacco smoke and 65 000 children die each year due to illnesses related to second-hand smoke. Smoking while pregnant can lead to several life-long health conditions for babies. Heated tobacco products (HTPs) contain tobacco and expose users to toxic emissions, many of which cause cancer and are harmful to health. Electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) and electronic non-nicotine delivery systems (ENNDS), commonly known as e-cigarettes, do not contain tobacco and may or may not contain nicotine, but are harmful to health and undoubtedly unsafe.
translations.reference: Ukuchayeka kwentuthu kagwayi kuye kwaba nesandla emiphumeleni emibi yezempilo, okubangela ukufa kwabantu abayizigidi eziyi-1.2 ngonyaka. Cishe ingxenye yazo zonke izingane ziphefumula umoya ongcoliswe intuthu kagwayi kanti izingane ezingu-65 000 ziyafa unyaka ngamunye ngenxa yezifo ezihlobene nentuthu kagwayi. Ukubhema ngenkathi ukhulelwe kungaholela ezimweni eziningana zezempilo zezingane. Imikhiqizo kagwayi eshisayo (amaHTP) iqukethe ugwayi futhi ichaya abasebenzisi ekukhiqizweni okunobuthi, iningi labo elidala umdlavuza futhi eliyingozi empilweni. Izinhlelo ze-electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) kanye ne-electronic non-nicotine delivery systems (ENNDS), ngokuvamile ezaziwa ngokuthi i-e-cigarette, azinawo ugwayi futhi zingase zibe nenicotine noma zingaqukathi, kodwa ziyingozi empilweni futhi ngokungangabazeki aziphephile.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuchayeka umatshini wase-sigariti onoma ukukhishwa komoya wase-sigariti kuhlushwa njengokuba kubangela izinkinga zezempilo, okubangela ukufa kwamakhulu ezinkulungwane ezingu-1.2 ngonyaka. Cishe ingxenye enkulu yezingane zikhishwa umoya ogcwele umatshini wase-sigariti, futhi zingama-65 000 ezingane ezife ngonyaka ngenxa yezifo ezihlobene nokuchayeka umatshini wase-sigariti. Ukugada ngesikhathi kukhulelwe kungabangela izimo eziningi zezempilo ezihlala impilo yezingane. Imikhiqizo yamatshini wase-sigariti efudumezwa (HTPs) iqukethe umatshini wase-sigariti futhi ibonisa abasebenzisi ezimweni eziyingozi, eziningi ezibangela ukugula kwegeja futhi ezimbi kakhulu ezempilweni. Izinhlelo zokulethwa kwe-nicotine kagesi (ENDS) kanye nezinhlelo zokulethwa kwe-non-nicotine kagesi (ENNDS), ezaziwa ngokuthi ama-e-cigarettes, aziqukathi umatshini wase-sigariti futhi kungase aqukethe noma kungase futhi angaqoki i-nicotine, kodwa zimbi kakhulu ezempilweni futhi ngempela azinamandla.

translations.source: However, it is too early to provide a clear answer on the long-term impact of HTPs and/or e-cigarette use. Impact: An estimated 1.3 billion people worldwide use tobacco products, 80% of whom are in low- and middle-income countries. Tobacco use contributes to poverty by diverting household spending from basic needs, such as food and shelter, to tobacco. This spending behaviour is difficult to curb because tobacco is so addictive. It also causes premature death and disability of productive age adults in households thus leading to reduced household income and increased healthcare costs.
translations.reference: Nokho, kusesekuseni kakhulu ukunikeza impendulo ecacile kumthelela wesikhathi eside wamaHTP kanye/noma ukusetshenziswa kwe-e-cigarette. Umthelela: Kulinganiselwa ukuthi abantu abayizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-1.3 emhlabeni wonke basebenzisa ugwayi, u-80% wabo usemazweni anemali ephansi naphakathi. Ukusetshenziswa kukagwayi kunomthelela ebuphofini ngokususa imali yasendlini isuke ezidingweni eziyisisekelo, njengokudla nendawo yokuhlala, iye kugwayi. Lokhu kuziphatha kokuchitha kunzima ukunqanda ngoba ugwayi uyalutha kakhulu. Kuphinde kubangele ukufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kanye nokukhubazeka kwabantu abadala abaneminyaka ekhiqizayo emakhaya ngaleyo ndlela kuholele ekwehleni kwemali engenayo yasekhaya kanye nezindleko zokunakekelwa kwezempilo eziphakeme.
translations.hypothesis: Kodwa-ke, kuyazala ukuthi kukhona isikhathi eside esadingeka ukuze sinikeze impendulo ecacile mayelana nomthelela omade wezinto ezibizwa nge-HTP (i-heating tobacco products) kanye/noma ukusetshenziswa kwezintambo zikagesi ezisetshenziselwa ukutshisa utamatini (e-cigarettes). Umthelela: Kulinganiselwa ukuthi abantu abayi-1.3 billion emhlabeni jikelele basebenzisa imikhiqizo yamatini, kanti u-80% wabo bayasemazweni anezindleko eziphansi nezamaphakathi. Ukusetshenziswa kwamathini kunganekhisa ubuhlakani ngokuthi kukhishwa imali yomndeni ekuvikelweni kwezidingo ezibalulekile, njengokudla kanye nendawo yokuhlala, ukuze itshalwe ematatinini. Le ndlela yokutshala imali kunzima ukuyeka ngoba utamatini uyinto ejabulisa kakhulu. Futhi, kubangela ukufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kanye nokukhubazeka kwabantu abadala abasebenzayo emikhayeni, okubangela ukwehla kwemali engenayo emikhayeni kanye nokwanda kwezindleko zokunakekelwa kwezempilo.

translations.source: In addition to the detrimental impact of tobacco on health, the total economic cost of smoking (from health expenditures and productivity losses together) are estimated to be around US$ 1.4 trillion per year, equivalent in magnitude to 1.8% of the world's annual gross domestic product (GDP). Almost 40% of this cost occurred in developing countries, highlighting the substantial burden these countries suffer. Tobacco taxes are applied in part to combat this effect and are seen as the most cost-effective way of curbing tobacco use, particularly among youth and low-income populations. A tax increase that increases tobacco prices by 10% decreases tobacco consumption by about 4% in high-income countries and about 5% in low- and middle-income countries. WHO response: The scale of this human and economic tragedy is shocking, but it’s also preventable.
translations.reference: Ngaphezu komthelela omubi kagwayi kwezempilo, isamba sezindleko zomnotho zokubhema (kusukela ezindlekweni zezempilo kanye nokulahlekelwa umkhiqizo ndawonye) zilinganiselwa ku-US$1.4 trillion ngonyaka, okulingana no-1.8% wesamba semali sasekhaya sonyaka emhlabeni somkhiqizo (GDP). Cishe u-40% walezi zindleko wenzeka emazweni asathuthuka, okugqamisa umthwalo onzima la mazwe awuthwele. Izintela zikagwayi zisetshenziswa ngokwengxenye ukulwa nalo mphumela futhi zibonwa njengendlela engabizi kakhulu yokunqanda ukusetshenziswa kukagwayi, ikakhulukazi phakathi kwentsha kanye nabantu abahola kancane. Ukwenyuka kwentela okwandisa amanani entengo kagwayi ngo-10% kunciphisa ukusetshenziswa kukagwayi cishe ngo-4% emazweni anemali engenayo ephezulu futhi cishe ngo-5% emazweni anemali engenayo esezingeni eliphansi noma ezingeni eliphakathi. Impendulo yeWHO: Izinga lale nhlekelele yabantu nezomnotho liyashaqisa, kodwa futhi liyagwemeka.
translations.hypothesis: Ngaphandle kwemiphumela emibi yotshaba empilweni, izindleko zomnotho ezibalwa kunoma yini yokutshala, (kuhlanganisa izindleko zempilo kanye nokulahlekelwa kwamandla okusebenza), zilinganiselwe ku-$1.4 trillion ngonyaka, okulingana ne-1.8% ye-GDP yomhlaba yonke ngonyaka. Cishe amaphesenti angu-40 walesi mali kwenzeka ezweni elithuthukile, okubonisa ukuthi lezi zizwe zibhekene nobudlova obukhulu. Izintela zotshaba zisebenzisa ngokwengxenye ukulwa nalokhu, futhi kubonakala njengendlela efikelela kuzinto eziningi yokunciphisa ukusetshenziswa kotshaba, ikakhulukazi phakathi kweentsha kanye nabantu abanemali encane. Ukunyuswa kwentela okwandisa amanani otshaba ngo-10% kunciphisa ukusetshenziswa kotshaba cishe ngamaphesenti angu-4 emazweni anezimali ezinkulu, kanye cishe ngamaphesenti angu-5 emazweni anezimali ezincane nezephesenti. Impendulo ye-WHO: Ubukhulu bale ngxabano lomuntu kanye nomnotho kubuhlezi, kodwa kungagwenywa.

translations.source: Big Tobacco — along with all manufacturers of tobacco products — is fighting to ensure the dangers of their products are concealed, but we are fighting back: In 2003, WHO Member States unanimously adopted the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (WHO FCTC), the only public health treaty under the auspices of WHO. In force since 2005, it has currently 181 Parties. To help countries implement the WHO FCTC, WHO introduced MPOWER, a package of technical measures and resources, each of which corresponds to at least one provision of the WHO FCTC. MPOWER builds the capacity of countries to implement 6 measures to reduce the demand for tobacco products: monitor tobacco use and prevention policies, protect people from tobacco use, offer help to quit tobacco use, warn about the dangers of tobacco, enforce bans on tobacco advertising, promotion and sponsorship and raise taxes on tobacco.
translations.reference: Ugwayi Omkhulu - kanye nabo bonke abakhiqizi bemikhiqizo kagwayi - balwela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izingozi zemikhiqizo yabo ziyafihlwa, kodwa siyazilwela: Ngo-2003, Amazwe Angamalungu eWHO amukela ngazwi linye IWHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (WHO FCTC), i isivumelwano sezempilo yomphakathi kuphela ngaphansi kweWHO. Isebenza kusukela ngo-2005, njengamanje inamaqembu ayi-181. Ukusiza amazwe ukuthi asebenzise i-WHO FCTC, iWHO yethule iMPOWER, iphakethe lezinyathelo zobuchwepheshe nezinsiza, ngayinye ehambelana nokunikezwa okungenani okukodwa kweWHO FCTC. iMPOWER yakha amandla amazwe okusebenzisa izinyathelo eziyisi-6 zokunciphisa isidingo semikhiqizo kagwayi: ukuqapha ukusetshenziswa kukagwayi nezinqubomgomo zokuvimbela, ukuvikela abantu ekusetshenzisweni kukagwayi, ukunikeza usizo lokuyeka ugwayi, ukuxwayisa ngezingozi zikagwayi, ukuphoqelela ukuvinjelwa kokukhangisa kukagwayi, ukuphromotha nokuxhaswa kanye nokukhuphula izintela kugwayi.
translations.hypothesis: I-Big Tobacco – kanye nazo zonke izinkampani ezilayisha imikhiqizo yotshaba – zilwela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izingozi zale mikhiqizo zifihlwe, kodwa siyazilwela: Nango-2003, izizwe ezilungiselelwe yi-WHO zamukele ngendlela engaqondakali i-WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (WHO FCTC), okuyisivumelwano esiyodwa lokunakekelwa kwezempilo yomphakathi esikhathi esisodwa ngaphansi kwe-WHO. Kusukela ngo-2005, manje inamaqembu angama-181. Ukuze kusize amazwe ukuthi asebenzise i-WHO FCTC, i-WHO yethule i-MPOWER, iphakethe lezinyathelo zobuchwepheshe kanye nezinsiza, okungcono kakhulu ukuthi ngakunye kulezi zinyathelo kuxhumene okungenani nesinye isigaba se-WHO FCTC. I-MPOWER ikhuthaza amandla amazwe ukuthi asebenzise izinyathelo eziyisithupha zokuqeda ukufuna imikhiqizo yotshaba: ukubheka ukusetshenziswa kotshaba kanye nezinqubomgomo zokuqapha, ukuvikela abantu ekusetshenzisweni kotshaba, ukunikeza usizo kulabo abafuna ukuyeka ukusetshenziswa kotshaba, ukuxwayisa ngengozi yotshaba, ukusebenzisa imithetho eqeda ukukhangiswa, ukukhuthazwa kanye nokuxhaswa kotshaba, kanye nokwandisa intela kotshaba.

translations.source: Trachoma Overview: Trachoma is a disease of the eye and the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. It is caused by an obligate intracellular bacterium called Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person by direct or indirect transfer of ocular and nasal discharges of infected people; indirect transfer includes carriage on the body of species of flies. Preschool-age children harbour the principal reservoir of infection.
translations.reference: ITrachoma Uhlolojikelele: ITrachoma yisifo seso futhi iyimbangela ehamba phambili ethathelanayo yobumpumputhe emhlabeni wonke. Ibangelwa i-obligate intracellular bacterium ebizwa ngokuthi iChlamydia trachomatis. Ukutheleleka kudluliselwa kusuka kumuntu kuya komunye ngokudluliswa okuqondile noma okungaqondile kokuphuma kwamehlo nasemakhaleni abantu abanaleli gciwane; ukudluliswa okungaqondile kubandakanya inqola emzimbeni wezinhlobo zezimpukane. Izingane ezifunda enkulisa ziphethe i-reservoir eyinhloko yokutheleleka.
translations.hypothesis: Incazelo ye-Trachoma: I-Trachoma yigciwane elithinta amehlo futhi yimbangela enhle kakhulu yobunzima bokubona emhlabeni jikelele. Ibanjwe yigciwane elincane elihlala ngaphakathi yamaseli, elibizwa ngokuthi i-Chlamydia trachomatis.
