Ukuguguleka kule gciwane kuthuthwa kusuka komuntu ngomuntu ngokuphathelene noma ngokuphindwe, ngokudluliselwa kwe-discharge (okukhishwa) evela emehlweni kanye nezindlebe zabantu abagulile; ukudluliselwa okuphindwe kuhlanganisa nokudluliselwa ngama-insects (izilwane ezindiza). Izingane ezincane, ezangaphambi kwasikole, ziba yindawo enhle kakhulu yokuhlala kule gciwane.

translations.source: Models suggest that an individual requires more than 150 lifetime infections to develop the blinding complications of trachoma. Trachoma is endemic in some of the world’s poorest populations, who live in rural and remote areas and have highly inadequate access to water, sanitation and healthcare. Africa is the most affected continent, but it also has the most widespread control efforts. The disease is also found in Central and South America, Asia, Australia, and the Middle East. As of 2 January 2020, 13 countries had reported achieving elimination goals.
translations.reference: Amamodeli aphakamisa ukuthi umuntu udinga izifo ezingaphezu kuka-150 zokuphila kwakhe konke ukuze athuthukise izinkinga zokungaboni ze-trachoma. ITrachoma igcwele abantu abampofu kakhulu emhlabeni, abahlala emaphandleni nasezindaweni ezikude futhi abangenawo ngokwanele amanzi, ukuthuthwa kwendle kanye nokunakekelwa kwezempilo. I-Afrika iyizwekazi elithinteke kakhulu, kodwa futhi inemizamo yokulawula esabalele kakhulu. Lesi sifo sitholakala naseCentral naseNingizimu Melika, e-Asia, e-Australia naseMiddle East. Kusukela ngomhla ka-2 kuMasingana 2020, amazwe ayi-13 abike ukuthi afinyelele izinhloso zokuqeda.
translations.hypothesis: Imodeli zibonisa ukuthi umuntu udinga ukuba nesifo esiningi kune-150 empilweni yakhe ukuze athole izinkinga ezibulalayo ezihlobene ne-trachoma. I-trachoma iyindlela evamile ezindaweni eziningi ezincane emhlabeni, lapho abantu abaphila khona bendawo zasemakhaya nezindaweni ezikude futhi abanazo izinsiza ezanele zamanzi, ukuhlanzwa kanye nokunakekelwa kwezempilo. I-Afrika yindawo ethathwe kakhulu yalesi sifo, kodwa futhi iyindawo enomzamo omkhulu kakhulu wokulawula. Lesi sifo sitholakala futhi e-Central America, e-South America, e-Asia, e-Australia nase-Middle East. Ngomhlaka 2 Januwari 2020, amazwe ayi-13 ayeveze ukuthi efikelele ezinhlulelweni zokukhipha lesi sifo.

translations.source: In 2019 alone, 92 622 people received surgical treatment for advanced trachoma and 95.2 million were treated with antibiotics. Despite these successes, the disease remains a serious public health concern, with an estimated US$ 8 billion annual loss in productivity due to blindness and visual impairment. Symptoms: Infection is associated with inflammatory changes in the conjunctiva known as “active trachoma”. An individual’s immune system can clear a single episode of infection, but in endemic communities, re-acquisition of the organism occurs frequently. After years of repeated episodes of active trachoma, the inside of the eyelid can become so severely scarred (trachomatous conjunctival scarring) that it turns inwards and causes the eyelashes to rub against the eyeball (trachomatous trichiasis), resulting in constant pain and light intolerance; this and other alterations of the eye can lead to scarring of the cornea.
translations.reference: Ngo-2019 kuphela, abantu abangama-92 622 bathola ukwelashwa kokuhlinzwa kwetrachoma esezingeni eliphakeme futhi abayizigidi ezingama-95.2 balashwe ngama-antibiotics. Naphezu kwalezi mpumelelo, lesi sifo siseyinkinga enkulu yezempilo yomphakathi, ngokulahleka okulinganiselwa ku-US$ 8 billion ngonyaka ekukhiqizeni ngenxa yokungaboni nokungaboni kahle. Izimpawu: Ukutheleleka kuhlotshaniswa nezinguquko zokuvuvukala kuconjunctiva eyaziwa ngokuthi "itrachoma esebenzayo". Amasosha omzimba womuntu angasusa isiqephu esisodwa sokutheleleka, kodwa emiphakathini ehlala njalo, ukutholwa kabusha kwento ephilayo kwenzeka kaningi. Ngemva kweminyaka yeziqephu eziphindaphindiwe zetrachoma esebenzayo, ingaphakathi lejwabu leso lingase libe nezibazi ezimbi kakhulu (itrachomatous conjunctival scarring) kangangokuthi iphendukela ngaphakathi futhi ibangele ukuthi izinkophe zihlikihle esweni (trachomatous trichiasis), okuholela ebuhlungu obuqhubekayo nokungabekezelelani okuncane; lokhu kanye nezinye izinguquko zeso kungaholela emazingeni ecornea.
translations.hypothesis: Ngo-2019 kuphela, abantu abangu-92 622 bathole ukwelashwa ngokusebenza kwezibondo ngobungozi obukhulu be-trachoma, kanti abantu abangu-95.2 million batholwe ukwelashwa ngamakhambi. Nakuba kunjalo, lesi sifo kuyinto ekhulu kakhulu yezempilo yomphakathi, kanti kulinganiselwa ukuthi kukhishwa imali engu-$8 billion ngonyaka ngenxa yokulahlekelwa umsebenzi ngenxa yobungozi nokulahlekelwa ukubukeka. Izimpawu: Ukuguguleka kuhlobene ngokushintsha kokuqhumayo kwe-conjunctiva, okubizwa ngokuthi "i-trachoma esebenzayo." Uhlelo lwezincane lomuntu ngamunye lungakwazi ukuhlanganisa ukuguguleka okukodwa, kodwa ezindaweni ezithile lapho lesi sifo sikhona kakhulu, ukuguguleka kulo sifo kuvela njalo. Ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi yezimo ezihleliwe ze-trachoma esebenzayo, ingaphakathi le-eyelid ingaba nemigubu emikhulu kakhulu (ukuguguleka kwe-conjunctiva ngenxa ye-trachoma) kancane kancane, futhi liyavuma ngaphakathi, okubangela ukuthi amatshe amehlo athinte umdwebo wamehlo (i-trachomatous trichiasis), okubangela ubuhlungu obuqhubekayo nokungathandi ukukhanya; lokhu kanye nezinye izinguquko zamehlo zingadala ukuguguleka kwe-cornea.

translations.source: Left untreated, this condition leads to the formation of irreversible opacities, with resulting visual impairment or blindness. The age at which this occurs depends on several factors including local transmission intensity. In very highly endemic communities, it can occur in childhood, though onset of visual impairment between the ages of 30 and 40 years is more typical. Women are blinded up to four times as often as men, probably due to more frequent contact with infected children. Individuals living in the poorest and most remote communities of Africa, Asia, Australia, the Middle East, Central and South America and the Pacific Islands are at risk.
translations.reference: Uma singelashwa, lesi simo siholela ekwakhekeni kwe-opacities engalungiseki, okuholela ekukhubazekeni kokubona noma ubumpumputhe. Iminyaka yobudala okwenzeka ngayo lokhu incike ezintweni ezimbalwa ezihlanganisa namandla okudlulisela kwasendaweni. Emiphakathini evame kakhulu, kungenzeka ebuntwaneni, nakuba ukuqala kokukhubazeka kokubona phakathi kweminyaka yobudala engama-30 kuya kwengama-40 kuvame kakhulu. Abesifazane baphuphuthekiswa izikhathi ezine ngokuphindwe kane kunabesilisa, mhlawumbe ngenxa yokuxhumana njalo nezingane ezinegciwane. Abantu abahlala emiphakathini empofu kakhulu nekude kakhulu yase-Afrika, e-Asia, e-Australia, eMiddle East, eMelika Ephakathi neseNingizimu kanye naseziqhingini zasePacific basengozini.
translations.hypothesis: Uma leli calo lingalungiswa, liyadala ukwakheka kwezinto ezimnyama okungalinyathelwa, okubangela ukulahlekelwa kokubona noma ukungaboni. Ubudala obuqala kuleli calo kuxhomekile ezinto eziningi, okuhlanganisa namandla okusasazeka endlini. Ezindaweni ezinezifo eziningi kakhulu, kungaqala ngempelasonto, nakuba ukuhlazwa kokubona phakathi kweminyaka engu-30 no-40 kuyinto ejwayelekile. Abesifazane badinga ukwelashwa ukuba badolobhwe izikhathi eziningi kunezinga labesilisa, mhlawumbe ngenxa yokuthi bathintana kakhulu nezingane ezithintekile. Abantu abahlala ezindaweni ezincane nezikude e-Afrika, e-Asia, e-Australia, e-Middle East, e-Central America, e-South America kanye nezizi zamaPulaki bahlukile nengozi.

translations.source: Treatment: Trachoma can be prevented by limiting environmental risk factors. These include inadequate hygiene, crowded households, inadequate access to water and inadequate access to and use of sanitation. Infections usually begin at an early age and grow less frequent and shorter in duration with increasing age. Infections are most often acquired through family and contact with others with active disease. Repeated infections cause the most serious symptoms of the disease.
translations.reference: Ukwelashwa: ITrachoma ingavinjelwa ngokunciphisa izici eziyingozi zemvelo. Lokhu kubandakanya ukungahlanzeki ngokwanele, amakhaya aminyene, ukungakwazi ukuthola amanzi ngokwanele kanye nokungatholakali okwanele nokusetshenziswa kwezindlu zangasese. Amagciwane ngokuvamile aqala esemncane futhi akhule kancane futhi abe mfushane ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngokuya ngeminyaka. Ukutheleleka kuvame ukutholwa ngomndeni kanye nokuxhumana nabanye abanesifo esisebenzayo. Ukutheleleka okuphindaphindiwe kubangela izimpawu ezimbi kakhulu zesifo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa: Ukugula kwe-trachoma kungavikelwa ngokunciphisa izinto ezingočaze ukugula. Lezi zinto zihlanganisa ukungahleleki kokuwasha, izindlu ezinezilwane eziningi, ukungatholakali komswakama kanye nokungatholakali kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemfucuza. Okugula ngokuvamile kuqala ngesikhathi esincane, futhi kuba ngamabomu futhi kuncane kakhulu ngokuhamba kweminyaka. Okugula ngokuvamile kutholakala ngenxa yomndeni kanye nokuxhumana nabanye abagulayo. Ukugula okuphindaphindiwe kubanga izimpawu ezinkulu kakhulu zalesi sifo.

translations.source: Trachoma can be eliminated as a public health problem using the SAFE strategy, comprising: Surgery to treat trachomatous trichiasis, the blinding stage of the disease; Antibiotics to clear infection, particularly mass drug administration of the antibiotic azithromycin, which is donated by the manufacturer to national programmes through the International Trachoma Initiative; Facial cleanliness; and Environmental improvement, particularly better access to water and sanitation.
translations.reference: ITrachoma ingaqedwa njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi kusetshenziswa isu elithi SAFE, elihlanganisa: Ukuhlinzwa ukwelapha itrachomatous trichiasis, isigaba sokuphuphuthekisa lesi sifo; Ama-antibiotics ukususa ukutheleleka, ikakhulukazi ukuphathwa kwezidakamizwa eziningi ze-antibiotic azithromycin, enikelwa ngumkhiqizi ezinhlelweni zikazwelonke nge-International Trachoma Initiative; Ukuhlanzeka kobuso; futhi Ukuthuthukiswa kwemvelo, ikakhulukazi ukutholakala kwamanzi nokuthuthwa kwendle okungcono.

translations.source: WHO adopted the SAFE strategy in 1993 and continues in its mandate to provide leadership and coordination of international efforts to eliminate trachoma as a public health problem.
translations.reference: IWHO yamukela isu leSAFE ku-1993 futhi iyaqhubeka nomsebenzi wayo wokuhlinzeka ngobuholi kanye nokuxhumana kwemizamo yamazwe ngamazwe yokuqeda i-trachoma njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO yagxumela kwi-strateji ethi "SAFE" ngonyaka ka-1993, futhi iyaqhubeka nokwenza umsebenzi wayo wokuholisa nokuxhumanisa imizamo yamazwe ngamazwe ukwehlisa ukugqwala kwe-trachoma njengengxube yezempilo yomphakathi.

translations.source: Traditional, Complementary and Integrative Medicine Overview: Traditional medicine Traditional medicine has a long history. It is the sum total of the knowledge, skill, and practices based on the theories, beliefs, and experiences indigenous to different cultures, whether explicable or not, used in the maintenance of health as well as in the prevention, diagnosis, improvement or treatment of physical and mental illness. Complementary medicine
translations.reference: Umuthi Wendabuko, Ohambisanayo kanye Nodidiyelo Uhlolojikelele: Imithi yesintu Imithi yesintu inomlando omude. Yisamba esiphelele solwazi, ikhono, nezinqubo ezisekelwe emibonweni, izinkolelo, kanye nolwazi lwendabuko lwamasiko ahlukene, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi luyachayeka noma cha, olusetshenziswa ekunakekeleni impilo kanye nasekuvimbeleni, ekuxilongeni, ekuthuthukiseni noma ekwelapheni. yokugula ngokomzimba nangokwengqondo. Umuthi ohambisanayo
translations.hypothesis: Ububanzi Bezindlela Zezokwelapha: Izokwelapha Zamadala. Izokwelapha zamadala zinomlando omude. Yileliqiniso lonke lwelwazi, amakhono, kanye nezindlela ezisuselwe ezimisweni, emibuyeni, kanye nezinto ezibekwe ngabantu bomthombo ngamanye amasiko, nokuthi kungachazeki noma cha, ezisetshenziselwa ukugcina impilo, kanye nokuvimbela, ukuxilonga, ukuthuthukisa, noma ukwelapha izifo zengqondo nomzimba. Izokwelapha ezisekelwe kwezinye izindlela.

translations.source: The terms “complementary medicine” or “alternative medicine” refer to a broad set of health care practices that are not part of that country’s own tradition or conventional medicine and are not fully integrated into the dominant health-care system. They are used interchangeably with traditional medicine in some countries. Herbal medicines Herbal medicines include herbs, herbal materials, herbal preparations and finished herbal products, that contain as active ingredients parts of plants, or other plant materials, or combinations. Impact: The WHO Traditional Medicine Strategy 2014–2023 was developed and launched in response to the World Health Assembly resolution on traditional medicine (WHA62.13).
translations.reference: Amagama athi “imithi ehambisanayo” noma “umuthi ohlukile” asho iqoqo elibanzi lezinqubo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezingeyona ingxenye yesiko lalelo zwe noma imithi evamile futhi engahlanganisiwe ngokugcwele ohlelweni lokunakekelwa kwezempilo olubusayo. Asetshenziswa ngokushintshana nemithi yesintu kwamanye amazwe. Imithi yamakhambi Imithi yamakhambi ihlanganisa amakhambi ayizinhlobonhlobo, izinto zeherbal, amalungiselelo eherbal nemikhiqizo yeherbal eqediwe, equkethe izithako ezisebenzayo izingxenye zezitshalo, noma ezinye izinto zezitshalo, noma izinhlanganisela. Umthelela: Isu Lemithi Yendabuko yeWHO 2014–2023 lathuthukiswa futhi laqalwa ngokuphendula isinqumo seWorld Health Assembly semithi yendabuko (WHA62.13).
translations.hypothesis: Le migamo "ezokwelapha ezengeziwe" noma "ezokwelapha ezikhethekile" kumelela uhla olubanzi lwemikhuba yezempilo engingeyingxenye yendlela yendabuko yalezwe noma yezokwelapha ezivamile, futhi engakhiwanga ngokuphelele ngaphakathi kohlelo olukhulu lwezokwelapha. Kwezinye izizwe, lezi zindlela zisebenziswa ngokufanayo nezokwelapha zendabuko. Izinto zokwelapha ezitholwe ezimbaleni: Lezi zinto zifaka izimbali, izinto ezitholwe ezimbaleni, ukulungiswa okwenziwe ngesimbali, kanye nemikhiqizo ekugcinile eyenziwe ngesimbali, ezoqukethe izingxenye zezitshalo, noma ezinye izinto ezitholwe ezitshalweni, noma ukuhlanganiswa kwazo. Umthelela: Uhlelo lwe-WHO lwezokwelapha zendabuko lwango-2014 kuya ku-2023 lwakhiwe futhi laqalwa njengempendulo kwiqala yeNdlu yezempilo yomhlaba mayelana nezokwelapha zendabuko (WHA62.13).

translations.source: The strategy aims to support Member States in developing proactive policies and implementing action plans that will strengthen the role traditional medicine plays in keeping populations healthy. Addressing the challenges, responding to the needs identified by Member States and building on the work done under the WHO traditional medicine strategy: 2002–2005, the updated strategy for the period 2014–2023 devotes more attention than its predecessor to prioritizing health services and systems, including traditional and complementary medicine products, practices and practitioners. The strategic objectives are: To build the knowledge base for active management of T&CM through appropriate national policies; To strengthen the quality assurance, safety, proper use and effectiveness of T&CM by regulating products, practices and practitioners;
translations.reference: Isu lihlose ukusekela Amazwe Angamalungu ekuthuthukiseni izinqubomgomo ezisebenzayo kanye nokusebenzisa izinhlelo zokusebenza ezizoqinisa indima edlalwa imithi yendabuko ekugcineni imiphakathi iphilile. Ukubhekana nezinselele, ukusabela ezidingweni ezihlonzwe Amazwe Angamalungu kanye nokwakhela phezu komsebenzi owenziwe ngaphansi kwesu lemithi yendabuko yeWHO: 2002-2005, isu elibuyekeziwe lesikhathi sika-2014-2023 linikezela ukunaka okungaphezulu kunokwandulela walo ekubekeni phambili izinsiza zezempilo nezinhlelo. , okuhlanganisa imikhiqizo yemithi yesintu nehambisanayo, izinqubo kanye nodokotela. Izinjongo zamasu yilezi: Ukwakha isisekelo solwazi sokuphatha okusebenzayo kweT&CM ngokusebenzisa izinqubomgomo zikazwelonke ezifanele; Ukuqinisa ukuqinisekiswa kwekhwalithi, ukuphepha, ukusetshenziswa okufanele nokusebenza kahle kweT&CM ngokulawula imikhiqizo, izinqubo kanye nabasebenzi;
translations.hypothesis: Lo mqondiso uhlose ukuxhasa izizwe ezilunga kule nhlanganisela ekuthuthukiseni amaphakheji ezinqubomgomo ezisheshayo kanye nokusebenzisa izinhlelo zokusebenza ezokhuthaza indima eyakhulu yezokwelapha zasendabuko ekugcineni impilo yeningi. Ngokubhekisela izinselelo, ukuphendula izidingo ezikhonjwe izizwe ezilunga kanye nokwandisa umsebenzi owenziwe ngaphansi komqondiso wezokwelapha zasendabuko we-WHO: 2002–2005, lo mqondiso omtsha walesi sikhathi esuka ku-2014 kuya ku-2023 unikeza ukunakekelwa okukhulu kunalokho elandule, kokuqokwa kwezinsizakalo kanye nezinhlelo zempilo, okubalwa kuzo imikhiqizo, izindlela kanye nabahlinzeki bezokwelapha zasendabuko kanye nezokwelapha ezongezwayo. Izinhloso ezibalulekile zilo mqondiso zifana nalezi: Ukwakha ulwazi oluyisisekelo lokulawula ngempumelelo izokwelapha zasendabuko nezokwelapha ezongezwayo ngamaphakheji eziqubomgomo kazwelonke afanele; Ukukhuthaza ikhwalithi, ukuphepha, ukusetshenziswa okufanele kanye nokusebenza kwezokwelapha zasendabuko nezokwelapha ezongezwayo ngokulawula imikhiqizo, izindlela kanye nabahlinzeki.

translations.source: To promote universal health coverage by integrating T&CM services into health care service delivery and self-health care. WHO response: The WHO global report on traditional and complementary medicine 2019 was developed to address the gap in reliable, credible and official data from Member States in the area of T&CM. This report reviews global progress in T&CM over the past two decades and is based on contributions from 179 WHO Member States. It provides valuable information for policy-makers, health professionals and the public for capitalizing on the potential contribution of T&CM to health and well-being.
translations.reference: Ukukhuthaza ukuhlinzekwa kwezempilo emhlabeni wonke ngokuhlanganisa izinsiza zeT&CM ekulethweni kwezinsizakalo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo kanye nokuzinakekela. Impendulo yeWHO: Umbiko wembulunga yonke weWHO ngemithi yendabuko nehambisanayo 2019 wathuthukiswa ukuze kubhekwane negebe kudatha ethembekile, ethembekile nesemthethweni evela emazweni Angamalungu endaweni yeT&CM. Lo mbiko ubuyekeza inqubekelaphambili yomhlaba kuT&CM kule minyaka engamashumi amabili edlule futhi usekelwe emnikelweni ovela emazweni Angamalungu eWHO ayi-179. Ihlinzeka ngolwazi olubalulekile kubenzi bezinqubomgomo, ochwepheshe bezempilo kanye nomphakathi ukuze usebenzise imali engaba khona yeT&CM empilweni nasenhlalakahleni.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuqinisa ukufinyelela kwamazimpilo kubo bonke ngokuphina izinsizakalo zama-T&CM (izinsizakalo zezokwelapha zamasiko nezokwelapha ezenziwa ngabantu) ezindleleni zokunikeza izinsizakalo zezempilo kanye nokunakekelwa kwempilo ngabantu ngabanye. Impendulo ye-WHO: Ingxenye yomhlalaphansi ye-WHO mayelana nezokwelapha zamasiko nezokwelapha ezenziwa ngabantu ka-2019 yakhiwa ukuze kuxazululwe ukuntuleka kolwazi oluthembekile, oluqinisekiswayo, kanye olusemthethweni ezweni ngakunye elilungu le-WHO kule ndawo ye-T&CM. Leli phaphethi libuyekeza ukuqhubeka kwamazwe ngamazwe kwe-T&CM eminyakeni embalwa edlule futhi kususwe ngemibiko evela ezweni elingu-179 elilungu le-WHO. Linikeza ulwazi olubalulekile kubenzi bezinqubomgomo, ochwepheshe bezempilo, kanye nomphakathi ukuze kuzuze kakhulu ukuthi i-T&CM ingasebenza kanjani ekuthuthukiseni impilo nokuba nokuziphilisa.

translations.source: Transplantation Overview: Transplantation of human cells, tissues and organs Transplantation of human cells, tissues or organs saves many lives and restores essential functions where no alternatives of comparable effectiveness exist. In 50 years, transplantation has become a successful worldwide practice. However, there are large differences between countries in access to suitable transplantation and in the level of safety, quality, efficacy of donation and transplantation of human cells, tissues and organs.
translations.reference: Ukufakelwa kabusha Uhlolojikelele: Ukufakelwa kabusha kwamangqamuzana omuntu, izicubu nezitho zomzimba Ukufakelwa kabusha kwamangqamuzana omuntu, izicubu noma izitho kusindisa izimpilo eziningi futhi kubuyisela imisebenzi ebalulekile lapho kungekho ezinye izindlela ezisebenzayo ezikhona. Eminyakeni engu-50, ukufakelwa kabusha sekuyinto ephumelelayo emhlabeni wonke. Kodwa ke, kunomehluko omkhulu phakathi kwamazwe ekufinyeleleni ukufakelwa okulungile kanye nezinga lokuphepha, ikhwalithi, ukusebenza kahle kokunikela kanye nokufakelwa kwamangqamuzana omuntu, izicubu nezitho zomzimba.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuguqulwa Kwengxenye Yomzimba: Ukuguqulwa kwezicelo, izicubu kanye nezimo zomuntu. Ukuguqulwa kwezicelo, izicubu noma izimo zomuntu kusindisa impilo yabantu abaningi futhi kubuyisele imisebenzi ebalulekile lapho akukho ezinye izindlela ezifanele kangako. Kule minyaka engu-50, ukuguqulwa kwengxenye yomzimba kuye kwaba yinto esabalale emhlabeni yonke futhi ephephile. Kodwa-ke, kukhona umehluko omkhulu phakathi kwezifunda ezahlukene ekufinyeleleni kwezindlela zokuguqulwa ezifanele kanye nezinga lokuphepha, ikhwalithi, kanye nokusebenza kahle kokunikezwa kanye nokuguqulwa kwezicelo, izicubu kanye nezimo zomuntu.

translations.source: The ethical aspects of transplantation are at the forefront. In particular, the unmet patients’ needs and the shortage of transplants lead to the temptation of trafficking in human body components for transplantation. Human transplantation Human cells and tissues for transplantation can save lives or restore essential functions. For examplea corneal graft can restore sight in corneal blindness;
translations.reference: Izici zokuziphatha zokufakelwa kabusha zihamba phambili. Ikakhulukazi, izidingo zeziguli ezingahlangatshezwana nazo kanye nokushoda kokufakelwa kabusha kuholela esilingweni sokushushumbiswa kwezingxenye zomzimba womuntu ukuze zifakwe kabusha. Ukufakelwa komuntu Amaseli omuntu kanye nezicubu zokufakelwa kabusha kungasindisa izimpilo noma kubuyisele imisebenzi ebalulekile. Isibonelo, icorneal graft ingabuyisela ukubona ebumpumputheni be-cornea;
translations.hypothesis: Izici zobuhle zokudluliselwa zibaluleke kakhulu. Ngakho-ke, ukuthi izidingo zabagulayo azitholwe futhi ukuntuleka kwezindlela zokudluliselwa kuholela ekuthengweni kanye nokuthengisweni yezingxenye zomzimba wabantu ukuze zidluliselwe. Ukudluliselwa kwabantu: Amaselula nezicubu zombili zabantu ezidluliselwa zingenza ukuthi impilo ilondolozwe noma imisebenzi ebalulekile ibuyiselwe. Ngokwesibonelo, ukudluliselwa kwamephilo kungabuyisela ukubukeka kubantu abangaboni ngoba kunokukhubazeka kwamephilo.

translations.source: the transplantation of haematopoietic stem cells can cure congenital or acquired diseases including some leukaemias See further information on Haematopoeitic Stem Cells the transplantation of a human heart valve often constitutes the best replacement situation and recipient patients do not require long term anti-coagulation therapy. Xenotransplantation Xenotransplantation, animal to human, defined as living cells, tissues or organs of animal origin and human body fluids, cells, tissues or organs that have ex vivo with these living, xenogeneic materials, has the potential to constitute an alternative to material of human origin and bridge the shortfall in human material for transplantation.
translations.reference: ukufakelwa kabusha kwehaematopoietic stem cell kungalapha izifo zokuzalwa noma ezitholiwe kubandakanya neleukemia Bona ulwazi olwengeziwe ngamaseli weHaematopoeitic Stem Cells ukufakelwa kwe-valve yenhliziyo yomuntu kuvame ukwenza isimo esingcono kakhulu sokubuyisela futhi iziguli ezithola usizo azidingi ukwelashwa kwesikhathi eside okulwa nokuhlangana. I-Xenotransplantation IXenotransplantation, isilwane ukuya kumuntu, okuchazwa njengamaseli aphilayo, izicubu noma izitho zemvelaphi yezilwane kanye noketshezi lomzimba womuntu, amaseli, izicubu noma izitho ezine-ex vivo nalezi zinto eziphilayo, zexenogeneic, zinamandla okwenza enye into yemvelaphi yomuntu kanye nokuvala ukushoda kwezinto ezisetshenziswa abantu zokufakelwa kabusha.
translations.hypothesis: Ukudluliselwa kwe-hematopoietic stem cells kungalungisa izifo ezalwa ngaphambilini noma ezifike ngemuva, okubalwa phakathi kwayo ezinye izinhlobo ze-leukemia. Bheka ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana ne-Hematopoietic Stem Cells. Ukudluliselwa kwentambo yomphefumulo yomuntu, kuvamile ukuthi kube yindlela engcono kakhulu yokutshintsha, futhi iziguli ezithola le ntambo azidingi ukwelashwa ngokusiza ukugwema ukufudumala isikhathi eside. I-Xenotransplantation: I-Xenotransplantation, ekudluliselweni kwezicelo ezimpilweni ezivela ezilwaneni kubantu, ichazwe njengamaseli, izicubu noma izimo ezimpilweni ezivela ezilwaneni, kanye nezicelo zomzimba womuntu, amaseli, izicubu noma izimo ezilungiselelwe ngaphandle komzimba, ezisebenzisana nalezi zicelo ezimpilweni, ezivela kwezinye izinhlobo. Le ndlela ingaba yindlela yokuthi kukhululeke ukusebenzisa izicelo ezivela emzimbeni womuntu, futhi ingasetshenziselwa ukuxazulula ukuntuleka kwezicelo zomuntu ezidingekayo ekudluliselweni.

translations.source: Donation: Donations from deceased persons should be developed to their maximum therapeutic potential avoiding, whenever possible, the inherent risks to live donors, as stated in WHO Guiding Principle 3. There is a recognized need for communities, and health professionals, to become better educated about donation and transplantation and that is the key to the success of deceased donation programmes. However, despite the frequent use of materials donated from deceased donors, the donations from living donors are necessary for some types of transplants or to compensate for the limited supply of material available from deceased donors in order to meet patient needs. Living donation is thus practised despite the fact that it involves risks for the donor that may not be negligible. As the procurement of human material for transplantation from deceased or living donors and the subsequent allogeneic transplantation may entail ethical and safety risks for both the recipient and the donor, strict controls and effective oversight should be carried out by the health authorities to protect them.
translations.reference: Umnikelo: Iminikelo evela kubantu abashonile kufanele ithuthukiswe ukuze ibe namandla abo aphezulu okwelapha ukugwema, noma nini lapho kunokwenzeka, izingozi ezingokwemvelo zokunikela abaphilayo, njengoba kushiwo Kumgomo 3 Wokuqondisa weWHO. Kunesidingo esibonakalayo sokuthi imiphakathi, kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo, bafundiswe kangcono ngokunikela nokufakelwa futhi lokho kuwukhiye wempumelelo yezinhlelo zokunikela abashonile. Nokho, naphezu kokusetshenziswa njalo kwezinto ezinikelwa kubanikeli abashonile, iminikelo evela kubanikeli abaphilayo iyadingeka kwezinye izinhlobo zokufakelwa noma ukunxephezela ukunikezwa okulinganiselwe kwezinto ezitholakala kubanikeli abashonile ukuze kuhlangatshezwane nezidingo zesiguli. Ukunikela okuphilayo kwenziwa kanjalo naphezu kweqiniso lokuthi kuhilela izingozi kumnikeli okungenzeka azinakwa. Njengoba ukuthengwa kwezinto ezisetshenziswa abantu zokufakelwa kabusha kusuka kubanikeli abashonile noma abaphilayo kanye nokufakelwa kabusha kwe-allogeneic okulandelayo kungase kufake izingozi zezimiso zokuziphatha nezokuphepha kubo bobabili umamukeli kanye nomnikeli, ukulawulwa okuqinile nokwengamela okusebenzayo kufanele kwenziwe iziphathimandla zezempilo ukuze zibavikele.
translations.hypothesis: Imbeko: Imbeko ezivela kubantu abashonile kufanele kukhuthazwe ukuze zisebenzise ngokugcwele kakhulu ekwelapheni, futhi uma kungenzeki, kufanele kuvunyelwe ukuthi zibe nezinkinga ezithile ezibangelwa ukuthi zitholakale kubantu abaphilayo, njengoba kuchaziwe kwiMimiselo Yokuholwa ye-WHO, nombhalo wesithathu. Kukhona isidingo esiqinile sokuthi imiphakathi kanye nochwepheshe bezempilo zifunde kabanzi mayelana nembeko nokudiliza izitho, futhi lokho kuyisihluthulelo sempumelelo yezinhlelo zembeko ezivela kubantu abashonile. Kodwa-ke, noma kunjalo ukuthi kusetshenziswa kaningi izinto ezitholwe embekeni yabantu abashonile, imbeko ezivela kubantu abaphilayo zidingekile kwezinye izinhlobo zokudiliza izitho, noma ukukhokhela ukuthi kunento encane kakhulu etholakala embekeni yabantu abashonile ukuze kwanelise izidingo zabagulayo. Ngakho-ke, imbeko kubantu abaphilayo isetshenziswa, noma kunjalo ukuthi ihlanganisa izingozi zomuntu othengiwe, ezingaba ezinkulu. Njengoba ukutholakala kwezinto zombili zabantu zokudiliza izitho, nokudiliza izitho okwamanje, kungabangela izingozi zombuso nezokuphepha kokubili umthengi kanye nombeko, ukulawulwa okuthobekile nokubhekwa okusebenzayo kufanele kwenziwe yizikhungo zezempilo ukuze zivikele.

translations.source: The Guiding Principles mandate optimal care for donors and recipients. The transparent oversight of the health authorities over donation and transplantation activities is also essential to increase the trust of the public in the system. In addition, the decision to be a donor is often based on the understanding that a contribution to the availability of transplant resources may someday benefit the health needs of the donor’s family. If we are prepared to receive a transplant should we need one, then we should be ready to give Ethics: WHO Guiding Principles on Human Cell, Tissue and Organ Transplantation
translations.reference: Izimiso Eziqondisayo zigunyaza ukunakekelwa okufanele kubanikeli nabamukeli. Ukwengamela okusobala kweziphathimandla zezempilo mayelana neminikelo kanye nemisebenzi yokufakelwa kabusha kubalulekile futhi ukuze kwandiswe ukwethenjwa komphakathi ohlelweni. Ukwengeza, isinqumo sokuba umnikeli ngokuvamile sisekelwe ekuqondeni ukuthi umnikelo ekutholakaleni kwezinsiza zokufakelwa kabusha kungase ngolunye usuku kuzuze izidingo zezempilo zomndeni walowo onikelayo. Uma sikulungele ukwamukela ukufakelwa kabusha uma sikudinga, kufanele sikulungele ukunikeza Izimiso Zokuziphatha: Izimiso Eziqondisayo zeWHO Kungqamuzana Lomuntu, Izicubu Nezitho Zokufakelwa
translations.hypothesis: Le mithetho eholayo ichaza ukuthi kufanele kunikezwe ukunakekelwa okuhle kubo bobabili, abanikeli kanye nabathola. Ukugadiwa okucacile kwezikhungo zezempilo ngemisebenzi yokunikeza kanye nokudiliza izitho kubalulekile ukuze kukhuliswe ukuzethemba komphakathi kulolu hlelo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, isinqumo sokuba umnikeli evamise ukususelwa eqinisweni lokuthi ukufakwa kwezinto ezidingekayo zokudiliza izitho kungase kusize ezindlini zezempilo zomndeni walowo unikeza. Uma singamukela ukudiliza izitho uma kudingeka, kufanele sibe ngomusa wokunikela. Izinqubomgomo: Izinqubomgomo ze-WHO eziholayo mayelana nokudiliza amaseli, izicubu kanye nezitho zabantu.

translations.source: In 1987 the fortieth World Health Assembly, concerned at the trade for profit in human organs, initiated the preparation of the first WHO Guiding Principles on Transplantation, endorsed by the Assembly in 1991 in resolution WHA44.25. These Guiding Principles have greatly influenced professional codes and practices as well as legislation around the world during almost two decades. After a consultation process that took several years, the Sixty-third World Health Assembly adopted resolution WHA63.22 on 21 May 2010, endorsing the updated WHO Guiding Principles and identifying areas of progress to optimize donation and transplantation practices. The Declaration of Istanbul Professionals of donation and transplantation from all regions, through many of their organizations and institutions, are endorsing the Declaration of Istanbul on organ trafficking and transplant tourism developed under the leadership of the Transplantation Society and the International Society of Nephrology in May 2008.
translations.reference: Ngo-1987 iWorld Health Assembly yamashumi amane, ephathelene nokuhweba ngenzuzo ezithweni zomuntu, yaqala ukulungiswa kweMigomo Yokuqondisa YeWHO Yokutshala Utshani, eyagunyazwa nguMkhandlu ngo-1991 ngesinqumo esithi WHA44.25. Le Migomo Eqondisayo ibe nomthelela omkhulu kumakhodi nezinqubo zochwepheshe kanye nemithetho emhlabeni wonke cishe phakathi neminyaka engamashumi amabili. Ngemva kwenqubo yokubonisana eyathatha iminyaka eminingana, Umhlangano Wezempilo Womhlaba Wamashumi Ayisithupha Nantathu wamukela isinqumo esithi WHA63.22 mhla zingama-21 kuNhlaba wezi-2010, esigunyaza Izimiso Zokuqondisa zeWHO ezibuyekeziwe kanye nokuhlonza izindawo zenqubekelaphambili ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinqubo zokunikela nokutshala. Isimemezelo seIstanbul Ochwepheshe bomnikelo nokufakelwa kabusha abavela kuzo zonke izifunda, ngokusebenzisa izinhlangano zabo eziningi nezikhungo, bagunyaza Isimemezelo sase-Istanbul mayelana nokushushumbiswa kwezitho zomzimba kanye nezokuvakasha zokufakelwa kabusha ezakhiwe ngaphansi kobuholi beTransplantation Society kanye ne-International Society of Nephrology ngoNhlaba 2008.
translations.hypothesis: Ngo-1987, i-Fortieth World Health Assembly, eyakhathazwa ukuthengiswa kwezitho zomzimba zabantu ngenhloso yokuthola inzuzo, yaqala ukulungiselela izinqubomgomo zokuqondisa zokuqala ze-WHO mayelana nokudiliza, ezavunywa yi-Assembly ngo-1991 ngokusho kweqophelo elithi WHA44.25. Lezi zinqubomgomo zokuqondisa zibanxele umthelela omkhulu ezindleleni zochwepheshe kanye nezindlela zokusebenza, kanye nomthetho kulo lonke elasekuphileni, ngeminye iminyaka emikhulu. Ngemuva kwenqubo yokuxoxisana ethathe iminyaka eminingi, i-Sixty-third World Health Assembly yamukela iqophelo elithi WHA63.22 ngomhlaka 21 Meyi 2010, yavuma izinqubomgomo zokuqondisa ezibuyekeziwe ze-WHO futhi yachaza izindawo zokuthuthuka ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukunikezwa kanye nezindlela zokudiliza. I-Declaration of Istanbul, ochwepheshe mayelana nokunikezwa nokudiliza ezifundazweni eziningi, ngamazinhlangano zabo kanye nezikhungo zabo, bayavuma i-Declaration of Istanbul mayelana nokuthengiswa kwezitho zomzimba kanye nokuvakasha kokudiliza, eyakhiwa ngaphansi kokuqondiswa kwe-Transplantation Society kanye ne-International Society of Nephrology ngoMeyi 2008.

translations.source: Travel and health Overview: International travel can pose various risks to health, depending on the characteristics of both the traveller and the travel. Travellers may encounter sudden and significant changes in altitude, humidity, microbes, and temperature, which can result in ill-health. In addition, serious health risks may arise in areas where accommodation is of poor quality, hygiene and sanitation are inadequate, medical services are not well developed and clean water is unavailable. International travel is on the rise, as millions of people travel for professional, social, recreational and humanitarian purposes each year.
translations.reference: Ukuhamba nempilo Uhlolojikelele: Ukuvakasha kwamanye amazwe kungabeka engcupheni ehlukahlukene empilweni, kuye ngezici zombili zomhambi kanye nohambo. Abahambi bangase bahlangabezane nezinguquko ezingazelelwe neziphawulekayo endaweni, umswakama, amagciwane, nezinga lokushisa, okungase kubangele impilo ebuthaka. Ukwengeza, izingozi ezingathi sína zezempilo zingase ziphakame ezindaweni lapho indawo yokuhlala isezingeni eliphansi, inhlanzeko kanye nokukhucululwa kwendle kunganele, izinsizakalo zezokwelapha azithuthukisiwe kahle futhi amanzi ahlanzekile engatholakali. Ukuvakasha kwamazwe ngamazwe kuyanda, njengoba izigidi zabantu zihamba ngezinjongo zobungcweti, zezenhlalo, zokungcebeleka kanye nokusiza abantu unyaka ngamunye.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhamba kanye nezempilo: Ukuhamba ngamazwe angaphandle kungaba nemingcweti ehlukahlukene ezempilweni, kuye ngesimo somhambi kanye nohambo oluthathwe. Abahambi bangahlangabezana noshintsho obukhulu nesheshayo kakhulu ekumeni, umswakama, amagciwane, kanye nomswakama, okungaholela ezinkingeni zezempilo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izingozi ezinkulu zezempilo zingavela ezindaweni lapho ukuhlala kuyingozi, ukuhlanzeka nokunakekelwa kwempilo kungaphansi kwezinga, izinsizakalo zokwelashwa azithuthukiswanga kahle, futhi amanzi ahlanzekile angeyitholakali. Ukuhamba ngamazwe angaphandle kukhulayo, njengoba amayelana ezigidi abantu ahamba nanyanga zonke ngenhloso yomsebenzi, ezokuxhumana, yokuzijabulisa, kanye nokunakekelwa kwabanye.

translations.source: All travellers must prepare for the variety of health risks they can be exposed to in unfamiliar environments before, during and after they travel. People planning to travel should seek advice on the potential hazards in their chosen destinations and understand how best to protect their health and minimize the risk of acquiring disease. Forward planning, appropriate preventive measures and careful precautions can protect the health of travellers, and minimize the risks of accident and of acquiring disease. Although the medical profession and the travel industry can provide extensive help and sound advice, it remains the traveller’s responsibility to seek information, to understand the risks involved and to take the necessary precautions to protect their health while travelling. Risk: When determining the health risks of international travel, travellers and health professionals should consider the following key factors:
translations.reference: Bonke abahambi kufanele balungiselele inhlobonhlobo yezingozi zezempilo abangachayeka kuzo ezindaweni abangazazi ngaphambi, ngesikhathi nangemuva kohambo. Abantu abahlela ukuvakasha kufanele bafune iseluleko mayelana nezingozi ezingase zibe khona ezindaweni abazikhethile futhi baqonde indlela engcono kakhulu yokuvikela impilo yabo kanye nokunciphisa ubungozi bokuthola izifo. Ukuhlela phambili, izinyathelo ezifanele zokuvimbela kanye nezinyathelo zokuqapha ngokucophelela kungavikela impilo yabahambi, futhi kunciphise ubungozi bengozi kanye nokuthola izifo. Nakuba umkhakha wezokwelapha kanye nemboni yezokuvakasha inganikeza usizo olubanzi nezeluleko eziphusile, kusewumthwalo wemfanelo womhambi ukufuna ulwazi, ukuqonda ubungozi obuhilelekile kanye nokuthatha izinyathelo zokuphepha ezidingekayo ukuze avikele impilo yakhe ngenkathi ehamba. Ubungozi: Lapho kunqunywa ubungozi bezempilo bokuvakasha kwamanye amazwe, abahambi kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo kufanele bacabangele lezi zici ezibalulekile ezilandelayo:
translations.hypothesis: Wonke umhambi kufanele alungiselele izinkinga zezempilo ezahlukene azibhekana nazo ezindaweni ezangaphambili, ngesikhathi nomhambi, nangemva kokuhamba. Abantu abahlela ukuhamba kufanele afune ucebo mayelana nezingozi ezingaba khona ezindaweni abazihambela kuzo, futhi baqonde ukuthi ngabe ngubani indlela engcono kakhulu yokuvikela impilo yabo nokunciphisa ingozi yokuphathwa yobusha. Ukuhlela kusengaphambili, izinyathelo zokuqapha ezifanele, kanye nokuzwela okucophelele kungavikela impilo yabahambi, futhi kunciphise amathuba emithi kanye nokutholakala kwezifo. Nakuba ochwepheshe bezokwelapha kanye nomkhakha wokuphatha ukuhamba banganikeza usizo olunzulu kanye nezeli ezifanele, kusekhona ukuthi umhambi ufunye ulwazi, aqonde amathuba, futhi thathe izinyathelo ezidingekayo zokuvikela impilo yakhe ngesikhathi ehamba. Ingosi: Lapho kunqunywa amathuba ezempilo okuhamba ngamazwe ngamazwe, abahambi kanye nochwepheshe bezokwelapha kufanele acabangele lezi zinto ezibalulekile:

translations.source: mode of transport destination(s) duration and season of travel purpose of travel standards of accommodation, food hygiene and sanitation
translations.reference: indlela yokuthutha indawo (izi) ubude besikhathi kanye nenkathi yokuhamba inhloso yokuhamba amazinga ezindawo zokuhlala, ukuhlanzeka kokudla kanye nokukhucululwa kwendle
translations.hypothesis: indlela yokuhamba, indawo (ezayo), isikhathi kanye nesizini yokuhamba, umgomo wokuhamba, amazinga kakhulu ezindawo zokuhlala, ukuhlanzeka kokudla kanye nokunakekelwa kwempilo.

translations.source: behaviour of the traveller underlying health of the traveller Travellers may encounter the following health risks depending on their destination: animal and insect bites, including mosquitoes, ticks, fleas, and some flies, which can spread diseases such as malaria exposure to blood or other bodily fluids
translations.reference: ukuziphatha komhambi impilo engaphansi yesihambi Abahambi bangase bahlangabezane nalezi zingozi zempilo ezilandelayo kuye ngendawo abaya kuyo: ukulunywa yizilwane nezinambuzane, okuhlanganisa omiyane, imikhaza, amazeze nezinye izimpukane, ezingasabalalisa izifo ezinjengomalaleveva. ukuchayeka egazini noma kolunye uketshezi lomzimba
translations.hypothesis: Indlela yohambo lomhambi kanye nezempilo zomhambi. Abahambi bangase bathathe izingozi ezempilo ezahlukene kuye lapho bayiya khona: ukugcotshwa ngamahlalana nezilwane ezincane, okubalwa phakathi kwazo izinambuzane, amagqolobe, izimbiza, kanye nezinye izilwane ezindiza, okungadala ukusasazwa kwezifo ezifana ne-malaria; ukutshengwa ngegazi noma eminye imithombo yomzimba.

translations.source: environmental changes, such as altitude, humidity, temperature foodborne and waterborne diseases inadequate medical services injuries, including from road traffic accidents or recreational activities psychological health, including stress and culture shock
translations.reference: izinguquko zemvelo, njengokuphakama, umswakama, izinga lokushisa izifo ezibangelwa ukudla kanye namanzi izinsiza zezokwelapha ezinganele ukulimala, okuhlanganisa izingozi zomgwaqo noma imisebenzi yokuzijabulisa impilo engokwengqondo, okuhlanganisa ukucindezeleka kanye nokushaqeka kwamasiko
translations.hypothesis: izinyezelo zemvelo, ezifana nokusebenza kwendawo, ubumnene, izinga lokushisa, izifo ezibangelwa ukudla kanye namanzi, izinsizakalo zokwelashwa ezinganele, amagula, okubalwa phakathi kwabo amagula avela emithombo yezimoto kanye nemisebenzi yokuzijabulisa, impilo yengqondo, okubalwa ukucindezela kanye nokuguquka kwamasiko.

translations.source: Travellers may also be exposed to a number of infectious diseases, and many of these can be prevented by vaccination. However, there are some infectious diseases, including some of the most dangerous, for which no vaccines exist. Destinations where accommodation, hygiene and sanitation, medical care and water quality are of a high standard pose relatively few serious risks to the health of travellers. Where these services are not provided, travellers should take stringent precautions to avoid illness. Travel warnings from governmental sources should be taken seriously.
translations.reference: Abahambi bangase bachayeke ezifweni eziningi ezithathelwanayo, futhi eziningi zazo zingavinjelwa ngokugoma. Kodwa ke, kunezifo ezithathelwanayo, kuhlanganise nezinye eziyingozi kakhulu, ezingenayo imithi yokugoma. Izindawo lapho indawo yokuhlala, inhlanzeko nokukhucululwa kwendle, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kanye nekhwalithi yamanzi kusezingeni eliphezulu kubangela ubungozi obuncane obumbalwa empilweni yabahambi. Lapho lezi zinsizakalo zinganikezwanga, abahambi kufanele bathathe izinyathelo eziqinile zokugwema ukugula. Izixwayiso zokuhamba ezivela emithonjeni kahulumeni kufanele zithathwe ngokungathi sína.
translations.hypothesis: Abahambi bangase bashoqe ezindleleni eziningi zokugula ezithathelwanayo, futhi eziningi zalolu hlobo zingavikelwa ngokugaywa. Kodwa, kunamanye amafufula athathelwanayo, okubalwa phakathi kwalo ezimbalwa eziyingozi kakhulu, lapho akukho okugaywa okutholakala. Izindawo lapho ukuhlala, ukuhlanzeka, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kanye nokukhawulelwa komphilo kuyinzalo ephezulu, zinezinkinga ezincane kakhulu ezempilo zabahambi. Lapho lezi zinsizakalo azitholakali, abahambi kufanele bathathe izinyathelo ezikhulu ukuvimbela ukugula. Izixwayiso zokuhamba ezivela ezinkundleni zikahulumeni kufanele zuthathwe ngobuqotho.

translations.source: Prevention: Before travel: contact a travel medicine centre or a physician, preferably 4–8 weeks before departure to receive any required vaccinations; read up on local diseases related to your destination; request information on malaria risk and prevention of mosquito bites. This may include purchasing appropriate preventive medication and packing a bednet and insect repellent; get a medical and dental check-up;
translations.reference: Ukuvimbela: Ngaphambi kohambo: Thintana nesikhungo semithi yokuhamba noma udokotela, okungcono amasonto ama-4-8 ngaphambi kokuhamba ukuze uthole noma yimiphi imigomo edingekayo; funda ngezifo zendawo ezihlobene nendawo oya kuyo; cela ulwazi ngengozi kamalaleveva kanye nokuvimbela ukulunywa omiyane. Lokhu kungase kuhlanganise ukuthenga imithi yokuvimbela efanele kanye nokupakisha inethi kanye nomuthi oxosha izinambuzane; thola ukuhlolwa kodokotela kanye namazinyo;
translations.hypothesis: Ukweluleka: Ngaphambi kokuhamba: xhumana nekhambi yezokwelapha ezihambiswayo noma nodokotela, ngempela ezinsukwini ezingu-4–8 ngaphambi kokuhamba ukuze uthole noma yimiphi imikhuba edingekayo; funda ngemithi yendawo ehlobene lapho uhamba khona; cela ulwazi mayelana nezingozi zama-malaria kanye nokuvikelwa kwizinduna. Lokhu kungafaka ukuthenga kwemithi yokweluleka efanele kanye nokupakisha ingubo yokulala kanye nomdwebo wokuvikela izinambuzane; yenza ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kanye nezamazinyo;

translations.source: obtain prescriptions for medication according to length of stay and assemble a suitable medical kit; purchase medical insurance with appropriate cover abroad During travel: eat only thoroughly cooked food and drink only bottled or packaged cold drinks. Boil drinking-water if safety is doubtful.
translations.reference: thola imiyalelo yemithi ngokuya ngobude besikhathi sokuhlala futhi uhlanganise isethi yezokwelapha efanele; ukuthenga umshwalense wezokwelapha ngekhava efanele phesheya Phakathi nohambo: dla kuphela ukudla okuphekwe kahle futhi uphuze kuphela iziphuzo ezibandayo ezisemabhodleleni noma ezipakishiwe. Bilisa amanzi okuphuza uma ukuphepha kuthandabuza.
translations.hypothesis: Thola izincazelo zemithetho yezindlela zokwelashwa ngokuya ngesikhathi esishiwo esibhedlela, bese uhlanganise isethi yezimpahla zokwelashwa efanele. Thenga ubulungu bezokwelashwa obufanele ukukuvikela lapho uhamba ngaphandle. Ngesikhathi uhamba: uthole ukudla okuphekwe kahle kuphela, futhi uthule iziphuzo ezibandakanywe noma ezifakwe ebhodlweni kuphela. Jika amanzi owashisayo uma unokungabaza mayelana nokuthi angabuleki yini.

translations.source: be aware of accidents or problems related to traffic, animals, allergies, sun and sport; carry a card showing your blood group; wear a medical alert bracelet, if you have allergies or a chronic disease Travellers should obtain a medical examination on their return if they: return with a fever from a country where malaria is or may be present
translations.reference: qaphela izingozi noma izinkinga ezihlobene nethrafikhi, izilwane, ukungezwani komzimba nezinto ezithile, ilanga nemidlalo; phatha ikhadi elibonisa iqembu lakho legazi; gqoka isongo lesixwayiso sezokwelapha, uma une-allergies noma isifo esingamahlalakhona Abahambi kufanele bathole ukuhlolwa kodokotela lapho bebuya uma: buya nomkhuhlane ovela ezweni lapho umalaleveva ukhona noma okungenzeka ukuthi ukhona
translations.hypothesis: Qaphela izinkinga noma izilondolozi ezihlobene nokugibela, izilwane, ukungcola, ilanga kanye nemidlalo; thatha ikhadi elikhombisayo uhlu ohluzo lwakho; gxweqe isibindi esikhombisayo sezempilo, uma unokungcola noma ubugeza obungavamile. Abahambi kufanele bathole ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha uma befika emuva uma: bafika benomkhuhlane esifundazweni lapho kukhona noma kungase kube khona ubutshwabi.

translations.source: suffer from a chronic disease experience illness in the weeks following their return home received treatment for malaria while travelling may have been exposed to a serious infectious disease spent more than 3 months in a developing country
translations.reference: uhlushwa isifo esingamahlalakhona bathola ukugula emasontweni alandela ukubuya kwabo ekhaya uthole ukwelashelwa umalaleveva ngesikhathi ehamba kungenzeka ukuthi wayechayeke esifweni esiyingozi esithathelwanayo wachitha izinyanga ezingaphezu kwezingu-3 ezweni elisathuthuka
translations.hypothesis: banoma yinkinga yezempilo edlule kakhulu, bathinteke ngobuhlungu emavikini alandelayo ngemuva kokubuyela ekhaya, bathole ukwelashwa kwe-malaria ngesikhathi bahamba, mhlawumbe bathinteke yinkinga yezifo ezibulalayo ezinkulu, bahlale emazweni angathuthukile isikhathi esingaphezu kwamathathu.

translations.source: Tuberculosis Overview: TB is caused by bacteria (Mycobacterium tuberculosis) and it most often affects the lungs. TB is spread through the air when people with lung TB cough, sneeze or spit. A person needs to inhale only a few germs to become infected. Every year, 10 million people fall ill with tuberculosis (TB).
translations.reference: Isifo sofuba Uhlolojikelele: iTB ibangelwa amagciwane (Mycobacterium tuberculosis) futhi ngokuvamile ihlasela amaphaphu. iTB isakazwa ngomoya lapho abantu abaneTB yamaphaphu bekhwehlela, bethimula noma bekhafula. Umuntu udinga ukuhogela amagciwane ambalwa ukuze angenwe yilesi sifo. Njalo ngonyaka, abantu abayizigidi eziyi-10 baphathwa isifo sofuba (TB).
translations.hypothesis: Ubuchuleko be-Tuberculosis: I-TB ibangelwa amagciwane (i-Mycobacterium tuberculosis) futhi ivame ukuthinta amaphuluni. I-TB idluliswa ngomoya lapho abantu abanama-TB amaphuluni begqolozwa, bakhonkoloza noma baphuza. Umuntu udinga ukuthatha amagciwane ambalwa kuphela ukuze agule. Unyaka ngunye, izigidi ezingu-10 zabantu zigula nge-tuberculosis (TB).

translations.source: Despite being a preventable and curable disease, 1.5 million people die from TB each year – making it the world’s top infectious killer. TB is the leading cause of death of people with HIV and also a major contributor to antimicrobial resistance Most of the people who fall ill with TB live in low- and middle-income countries, but TB is present all over the world. About half of all people with TB can be found in 8 countries: Bangladesh, China, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, Pakistan, Philippines and South Africa. About a quarter of the global population is estimated to have been infected with TB bacteria, but most people will not go on to develop TB disease and some will clear the infection.
translations.reference: Nakuba kuyisifo esingagwemeka futhi eselaphekayo, abantu abayizigidi ezingu-1.5 babulawa iTB unyaka ngamunye – okuyenza ibe umbulali ohamba phambili emhlabeni wonke. iTB iyimbangela ehamba phambili yokufa kwabantu abane-HIV futhi iphinde ibe neqhaza elikhulu ekwandeni kwemithi elwa namagciwane Iningi labantu abaguliswa yiTB lihlala emazweni anemali ephansi noma ephakathi, kodwa iTB ikhona emhlabeni wonke. Cishe ingxenye yabo bonke abantu abaneTB bangatholakala emazweni angu-8: Bangladesh, China, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, Pakistan, Philippines naseNingizimu Afrika. Cishe ingxenye yesine yabantu emhlabeni wonke kulinganiselwa ukuthi inamagciwane eTB, kodwa abantu abaningi ngeke baqhubeke nokuba nesifo sofuba futhi abanye bazosiqeda lesi sifo.
translations.hypothesis: Nakuba i-TB yigciwane elingavikelwe futhi lingalapheka, abantu abayi-1.5 million bayashona ngenxa yayo minyaka yonke – okuyenza ibe yigciwane eliyingozi kakhulu emhlabeni. I-TB yimbangela enkulu yobuliva kubantu abanezifo ze-HIV, futhi futhi ibanga elikhulu ekuxazululeni ukungatholakali kwezindlela zokwelapha. Abaningi abantu abagulwa yi-TB batholakala ezweni ezinezimali ezincane nezamaphakathi, kodwa i-TB itholakala kuyo yonke indawo emhlabeni. Cishe ingxenye yabo bonke abantu abagulwa yi-TB itholakala ezweni ezinkulu ezingu-8: i-Bangladesh, i-China, i-India, i-Indonesia, i-Nigeria, i-Pakistan, i-Philippines kanye neNingizimu Afrika. Kulinganiselwa ukuthi cishe ikota yabo bonke abantu bomhlaba bathinteki yigciwane le-TB, kodwa abaningi abantu abazozitholi ngalesi sifo, kanti abanye bazophuma kulokho.

translations.source: Those who are infected but not (yet) ill with the disease cannot transmit it. People infected with TB bacteria have a 5–10% lifetime risk of falling ill with TB. Those with compromised immune systems, such as people living with HIV, malnutrition or diabetes, or people who use tobacco, have a higher risk of falling ill. Symptoms: Common symptoms of TB disease include: Prolonged cough, Chest pain, Weakness or fatigue, Weight loss, Fever, Night sweats Often, these symptoms will be mild for many months, thus leading to delays in seeking care and increasing the risk of spreading the infection to others.
translations.reference: Labo abangenwe yilesi sifo kodwa abangakaguli (okwamanje) abanalesi sifo abakwazi ukusidlulisela. Abantu abangenwe amagciwane eTB basengozini engu-5-10% yokuphila konke yokugula iTB. Labo abanamasosha omzimba asengozini, njengabantu abaphila neHIV, abangondleki kahle noma abanesifo sikashukela, noma abantu abasebenzisa ugwayi, basengozini enkulu yokugula. Izimpawu: Izimpawu ezijwayelekile zesifo sofuba zihlanganisa: Ukukhwehlela isikhathi eside, ubuhlungu besifuba, ubuthakathaka noma ukukhathala, ukuncipha komzimba, Imfiva, Ukujuluka ebusuku. Ngokuvamile, lezi zimpawu zizoba mnene izinyanga eziningi, ngaleyo ndlela kuholele ekubambezelekeni kokufuna ukunakekelwa futhi kwandise ingozi yokusabalalisa ukutheleleka kwabanye.
translations.hypothesis: Abantu abagulwe yileli khazi kodwa abakhathazekile (okwamanje) angekho namandla okukusabalalisa. Abantu abagulwe ngamabhaktheriya e-TB banenqwaba engu-5–10% yokuphila yokuphila ngaleli khazi. Labo abanamasu okuziphepha ayingeni kahle, njengabantu abaphila ne-HIV, abagulwe ukuntshiselwa, noma abagulwe ukhoma, noma abantu abasebenzisa uthobhakabhaka, banenqwaba enkulu yokuphila yokuphila ngaleli khazi. Izimpawu: Izimpawu ezivamile zaleli khazi zihlanganisa: Ukukhala okude, ubuhlungu ebuswini, ukungabi namandla noma ukukhathazeka, ukulahlekelwa isisindo, ubushwa, ukuvuvukala ekuseni. Kakhulu, lezi zimpawu zizoba mbalwa ezinyangeni eziningi, ngaleyo ndlela zibangele ukuthi kuthathwe isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokufuna usizo, futhi kukhuliswe ingozi yokusabalalisa ukugula kwabanye.

translations.source: If the healthcare provider suspects a patient to have TB disease, they will send the patient for testing. In the case of suspected lung TB disease, patients will be asked to give a sputum sample for testing for TB bacteria. For non-lung TB disease, samples of affected body fluids and tissue can be tested. WHO recommends rapid molecular diagnostic tests as initial tests for people showing signs and symptoms of TB. Other diagnostic tools can include sputum smear microscopy and chest X-rays.
translations.reference: Uma umhlinzeki wezempilo esola ukuthi isiguli sinesifo sofuba, bazothumela isiguli ukuthi siyohlolwa. Esimeni sokusolwa kwesifo sofuba samaphaphu, iziguli zizocelwa ukuthi zinikeze isampula yesikhwehlela ukuze kuhlolelwe amagciwane eTB. Ngesifo sofuba esingesona esamaphaphu, amasampula oketshezi lomzimba oluthintekile kanye nezicubu angahlolwa. IWHO incoma ukuhlolwa kokuxilonga kwamangqamuzana okusheshayo njengokuhlola kokuqala kwabantu ababonisa izimpawu nezimpawu zeTB. Amanye amathuluzi okuxilonga angabandakanya iSputum smear microscopy nama-X-ray esifuba.
translations.hypothesis: Uma umuntu ongaphatha izempilo enomthelela wokuthi igcine umuntu onesifo se-TB, uyothumela umuntu kulolu hlobo lokuhlaziywa. Uma kucatshangwa ukuthi umuntu unesifo se-TB elithinta amaphaphu, uyacelwa ukuthi anikeze isampula yento ethile egcwele imilomo ukuze ihlolwe ukuthola amagciwane e-TB. Uma kucatshangwa ukuthi umuntu unesifo se-TB elingathintanga amaphaphu, amasamphula ezakhiwo nomdlavuza ongaphansi komzimba angahlaziywa. I-WHO incoma ukuhlaziywa okusheshayo kwezinto ezincane ukuze kube yindlela yokuqala yokuhlola abantu ababonakala benomahlalela nezimpawu zesifo se-TB. Ezinye izindlela zokuhlaziya zingafaka ukubheka ngamehlo imilomo egcwele kanye nokuthwebula izithombe zengemuva yomzimba.

translations.source: With TB infection, a person gets infected with TB bacteria that lie inactive in the body. This infection can develop into TB disease if their immune system weakens. People with TB infection do not show any signs or symptoms of TB. To identify TB infection, healthcare providers will screen at-risk patients to rule out active TB, and they may use a skin or blood test to check for TB infection. Treatment: TB disease is curable.
translations.reference: Ngokungenwa yiTB, umuntu ungenwa amagciwane eTB alele engasebenzi emzimbeni. Lesi sifo singakhula sibe yisifo sofuba uma amasosha omzimba eba buthaka. Abantu abaneTB ababonisi zimpawu noma izimpawu zeTB. Ukuhlonza ukutheleleka ngeTB, abahlinzeki bezempilo bazohlola iziguli ezisengozini ukuze bakhiphe iTB ephilayo, futhi bangasebenzisa isikhumba noma ukuhlolwa kwegazi ukuhlola ukuthi ayinalo yini iTB. Ukwelashwa: Isifo sofuba siyelapheka.
translations.hypothesis: Ngokugula kwe-TB, umuntu ugculwa yi-bhebhisi ye-TB eyahlala engenamsebenzi ngaphakathi emzimbeni. Lokhu kugula kungathuthuka kube yigciwane le-TB uma ukukhutshulwa komzimba kukawo lomuntu kuncipha. Abantu abagulwa ngogciwane lwe-TB ababonisi zinkinga noma izimpawu zale gciwane. Ukuthola ukuthi umuntu ugulwe ngogciwane lwe-TB, odokotela bazohlola iziguli ezithintekayo ukuze bathole ukuthi bayina gciwane elisebenzayo le-TB, futhi bangase basebenzise ukuhlolwa kwesikhumba noma begazi ukuze baqiniseke ukuthi umuntu ugulwe ngaleli gciwane. Ukwelashwa: Igciwane le-TB lingwelashwa.

translations.source: It is treated by standard 6 month course of 4 antibiotics. Common drugs include rifampicin and isoniazid. In some cases the TB bacteria does not respond to the standard drugs. In this case, the patient has drug-resistant TB. for drug-resistant TB is longer and more complex.
translations.reference: Yelashwa ngenkambo evamile yezinyanga eziyi-6 yama-antibiotic ama-4. Imithi ejwayelekile ihlanganisa irifampicin ne-isoniazid. Kwezinye izimo amagciwane eTB awaphenduli emithini evamile. Kulokhu, isiguli sineTB engazweli emishanguzweni. kuTB engazweli emishanguzweni yinde futhi iyinkimbinkimbi.
translations.hypothesis: Kwelashwa ngokusetshenziswa kwezokwelapha ezivamile eziqukethe amakhambi amane ezilawuliwe ezinyanga eziyisithupha. Amakhambi avamile afaka i-rifampicin kanye ne-isoniazid. Kwamanye amacala, amagciwane e-TB angaphenduli kumakhambi avamile. Kulolu hlobo, igciwane le-TB yaleli ncwadi ayiphenduli kumakhambi. Ukwelashwa kwe-TB engaphenduli kumakhambi kuyandiza kakhulu futhi kunobunzima obukhulu.

translations.source: The course of TB drugs is provided to the patient with information, supervision and support by a health worker or trained volunteer. Without such support, treatment adherence can be difficult. If the treatment is not properly completed, the disease can become drug-resistant and can spread. In the case of TB infection (where the patient is infected with TB bacteria but not ill), TB preventive treatment can be given to stop the onset of disease. This treatment uses the same drugs for a shorter time.
translations.reference: Imithi yeTB inikezwa isiguli ngolwazi, ukugadwa nokusekelwa umsebenzi wezempilo noma ivolontiya eliqeqeshiwe. Ngaphandle kokusekelwa okunjalo, ukubambelela ekwelashweni kungaba nzima. Uma ukwelashwa kungaqedwa kahle, lesi sifo singamelana nemithi futhi singasakazeka. Esimeni sokutheleleka ngeTB (lapho isiguli sitheleleke ngamagciwane eTB kodwa singaguli), ukwelashwa kokuvimbela iTB kungenziwa ukuze kunqandwe ukuqala kwesifo. Lokhu kwelashwa kusebenzisa izidakamizwa ezifanayo isikhathi esifushane.
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa kwe-TB kunikezwa kwigama elithile, kanti umuntu oyisibhedlela noma umvolontiya oqeqeshiwe unikeza ulwazi, ukugadeka nokusekela. Ngaphandle kwalesi sekelwe, kungaba nzima ukuthi umuntu landele ukwelashwa. Uma ukwelashwa kungaqedwa kahle, ubugeza bungase baqale ukungasetshenziswa ngamakhambi futhi bungasabalala. Uma umuntu ugugile i-TB (kodwa engakhululi), ukwelashwa okuvimbela i-TB kunganikezwa ukuze kuvinjwe ukuba yindlela yalesi sifo. Lokhu kwelashwa kusebenzisa amakhambi afanayo, kodwa isikhathi esifushane.

translations.source: Recent treatment options have shortened the duration to treatment to only 1 or 3 months, as compared to 6 months in the past.
translations.reference: Izinketho zokwelashwa zakamuva zifinyeze ubude besikhathi sokwelashwa saba yizinyanga ezi-1 noma ezi-3 kuphela, uma kuqhathaniswa nezinyanga ezingu-6 ezedlule.
translations.hypothesis: Izindlela zokwelashwa ezisanda kwatholakala zenzelile ukuthi isikhathi sokwelashwa sibe iminyaka eyodwa noma eyisithathu kuphela, kanti ngaphambilini kwakuyiminyaka eyisithupha.

translations.source: Ultraviolet radiation Overview: Ultraviolet (UV) radiation covers the wavelength range of 100–400 nm, which is a higher frequency and lower wavelength than visible light. UV radiation comes naturally from the sun, but it can also be created by artificial sources used in industry, commerce and recreation. The UV region covers the wavelength range 100-400 nm and is divided into three bands: UVA (315-400 nm)UVB (280-315 nm)UVC (100-280 nm). As sunlight passes through the atmosphere, all UVC and approximately 90% of UVB radiation is absorbed by ozone, water vapour, oxygen and carbon dioxide.
translations.reference: Imisebe yeUltraviolet Uhlolojikelele: Imisebe ye-Ultraviolet (UV) ivala ububanzi be-wavelength obungu-100–400 nm, okuyifrikhwensi ephezulu kanye nobude obuphansi begagasi kunokukhanya okubonakalayo. Imisebe ye-UV ivela ngokwemvelo ivela elangeni, kodwa ingabuye idalwe ngemithombo yokwenziwa esetshenziswa embonini, ezentengiselwano nezokuzijabulisa. Isifunda se-UV simboza ububanzi be-wavelength 100-400 nm futhi sihlukaniswe ngamabhande amathathu: UVA (315-400 nm) UVB (280-315 nm) UVC (100-280 nm). Njengoba ukukhanya kwelanga kudlula emkhathini, yonke i-UVC kanye nama-90% emisebe ye-UVB amuncwa i-ozone, umhwamuko wamanzi, umoyampilo kanye nesikhutha.
translations.hypothesis: Imisebe yokuqala: Imisebe yokuqala (UV) ihlanganisa ububanzi be-wavelength (umugqa ophephile) obungu-100–400 nm, okuyi-frequency ephezulu kanye ne-wavelength ephansi kunokukhanya okubonakalayo. Imisebe yokuqala ivela ngokuph Naturally elanga, kodwa ingasetshenziswa futhi ngemithombo eyenziwe ngabantu esetshenziswa emikhakheni yezimboni, ezobuciko kanye nokuzilibazisa. Igxathu le-UV ligcwalisa ububanzi be-wavelength obungu-100-400 nm futhi lihlukaniswe ngamabandlela amathathu: UVA (315-400 nm), UVB (280-315 nm), kanye ne-UVC (100-280 nm). Njengoba ukukhanya kwelanga kudlula kwasemoyeni, yonke i-UVC kanye cishe ngo-90% ye-UVB iyatholakala (iyathwebelwa) yi-ozone, amanzi, oksijeni kanye ne-carbon dioxide.

translations.source: UVA radiation is less affected by the atmosphere. Therefore, the UV radiation reaching the Earth’s surface is largely composed of UVA with a small UVB component. The amount of UV radiation from the sun that hits the Earth’s surface depends on several factors, including the sun’s height in the sky, latitude, cloud cover, altitude, the thickness of the ozone layer and ground reflection. Reductions in the ozone layer due to human-created pollution increase the amount of UVA and UVB that reaches the surface. This can impact human health, animals, marine organisms and plant life.
translations.reference: Imisebe ye-UVA ayithinteki kangako emkhathini. Ngakho ke, imisebe ye-UV efinyelela ebusweni bomhlaba ikakhulukazi yakhiwe i-UVA enengxenye encane ye-UVB. Inani lemisebe ye-UV evela elangeni elishaya ebusweni boMhlaba lincike ezintweni ezimbalwa, okuhlanganisa ubude belanga esibhakabhakeni, i-latitude, ukumboza kwamafu, ukuphakama, ukujiya kongqimba lwe-ozone kanye nokubonakala komhlabathi. Ukwehliswa kongqimba lwe-ozone ngenxa yokungcola okudalwe umuntu kwandisa inani le-UVA ne-UVB elifika phezulu. Lokhu kungaba nomthelela empilweni yomuntu, izilwane, izinto eziphilayo zasolwandle kanye nempilo yezitshalo.
translations.hypothesis: Imisebe yama-UVA ayathintwa kakhulu yi-athomosphere. Ngakho-ke, imisebe ye-UV efika emphendwini yephulathwe ikakhulukazi i-UVA, enoshintshi omncane we-UVB. Ububanzi bemisebe ye-UV evela elanga elifike emphendwini yephulathwe kuxhomekile ezinto eziningi, okubalwa phakathi kwayo ukuphakama kwelanga esibhakabhakeni, ububanzi, ukugcwala kwezimo zolwandle, ukuphakama, ububanzi weshosha ye-ozone kanye nokukhishwa kwemisebe ngemphendu. Ukwehla kweshosha ye-ozone ngenxa yobunzulu obudalwe ngabantu kwandisa ububanzi be-UVA ne-UVB afike emphendwini. Lokhu kungathinta impilo yabantu, izilwane, izinto ezihlala olwandle kanye nezitshalo.

translations.source: In humans, increased UV exposure can cause skin cancers, cataracts and immune system damage. Prevention: The rise in the number of cases of skin cancer over the past decades is strongly related to increased exposure to the sun during outdoor activities and to artificial sources of UV radiation such as sunlamps and tanning beds. Overexposure is also the underlying cause of harmful effects on the eyes and immune system. Adopting a few simple precautions can greatly reduce the risk of these health conditions: Limit time in the midday sun from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., particularly on days when the UV index is high When UV rays are most intense and you must be outside, try to find shade and wear protective clothing, including a brimmed hat that provides sun protection for your head, face and neck.
translations.reference: Kubantu, ukwanda kokuchayeka kwe-UV kungabangela umdlavuza wesikhumba, ulwelwesi lwamabala kanye nokulimala kwamasosha omzimba. Ukuvimbela: Ukukhuphuka kwenani leziguli zomdlavuza wesikhumba emashumini eminyaka adlule kuhlobene kakhulu nokuchayeka elangeni ngesikhathi semisebenzi yangaphandle kanye nemithombo yokwenziwa yemisebe ye-UV efana nezibani zelanga nemibhede yokushuka. Ukuchayeka ngokweqile nakho kuyimbangela eyinhloko yemiphumela eyingozi emehlweni namasosha omzimba. Ukwamukela izinyathelo ezimbalwa ezilula zokuphepha kunganciphisa kakhulu ingozi yalezi zimo zempilo: Nciphisa isikhathi elangeni lasemini kusukela ngo-10 ekuseni kuya ku-4 ntambama, ikakhulukazi ngezinsuku lapho inkomba ye-UV iphezulu. Lapho imisebe ye-UV inamandla kakhulu futhi kufanele ube ngaphandle, zama ukuthola umthunzi futhi ugqoke izingubo zokuzivikela, kuhlanganise nesigqoko esinomphetho esinikeza isivikelo elangeni ekhanda lakho, ebusweni nasentanyeni.
translations.hypothesis: Kwezigebeni zabantu, ukuchayeka okukhulu kwe-UV kungaholela ekugqwashiseni kwamasiko, ekubeni kobufakazi, kanye nokulimala kwefulemabhizinisi. Ukuvikelwa: Ukukhula kwezinombolo zamacala okugqwashise kwamasiko ezinyangeni ezidlule kuhlobene kakhulu nokuchayeka okukhulu kwelanga ngesikhathi kwezigameko zangaphandle kanye nemithombo engenature ye-UV, njengezibani zenyanga kanye nezikhungo zokufakwa kwelanga. Ukuchayeka okukhulu futhi kuyimbangela ebonakalayo yemiphumela emibi emehlweni kanye nefulemabhizinisi. Ukuthatha izinyathelo ezimbalwa ezilula kunganciphisa kakhulu ingozi yalezi zinkinga zezempilo: Qinisa isikhathi esichayeka ngaphansi kwelanga phakathi nosuku, kusukela ngo-10 ekuseni kuya ku-4 ntambama, ikakhulukazi ngosuku lapho izinga le-UV liphezulu. Uma imisebe ye-UV iyakhulu kakhulu futhi kufanele ube ngaphandle, zama ukuthola indawo enomthunzi futhi ugqoke izingubo zokuvikela, okubalwa kulo isivalo selihalati esinikeza ukuvikelwa kwelanga ikhanda, ubuso kanye nomlenze.

translations.source: Use a broad-spectrum sunscreen of at least 15 SPF – ideally higher– and reapply every 2 hours. Avoid sunlamps and tanning parlours, as they are known to damage the skin and eyes. Children’s UV exposure should be carefully limited because they are in a dynamic state of growth and therefore more susceptible to environmental threats than adults. Many vital functions such as the immune system are not fully developed at birth, and unsafe environments may interfere with their normal development. WHO Response: WHO works with Member States and partners to increase public understanding of the effects of overexposure to ultraviolet radiation.
translations.reference: Sebenzisa isikrini sokuvikela ilanga esino-spectrum obanzi okungenani esingu-15 SPF – ngokuhle kakhulu– futhi uphinde ufake isicelo njalo emahoreni ama-2. Gwema amalambu elanga kanye nezindawo zokushuka isikhumba, njengoba zaziwa ngokulimaza isikhumba namehlo. Ukuchayeka kwe-UV kwezingane kufanele kukhawulwe ngokucophelela ngoba zisesimweni sokukhula futhi ngenxa yalokho zisengozini enkulu ezingozini zemvelo kunabantu abadala. Imisebenzi eminingi ebalulekile efana namasosha omzimba ayikakhuli ngokugcwele lapho ezalwa, futhi izindawo ezingaphephile zingaphazamisa ukukhula kwazo okuvamile. Impendulo yeWHO: IWHO isebenza Namazwe Angamalungu kanye nabalingani ukukhulisa ukuqonda komphakathi ngemiphumela yokuchayeka ngokweqile emisebeni ye-ultraviolet.
translations.hypothesis: Sebenzisa ikhilimu yokuvikela ilanga etholakalayo yonke indawo, enomlingo we-SPF ongama-15 okungenani – okungcono nakakhulu – futhi uyiphinde njalo ngemuva kwamahora amabili. Gwema ukusebenzisa amalampha ezinkanyezi kanye nezindawo zokufaka ilanga, ngoba zaziwa ngokuthi zimelela ingozi kwikhambi neliso. Ukuchayeka kwabantwana kumaweli kufanele kulinganiswe ngokuqinile ngoba bayisikhathi sokukhula futhi, ngaleyo ndlela, bayingxenye ebangempela yengozi yezimo zemvelo kunabantu abadala. Imisebenzi eminingi ebalulekile, njengohlelo lwezincwadi, ayithuthukiswanga ngokugcwele ekuzalweni, futhi izimo ezingaphephile zingaphazamisa ukukhula kwawo okujwayelekile. Impendulo ye-WHO: I-WHO isebenza nezizwe ezilunga kanye nabalingani ukuze kukhuliswe ukuqonda kwabantu mayelana nemiphumela yokuchayeka okugqamile kumaweli.

translations.source: The INTERSUN Programme is a collaboration between WHO, the United Nations Environment Programme, the World Meteorological Organization, the International Agency on Cancer Research and the International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection. It promotes and evaluates research on the health effects of UV radiation, and develops an appropriate response through guidelines, recommendations and information dissemination. The goals of the programme including providing practical and sound advice on the health and environmental impacts of UV exposure, to encourage countries to take action to reduce UV-induced health risks and to provide guidance to national authorities about sun awareness programmes. To this end, the programme collaborates with experts and specialist agencies to implement key research activities, identifies and quantifies health risks from UV radiation, develops reliable predictions of health and environmental consequences of changes in UV exposure with stratospheric ozone depletion, and develops practical ways of monitoring change in UV-induced health effects over time. The programme provides tools and guidelines related to the UV index, sun protection for children, artificial sunbeds, tourism and occupational health.
translations.reference: Uhlelo lwe-INTERSUN luwukubambisana phakathi kweWHO, i-United Nations Environment Programme, iWorld Meteorological Organization, i-International Agency yeCancer Research kanye neKhomishini Yamazwe Ngamazwe Yokuvikela iNon-ionizing Radiation. Ikhuthaza futhi ihlole ucwaningo ngemiphumela yezempilo yemisebe ye-UV, futhi ithuthukise impendulo efanele ngokusebenzisa imihlahlandlela, izincomo kanye nokusabalalisa ulwazi. Imigomo yalolu hlelo kuhlanganise nokunikeza iseluleko esisebenzayo nesiphusile mayelana nemithelela yezempilo nemvelo yokuchayeka kwe-UV, ukukhuthaza amazwe ukuthi athathe isinyathelo sokunciphisa izingozi zezempilo ezibangelwa yi-UV kanye nokunikeza isiqondiso kuziphathimandla zikazwelonke mayelana nezinhlelo zokuqwashisa ngelanga. Kuze kube manje, lolu hlelo lusebenzisana nochwepheshe nama-ejensi angochwepheshe ukwenza imisebenzi ebalulekile yocwaningo, luhlonze futhi lulinganise ubungozi bezempilo emisebeni ye-UV, luthuthukise izibikezelo ezinokwethenjelwa zemiphumela yezempilo neyemvelo yezinguquko zokuchayeka kwe-UV ngokuncipha kwe-ozone yeStratospheric, futhi lithuthukise izindlela ezingokoqobo ukuqapha ushintsho emiphumeleni yezempilo ebangelwa yi-UV ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Lolu hlelo luhlinzeka ngamathuluzi neziqondiso ezihlobene nenkomba ye-UV, ukuvikela ilanga ezinganeni, ama-sunbed okwenziwa, ezokuvakasha kanye nempilo yomsebenzi.
translations.hypothesis: Uhlelo lwe-INTERSUN luyingxenye yobambiswano phakathi kwe-WHO, iHlelo LaseHlangano LaseHlabathi Lengoqondiso Yomhlaba, iNhlangano Yomkhakha Wezulu Yomhlaba, i-International Agency on Cancer Research, kanye ne-International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection. Luhlelela futhi alihloli ucwaningo mayelana nemiphumela yezempilo yomthelela we-UV, futhi udala impendulo efanele ngemikhuba, izincomo, kanye nokwabiwa kolwazi. Izinhloso zale nhlangano zifaka ukuhlinzeka ngelwazi eliqinile nelisebenzayo mayelana nemiphumela yezempilo kanye nomhlaba yokutshelwa yimitha ye-UV, ukukhuthaza izifunda ukuthi zithathe izinyathelo zokunciphisa ama-riski ezempilo adaliwe yimitha ye-UV, kanye nokuhlinzeka ngomcebheko kubaphathi bazwelonke mayelana nezinhlelo zokwazisa ngolwazi mayelana nemitha ye-UV. Ngalokhu, le nhlangano ibambisana nochwepheshe kanye nezinhlangano ezikhethekile ukuze yenze imisebenzi ebalulekile yocwaningo, ukuthola nokulinganisa ama-riski ezempilo adaliwe yimitha ye-UV, ukuthuthukisa izibikezelo ezitsholwe kahle mayelana nemiphumela yezempilo kanye nomhlaba ekubuyekezweni kwemitha ye-UV kanye nokwehla kwe-ozone esendaweni ephezulu, kanye nokuthuthukisa izindlela ezisebenzayo zokubheka ukuguquka kwemiphumela yezempilo edaliwe yimitha ye-UV kakhulu. Le nhlangano ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi kanye nemikhuba ehlobene ne-UV index, ukuvikelwa kwabantwana emitha ye-UV, amachibi elanga ekhiqizweni, ezokuvakasha, kanye nezempilo zabasebenzi.

translations.source: Universal health coverage Overview: Universal health coverage (UHC) means that all people have access to the full range of quality health services they need, when and where they need them, without financial hardship. It covers the full continuum of essential health services, from health promotion to prevention, treatment, rehabilitation and palliative care. To deliver on this promise, countries need to have strong, efficient and equitable health systems that are rooted in the communities they serve. Primary health care (PHC) is the most effective and cost-efficient way to get there.
translations.reference: Ukuhlinzekwa kwezempilo jikelele Uhlolojikelele: I-Universal health coverage (UHC) isho ukuthi bonke abantu banokufinyelela uhla oluphelele lwezinsizakalo zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu abazidingayo, nini futhi kuphi, ngaphandle kobunzima bezezimali. Ihlanganisa ukuqhubeka okuphelele kwezinsizakalo zezempilo ezibalulekile, kusukela ekukhuthazeni impilo kuya ekuvimbeleni, ukwelashwa, ukuhlunyeleliswa kanye nokunakekelwa kwe-palliative. Ukufeza lesi sithembiso, amazwe adinga ukuba nezinhlelo zezempilo eziqinile, ezisebenza kahle nezilinganayo ezigxile emiphakathini ayisebenzelayo. Ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuyisisekelo (PHC) kuyindlela ephumelela kakhulu neyonga kakhulu yokufika lapho.
translations.hypothesis: Ukufinyelela konke kwempilo: Ukufinyelela konke kwempilo (UHC) kusho ukuthi wonke umuntu ube nokufinyelela kuzo zonke izinhlobo zezinsizakalo zempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ezidinga, uma nini futhi kuphi lapho zidingeka khona, ngaphandle kokuthi kube nobunzulu bezimali. Kuhlanganisa yonke inqubo yezinsizakalo ezibalulekile zempilo, kusukela ekukhuthazeni kwempilo kuya ekuphepheni, ekwelapheni, ekubuyiseni kanye nokunakekelwa okuthuthukisayo. Ukufinyelela kulelo mnotho, amazwe kudingeka abe nezinhlelo zempilo ezibanzi, ezisebenzayo futhi ezilinganiselwe ezisuselwe emiphakathini abasizayo. Ukunakekelwa kwempilo eyisisekelo (PHC) yindlela efanele kakhulu futhi engenandaba kakhulu yokufinyelela kulelo mnotho.

translations.source: Every country has a different path to achieving UHC and to decide what to cover based on the needs of their populations and the resources at hand. Investing in PHC ensures that all those needs are identified, prioritized and addressed in an integrated way; that there is a robust and equipped health and care workforce; and that all sectors of society contribute to confronting the environmental and socio-economic factors that affect health and well-being, including preparing for, responding to and recovering from emergencies. WHO response: As a foundation for UHC, WHO recommends reorienting health systems using a primary health care (PHC) approach. Achieving UHC is a WHO strategic priority, with the goal of 1 billion more people benefitting from universal health coverage by 2025. In countries with fragile health systems, we focus on technical assistance to build national institutions and service delivery to fill critical gaps in emergencies.
translations.reference: Izwe ngalinye linendlela ehlukile yokuzuza i-UHC nokunquma ukuthi yini okufanele ihlanganiselwe ngokusekelwe ezidingweni zabantu bakhona kanye nezinsiza ezikhona. Ukutshala imali ku-PHC kuqinisekisa ukuthi zonke lezo zidingo ziyahlonzwa, zibekwe eqhulwini futhi zisingathwe ngendlela edidiyelwe; ukuthi kukhona abasebenzi bezempilo abaqinile nabahlomile; kanye nokuthi yonke imikhakha yomphakathi ibambe iqhaza ekubhekaneni nezici zemvelo nezenhlalo-mnotho ezithinta impilo nokuphila kahle, okuhlanganisa ukulungiselela, ukuphendula kanye nokululama ezimeni eziphuthumayo. Impendulo yeWHO: Njengesisekelo se-UHC, iWHO incoma ukuhlela kabusha izinhlelo zezempilo kusetshenziswa indlela yokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuyisisekelo okyiprimary health care (PHC). Ukuzuza i-UHC yinto eseqhulwini yeWHO, okuhloswe ngayo ukuthi abantu abayizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-1 bahlomule ekutholeni usizo lwezempilo emhlabeni wonke ngo-2025. Emazweni anezinhlelo zezempilo ezintekenteke, sigxila osizweni lwezobuchwepheshe ukuze kwakhiwe izikhungo zikazwelonke kanye nokulethwa kwezinsiza ukuze sivale izikhala ezibucayi ezimeni eziphuthumayo.
translations.hypothesis: Wonke izwe linendlela ehlukene yokufinyelela ekubandakanyeni kwamazimpilo kubantu bonke (UHC), futhi kunquma ukuthi yini okufanele ifakwe ngokusekelwe ezidingweni zabantu kanye nezinsiza ezitholakalayo. Ukutshala imali kwezempilo ezibalulekile (PHC) kuqinisekisa ukuthi zonke lezo zidingo zikhonjwe, zinqunywe ububanzi, futhi zixazululwe ngendlela ehambisanayo; ukuthi kunabasebenzi bezempilo abanobungcweti futhi banomshini; kanye nokuthi zonke izigaba zomphakathi ziba negalelo ekulwilweni kwezinto ezibalulekile zemvelo nezezomnotho ezithinta impilo nokukhululeka, okubalwa ukulungiselela, ukuphendula, kanye nokululama ngemva kwezimo eziyingozi. Impendulo ye-WHO: Njengengxenye ebalulekile ye-UHC, i-WHO incoma ukuguqula izinhlelo zezempilo ngokusebenzisa indlela yezempilo ezibalulekile (PHC). Ukufinyelela kwe-UHC kuyinto ebalulekile ye-WHO, ngenhloso yokuthi abantu abayizigidi eziyikhulu abaningi bathole inzuzo yokubandakanywa kwamazimpilo kubantu bonke ngonyaka ka-2025. Ezweni elinezinhlelo zezempilo ezingunaphakade, sigxile ekusizeni ngobuchwepheshe ukwakha izikhungo zikazwelonke kanye nokuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza ukuze zigcwalise izikhala ezibalulekile ezimweni eziyingozi.

translations.source: In more robust health system settings, we drive public health impact towards health coverage for all through policy dialogue for the systems of the future and strategic support to improve performance.
