This work is supported by normative guidance and agreements; data, research and innovation; and leadership in the realms of diplomacy, advocacy, gender equality, health equity and human rights, multisectoral action, and finance. 2030 Agenda for SDGs WHO’s work is aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) target 3.8, which focuses on achieving universal health coverage, including financial risk protection, access to quality essential health-care services and access to safe, effective, quality and affordable essential medicines and vaccines for all. Globally, progress towards universal health coverage is a challenge. Progress in service coverage has stalled while the proportion of the population facing catastrophic out-of-pocket health spending increases continuously.
translations.reference: Ezilungiselelweni eziqinile zesistimu yezempilo, siqhuba umthelela wezempilo womphakathi ekuhlinzekeni impilo yabo bonke ngezingxoxo zenqubomgomo yezinhlelo zesikhathi esizayo kanye nokwesekwa kwamasu okwenza ngcono ukusebenza. Lo msebenzi usekelwa isiqondiso esivamile nezivumelwano; idatha, ucwaningo kanye nokusungula izinto ezintsha; kanye nobuholi emikhakheni yezokuxhumana, ukumela, ukulingana ngokobulili, ukulingana kwezempilo kanye namalungelo abantu, isenzo semikhakha eminingi, kanye nezezimali. I-Ajenda ka-2030 yama-SDGs Umsebenzi weWHO uhambisana nezinjongo zeSustainable Development Goals (SDG) ezihlosiwe 3.8, ezigxile ekuzuzeni usizo lwezempilo emhlabeni wonke, okuhlanganisa nokuvikelwa kwengozi yezezimali, ukufinyelela ezinsizeni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezibalulekile kanye nokufinyelela ekuphepheni, ngempumelelo, kwekhwalithi nokuthengekayo. imithi ebalulekile kanye nemigomo yawo wonke umuntu. Emhlabeni jikelele, inqubekelaphambili emayelana nokuhlinzekwa kwezempilo kuyinselele. Inqubekelaphambili ekuhlinzekeni ngezinsizakalo imile ngenkathi ingxenye yabantu ababhekene nenhlekelele yokusetshenziswa kwemali kwezempilo ephuma ephaketheni ikhula ngokuqhubekayo.
translations.hypothesis: Kunezinhlelo zezempilo ezibanzi kakhulu, siphothula umthelela wezempilo zomphakathi ukuze wonke umuntu uthole ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, ngokusholezwa ngamaphakethe ezinqubomgomo zenhlelo yangobuso, kanye nokusekela okubalulekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza kahle. Lo msebenzi uxhaswe ngomthetho, imibandela, kanye nemininingwane; idatha, ucwaningo kanye nokuguqulelwa; kanye nobuchule ezindaweni zombusomthetho, ukukhuthaza, ukulingana ngamafu, ukulingana kwezempilo kanye namalungelo abantu, ukusebenzisana kwezikhungo eziningi, kanye nezimali. Uhlelo lwe-2030 lwe-SDGs: Umsebenzi we-WHO uhambisana ne-SDG 3.8, okugxile ekufinyeleleni ekunakekelweni kwezempilo komunye umuntu, okubandakanya ukuvikelwa kwezimali, ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo ezibalulekile zokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu, kanye nokufinyelela kwezigebhezi nezindlela zokwelapha ezibalulekile, eziphephile, ezisezingeni eliphezulu futhi ezithengekayo kuzo zonke. Emhlabeni jikelele, ukuqhubeka nokufezeka kokunakekelwa kwezempilo komunye umuntu kuyinselele. Ukuqhubeka kwezinsizakalo kuye kuye ngokuthi kuthambe, kuyilapho iphesenti labantu ababhekene nokuchitha imali enkulu kwezempilo kukhula ngokuqhubekayo.

translations.source: WHO monitors progress and publishes global reports to reveal the latest evidence every two years. See the reports here and visit the UHC fact sheet for more information.
translations.reference: IWHO iqapha inqubekelaphambili futhi ishicilele imibiko yomhlaba wonke ukuze iveze ubufakazi bakamuva njalo eminyakeni emibili. Bheka imibiko lapha futhi uvakashele ikhasi lamaqiniso e-UHC ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO iyabheka ukuthi uhambo lufinyelela kuphi futhi ichaze imibiko emhlabeni jikelele ukuze ibonise ukwaziswa okusha njalo eminyakeni emibili. Bheka le mibiko lapha futhi vakashela iphepha loxoxo mayelana ne-UHC ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe.

translations.source: Urban health Overview: Urbanization is one of the leading global trends of the 21st century that has a significant impact on health. Over 55% of the world’s population live in urban areas – a proportion that is expected to increase to 68% by 2050. As most future urban growth will take place in developing countries, the world today has a unique opportunity to guide urbanization and other major urban development trends in a way that protects and promotes health. This is important, not least because the health and well-being of citizens is perhaps a city’s most important asset.
translations.reference: Impilo yasemadolobheni Uhlolojikelele: Ukufudukela emadolobheni kungenye yezindlela ezihamba phambili emhlabeni wonke zekhulu lama-21 ezinomthelela omkhulu kwezempilo. Bangaphezu kwama-55% abantu bomhlaba abahlala ezindaweni zasemadolobheni - ingxenye okulindeleke ukuthi yenyuke ifinyelele ku-68% ngo-2050. Njengoba ukwanda kwamadolobha amaningi esikhathini esizayo kuzokwenzeka emazweni asathuthuka, umhlaba namuhla unethuba eliyingqayizivele lokuqondisa ukufudukela kwabantu emadolobheni kanye nezinye izindlela ezinkulu zokuthuthukiswa kwamadolobha ngendlela evikela futhi ikhuthaze impilo. Lokhu kubalulekile, hhayi okungenani ngoba impilo nokuphila kahle kwezakhamizi mhlawumbe kuyimpahla ebaluleke kakhulu yedolobha.
translations.hypothesis: Ubuciko bezempilo ezindaweni zasemadolobheni: Ukukhula kwamadolobha kuyinketho eyodwa ebalulekile emhlabeni jikelele kule minyaka engu-21, futhi kune mpemfo enkulu ezempilweni. Ngaphezu kuka-55% wabantu bomhlaba bathola izimpilo zabo ezindaweni zasemadolobheni – umlingo okubalwa ukuthi uzokhula ube ngu-68% ngonyaka ka-2050. Njengoba ukukhula kwamadolobha okuzayo kuzokwenzeka kakhulu ezweni elithuthukisayo, umhlaba namuhla unethuba eliyingqayizivele lokukhombisa indlela yokukhula kwamadolobha kanye nezinye izindlela ezinkulu zokuthuthukiswa kwamadolobha ngendlela ekhusela futhi ethuthukise impilo. Lokhu kubalulekile, ngakho-ke, ngoba impilo nokuziphilisa kwabantu kungenye yinto ebaluleke kakhulu edolobheni.

translations.source: However, most of the 4.2 billion people living in cities suffer inadequate housing and transport, poor sanitation and waste management, and air quality that fails WHO guidelines. Other forms of pollution, such as noise, water and soil contamination, so-called urban heat islands, and a lack of space for walking, cycling and active living further combine to make cities epicentres of a noncommunicable disease epidemic and drivers of climate change. WHO Repository on Urban Health Impact: Around 40% of urban growth is in slums that lack safe water and sanitation, and 91% of people in urban areas breathe polluted air. When it comes to healthy diets, urbanization increases the distance from farm to fork, driving demand for unhealthy, processed foods.
translations.reference: Nokho, iningi labantu abayizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-4,2 abahlala emadolobheni alinazo izindlu nezinto zokuhamba ezintula, ukukhucululwa kwendle nokungaphathwa kahle kwemfucuza, kanye nezinga lomoya elizephula iziqondiso zeWHO. Ezinye izinhlobo zokungcola, ezinjengomsindo, ukungcoliswa kwamanzi nomhlabathi, lokho okubizwa ngokuthi iziqhingi zokushisa zasemadolobheni, kanye nokuntuleka kwendawo yokuhamba, ukugibela amabhayisikili nokuphila okumatasa kuhlanganisa ukwenza amadolobha abe yisizinda sesifo esiwumqedazwe wezifo ezingathathelwana kanye nezisusa zokushintsha kwesimo sezulu. IWHO Repository on Urban Health Umthelela: Cishe u-40% wokukhula kwedolobha usemijondolo engenawo amanzi aphephile nezindlu zangasese, kanti abantu abangu-91% basemadolobheni baphefumula umoya ongcolile. Uma kukhulunywa ngezidlo ezinempilo, ukufudukela kwabantu emadolobheni kukhulisa ibanga ukusuka epulazini kuye kwelinye, kushayela isidingo sokudla okungenampilo, okugayiwe.
translations.hypothesis: Noma kunjalo, abantu abaningi kakhulu, cishe ibiliyoni elingu-4.2, abahlala ezikhungweni zedolobha, badinga ukufakelwa kwegceke elihle, ezindleleni zokuhamba, ukuhlanzwa okuhle kanye nokulawulwa kwempahla engenayo, kanye nomoya ongcolile ongahambisani nemigomo ye-WHO. Ezinye izinhlobo zokungcolileka, njengomsindo, ukungcolileka kwamanzi nomhlaba, "izindawo ezishisayo zedolobha," kanye nokuntuleka kwendawo yokuhamba ngezinyawo, ukugibela kanye nokuhlala ngendlela ezilungele impilo, zenza izikhungo zedolobha zibe yindawo ekhulu kakhulu yobhubhane lwezifo ezingafakwa kwiqophelo futhi zenza ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu kube ngokushesha. Igadi le-WHO mayelana nomthelela wempilo yezikhungo zedolobha: cishe amaphesenti angu-40 kokuphakama kwedolobha kutholakala ezindaweni ezincane eziningi ezinganalo amanzi aphephile nokuhlanzwa, futhi amaphesenti angu-91 abantu abahlala ezindaweni zedolobha buphefumula umoya ongcolile. Uma kukhulunywa ngokudla okunempilo, ukukhula kwedolobha kwenza ukuba kube kude kakhulu phakathi kwefama kanye nomthengi, okwenza ukufuna ukudla okunempilo okuncibilisiwe kube mnene.

translations.source: Urban dwellers are also highly vulnerable to the effects of climate change because of their dependence on fossil fuels for transport, cooking and heating. Cities account for over two thirds of the world’s energy and emit 60% of greenhouse gases, and those inland may experience temperatures 3–5º C higher than surrounding rural areas because of their large expanses of concrete and limited open green spaces. All of this puts urban dwellers’ health at risk. Most the top 10 causes of death are closely related to rapid and unplanned urbanization, and poor urban design and planning. Cities face the triple health burden of infectious diseases like HIV/AIDS, tuberculosis, pneumonia, dengue and diarrhoea;
translations.reference: Abantu abahlala emadolobheni basengozini enkulu yokushintsha kwesimo sezulu ngenxa yokuthembela kwabo ezintweni ezimbiwa phansi zokuthutha, ukupheka kanye nokushisisa. Amadolobhakazi athatha ngaphezu kwezingxenye ezimbili kwezintathu zamandla omhlaba futhi akhipha ama-60% amagesi abamba ukushisa, futhi lawo amaphakathi nezwe angase abe nezinga lokushisa elingu-3–5º C ngaphezu kwezindawo zasemaphandleni ezizungezile ngenxa yobukhulu bazo obukhonkolo kanye nezindawo eziluhlaza ezivulekile ezilinganiselwe. Konke lokhu kubeka impilo yabantu abahlala emadolobheni engcupheni. Iningi lezimbangela eziyishumi eziphezulu zokufa zihlobene eduze nokukhula ngokushesha nokungahleliwe kwedolobha, kanye nokuklanywa nokungahlelwa kahle kwamadolobha. Amadolobha abhekene nomthwalo wezempilo ophindwe kathathu wezifo ezithathelwanayo njengeHIV/AIDS, isifo sofuba, inyumoniya, udenga kanye nesifo sohudo;
translations.hypothesis: Abantu abahlala ezikhathini badinga kakhulu ukuba bathinteke yimiphumela yezinguquko zezulu ngenxa yokuthemba kwabo kugesi elithathwe ezintweni ezisindayo, ezisetshenziselwa ukuhamba, ukupheka nokufudula. Amadolobha anganoma yini engaphezu kwamandla amabili atholakalayo emhlabeni, futhi ayakha ama-60% yegesi eliphathekayo. Futhi, amadolobha angaphakathi kungenzeka ahambisane nezimo zokushisa ezingama-3–5º C ezinde kunendawo yasezulwini ezungezile ngenxa yendawo enkulu yendlu yangethusi kanye nendawo encane yomhlaba evulekile. Konke lokhu kubeka impilo yabalimi ezikhathini engozini. Okuningi kwezinto eziyimbangela ezinkulu zokufa zihlobene ngokuqondile nokukhula okusheshayo futhi okungahleliwe kwamadolobha, kanye nokulungiselelwa nokuhlelwa kwamadolobha okungahleliwe. Amadolobha ahamba phambili ezinkingeni ezintathu zezempilo ezifana nezifo ezithathelwayo ezifana ne-HIV/AIDS, i-tuberculosis, i-pneumonia, i-dengue kanye ne-diarrhoea.

translations.source: noncommunicable diseases like heart disease, stroke, asthma, cancer, diabetes and depression; and violence and injuries, including road traffic injuries. WHO response: Despite their challenges, cities can create opportunities for better health, cleaner environments and climate action. Strong urban policies must prioritize health, as it is essential for fostering good urban livelihoods, building a productive workforce, creating resilient and vibrant communities, enabling mobility, promoting social interaction and protecting vulnerable populations. WHO’s approach to urban health focuses on better air quality, water and sanitation, and other environmental determinants; healthy urban planning; healthier and smoke-free environments; safe and healthy mobility; preventing violence and injuries; promoting healthy food systems and diets; environmental management of vector-borne diseases; and urban preparedness for emergencies.
translations.reference: izifo ezingathathelaniyo ezifana nesifo senhliziyo, unhlangothi, isifuba somoya, umdlavuza, isifo sikashukela kanye nokudangala; futhi udlame nokulimala, okuhlanganisa nokulimala emgwaqeni. Impendulo yeWHO: Naphezu kwezinselele zawo, amadolobha angakha amathuba empilo engcono, indawo ehlanzekile kanye nokusebenza kwesimo sezulu. Izinqubomgomo eziqinile zasemadolobheni kufanele zibeke ezempilo kuqala, njengoba ibalulekile ekukhuthazeni impilo enhle yasemadolobheni, ukwakha abasebenzi abakhiqizayo, ukudala imiphakathi eqinile nenempilo, evumela ukuhamba, ukukhuthaza ukuxhumana nomphakathi kanye nokuvikela abantu abasengozini. Indlela yeWHO yezempilo yasemadolobheni igxile eqophelweni eliphezulu lomoya, amanzi kanye nokukhucululwa kwendle, kanye nezinye izici zemvelo; ukuhlela kahle kwedolobha; izindawo ezinempilo nezingabhemi; ukuhamba okuphephile nokunempilo; ukuvimbela udlame nokulimala; ukukhuthaza izinhlelo zokudla okunempilo nokudla okunempilo; ukuphathwa kwemvelo kwezifo ezithwalwa yizilwane; kanye nokulungela amadolobha ezimeni eziphuthumayo.
translations.hypothesis: Izifo ezingafakwa ngokuqelene, ezifana nezifo zenhliziyo, ukushaya kwegazi, ukukhubazeka komoya, ukugula kwegeja, ukhova, kanye nokudabuka; kanye nobugebengu nezilonda, okubalwa kuzo nezilonda ezibangelwa ukushaywa emgwaqeni. Impendulo ye-WHO: Nakuba kunezinkinga, amadolobha angakha amathuba okuthuthuka kwezempilo, ezindawo ezihlanzekile, kanye nokulwa ushintsho lwemvelo. Izinqubomgomo zamadolobha ezibanzi kufanele zibe nezinto ezibalulekile ezimpilweni, njengoba kubalulekile ekukhuthazeni impilo enhle yabadlala, ekwakheni umsebenzi omuhle, ekwakheni imiphakathi eqinile futhi egcwele impilo, ekwenzeleni ukuthi abantu bakwazi ukuhamba, ekukhuthazeni ukuxhumana phakathi kwabantu, kanye ekugcineni iziphathi ezithintekayo. Indlela ye-WHO mayelana nezempilo zamadolobha igxile ekuthuthukisweni kwekhwalithi yomoya, amanzi, kanye nokuhlanzwa, kanye nezinye izinto ezithinta imvelo; ekuhleleni amadolobha ngendlela enhle; ezindaweni ezintle futhi ezingenanto eshayayo; ekuhambeni okunephephile futhi okukhuthazayo; ekugweneni kwebugebengu nezilonda; ekukhuthazeni izinhlelo zokudla ezintle kanye nokudla okunempilo; ekulawulweni kwemvelo kwezifo ezisetshenziswa izilwanyana; kanye ekulungiseleleni amadolobha ngokuphuthuma kwezimo eziyingozi.

translations.source: Working across sectors and ensuring the coherence of policies across different areas is key to creating supportive and enabling environments for health, which ensures that health and equity considerations are integrated throughout the planning process, investments and policy decisions at the local level. To help Member States address the above priorities, WHO works to strengthen the evidence base to help policy-makers make informed decisions when addressing health risks. It provides tools and guidance on what works, and supports monitoring of key health-related indicators. WHO leads and engages in fostering city-to-city exchanges and helps develop institutional and policy frameworks for good urban governance for health and well-being in cities.
translations.reference: Ukusebenza kuyo yonke imikhakha kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuhambisana kwezinqubomgomo kuzo zonke izindawo ezihlukene kubalulekile ekudaleni izindawo ezisekelayo nezivumelayo zezempilo, okuqinisekisa ukuthi ukucatshangelwa kwezempilo nokulingana kuyahlanganiswa phakathi nenqubo yokuhlela, ukutshalwa kwezimali kanye nezinqumo zenqubomgomo ezingeni lendawo. Ukusiza Amazwe Angamalungu ukubhekana nalezi zinto ezibalulekile ezingenhla, iWHO isebenza ukuqinisa isisekelo sobufakazi ukuze isize abenzi bezinqubomgomo benze izinqumo ezinolwazi lapho bebhekana nezingozi zezempilo. Ihlinzeka ngamathuluzi nesiqondiso kulokho okusebenzayo, futhi isekela ukubhekwa kwezinkomba ezibalulekile ezihlobene nempilo. IWHO ihola futhi izibandakanye ekukhuthazeni ukuhwebelana kwedolobha nedolobha futhi isiza ukuthuthukisa izinhlaka zesikhungo nenqubomgomo yokuphatha okuhle kwedolobha kwezempilo nokuphila kahle emadolobheni.
translations.hypothesis: Ukusebenzisana ezikhungweni ezahlukene futhi kuqinisekiswe ukuhambisana kwemithetho ezindaweni ezihlukene kubalulekile ekwakhiweni kwezindawo ezisekela kanye nokwenza kube lula ezempilo, okwenza ukuthi izinto ezihlobene nezempilo kanye nokulingana zihlanganiswe kuyo yonke inqubo yokuhlela, ukutshalwa kwezimali kanye nezinqumo zomthetho ezingeni lendawo. Ukuze usize izizwe ezilunga ukulungisa lezi zinto ezibalulekile, i-WHO isebenza ekuthuthukiseni ulwazi olusemthethweni ukuze isize abagqugquzeli bomthetho ukuthi bathe imininingwane efanele lapho babelana ngengozi yezempilo. Inikeza amathuluzi kanye nezinkomba mayelana nokuthi yini engcono, futhi isekela ukulaleliswa kwezinkomba ezibalulekile ezihlobene nezempilo. I-WHO iholwa futhi ibandakanyeka ekukhuthazeni ukutshintshaniswa phakathi kwamadolobha, futhi isiza ekuthuthukisweni kwezinhlaka zomgijima kanye nemithetho yokuphatha kahle edolobheni ukuze kukhuthazwe impilo nokukhululeka ezidolobheni.

translations.source: Violence against children Overview: Violence against children includes all forms of violence against people under 18 years old. For infants and younger children, violence mainly involves child maltreatment (i.e. physical, sexual and emotional abuse and neglect) at the hands of parents and other authority figures. Boys and girls are at equal risk of physical and emotional abuse and neglect, and girls are at greater risk of sexual abuse. As children reach adolescence, peer violence and intimate partner violence, in addition to child maltreatment, become highly prevalent.
translations.reference: Udlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni Uhlolojikelele: Udlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni luhlanganisa zonke izinhlobo zodlame olubhekiswe kubantu abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 ubudala. Ezinsaneni nasezinganeni ezincane, udlame luhilela ikakhulukazi ukuphathwa kabi kwezingane (okungukuthi, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokomzimba, ngokocansi nangokomzwelo kanye nokunganakwa) ezandleni zabazali nabanye abaphethe. Abafana namantombazane basengozini elinganayo yokuhlukunyezwa ngokomzimba nangokomzwelo nokunganakwa, futhi amantombazane asengozini enkulu yokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi. Njengoba izingane zifinyelela eminyakeni yobusha, udlame lontanga nodlame olusondelene nozakwethu, ngaphezu kokuphathwa kabi kwezingane, kuyanda.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulwa kwezingane: Incazelo: Ukulwa kwezingane kuhlanganisa zonke izinhlobo zokulwa ezibhekiswe kubantu abangaphansi konyaka weminyaka ka-18. Kwezingane ezincane nezidala, ukulwa kakhulu kuhlanganisa ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane (okungukuthi, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokomzimba, ngokobudlova kanye ngokomzwelo kanye nokungabheki) ngabazali nezinye iziphathimandla. Amadoda namantombazane afana ekugibelenweni kokuhlukunyezwa komzimba kanye nomzwelo, kodwa amantombazane afana kakhulu ekugibelenweni kokuhlukunyezwa ngokobudlova. Njengoba izingane zifike eminyakeni yobusha, ukulwa phakathi kwabafana nabafundi kanye nokulwa phakathi kwabangane, ngaphandle kokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane, kuba kakhulu.

translations.source: Violence against children can be prevented. Preventing and responding to violence against children requires that efforts systematically address risk and protective factors at all four interrelated levels of risk (individual, relationship, community, society). May 2016 World Health Assembly resolution endorsed the first ever WHO Global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health system within a national multisectoral response to address interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls, and against children. A According to this plan, WHO in collaboration with Member States and other partners, is committed to: Monitoring the global magnitude and characteristics of violence against children and supporting country efforts to document and measure such violence. Maintaining an electronic information system that summarizes the scientific data on the burden, risk factors and consequences of violence against children, and the evidence for its preventability.
translations.reference: Udlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni lungagwemeka. Ukuvimbela nokusabela odlameni olubhekiswe ezinganeni kudinga ukuthi imizamo ibhekane nengozi kanye nezici zokuzivikela kuwo wonke amazinga amane ahlobene obungozi (umuntu ngamunye, ubudlelwano, umphakathi, umphakathi). Isinqumo soMhlangano Womhlaba Wezempilo ka-Nhlaba 2016 sagunyaza uhlelo lokuqala lweWHO Lokusebenza Lomhlaba wonke lokuqinisa indima yohlelo lwezempilo ngaphakathi kwempendulo yemikhakha ehlukahlukene kazwelonke yokubhekana nodlame phakathi kwabantu, ikakhulukazi kwabesifazane namantombazane, kanye nezingane. A Ngokwalolu hlelo, iWHO ngokubambisana Namazwe Angamalungu kanye nabanye ababambisene nabo, izibophezele: Ukuqapha ubukhulu bomhlaba wonke kanye nezici zodlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni kanye nokusekela imizamo yezwe yokubhala kanye nokukala ubudlova obunjalo. Ukugcina isistimu yolwazi lwe-elekthronikhi efingqa idatha yesayensi yomthwalo, izici engcuphe kanye nemiphumela yodlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni, kanye nobufakazi bokuvikeleka kwalo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulwa kwezingane kungagwenywa. Ukugwema nokuphendula ukulwa kwezingane kudinga ukuthi imizamo ihlale ixhasa izinto ezingozisa kanye nalezo ezivikela, kuyo yonke leli zinga ezine ezihambisanayo zengozi (umuntu ngamunye, ubuhlobo, umphakathi, umphakathi). Isinqumo se-World Health Assembly sangoMeyi 2016 sagxumela ngaphambili ohlelweni lokuqala lwe-WHO lwehlabathi lokwenza kube ngcono indima yohlelo lwezempilo ngaphakathi kokuphendula okuhlukahlukene kwezwe ukulwa nokulwa phakathi kwabantu, ikakhulukazi kwezinduna nezintombi, kanye kwezingane. Ngokwalesi hlelo, i-WHO, ngokubambisana nezizwe ezilunga kanye nabanye abalingani, izibophezele ekulandeleni: Ukubheka ukukhulu kanye nezici zokulwa kwezingane emhlabeni jikelele nokuxhasa imizamo yamazwe yokubhalisa nokulinganisa lokhu kulwa. Ukugcina uhlelo lwemibhalo yedijithali oluhlinzeka ngemininingwane eyisayensi mayelana nobudlova, izinto ezingozisa kanye nemiphumela yokulwa kwezingane, kanye nobufakazi bokuthi kungagwenywa.

translations.source: Developing and disseminating evidence-based technical guidance documents, norms and standards for preventing and responding to violence against children. Regularly publishing global status reports on country efforts to address violence against children through national policies and action plans, laws, prevention programmes and response services. Supporting countries and partners in implementing evidence-based prevention and response strategies, such as those included in INSPIRE: Seven strategies for ending violence against children. Collaborating with international agencies and organizations to reduce and eliminate violence against children globally, through initiatives such as the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children, the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children,
translations.reference: Ukuthuthukisa nokusabalalisa imibhalo yeziqondiso zezobuchwepheshe ezisekelwe ebufakazini, izinkambiso nezindinganiso zokuvimbela kanye nokusabela kubudlova obubhekiswe ezinganeni. Ukushicilela njalo imibiko yesimo somhlaba ngemizamo yezwe yokubhekana nodlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni ngezinqubomgomo zikazwelonke nezinhlelo zokwenza, imithetho, izinhlelo zokuvimbela kanye nezinsizakalo zokuphendula. Amazwe asekelayo nabalingani ekusebenziseni amasu okuvimbela nokuphendula asekelwe ebufakazini, njengalawo afakwe ku-INSPIRE: Amasu ayisikhombisa okuqeda udlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni. Ukusebenzisana nama-ejensi nezinhlangano zamazwe ngamazwe ukunciphisa nokuqeda udlame olubhekiswe ezinganeni emhlabeni wonke, ngezinhlelo ezifana ne-Global Partnership Yokuqeda Udlame Olubhekiswe Kubantwana, IGlobal Partnership Ukuqeda Udlame Olubhekiswe Kubantwana,
translations.hypothesis: Ukuthuthukisa nokusabalalisa imibhalo yezeluleko ezisekelwe ezincwadi, imithetho kanye nezindinganiso zokuqapha nokuphendula ukusetshenziswa kwabadluleli. Ukushicilela ngokuphindaphindi imibiko yezimo zomhlaba wonke mayelana nomzamo ngamanye amazwe wokulwela ukusetshenziswa kwabadluleli ngamazwi kazwelonke, izinhlelo zokusebenza, imithetho, izinhlelo zokuqapha kanye nezinsizakalo zokuphendula. Ukusekela amazwe kanye nabalingani ekusebenzisweni kwezindlela zokuqapha nokuphendula ezisekelwe ezincwadi, njengalezo ezikhunjulwe kwi-INSPIRE: Izinyathelo eziyisikhombisa zokuqeda ukusetshenziswa kwabadluleli. Ukubambisana nezinhlangano kanye nezikhungo zamazwe ngamazwe ukunciphisa nokuxazulula ukusetshenziswa kwabadluleli emhlabeni wonke, ngamaphrojekthi afana ne-Global Partnership to End Violence against Children.

translations.source: Together for Girls and the Violence Prevention Alliance. Child maltreatment Child maltreatment is the abuse and neglect that occurs to children under 18 years of age. It includes all types of physical and/or emotional ill-treatment, sexual abuse, neglect, negligence and commercial or other exploitation, which results in actual or potential harm to the child’s health, survival, development or dignity in the context of a relationship of responsibility, trust or power. Exposure to intimate partner violence is also sometimes included as a form of child maltreatment.
translations.reference: Sihlangene Samantombazane kanye neViolence Prevention Alliance. Ukuphathwa kabi kwezingane Ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane wukuhlukunyezwa nokunganakwa okwenzeka ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka eyi-18. Kuhlanganisa zonke izinhlobo zokuphathwa kabi ngokomzimba kanye/noma ngokomzwelo, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi, ukunganakwa, ubudedengu nokuxhashazwa kwezentengiselwano noma okunye, okuholela ekulimaleni kwangempela noma okungaba khona empilweni yengane, ekusindeni kwayo, ekukhuleni kwayo noma ekuhloniphekeni kwayo esimweni sobudlelwano umthwalo wemfanelo, ukwethenjwa noma amandla. Ukuchayeka kudlame lozakwethu kwesinye isikhathi kufakwa njengendlela yokuphathwa kabi kwezingane.
translations.hypothesis: I-Together for Girls kanye ne-Violence Prevention Alliance. Ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane. Ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kukuphindaphindwa nokungagcwaliseki kwemigomo okwenzeka kubantwana abangaphansi kweminyaka eyishumi nesishiyagalolunye. Kuhlanganisa zonke izinhlobo zokuhlazwa ngokomzimba kanye/noma ngokomzwelo, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokobudlova, ukungagcwaliseki kwemigomo, ukungabi nalwazi kanye nokusetshenziswa kwezentengiselwano noma kwezinye izindlela, okubangela umthelela omanga noma ongaba khona empilweni, ekusindeni, ekuthuthukeni noma ekuhlonipheni lentombazane, kakhulu kulokho okuhlobene nobudlelwane obubalulekile, ukwethemba noma amandla. Ukuchayeka ekuhlukunyezweni phakathi kwabashadi noma labo abathandana nabo ngamanye amathuba kufakwa njengohlobo lokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane.

translations.source: Child maltreatment has enormous immediate and long-term repercussions. Beyond death, physical injury and disability, violence can lead to stress that impairs brain development and damages the nervous and immune systems. This in turn is associated with delayed cognitive development, poor school performance and dropout, mental health problems, suicide attempts, increased health-risk behaviours, revictimization and the perpetration of violence. The good news is that child maltreatment can be prevented through interventions that support parents and caregivers, promote non-violent norms and values, provide education and life skills training, strengthen families’ income and economic security, offer high quality response and support services, create and sustain safe environments for children, and implement and enforce laws against child maltreatment. WHO, in collaboration with a number of partners:
translations.reference: Ukuphathwa kabi kwezingane kunemiphumela emikhulu esheshayo neyesikhathi eside. Ngaphandle kokufa, ukulimala ngokomzimba nokukhubazeka, udlame lungaholela ekucindezelekeni okuphazamisa ukukhula kobuchopho futhi kulimaze amasosha omzimba kanye nemizwa. Lokhu kubuye kuhlotshaniswe nokubambezeleka kokuthuthukiswa kwengqondo, ukungaphumeleli kahle kwesikole kanye nokuyeka isikole, izinkinga zempilo yengqondo, ukuzama ukuzibulala, ukwanda kokuziphatha okuyingozi empilweni, ukuvuselelwa kanye nokubhebhezelwa kodlame. Izindaba ezinhle ukuthi ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kungavinjelwa ngokungenelela okusekela abazali nabanakekeli, ukukhuthaza imikhuba nezindinganiso ezingenalo ubudlova, ukuhlinzeka ngemfundo nokuqeqeshwa kwamakhono okuphila, ukuqinisa iholo lemindeni kanye nokuvikeleka kwezomnotho, ukunikeza impendulo yezinga eliphezulu kanye nezinsizakalo zokusekela, ukudala. kanye nokusimamisa izindawo eziphephile zezingane, nokusebenzisa nokuphoqelela imithetho emelene nokuphathwa kabi kwezingane. IWHO, ngokubambisana nenani lozakwethu:
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlukumeza izingane kubanga iziphetho ezinkulu futhi ezihlala isikhathi eside. Ngaphandle kokufa, ukulimala omzimbeni kanye nokungabi nakho ukwenza okuthile, ubugebengu bungadala ukucindezela okuyikhokhisa ukuthuthukiswa kwengqondo futhi ludingise izinhlelo zengqondo kanye nezempilo. Lokhu, ngakho-ke, kuhlobene nokuthintwa kokuphathwa kwengqondo, ukwehluleka ekufundeni kanye nokushiya esikoleni, izinkinga zempilo yengqondo, ukuzama ukuzibulala, ukwandiswa kwezindlela zempilo ezingcono, ukulondolozwa kabusha kobufakazi, kanye nokwenzeka kobugebengu. Okuhle ukuthi ukuhlukumeza izingane kungagwenywa ngokusebenzisa izindlela ezisebenzayo ezisekelayo abazali kanye nabagadi, ezikhuthaze imikhuba nezindinganiso ezingabugebengu, ahlinzeke ngemfundo kanye nokuqeqeshwa kwezinani zempilo, anthathe imali yomndeni kanye nokuphepha kwezomnotho, ahlinzeke ngezinsizakalo ezisezingeni eliphezulu zokusabela nokusekela, adale futhi agcine izindawo eziphephile izingane, futhi asebenze futhi asebenzise imithetho ekhombisa ukuhlukumeza izingane. I-WHO, ngokubambisana nabanxhumanisi abaningi:

translations.source: provides technical and normative guidance for evidence-based child maltreatment prevention; advocates for increased international support for and investment in evidence-based child maltreatment prevention; provides technical support for evidence-based child maltreatment prevention programmes in several low- and middle-income countries. Youth violence Youth violence is a global public health problem.
translations.reference: inikeza isiqondiso sobuchwepheshe nesivamile sokuvimbela ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane okusekelwe ebufakazini; ikhuthaza ukwesekwa kwamazwe ngamazwe kanye nokutshalwa kwezimali ekuvimbeleni ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane okusekelwe ebufakazini; inikeza ukwesekwa kwezobuchwepheshe kwezinhlelo zokuvimbela ukuphathwa kabi kwezingane ezisekelwe ebufakazini emazweni amaningana anemali engenayo ephansi naphakathi. Udlame lwentsha Udlame lwentsha luyinkinga yezempilo yomphakathi emhlabeni jikelele.
translations.hypothesis: Inikeza ukukhuliswa kwezobuchwepheshe kanye namazinga okufaneleka ekuphepheni kokuvikelwa kwezingane ekuhlazeni. Uphinde ukhuthaze ukukhuliswa kokusekela nokutshalwa kwezimali ekuphepheni kokuvikelwa kwezingane okusekelwe ezindinganisweni. Unikeza ukusekela kwezobuchwepheshe ezinhlelweni zokuvikelwa kwezingane ezisekelwe ezindinganisweni eziningi zezifunda ezinezimali ezincane nezephesheya. Ubugebengu phakathi kweentombazane. Ubugebengu phakathi kweentombazane yinkinga yezempilo yomphakathi emhlabeni wonke.

translations.source: It includes a range of acts from bullying and physical fighting, to more severe sexual and physical assault to homicide. Youth violence dramatically increases health, welfare and criminal justice costs; reduces productivity; and generally undermines the fabric of society. Beyond deaths, injuries and psychological harm, youth violence can lead to increased health risk behaviours such as smoking, substance abuse, unsafe sex, and further violence. These in turn are associated with chronic respiratory diseases, cancer, cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, early pregnancy and sexually transmitted diseases. Effective prevention and response strategies include those that promote parenting and early childhood development;
translations.reference: Kubandakanya uhla lwezenzo kusukela ebuxhwanguxhwangwini kanye nokulwa ngokomzimba, ukuya ekuhlaselweni kanzima ngokocansi nangokomzimba kuya ekubulaleni. Udlame lwentsha lunyusa kakhulu izindleko zezempilo, inhlalakahle kanye nobulungiswa bobugebengu; kunciphisa ukukhiqiza; futhi ngokuvamile ibukela phansi isisekelo somphakathi. Ngaphandle kokufa, ukulimala kanye nokulimala kwengqondo, udlame lwentsha lungaholela ekwandeni kokuziphatha okuyingozi kwezempilo njengokubhema, ukusebenzisa kabi izidakamizwa, ucansi olungaphephile, kanye nobudlova obengeziwe. Lokhu-ke kuhlotshaniswa nezifo ezingelapheki zokuphefumula, umdlavuza, izifo zenhliziyo, isifo sikashukela, ukukhulelwa besebancane kanye nezifo ezithathelwana ngocansi. Amasu asebenzayo okuvimbela kanye nokusabela ahlanganisa lawo akhuthaza ukuba umzali kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwengane isencane;
translations.hypothesis: Kuhlanganisa nezindlela ezahlukene zombuso, kusukela ekuhlukumezini kanye nokulwa ngamahlalakhubo, kuya ekuhlukumezini okukhulu kakhulu okuhlanganisa ukuhlukumeza ngokomzwelo kanye nokugwetshwa, kuya ekubuleni. Ukulwa phakathi kweentombazane nakubalulekile kukhulisa izindleko zezempilo, zokunakekelwa kanye nezomthetho; kunciphisa ukukhiqizwa; futhi ngokuvamile kuhlisa ukubambisana komphakathi. Ngaphandle kokufa, ukulimala kanye nokulimala ngokomzwelo, ukulwa phakathi kweentombazane kungaholela ezenzo ezingcono kakhulu ezempilo, ezifana nokutshala uthu, ukusetshenziswa kwezinto eziyingozi, ukuxhumana ngokungenasici, kanye nokulwa okwengeziwe. Lezi zinto, ngakho-ke, zihlobene nezifo ezivikelayo, ukugula kwe-cancer, izifo zekhadiyavaskulari, ukhoma, ukukhulelwa okusheshayo kanye nezifo ezithathelwayo ngokoxinwa. Izindlela zokuqapha kanye nokuphendula ezisebenzayo zifaka ezithuthukisa ukufundisa izingane kanye nokukhula kwazo kusukela ekuseni.

translations.source: school-based bullying prevention, academic, and life and social skills development programmes; therapeutic approaches with high-risk individuals, and community- and society-level approaches like reducing access to and misuse of alcohol and firearms, hotspots and problem-oriented policing, urban upgrading, and poverty de-concentration. WHO and partners decrease youth violence through initiatives that help to identify, quantify and respond to the problem, these include: developing a package for schools-based violence prevention programmes; drawing attention to the magnitude of youth violence and the need for prevention;
translations.reference: izinhlelo zokuvimbela ubuxhwanguxhwangu ezikoleni, ezifundweni, kanye nezokuthuthukisa amakhono empilo nezenhlalo; izindlela zokwelapha ezinabantu abasengozini enkulu, kanye nezindlela ezisezingeni lomphakathi kanye nomphakathi ezifana nokunciphisa ukufinyelela kanye nokusetshenziswa budedengu kotshwala nezibhamu, izindawo ezishisayo kanye namaphoyisa agxile ezinkingeni, ukuthuthukisa amadolobha, kanye nokuqeda ubumpofu. IWHO kanye nozakwethu banciphisa udlame lwentsha ngezinyathelo ezisiza ukuhlonza, ukulinganisa nokuphendula inkinga, lokhu kufaka phakathi: ukwakha iphakethe lezinhlelo zokuvimbela udlame ezikoleni; idonsela ukunaka ubukhulu bobudlova bentsha kanye nesidingo sokuvimbela;
translations.hypothesis: Izinhlelo zokuqapha ukuhlukumeza ezikhishwa ezikoleni, ezifundisa, kanye nezinhlelo zokuthuthukisa amakhono ezimpilo kanye nomphakathi; izindlela zokwelapha ezisetshenziselwa abantu abanezinkinga ezinkulu, kanye nezindlela ezisetshenziswa emiphakathini kanye emphakathini wonke, njengokuqinisa ukuthi abantu bangafinyezi futhi bangasebenzisi ngokungalungile utshwala nezibhamu, ukulwa nendawo ezinkulu zokuhlukumeza kanye nezinkinga, ukuthuthukisa amadolobha, kanye nokunciphisa ububha. I-WHO kanye nabalingani bayalwa nokuhlukumeza kwebantwana ngemikhuba esiza ukuthola, ukubala, kanye nokusabela kule nkinga, okubalwa kuzo: ukuthuthukisa uhlelo lwezinhlelo zokuqapha ukuhlukumeza ezikhishwa ezikoleni; ukukhombisa ukubaluleka kokuhlukumeza kwebantwana kanye nesidingo sokuqapha;

translations.source: building evidence on the scope and types of violence in different settings; developing guidance for Member States and all relevant sectors to prevent youth violence and strengthen responses to it; supporting national efforts to prevent youth violence; and collaborating with international agencies and organizations to prevent youth violence globally.
translations.reference: ukwakha ubufakazi kububanzi nezinhlobo zodlame ezindaweni ezahlukene; ukuthuthukisa isiqondiso saMazwe Angamalungu kanye nayo yonke imikhakha efanele ukuvimbela udlame lwentsha nokuqinisa izimpendulo kulo; ukusekela imizamo kazwelonke yokuvimbela udlame lwentsha; futhi ukusebenzisana nezinhlangano zamazwe ngamazwe kanye nezinhlangano ukuvimbela udlame lwentsha emhlabeni jikelele.
translations.hypothesis: ukuqokwa kwezimpawu mayelana nobubanzi kanye nezinhlobo zombilo ezikhungathekile ezindaweni ezihlukene; ukuthuthukisa iziqondiso ezihloselwe izizwe ezilunga kanye nezikhungo ezifanele zonke ukuvimbela umbilo webantwana kanye nokwenza kube lula ukuphendula kulowo mbilo; ukusekela imizamo kazwelonke yokuvimbela umbilo webantwana; kanye nokubambisana nezinhlangano kanye nezikhungo zamazwe ngamazwe ukuvimbela umbilo webantwana kulo lonke elasezweni.

translations.source: Violence against women Overview: Violence against women – particularly intimate partner violence and sexual violence – is a major public and clinical health problem and a violation of women's human rights. It is rooted in and perpetuates gender inequalities.Globally 1 in 3 women experience physical and/or sexual violence in their lifetime, mostly by an intimate partner. This is a stark reminder of the scale of gender inequality and discrimination against women. The United Nations defines violence against women as "any act of gender-based violence that results in, or is likely to result in, physical, sexual, or mental harm or suffering to women, including threats of such acts, coercion or arbitrary deprivation of liberty, whether occurring in public or in private life.
translations.reference: Udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane Uhlolojikelele: Udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane - ikakhulukazi udlame olusondelene nabalingani kanye nodlame locansi - yinkinga enkulu yezempilo yomphakathi neyezempilo kanye nokwephulwa kwamalungelo abantu besifazane. Isekelwe futhi iqhubekisela phambili ukungalingani kobulili. Emhlabeni wonke owesifazane oyedwa kwabathathu uba nodlame olungokomzimba kanye/noma locansi ekuphileni kwabo, kakhulukazi okwenziwa umlingani osondelene naye. Lesi yisikhumbuzo esiqinile sezinga lokungalingani ngokobulili kanye nokucwaswa kwabantu besifazane. I-United Nations ichaza udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane “njenganoma yisiphi isenzo sodlame olusekelwe ebulilini esiholela, noma esingase sibangele, ukulimala ngokomzimba, ngokocansi, noma kwengqondo noma ukuhlupheka kwabesifazane, okuhlanganisa izinsongo zezenzo ezinjalo, ukuphoqelelwa noma ukuncishwa okuthile ngokungafanele. inkululeko, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi yenzeka emphakathini noma empilweni yangasese.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulwa kwabesifazane: Ingxenye enkulu yezempilo yomphakathi kanye nezokwelashwa, kanye nokwephulwa amalungelo abesifazane, ukulwa kwabesifazane – ikakhulukazi ukulwa phakathi kwabashadi kanye nokulwa ngokosizi – kuyinkinga enkulu. Kufakelwe ezinkingeni zenguquko phakathi kwabantu besilisa nabesifazane futhi kuqhubeka nokwenza lezi zinkinga zibe nzulu. Emhlabeni wonke, kwabesifazane abathathu, omunye udlala ukulwa okomzimba kanye/noma ukosizi empilweni yakhe, kakhulu ngumlingani omdala. Lokhu kuyisikhumbuzo esikhulu sendlela engalinganani kangaka yenguquko kanye nokuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane. IHhashi Lombuso laseHlangani (United Nations) lidefinisha ukulwa kwabesifazane njenge-"noma yimuphi umsebenzi wokulwa okususelwe enguquko ongenela, noma oyingozi yokubangela, umonakalo omzimba, wokosizi, noma wengqondo kubesifazane, okubalwa nakho izinsogo zalolu hlobo, ukucindezelwa, noma ukuhlazwa okungahleliwe kwelizwi, kungakhulunywa noma kungakhulunywa.

translations.source: Intimate partner violence refers to behaviour by an intimate partner or ex-partner that causes physical, sexual or psychological harm, including physical aggression, sexual coercion, psychological abuse and controlling behaviours. Sexual violence is "any sexual act, attempt to obtain a sexual act, or other act directed against a person’s sexuality using coercion, by any person regardless of their relationship to the victim, in any setting. It includes rape, defined as the physically forced or otherwise coerced penetration of the vulva or anus with a penis, other body part or object." Impact: Violence against women is a global problem of pandemic proportions. It causes devastating, harm to women’s lives and that of their children.
translations.reference: Udlame lozakwethu abasondelene lusho ukuziphatha komlingani osondelene naye noma owake wathandana naye okubangela ukulimala ngokomzimba, ngokocansi noma ngokwengqondo, okuhlanganisa ulaka olungokomzimba, ukucindezelwa ngokocansi, ukuhlukumeza ngokomqondo kanye nokuziphatha okulawulayo. Udlame locansi "yinoma yisiphi isenzo socansi, umzamo wokuthola isenzo socansi, noma esinye isenzo esiqondiswe ngokumelene nobulili bomuntu kusetshenziswa ukuphoqwa, yinoma yimuphi umuntu ngokunganaki ubudlelwano bakhe nomuntu ohlukunyeziwe, kunoma yisiphi isimo. Kuhlanganisa ukudlwengulwa, okuchazwa njengokungena ngenkani ngokomzimba noma ngenye indlela kwengquza noma ididi ngepipi, enye ingxenye yomzimba noma into." Umthelela: Udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane luyinkinga yomhlaba wonke yokwanda kobhubhane. Kudala umonakalo, ukulimala ezimpilweni zabesifazane kanye nezabantwana babo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukulwa phakathi kwabashadi noma labo abathandana kuhlanganisa ukuziphatha komlingani noma owayengumlingani okubangela umonakalo omzimba, ngengcezu noma ongqondo, okuhlanganisa ukuhlasela ngomzimba, ukucindezelwa ngengcezu, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokwengqondo kanye nokuziphatha okuzilawula. Ukulwa ngengcezu kuchiqho "noma yiluphi uhlobo lokusebenzisana ngengcezu, umzamo wokuthola ukusebenzisana ngengcezu, noma enye indlela yokusebenzisa umuntu ngengcezu ngokucindezelwa, ngumuntu noma ngubani, ngaphandle kokuthi ubudlelwano bakhe nomufi, kunoma yikuphi indawo." Kubandakanya ukuhlaselwa ngengcezu, okuchazwe njengokungenelela ngomzimba noma ngelinye ifomu lokucindezelwa kwevulva noma yomlomo ngesithupha, ingxenye yomzimba enye noma into. Umthelela: Ukulwa kwabesifazane kuyinkinga emhlabeni jikelele, enobunzima obukhulu. Kubanga umonakalo omkhulu empilweni yabesifazane kanye nalabo abantwana babo.

translations.source: It also hurts the economic and social health of their families, communities, and countries. While some women are more at risk than others, violence can happen to any woman, in any country – regardless of culture, religion or economic status. Gender inequality including harmful gender norms are key drivers of violence against women. Violence can negatively affect women’s physical, mental, sexual, and reproductive health. It is associated with increased risk of injuries, depression, anxiety disorders, unplanned pregnancies, sexually transmitted infections, HIV and many other health problems.
translations.reference: Kulimaza futhi impilo yezomnotho nenhlalo yemindeni yabo, imiphakathi, kanye namazwe. Nakuba abanye besifazane besengozini kakhulu kunabanye, udlame lungenzeka kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesifazane, kunoma yiliphi izwe - kungakhathaliseki isiko, inkolo noma isimo somnotho. Ukungalingani ngokobulili okuhlanganisa nezinkambiso zobulili eziyingozi yizona ezihamba phambili zodlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane. Udlame lungaphazamisa impilo yabesifazane ngokomzimba, ngokwengqondo, ocansini, kanye nokuzala. Kuhambisana nokwanda kwengozi yokulimala, ukudangala, ukuphazamiseka kokukhathazeka, ukukhulelwa okungahleliwe, izifo ezithathelwana ngocansi, iHIV nezinye izinkinga eziningi zempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Kuyinto okubangela umonakalo kwezomnotho kanye nobuhle bomphakathi emikhaya, ezikhungweni kanye nezifunda. Nakuba ezinye izinduna zibuthakathile kakhulu kunezinye, ukuhlukunyezwa kungenzeka kunoma yimuphi umuntu, kunoma yiliphi izwe – kungakhathaliseki ngamasiko, ezinkolo noma isimo sezomnotho. Ukungalingani ngobulili, okubalwa nakho izimiso ezimbi ezihlobene nobubulili, yizinto ezibalulekile ezibangela ukuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane. Ukuhlukunyezwa kungaba nomthelela omubi empilweni yomzimba, yengqondo, yobulili kanye nempilo yokuvelisa yabesifazane. Kubandakanya ukukhuliswa kwengozi yezilonda, ukudabuka, ukukhathazeka, ukukhulelwa okungahleliwe, ukugqwashwa kwezifo ezithathelwanayo, i-HIV kanye nezinkinga eziningi zempilo.

translations.source: Children who grow up in families where there is violence may suffer a range of behavioural and emotional disturbances. These can lead to mental and development problems and also be associated with perpetrating or experiencing violence later in life. WHO response: WHO plays a key role in bringing attention to and responding to violenceagainst women as a public health and gender equality issue through: Research and evidence-building to highlight the magnitude of violence against women, its risk factors and consequences, and to identify effective interventions for prevention and response. Developing guidelines and tools, setting norms and standards for an effective health response to violence against women.
translations.reference: Izingane ezikhulela emikhayeni enobudlova zingase zibe nokuphazamiseka okuhlukahlukene kokuziphatha nemizwelo. Lokhu kungaholela ezinkingeni zengqondo nokukhula futhi kuhlotshaniswe nokwenza noma ukubhekana nodlame kamuva ekuphileni. Impendulo yeWHO: iWHO idlala indima ebalulekile ekuletheni ukunaka nokuphendula udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane njengendaba yezempilo yomphakathi kanye nokulingana kobulili ngokusebenzisa: Ucwaningo nokwakhiwa kobufakazi ukuze kugqanyiswe ubukhulu bodlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane, izici zalo eziyingozi kanye nemiphumela, kanye nokuhlonza ukungenelela okuphumelelayo kokuvimbela nokusabela. Ukuthuthukisa imihlahlandlela namathuluzi, ukubeka izimiso nezindinganiso zokuphendula ngempumelelo kwezempilo kubudlova obubhekiswe kwabesifazane.
translations.hypothesis: Izingane ezikhuliswa emikhayeni lapho kukhona ukuhlaziywa, zingase zibheke ukuguquka okuhlukahlukene kwezindlela zazo zokuziphatha kanye nemizwa. Lokhu kungaholela ezinkingeni zengqondo kanye nokukhula, futhi kungahlobana nokwenza noma ukuhlanganiswa kwezinto zokuhlaziywa ngemuva kwasikhathi. Impendulo ye-WHO: I-WHO idlala indima ebalulekile ekukwazisa kanye nokuphendula ukuhlaziywa kwabesifazane njengengxenye yezempilo yomphakathi kanye nokulingana kwabezimboni ngokusebenzisa: Ucwaningo nokwakhiwa kwezimpawu ukuze kukhonjwe ukubaluleka kokuhlaziywa kwabesifazane, izinto eziyingozi kanye nemiphumela yalo, kanye nokutholwa kwezindlela ezisebenzayo zokuqapha nokuphendula. Ukuthuthukiswa kwemihlahlandlela nezinsiza, kanye nokusethwa kwezinqubo kanye namazinga okuphendula ezempilo okunengqondo ekuhlaziyweni kwabesifazane.

translations.source: Strengthening country capacity of health systems and providers to prevent and respond to violence against women. Encouraging leadership in health systems and building political will to address violence against women through advocacy and partnerships. The WHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW) includes violence against women as part of its contribution to Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 5 on gender equality and women’s empowerment (specifically, SDG 5.2 on the elimination of violence against women and girls). At the World Health Assembly in May 2016, Member States endorsed a global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health systems in addressing interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls and against children.
translations.reference: Ukuqinisa amandla ezwe wezinhlelo zezempilo nabahlinzeki ukuze kuvinjelwe futhi kuphendule udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane. Ukukhuthaza ubuholi ezinhlelweni zezempilo kanye nokwakha intando yezepolitiki yokubhekana nodlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane ngokukhulumela nokusebenzisana. iWHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW) ihlanganisa udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane njengengxenye yomnikelo walo kuSustainable Development Goal (SDG) 5 mayelana nokulingana kobulili kanye nokufukulwa kwabesifazane (ikakhulukazi, SDG 5.2 mayelana nokuqedwa kodlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane namantombazane). Emhlanganweni Wezempilo Womhlaba ngoNhlaba 2016, Amazwe Angamalungu agunyaza uhlelo lokusebenza lomhlaba wonke lokuqinisa indima yezinhlelo zezempilo ekubhekaneni nodlame phakathi kwabantu, ikakhulukazi abesifazane namantombazane kanye nezingane.
translations.hypothesis: Ukukhuthaza amakhono ezinhlelweni zempilo nezikhungo zempilo ezweni ukuze kuvikelwe futhi kukhutshwe ukubusa kwezobuciko ezikhunjulweni zabesifazane. Ukukhuthaza ubuholi ezinhlelweni zempilo nokwakha izimiso zombusho zokulungisa ukubusa kwezobuciko ezikhunjulweni zabesifazane ngokusetshenziswa kwezokukhuthaza kanye nokubambisana. Uhlelo Olunzulu Lwezokusebenza lwe-WHO (GPW) oluyi-13 lufaka ukubusa kwezobuciko ezikhunjulweni zabesifazane njengengxenye yomsebenzi wayo wokufinyelela umgomo wokuthuthukiswa oqukethekile (SDG) 5 mayelana nokulingana ngengqikithi kanye nokunakekelwa kwabesifazane (ikakhulukazi, i-SDG 5.2 mayelana nokususa ukubusa kwezobuciko ezikhunjulweni zabesifazane kanye nezintombi). Kuhlanganiswe ngabafundi bezizwe zasehlabelelweni ngohlelo lwesivumelwano lomhlaba wonke mayelana nokwenza kube ngcono indima yezinhlelweni zempilo ekulungiseni ukubusa kwezobuciko phakathi kwabantu, ikakhulukazi ezikhunjulweni zabesifazane nezintombi kanye nezintshwa.

translations.source: Wildfires Overview: Wildfires are increasing around the globe in frequency, severity and duration, heightening the need to understand the health effects of wildfire exposure. The risk of wildfires grows in extremely dry conditions, such as drought, heat waves and during high winds.Wildfire smoke is a mixture of hazardous air pollutants, such PM2.5, NO2, ozone, aromatic hydrocarbons, or lead. In addition to contaminating the air with toxic pollutants, wildfires also simultaneously impact the climate by releasing large quantities of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases into the atmosphere. With climate change leading to warmer temperatures and drier conditions and the increasing urbanization of rural areas, the fire season is starting earlier and ending later.
translations.reference: Imililo yequbula Uhlolojikelele: Imililo yequbula iyanda emhlabeni wonke ngobuningi, ubukhali kanye nobude besikhathi, ikhulisa isidingo sokuqonda imiphumela yezempilo yokuchayeka emlilweni wequbula. Ingozi yomlilo wequbula ikhula ezimeni ezome kakhulu, njengesomiso, amagagasi okushisa nangesikhathi somoya onamandla.Intuthu yomlilo wequbula iyingxube yezinto ezingcolisa umoya eziyingozi, ezifana nePM2.5, NO2, i-ozone, amahydrocarbon anephunga elimnandi, noma umthofu. Ngaphezu kokungcolisa umoya ngezinto ezingcolisayo ezinobuthi, imililo yequbula iphinde ithinte isimo sezulu ngasikhathi sinye ngokukhiphela inqwaba yesikhutha namanye amagesi abamba ukushisa emkhathini. Ngokushintsha kwesimo sezulu okuholela emazingeni okushisa afudumele nezimo ezomile kanye nokwanda kokukhula kwezindawo zasemadolobheni, inkathi yomlilo iqala ngaphambi kwesikhathi futhi iphele kamuva.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubheka Kwezolimo Ezilimele: Izilimo ezilimele zikhula kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele, kokubili ngenani, ubukhulu kanye nesikhathi, okwenza kube nomthelela omkhulu ekubeni kudingeke ukuthi siqonde imiphumela yezempilo yokutshelwa yisilimo esilimele. Ubungozi bezilimo ezilimele buyanda ezimeni ezomile kakhulu, njengobulimo, ukushisa okukhulu kanye nasebusweni obukhulu bomoya. Umsila wezilimo ezilimele uyinhlanganisela yezinto ezilimele ezitholakala emoyeni, njenge-PM2.5, i-NO2, i-ozone, ama-hydrocarbon ahlukahlukene, noma i-lead. Ngaphandle kokungcola umoya ngamazinyo ezilimele, izilimo ezilimele futhi zithinta ngesikhathi esifanayo ikhlimethi ngokukhulisa amanani amakhulu e-carbon dioxide kanye nezinye izincwadi zokugqwala emoyeni. Ngenxa yokuguquka kwekhlimethi okubangela ithuba lokushisa elikhulu kanye nezimo ezomile, kanye nokukhula kwezigadi ezinkulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya, isizini yezilimo iqala ngokushesha futhi iphela kamuva.

translations.source: Wildfire events are getting more extreme in terms of acres burned, duration and intensity, and they can disrupt transportation, communications, water supply, and power and gas services. Impact: Wildfires that burn near populated areas can have significant impact on the environment, property, livestock and human mortality and morbidity depending on the size, speed and proximity to the fire, and whether the population has advanced warning to evacuate. Wildfire smoke is a mixture of air pollutants of which particulate matter (PM) is the principal public health threat. PM2.5 from wildfire smoke is associated with premature deaths in the general population, and can cause and exacerbate diseases of the lungs, heart, brain/nervous system, skin, gut, kidney, eyes, nose and liver. It has also been shown to lead to cognitive impairment and memory loss.
translations.reference: Imicimbi yomlilo wequbula iba ngokwedlulele ngokwedlulele mayelana nokushiswa kwamahektare, ubude besikhathi namandla, futhi ingaphazamisa ezokuthutha, ukuxhumana, ukuhlinzekwa kwamanzi, namandla kanye nezinsizakalo zegesi. Umthelela: Imililo yequbula evutha eduze kwezindawo ezinabantu abaningi ingaba nomthelela omkhulu endaweni ezungezile, impahla, imfuyo kanye nokufa kwabantu kanye nezifo kuye ngobukhulu, isivinini kanye nokuba seduze komlilo, kanye nokuthi ingabe abantu banesexwayiso esithuthukisiwe sokuthi baphume. Intuthu yomlilo wequbula iyingxube yezinto ezingcolisa umoya okuyiparticulate matter (PM) ewusongo olukhulu lwezempilo yomphakathi. iPM2.5 evela kuntuthu womlilo wequbula ihlotshaniswa nokufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kubantu abaningi, futhi ingabangela futhi yandise izifo zamaphaphu, inhliziyo, ubuchopho/isimiso sezinzwa, isikhumba, amathumbu, izinso, amehlo, ikhala nesibindi. Kubuye kwaboniswa ukuthi kuholela ekukhubazekeni kwengqondo nokulahlekelwa inkumbulo.
translations.hypothesis: Imicimbi yomlilo ongcolile iyashisa kakhulu, kukhona ukukhuluza okukhulu, isikhathi eside, kanye namandla amakhulu, futhi ingaphazamisa ukuhamba, ukuxhumana, ukunikezwa kwamanzi, kanye nezinsizakalo kagesi kanye negesi. Umthelela: Imililo ongcolile eyashisa eduze kwezindawo ezihlala kuzo ingaba nomthelela omkhulu endaweni yangakubo, ezakhiwo, ezilwane, kanye nokufa kanye nokugula kwabantu, kuye ngobukhulu, isivinini, kanye nobubanzi bomlilo, kanye nokuthi abantu batholwe yini ngesikhathi eside ngaphambi kokuthi kufanele bahambe. Umsindo womlilo ongcolile uyinhlanganisela yezinto ezilimazayo emoyeni, okuyinto uketshezi (PM) okuyinto enobungozi obukhulu empilweni yomphakathi. I-PM2.5 evela emsindweni womlilo ongcolile ihlobene nokufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kubantu, futhi ingadala futhi yagweme izifo zethilomu, inhliziyo, ingqondo/uhlelo lwezinervo, isikhumba, igazi, imfundo, amehlo, insimu kanye neqophe. Futhi kukhonjiwe ukuthi ingaholela ekulahlekeni kwamakhono nokulahlekelwa kwememori.

translations.source: Firefighters and emergency response workers are also greatly impacted by injuries, burns and smoke inhalation, particularly at high concentrations. More interdisciplinary research is warranted to understand the latent and long-term health effects of wildfire exposure on vulnerable populations (children, older people, pregnant people, chronically ill people), particularly for geographic areas enduring repeated and cyclical exposure to these wildﬁre events. WHO Response: The magnitude of the physical and human costs from wildfires can be reduced if adequate emergency prevention, preparedness, response and recovery measures are implemented in a sustainable and timely manner. Working with Member States, WHO helps to build resilient and proactive health systems that can anticipate the needs and challenges during emergencies, so that we can be more likely to reduce risks and respond effectively when needed. WHO works with partners in preparing, preventing, detecting, responding and recovering from emergencies and disasters, including environmental exposures, such asimplementing early warning systems and issuing health and air quality advisories;
translations.reference: Izicishamlilo kanye nabasebenzi bezimo eziphuthumayo nabo bathintwa kakhulu ukulimala, ukusha nokuhogela intuthu, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezigxile kakhulu. Ucwaningo olwengeziwe lwezinhlaka ezahlukene lufanelekile ukuze kuqondwe imiphumela yezempilo ecashile neyesikhathi eside yokuchayeka komlilo wequbula kubantu abasengozini (izingane, abantu abadala, abantu abakhulelwe, abantu abagula ngokungalapheki), ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezibekezelela ukuchayeka kaningi kanye nokujikeleza kule micimbi yomlilo wasendle. Impendulo yeWHO: Ubukhulu bezindleko ezingokwenyama nezomuntu ezivela emlilweni wequbula zingancishiswa uma ukuvimbela okwanele kwezimo eziphuthumayo, ukulungela, ukusabela kanye nezinyathelo zokuthola kabusha zenziwa ngendlela eqhubekayo nangesikhathi esifanele. Ukusebenzisana Namazwe Angamalungu, iWHO isiza ekwakheni izinhlelo zezempilo eziqinile nezisebenzayo ezingase zilindele izidingo nezinselele ngesikhathi sezimo eziphuthumayo, ukuze sikwazi ukunciphisa izingozi futhi siphendule ngokuphumelelayo lapho kudingeka. IWHO isebenza nabalingani ekulungiseleleni, ekuvimbeleni, ekutholeni, ekuphenduleni nasekululameni ezimeni eziphuthumayo nezinhlekelele, okuhlanganisa ukuchayeka kwemvelo, njengokwenza kube lula izinhlelo zokuxwayisa kusenesikhathi kanye nokukhipha izeluleko zezempilo nezomoya;
translations.hypothesis: Abafundisi bezomlilo kanye nabasebenzi abaphendula ezimweni eziphuthumayo badingeka kakhulu ngenxa yezilonda, ukutshiswa kanye nokugwetshwa umusi, ikakhulukazi uma umusi unomucu omkhulu. Kufanele kwenziwe ucwaningo olunzulu oluhambisana nezinhlelo eziningi ukuze kuhlale kwakaziwe imiphumela yezempilo ezifihlekile kanye nezikhathi ezide ezibangelwa ukutshelwa umjuluko, ikakhulukazi kubantu abangempilo (abantwana, abadala, abafazi abakhulelwe, kanye nabantu abagulwe), ikakhulukazi ezindaweni ezibanzi ezibhekene nokutshelwa umjuluko okwaphakathi nangokulandelana. Impendulo ye-WHO: Ubukhulu bomthelela omzimba kanye nomthelela kubantu obangelwa imijulukwane kungancishiswa uma kuthathwa izinyathelo ezifanele zokuqapha, ukulungiselela, ukuphendula kanye nokululama ngendlela eqhubekayo kanye ngesikhathi esifanele. Ngokusebenzisana nezizwe ezilunga, i-WHO isiza ekwakhiweni kwezinhlelo zezempilo ezinamandla futhi ezilamkile ezikwazi ukubheka izidingo nezinselele ezikhathini zokuphuthumayo, ukuze sikwazi ukunciphisa amathuba yezingozi futhi siphendule ngempumelelo lapho kudingeka. I-WHO isebenza nabalingani ekulungiseleleni, ekuvimbeleni, ekutholeni, ekuphenduleni kanye ekululamenzi ezimweni eziphuthumayo nezingozi, okubalwa nakho ukutshelwa yimvelo, njengokusebenzisa izinhlelo zokuxwayisa ngokushesha kanye nokunikeza izeluleko mayelana nempilo kanye nokukhulisa komoya;

translations.source: containing the release of hazardous materials; assessing health needs of the community and infrastructure damage; restoring primary care services, like immunization, child and maternal health, and mental health; strengthening human resources for disaster management; collecting, analysing and disseminating information related to emergencies and disasters that are likely to occur in a region; establishing and managing stocks of relief supplies and equipment;
translations.reference: equkethe ukukhululwa kwezinto eziyingozi; ukuhlola izidingo zezempilo zomphakathi kanye nokulimala kwengqalasizinda; ukubuyisela izinsiza zokunakekelwa okuyisisekelo, njengokugoma, impilo yezingane kanye nomama, kanye nempilo yengqondo; ukuqinisa izinsiza zabantu ekulawuleni izinhlekelele; ukuqoqa, ukuhlaziya nokusabalalisa ulwazi oluhlobene nezimo eziphuthumayo nezinhlekelele okungenzeka zenzeke esifundeni; ukusungula nokuphatha isitokwe sezimpahla zosizo kanye nemishini;
translations.hypothesis: okuqukethe ukukhishwa kwezinto eziyingozi; ukuhlaziywa kwezidingo zezempilo zomphakathi kanye nomonakalo wendlela; ukubuyisela izinsizakalo ezibalulekile zokunakekelwa, ezifana nokugaywa ngamathuba, impilo yezingane kanye namakhosikazi, kanye nempilo yengqondo; ukuqinisa izinsiza zabantu zokuphathwa kwezinhlekelele; ukuqoqa, ukuhlaziya nokusabalalisa ulwazi oluhlobene nezimo eziphuthumayo nezinhlekelele eziningi kungenzeka ukuthi zenzeke endaweni ethile; ukusungula futhi kulawulwe izitokwe zempahla yokusiza kanye nezinsiza;

translations.source: calling for emergency funding to support health action; and developing national policies, recommendations and national emergency response plans.
translations.reference: ukubiza uxhaso oluphuthumayo ukuze kusekelwe isenzo sezempilo; futhi ukuthuthukisa izinqubomgomo zikazwelonke, izincomo kanye nezinhlelo zikazwelonke zokubhekana nezimo eziphuthumayo.
translations.hypothesis: ukucela ukuxhaswa ngemali engenayo ukuze kusize ezindleleni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo; kanye nokuhlela imigomo kazwelonke, izincomo kanye nezinhlelo zombusazwe zokuphendula ezimweni eziphuthumayo.

translations.source: Women's health Overview: Being a man or a woman has a significant impact on health, as a result of both biological and gender-related differences. The health of women and girls is of particular concern because, in many societies, they are disadvantaged by discrimination rooted in sociocultural factors. For example, women and girls face increased vulnerability to HIV/AIDS. Some of the sociocultural factors that prevent women and girls to benefit from quality health services and attaining the best possible level of health include:
translations.reference: Impilo yabesifazane Uhlolojikelele: Ukuba owesilisa noma owesifazane kunomthelela omkhulu empilweni, ngenxa yakho kokubili umehluko webhayoloji nohlobene nobulili. Impilo yabesifazane namantombazane ikhathaza kakhulu ngoba, emiphakathini eminingi, bancishwe amathuba ngenxa yokucwaswa okubangelwa izici zezenhlalo namasiko. Isibonelo, abesifazane namantombazane babhekene nokwanda kobungozi beHIV/AIDS. Ezinye zezici zezenhlalo namasiko ezivimbela abesifazane namantombazane ukuthi bazuze ezinsizeni zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu futhi bathole izinga lezempilo elingcono kakhulu zifaka phakathi:
translations.hypothesis: Ubuciko bezempilo zabesifazane: Ukuba umfana noma umfazi kunomthelela omkhulu ezempilweni, ngenxa yobuhle obuhlukile kanye nezindlela ezihlukene ezihlobene nobunjalo. Impilo yabesifazane kanye nezintombi iyinkinga ekhethekile ngoba, ezinhlelweni eziningi, zibandakanywa yobunzima ngenxa yobunzima obubangelwa izinto ezihlobene nomphakathi kanye namasiko. Ngokwesibonelo, abesifazane nezintombi bazuza kakhulu ekugqeleni kwe-HIV/AIDS. Ezinye zezinto ezihlobene nomphakathi kanye namasiko ezivimbela abesifazane nezintombi ukuthi bazuzwe ngamasevisi ezempilo asezingeni eliphezulu futhi bathole izinga eliphezulu kakhulu lempilo zifaka:

translations.source: unequal power relationships between men and women; social norms that decrease education and paid employment opportunities; an exclusive focus on women’s reproductive roles; and potential or actual experience of physical, sexual and emotional violence. While poverty is an important barrier to positive health outcomes for both men and women, poverty tends to yield a higher burden on women and girls’ health due to, for example, feeding practices (malnutrition) and use of unsafe cooking fuels (COPD).
translations.reference: ukungalingani kwamandla ubudlelwano phakathi kwabesilisa nabesifazane; izinkambiso zomphakathi ezehlisa imfundo kanye namathuba omsebenzi akhokhelwayo; ukugxila okukhethekile ezindimeni zokuzala zabesifazane; futhi okungenzeka noma okuhlangenwe nakho kwangempela kodlame olungokomzimba, locansi kanye nolwemizwa. Nakuba ubumpofu buyisithiyo esibalulekile emiphumeleni emihle yezempilo kubo bobabili abesilisa nabesifazane, ubumpofu buvame ukuletha umthwalo omkhulu empilweni yabesifazane namantombazane ngenxa, isibonelo, imikhuba yokudla (ukungondleki) kanye nokusetshenziswa kwezibaseli zokupheka ezingaphephile (COPD).
translations.hypothesis: Ubuhlobo obungalungile bemandla phakathi kwabantu kanye nabesifazane; imithetho yomphakathi ephazamisa amathuba emfundo kanye nomsebenzi oguquke ngemali; ukugxilwa kuphela ezindimeni zokuzala zabesifazane; kanye nengozi noma okwenzekile yobulili, ukuhlukunyezwa ngokomzwelo. Nakuba ubumpofu bunobunzima obukhulu ekutholeni impilo enhle kubantu bobabili, ubumpofu uvame ukuba nomthelela omkhulu empilweni yabesifazane kanye nezintombi, ngoba okungenye okubalulekile, ukudla okudliwe (ukuntshontshwa) kanye nokusetshenziswa kwamagasini okushisa ayingcolile (i-COPD).

translations.source: Yaws (Endemic treponematoses) Overview: Yaws is a chronic skin infection characterized by papillomas (noncancerous lumps) and ulcers. It is caused by the bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, which belongs to the same group of bacteria that causes venereal syphilis. Yaws primarily affects children aged under 15 years who live in poor communities in warm, humid and tropical forested areas of Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Pacific islands. The majority of affected populations live rural areas, far from health services.
translations.reference: Izikhala (Endemic treponematoses) Uhlolojikelele: Izadla yisifo sesikhumba esingalapheki esibonakala ngamapapillomas (izigaxa ezingenawo umdlavuza) kanye nezilonda. Kubangelwa i-Bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, eyingxenye yeqembu elifanayo lamabhaktheriya abangela i-venereal syphilis. Izikhala zithinta kakhulu izingane ezineminyaka engaphansi kwe-15 ezihlala emiphakathini empofu ezindaweni ezifudumele, ezinomswakama kanye namahlathi ashisayo e-Afrika, e-Asia, eLatin America naseziqhingini zasePacific. Iningi labantu abathintekile lihlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya, kude nezinsiza zezempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuchazwa kwe-Yaws (izifo zama-treponema ezivamile): I-Yaws iyinto yokugula kwezikhumba esikhukhula futhi edadisa, ekhonjiswa ngamaphapiloma (amathambo angalutho) kanye nezilonda. Ibanjwa yibhaktheriya ethi i-Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, efanayo nebhaktheriya edala ukugula okubizwa nge-venereal syphilis. I-Yaws ingakafika kubantwana abangaphansi kweminyaka eyi-15 abahlala ezindaweni ezincane ezikulo mzantsi, ezikushisa, ezimanzi futhi ezinezitshalo ezinkulu e-Afrika, e-Asia, e-Latin America kanye nezizikalo zase-Pacific. Abaningi abantu abagulwa bayahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya, kude nezinsizakalo zezempilo.

translations.source: Poverty, low socio-economic conditions and poor personal hygiene facilitate the spread of yaws. Although there are over 80 000 cases of yaws each year, experts believe the disease can be controlled and ultimately eradicated for several reasons. First, it only occurs in humans, not animals, making control much easier. It is also easy to treat with readily available drugs and has already been eliminated in some countries, including India. The remaining pockets of yaws infection, although usually in remote places, means further spread is less likely with proper surveillance and control measures.
translations.reference: Ubumpofu, izimo zenhlalomnotho eziphansi kanye nenhlanzeko yomuntu siqu kusiza ukusabalala kwamaza. Yize kunezigameko ezingaphezu kuka-80 000 zokuzamula unyaka nonyaka, ongoti bakholelwa ukuthi lesi sifo singalawuleka futhi sigcine siqedwe ngenxa yezizathu eziningi. Okokuqala, kwenzeka kuphela kubantu, hhayi izilwane, okwenza ukulawula kube lula kakhulu. Kulula futhi ukuyelapha ngemithi etholakala kalula futhi isivele yaqedwa kwamanye amazwe, kuhlanganise nelaseNdiya. Amaphakethe asele okutheleleka nge-yaws, nakuba ngokuvamile ezindaweni ezikude, kusho ukuthi ukusakazeka okwengeziwe mancane amathuba okuba nezinyathelo ezifanele zokuqapha nokulawula.
translations.hypothesis: Ukukhubazeka, izimo ezimbi zombusaziso nomndeni, kanye nokungagcwaliseki kwempilo yomuntu ngamunye kwenza ukusakazeka kwe-yaws kube lula. Nakuba kunama-80,000 eziguli ze-yaws minyaka yonke, ochwepheshe bakholelwa ukuthi leli nkinga ingalawulwa futhi ekugcineni iyehlelwe ngenxa yezizathu eziningi. Okokuqala, leli nkinga yenzeka kubantu kuphela, hhayi ezilwaneni, okwenza ukulawulwa kube lula kakhulu. Futhi kulula ukuyilapha ngemithi etholakala kalula, futhi isivele seyehlelwe ezweni ezithile, okubalwa uNhlanhla. Izindawo ezisele ezithintekile nge-yaws, nakuba zivame ukuba ezindaweni ezikude, kusho ukuthi ukusakazeka okwengeziwe kunokuncipha ngokufanele ngokuqapha kanye nezinyathelo zokulawula.

translations.source: Symptoms: There are two stages of yaws infection. The early stage is when the patient is infectious and can spread the disease to others. In this stage, a papule (a noncancerous, outward-growing lump) develops at the site of infection. This papule is full of the organisms and may persist for 3–6 months followed by natural healing. Without treatment, this is followed by disseminated skin lesions over the body.
translations.reference: Izimpawu: Kunezigaba ezimbili zokutheleleka nge-yaws. Isigaba sokuqala yilapho isiguli sithelela khona futhi singasabalalisa lesi sifo kwabanye. Kulesi sigaba, i-papule (iqhubu elingenawo umdlavuza, elikhula ngaphandle) liyakhula endaweni yegciwane. Le papule igcwele izinto eziphilayo futhi ingase iqhubeke izinyanga ezingu-3-6 kulandelwa ukuphulukiswa kwemvelo. Ngaphandle kokwelashwa, lokhu kulandelwa izilonda zesikhumba ezisatshalaliswa emzimbeni.
translations.hypothesis: Izimpawu: Kuneziteji ezimbili zokugaywa yi-yaws. Ekuqaleni, umuntu ogaywe uyagula futhi angadala ukuthi abanye bagaywe. Kuleli sikhathi, ukugaya (umhlanganiswe ongumdlavuza, okhulayo ngaphandle) kudlulela endaweni yokugaywa. Lolu kugaya lufakelwe izinto ezidala ukugaywa futhi lungahlala izinsuku ezingu-3 kuya kweziyi-6 ngaphambi kokululama ngokwemvelo. Ngaphandle kokwelashwa, lokhu kulandelwa ukuthi kubonakale amagugu ezikhumba ezindaweni eziningi emzimbeni.

translations.source: Bone pain and bone lesions may also occur. The second stage is noninfectious and typically appears five years after infection. It is characterized by disabling consequences of the nose, bones and palmar/plantar hyperkeratosis (thickening). After a field diagnosis based on these symptoms, the disease can be confirmed by examining a sample from a skin legion under a special type of microscope (darkfield examination). Blood tests are not typically used because yaws is closely related to the bacterium that causes syphilis and the two diseases will show the same result.
translations.reference: Ubuhlungu bethambo kanye nezilonda zamathambo kungase kwenzeke. Isigaba sesibili asitheleleki futhi ngokuvamile sivela eminyakeni emihlanu ngemva kokutheleleka. Ibonakala ngokukhubaza imiphumela yekhala, amathambo kanye nesundu/plantar hyperkeratosis (ukuqina). Ngemva kokuxilongwa kwensimu okusekelwe kulezi zimpawu, lesi sifo singaqinisekiswa ngokuhlola isampula ku-legion yesikhumba ngaphansi kohlobo olukhethekile lwe-microscope (ukuhlolwa kwedarkfield). Ukuhlolwa kwegazi akuvamile ukusetshenziswa ngoba izamula zihlobene eduze nebhaktheriya elibangela ugcunsula futhi lezi zifo ezimbili zizobonisa umphumela ofanayo.
translations.hypothesis: Ubuhlungu bezimbazo kanye nezifo ezimbazini zingase zivele. Isigaba sesibili asibangelwa ukugugulela futhi ngokuvamile sibonakala eminyakeni eyisikhombisa ngemuva kokuqala kokuqoka. Kufakazelwe yimiphumela emibi ezindlebeni, ezimbazini kanye nokukhuliswa kakhulu kwamasiko kanye nezinyawo (ukuba mkhulu). Ngemuva kokuhlaziywa okwethulwa ngalezi zimpawu, ingxabano ingaqinisekiswa ngokuhlola isampula esitholakala endaweni yomuthi ngaphansi kohlo lwemikhrofuskhophu okhethekile (ukuhlaziywa kwe-darkfield). Ukuhlolwa kwegazi ngokuvamile akusetshenziswa ngoba i-yaws ihlobene kakhulu nebhakthiriya edala i-syphilis, futhi lezi zimbili zombinga zizobonisa imiphumela efanayo.

translations.source: Treatment: There is currently no vaccine for yaws. Health education and improved personal hygiene are the most important tactics for prevention. Two antibiotics can be used to treat yaws. A single oral dose of azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g) is the recommended treatment. Benzathine penicillin (single intramuscular dose) at 0.6 million units (children aged under 10 years) and 1.2 million units (people aged over 10 years) can be used for patients with suspected clinical treatment failure after azithromycin, or patients who cannot be treated with azithromycin.
translations.reference: Ukwelashwa: Okwamanje awukho umuthi wokugomela izamula. Imfundo yezempilo kanye nenhlanzeko yomuntu siqu ethuthukisiwe kungamaqhinga abaluleke kakhulu okuvimbela. Ama-antibiotics amabili angasetshenziswa ukwelapha amayaws. Umthamo owodwa womlomo we-azithromycin (30 mg/kg, ubukhulu obungu-2 g) uwukwelashwa okunconyiwe. IBenzathine penicillin (umthamo owodwa we-intramuscular) emayunithi ayizigidi ezingu-0.6 (izingane ezineminyaka engaphansi kweyi-10) kanye namayunithi ayizigidi ezingu-1.2 (abantu abaneminyaka engaphezu kweyi-10) angasetshenziswa ezigulini ezisolwa ngokwehluleka ukwelashwa ngemva kwe-azithromycin, noma iziguli ezingakwazi ukwelashwa nge-azithromycin. .
translations.hypothesis: Ukwelashwa: Okwamanje, akukho itimu yokuvakasha yalesi sifo esibizwa nge-yaws. Ukufundisa ngempilo kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwezindlela zokuhlanzeka komuntu ngamunye kuyizindlela ezibaluleke kakhulu zokuqapha. Amakhambi amabili asebenzayo angasetshenziswa ukwelashula i-yaws. Idosi eyodwa yefu elithathwa ngomkhakha, okuyi-azithromycin (30 mg/kg, engaphezu kuka-2 g), kuyindlela yokwelashwa esikhuthazwayo. I-benzathine penicillin (idosi eyodwa efakelwe ngaphakathi komzimba) engu-0.6 million units (ezingane eziminyaka engaphansi kuka-10) kanye no-1.2 million units (kwabantu abangaphezu kuka-10) ingasetshenziswa kubagulazayo abangenakwelashwa ngokuphumelela ngemuva kokwelashwa nge-azithromycin, noma kwabagulazayo abangakwazi ukwelashwa nge-azithromycin.

translations.source: This treatment will result in complete clinical healing in 95% of cases but patients should be re-examined 4 weeks after receiving the antibiotics. A review of the historic documents from 1950s shows that over 90 countries and territories were endemic for yaws. Only 14 out of the 90 countries and territories have recent data on yaws based on the routine surveillance system; however, these figures may just be an indication of the presence of the disease and not its full extent. Ghana, Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands report over 10 000 cases per year. Ecuador and India appear to have interrupted transmission.
translations.reference: Lokhu kwelashwa kuzophumela ekwelapheni okuphelele komtholampilo kuma-95% ezimeni kodwa iziguli kufanele zihlolwe kabusha emasontweni ama-4 ngemuva kokuthola ama-antibiotics. Ukubuyekezwa kwemibhalo yomlando kusukela ngeminyaka yawo-1950 kukhombisa ukuthi amazwe nezindawo ezingaphezu kuka-90 zaziyinsakavukela umchilo wesidwaba. Amazwe nezindawo eziyi-14 kuphela kwangu-90 anedatha yakamuva mayelana ne-yaws esekelwe ohlelweni lokuqapha olujwayelekile; nokho, lezi zibalo zingase zibe inkomba nje yokuba khona kwalesi sifo hhayi izinga laso eligcwele. IGhana, iPapua New Guinea kanye neSolomon Islands babika amacala angaphezu kuka-10 000 ngonyaka. i-Ecuador kanye ne-India kubonakala sengathi kuphazamise ukuhanjiswa.
translations.hypothesis: Lo chitho kuzophumela ekulophenyweni okuphelele kwezifo kwezinketho ezingu-95% yezimo, kodwa iziguli kufanele zibuyekeziwe ngemuva kwamawingu ayi-4 ngemuva kokuthola amakhambi. Ukubuyekezwa kwamadokhumenti adala kusukela ngonyaka ka-1950 ubonisa ukuthi izifunda nezizwe eziningi kunoma yini ezingu-90 zazinomzimba wezifo ezibizwa nge-"yaws." Kuphela izifunda ezingu-14 kulezo ezingu-90 ezinezincazelo zamanje mayelana ne-"yaws" ngokusekelwe ohlelweni lokubhekwana njalo; nokho, lezi zinombolo zingaba uphawu lokuba khona lesi sifo, kodwa hhayi ukuthi lukhulu kangakanani. I-Ghana, i-Papua New Guinea kanye ne-Solomon Islands zibika izimo ezingaphezu kuka-10 000 ngonyaka. Kubonakala sengathi i-Ecuador ne-India zimele ukuthi ukusasazwa kwalesi sifo kuye kweka.

translations.source: Yellow fever Overview: Yellow fever is a viral disease that is transmitted to humans by the bites of infected mosquitoes. It is prone to epidemics and is preventable with a vaccine. These day-biting mosquitoes breed around houses (domestic), in forests or jungles (wild), or in both habitats (semi-domestic). Yellow fever is a high-impact, high-threat disease, with a risk of international spread, representing a potential threat to global health security.
translations.reference: Umkhuhlane ophuzi Uhlolojikelele: iYellow fever yisifo esiyigciwane esidluliselwa kubantu ngokulunywa omiyane abanalesi sifo. Ijwayele ukungenwa izifo eziwumshayabhuqe futhi ingavinjelwa ngomgomo. Lezi zimiyane eziluma emini zizalela ezindlini (zasekhaya), emahlathini noma emahlathini (endle), noma kuzo zombili izindawo zokuhlala (ezisekhaya). iYellow fever yisifo esiyingozi, esiyingozi kakhulu, esisengozini yokusakazeka emhlabeni wonke, emele usongo olungase lube khona ekuvikelekeni kwezempilo emhlabeni wonke.
translations.hypothesis: Ubuntwashe: Ubuntwashe buwugwayi obutholakala ngamakhambi ezinduku ezithile. Kugqamile ukuthi kugqamile futhi kungavikelwe ngogogo. Lezi zinduku ezidla ngosuku zikhula eduze kwezindlu (ezindlu), ezihlanzini noma ezintabeni (ezilwandle), noma kokubili (ezihambisanayo). Ubuntwashe kuyigciwane elinamandla kakhulu futhi elingezelwa, elinezinkinga ezinkulu, futhi kukhona ithuba lokuthi lwandise emhlabeni wonke, okwenza kube yingozi enkulu empilo yomhlaba jikelele.

translations.source: There are 3 types of transmission cycles: Sylvatic (or jungle) yellow fever spreads when monkeys are bitten by wild mosquitoes that pass the virus on to other monkeys and humans. Intermediate yellow fever spreads when semi-domestic mosquitoes infect both monkeys and people. This is the most common type of outbreak in Africa. Urban yellow fever can cause large epidemics when infected people introduce the virus into heavily populated areas with high mosquito density and where people have little immunity. Occasionally, infected travellers have exported cases to countries that are free of yellow fever.
translations.reference: Kunezinhlobo ezi-3 zemijikelezo yokudlulisela: iSylvatic (noma ihlathi) iyellow fever isakazeka lapho izinkawu zilunywa omiyane basendle abadlulisela leli gciwane kwezinye izinkawu nakubantu. iYellow fever ephakathi isakazeka lapho omiyane besemi-domestic bethelela kokubili izinkawu nabantu. Lolu wuhlobo oluvame kakhulu lokuqubuka kwezifo e-Afrika. i-Urban yellow fever ingabangela ubhubhane olukhulu lapho abantu abanaleli gciwane bengenisa igciwane ezindaweni ezinabantu abaningi abanomiyane abaningi nalapho abantu bengenawo amandla okuzivikela. Kwesinye isikhathi, abahambi abanaleli gciwane baye bathumela amacala emazweni angenayo iyellow fever.
