translations.hypothesis: Kunezinhlobo ezintathu zokusabalala kwezifo: Ukusabalala kwezifo zethuna (noma zezilwane zasendle) kwenzeka lapho amakhanda amakhulu agwayi izinkomo zasendle, bese alithumela ividi kweminye inkomo kanye nabantu. Ukusabalala kwezifo ezisaphakathi kwenzeka lapho amakhanda ahlanganiswe nabantu kanye nezinkomo. Lena yinhlobo ebanzi kakhulu yokuphunyuka e-Afrika. Ukusabalala kwezifo ezidolobhaneni kungadala izifo ezinkulu lapho abantu abagulayo bayithumela ividi ezindaweni ezinkulu ezinezakhiwo eziningi kanye namakhanda amaningi, futhi lapho abantu abanenani elincane lokuvikelwe. Kwakhishwa izingxenye zezifo ezweni elingenayo lezi zifo ngabantu abahamba abagulile.

translations.source: However, the disease can only spread easily to a new country if there are mosquito species able to transmit it, specific climatic conditions, and the animal reservoir needed to maintain it. Symptoms: Yellow fever can present with a wide range of symptoms and severity. Once contracted, the yellow fever virus incubates in the body for 3–6 days. Many people do not experience symptoms, but when these do occur, the most common are fever, muscle pain with prominent backache, headache, loss of appetite, and nausea or vomiting. In most cases, symptoms disappear after 3–4 days.
translations.reference: Kodwa ke, lesi sifo singasakazeka kalula ezweni elisha kuphela uma kunezinhlobo zomiyane ezikwazi ukusidlulisela, izimo ezithile zezulu, kanye nedamu lezilwane elidingekayo ukuze lisilondoloze. Izimpawu: iYellow fever ingaba nezinhlobonhlobo zezimpawu kanye nobukhulu. Uma selingenile, igciwane leYellow fever lifukamela emzimbeni izinsuku ezingu-3-6. Abantu abaningi ababi nazo izimpawu, kodwa uma lokhu kwenzeka, okuvame kakhulu imfiva, ubuhlungu bemisipha obunomgogodla ogqamile, ikhanda elibuhlungu, ukungakuthandi ukudla, isicanucanu noma ukuhlanza. Ezimweni eziningi, izimpawu ziyanyamalala ngemva kwezinsuku ezingu-3-4.
translations.hypothesis: Noma kunjalo, leli nkinga ingasetshenziswa kalula ezweni elisha uma kukhona izinhlobo zezinduku ezikwazi ukuyisabalalisa, uma kukhona izimo zamafu ezifanele, kanye negumbi lwayo ezilwandle okudingekile ukuze ihlale ibukhona. Izimpawu: Ukugula okubizwa nge-"yellow fever" kungabonisa izimpawu eziningi nezinga lobunzima. Uma kuthathwe, igciwane le-"yellow fever" ligcina emzimbeni izinsuku ezingu-3 kuya kweziyi-6. Abaningi abantu abangaqiniseki ngempawu, kodwa uma lezi zimpawu zivele, ezivamile kakhulu zifaka ukushisa, ubuhlungu bemisipha nombili omkhulu, ubuhlungu kwi-gqoko, ukulahlekelwa kwenhliziyo yokudla, kanye nokugula noma ukugula. Kakhulu, lezi zimpawu ziyashiya ngemuva izinsuku ezingu-3 kuya kweziyi-4.

translations.source: A small percentage of patients enter a second, more toxic phase within 24 hours of recovering from initial symptoms. High fever returns and several body systems are affected, usually the liver and kidneys. In this phase, people are likely to develop jaundice (yellowing of the skin and eyes, hence the name yellow fever), dark urine, and abdominal pain with vomiting. Bleeding can occur from the mouth, nose, eyes, or stomach. Half of these patients die within 7–10 days.Yellow fever is difficult to diagnose, especially during the early stages.
translations.reference: Iphesenti elincane leziguli lingena esigabeni sesibili, esinobuthi obuthe xaxa phakathi namahora angama-24 ukululama ezimpawini zokuqala. Ukubuya komkhuhlane ophezulu kanye nezinhlelo zomzimba eziningana ziyathinteka, ngokuvamile isibindi nezinso. Kulesi sigaba, abantu kungenzeka babe ne-jaundice (isikhumba namehlo sibe phuzi, yingakho kuqanjwe iYellow fever), umchamo omnyama, nobuhlungu besisu obuhambisana nokuhlanza. Ukopha kungase kwenzeke emlonyeni, ekhaleni, emehlweni, noma esiswini. Ingxenye yalezi ziguli ifa phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-7-10. iYellow fever kunzima ukuyixilonga, ikakhulukazi phakathi nezigaba zokuqala.
translations.hypothesis: Umnumunyo omancane wabadlali bangena esigabeni sesibili, esiyingozi kakhulu, ngaphakathi kwehora ezinkulu ezingu-24 ngemuva kokululama ezimpawu zokuqala. Ukushisa okukhulu kubuyela futhi izinhlelo eziningi zomzimba zithintwa, ngokuvamile ileba kanye namandla. Kulesi sigaba, abantu banokuthuthukiswa kwe-jaundice (ukushaya kombala obuhlaza okukhulu kwamasiko nezindlebe, ngakho-ke igama elithi "yellow fever"), itiyosi emnyama, kanye nobunyembezi obunzima nombhobho. Ukungcola kungaphuma emlonyeni, naseni, ezindlebeni, noma esifudlwane. Iphunga labo badlali abangaphakathi kuleli phuzu lifile ngaphakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-7-10. Ukuhlaziya kwe-"yellow fever" kunzima, ikakhulukazi ekuqaleni.

translations.source: More severe cases can be confused with severe malaria, leptospirosis, viral hepatitis (especially fulminant forms), other haemorrhagic fevers, infection with other flaviviruses (such as dengue haemorrhagic fever) and poisoning. Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) testing in blood and urine can sometimes detect the virus in early stages of the disease. In later stages, testing to identify antibodies is needed (IgM). Treatment: Yellow fever infections can cause serious illness and can be fatal in severe cases. Early supportive treatment in hospitals improves survival rates.
translations.reference: Izimo ezinzima kakhulu zingadideka nomalaleveva onzima, ileptospirosis, iviral hepatitis (ikakhulukazi amafomu agcwele), eminye imfiva yokopha, ukungenwa amanye amagciwane eflavivirus (afana nedengue haemorrhagic fever) kanye nobuthi. Ukuhlolwa kwePolymerase chain reaction (PCR) egazini nasemchamweni ngezinye izikhathi kungathola igciwane ezigabeni zokuqala zesifo. Ezigabeni zakamuva, ukuhlolwa ukuhlonza amasosha omzimba kuyadingeka (IgM). Ukwelashwa: Izifo zeYellow fever zingabangela ukugula okubi kakhulu futhi zingabulala ezimweni ezimbi kakhulu. Ukwelashwa okusekela kusenesikhathi ezibhedlela kuthuthukisa amazinga okusinda.
translations.hypothesis: Izimo ezinzulu kakhulu zingafakelwa yezifo ezinkulu, njenge-malaria, i-leptospirosis, i-hepatitis eyomile (ikakhulukazi izinhlobo ezinkulu), ezinye izifo zokoma, ukugaywa kwezinye izivirisi ze-flavivirus (njenge-dengue haemorrhagic fever), kanye nokugaywa. Ukuhlolwa kwe-polymerase chain reaction (PCR) emzimbeni nasezinswini kungase kube nakho ukuthola isivirisi ekuqaleni kwesifo. Emeqinisweni esikhathi eside, kudingeka ukuhlolwa ukuze kutholwe ama-antibody (i-IgM). Ukwelashwa: Ukugaywa kwe-yellow fever kungabangela ukugula okukhulu futhi kungaba nomthelela ongcolile ezimweni ezinkulu. Ukwelashwa okuyisisekelo ekuqaleni ezibhedlela kuthuthukisa amathuba okuhlala.

translations.source: There is currently no specific anti-viral drug for yellow fever, but specific care to treat dehydration, fever, and liver and kidney failure improves outcomes. Associated bacterial infections can be treated with antibiotics. Patients need to stay under mosquito nets during the day to limit the risk of spreading to others through mosquito bites. Vaccination is the single most important measure for preventing yellow fever. The prevention of outbreaks can only be achieved if the majority of the population is immunized.
translations.reference: Okwamanje awukho umuthi othize we-antiviral we-yellow fever, kodwa ukunakekelwa okukhethekile ukwelapha ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni, imfiva, nokwehluleka kwesibindi nezinso kuthuthukisa imiphumela. Izifo ezihambisana namagciwane zingelashwa ngama-antibiotics. Iziguli kudingeka zihlale ngaphansi kwamanethi omiyane phakathi nosuku ukuze kukhawulelwe ingozi yokusakazeka kwabanye ngokulunywa omiyane. Ukugoma kuyisinyathelo esisodwa esibaluleke kakhulu sokuvimbela iyellow fever. Ukuvimbela ukuqubuka kungafezwa kuphela uma iningi labantu ligonywa.
translations.hypothesis: Kukho okokugcwele okuthile okwelashwe ngalo ukugula kwe-yellow fever, kodwa ukunakekelwa okukhethekile ukuphatha ukuntuleka kwamanzi, ubushwa, kanye nokwehluleka kwe-liver kanye ne-kidney kuthuthukisa imiphumela. Izifo zombuthano ezihlobene zingalaliswa ngamakhambi amabhithibhithi. Iziguli kumele zihlale ngaphansi kwamasethi amagobolondo ngosuku ukuze kuncishiswe ingozi yokusabalalisa ukugula kubanye ngamaphunga amagobolondo. Ukugaywa ngengubo yokuqapha kubaluleke kakhulu ekwelashweni kwe-yellow fever. Ukugcina izifo ezingaphazami kungatholakala kuphela uma iningi labantu kugaywe.

translations.source: The yellow fever vaccine is safe and affordable, and a single dose provides life-long immunity against the disease. People who recover from yellow fever infection are also protected for life. Read more about the yellow fever vaccine. Mosquito control can also help to prevent yellow fever and is vital in situations where vaccination coverage is low or the vaccine is not immediately available. Mosquito control includes eliminating sites where mosquitoes can breed and killing adult mosquitoes and larvae by using insecticides in areas with high mosquito density.
translations.reference: Umuthi wokugomela iyellow fever uphephile futhi uyathengeka, futhi umthamo owodwa unikeza ukugonywa impilo yonke ngokumelene nesifo. Abantu abelulama ekuthelelekeni ngeyellow fever nabo bavikelekile impilo yabo yonke. Funda kabanzi ngomgomo wokugomela iyellow fever. Ukulawula omiyane kungasiza futhi ekuvimbeleni iyellow fever futhi kubalulekile ezimeni lapho ukugoma kuncane noma umgomo ungatholakali ngokushesha. Ukulawula omiyane kuhlanganisa ukuqeda izindawo lapho omiyane bengazala khona futhi babulale omiyane abadala nezibungu ngokusebenzisa izibulala zinambuzane ezindaweni ezinomiyane abaningi.
translations.hypothesis: I-vakasini yomdlavuza ohlaza iphephile futhi ethengekayo, futhi idosi eyodwa inikeza ukuzivikela okuphakade kuleli nkinga. Abantu abaphulukile kuleli nkinga yomdlavuza ohlaza nabo bavikelwe kuze kube phakade. Funda kabanzi ngale vakasini yomdlavuza ohlaza. Ukulawulwa kwamahlalathini kungasiza ekwenzeni ukuvikelwa komdlavuza ohlaza futhi kubalulekile ezimeni lapho ukufakwa kwevakasini kungaphansi noma uma ivakasini ayitholakali ngokushesha. Ukulawulwa kwamahlalathini kubandakanya ukususa izindawo lapho amahlalathini angakhula khona kanye nokubulala amahlalathini amakhulu kanye nezimbovane ngokusebenzisa izinto ezibulala amahlalathini ezindaweni ezinezinkomo eziningi.

translations.source: Community involvement through activities, such as cleaning household drains and covering water containers where mosquitoes can breed is an important and effective way to control mosquitoes.
translations.reference: Ukuzibandakanya komphakathi ngemisebenzi, njengokuhlanza imisele yasendlini kanye nokuvala izitsha zamanzi lapho omiyane bengazalana khona kuyindlela ebalulekile nesebenzayo yokulawula omiyane.
translations.hypothesis: Ukubamba iqhaza lomphakathi ngezinto ezithile, njengokuhlanzwa kwamaphunga ekhaya kanye nokufakwa kwengubo ezikhongozweni zamanzi lapho amagundwane angakhula khona, kuyindlela ebalulekile futhi ephumelelayo yokulawula amagundwane.

translations.source: People with medical needs are “left behind in pain” reveals new report The World Health Organization (WHO) has published a new report on access to morphine for medical use, which describes how the global distribution of morphine, as a vital pain medicine, is unequal and does not fulfil the medical need. The report, titled “Left behind in pain”, highlights the problems in access to this essential medicine and offers actions to improve safe access through balanced policy. Despite morphine being an effective and relatively low-cost medicine for relieving strong pain, listed since 1977 in the first edition of the WHO Model list of Essential Medicines, the disparity in access across countries is stark. There is a 5- to 63-fold difference in the estimated median consumption of morphine between high-income countries and lower income countries.
translations.reference: Abantu abanezidingo zokwelashwa "bashiywa ngemuva ezinhlungwini" kuveza umbiko omusha Inhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO) isishicilele umbiko omusha wokungena kumofini yokusetshenziselwa ukwelapha, echaza ukuthi isetshenziswa kanjani imofini, njengomuthi obalulekile wezinhlungu, awulingani futhi awusigcwalisi isidingo sokwelapha. Umbiko osihloko "Bashiywe ngemuva ezinhlungwini' uveze izinkinga zokungena kulokhu kulashwa okubalulekile futhi unikeza izenzo zokwenza ngcono ukuphepha kokungena ngenqubomgomo eyisilinganiso. Ngaphandle kokuthi imofini iyasebenza futhi ibiza kancane ukuthi ingadambisa izinhlungu kakhulu, isohlweni kusuka ngo-1977 kuhlobo lokuqala lweWHO Model list of Essential Medicines, inkinga yokungena kumazwe onke inzima. Kukhona ukwahlukana kwefolidi okungu-5 kuya ku-63 esilinganisweni semedeni yokugcina imofini phakathi kwamazwe anemali engenayo ephezulu kanye namazwe anemali engenayo encane.
translations.hypothesis: Abantu abanezidingo zezokwelashwa "bashiywe ngaphandle kokwelashwa ngobuhlungu," kusho umbiko omusha. Uhlelo Lwamazwe Omhlaba Lwempilo (WHO) ulukhishile umbiko omusha mayelana nokufinyelela kumorphine ukusetshenziswa kwezokwelashwa, owachaza ukuthi ukusatshalaliswa komorphine, njengomuthi onempilo obalulekile wokulungisa ubuhlungu, akulinganisi futhi akuhlangabezani nezidingo zezokwelashwa. Umbiko, obizwa ngokuthi "Bashiywe ngaphandle kokwelashwa ngobuhlungu," ubonisa izinkinga ekufinyeleleni kulo mthathi obalulekile futhi unikeza izindlela zokuthuthukisa ukufinyelela okuphephile ngokusetshenziswa kwemigomo ehlelekile. Nakuba umorphine ungumuthi osebenza futhi othengiswayo ngentengo ephansi ekulungiseni ubuhlungu obukhulu, obubhalwe kusukela ngo-1977 kwi-edishini yokuqala yohlu lwe-WHO lwamathathu abalulekile, ukungalingani ekufinyeleleni kulo emazweni ahlukene kubalulekile. Kukhona umehluko osemkhulu kakhulu, okuyi-5 kuya ku-63, ekulinganiseni okulinganisiwe lokusetshenziswa komorphine phakathi kwamazwe anentengo ephezulu kanye namazwe anentengo ephansi.

translations.source: Consumption pattern varies significantly across countries of similar wealth; it does not correspond to medical need, as indicated by the estimated number of days people are in pain or suffer with severe shortness of breath for people with a terminal illness. This data echoes that of the 2018 Lancet Commission which described the lack of access to pain relief medication as ‘one of the most heinous, hidden inequities in global health’ with the richest 10% of countries possessing 90% of distributed morphine-equivalent opioids. “Leaving people in pain when effective medicines are available for pain management, especially in the context of end-of-life care, should be a cause of serious concern for policy-makers,” says Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General for Medicines and Health Products. “We must urgently advocate for safe and timely access to morphine for those in medical need through balanced policy, everywhere.”
translations.reference: Ukugcina iphethini kuyahlukana kakhulu emazweni onke ngokufana komcebo; Akuhambisani nesidingo sokwelapha,njengoba kuveziwe ngenamba ehlawumbelesiwe yabantu abasezinhlungwini noma abakhathazeke ngokuphelelwa ngumoya okukhulu okunokufa okubulalayo. Le datha ivumelana naleyo ye-2018 Lancet Commission eyayichaza ngokuthola umuthi wokudambisa izinhlungu njengomunye oyinkinga kakhulu,ukungalingani okufihliwe kwezempilo yomhlaba ngokuceba kwa-10% wamazwe ano-90% wokuhambisa imofini elingana neophiyodi. "Ukushiya abantu besezinhlungwini uma ikhona imithi esebenzayo ukuthi umele izinhlungu ikakhulukazi kungqikkithi yokuphela kokunakekelwa kwempilo, kumele kube yisizathu sokukhathazeka okukhulu kubenzi benqubomgomo," kusho uDkt Yukiko Nakatani, Umsizi woMqondisi Jikelele weWHO weZokwelapha neMikhiqizo yeZempilo. "Kumele sibamele ngokushesha ukuze baphephe nokungena ngesikhathi kumofini kulabo abanezidingo zeokulashwa ngenqubomgomo enesilinganiso, kuyo yonke indawo."
translations.hypothesis: Ukutshalwa kwezinto eziningi kuhluka kakhulu phakathi kwezwe ngalunye, ngaphandle kokuthi azinazo izimali ezifanayo; akuhambisani nesidingo sezokwelapha, njengoba kuboniswa inombolo elilinganisiwe yezinsuku abantu abathola ngayo ubuhlungu noma abanesikhukhumi esikhulu kakhulu, ikakhulukazi kubantu abagulwe kakhulu. Lolu daba lufana nalolu lweKomishini ye-Lancet ka-2018, eyachaza ukuntuleka kokufinyelela kumithi yokulapha ubuhlungu njengoba "elinye lamaphutha amakhulu, afihliwe ezempilo emhlabeni jikelele," kanti izifunda ezingu-10 ezinezimali ezinkulu kakhulu zibanzi nge-90% yomuthi ogunyazwe we-morphine. "Ukushiya abantu bebuhlungu uma kunemithi efanele yokulapha ubuhlungu etholakala, ikakhulukazi kule ndawo yokunakekelwa kwabagulwe kakhulu, kufanele kube yinto ekhathazayo kakhulu kubaphathi bezinqubomgomo," kusho uDkt. Yukiko Nakatani, iMbuyiseli Omkhulu Wezokwelapha kanye Nemikhiqizo Yezempilo e-WHO. "Kufanele siphimisise ngokushesha ukufinyelela okuphephile nokusheshayo kumuthi we-morphine kulabo abanesidingo sezokwelapha, ngokusebenzisa inqubomgomo efanele, kuwo wonke amapulazi."

translations.source: Reasons for the disparity Access to morphine for medical use is influenced by many interacting factors including enablers related to good governance, reliable/efficient procurement and supply processes, resource availability and capacity-building activities, along with barriers related to overly restrictive legislation and policies, inadequate service provision, and misinformed attitudes and perception. Given different country contexts, enablers, barriers and priorities for action vary; a stakeholder survey presented in this report, with respondents from 105 WHO Member States, confirms this variation. For example, irregular supply of morphine and other strong opioids at health facilities due to limited financing were commonly noted as a barrier in low- and middle-income countries compared to high-income countries. More than a third of respondents across all regions also noted barriers arising from legislative and regulatory factors while recognizing the importance of a legislative and regulatory framework in achieving safe access.
translations.reference: Izizathu zokungalingani. Ukuthola imofini ukuyisebenzisa ukwelapha kwenziwa izinto eziningi ezixhumanayo okufaka ukukwazi okuhlobene nokuphatha kahle,ukwethembeka nokuthenga okufanele nezinhlelo zesaplayi, ukubakhona kwezinsizakusebenza nemisebenzi yokukwwazi yamabhilidi ehambisana nezivimbo ezihlobene nemithetho yokuvimba eyeqile nenqubomgomo, umsebenzi ongagculisi nokuzizwa kolwazi okungeyilo nendlela yokucabanga. Ngezingqikithi zamazwe ahlukene, abenzi,izivimbi kanye nokuhamba phambili ukwenza kuyahlukana,ababambisani bocwaningo olwenziwe lwathulwa kulombiko, nabaphendulile ku-105 WHO Members States, kuqinisekisa lokhu kwehlukana. Isibonelo, ukungasaplayi ngendlela kwemfini kanye namanye ama-ophiyodi aqinile ezindaweni zezempilo ngenxa yomkhawulo wezimali kuqapheleke ngokufana njengomngcele kumazwe anemali engenayo encane nephakathi nendawo uma uqhathanisa namazwe anemali engenayo enkulu. Ngaphezu kwamakota amathathu kwabaphendulile kuzona zonke izifunda nokuqaphela izivimbo okunyuswa ezothetho nezinto zokulawula ngesikhathi sibona ukubaluleka komhlahlandlela womthetho nemigomo ekutholeni ukungena okuphephile.
translations.hypothesis: Izizathu zokungalingani: Ukufinyelela kumorpheji ukuze kusetshenziswe ezokwelapha kuthintekayo ngezinto eziningi ezihambisana, okubalwa phakathi kwazo izinto ezisiza ezihlobene nokubusa okuhle, izinqubo zokuthenga nezokuhlinzeka ezinokwethenjwa futhi ezisebenzayo, ukutholakala kwezinsiza kanye nemikhuba yokukhulisa amakhono, kanye nezinto ezimelayo ezihlobene nomthetho nezinqubomgomo ezinqubomgomo kakhulu, ukuhlinzekwa kwezinsizakalo engcono, kanye nemibono nemibono engalungile. Ngenxa yezimo ezihlukene ezweni ngalinye, izinto ezisiza, izinto ezimelayo kanye nezinto ezibalulekile zokuthatha izinyathelo ziyahlukahluka; ucwaningo lwabaxhasi olubonisiwe kuleli phaphostshi, ngabaxhasi abavela ezweni elingu-105 elilungu le-WHO, luqinisekisa le kulungile. Ngokwesibonelo, ukuhlinzekwa okungavamile komorpheji nezinye izinto ezibuthaziyo ezibukhulu ezikhungweni zezempilo ngenxa yezimali ezilinganiselwe, zibonwe njengezinto ezimelayo ezweni elingezona elinamandla kazwelonke uma kuqhathaniswa nezwe elinamandla kazwelonke. Futhi, abaxhasi abangaphezu kwengxenye yesithathu kuzo zonke izifunda bathi nezinto ezimelayo ezivela ezindleleni zomthetho kanye nezokulawula, kuyilapho baqaphela ukubaluleka kwesakhiwo somthetho kanye nokulawulwa ekufinyeleleni okuphephile.

translations.source: Unduly restrictive requirements could hamper patient access because they impede the flow of supply or make prescribing and dispensing difficult for health-care professionals. It is important to note that concerns about the potential harmful effects of opioids are valid, such as their potential to lead to opioid use disorder. For this reason, a certain amount of caution about the potential harms of opioid use (e.g. use in chronic non-cancer pain) is important for public health insofar as its use is well-informed and proportionate to risks. Such concerns should not undermine the benefits of opioid use when clinically indicated and when used safely by trained professionals. Opportunities for actionThe report presents a complementary set of areas for action that aim to improve safe access to morphine.
translations.reference: Ukungabi nesiqiniseko kwezidingo zezivimbo kungavimba ukungena kweziguli ngoba kungavimba ukuhamba kwesaplayi noma ukwenza imvume nokuhambisa kanzima kwabasebenzi bokunakekela ezempilo. Kubalulekile ukuqaphela ukukhathazeka ngemithelela enamandla engalimaza i-opiyodi okuyiyo, njengamanlda okuholela ukugula kokusebenzisa ophiyodi. Ngalesi sizathu, inani elithile lokuqaphela ngokulimala okungenzeka ngokusebenzisa ama-ophiyodi (isibonelo ukusebenzisa kumahlalakhona ezinhlungu zomdlavuza) kubalulekile kwezempilo yomphakathi kangangokusebenzisa wazi kahle nokuqondene nengcuphe. Lokhu kukhathazeka akumele kuthathe kancane izinzuzo zokusebenzisa i-opiyodi uma kuveziwe ngokwezempilo futhi uma kusetshenziswe ngokuphepha yizisebenzi eziqeqeshiwe. Amathuba okwenza umbiko wethula isethi ehambisanayo ezindaweni zokwenza ezihlose ukwenza kangcono ukuphepha kokungena kumofini.
translations.hypothesis: Imigomo eqinile kakhulu ingaphazamisa ukufinyelela kwegciwane ngoba ivimbele ukuhamba kwempahla noma yenze kube nzima ochwepheshe bezempilo ukwenza izicelo zokwelashwa nokunikeza imithi. Kubalulekile ukukhumbula ukuthi ukukhathazeka mayelana nemiphumela emibi engaba khona kwe-opioids kuyalungile, njengokuthi kungase kube nomthelela wokuthi umuntu azithande futhi azifake kuleyo mithi. Ngenxa yalokho, kubalulekile ukuba nomzamo wokuzindla mayelana nemiphumela emibi engaba khona yokusetshenziswa kwe-opioids (isb. ukusetshenziswa kule mithi ekuluthe lwengcweti elingakhona). Lokhu kubalulekile empilweni yomphakathi, ngalokho ukusetshenziswa kwayo kufanele kuhlale kulandelelwe yimiqondiso efanele futhi kungafani nomngcipheko. Lezi zinkinga akufanele zimele ithuba lokuthi le mithi inikeze inzuzo uma kudingeka ngokwezokwelapha futhi uma isetshenziswa ngokuphephile ochwepheshe abaqeqeshiwe. Amathuba okwenza okuthile: Lolu hlelo lubonisa izindawo eziningi ezihambisana ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukufinyelela okuphephile kumuthi i-morphine.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: Lokhu kufaka ukwenza kwesikali esincane sesifunda noma izinhlelo ezinkulu zesizwe zokwenza ngcono ukuthola imofini yokusebenzisa ukwelapha nokufakwa kwemisebenzi ebalulekile nemikhiqino yokunakekela kwephakathivu lokho kwenziwe ngokweWHO Model List of Essential Medicines kanye neWHO Essentila Package of Palliative Care. Lokhu kuphinde kufake ukwenza ngcono ukuphatha, ukuveza ukuthenga nohlelo lokusaplaya ukubhekana nokungasebenzi kahle, ukwenza ngcono izinsizakusebenza njengoxhasomali oluzinzile, ukwandisa amakhono okusebenza kwabasebenzi bezempilo, nokuqwashisa kukhona kokubili ukuzuza namandla okulimaza okusebenzisa i-ophiyodi. Ukuphumelela kwalezizenzo kuzohlanganisa ukubambisana nokusebenzisana kubona bonke ababambisani ezweni,esifundeni kanye nasemazingeni omhlaba.
translations.hypothesis: Lezi zindlela zifaka ukusebenzisa izinhlelo ezincane ezisezingeni lendawo noma ezweni lonke zokusenza kube lula ukufinyelela kumorpheko ezinsimini zokwelapha, kanye nokuhlinzeka ngezinsizakalo nemikhiqizo ezibalulekile yokunakekelwa kwabagulayo, okuhlanganiswe ngokuya ngohlaziyeko lwe-WHO lwemikhiqizo yezokwelapha ebalulekile kanye nephakethe elibalulekile le-WHO lokunakekelwa kwabagulayo. Futhi zifaka ukuthuthukisa ukulawulwa, ukwenza kube lula inqubo yokuthenga nokuhlinzeka ukuze kuxazululwe noma yimiphi imikhakha engcono, ukuthuthukisa ukuxhaswa, njengemali eqinile, ukwandisa amakhono abasebenzi bezempilo, kanye nokukhuthaza ukuqwashwa mayelana nezinzuzo kanye nezingozi ezingaba khona zokusebenzisa ama-opioid. Impumelelo yalezi zinto izoxhomekwa ekubambisaneni nasekuhlanganyeleni phakathi kwayo yonke into ehilelekile ezingeni lezwe, ezindaweni, kanye nomhlaba wonke.

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the world’s deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs – which cause 74% of all deaths globally – due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS.
translations.reference: Iziqhingi ezincane zivuma icebo elikhulu lokwenza kuzifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo kanye nezempilo yengqondo. Namhlanje i-2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCD) neZempilo zeNgqondo kwethuliwe ukubhekana nezinye zezifo ezibulalayo emhlabeni, eSmall Island Developing States (SIDS) ikakhulukazi abasengcupheni. Isimemezelo singumphumela obalulekile kweSIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Disease (NCD) neZempilo zeNgqondo,ezokwenzeka kusuka mhlaka-14-16 kuNhlangulana izosingathwa yiNhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO), iPan Ameriacan Health Organisation (PAHO) kanye neGovernment Barbados. I-SIDS inomthelela omkhulu yiNCD - okudala 74% wakho konke ukufa emhlabeni-ngenxa yokuncika ekudleni okulethwayo, iimithelela yezomnotho kanye nezinkinga zesimo sezulu. Umbiko omusha weWHO ukhombisa ukuthi angu 8 kwawu 15 amazwe angaphezu kwengcuphe engu 30% wokufa singakashayi isikhathi ngenxa yesifo esiphathelene nenhliziyo, umdlavuza,ushukela,noma isifo sezokuphefumula okungamahlalakhona okuyi SIDS.
translations.hypothesis: Izizinda ezincane zivumile uhlelo olukhulu lokusebenza mayelana nezifo ezingatholakali futhi nempilo yengqondo. Namuhla, kwasungulwa i-2023 Bridgetown Declaration mayelana nezifo ezingatholakali (NCDs) kanye nempilo yengqondo, ukuze kuxazululwe ezinye zezifo ezibulalayo kakhulu emhlabeni ezifana nazo ezifana nezifo zekhadi, ukudabuka, ubulungu, kanye nezifo zombilo ezinkulu, ezifana nalokho okwenzeka ezizindeni ezincane ezithuthukayo (SIDS), ezibuthakathaka kakhulu. Le Declaration iyinto ebalulekile evela kwi-SIDS Ministerial Conference mayelana nezifo ezingatholakali (NCDs) kanye nempilo yengqondo, eyayinqume kusukela ngomhlaka 14 kuya ku-16 Juni, eyayiholwa ngokubambisana yi-World Health Organization (WHO), i-Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) kanye noHulumeni waseBarbados. Izizinda ezincane zithinteke kakhulu yizifo ezingatholakali – ezibanga u-74% wazo zonke izingosi emhlabeni – ngenxa yokuthembeleka kwawo kokudla okungenayo, ukuthonya kwezentengiselwano kanye nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu. Ingxenye entsha yombiko we-WHO ibonisa ukuthi kwezifunda ezingu-15 ezinezinkulungwane ezingu-30 ngenhla yobungozi bokufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi ngenxa yezifo zekhadi, ukudabuka, ubulungu, noma izifo zombilo ezilukhuni, ezingu-8 yizo ezifana ne-SIDS.

translations.source: The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Ngaphezu kwamazwe angu 10 anezinga eliphezulu lokukhuluphala ngokweqile emhlabeni wonke angu SIDS kuPacific, lapho kungaphezu kuka 45% abantu abadala abaphila ngokukhuluphala okweqile. Izimo zempilo yengqondo zijwayelekile emazweni eSIDS, okukhahlazeke isibalo sabantu esibalelwa ku-15.2% eCaribean no11.2% wesibalo sabantu ePacific. Abantu abanezimo zempilo zengqondo babhekene nokufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi okuyingcuphe enkulu, okubandakanya izimo zempilo yesiqu okungabhekwanango nazo kanye nokuzibulala. Ihlazo, ukuntuleka kwabasebenzi abangongoti nomthelela wokuguquka kwesimo sezulu kunomthelela esimweni esiyingqinamba kuSIDS okudinga ukunakwa okuphuthumayo. I-2023 Bridgetown Declaration iveza amagxathu anzima ukubhekana nokwahluka kwenhlalakahle, indawo, ezomnotho kanye nezinkinga zomnotho eziholela kuNCD nezimo zempilo yengqondo.
translations.hypothesis: Izizwe ezingu-10 ezinezinkinga ezinkulu kakhulu zokugula ngokugqwala emhlabeni jikelele ngamazwe amancane angamapulazi (SIDS) ase-Pacific, lapho abantu abangaphezu kuka-45% abakhulile abagula ngokugqwala. Izinkinga zezempilo yengqondo ziyinto evamile ezweni lama-SIDS, zithinta cishe i-15.2% yomphakathi eCaribbean kanye ne-11.2% yomphakathi e-Pacific. Abantu abagulwa izinkinga zezempilo yengqondo bayibona ingozi enkulu yokuphila ngaphambi kwesikhathi, okubalwa ukugula kwezempilo zokwakheka okungalungiswa kanye nokuzibulala. Ukucatshangwa, ukuntuleka kwabasebenzi abakhobonakalayo kanye nomthelela ushintsho lwekilayithi zibangela isimo esinzima ezweni lama-SIDS, okudinga ukunakekelwa ngokushesha. Isitatimende saseBridgetown sango-2023 sibaluleka kakhulu ekuxazululweni kwezinkinga eziningi ezihlobene nomphakathi, ezemvelo, ezomnotho kanye nezombusazwe eziholela ekuguleni kwezifo ezingalungiseki (NCDs) kanye nezinkinga zezempilo yengqondo.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led ‘for’ and ‘by’ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. “Bold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,” said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. “Funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.” "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Kwakhiwengohlelo lwangaphakathi oluholela yiSIDS, ukumenyezelwa kuveza ukuthi amaNCD kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo ngeke kubhekwane nazo ngendlela ngaphandle kokuphendula izinkinga zesimo sezulu. "Ukwenza okugqamile esimweni sezulu sethu,impilo enhle,ukuphila okuncike ekuxoliseni nokuphela kabusha ezezimali zomhlaba ukuvula amabhiliyoni kutshalomali ngesikhathi wenza okuncane ukujezisa emazweni asathuthuka ukuthi akhokhe izikweletu," kusho iNdlovukazi uMia Amor Mottley.UNdunankulu waseBarbados. "Uxhasomali lokuguquka kwesimo sezulu nokuphindeka emazweni ahlupheke kakhulu nakho kubalulekile, nezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo nempilo yengqondo kumele kubophezeleke." "Izingqinamba ezibhekene neSmall Island Developing States kuxhumene futhi kunezinto eziningi. Ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukuguguka kwendawo, ukungalingani kwezomnotho nenhlalakahle kanye nabazimisele bezomnotho zempilo ukwehlisa umthwalo weNCD nezimo zempilo yengqondo," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreysus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO.
translations.hypothesis: Kwenziwe ngohlelo olubanzi oluqhutshwa yi-SIDS (ama-Small Island Developing States), leli sicelo ligcizelela ukuthi izifo ezingatholakali kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo azikwazi ukulungiswa kahle ngaphandle kokubhekana nenkinga yezinguquko zezulu. "Ukuthatha izinyathelo ezibalulekile mayelana nezinguquko zezulu, impilo enhle kanye nokukhululeka kuxhomekile ekulungisweni nasekuhlelweni kabusha kwezindleko zamazwe ngamazwe ukuze kuvulwe izigidi zokutshalwa kwezimali, kuyilapho kwenza kube lula amazwe athuthukayo ukukhokha izikweletu azo," kusho uMnuz Mia Amor Mottley, iPhini likaMongameli waseBarbados. "Ukuxhasa ukulungiswa nezindlela zokuphatha ukuguquka kwezulu ezizweni ezithintekile kakhulu kubalulekile, kanti kufakwa nezifo ezingatholakali kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo." "Izinkinga ezibhekwe yi-Small Island Developing States zihlobene futhi zinezici eziningi. Ukuguquka kwezulu, ukuhlazwa kwemvelo, ukungalingani kwezomthethosisekelo kanye nezomnotho, kanye nezinto ezihlobene nokukhishwa kwempilo, zenza kube nzima kakhulu ukulungisa izifo ezingatholakali kanye nezimo zempilo yengqondo," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, iSikhulu Jikelele se-WHO.

translations.source: "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for ‘loss and damage’ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: "Ngaphandle komkhawulo wezinsiza kusebenza kanye nezivimbo zomhlaba, lamazwe asekhombise ukubekezela okuncomekayo ebusweni bokwahlukana. Ndawonye kumele senze indlela enesisekelo sokulingana, ukubekezela nokugcineka. Kumele siqinise izinhlelo zezempilo, sandise ukuvikela kanye nezinqumo zokuthola ngokushesha, sihambise phambili ukuhlangana kweNCD nemisebenzi yempilo yengqondo kwezokunakekelwa kwempilo yokuqala. "Umqondisi Jikelele uphinde wafunga ukuthi iWHO izosebenza ukuhlanganisa izinsizakusebenza zezimali ukudevelopha amandla okumelana nesimo sezulu, izindawo zokunakekelwa kwempilo ezindaweni ezigcinekile kuSIDS. I-WHO izoqhubeka imele ukulahlekelwa nokonakala, uxhasomali lokuguquka kwesimo sezulu ukujwayela nokwehlisa ingcuphe emazweni anemali engenayo encane.
translations.hypothesis: "Noma kunjalo ukuthi lezi zizwe zinomthamo omncane yezinsiza kanye nemingeni yendawo, zibonise ukumelene okumangalisayo nezinkinga. Ndawonye, kufanele sakhe indlela esekelwe ekulinganeni, ekuguquleni, kanye nokusimama. Kufanele sikhulise izinhlelo zezempilo, sithuthukise izindlela zokuqapha nokutholwa kwesikhathi esikhulunywe, futhi siqinise ukuhlanganiswa kwezinsiza zezifo ezingapheli kanye nezempilo yengqondo ezinhlelweni zempilo ezisemthethweni. "UMphathi Omkhulu uphinde wazibophezela ukuthi i-WHO izosebenza ekukhiqizeni izinsiza zzezimali ukuze kuthuthukiswe izikhungo zezempilo ezikwazi ukulwa ushintsho lwemvelo, futhi ezisimame kakhulu, ezweni lase-SIDS. I-WHO nayo izoqhubeka nokukhuthaza ukuxhaswa kwezimali "zokulahlekelwa nokulimazeka" ukuze kwenziwe ukutshalwa kwezimali ekulungisweni kanye nokunciphisa umthelela wezinguquko zengilazi ezizweni ezinzuzo ezincane.

translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populations’ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHO’s ‘best buys’ – a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. “SIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs.
translations.reference: Njenge ngxenye yokuvuma Isimemezelo, iSIDS yasayinda ukuthatha isuthi yokwenza, ukukhava izindawo njengokukhuluma nomphakathi wonke, ukuqhuba ukwenza, ukuthola utshalomali ukuhambisana nohulumeni bonke nokubala ukuqhubeka. Inkomfa iphinde yakhombisa ukuzibophezela okuthile kweSIDS kuNCD kanye nezempilo yengqondo okufaka ukwenza kangcono kokungena kwezokunakekelwa kwempilo yengqondo ezindaweni zokunakekela zokuqala, ukubuyekeza umthetho wokulawula ugwayi ukukhava okukagwayi nokwehlisa isibalo sabantu abadla usawoti noshukela kakhulu. Lezi zibophezelo zihambisana 'nokuthenga okuhle' kweWHO - isethi yokubiza kahle, ukungenelela okuncike kubufakazi kubhekane namaNCD. Uhla lokuthenga okuhle lusanda kubuyekezwa eMhlanganweni weZempilo woMhlaba ngoNhlaba ukufaka ukuvikela kwesibili kwemfiva, ukuphathwa kwesikhathi eside nokunzima kwesifo sofuba nesifo samahlalanjalo semithambo kanye nokungenelela okumbalwa kwesibeletho amabele, amafutha isibindi kanye nomdlavuza wobungane nokulashwa okukhulu komdlavuza kulabo abaphila neHIV. "I-SIDS eMelika iyaqhubeka ubuthaka obungaphezu kwamandla kumaNCD.
translations.hypothesis: Njengengxenye yokuqinisekiswa kwalesi silayizo, i-SIDS yazibophezele ekwenzeni izenzo eziningi, ezifakazelwe ezindaweni ezifana nokubandakanya yonke imiphakathi, ukusheshisa ukwenziwa, ukuthola izimali, ukuhambisana phakathi kwezinhlaka zikahulumeni, kanye nokubalwa kwendlela yokuthuthuka. Inkondlo yalo mbusho ibuye yaqhamuka nezibopho ezithile ze-SIDS mayelana nezifo ezingokwakhiwa ngobungo kanye nezempilo yengqondo, okubalwa kuzo ukuthuthukisa ukufinyelela ezinsizakalweni zempilo yengqondo ezikhungweni zokunakekelwa ezisemkhakheni wokuqala, ukubuyekeza imithetho yokulawula uthuli ukuze ifake nezinto ezithisiwe kanye nokuphefumula ngothuli, kanye nokunciphisa ukutshalwa kwezinsimbi nezisukara emphakathini. Lezi zibopho zihambisana "nezinto ezibalulekile" ze-WHO – isethi yezindlela ezisebenza futhi ezibanzi, ezisekelwe ezibonakalisiwe, zokusabalalisa izifo ezingokwakhiwa ngobungo. Uhlu lwalezi "zinto ezibalulekile" lubuyekeziwe muva nje eSibini Sezempilo Yihlabathi ngoMeyi, ukuze kufakwe ukwelashwa okwesibili kwezifo zokungcola, ukulawulwa kwezifo zokuphefumula ezisheshayo nezide, kanye nezindlela eziningi zokwelashwa kwezifo zengqondo, kwezifuba, kwezinzwa, zefuba, kanye nezifo zezingane, kanye nokwelashwa okuphelele kwezifo zokugaya kulabo abaphila ne-HIV. "I-SIDS eMelika isasala kakhulu kulezo zifo ezingokwakhiwa ngobungo."

translations.source: This Ministerial Conference comes at a unique time and will be key to amplifying the voice and needs of SIDS, bringing NCDs and mental health to the forefront of our priority list,” said Dr Jarbas Barbosa, PAHO Director, and WHO Regional Director for the Americas. “To build on this momentum, we must act now. PAHO is ready to support accelerated implementation of interventions in our region, including mainstreaming care for these conditions into primary health services and taking advantage of innovations such as digital health tools.” SIDS countries have a track record of driving global decision-making; their Port of Spain and SAMOA pathway agreements paved the way for the first-ever UN political declaration on NCDs in 2018. The conference and the Declaration will inform and shape forthcoming UN General Assembly High-Level Meetings on universal health coverage in September 2023 and on NCDs in 2025.
translations.reference: Le Nkomfa yoNgqongqoshe ifika ngesikhathi esehlukile futhi izoba okubalulekile kokukhulisa izwi nezidingo zeNCD kanye nempilo yengqondo kokuphambili ohlweni lwethu oluhamba phambili," kusho uDkt Jarbas Barbosa uMqondisi wePAHO noMqondisi weSifunda weWHO kuma-America. "Ukwakhela kulamandla, kumele senze manje. PAHO isikulungele ukweseka ukuqhubeka kokwenza kokungenelela esifundeni sethu, okufaka ukunakekela kokukhombisa kwalezizimo emsebenzini yezempilo yokuqala nokuthatha ithuba lokwenzakabusha njengamathuluzi ezempilo edijithali." Amazwe eSIDS anomlando wokuhambisa ukuthathwa kwezinqumo emhlabeni, iPort of Spain yabo neSAMOA indlea izivumelwano ezivule indlela yesimemezelo sezepolitiki ku-UN okokuqala ku-NCD ngo-2018. Inkomfa kanye neSimemezelo kuzokwazisa futhi kwakhe okuzayo kwe-UN General Assembly High Level Meetings ekukhavweni kwezempilo yomhlaba ngoMandulo 2023 nakumaNCD ngo-2025.
translations.hypothesis: Le Nkondlo yamaMinistri iza ngesikhathi esisodwa futhi izoba yinto ebalulekile ekukhuliseni izwi kanye nezidingo zeziZwe Ezincane ZamaSithando (SIDS), efaka izifo ezingalulami kanye nezempilo yengqondo phakathi kwezinto ezibalulekile kakhulu. "Ukuze sithuthukise lokhu, kufanele senze okuthile manje. I-PAHO ilungele ukuxhasa ukwenziwa ngokushesha kwezindlela zokusiza endaweni yethu, okubalwa ukufaka ukunakekelwa kwalezi zifo ezinsizakalweni zezempilo ezisemqoka kanye nokusebenzisa ubuhlukumezi obunjalo njengamathuluzi ezempilo edijithali." Izizwe ze-SIDS zinezimpumelelo ekuholeni ezinqumweni zezwe lonke; izivumelwano zabo ze-Port of Spain kanye ne-SAMOA zavelele endleleni yokuqinisekiswa kokuqala kwezombangazwe kweNhlangano yamaHlangano Kazwelonke (UN) mayelana nezifo ezingalulami ngo-2018. Le nkondlo kanye nalesi Ngxenye zizochaza futhi zenza kube ngcono izinkomishi zeNhlangano yamaHlangano Kazwelonke (UN) ezinkulu ezizokuba khona ngoSepthemba ka-2023 mayelana nokufakwa kwempilo yomuntu wonke kanye mayelana nezifo ezingalulami ngo-2025.

translations.source: WHO’s Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting ends with stirring call for worldwide action Delegates and representatives left the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting with a stirring call to action from its director Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall. As the multinational meeting, attended by some 300 key partners, came to an end in Geneva on Tuesday 13 June, Dr Fall urged participants to take on board the message that, “if we do not challenge ourselves, we cannot evolve and improve”. In a wide-ranging event held to review progress against the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, partners, donors, technical partners, institutions and country representatives reinforced their commitment to achieving an ambitious target: a world free from neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meeting’s primary theme centred around the vision of “One community delivering one Global NTD Programme”.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weWHO weGlobal Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme uphele nesimemezelo esijabulisayo sesenzo somhlaba wonke. Izihambeli kanye nabamele bashiye uMhlangano weGlobal Negleted Tropical Diseases Programme Partners ngesimemezelo esijabulisayo sokwenza okuphuma kuMqondisi waso uDkt Ibrahim Soce Fall. Njengomhlangano wamazwe amaningi, othanyelwe ababambisani ababalulekile abangu 300 owaphela eGeneva ngoLwesibili mhlaka-13 kuNhlangulana, uDkt Fall ucele ababambiqhaza ukuthi bathathe umyalezo othi, "uma singazifaki inqginamba thina ngeke size sishintshe noma sibe ngcono.". Ukwahlukana okukhulu komncimbi obanjiwe ukubheka ukuqhubeka okubhekeke nomgwaqobalazwe lwezifo ezinganakiwe ezijwayelekile 2021-2030 nokwenza ukuqonda kangcono kokusebenza kweNTD emhlabeni kuzona zombili izifo ezithile nezindlela zokujomba, ababambisani abaxhasi ababambisani bezobuchwepheshe izikhungo kanye nabamele izwe begcizelela ukuzibophezela kwabo ekutholeni okuqondiwe okugqugquzelayo, izwe elikhululekile ezifweni ezinganakiwe ezijwayelekile ngo-2030. Ingqikithi yokuqala yomhlangano yayigxile kumbono "weUmphakathi owodwa uletha Uhlelo lweGlobal NTD".
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano wezinkampani zeHhovisi Lomhlaba Wonke (WHO) mayelana nezifo ezithile ezitholakala ezindaweni eziningi uqede ngesikhuthazo esikhulu sokuthi kumele kwenziwe okuthile emhlabeni wonke. Abahlanganyeli kanye nabameleli baphumele kulo mhlangano wezinkampani zeHhovisi Lomhlaba Wonke mayelana nezifo ezithile ezitholakala ezindaweni eziningi benze ukuthi umqulu wabo ube yisikhuthazo sokuthi kumele kwenziwe okuthile, ngamagama kaDkt. Ibrahima Socé Fall, umholi walolu hlelo. Njengoba lo mhlangano omkhulu, owabanjwa eGeneva ngoLwesibili, 13 Juni, futhi owahambisana nabalingani ababalulekile abangaba ngu-300, ufezeka, uDkt. Fall ucele abahlanganyeli ukuthi bayamukele umyalezo othi, "uma singazimiseli, asikwazi ukuthuthuka futhi sithuthukise." Kulo mnotho omkhulu owenziwe ukubuyekeza intuthuko kwiqinisekiso ye-WHO mayelana nezifo ezithile ezitholakala ezindaweni eziningi, 2021–2030, futhi ukuthuthukisa ukuqonda okungcono ngemisebenzi yomhlaba wonke mayelana nalezi zifo, kubantu abahlanganisiwe, abaxhasi, abalingani bezobuchwepheshe, izikhungo kanye nabameleli bezifunda, baqinise ukuzibophezela kwabo ekufinyeleleni kule nqubo enkulu: umhlaba ongakhululi yizifo ezithile ezitholakala ezindaweni eziningi ngonyaka ka-2030. Isihloko esikhulu salomhlangano sikhuluma ngombono woku "kuhlanganyela umphakathi owodwa ekuhleleni uhlelo olulodwa lwezifo ezithile ezitholakala ezindaweni eziningi."

translations.source: Taking their cues from the three key strategic shifts advocated in the road map – greater country ownership, measuring impacts not process, and a commitment to cross-cutting activities and collaboration for greater efficiency – discussions were pragmatic, clear-sighted and suffused also with the need for health equity and justice to tackle NTDs. Only such an approach, the meeting heard, can bring about the change that is needed by some of the world’s poorest communities to achieve the United Nations 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. In the first such global meeting since the launch of the road map in January 2021, delegates heard also from WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Welcoming participants at the beginning of the two-day symposium, Dr Tedros said, “This gathering illustrates what WHO is all about – partners coming together to leverage their collective strength to address global health challenges that none of us could address alone. “A multifaceted challenge like neglected tropical diseases takes a multifaceted approach, and that is what we bring, together”.
translations.reference: Ukuthatha imicabango yabo besusela ekushintsheni kwamasu abalulekile okukhulunywe ngakho kumgwaqobalazwe - ubunikazi obukhulu bezwe, ukukala umthelela ayi uhlelo nokuzibophezela kweminye imisebenzi nokubambisana ukuze kube kukhulu ukusebenza kahle-izingxoxo bezizwakala,zibonakala kahle futhi zihlanganiswe nesidingo sokulingana kwezempilo nobulungiswa ukubhekana namaNTD. Ileyo ndlela kuphela, umhlangano owayizwa,engaletha ushintsho oludingekayo kweminye yemiphakathi ehluphekayo emhlabeni ukuthi ithole i-United Nations 2023 Sustainable Development Goals. Emhlanganweni womhlaba wokuqala kusukela kwethulwe umgwaqo webalazwe ngoMasingana 2021, izihambeli zezwa futhi ngoMqondisi Jikelele weWHO uDkt Tedroa Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Ukwamukela ababambiqhaza ekuqaleni komhlangano wezinsuku ezimbili,uDkt Tedros uthe, "Lokhu kuhlangana kukhombisa ukuthi Iwho imayelana nani - ababambisani behlangana ndawonye ukuzokhombisa amandla abo behlangene nokubhekana nezingqinamba zempilo yomhlaba, nokuthi akekho ongabhekana nalokhu eyedwa. "Ingqinamba yezinkinga eziningi njengokunganakwa kwezifo ezijwayelekile kuthatha indlela yezinkinga eziningi, futhi yilokho esikuletha ndawonye".
translations.hypothesis: Ngokulandela iziqondiso ezithathwe eziguquzulweni ezintathu ezibalulekile zohlelo lokusebenza – ukwanda kokuzinikela kwamazwe, ukuhlola imiphumela kunokugxilisa ekuhleleni, kanye nokuzibophezela emisebenzini ehambisana nezinye kanye nokubambisana ukuze kukhuliswe ukusebenza kahle – izingxoxo zabe ziqondile, zinomqondo, futhi zabe zikhombisa nokudingeka kokulinganiselwa kwezempilo kanye nokulungiswa ukuze kuxazululwe izifo ezithathelwayo zamazwe. Uhlelo olunjalo kuphela, njengoba kwakukhulunywa kule nkhundla, lungenza izinguquko ezidingekayo ezindaweni eziningi emhlabeni ezinezinkinga ezinkulu ukuze kufinyelelwe kamanjo e-2030 e-United Nations mayelana nokuthuthukiswa okusimeme. Kule nkhundla yobhunga lomhlaba yokuqala ngale nkinga kusukela ekukhishwa kohlelo lokusebenza ngoJanuwari 2021, abahlanganyeli babuye bazwa ukukhuluma kukaMqondisi Jeneral we-WHO, uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Ekumemezelweni kwabahlanganyeli ekuqaleni kwalesi simposium elingosuku ezimbili, uDkt. Tedros uthe, “Le ndawo yokuhlangana ibonisa ukuthi i-WHO yini – abalingani abahlangana ukuze basebenzise amandla abo okubambisene ukulwa nezinkinga zezempilo zomhlaba ezinkulu kangaka kangokuthi akukho muntu ongazilwela ngedwa. “Inkinga ejwayelekile njengezifo ezithathelwayo zamazwe idinga indlela ejwayelekile, futhi yilokho esikufelezayo, ndawonye.”

translations.source: Delegates and participants spent the subsequent two days identifying the major gaps and challenges to achieving high-level goals and local, on-the-ground challenges. Those on-the-ground challenges include ensuring that people directly affected by NTDs, and those directly responsible for administering interventions against NTDs, are solicited and acknowledged, particularly in terms of communication and community engagement. The meeting noted also the importance of developing communities of practice, in order to build the capacity and confidence of the global NTD workforce. In further discussions, delegates agreed on principles and practical steps to implement action towards the stated targets and planned together for a Global Action Plan for 2025–2030. Key actions and decisions arising from the meeting included recommendations for strengthening and operationalizing national coordination platforms to ensure coordination for joint planning and for monitoring and evaluation, and to ensure more efficient supply chain management within national systems.
translations.reference: Izihambeli kanye nababambe iqhaza bachitha izinsuku ezimbili zilandelana ukuhlonza izikhala ezinkulu kanye nezingqinamba ukuthola izinhloso zezinga eliphezulu, kuzingqinamba eziphansi. Labo abanezingqinamba eziphansi okufaka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu abakhahlazemeke ngqo yiNTD nalabo okungumsebenzi wabo ngqo wokuphatha ukungenelela okubhekene namaNTD, baseceleni futhi banolwazi ikakhulukazi ngokokuxhumana kanye nokukhuluma komphakathi. Umhlangano uphinde waqaphela ukubaluleka kokwenza komphakathi osathuthuka, ukuze kwakhiwe amandla okukwazi nokuzethemba kokusebenza kweNTD yomhlaba. Ngokuqhubeka ngengxoxo, izihambeli zavumelana ngemigomo kanye namagxathu angenzeka ukwenza okubheke kokuqondiwe okushiwo futhi kwahlelwa ndawonye kweGlobal Action Plan ya-2025-2030. Ukwenza okubalulekile nokukhula kwezinqumo emhlanganweni okufaka iziphakamiso zokuqinisa nokusebenza kwezinkundla zokuxhumana zezwe nokuqinisekisa ukuxhumana kokuhlela ngokuhlanganyela nokubheka nokubhekisisa nokuqinisekisa ukusebenza kahle kokuphathwa kwesaplayi sheni ezinhlelweni zezwe.
translations.hypothesis: Abaholi kanye nabaxhasi basevele bathole ukuthi yiziphi izinkinga ezinkulu kanye nezinkinga ezimelene nokufinyelela izinhloso ezinkulu kanye nezinkinga eziseduze, ezifana nalokho okwenzeka endaweni yangempela. Lezi zinkinga eziseduze zifaka ukuthi kwenziwe ukuthi abantu abathintwa ngqo yi-NTDs (izifo ezivamile ezithathelwa kakhulu), kanye nalabo abanomsebenzi wokuhlinzeka ngokusiza kwezifo zalezi zifo, batholwe futhi baziwa, ikakhulukazi mayelana nokuxhumana kanye nokubandakanywa komphakathi. Umhlangano uqaphele futhi ukubaluleka kokwakha amafemu okusebenza, ukuze kukhuliswe amakhono kanye nothando labasebenzi bomhlaba wonke abasebenza ezindlini zokwelapha. Kwengxoxo eyengeziwe, abaholi bavumelene ngemithetho kanye nezinyathelo ezisebenzayo zokuqaliswa kwezenzo zokufeza izinhloso ezishiwo, futhi bahlela ngokuhlanganyelwe uhlelo lomhlaba wonke lwezenzo lonyaka ka-2025-2030. Izinto ezibalulekile kanye nezinqumo ezivela kuleli hlangano zifaka izincomo zokwenza ngcono nokusebenzisa izindawo zokuhlela ezinkulu ezweni, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuhlanganyela ekuhleleni kanye nokulalela nokuhlaziywa, kanye nokwenza ukuphathwa kwesistimu yokuhlinzeka ngempahla kube nokwengeza kakhulu ngaphakathi kwezinhlelo zamazwe.

translations.source: The Partners’ Meeting took place also at the end of a major functional review process within WHO’s Department of Control of Neglected Tropical Diseases. Over the course of the past four months, WHO has been hearing contributions and testimony from all its partners and stakeholders, in order to ensure that it itself embodies the values of accountability, transparency and equity that it espouses and demands. Those values also include ensuring that NTDs are repositioned in the global health architecture. Meeting participants welcomed the emphasis on the key roles that the NTD community can and must play in contributing to wider challenges such as Universal Health Coverage, One Health and the increasing threat of global climate change. Delegates attending in person were also able to enjoy an exhibition dedicated to neglected tropical diseases at WHO headquarters.
translations.reference: Umhlangano wabaBambisani wenzeka futhi ekupheleni kohlelo lokubheka ukusebenza okukhulu eMnyangweni weWHO wokulawula izifo ezijwayelekile kodwa ezinganakiwe. Esikhathini esingangezinyanga ezine ezedlule, iWHO ibizwa uxhaso kanye nobufakazi kubona bonke ababambisani bayo, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi amalunga ayo akubeka phambili ukuthatha isibopho, ukwethembeka nokulingana ekufunayo. Lawo manani aphinde afake ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amaNTD iseikhundleni kwezokwakha ezempilo yomhlaba. Ukuhlangana nababambiqhaza bamukelwa ekugcizeleleni indima ebalulekile yomphakathi weNTD ingenza futhi ingadlala indima enkulu ukuxhasa kuzingqinamba eziningi njenge Universal Health Coverage, One Health nokunyuka kokusaba kokuguquka kwesimo sezulu emhlabeni. Izihambeli ezethamele siqu zaphinde zajabulela umbukiso owawunikelwe kuzifo ezidumile ezinganakiwe kwekomkhulu leWHO.
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano wabalingani uqhubile ngenxa yokuphela kwenqubo enkulu yokuhlaziywa kwezinto ezibalulekile ngaphakathi kweSigaba se-WHO sokulawula izifo zendalo ezikhungathekile. Kulezi zinyanga ezine ezidlule, i-WHO izwele imibono kanye nezibuyekezo ezivela kubalingani bayo nabanikazi, ukuze iqiniseke ukuthi iyazibophezela ngempela ezibalweni zokuziphendulela, ukukhululeka kanye nokulinganiselwa okuyazifunayo futhi ezifuna kuzo. Lezi zibaluli zifaka nokwenza ukuthi izifo zendalo ezikhungathekile zibuyiswe endaweni efanele kakhulu ohlelweni lwezempilo emhlabeni. Ababambiqhaza kuleli hlangano bayamukela ukuthi kukhankanywe ngendlela ebalulekile mayelana nezindima ezibalulekile abalingani bezifo zendalo ezikhungathekile bangadlala, futhi kufanele badlale, ekuxhaseni izinkinga ezibanzi njengezokunakekelwa kwezempilo kubo bonke, i-"One Health" kanye nokukhula kwezingozi ezihlobene noshintsho lwemvelo emhlabeni. Abaholi ababehleli kuleli hlangano ngomuntu ngamunye bathole nethuba lokubuka umbukiso oqinisekiswe ezifweni zendalo ezikhungathekile eholweni lokuqala le-WHO.

translations.source: A set of metal panels was commissioned to illustrate the 20 conditions that make up the NTD grouping, and these were accompanied by photographs and information illustrating the actions that have been put in place over the course of many decades to tackle them.
translations.reference: Isethi yamaphaneli ensimbi yayikhominishiniwe ukuzokhombisa izimo ezingu-20 ezenza amaqoqo eNTD futhi loku kwakuhambisana nezithombe kanye nolwazi olukhombisa izenzo esezibekwe endaweni ngaphezu kwesifundo samashuminyaka amaningi ukuthi abhekane nawo.
translations.hypothesis: Uhlu lwamaphaneli yensimbi lwenziwe ukuze lukhombise izimo ezingu-20 ezakha leli qembu lezifo ezithathelwayo (NTD), futhi lawa maphaneli ayehlanganiswe nezithombe kanye nolwazi olukhombisa izenzo ezithathwe kuyo yonke le minyaka ukuze kulwiswe nalezi zifo.

translations.source: Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, 12–13 June 2023 Representatives of the global NTD community will gather in Geneva next week to participate in the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, which takes place in headquarters’ auditorium on 12-13 June 2023. The objectives of the meeting are to review progress on the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, as well as to engage in wide-ranging discussions around the vision for One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme. While previous global meetings of NTD partners were convened by WHO in 2007 and 2017, this third upcoming event is the first since the launch of the road map in January 2021. The WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 is a comprehensive framework that outlines targets, mechanisms for alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals and other global agendas and calls for strategic shifts in NTD approaches with the aim of ending the epidemic of neglected tropical diseases by 2030.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weGlobal Neglected Tropica Disease Programme Partners ngo-12-13 Nhlangulana 2023 Abamele umphakathi womhlaba weNTD bazohlangana eGeneva ngesonto elizayo ukubamba iqhaza kuGloba Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners Meeting, ezobanjelwa endaweni yekomkhulu ngo-12-13 Nhlangulana 2023. Izinjongo zomhlangano ukubheka ukuqhubeka kumgwaqobalazwe leWHO wezifo ezijayelekile ezinganakiwe 2021-2030 nokwenza ukuqonda okungcono kokusebenza kweNTD yomhlaba kukhona kokubili izifo ezithile nezindlela ezingcono kanye nokukhuluma ezingxoxweni ezivulelekile ngokombono we-OneWHO ekuletheni kwiGlobal NTD Programme. Ngesikhathi imihlangano yomhlaba edlule yababambisani beNTD bahlanganiswa yiWHO ngo-2007 nango-2017, lomcimbi wesithathu ozayo owokuqala kusukela kwathulwa umgwaqo webalazwe ngoMasingana 2021. Umgwaqobalazwe weWHO wezifo ezinganakiwe ezijwayelekile 2021-2030 umhlahlandela omkhulu oveza okuqondiwe, izindlela zokuhambisana neSustainalbe Development Goals kanye namanye ama-ajenda omhlaba nokumenyezelwa kokushinthsa kwamasu ezindleleni zeNTD ngenhloso yokuqeda ubhubhane lokunganakwa kwezifo ezijwayelekile ngo-2030.
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano Wobambisana Wephrogramu Yomhlaba Wonke Yezifo Ezihlanzekile ZaseTropiki, 12–13 Juni 2023. Abameleli bomphakathi womhlaba wonke wezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki bazokuthanda eGeneva ngesonto ezayo ukuze bathathe ubudlelwane kulo mhlangano, owenzeka endaweni yokuhlangana ekhanda leholide ngomhlaka 12-13 Juni 2023. Izinhloso zalomhlangano zokubuyekeza intuthuko kwiphulani ye-WHO yezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki zika-2021–2030, kanye nokuthuthukisa ukuqonda ngemisebenzi yomhlaba wonke kwezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki, kokubili ngohlobo lwezifo kanye nendlela ejwayelekile, kanye nokubamba ingxoxo ebanzi mayelana nombono we-WHO eyodwa efeza iphrogramu eyodwa yomhlaba wonke kwezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki. Nakuba imihlangano yangaphambilini yobambisana kwezinhlangano ezisebenzisana kwezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki ibibanjwe yi-WHO ngo-2007 kanye no-2017, lo mngane wesithathu ozayo ngowokuqala kusukela ekulandelweni kwale phulani ngoJanuwari 2021. Iphulani ye-WHO yezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki zika-2021–2030 iyinhlelo ephelele ehlanganisa izinhloso, izindlela zokuhambisana nezinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezisengokwanele kanye nezinye izinhloso zomhlaba wonke, futhi ibalulekisa ukuguqulwa kwezindlela zokulwa nezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki, ngenhloso yokugcina lesi sigulukgu sezifo ezihlanzekile zaseTropiki ngonyaka ka-2030.

translations.source: The meeting will focus on: reviewing current progress to achieving the 2030 targets; identifying the major gaps and challenges to reaching those targets; agreeing principles and practical steps for how to implement action towards the targets; galvanizing support and commitment from NTD partners to operationalize the shifts advocated in the road map and to achieve its targets; and
translations.reference: Umhlangano uzogxila ku: ukubheka uhlelo lwamanje lokuthola okuqondiwe kuka-2030; ukuhlonza izikhala ezinkulu kanye nezingqinamba zokufinyelela kulokho okuqondiwe; ukuvumelana ngemigomo kanye nokwenzeka kwamagxathu ukuthi kwenziwa njani ukuya kokuqondiwe; ukweseka okuthusayo nokuzinikela okuvela kubabambisani beNTD ukusebenzisa ukushintshana okumelwe kumgwaqo webalazwe nokuthola abakuqondile;
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano uzogxila koku: ukubuyekeza intuthuko yamanje ekufinyeleleni kwezigalelo zango-2030; ukuthola izimo eziyinhlekelele nezinkinga ezimikhulu ekufinyeleleni kulezi sigalelo; ukuhlanganyela ngemithetho nezinyathelo ezenziweyo mayelana nokuthi kungenziwa ini ukuze kufinyelelwe kulezi sigalelo; ukukhuthaza ukusekelwa nokuzibophezela kubalingani be-NTD ukuze kwenziwe izinguquko ezikhutshwe kuleli hlaka kanye nokufinyelela kulezi sigalelo; kanye nokunye.

translations.source: planning together for a Global Action Plan 2025–2030. Over 300 participants in the meeting are expected to attend, either in-person or online. They will include representatives of the global NTD community, from countries and donors to implementing and technical partners, from academia to patients’ associations and all other entities and institutions involved in the fight against NTDs. An exhibition on neglected tropical diseases will take place in the mezzanine of the B building, just above the cafeteria. A set of metal panels will illustrate the 20 conditions grouped under the NTD umbrella and provide information on actions implemented to tackle their burden.
translations.reference: nokuhlela ndawonye ngeGlobal Action Plan 2025-2030. Ngaphezu kwababambe iqhaza abangu-300 emhlanganweni okulindeleke ukuba bathamele siqu noma nge-inthanethi. Bazofaka ababamele emphakathini weNTD womhlaba okuphuma emazweni kanye nabanikeli ekwenzeni kanye nababambisani bezobuchwepheshe, kusuka kumfundo uya ezigulini inhlangano kanye nezinye izinto nezinhlangano ezibandakanyekayo ekulweni okubhekene namaNTD. Umbukiso ezifweni ezijwayelekile ezinganakiwe uzokwenzeka emezzanine yebhilidi B ngaphezu nje kwendawo yokudayisa ukudla. Isethi yamaphaneli ensimbi azokhombisa izimo ezingu-20 ezihlanganizwe ngaphansi kwesandla seNTD nokunikeza ulwazi ezenzweni zokwenza ukubhekana nomthwalo wabo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlela ndawonye ngohlelo lwezwe lonke lwe-2025–2030. Kucatshangwa ukuthi abafundi abangaphezu kuka-300 bazobamba iqhaza kule mhlangi, ngokoqobo noma ngobuqondile. Bazoba ngabameleli bomphakathi womhlaba wonke wasezinye izifo, kusukela ezweni nabasebenzisi zimali kuya kubafakazeli kanye nabaxhasi bezobuchwepheshe, kusukela ezikhungweni zemfundo kuya ezinhlanganweni zabagulayo kanye nakho konke okunye okuhlobene nokulwa nalezi zifo. Umbukiso mayelana nezifo zendalo ezihlulekile uzobanjwa endaweni ephezulu kakhulu yendlu yangakini ye-B, ngaphezu kendawo yokudlela. Uchungechunge lwamaphaneli ensimbi luzokhombisa izimo ezingu-20 ezihlukaniswe ngaphansi kwegeyini yezifo zendalo ezihlulekile futhi luzonikeza ulwazi mayelana nezindlela ezisetshenzisiwe ukulwa nalezi zifo.

translations.source: WHO announces winners of the 4th Health for All Film Festival 7 winning short films, 4 special mentions from the jury The World Health Organization has announced the official selection of this year’s winning films at its 4th Annual Health for All Film Festival, held at WHO Headquarters, Geneva. The event, attended in person and online by actors, producers and public figures, saw winning films announced for 7 different categories, while 4 films received special mentions from the jury.
translations.reference: I-WHO imemezela abanqobile ku Ezempilo zawo wonke umuntu Umcimbi wamafilimu wesine amafilimu amafishane anqobile angu-7, awu-4 ashiwo ngokukhathekile aphuma kumajaji. Inhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba isimemezele ukukhethwa ngokusemthethweni kokunqoba kwamafilimu kulonyaka ku4th Annual Health for All Film Festival obubanjelwe kwekomkhulu leWHO eGeneva. Umcimbi, wethanyelwa siqu kanye naku inthanethi ngabalingisi, abakhiqizi kanye nabadumile, babona amafilimu anqobile emenyezelwa ngemikhakha eyahlukene engu-7, ngesikhathi amafilimu angu 4 etholwe ukushiwo ngokukhethekile okuphuma kumajaji.
translations.hypothesis: UHlelo lwe-WHO lumanzise abawinile komkhosi wefilimu we-4 we-"Health for All", ngamaphilimu amaningana ayisikhombisa ayawinile, kanye namaphuzu amane ahlukile atholwe ngabahloli. I-World Health Organization imane ngezifilimu ezikhethiwe zalesi sikhathi komkhosi wayo waminyaka yonke we-"Health for All", owenziwe eholweni le-WHO eGeneva. Lo mcimbi, owabuyekezwa ngabantu abaningi, kufaka phakathi abalingisi, abakhiqizi kanye nabantu abaziwayo, ubukise ukumemezwa kwamaphilimu ayawinile ezigxeni eziyisikhombisa ezihlukene, kuyilapho amaphilimu amane athole amaphuzu ahlukile kulolu hlelo oluholwayo.

translations.source: This is the fourth year of the film festival and competition was no less fierce, with some 93 shortlisted films covering issues ranging from anxiety and depression through to the effects of climate change on health, as well as the health challenges of people with disabilities. The films were judged by a panel of distinguished professionals, artists and activists, including the renown actors, Sharon Stone and Alfonso Herrera, dance choreographer, Sherrie Silver, climate activist, Sophia Kianni and media personality, Adelle Onyango. They were joined by senior United Nations officials and WHO staff. “The Health for All Film Festival brings a human face to WHO’s scientific work,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Listening to the voices of people affected by health issues is a powerful way to raise awareness and improve our understanding of people’s experiences and this can help us advance towards health for all.”
translations.reference: Unyaka wesine womcimbi wamafilimi kanye nokuncintisana wawungekho ngaphansi kokwesabeka namanye amafilimi ehlisiwe angu-93 abheke izinkinga ezahlukene kusuka kwixhala ingcindezi ngemithelela yokuguquka kwesimo sezulu kwezempilo kanye nezingqinamba zezempilo kubantu abaphila nokukhubazeka. Amafilimu ayejajwa yiphaneli yezifundiswa ezikhethekile, amaciko nezishoshovu, okubandakanya osaziwayo babalingisi, uSharone Stone no-Alfonso Herera, umfundisi womdanso, uSherrie Silver, isishoshovu sesimo sezulu, uSophia Kianni nowezezendaba, u-Adelle Onyango. Sijoyinwe abasebenzi abakhulu be-United Nations kanye nabasebenzi beWHO. "I-Health for All Film Festival iletha ubuso bomuntu kumsebenzi wesayensi weWHO," kusho Umqondisi Jikelele weWHO, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Ukulalela amazwi abo bonke abantu abathikamezeke yizinkinga zempilo indlela enamandla yokuqwashisa nokwenza kangcono ukuqonda kwethu ngezipiliyoni zabantu futhi lokhu kungasisiza ukwenza ngcono okubheke kwezempilo zawo wonke umuntu.
translations.hypothesis: Lena unyaka wesine wephini festivali, futhi umncintiswano wawukhulu, ngamaphilimu angama-93 atholwe ukuthi afanele ukuncintisana, afakazelwe izindaba ezahlukene kusukela ekukhathazekile nasekubeni kuya emiphumeleni enguquko yezulu empilweni, kanye nezinkinga zezempilo zabantu abanokukhubazeka. Amaphilimu ayahlolwa yiphaneli yochwepheshe abakhulu, abaculi kanye nabaxhasayo, okubalwa phakathi kwawo abadlali abaziwayo, u-Sharon Stone no-Alfonso Herrera, umdlali we-dance u-Sherrie Silver, umxhasi wezinguquko yezulu u-Sophia Kianni, kanye nomuntu odumile ezindlini zokukhala u-Adelle Onyango. Babanjwe nabasebenzi abaphakeme beNhlangano Yamazwe Ngamazwe kanye nabasebenzi be-WHO. "Iphini festivali ethi 'Impilo Kuwo Wonke' iletha ukubonakala komuntu kusebenza kwezesayensi le-WHO," kusho uMqondisi-Jeneral we-WHO, uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Ukulalela izwi zabantu abathintekile yizinkinga zezempilo kuyindlela enamandla yokukhuthaza ukuqwashisa futhi ithuthukise ukuqonda kwethu ngolwazi lwabantu, futhi lokhu kungasisiza ukuthi siqhubeke esendleleni yempilo kuwo wonke."

translations.source: From the official selection one “GRAND PRIX” is attributed for each of the three main competition categories: Universal Health Coverage, Health emergencies, and Better health and well-being, which align with WHO’s Triple Billion Targets. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress from the United States of America, producer and activist for health and humanitarian causes said: "I am delighted to be part of the Health for All Film Festival. This is about creating better awareness on crucial actions needed for reaching healthier living conditions around the world. The stories selected talk to us about the intrinsic value of good health and its access, and they advocate for universal health coverage.
translations.reference: Kulokhu kukhethwa okusemthethweni GRAND PRIX, ibenomthelela emikhakheni womncintiswano omkhulu kwemithathu ngamunye. Ukukhavwa kweZempilo yoMhlaba, Ezempilo eziphuthumayo nezempilo ezingcono kanye nokuphila kahle okuhambisana neWHO Triple Billion Targets. USharon Stone, umlingisikazi onqobe indondo yeGolden Globe ne-Emmy wase-United States of America, umkhiqizi nesishoshovu sezempilo kanye nezinkinga zobuntu: Ngiyajabula ukuba yingxenye yezempilo yawowonke umuntu kumncimbi wezamafilimu. Lokhu kumayelana nokwenza ukuqwashisa okungcono ekwenzeni okubucayi oudingeka ukufinyelela kuzimo zokuphila ezinempilo emhlabeni wonke. Izindaba ezikhethiwe ezizokhuluma nathi ngenani lomongo lwezempilo ezikahle nokuphumelela kwakho, futhi bamela ukukhavwa kwezempilo emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: Kusukela ezinkethweni ezisemthethweni, umklomelo owodwa "GRAND PRIX" uholwe ngakunye yezigaba ezintathu ezinkulu zemincintiswano: Ukufakelwa Kokunakekelwa Kwempilo Kuwo Wonke Umuntu, izimo eziphuthumayo zempilo, kanye nokufakelwa kwempilo engcono kanye nokukhululeka, okuhambisana nezinhloso ezintathu ze-WHO. U-Sharon Stone, umdlali ohlonishwe ngama-Golden Globe kanye nama-Emmy Award ovela e-United States of America, umvelisi kanye nomdlali omkhulu empilweni kanye nezindaba zoluntu, uthe: "Ngijabule ukuba yingxenye ye-Health for All Film Festival. Lokhu ngokuqukethwe ekwakhiweni kobunzulu ngemisebenzi ebalulekile edingekayo ukuze kufinyelelwe ezimeni zempilo ezintle emhlabeni wonke. Izindaba ezikhethiwe zixoxa nathi ngububanzi bendawo yempilo enhle kanye nokufinyelela kuyo, futhi zikhuthaza ukufakelwa okunakekelwa kwempilo kuwo wonke umuntu."

translations.source: Universal Health Coverage is a very important right, it’s a human right for everyone around the world. "Four special prizes were also given for a Student-produced film, a film on Climate Change and Health, a film on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights and a Very Short Film. The theme of mental health featured heavily in this year’s winning entries, including a powerful and moving short film from Sweden about anxiety and depression. The film, set to a stirring soundtrack, featured a series of actors expressing different stages of anxiety and how it can manifest itself. The overall message was that you are not alone in experiencing negative thoughts and that it is okay to acknowledge such feelings.Another winning film, from Bangladesh, features a young boy who was exposed to lead from a local factory.
translations.reference: Universal Health coverage Yilungelo elibaluleke kakhulu yilungelo lomuntu kuwo wonke umuntu emhlabeni. "Imiklomelo ekhethekile emine iphinde yanikezwa ifilimu ekhiqizwe ngumfundi, ifilimu engoKuguquka kwesimo sezulu nezempilo, ifilimu ngezempilo yezocansi nokuzala kanye namalungelo futhi ifilimu emfishane kakhulu. Ingqikithi yezempilo zengqondo ifakwe kakhulu kwabangenele ukunqoba kulonyaka, okufaka amafilimu amafishane ahambayo futhi anamandla aphuma eSweden angexhala nengcindezi. Ifilimu yezwe ngemisindo ejabulisayo, kwafakwa uchungechunge lwabalingisi beziveza kuzigaba ezahlukene zexhala nokuthi lingaziveza kanjani lona. Imiyalezo yonke yayithi awuwedwa kusipiliyoni semicabango engemihle, futhi lokho akunankinga ukwamukela leyo mizwa. Enye ifilimu enqobile yaseBangladesh, enomfana omncane owakumele ahole esembonini yasemakhaya.
translations.hypothesis: Ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kubo bonke abantu kuyilungelelo elibalulekile, kuyilungelelo lomuntu wonke emhlabeni jikelele. "Amabhayisiki ayisikhombisa asetshenzisiwe nanamanye amabhayisiki, okuhlanganisa ibhayisiki elenziwe ngabafundi, ibhayisiki mayelana nezinguquko zobushwa kanye nezempilo, ibhayisiki mayelana nezempilo kanye nezilungelo zokuzalwa nokuziphimela, kanye nobhayisiki omfutshana kakhulu. Ingxenye ebalulekile yale ngxenye yalo nyaka kwakuyizihloko ezihlobene nezempilo yengqondo, okuhlanganisa ibhayisiki emfushane egcwele amandla nesimanga esivela eSweden mayelana nokukhathazeka kanye nokudabuka. Le bhayisiki, enomsindo omuhle, ibonisa abalingisi abahlukahlukene abancoma izigaba ezihlukene zokukhathazeka nokuthi kungabonakala kanjani. Umbhalo omkhulu walo bhayisiki wawukuthi awukho umuntu odayalelwa ukuba anomuzwa omubi, futhi kulungile ukuzwa kanjani. Omunye wababhayisiki abawinile, osuka eBangladesh, ubonisa intombazane encane eyayibonakala ukuthi ithinteke ngenguqule evela efektri yendawo.

translations.source: The moving film details the effects this has had on his educational development and the work that a local non-governmental organization has done to both highlight the issue and take action to prevent lead poisoning in the affected community. List of films awarded: UHC "Grand Prix": “Jonathan’s Miracle Feet” – Sierra Leone / Disability, clubfoot Directed by Mamihasina Raminosoa and Nantenaina Rakotondranivo from Madagascar for the NGO Miracle Feet / Documentary – Duration 3’19’’ Health Emergencies "Grand Prix": “Nurses facing Covid / Na Lihna de Frente” – Brazil / COVID-19 and access to care
translations.reference: Imininingwane yefilimu ehambayo umthelela enawo ekuthuthukeni kwemfundo yakhe kanye nomsebenzi osuwenziwe enhlanganweni okungeyona ekahulumeni yasendaweni kokubili ukuveza inkinga kanye nokuthatha igxathu ukuvikela ukuhola okunoshevu emphakathini othintekile. Uhla lwamafilimu aklonyelisiwe: I-UHC "Grand Prix": "Jonathans Miracle Feet" - eyaseSierra Leone / Ukukhubazeka, ikilabhu yonyawo. translations.hypothesis: Lo mdlalo wefilimu ubonisa ukuthi lokhu kuye banipha kanjani ekuthuthukisweni kwemfundo yakhe, kanye nomsebenzi owenziwe yinhlangano yangenhlangano yangomphakathi yendawo ukukhombisa le nkinga kanye nokuthatha izinyathelo zokuqeda ukugaywa ngama-lead emphakathini o affected. Uhlu lwemifilimu eyayifikelezelwe: UHC "Grand Prix": “Jonathan’s Miracle Feet” – Sierra Leone / Ukungabi nakho, ukukhubazeka kwenyawo. Uyalungiswa ngu-Mamihasina Raminosoa no-Nantenaina Rakotondranivo wase-Madagascar, ngomhlangano yangenhlangano yangomphakathi i-Miracle Feet / Idokhumentari – Ubude: 3’19’’. Izimo zempilo eziphuthumayo "Grand Prix": “Nurses facing Covid / Na Lihna de Frente” – i-Brazil / I-COVID-19 kanye nokufinyelela ekwelashweni.
