translations.source: Climate Change and Health Special Mention: “Freedom to breathe: a child’s right to breath clean air” – Global / Asthma and air pollution Directed by Georgette Thomas (United Kingdom) / Documentary – Duration 5’39’’ Very Short Film Special Mention: “I am naked / Je suis nue” – France / Violation of privacy; Mental health; Emotional violence against women Directed by Alexandra Mignien (France) / Fiction – Duration 2’20’’ For more details on the official selection, the jury composition and to watch the films and awards ceremony, visit https://www.who.int/film-festival
translations.reference: Ukushiwo okukhethekile ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu nezempilo: "Inkululeko yokuphefumula: ilungelo lengane lokuphefumula umoya ohlanzekile" - Okomhlaba / Isifuba nokungcola komoya Iqondiswe nguGeorgette Thomas (United Kingdom) / iDocumentary - Isikhathi 5'39" Ukushiwo ngokukhethekile wefilimu emfishane kakhulu: “I am naked / Je suis nue” - France / Ukwephulwa kobumfihlo; Ezempilo yengqondo; Ukuhlukunyezwa ngokomzwelo kwabesifazane Iqondiswe ngu-Alexandra Mignien (France) / Ifikishini - Isikhathi 2'20" Ngemininingwane eyendeziwe yokukhethwa okusemthethweni, ukwakheka kwamajaji kanye nokubuka amafilimu nomcimbi wemiklomelo, vakashela u-http://www.who.int/film-festival
translations.hypothesis: Ukuguquka Kwesimo Sezulu kanye Nezempilo: Ukubalwa Okukhethekile: "Inkululeko yokuphefumula: ilungelo lenkantolo yokuphefumula umoya ohlanzekile" – Emhlabeni wonke / Ukugula kwe-asthma nokungcola komoya. Kulungiselelwe ngu-Georgette Thomas (e-United Kingdom) / Ifilimu yodokumenti – Ubude: 5’39’’. Ifilimu Ekhulu Kakhulu: Ukubalwa Okukhethekile: "Ngifile / Je suis nue" – E-France / Ukwephulwa kwemfihlo; Ezempilo yengqondo; Ukuhlazwa ngokomzwelo kwabesifazane. Kulungiselelwe ngu-Alexandra Mignien (e-France) / Ifilimu yobuciko – Ubude: 2’20’’. Ukuze uthole eminye imininingwane mayelana nokukhethwa okusemthethweni, ukuhlela komkhosi, kanye nokubukela amaphilimu kanye nomcimbi wokuwina amabhonasi, vakashela ku-https://www.who.int/film-festival.

translations.source: Basic energy access lags amid renewable opportunities, new report shows Global energy access gap persists: 675 million people without electricity, 2.3 billion people reliant on harmful cooking fuels A new report by the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO), released today, finds that the world is not on track to achieve the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 for energy by 2030. This year marks the halfway point for achieving SDGs by 2030. SDG 7 is to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy.
translations.reference: Amandla ayisisekelo okungena kokungaphumeleli kokuphakathi nendawo kokuvuselelwa kwamathuba, umbiko omusha uyakhombisa. Amandla omhlaba okungena esikhaleni ayaqhubeka:abantu abayizigidi ezingu-675 abangenawo ugesi, abantu abayizigidi ezingu-2.3 abancike kumafuweli alimazayo okupheka. Umbiko omusha w-International Energy Agency (IEA) i-International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA) Uniyed State Statistics Division(UNSD) iWorld Bank kanye neNhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba 9WHO)ikhiphe namhlanje, uthila ukuthi umhlaba awuhambi kahle ekutholeni iSustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 yamandla ngo-2030. Lonyaka umaka ukufika kuhhafu ekutholeni ISDG ngo-2030. SDG 7 ukuqinisekisa ukungena okukhonekayo, okwethembekile, okugcinekile kanye namandla esimanje.
translations.hypothesis: Ukufinyelela amandla okusebenza kuyasihlwa kakhulu, naphezu kwezindlela ezintsha zokuvela kwamandla, njengoba kubonisa umbiko omusha. Ubunzulu bokungafinyelelwa kwamandla okusebenza kuseqhubekile: abantu abayi-675 million abanandlu, kanti abantu abayi-2.3 billion basendaweni esebenzisa izinto zokuphika ezimbi. Umbiko omusha owenziwe yi-International Energy Agency (IEA), i-International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), i-United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), i-World Bank, kanye ne-World Health Organization (WHO), owethulwe namuhla, uthi umhlaba awufuni ukufinyelela umgomo wokuthuthukiswa oqukethe (Sustainable Development Goal - SDG) ongunombolo 7 mayelana namandla okusebenza ngonyaka ka-2030. Lo nyaka uyingxenye ephakathi yokufeza lezi zinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ngonyaka ka-2030. Umgomo ongunombolo 7 uwukwenza kube nokwenzeka ukufinyelela kwamandla okusebenza anobungoti, athembekile, aqhubekayo, futhi asezingeni lesimanje.

translations.source: The goal includes reaching universal access to electricity and clean cooking, doubling historic levels of efficiency improvements, and substantially increasing the share of renewables in the global energy mix. Attaining this goal will have a deep impact on people’s health and well-being, helping to protect them from environmental and social risks such as air pollution, and expanding access to primary health care and services. The 2023 edition of Tracking SDG 7: The Energy Progress Report warns that current efforts are not enough to achieve the SDG 7 on time. There has been some progress on specific elements of the SDG 7 agenda – for example, the increased rate of using renewables in the power sector – but progress is insufficient to reach the targets set forth in the SDGs. The global energy crisis is expected to stimulate the deployment of renewables and improve energy efficiency with several government policies pointing to increasing investment.
translations.reference: Inhloso ibandakanya ukufinyelela komhlaba ekungeneni kugesi kanye nokupheka okuhlanzekile amazinga aphindekile omlando wokwenza kangcono ukusebenza nokugcineka kokunyuka kokwabelana kokuvuselelekayo emhlabeni wamandla axubile. Ukuthola le nhloso kuzoba nomthelela ojulile ezimpilweni zabantu kanye nokuphila, kusiza ukubavikela kwezendawo ubungcuphe benhlalakahle njengokungcola komoya nokwandisa ukungena ekunakekelweni kwempilo kokuqala kanye nemisebenzi. Uhlobo lwango-2023 lokulandelela SDG 7:Umbiko wokuqhubeka kwamandla uxwayisa ukuthi imizamo yamanje ayanele ukuthola Isdg 7 ngesikhathi. Sekunokuqhubeka kwezinye izinto zokuxoxwa kweSDG 7-isibonelo,ukunyuka kwezinga lokusebenzisa okwenziwa kabusha emkhakheni wamandla-kodwa ukuqhubeka akwanele ukufinyelela kokuqondiwe ukuhlelela okuzayo kwamaSDG. Inkinga yamandla emhlabeni kulindeleke ukuthi yenze ukubekwa kokwenza kabusha nokukwenza kangcono ukusebenza kahle kwamandla ngenqubomgomo embalwa kahulumeni okukhombisa ukunyuka kotshalomali.
translations.hypothesis: Umkhakha wohlelo uqukethe ukufinyelela konke kumandla kagesi kanye nokupheka okuhlanzekile, ukwandisa kabili amazinga amandulo okuthuthukiswa, kanye nokwandisa kakhulu ingxenye yamandla avuselelekile kuyo yonke indawo emhlabeni. Ukufinyelela kulo mkhakha kuzoba nomthelela omkhulu empilweni kanye nokukhululeka kwabantu, kuthakaselwe ukubavikela ezinkingeni zemvelo nezomphakathi ezifana nokungcola komoya, kanye nokwandisa ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zempilo ezibalulekile. Uhlelo lonyaka ka-2023 oluthi "Ukulandelela i-SDG 7: Umbiko Wokuthuthuka Kwezamandla" uqaphela ukuthi imizamo yamanje ayanele ukufinyelela i-SDG 7 ngesikhathi esifanelekile. Kukhona ukuthuthuka okuthile ezici ezithile ze-SDG 7 – ngokwesibonelo, ukwandiswa kwesimo sokusetshenziswa kwamandla avuselelekile emkhakheni wamandla – kodwa ukuthuthuka akwanele ukufinyelela kulezo zinhloso ezibekwe yi-SDGs. Kucatshangwa ukuthi ingxabano yamanje yamandla emhlabeni izophakamisa ukusetshenziswa kwamandla avuselelekile futhi ithuthukise ukusebenza kahle kwamandla, kanti izinqubomgomo eziningi kahulumeni zibonisa ukwandiswa kokutshalwa kwezimali.

translations.source: However, IRENA estimates show that international public financial flows in support of clean energy in low- and middle-income countries have been decreasing since before the COVID-19 pandemic and funding is limited to a small number of countries. To meet SDG 7 targets and to ensure that people fully benefit from the socio-economic gains of the shift to sustainable energy, it is necessary to structurally reform international public finance and define new opportunities to unlock investments. The report also finds that mounting debt and rising energy prices are worsening the outlook for reaching universal access to clean cooking and electricity. Current projections estimate that 1.9 billion people will be without clean cooking and 660 million without electricity access in 2030 if we do not take further action and continue with current efforts. These gaps will negatively impact the health of our most vulnerable populations and accelerate climate change.
translations.reference: Kepha i-IRENA isilinganiso sikhombisa ukuthi ukuhamba kwezimali zomphakathi wamazwe angaphandle ekwesekweni kwamandla ahlanzekile emazweni anemali engenayo encane nephakathi nendawo kulokhu kwehla kusukela ngobhubhane leCOVID-19 futhi nixhasomali lunomkhawulo enambeni encane yamazwe. Ukuhlangabezana nokuqondwe yiSDG 7 nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazuza ngokugcwele ekuzuzeni kwezomnotho wenhlalo wokushintsha kokugcineka kwamandla, kubalulekile ukuhlela ukwakha kabusha kwezimali zomphakathi wamazwe angaphandle nokuchaza amathuba amasha ukuvula utshalomali. Umbiko uphinde uthole ukuthi ukunyuka kwesikweletu nokunyuka kwamanani amandla aqhubekisa ukubukeka kokufinyelela emhlabeni ekuphekeni okuhlanzekile kanye nogesi. Izikhombiso zamanje zihlawumbisela ukuthi izigidigidi ezingu-1.9 abantu bazobe bengenakho ukupheka okuhlanzekile futhi izigidi ezingu-660 zizobe zingenawo ugesi ngo-2030 uma singathathi isinyathelo futhi siqhubeke nemizamo yamanje. Lezi zikhala zizoba nomthelela omubi kwezempilo kusibalo sabantu abahluphekile nokukhuphula ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu.
translations.hypothesis: Nokho, izibalo ze-IRENA zibonisa ukuthi ukukhokhwa kwezimali zomphakathi kazwelonke ukuxhasa amandla ahlanzekile ezizweni ezinezinkampani ezincane nezamaphakathi kuye luncipha kusukela ngaphambi kwecala le-COVID-19, futhi imali etholakalayo ixhasa kuphela izizwe ezimbalwa. Ukufinyelela izinhloso ze-SDG 7 kanye nokwenza kube yiqiniso ukuthi abantu bazuzwe ngokugcwele kwiinzuzo zombusoshoni nezezomnotho zokuguquka kwamandla ahlanzekile, kudingeka ukuguqulwa kabusha kwezindlela zokukhokha zama-phondo kazwelonke kanye nokuchaza ithuba elisha lokwenza ukutshalwa kwezimali kube nokwenzeka. Leli phaphostshi futhi lithi ukwandiswa kwezibalo zokwephula kanye nokunyuka kwamapulaki yamandla kukhuthaza ukuthi kube nzima ukufinyelela kuzo zonke izindawo ngamandla okupheka ahlanzekile namandla kagesi. Izibalo zamanje zibonisa ukuthi cishe abantu abayi-1.9 billion abangeke bafinyelele amandla okupheka ahlanzekile futhi abantu abayi-660 million abangeke bafinyelele amandla kagesi ngo-2030 uma singenzi okwengeziyo futhi siqhubeke nezindlela esizenzile. Lezi zinkinga zizoba nomthelela omubi empilweni yezigidi zabantu ezithintekayo kakhulu futhi zenza ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu kube ngokushesha.

translations.source: According to WHO, 3.2 million people die each year from illness caused by the use of polluting fuels and technologies, which increase exposure to toxic levels of household air pollution. Key findings of the report In 2010, 84% of the world’s population had access to electricity. This increased to 91% in 2021, meaning more than a billion people gained access over that period. However, the growth pace of access slowed in 2019–2021 compared to previous years.
translations.reference: Ngokwe WHO, izigidi ezingu-3.2 zabantu ziyafa unyaka ngamunye ngokugula okudalwe ukusebenzisa amafuwela angcolisayo kanye nobuchwepheshe, okukhuphula ukuthola amazinga angakhazayo emakhaya omoya ongcolile. Imiphumela ebalulekile yombiko Ngo-2010 u-84% esibalweni sabantu emhlabeni ebesithola ugesi. Lokhu kwanyuka ngo-91% ngo-2021, okusho ukuthi ngaphezu kwezigidigidi zabantu bathole ukungena kulesosikhathi. Kepha izinga lokukhula ukungena lehlile ngo-2019-2021 uma uqhathanisa neminyaka edlule.
translations.hypothesis: Ngokwama-WHO, abantu abayi-3.2 million bayashona ngonyaka ngenxa yezifo ezibangelwa ukusetshenziswa kwamagasili nezindlela zokukhiqiza ezenza umoya ube mubi, okwandisa ukuchayeka kwezinga ezinkulu zombutho emoyeni ngaphakathi kwezindlu. Okuyinto ebalulekile yalo mbiko: Nango-2010, u-84% wabantu bomhlaba banokufinyelela kukagesi. Lesi sikhathi sanda ibanga liye ku-91% ngo-2021, okusho ukuthi abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezinkulu bathole ukufinyelela kulo kulesikhathi. Kodwa, ukukhula kokufinyelela kulesi simo kuncitshisiwe ngango-2019–2021 uma kuqhathaniswa neminyaka yangaphambilini.

translations.source: Rural electrification efforts contributed to this progress, but a large gap within urban areas remains. In 2021, 567 million people in sub-Saharan Africa did not have access to electricity, accounting for more than 80% of the global population without access. The access deficit in the region stayed almost the same as in 2010. The world remains off track to achieve universal access to clean cooking by 2030. Up to 2.3 billion people still use polluting fuels and technologies for cooking, largely in sub-Saharan Africa and Asia.
translations.reference: Imizamo yokufaka ugesi ezindaweni zasemakhaya kube nomthelela kulokhu kuqhubeka kodwa isikhala esikhulu sisakhona ezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Ngo-2021 u-567 wezigidi zabantu esub-Saharan Afrika abangakwazanga ukuthola ugesi,babalelwa ngaphezu kuka-80% wesibalo sabantu emhlabeni abangenawo ugesi. Ukushoda kokungena kusifunda kwahlala kufana kwaze kwaba u-2010. Umhlaba uyaphuma endleleni ukuze uthole ukungena komhlaba ekuphekeni okuhlanzekile ngo-2030. Kufika ku-2.3 izigidi zabantu abasasebenzisa amafuweli angcolisayo kanye nobuchwepheshe bokupheka ikakhulukazi esub-Saharan Afrika ne-Asia.
translations.hypothesis: Imizamo yokunikeza ugesi ezindaweni zasemakhaya ibanga kulo mkhakha, kodwa kukhona ukungalingani okukhulu ezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Nango-2021, amakhulu ayizinkulungwane ezingu-567 abantu e-Afrika eseningizimu ye-Sahara ayenawo ukufinyelela kugesi, okubalwa kabanzi kunama-80% wabantu bomhlaba abangenawo ukufinyelela. Ukungalingani ekufinyeleleni kugesi kuleli zwe lihlale cishe ngamanani afanayo njengango-2010. Umhlaba usasengaphambili ekufinyeleleni ekuphekeni okuhlanzekile kuwo wonke umuntu ngowe-2030. Kuze kufike kuma-bhiliyoni angu-2.3 abantu asasasebenzisa amafutha nezindlela zokupheka ezilimazayo, kakhulu e-Afrika eseningizimu ye-Sahara nase-Asia.

translations.source: The use of traditional biomass also means households spend up to 40 hours a week gathering firewood and cooking, which prohibits women from pursuing employment or participating in local decision-making bodies and children from going to school. According to the 2019 WHO estimates, 3.2 million premature deaths each year were attributable to household air pollution created by using polluting fuels and technologies for cooking. Renewable electricity use in global consumption has grown from 26.3% in 2019 to 28.2% in 2020, the largest single-year increase since the start of tracking progress for the SDGs. Efforts to increase renewables’ share in heating and transport, which represent more than three quarters of global energy consumption, remain off target to achieve 1.5oC climate objectives. Energy intensity – the measure of how much energy the global economy uses per dollar of GDP – improved from 2010–2020 by 1.8% annually.
translations.reference: Ukusebenzisa ibhayomesi yomdabu kuphinde kusho ukuthi amakhaya asebenzisa kufinyelele kumahora angu-40 ngesonto ukuhlanganisa izinkuni nokupheka, okuvimbela abantu besifazane ukuthi babheke imisebenzi noma babambe iqhaza ekuthathweni kwezinqumbo emphakathini kanye nokuvimbela izingane ukuthi ziye esikoleni. NgokweWHO ya-2019 kulinganiselwa kuzigidi ezingu-3.2 ukufa ngaphambi kwesikhathi unyaka ngamunye okwenzeke ekhaya lokungcoliswa komoya okwenziwe ukusebenzisa amafuwela angcolisayo kanye nobuhcwepheshe bokupheka. Ugesi ovuselelekayo osetshenziswayo ekugcineni komhlaba sekukhule kusuka ku-26.3% ngo-2019 kuya ku-28.2% ukunyka okukhulu konyaka owodwa kusukela kuqala ukuqhubeka kokulandelela kweSDGs. Imizamo yokunyusa okuvuselelwayo ukwabelana ekushiseni kanye nokuthutha okungaveza okungaphezu kwamakota amathathu okugcina amandla omhlaba, kugcina kuphuma kokuqondiwe ukuthola 1.5oc wezinjongo zesimo sezulu. Isisindo samandla-isikalo sokuthi mandla angakanani asetshenziswa umnotho womhlaba ngedola ngalinye leGDP-kuthuthuke kusuka 2010-2020 ngo-1.8% ngonyaka.
translations.hypothesis: Ukusebenzisa izinto zokusisa ezindala kusho ukuthi amakhaya achitha kuze kufike emahoreni angu-40 ngesonto ukuqoqa udoti kanye nokupheka, okubaleka izinduna ukuthi bathole umsebenzi noma bathabathe ubuningi ezinkundleni zokwenza izinqumo ezifunda, kanye nezingane ukuthi zifunde ezikoleni. Ngokusho kwezibalo ze-WHO zango-2019, izigidi ezingu-3.2 zifo ezibulalayo ngonyaka zibangelwe ukungcola komoya emakhaya, okubangelwa ukusetshenziswa kwezinto zokusisa eziyingozi kanye nezindlela zokupheka. Ukusetshenziswa kwamandla kagesi avuselelekayo ekusetshenzisweni emhlabeni jikelele kukhule kusukela ku-26.3% ngango-2019 kuya ku-28.2% ngango-2020, okuyinkuthalo enkulu kakhulu ngonyaka kusukela ekuqaleni kokulandelela intuthuko ye-SDGs. Umzamo wokwandisa ukuthi amandla avuselelekayo athathwe kakhulu ekufudeni nasezokuthutha, okubalwa njengengxenye engaphezu kwamandla amathathu kokuqeqeshwa kwamandla emhlabeni jikelele, usasazange ufeze izinhloso zenguquko yezulu ezingu-1.5oC. Ukukhishwa kwamandla – ukulinganisa ukuthi umnotho womhlaba jikelele usebenzisa amanani amangaki amandla ngalinye liredi ye-GDP – kuthuthukile ngamaphesenti angu-1.8 ngonyaka kusukela ngo-2010 kuya ku-2020.

translations.source: This is higher than the 1.2% improvement from the previous decades. However, the rate of energy intensity improvement has slowed in recent years and dropped to 0.6% in 2020. This makes it the worst year for energy intensity improvement since the global financial crisis, albeit largely due to pandemic-related restrictions, which may indicate only a temporary setback. Annual improvements through 2030 must now average 3.4% to meet the SDG target 7.3. International public financial flows in support of clean energy in developing countries stand at US$ 10.8 billion in 2021, 35% less than the 2010–2019 average and only about 40% of the 2017 peak of US$ 26.4 billion. In 2021, 19 countries received 80% of the commitments.The report will be presented to top decision-makers at a special launch event on 11 July 2023 at the High-Level Political Forum (HLPF) on Sustainable Development, ahead of the second SDG Summit in September 2023 in New York.
translations.reference: Lokhu kungaphezu kuka-1.2% wokwenza ngcono kusukela kushumi minyaka eyedlule. Kepha, izinga lokuthuthuka kwesisindo samandla sekwehlile eminyakeni yakamuva futhi kwehla kwafika ku-0.6% ngo-2020. Lokhu kwenza kube unyaka omubi wokwenzangcono isisindo samandla kusukela kunezinkinga zezimali zomhlaba,yize noma kukukhulu ngenxa yemigomo ehlobene nobhubhane, okungakhombisa ukubuyela emuva okwesikhashana. Ukuthuthuka konyaka ngo-2030 kumele manje kube isilinganiso sika-3.4% ukuhlangabezana nokuqondwe yiSDG ka-7.3 wokuhamba kwezezimali zamazwe omhlaba ukweseka amandla ahlanzekile emazweni asathuthuka okumi ku-US$10.8 wezigidigidi ngo-2021 ngaphansi kwesilinganiso sika-2010-2019 futhi kungafinyelela ku-40% wokuphezulu kwa-2017 we-U$ 26.4 wezigidigidi. Ngo-2021 amazwe angu-19 athola u-80% wokuzibophezela. Umbiko uzokwethula kubathathi zinqumo abaphezulu ekwethulweni okukhethekile umcimbi ngo-11 kuNtulikazi 2023 eHigh-Level Political Forum (HLPF) kuSustainable Development, ngaphambi kweyesibili iSDG Summit ngoMandulo 2023 eNew York.
translations.hypothesis: Lolu phuzu phezulu kunokuthuthuka okungu-1.2% okuboniswe eminyakeni edlule. Kodwa-ke, isilinganiso sokuthuthuka kwezindlela zokusebenzisa amandla sishiye kancane kule minyaka yamuva futhi saba ngu-0.6% ngonyaka ka-2020. Lokhu kwenza ngunyaka omubi kakhulu wokuthuthuka kwezindlela zokusebenzisa amandla kusukela ngemuva kwecala lezezimali emhlabeni jikelele, nakuba kungenxa enkulu yemithetho ebalulekile ngenxa yobhubhane, okungase kubonise ukuthi lesi yinkinga esheshayo nje. Ukuthuthuka kwaminyaka yonke kuze kube ngu-2030 kufanele kusilinganise ku-3.4% ukuze kufinyelelwe kule nqubo ye-SDG 7.3. Ukuhambisana kwezimali zomphakathi kazwelonke ukuxhasa amandla ahlanzekile ezizweni ezithuthukayo bekuyi-$10.8 billion ngonyaka ka-2021, okungaphansi ngama-35% kunesilinganiso esiphakathi kuka-2010 kuya ku-2019, futhi kungaba cishe amaphesenti angu-40 kuphela walokho okubalwa njengaphezulu kakhulu ngonyaka ka-2017, okuyi-$26.4 billion. Ngonyaka ka-2021, amazwe ayi-19 athole amaphesenti ayi-80 yalokho okuthengisiwe. Lolu hlelo luzokwethulwa kubaholi abaphezulu ezinqumweni ngesigaba esikhethekile ngomhla ka-11 Julayi 2023 kwi-High-Level Political Forum (HLPF) mayelana nokuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo, ngaphambi kwengqungquthela yesibili ye-SDG eNew York ngoSepthemba 2023.

translations.source: The authors urge the international community and policymakers to safeguard the gains made toward achieving SDG 7, to advance structural reforms, and to maintain a strategic focus on the vulnerable countries needing the most support. Quotes: “The energy crisis sparked by Russia’s invasion of Ukraine continues to have a profound impact on people all around the world. High energy prices have hit the most vulnerable hard, particularly those in developing economies. While the clean energy transition is moving faster than many think, there is still a great deal of work needed to deliver sustainable, secure and affordable access to modern energy services for the billions of people who live without it. Successful energy transitions rely on effective policies and technological innovation combined with large-scale mobilisation of investment capital.
translations.reference: Ababhali bancenga umphakathi wamazwe angaphandle kanye nabenzi benqumomgomo ukuthi bagcine okuzuzwayo ukwenza ukuqhubekela phambili ekutholeni iSDG7 ukuqhubeza ukuhlela ukwenza kabusha nokugcina isu lokugxila emazweni ahluphekile adinga ukwesekwa okukhulu. Okucashuniwe: "Izinkinga zamandla ezivezwe ukungena kweRussia ku Ukraine kuyaqhubeka kuba umthelela ozwakalayo kubantu emhlabeni wonke. Amanani amandla aphezulu aselimaze kanzima abahluphekayo, ikakhulukazi labo abaneminotho esathuthuka. Ngesikhathi ukuguquka kwamandla ahlanzekile kwenzeka ngokushesha ukune ndlela obucabanga ngayo, kusanokukhulu komsebenze odingekayo ukuletha ukugcineka, ukuvikela kanye okukhoneka ukungena emisebenzini yamandla amanje ngezigidigidi zabantu abaphila ngaphandle kwawo. Ukuphumelela kokuguquka kwamandla kuncike ekusebenzeni kwenqubomgomo nokwenza kabusha ezobuchwepheshe kuhlanganiswe nokuhlanganisa okuyisikali esiphezulu sengqalabhizinisi yotshalomali.
translations.hypothesis: Ababhali bacebisa umphakathi wamazwe ngamazwe kanye nabagqugquzeli izinqubomgomo ukuthi bagcine izinto ezifezekwe ekufinyelelweni kwe-SDG 7, bathuthukise ukuguqulelwa kwezinto ezibalulekile, futhi bagcine ukugxilwa okubalulekile ezweni elithintekayo elidinga usizo olukhulu kakhulu. Izitatimende: "Ingxabano yamanzi yasentambo ebabanjwe yiRussia ekuhlaselweni kwe-Ukraine iyaqhubeka nokuba nemiphumela emikhulu kubantu abaningi emhlabeni jikelele. Amanani aphezulu kakhulu kamanzi asebenzayo asebenze kakhulu kulabo abathintekayo kakhulu, ikakhulukazi labo ezomnotho ogxile ekuthuthukisweni. Nakuba ukuguqulelwa kwamandla ahlanzekile kuya ngokushesha kunalokho abaningi okucabanga, kusafanele kwenziwe umsebenzi omkhulu ukuze kuhlinzekwe ngokufinyelela okulinganiselwe, okuphephile futhi okufanelekile kumasevisi amandla amadala kubantu abayizigidi abaningibali abaphila ngaphandle kwalokho. Ukuguqulelwa kwamandla okwaphumelela kuxhomekile ezinqubomgomo ezisebenzayo kanye nokwanda kwezobuchwepheshe, kanye nokuhlanganyelwa okukhulu kwezimali zokutshala izimali.

translations.source: The international community must leverage all these tools to meet the Sustainable Development Goals by the end of this decade.” Fatih Birol, Executive Director, International Energy Agency “Cost-competitive renewable energy has yet again demonstrated remarkable resilience, but the poorest in the world are still largely unable to fully benefit from it. To realise SDG7 without compromising climate goals, we must bring about systemic change in the way international cooperation works. It is crucial that multilateral financial institutions direct financial flows more equitably around the world to support renewables deployment and related physical infrastructure development.” Francesco La Camera, Director-General, International Renewable Energy Agency “Despite advances towards sustainable energy targets at the mid-point of Agenda 2030, Goal 7 seems harder to reach than it was in 2015 and scaled-up action is necessary if we are to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all by 2030.
translations.reference: Umphakathi wamazwe angaphandle kumele ubambise wonke lamathuluzi ukuhlangana neSustainable Development Goals ekupheleni kwalelishumunyaka." uFatih Birol. Umqondisi omkhulu, we-Ejensi yaMandla Amazwe angaphandle. "Ukuncintisana kwamandla avuselelwayo sekuphinde kwakhombisa amandla okumelana ancomekayo, kodwa abahluphekayo emhlabeni abakwazi ukuthola ngokugcwele kuyona. Ukubona iSDG7 ngaphandle kwesivumelwano sezinhloso zesimo sezulu kumele silethe uhlelo loshintsho ngendlela ukusebenza kwamazwe angaphandle kusebenza ngayo. Kubucayi ukuthi izikhungo zezimali eziningi ziqondisa ukuhamba kwezimali ngokulingana emhlabeni wonke ukweseka ukubekwa okuvuselelwayo okuhlobene nokuthuthuka kwengqalasizinda siqu," uFrancesco La Camera, Umqondisi Jikelele weInternational Renewable Energy Agency. "Ngaphandle kokuqhubeka okuya kokuqondiwe kwamandla agcinekile endaweni ephakathi nendawo ye-Agenda ka-2030, Inhloso 7 ibukeka inzima ukufika ukunokuba kwakunjalo ngo-2015 nokunyuka futhi kokwenza kubalulekile uma sifuna ukuqinisekisa ukungena kokukhonekayo, okuthembekile, okugcinekayo namandla esikhathi samanje kuwona wonke umuntu ngo-2030.
translations.hypothesis:
Umphakathi wamazwe ngamazwe kufanele usebenzise wonke lawa amathuluzi ukuze kufinyelelwe kazo zonke izinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezihlala njalo ngaphambi kokuphothulwa kwalesi shumi. - Fatih Birol, Umphathi Omkhulu, i-International Energy Agency.

"Amandla avuselelekayo anentengo engcono manje selibonise ukuguquka okumangalisayo, kodwa abantu abampofu kakhulu emhlabeni bayasala abanako ukuzifaka kakhulu kulokhu. Ukufinyelela kulelo njongo lesi-7 (SDG7) ngaphandle kokuhlaziywa kwezinjongo zenguquko yezulu, kufanele senze izinguquko ezinkulu endlela yokusebenzisana kwamahhovisi kazwelonke. Kubalulekile ukuthi izikhungo zokuxhaswa kwezezimali ezinezinkampani eziningi ziqondise ukuhamba kwezimali ngendlela efanele kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele ukuze kuxhaswe ukusetshenziswa kwamandla avuselelekayo kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwempahla yangempela ehlobene nayo." - Francesco La Camera, Umphathi Jikelele, i-International Renewable Energy Agency.

"Noma kunjalo, naphezu kokuphothulwa kwezinjongo zokuthuthukiswa kwamandla ezihlala njalo phakathi kwegeyini yesi-2030, kubonakala ukuthi kunzima kakhulu ukufinyelela kulelo njongo lesi-7 kunalokho okwakukhona ngonyaka ka-2015, futhi kudingeka ukuthuthukiswa okukhulu uma sifuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu ufinyelela kumandla afikelelekayo, athembekile, athuthukisiwe futhi amodern ngaphambi kuka-2030."

translations.source: Access to electricity and clean cooking still display great regional disparities and should be the focus of action to ensure that no one is left behind. Investment needs to reach the least-developed countries and sub-Saharan Africa to ensure more equitable progress toward Goal 7.” Stefan Schweinfest, United Nations Statistics Division “Despite a recent slowdown in the global pace of electrification, the number of people without electricity almost halved over the past decade, from 1.1 billion in 2010 down to 675 million in 2021. Nonetheless, additional efforts and measures must urgently be put in place to ensure that the poorest and hardest-to-reach people are not left behind. To reach universal access by 2030, the development community must scale up clean energy investments and policy support.” Guangzhe Chen, Vice President for Infrastructure, World Bank
translations.reference: Ukuthola ugesi nokupheka okuhlanzekile kusakhombisa kusakhombisa ukwahlukana okukhulu esifundeni futhi kumele kugxile ekwenzeni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akekho oshiywe ngemuva. Utshalomali ludinga ukufika emazweni amaningi asathuthuka nesub Saharan Afrika ukuqinisekisa ukuqhubeka okulinganayo okuya kuGoal 7." uStefan Schweinfest, we-United Nations Statistics Division. "Ngaphandle kokwehla kwakamuva ekuhambeni komhlaba kwagesi,inamba yabantu abangenawo ugesi cishe isihhafuliwe kulelishuminyaka eledlule kusuka kwizigidigidi ezingu-1,1 ngo-2010 kwehla kuya ku-675 izigisi ngo-2021. Kodwa ke, imizamo eyengeziwe kanye nezikalo kumele kubekwe endaweni efanele ngokuphuthuma ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abahluphekile kanye nabantu okunzima ukubathola abashiyeki emuva. Ukufika ekungeneni komhlaba ngo-2030, intuthuko yomphakathi kumele inyuse utshalomali lwamandla oluhlanzekile kanye nokweseka inqubomgomo." uGuangzhe Chen, Usekela Mongameli weNgqalasizinda World Bank.
translations.hypothesis:
Ukufinyelela kukagesi kanye nokupheka okuhlanzekile kusazwakala ukwahlukahluka okukhulu ezindaweni ezihlukene, futhi kufanele kube yinto ebalulekile yokuthuthukiswa ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akekho oshaywa ngemuva. Ukutshalwa kwezimali kufanele fiwe ezweni ezinezimo ezimbi kakhulu kanye ne-Afrika esenyakatho ye-Sahara ukuqinisekisa ukuqhubeka okulinganiselwe ngenjongo yesi-7.

– Stefan Schweinfest, Umnyango Wezibalo Wezizwe ZeHlangano.

"Noma kunjalo, ngaphandle kokuba kuncike kakhulu ekukhuliseni ukufinyelela kukagesi emhlabeni jikelele, inani labantu abangenayo ukagesi lincike kakhulu kule minyaka eyishumi edlule, lihamba kusukela ku-1.1 billion ngonyaka ka-2010 kuya ku-675 million ngonyaka ka-2021. Kodwa-ke, kufanele kwenziwe umzamo owengeziwe kanye nezinyathelo ngokushesha ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu abampofu kakhulu kanye nalabo abasezindaweni ezinzima ukufinyelela kubo abashaywa ngemuva. Uphinde, ukuze kufinyelelwe ekufinyeleleni kuwo wonke umuntu ngonyaka ka-2030, umphakathi wokuthuthukiswa kufanele wandise ukutshalwa kwezimali emandleni okuhlanzekile kanye nokusekela kwamazwi.

– Guangzhe Chen, iPhini likaMongameli we-Infrastructure, iBhange Lomhlaba.

translations.source: “We must protect the next generation by acting now. Investing in clean and renewable solutions to support universal energy access is how we can make real change. Clean cooking technologies in homes and reliable electricity in health-care facilities can play a crucial role in protecting the health of our most vulnerable populations.” Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, World Health Organization About the report This report is published by the SDG 7 custodian agencies, the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO) and aims to provide the international community with a global dashboard to register progress on energy access, energy efficiency, renewable energy and international cooperation to advance SDG 7.
translations.reference: "Kumele sivikele isizukulwane esilandelayo ngesizokwenza manje. Ukutshala kokuhlanzekile nezixazululo ezivuselelwayo ukweseka ukungena kumandla omhlaba iyona ndlela esingenza ngayo ushintsho. Ubuchwepheshe bokupheka okuhlanzekile emakhaya nokuthembeka kukagesi ezindaweni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo kungadlala indima ebucayi ekuvikeleni ezempilo kwabahlupheke kakhulu esibalweni sabantu." UDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreysus, uMqondisi Jikelele weNhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba Ngombiko Lombiko ushicilelwe ama-ejensi ezokugcina eSDG 7, i-Internatuonal Energy Agency (IEA), i-International Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA), i-United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), iWorld Bank, neNhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO) nokuhlosa ukunikeza umphakathi wamazwe angaphandle ngedeshibhodi yomhlaba ukubhalisa ukuqhubeka ekungeneni kwamandla, ukwanela kwamandla, ukuvuselelwa kwamandla nokusebenza kwamazwe angaphandle ukuqhubeza iSDG 7.
translations.hypothesis:
"Kumele siximile isizukulwane esilandelayo ngokwenza okuthile manje. Ukutshala imali ezindleleni ezihlanzekile nezintobontobontombo ukusekela ukufinyelela kukho konke ngogesi kuyindlela esingenza ngayo uguquko real. Ubuchwepheshe bokupheka obucindezelayo ezindlini kanye negesi ethembekile ezikhungweni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo kungabandakanyeka kakhulu ekugcineni impilo yabezakhi zethu ezithintekayo kakhulu." - Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Umphathi-Jikelele we-WHO, iHhovisi Lomhlaba Lempilo.

Mayelana ngalesi phaphostshi:
Leli phaphostshi lushicilelwe yizikhungo ezibambe iqhaza ekuhloleni i-SDG 7, okuyizikhungo ezifana ne-International Energy Agency (IEA), i-International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), i-United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), iBhange Lomhlaba, kanye ne-World Health Organization (WHO), futhi ihlose ukunikeza umphakathi wase-International ideshibhodi yomhlaba ukuze kubhalwe intuthuko ekufinyeleleni ngogesi, ukusebenza kahle kwegesi, amandla entobontobontombo, kanye nokubambisana kwezizwe ukuze kuthuthukiswe i-SDG 7.

translations.source: This is the ninth edition of this report, formerly known as the Global Tracking Framework (GTF). This year’s edition was chaired by the World Health Organization (WHO). The report can be downloaded here Funding for the report was provided by the World Bank’s Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).
translations.reference: Lolu uhlobo lwesishagalolunye lwalombiko obelwaziwa ngeGlobal Tracking Framework (GTF). Uhlobo lwalonyaka lwaluphethwe yiNhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO). Umbiko ungawulanda lapha. Uxhasomali lombiko lwakhishwa yiWorld Bank Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).
translations.hypothesis: Lesi yiphini yesibili yalo mbiko, owaphambilini wayaziwa ngokuthi i-Global Tracking Framework (GTF). Le ngxenye yalo mbiko kuleli bhanga selokhu iholwa yi-World Health Organization (WHO). Lo mbiko ungatholakala lapha. Ukuxhaswa kwezezimali zalo mbiko kunikezwe yi-World Bank's Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).

translations.source: The European Commission and WHO launch landmark digital health initiative to strengthen global health security The World Health Organization (WHO) and European Commission have announced today the launch of a landmark digital health partnership. In June 2023, WHO will take up the European Union (EU) system of digital COVID-19 certification to establish a global system that will help facilitate global mobility and protect citizens across the world from on-going and future health threats, including pandemics. This is the first building block of the WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) that will develop a wide range of digital products to deliver better health for all. “Building on the EU’s highly successful digital certification network, WHO aims to offer all WHO Member States access to an open-source digital health tool, which is based on the principles of equity, innovation, transparency and data protection and privacy,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Ikhomishini yaseEurope neWHO bethule isikhonkwane sokuqala ezempilo zedijithali ukuqinisa ukuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni. Inhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO) neKhomishini yase-Europe bathule namhlanje isikhonkwane sokubambisana kwezempilo zedijithali. NgoNhlangulana 2023, iWHO izothatha European Union uhlelo lwedijithali lwesitifiketi seCOVID-19 ukwenza uhlelo lomhlaba oluzosiza ukusiza ukunyakaza kwezomhlaba nokuvikela izakhamisi emhlabeni wonke ekuqhubekeni kokusabisa kwezempilo yekusasa, okubandakanya ubhubhane. Lena ibhulokhi yesakhiwo sokuqala yeWHO Global Didital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) ezodevelopha okwahlukene okuningi kwemikhiqizo yedijithali ezoletha ezempilo ezingcono kuwona wonke umuntu. "Ukwakha ku-EU ukuphumelela okukhulu kohlelokuxhumana lwesitifiketi sedijithali,WHO ihlose ukunikeza iMember State yonke ukungena kuthuluzi lezempilo yedijithali eliwumthombo ovulelelkile olugxile kumigomo yokulingana, ukwenza kabusha, ukwethembeka nokuvikelwa kwedatha nobumfihlo," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreysus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO.
translations.hypothesis: I-European Commission kanye ne-WHO ziqalise uhlelo olubalulekile lwegugu ledijithali ukuze ziqinise ukuphepha kwezempilo emhlabeni jikelele. Namuhla, i-World Health Organization (WHO) kanye ne-European Commission zamenyezelwe ukuthi ziqalise umphakama obalulekile wokubambisana kwezempilo yedijithali. NgoJuni ka-2023, i-WHO izosebenzisa uhlelo lwe-European Union (EU) lweziqu zedijithali ze-COVID-19 ukuze yakhe uhlelo lomhlaba wonke oluzosiza ekwenzeni ukuhamba komhlaba kube lula futhi kulondoloze izakhamuzi kulo lonke elasekuphileni ezinkingeni zezempilo ezijikelezayo nakwesikhathi esizayo, okubalwa nezifo ezibulalayo. Lesi yisisekelo sokuqala se-WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) ezokuthuthukisa imikhiqizo eminingi yedijithali ukuze ithuthukise ezempilo kubo bonke. "Ngokusebenzisa uhlelo olusebenza kakhulu lwe-EU lweziqu zedijithali, i-WHO ihlose ukunikeza wonke amazwe angamalungu e-WHO ukufinyelela ethuluzi ledijithali elivulekile, elisuselwe ezimfundweni zokulinganisa, ubuciko, ukucaciswa kanye nokuvikelwa kwedatha kanye namalungelo obuntu," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi-Jeneral we-WHO.

translations.source: “New digital health products in development aim to help people everywhere receive quality health services quickly and more effectively”. Based on the EU Global Health Strategy and WHO Global strategy on digital health, the initiative follows the 30 November 2022 agreement between Commissioner Kyriakides and Dr Tedros to enhance strategic cooperation on global health issues. This further bolsters a robust multilateral system with WHO at its core, powered by a strong EU.“This partnership is an important step for the digital action plan of the EU Global Health Strategy. By using European best practices we contribute to digital health standards and interoperability globally—to the benefit of those most in need. It is also a powerful example of how alignment between the EU and the WHO can deliver better health for all, in the EU and across the world.
translations.reference: "Imikhiqizo yezempilo yedijithali emisha ekuthuthukiseni ehlose ukusiza abantu yonke indawo ukuthi bathole okwezempilo okufanele ngokushesha nangendlela efanele". NgokweEU Global Health Strategy neWHO Global isu lwezempilo yedijithali, umzamo ulandela isivumelwano sangomhlaka-30 kuLwezi 2022 phakathi kweKhomishini Kyriakides noDkt Tedros ukwengesa isu lokusebenza ezinkingeni zempilo zomhlaba. Lokhu kuqhubeka kwezeseko kohlelo olukhulu lokuningi neWHO kanye nomongo, kunikwa amandla yi-EU eqinile. "Lokhu kubambisana kuyigxathu elibalulekile lohlelo lokwenza lwedijithali le-EU Global Health Strategy. Ngokusebenzisa ukwenza okuhle kwaseEurope sifaka isandla kumazinga ezempilo yedijithali kanye nokusebenzisana emhlabeni-ukuze kuzuze bonke abadingayo. Kuphinde kube yiibonelo esinamandla ukuthi kuhambisana kanjani phakathi kwe-EU neWHO ukuletha ezempilo engcono kuwona wonke umuntu, ku-EU nasemhlabeni wonke.
translations.hypothesis: “Imikhiqizo emisha yedijithali yezempilo esekulungiswa ihlose ukusiza abantu kuyo yonke indawo ukuthi bathole izinsizakalo zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ngokushesha nangokusebenzayo kakhulu.” Ngokusekelwe kuhlaka lwezokwelapha lomhlaba jikelele lwe-EU kanye nohlelo lwe-WHO olumhlaba jikelele mayelana nezempilo zedijithali, le nqubo ilandela isivumelwano esenziwe ngomhla ka-30 Novemba 2022 phakathi kukaMphathisitho Kyriakides noDkt. Tedros mayelana nokuthuthukisa ukubambisana kwezobuchwepheshe ezindabeni zezempilo zomhlaba jikelele. Lokhu kwenza kube namandla okwengeziwe uhlelo oluqinile olwenza ukubambisana, olunamandla kakhulu, eliholwa yi-WHO, elixhaswe yi-EU enamandla. "Lolu budlelwano bungoqobo olubalulekile ohlelweni lodijithali lwehlaka lwezokwelapha lomhlaba jikelele lwe-EU. Ngokusebenzisa izindlela ezihle kakhulu zaseYurophu, sinikela ekuthuthukisweni kwezinga zezempilo zedijithali kanye nokusebenzelana emhlabeni wonke—ngokusebenzela labo abadinga kakhulu. Futhi, yisibonelo esinamandla sokuthi ukuhambisana phakathi kwe-EU ne-WHO kungenza ukuthi wonke umuntu uthole izempilo ezihle, ngaphakathi kwe-EU nakuyo yonke imiphakathi yomhlaba."

translations.source: As the directing and coordinating authority on international health work, there is no better partner than the WHO to advance the work we started at the EU and further develop global digital health solutions,” said Stella Kyriakides, Commissioner for Health and Food Safety. This partnership will include close collaboration in the development, management and implementation of the WHO GDHCN system, benefitting from the European Commission’s ample technical expertise in the field. A first step is to ensure that the current EU digital certificates continue to function effectively.“ With 80 countries and territories connected to the EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, the EU has set a global standard. The EU certificate has not only been an important tool in our fight against the pandemic, but has also facilitated international travel and tourism.
translations.reference: Njengokuqondisa negunya lokuxhumanisa emsebenzini wezempilo wamazwe angaphandle, akekho umbambisani ongcono ukunoWHO ukuqhubekisa umsebenzi esesiwuqalile eEU nokuqhubela ukudevelopha izixazululo zempilo yedijithali yomhlaba," kusho uStella Kyriakides, Ikhomishani yeZempilo noKuphepha koKudla. Lokhu kubambisana kuzofaka ukubambisana kwezentuthuko, ukuphatha nokwenza kohlelo lweWHO GDHCN ukuzuza kuKhomishini ye-Europe kongoti bezobuchwepheshe kulomkhakha. Igxathu lokuqala ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izitifiketi zedijithali zamanje ze-EU ziyaqhubeka zisebenza kahle. Namazwe angu 80 kanye nezindawo ezixhumene nesitifiketi se-EU Digital COVID-19, i-EU isiyenze izinga lomhlaba. Isitifiketi se-EU asibanga yithuluzi elibalulekile kuphela ekulweni kwethu nobhubhane kodwa kodwa siphinde sasiza ezokuvakasha nokuhamba kwamazwe angaphandle.
translations.hypothesis: Njengohlelo olukhulu lokulawula kanye nokuhlela emsebenzini wezempilo kazwelonke, akukho umlingani ongcono kunoWHO ukuthuthukisa umsebenzi osiqalile e-EU futhi sithuthukise izixazululo zempilo yedijithali zamazwe ngamazwe," kusho uStella Kyriakides, iKomishana yezempilo kanye nokuphepha kokudla. "Lolu budlelwano buzozoba nemisebenzi edlule, okuhlanganisa ukubambisana okujulile ekuthuthukisweni, ekuphathweni nasekusetshenzisweni kohlelo lwe-WHO GDHCN, kanti kuzosetshenziswa nobuhle bokwazi obukhulu beKhomishini yaseYurophu kulo msebenzi. Okokuqala, kudingeka siqiniseke ukuthi ama-isikhathi-mbuyiselo edijithali ase-EU aqhubeke nokusebenza kahle." "Ngamawaka-80 ezizwe nezifunda ezixhumekile kwi-EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, i-EU isethe umlingo womhlaba wonke. I-certificate ye-EU ayikaze ibe ithuluzi elibalulekile empini yethu ngalesi sifo, kodwa futhi isize ukuhweba kanye nokuvakasha kazwelonke.

translations.source: I am pleased that the WHO will build on the privacy-preserving principles and cutting-edge technology of the EU certificate to create a global tool against future pandemics,” added Thierry Breton, Commissioner for Internal Market. A global WHO system building on EU legacy One of the key elements in the European Union’s work against the COVID-19 pandemic has been digital COVID-19 certificates. To facilitate free movement within its borders, the EU swiftly established interoperable COVID-19 certificates (entitled ‘EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate’ or ‘EU DCC’). Based on open-source technologies and standards it allowed also for the connection of non-EU countries that issue certificates according to EU DCC specifications, becoming the most widely used solution around the world.
translations.reference: Ngiyajabula ukuthi Iwho izokwakha kumigomo yokugcina ubumfihlo nezobuchwepheshe eziphambili kwesitifiketi se-EU ukwenza ithuluzi lomhlaba lobhubhane lwekusasa, kwengeza uThierry Breton, Ikhomishini yeMakethe yaMazwe angaphandle. Uhlelo lomhlaba lweWHO lwakha efeni le-EU Enye yezinto ezibalulekile emsebenzini weEuropean Union okubhekene nobhubhane lweCOVID-19 sekube yizitifiketi zeCOVID-19. Ukusiza ukuhamba ngokukhululeka kumingcele yayo, i-EU yashesha yenza ukusebenzisana ngezitifiketi zeCOVID-19 (ezisihloko 'EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate' noma i-'EU DCC'). Ngokwezobuchwepheshe obuvulelekile bezobuchwepheshe namazinga kuphinde kuvumele konke ukuxhumana bamazwe angekho kuEU akhipha izitifiketi ngokwe-EU DCC iziqondiso, okuba okuvulelekile kakhulu kwesixazululo esisetshenzisiwe emhlabeni wonke.
translations.hypothesis: Ngijabule ukuthi i-WHO izosebenzisa izinqubo zokuvikela ubumfihlo kanye nobuchwepheshe bomusho lwe-EU ukuze yakhe ithuluzi lomhlaba wonke elo kuzosetshenziswa ukulwa nezifo ezibulalayo ezizayo,” kusho uThierry Breton, uMphathisa weMakamu yangaphakathi. Uhlelo lwe-WHO lomhlaba wonke olususelwe kulokho i-EU esiyenze. Enye yezingxenye ezibalulekile emsebenzini we-European Union ekulweni nomdlavuza we-COVID-19 kwakuyi-digital COVID-19 certificates. Ukuze kwenziwe ukuthi abantu bahambe ngokukhululekile ngaphakathi kwamagama yayo, i-EU yasungula ngokushesha ama-COVID-19 certificates ahambisana (ayaziwa ngokuthi 'EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate' noma 'EU DCC'). Ngokusekelwe kubuchwepheshe kanye nezindinganiso ezivulekile, kwavumela ukuthi izizwe ezingeyona ze-EU ezikhishwa izitifiketi ngokuya ngamazinga e-EU DCC zixhumanwe, okwenza kube yisixazululo esasetshenziswa kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele.

translations.source: From the onset of the pandemic, WHO engaged with all WHO Regions to define overall guidelines for such certificates. To help strengthen global health preparedness in the face of growing health threats, WHO is establishing a global digital health certification network which builds upon the solid foundations of the EU DCC framework, principles and open technologies. With this collaboration, WHO will facilitate this process globally under its own structure with the aim to allow the world to benefit from convergence of digital certificates. This includes standard-setting and validation of digital signatures to prevent fraud. In doing so, WHO will not have access to any underlying personal data, which would continue to be the exclusive domain of governments.
translations.reference: Kusukela ekuqaleni kobhubhane, iWHO yakhuluma nazo zonke izifunda zeWHO ukuchaza imibandela yonke yezitifiketi. Ukusiza ukuqinisa ukuzilungiselela ezempilo komhlaba ukubhekana nokukhula kokusabisa kwezempilo, iWHO yakha uhlelokuxhumana lwesitifiketi sezempilo yedijithali yomhlaba eyakhiwa phezu kwesisekelo esiqinile yomhlahlandlela we-EU DCC, imigomo kanye nezobuchwepheshe obuvulelekile. Lokhu kubambisana iWHO izosiza loluhlelo emhlabeni ngaphansi kwesakhiwo sayo ngenhloso yokuvumela ukuthi umhlaba uhlomule ekujikeni kwezitifiketi zedijithali. Lokhu kubandakanya ukuhlela izinga nokuqinisekiswa kwemisayino yedijithali ukuze kugwenywe ukukhwabanisa. Ngokwenza njalo, iWHO ngeke ikwazi ukungena kweminye imininingo yomuntu, okuzoqhubeka kube umkhakha owehlukile wahulumeni.
translations.hypothesis: Kusukela ekuqaleni kwalesi sigulukwane, i-WHO ibambe iqhaza nazo zonke izindawo ze-WHO ukuze kukhonywe imigomo ejwayelekile yalezi ziqu. Ukuze kukhuliswe ukulungiselela ezempilo emhlabeni jikelele ngokuphila kwezinkinga zezempilo ezikhulayo, i-WHO iyalungisa inethiwekhi yomhlaba wonke yeziqu zempilo ezidijithali, okuyinto esuselwa ezisekelweni ezibanzi zephrojekthi ye-EU DCC, imithetho, kanye nezobuchwepheshe ezivulekile. Ngale ndlela yokubambisana, i-WHO izophakamisa le nqubo kulo lonke elasekuphileni ngaphansi kwakho konke, ngenhloso yokuvumela umhlaba ukuthi usize ekuhlanganisweni kweziqu ezidijithali. Lokhu kufaka ukusethwa kwezinga kanye nokuhlolwa kwezimpawu ezidijithali ukuze kuvikelwe ukubulala. Ngale ndlela, i-WHO ngeke ibe nokufinyelela kunoma yimiphi imininingwane yomuntu siqu, okuyinto ezosala njengendawo ehlukile yezikhungo zikahulumeni.

translations.source: The first building block of the global WHO system becomes operational in June 2023 and aims to be progressively developed in the coming months. A long-term digital partnership to deliver better health for all To facilitate the uptake of the EU DCC by WHO and contribute to its operation and further development, WHO and the European Commission have agreed to partner in digital health. This partnership will work to technically develop the WHO system with a staged approach to cover additional use cases, which may include, for example, the digitisation of the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis. Expanding such digital solutions will be essential to deliver better health for citizens across the globe.
translations.reference: Ibhulokhu yesakhiwo sokuqala yohlelo lomhlaba lweWHO luqala ukusebenza ngoNhlangulana 2023 futhi ihlose ukuqhubeka nokudevelopha ezinyangeni ezizayo. Ukubambisana kwedijithali kwesikhathi eside ukuletha ezempilo ezingcono kuwona wonke umuntu. Ukusiza ukuthatha kwe-EU DCC yiWHO nokufaka isandla ekusebenzeni kwayo nokuqhubeka nokuthuthuka, iWHO neKhomishini yaseEurope sebevumelene ukubambisana kwezempilo yedijithali. Lokhu kubambisana kuzosebenza ukudevelopha ngezobuchwepheshe yohlelo lweWHO nokukhombisa indlela ukukhava ukusebenzisa amacala engeziwe, okungafaka, isibonelo, idijithalizeshini ye-International Certificate of Vaccination noma iProphylaxis. Ukwandisaizixazululo zedijithali ezinjalo ekwabelaneni ngokubalulekile nemigomo kuzobaluleka ukuletha ezempilo ezingcono kuzakhamizi kuwona wonke umhlaba.
translations.hypothesis: Uhlelo lokuqala lwezinhlelo zomhlaba jikelele ze-WHO luzoqala ukusebenza ngoJuni ka-2023, futhi uhambo lokuthuthukiswa kwayo luzoqhubeka ezinyangeni ezizayo. Ukubambisana kwedijithali ende nendawo ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo kubantu bonke. Ukuze kukhuthazwe ukuthi i-WHO isebenzise i-EU DCC futhi kungeniswe isandla ekusebenzeni kwayo nasekuthathekeni kwayo, i-WHO kanye neKhomishini yaseYurophu zivumile ukubambisana ezindalini zedijithali. Lolu hlobo lobambisana luzosebenza ekuthuthukiseni uhlelo lwe-WHO ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, ukuze kufakwe ezindleleni eziningi, okungenzeka ukuthi zifake, ngokwesibonelo, ukwenzwa kwezinto zedijithali zeSikhathi-Sethile Sezigcawu Zokugaywa noma Zokuvikelwa. Ukwandisa izixazululo ezinjalo zedijithali kuzoba yinto ebalulekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo yabantu kulo lonke elasekuphileni.

translations.source: This cooperation is based on the shared values and principles of transparency and openness, inclusiveness, accountability, data protection and privacy, security, scalability at a global level, and equity. The WHO and the European Commission will work together to encourage maximum global uptake and participation. Particular attention will be paid to equitable opportunities for the participation by those most in need: low and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Loku kusebenza kuncike ekwabelaneni ngokubalulekile kanue nemigomo yokwethembeka nokuvuleleka, ukufaka abanye ukwenza isibopho ukuvikelwa kwemininingo nobumfihlo, ukuphepha, ukukaleka ezingeni lomhlaba nokulingana. I-WHO neKhomishi yseEurope bazosebenza ndawonye ukukhuthaza ukuthathwa komhlaba okukhulu nokubamba iqhaza. Ukunaka okuthile kuzokhokhelwa kumathuba alinganayo ekubambeni iqhaza kulabo abanesidingo amazwe anemali engenayo encane nephakathi nendawo.
translations.hypothesis: Lo msebenzi wokubambisana ususelwe kuzinto ezifanayo nezinqubo zokukhululeka nokuvuleka, ukufakwa kwabantu bonke, ukuziphendulela, ukuvikelwa kwemininingwane kanye nokuyimfihlo, ukuphepha, ukukhuliswa kakhulu emhlabeni wonke, kanye nokulingana. I-WHO kanye neKhomishini yaseYurophu zozosebenzisana ukuze kukhuthazwe ukubamba iqhaza okukhulu kunabo bonke emhlabeni. Kwenziwe ukunakekelwa okukhethekile ezindleleni ezilinganayo zokubamba iqhaza kwabantu abadinga kakhulu: amazwe anezimali ezincane nezamaphakathi.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 30 May 2023 WHO’s annual assembly ends with agreement on funding, and array of health topics WHO’s 76th health assembly closed today, having addressed a vast array of issues, including behavioural sciences; best buys for non-communicable diseases; diagnostics; disabilities; drowning prevention; emergency, critical and operative care; food micronutrients; indigenous health; infection prevention and control; maternal and child health; medical oxygen; primary health care; refugee and migrant health;
translations.reference: Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wesi-76 - Ukubuyekezwa kosuku: ziwu-30 kuNhlaba 2023 Umhlangano wonyaka weWHO uphela ngesivumelwano soxhasomali kanye nezinhlelo zezihloko zezempilo Umhlangano wezempilo wesi-76 weWHO uyavalwa namhlanje, nokubhekana nezinhlelo eziningi zezinkinga kanye nokuziphatha kwezesayensi; ukuthenga okuhle kwezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo, ukuxilonga, ukukhubazeka, ukuvikela ukuminza, okuphuthumayo nobucayi bokusebenza kokunakekelwa; izakhamzimba ezincane zokudla; ezempilo zomdabu; ukuvikelwa kokuthelelana nokulawula; ukuzala nezempilo yomntwana; umoyampilo wezokwelapha; ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala; abangenandawo nempilo yabafuduki;
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano we-76 we-Hhovisi Lomhlaba Mayelana Nezempilo – Isibuyekezo sansuku zonke: 30 Meyi 2023. Umhlangano waminyaka yonke we-WHO uphelelwe ngokuvumelana mayelana nokuxhaswa kwezimali, kanye nezindaba eziningi mayelana nezempilo. Umhlangano we-76 wezempilo we-WHO uvale namuhla, ngemuva kokubheka izindaba eziningi, okubalwa kuzo izivivinyo zombambo, izindlela ezinhle kakhulu zokulwa nezifo ezingathathwa ngokusetshenziswa; ukuhlaziywa kwezifo; ukukhubazeka; ukwabiwa; ukunakekelwa kwezimo eziphuthumayo, ezibalulekile kanye nezokuhlinzwa; imikhiqizo emincane yokudla; ezempilo zabantu bendawo; ukugwema nokulawula ukwelapheka kwezifo; ezempilo zabanye nabantfwana; oksijeni wezokwelapha; ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ezisemqoka; ezempilo zabagijimi kanye nabathuthukisi.

translations.source: rehabilitation; traditional medicine, and WHO’s work in responding to dozens of emergencies while working with Member States to be better prepared to face new ones. Earlier in the day, delegates in Committee A agreed to note the roadmap towards the Global Health and Peace Initiative (along with a slight change in name from “Global Health for Peace Initiative”), and requested that the Director-General report on progress in strengthening the roadmap. In plenary, as the final approval step of the assembly, delegates adopted the resolutions and decisions of the two committees, and adopted their reports. This included approval of the budget for 2024-25, and a 20% increase in assessed contributions. The committee chairs and representatives from two regions spoke to recognize the work and progress of this Assembly.
translations.reference: ukuvuselelwa kwesimilo; ukwelapha ngokwesintu nosebenzi weWHO wokuphendula amadazini okuphuthumayo ngesikhathi besebenza neMember States ukuze bazilungiselele kangcono ukubhekana nezintsha. Ekuqaleni kosuku izihambeli eKomidini A zivumelene ukuqaphela umgwaqobalazwe oya kuGlobal and Peace Initiative (okuhambisana nokushintsha okuncane egameni le-"Global Health for Peace Initiative"), futhi bacela ukuthi uMqondisi Jikelele umbiko wokuqhubeka ekuqiniseni umgwaqobalazwe. Ohlelweni njengegxathu lokugcina lokugunyaza kokuhlangana, izihambeli zathatha izixazululo kanye nezinqumo kwamakomidi amabili futhi bathatha nemibiko yabo. Lokhu kufake ukugunyazwa kohlelomali luka-2024-2025 nokunyuka ngamaphesenti angu-20 okuhlolwa kokufakiwe. Izihlalo zekomidi kanye nababamele abasuka ezifundeni ezimbili bakhulumile ukubona umsebenzi nokuqhubeka kwale-Essembly.
translations.hypothesis: ukuvuselela; izindlela zokwelapha zendabuko, kanye nomsebenzi we-WHO ekuphenduleni ezinkululeleni eziningi kuyilapho kusebenzisana nezizwe ezilunga ukuze zilungiselele kangcono ukubhekana nezinkinga ezintsha. Kusasa ngaphambilini, abameleli kwiKomidi A bavumelene nokubheka uhlelo lokuthuthuka lwe-Global Health and Peace Initiative (ngokuguqulwa okuncane kwigama elithi "Global Health for Peace Initiative"), futhi bacele ukuthi uMqondisi-Jeneral anikeze ngolwazi mayelana nokuthuthuka ekwenzeni lolu hlelo lube namandla. Kwi-plenary, njengengxenye yokugunyazwa okugcina yale ndawo, abameleli bamukela izinqubomgomo kanye nezinqumo zezinkomidi ezimbili, futhi bamukela imibiko yazo. Lokhu kubandakanya ukunqunywa kwengadi yama-2024-25, kanye nokunyuswa okungu-20% kwezimali ezilinganiselwe. Okuphathi kwezinkomidi kanye nabameleli ezifundazweni ezimbili bathule ukubonga umsebenzi kanye nokuthuthuka kwale Ndlu.

translations.source: In his closing remarks, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO’s Director-General, noted that “the increase in assessed contributions and the investment round are historic and a huge milestone.” He spoke about the year ahead, with high-level meetings on universal health coverage, tuberculosis and pandemic preparedness and response at this year’s UN General Assembly. He pointed to the continuing negotiations on the pandemic accord and amendments to the International Health Regulations as unprecedented—“generational”—opportunities to learn from the mistakes of the COVID-19 pandemic and ensure they are not repeated. Delegates also had the chance to hear from former WHO staff Gwen Carnelley, who turned 100 this year, who began working with WHO in 1949, just a year after WHO was founded 75 years ago. Video of Closing of the 76th World Health Assembly.
translations.reference: Ngamazwi akhe okuvala, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi jikelele weWHO uqaphele ukuthi "ukwenyuka kokubhekwa kokufakiwe kanye notshalomali kwezomlando kanye nohambo olude olukhulu." Ukhulume ngonyaka olandelayo,ngemihlangano esezingeni eliphezulu ekukhavweni kwezempilo yomhlaba, isifo sofuba nokulungiselela ubhubhane kanye nokuphendula kulonyaka ku-UN General Assembly. Ukhombe ekuqhubekeni kwezingxoxo ngokobhubhane kanye nezichibiyelo ku-International Health Regulations njengokungalindelekile-okwesizukulwane-amathuba okufunda emaphutheni obhubhane lweCOVID-19 nokuqinisekisa ukuthi awaphindi. Izithunywa ziphinde zathola ithuba lokuzwa kubasebenzi bangaphambili beWHO uGwen Carnelley, owahlanganisa iminyaka eyi-100 kulo nyaka, owaqala ukusebenza neWHO ngo-1949, ngemva nje konyaka kwasungulwa iWHO eminyakeni engu-75 edlule. Ividiyo yokuvala kwe-76 World Health Assembly.
translations.hypothesis: Ekupheleni kwentambo, uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, oyiMqondisi-Jeneral we-WHO, uhole ngokuthi "ukukhuliswa kwezimali ezikhokhwayo kanye nokufakazelwa kwezimali kuyinto ebalulekile futhi umkhuba omkhulu." Ukhulume ngonyaka ozayo, ngemihlangano ebalulekile mayelana nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kwabantu bonke, i-tuberculosis, kanye nokulungiselela kanye nokuphendula izifo ezibulalayo kuleli hhovisi likaSizindalwazi saseHlangani sangoChunge lonyaka. Ubonise ukuthi ukuxoxiswana okuqhubekayo mayelana nomthetho wezifo ezibulalayo kanye nezinguquko kuMthethosizwe Wamazwe Ngamazwe Wezempilo kuyithuba elingajwayelekile—"le minyaka"—lokufunda ezinkingeni zohlelo lwe-COVID-19 futhi kuqiniseke ukuthi aziphindaphindwa. Abahlanganyeli nabo bathole ithuba lokuzwa kukaGwen Carnelley, owayeyilungu le-WHO futhi othole iminyaka engama-100 kulo nyaka, owaqala ukusebenza ne-WHO ngo-1949, nje nje ngemuva kokuba i-WHO isungulwe eminyakeni engama-75 edlule. Ividiyo yokuvala i-76th World Health Assembly.

translations.source: Gwen Carnelley is introduced at 54:37 and speaks shortly afterwards. Starting tomorrow, the 153rd meeting of Executive Board begins, where the outcomes of the Assembly will be discussed, among other things.
translations.reference: U-Gwen Carnelley wethulwe ngo-54:37 futhi wabe esekhuluma emva kwalapho. Kuqala kusasa,umhlangano wesi-153 Webhodi labaPhathi uyaqala, lapho imiphumela ye-Assembly izodingidwa kwezinye zezinto.
translations.hypothesis: UGwen Carnelley uboniswa ngesikhathi esingu-54:37 futhi uthetha ngemuva kwalokho. Kusukela kusasa, umhlangano wama-153 weBhodi Eliqondile uqala, lapho kuzoxoxwa khona ngemiphumela yeNdlu, phakathi kwezinye izinto.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 29 May 2023 Landmark resolution for strengthening Indigenous Peoples’ health globally The World Health Assembly today approved an unprecedented resolution on the health of Indigenous Peoples, which requests the Director-General to develop a global action plan for the health of indigenous peoples and to present it to the Seventy-ninth World Health Assembly in 2026. Indigenous Peoples, although representing diverse population groups and communities, in general have considerably lower life expectancy than non-indigenous populations. They also have a higher prevalence of many diseases and adverse health conditions, including diabetes, maternal and infant mortality and malnutrition.
translations.reference: I-World Health Assembly yamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha - Ukubuyekezwa nsuku zonke: ngo-29 kuNhlaba 2023. Isixazululo siyisikhonkwane sokuqinisa ezempilo yabantu bomdabu emhlabeni. Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba namhlanje ugunyaze isiqumo esingakaze sibe khona kwezempilo yebantu bomdabu, esifuna ukuthi uMqondisi Jikelele adevelophe uhlelo lokwenza lomhlaba lwezempilo yabantu bomdabu bese eyalwethula kuMhlangano weZempilo womhlaba wamashumi ayisikhombisa nesishagalolunye ngo-2026. Abantu bomdabu, yize noma bemele isibalo sabantu abehlukene kanye nemiphakathi, ngokujwayelekile kucatshangelwa abanempilo ephansi ukunokungebona abantu bomdabu. Baphinde babe nokujwayelekile okukhulu kwezifo eziningi kanye nezimo zempilo ezahlukene, okubandakanya ushukela,ukuzala kanye nokushona kwezingane kanye nokungondleki.
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano we-76 Wezempilo Zomhlaba Wonke – Isibuyekezo sansuku zonke: 29 Meyi 2023. Isinqumo esibalulekile sokukhuthaza impilo yamaHlanga. Namuhla, i-World Health Assembly ivunyelwe inqubomgomo engajwayelekile mayelana nempilo yamaHlanga, equkethe isicelo sokuthi uMqondisi-Jeneral athuthukise uhlelo lomsebenzi womhlaba wonke mayelana nempilo yamaHlanga futhi aludwele kwi-World Health Assembly engu-79 ngo-2026. Nakuba amaHlanga amele izinhlobo ezihlukahlukene zabantu kanye nemiphakathi, ngokuvamile banempilo esiphansi kakhulu kunezinye izinhlobo zabantu. Futhi banobubanzi obukhulu bezifo nezimo ezingalungile zempilo, okubalwa ukugula kweglucoma, ukufa kwabakhubazwe kanye nezinsana, kanye nokuntshontshwa.

translations.source: The Assembly requested the action plan be developed in consultation with Indigenous Peoples; that WHO provide support to Member States, upon request, for improving indigenous health; and that the improvement of Indigenous Peoples’ health be included in the development of the Fourteenth WHO General Programme of Work. In the same resolution, the Health Assembly urged Member States to, among other tasks, develop knowledge about the health situation of Indigenous Peoples, with their free, prior and informed consent; develop, fund and implement national health plans, strategies or other measures for Indigenous Peoples;
translations.reference: Umhlangano ucele uhlelo lokwenza ludevelophwe ngokuxhumana nabantu bomdabu; leyo WHO inikeza ukweseka kuMembers States, ngokucelwa ukwenza ngcono ezempilo zendabuko; futhi ukwenza ngcono ezempilo yaBantu boMdabu kungafakwa ekuthuthukisweni kohlelo jikelele lweWHO lomsebenzi weshuminane. Ngesixazululo esifanayo, iHealth Assembly inxuse iMember States kweminye imisebenzi ukudevelopha ulwazi ngesimo sezempilo yabantu bomdabu, ngokukhululeka kwabo, kanye nokunikeza imvume; ukudevelopha, ukuxhasa nokwenza izinhlelo zempilo zezwe,amasu kanye nezinye izinyathelo zabantu bomdabu;
translations.hypothesis: I-Assembly ifise esikhumbuzo sokuthi uhlelo lokusebenza lukhuthazwe ngoxhumano nezikuluphu zamaShenge, ukuthi i-WHO inikeze izizwe ezilunga ngosizo, uma kucelwe, ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo yamaShenge, kanye nokuthi ukuthuthukiswa kwempilo yamaShenge kufakwe ekuhleleni uhlelo olukhulu lokuqala lwe-WHO. Kule risolushini efanayo, i-Health Assembly yacebise izizwe ezilunga ukuthi, phakathi kwezinye izinto, zakhe ulwazi mayelana nesimo sempilo yamaShenge, ngemvume yabo efakazekile, yangaphambilini, kanye nengokwazi; zakhe, zixhase futhi zisebenzise izinhlelo, amasu noma ezinye izindlela zezempilo zamazwe ngamazwe zamaShenge.

translations.source: encourage the attraction, training, recruitment and retention of Indigenous Peoples as health workers taking into account the traditional knowledge and practices. Related document: A76/A/CONF./1 - Health of Indigenous Peoples First-ever resolution to accelerate action on drowning preventionThe delegates at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly agreed a resolution to accelerate action on global drowning prevention. The resolution requests Member States to assess their national drowning situation and to develop and implement multisectoral drowning prevention programmes. Drowning causes 236 000 deaths every year.
translations.reference: ukugqugquzela ukuheha, ukuqeqesha, ukuqasha nokuphinda kubantu bomdabu njengabasebenzi bezempilo uphinde ucabange ulwazi lwesintu kanye nokwenza. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./1 - Ezempilo zaBantu bomdabu. Isixaululo sokuqala ukuqhuba ukwenza ekuvikelweni kokuminza, izihambeli eMhlanganweni weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha basivuma isixazululo sokuqhuba ukwenza ekuvikeleni ukuminza emhlabeni. Isicelo sesixazululo seMember States ukubheka isimo sabo sokuminza kanye nokudevelopha nokwenza ngemikhakha eminingi izinhlelo zokuvikela ukuminza. Okudala ukuminza ukufa okungu-236 000 njalo ngonyaka.
translations.hypothesis: Khuthaza ukuhlukumezwa, ukufundiswa, ukubuyiselwa kanye nokugcinwa kwabantu bendawo njengabasebenzi bezempilo, kuhlanganiswe nolwazi nemikhuba yendabuko. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./1 - Impilo yabantu bendawo. Isinqumo sokuqala sokusheshisa ukusebenza ekwelapheni ukufa ngokuswama. Abameleli eSibanjweni Samahlanga Omhlaba Mayelana Nezempilo sesibili bavumelene nesinqumo sokusheshisa ukusebenza ekwelapheni ukufa ngokuswama emhlabeni jikelele. Lesi sinqumo sicela izizwe ezilunga ukuhlola isimo sabo sezwe mayelana nokufa ngokuswama futhi bakuthuthukise futhi basebenzise izinhlelo zokwelashwa kokufa ngokuswama ezihlanganisa izigaba eziningi. Ukufa ngokuswama kubanga ukufa kwezigidi ezingu-236 ngonyaka.

translations.source: It is a leading global cause of injury-related child deaths. Over the past decade, 2.5 million people died from drowning, and over 90% of those occurred in low- and middle-income countries. At the invitation of the United Nations (UN) General Assembly, WHO will coordinate actions within the UN system on drowning prevention and facilitate the observance of World Drowning Prevention Day on 25 July each year. WHO will also set up a Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention with organizations of the UN system, international development partners and nongovernmental organizations. To better understand the true burden and impact of drowning, the resolution further requests WHO to prepare a global status report on drowning prevention.
translations.reference: Isizathu somhlaba esihamba phambili kokufa kwezingane okuhlobene nokulimala. Kushuminyaka eledlule, abantu abayizigidi ezingu-2.5 bafa ngenxa yokuminza futhi ngaphezu kuka-90% walokho kwenzeka emazweni anemali engenayo encane kuya kwephakathi nendawo. Esimemweni se-United Nations (UN) General Assembly, iWHO izoxhumanisa izenzo kuhlelo lweUN lokuvikela ukuminza nokusiza ukunaka uSuku lokuVikela ukuMinza eMhlabeni ngomhlaka-25 kuNtulikazi njalo ngonyaka. I-WHO izophinde ihlele iGlobal Alliance yokuvikela ukuminza nezinhlangano zohlelo lwe-UN, ababambisani bokuthuthukisa amazwe angaphandle kanye nezinhlangano ezizimele. Ukuqonda kangcono umthwalo wangempela nomthelela wokuminza, isixazululo zezicelo kuWHO ukulungiselela umbiko wesimo samhlaba ekuvikeleni ukuminza.
translations.hypothesis: Kungumphumela omkhulu kakhulu emhlabeni jikelele ezinkingeni ezihlobene nokufa kwezingane. Kule minyaka eyishumi edlule, abantu abayizigidi ezingu-2.5 sebelele ngenxa yokugcotshwa, futhi ngaphezu kuka-90% walezi zifo zenzeke ezweni ezinezimali ezincane nezamaphakathi. Ngemvume yeSikhungo Sezokubambisana SeHlangano Zamazwe Ngamazwe (UN), i-WHO izohlela izenzo ngaphakathi kohlelo lwe-UN mayelana nokuvimbela ukugcotshwa, futhi izisize ekugujweni kolu suku oluyi-World Drowning Prevention Day ngomhla ka-25 Julayi minyaka yonke. I-WHO nayo izakha i-Global Alliance yokuVimba Ukugcotshwa, ehambisana nezinhlangano zohlelo lwe-UN, abalingani bokuthuthukiswa kazwelonke kanye nezinhlangano ezizimele. Ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuqonda ngempela mayelana nobunzima kanye nomthelela wokugcotshwa, le ngxenye yophenyo ifuna ukuthi i-WHO ilungiselele umbiko womhlaba wonke mayelana nokuvimbela ukugcotshwa.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/CONF./2 - Accelerating action on global drowning prevention Read more about the resolution World Drowning Prevention Day 2023 Member States mobilize behind resolution to tackle chemicals, waste and pollution Member States welcomed the resolution addressing environmental determinants, including management of chemicals and waste. The efforts can help prevent up to one fifth of all suicide-related deaths from highly hazardous pesticides.
translations.reference: Amadokhumentu ahlobene: EB152/CONF./2 - Ukuqhuba ukwenza ngokuvikela ukuminza emhlabeni Funda okwengeziwe ngesixazululo Usuku lokuvikela ukuminza emhlabeni 2023 I-Member States ihlanganise isinqumo ngemuva kokubhekana namakhemikhali, udoti kanye nokungcola, ama-Member State amukele isinqumo sokubhekana nabazinikele bendawo, okufana nokuphathwa kwamakhemikhali kanye nodoti. Imizamo ingasiza ukuvikela kuze kufike ngokufa okuhlobene nokuzibulala okuvela kuzibulalanambuzane.
translations.hypothesis: Umbhalo ohlobene: EB152/CONF./2 - Ukukhuthaza ukusebenza ngokushesha ekulweni nokugqwashiseka emhlabeni jikelele. Funda kabanzi ngale ngxenye. Usuku Lwezwe Lwezwe Lokuqwashisa Emhlabeni ngo-2023. Izizwe ezilunga zisebenzisana ukuze kusebenze kule ngxenye ehloselwe ukulwa nezakhamisa, udoti kanye nokungcola. Izizwe ezilunga zamukele le ngxenye ehloselwe ukulungiselela izinto ezithinta imvelo, okubalwa ukulawulwa kwezakhamisa kanye nodoti. translations.source: Member States were urged to bolster the implementation of existing WHO strategies including implementation of the WHO Chemicals Roadmap which outlines key roles of the health sector in implementing the Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management. The resolution also encourages the Ministries of Health to engage in efforts to prepare proposals for an intergovernmental science policy panel and negotiations for a treaty to end plastic pollution. The resolution called upon the Director-General to undertake several actions, including: publishing a report on the health implications of chemicals, waste and pollution from a "One Health" perspective; updating the 2012 document on the State of the Science of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals jointly with the United Nations Environment Programme; and
translations.reference: Ama-Member State ayanxenxwa ukuba ibe yisezeseko sokwenza samasu akhona eWHO okufaka ukwenza kweMgwaqobalazwe lwamakhemikhali eWHO eveza izindima ezibalulekile emkhakheni wezempilo ekwenzeni Indlela yeSu eKuphathweni kwamaKhemikhali eMazweni angaphandle. Isixazululo siphinde sigqugquzele uNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo ukuthi akhulume emizamweni ukulungiselela iziphakamiso kuphaneli yesayensi yenqubomgomo yangaphakathi kohulumeni kanye nezingxoxo kwesivumelwano sokuqeda ukugcola koshekhasi. Isixazululo sibizwe ngoMqondisi Jikelele ukuthatha izinqumo ezimbalwa, okufaka: Ukushicilela umbiko ezinkingeni zempilo yamakhemikhali, udoti nokungcola ngendlela ye-"One Health"; ukubuyekezwa kwedokhumenti yango-2012 kuState yeScience Of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals ngokuhlanganyela ne-United NationsEnvironment Programme; futhi
translations.hypothesis: Izizwe ezilungu zakhuthazwa ukuthi ziqinise ukusebenza kwezinhlelo ezikhona ze-WHO, okubalwa ukusebenza kwe-"WHO Chemicals Roadmap" echaza izindima ezibalulekile zomkhakha wezempilo ekusebenzisweni kwe-"Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management." Iphini yenhlangano nayo yakhuthaza izikhungo zezempilo ukuthi zibe yingxenye yomzamo wokulungiselela iziphakamiso zeqembu lesayensi kanye namalungelo phakathi kwezizwe, kanye namalungelo okwenyanga esivumelwano esiqedele ukungcoliswa ngamaphulasitiki. Iphini yenhlangano ibalule ukuthi uMqondisi-Jeneral afeze izinto eziningi, okubalwa: ukushicilela ingxenye mayelana nemiphumela yezempilo yamakhemikhali, udoti kanye nokungcoliswa kusuka ngombono we-"One Health"; ukubuyekeza idokhumenti yonyaka ka-2012 mayelana nalokho okwaziwayo ngamakhemikhali athinta ama-endocrine, ngokubambisana ne-"United Nations Environment Programme"; kanye nokunye.

translations.source: supporting countries in developing national or regional human biomonitoring programmes for chemicals of concern. Related document: A76/A/CONF./2 - The impact of chemicals, waste and pollution on human health WHO’s work on chemical safety and health Achieving well-being: a global frameworkMember States agreed to adopt the "Global framework for integrating well-being into public health utilizing a health promotion approach", which strives to enable all people to flourish and achieve their full physical and mental health potential throughout their lives and across generations. The Global framework recommends six key strategic directions that focus on: universal health coverage, equitable economies, protecting the planet, social protection systems, digital systems to enable health, and measuring and monitoring well-being.
translations.reference: ukweseka amazwe ezweni elithuthukayo noma izinhlelo zokubheka abantu besifunda ngokukhathazeka ngamakhemikhali. idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./2 - Umthelela wamakhemikhali,udoti nokungcola kwezempilo yomuntu. Umsebenzi weWHO ekuphepheni kwekhemikhali nokuthola ezempilo nokuphila: umhlahlandlela womhlaba weMember States uvumile ukuthatha umhlahlandlela womhlaba ekuhlanganiseni ukuphila ekusebenziseni kwezempilo zomphakathi indlela yokuqguqguzela ezempilo, okuhlose ukwenza bantu bonke baphumelele futhi bathole okwesiqu sabo konke namandla ezempilo yengqondo ngezimpilo zabo kusona sonke isizukulwane. Umhlahlandlela womhlaba uphakamise izindlela zamasu abalulekile ayisithupha okuzogxilwa kuwona: ukukhavwa kwezempilo emhlabeni,ezomnotho ezilinganayo ukuvikela umhlaba,izinhlelo zokuvikela ezenhlalakahle, izinhlelo zedijithali ukusiza ezempilo ukukala nokubheka ukuphila.
translations.hypothesis: Ukusekela izizwe ekuthuthukiseni izinhlelo zikazwelonke noma zendawo zokuhlola izimpilo zabantu mayelana namakhemikhali athize. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/A/CONF./2 - Umthelela wamakhemikhali, udoti kanye nokungcola empilweni yabantu. Umsebenzi we-WHO mayelana nokuphepha kwamakhemikhali kanye nempilo. Ukufinyelela ekunethezekeni: uhlelo lwemvelo jikelele. Izizwe ezilunga zamukele "uhlelo lwemvelo jikelele lokuhlanganisa ukunethezeka empilweni yomphakathi, kusetshenziswa indlela yokukhuthaza impilo," okuhlose ukwenza kube nokwenzeka kubantu bonke ukuthi bathuthuke futhi bathole impilo yabo yangempela, ngokomzimba nangengqondo, ngaso kuzo zonke izikhathi zempilo yabo kanye kuzo zonke izizukulwane. Uhlelo lwemvelo jikelele lincoma izindlela ezinhlanu ezibalulekile ezigxile koku: ukufinyelela kwempilo kubo bonke, ezomnotho ezilinganiselwe, ukuvikelwa komhlaba, izinhlelo zokuvikelwa komphakathi, izinhlelo zedijithali ezisiza impilo, kanye nokulandela kanye nokuhlola ukunethezeka.

translations.source: The framework proposes close collaboration with sectors outside the health sector to promote and protect health. It serves as a guide for all stakeholders to engage in a coherent and coordinated manner around a common purpose: promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. The Assembly requests the Director-General to report on implementation of the global framework in 2024, 2026 and 2031. Related document: A76/7 Add.2 - Well-being and health promotion
translations.reference: Izikphakamiso somhlahlendlela zokubambisana okusondelene nemikhakha ngaphandle komkhakha wezempilo ukugqugquzela nokuvikela okwezempilo. Kusiza njengomyalelo wabobonke ababambisani ukuthi bakhulume ngokuxhumana nokubambisana ngenhloso efanayo: ukugqugquzela ezempilo zabantu kanye nomhlaba ngendlela egcinekile nelinganayo. ukugqugquzela ezempilo yabantu emhlabeni ngendlela egcinekile nelinganayo. Umhlangano ucela uMqondisi Jikelele ukuthi abike ukwenza komhlahlandlela womhlaba ngo-2024, 2026 kanye no-2031. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/7 Add.2- ukuphila nokugqugquzela impilo
translations.hypothesis: Lo mbukiso uphakamisa ukubambisana okubanzi nezikhungo ezingaphakathi komkhakha wezempilo ukuze kukhuthazwe futhi kukhululwe impilo. Kusebenza njengencwadi yokuhumusha kubo bonke ababambe iqhaza, ukuze bakwazi ukubamba iqhaza ngendlela ehambisanayo futhi ehleliwe, ngenhloso efanayo: ukukhuthaza impilo yabantu kanye nomhlaba ngendlela elingqubuzana futhi ebanzi. Ukukhuthaza impilo yabantu kanye nomhlaba ngendlela elingqubuzana futhi ebanzi. IBhodi lifuna ukuthi uMqondisi-Jeneral anikeze ngombiko mayelana nokusebenza kwalesi mbukiso womhlaba wonke ngo-2024, 2026 kanye no-2031. Idokhumenti ehlobene: A76/7 Add.2 - Ukunethezeka kanye nokukhuthazwa kwempilo.

translations.source: New resolution to accelerate efforts on food micronutrient fortification The delegates approved a resolution on accelerating efforts to prevent micronutrient deficiencies through safe and effective food fortification. Deficiencies in vitamin and mineral status, particularly of folate, iron, vitamin A, and zinc, affect 50% of all preschool aged children and 67% of all women of reproductive age worldwide. Micronutrient deficiencies can have serious consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects.Large scale food fortification is part of the solution. By adding essential vitamins and minerals to staple foods and condiments, such as wheat and maize flours, rice, cooking oil and salt in accordance with national consumption patterns and deficiencies, countries can correct and further prevent a demonstrated micronutrient deficiency.
translations.reference: Isixazululo esisha sokuqhuba imizamo ekuqinisekisweni kokudla okunomsoco omncane. Izihambeli zigunyaze isiphakamiso sokuqhuba imizamo nokuvikela ukushoda komsoco omncane ngokuphepha kanye nokuqinisekiswa kokudla okufanele. Ukushoda kumavithamini kanye nesimo samaminerali,ikakhulukazi ifolathi,ayoni,uvithamin A nozinki, unomthelela ka-50% ezinganeni zonke ezisenkulisa kanye no-67% wabo bonke abantu besifazane abaseminyakeni yokuzala emhlabeni wonke. ukushoda kokudla okuncane kungaba nemiphumela yangempela okufaka isipina bifida kanye namashubhu okuhlola isikali esikhulu sokuqinisekisa ukudla njengengxenye yesixazululo. Ngokwengeza amavithamini abalulekile namaminerali ukuhlanganisa ukudla namakhondimenti njengokolweni impiphu ufulawa, ilayisi,amafutha nosawoti ngokuvumelana namaphethini okugcina kwezwe kanye nokushoda,amazwe angalungisa nokuqhubeka ukuvikela ukushoda kwezakhamuzimba ezincane ezikhonjiswayo.
