translations.hypothesis: Isinqumo esisha sokusheshisa imizamo yokwenza ukudla kube nokudla okuyinkimbinkimbi. Abaholi basevele bamukele isinqumo sokusheshisa imizamo yokuvimbela ukuntuleka kwezinto ezincane zokudla ngokwenza ukudla kube nokudla okuyinkimbinkimbi ngendlela ephephile futhi ephumelelayo. Ukuntuleka kwezivitamini nezinsimbi, ikakhulukazi i-folate, i-iron, i-vitamin A, kanye ne-zinc, kuthinta ama-50% wazo zonke izingane ezincane kanye nama-67% wazo zonke izinduna ezikhuluma ubudala bokwazisa emazweni ngomhlaba wonke. Ukuntuleka kwezinto ezincane zokudla kungaba nemiphumela emikhulu, okubalwa phakathi kwayo i-spina bifida kanye nezinye izinkinga zombhobho. Ukwenza ukudla kube nokudla okuyinkimbimbi kuyo yonke indawo kuyingxenye yesixazululo. Ngokwengeza izivitamini nezinsimbi ezibalulekile ezifudlweni ezibalulekile kanye nezinto ezisetshenziswa ekuphekeleni ukudla, ezifana nomfingo kanye nomgqumeni, irisi, amafutha okupheka kanye nosawoti, ngokuya ngohlelo lokuthenjwa lwaso ngasinye kanye nokuntuleka, amazwe angalungisa futhi avimbele ukuntuleka kwezinto ezincane zokudla okubonakaliswe.

translations.source: The resolution urges Member States to develop policies on food fortification with micronutrients and/or supplementation, and to consider ways of strengthening financing and monitoring mechanisms. The resolution was agreed under the umbrella of the United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report. Related document: EB152/CONF./5 Accelerating efforts for preventing micronutrient deficiencies and their consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects, through safe and effective food fortification Related links
translations.reference: Isixazululo sinxenxa iMember States ukuthi idevelophe izinqubomgomo ekuqinisekisweni kokudla okunomsoco omncane noma izikhuthazi, nokucabanga izindlela zokuqinisa ezezimali nokubheka indlela yokwenza. Isixazululo kwakuvunyelwene ngaso ngaphansi kwesambulela seUnited Nations of Action of Nutrition (2016-2025) umbiko. idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/CONF./5 Ukuqhuba imizamo yokuvikela ukushoda komsoco omncane kanye nemiphumela yakhona, okufaka isphina bifida kanye nezinye amashubhu okuhlola, ngokuphepha nokuqinisekisa ukudla okufanele Amalinki axhumene
translations.hypothesis: Le risolushini yicela izizwe ezilunga neNhlangano ukuthi zithuthukise imigomo mayelana nokwengezwa kwezinto ezincane ezibalulekile ezifakelwe ukudla kanye/noma ukwengezwa kwezinto ezibalulekile, futhi kube nokucatshangwa kwezindlela zokuqinisa ukuxhaswa kwezimali kanye nezindlela zokulalela. Le risolushini yayivumelwe ngaphansi kwegeyini yeRipothini leMinyaka Yokusebenza yeNhlangano ehlanganiswe yiZizwe zase-United Nations mayelana nokudla (2016-2025). Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/CONF./5 Ukusheshisa imizamo yokuvimbela ukuntuleka kwezinto ezibalulekile ezincane kanye nemiphumela yazo, okubalwa phakathi kwayo i-spina bifida kanye nezinye izinkinga ezihlobene nezimbobo zengqondo, ngokusebenzisa ukwengezwa kokudla okunephephile futhi okusebenza. Izixhumanisi ezihlobene.

translations.source: Read more about the resolution WHO's work on food fortification Member States approve actions to counter substandard and falsified medicines On 27 May, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly approved a resolution to conduct an independent review of the Member State Mechanism (MSM) for incidents, substandard and falsified medicines, reinforcing the Director-General’s January 2023 call for increased vigilance and action in this important area. The review will be initiated at the next MSM steering committee meeting later in 2023.
translations.reference: Funda okwengeziwe ngesixazululo Umsebenzi weWHO ekuqinisekisweni kokudla Ama-Member State agunyaza izenzo ukubhekana namazinga nemithi engalungile. Ngomhlaka-27 Nhlaba, Umhlangano weZempilo yoMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha agunyaze isinqumo sokwenza ukubheka okuzimele seMember States Mechanism (MSM) yezingozi, okungaphansi kanye nemithi yemigunyathi, kugcizelela uMqondisi Jikelele ngoMasingana 2023 isimemezelo sokunyusan ukuqaphela nokwenza kulendawo ebalulekile. Ukubukisiswa kuzoqalwa ngomhlangano olandelayo weMSM ekupheleni kuka-2023.
translations.hypothesis: Funda kabanzi mayelana nesinqumo mayelana nomsebenzi we-WHO ekuthuthukiseni ukudla. Izizwe ezilunga namalungu zamukela izenzo zokuphikisa imithi engcono futhi engemthetho. Ngo-27 uMeyi, i-Inkhundla Yomhlaba Wonke Yezezempilo (World Health Assembly) eyi-76 ivumele isinqumo sokwenza ukuhlaziywa okukhululekile kweHlelo Lamazwe Amalunga (Member State Mechanism - MSM) mayelana nezimo, imithi engcono futhi engemthetho. Lokhu kuqinisa isikhuthazo somphathi omkhulu ngoJanuwari ka-2023, sokuba kube nokunemba nokusebenza kakhulu kule ndawo ebalulekile. Ukuhlaziywa kuzoqala endizeni elandelayo yeKomidi Yokuholwa ye-MSM kamuva ngonyaka ka-2023.

translations.source: The Assembly established the MSM in 2012 to tackle substandard and falsified medical products from a public health perspective and in a transparent and inclusive way. The goal of the MSM is to protect public health and promote access to affordable, safe, efficacious and quality medical products. Noting recent events of contaminated medicines found on various markets and related preventable deaths, Member States emphasized the support needed to improve their capacity to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products through access to appropriate technologies, including laboratory testing facilities, along with improved oversight on informal markets and advertising, and the online sale of medical products. Member States called for embracing and implementing track and trace technologies for market control and surveillance, as well as the need for formal collaboration by relevant local and global partners such as law enforcement and customs administrations. Member States were encouraged to align with conventions aimed at improvement of legislation and imposition of prohibitive sanctions for wrongful dealing in substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Umhlangano wasungula iMSM ngo-2012 ukubhekana namazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha yamanga ngendlela yezempilo yomphakathi nangendlela enokuthembeka neyangaphakathi. Inhloso yamaMSM ukuvikela ezempilo yomphakathi nokugqugquzela ukuthola okukhonekayo, okuphephile amandla okwenza kanye nokulingana kwemikhiqizo yokwelapha. Ukuqaphela izigigaba zakamuva zemithi engcolile etholakale emakathe ehlukene nokuhlobana kokuvikela ukufa, iMember States Igcizelele ukweseka okudingekayo ukwenzangcono amandla abo ukuvikela,ukuthola nokuphendula kokungaphansi nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engumgunyathi ngokuthola ezobuchwepheshe okufanele, okufaka izindawo zokuhlola elebhu, okuhambisana nokubheka okwenziwe ngcono ezimakethe ezingekho emthethweni nokukhangisa,ukudayisa ku-inthanethi kwemikhiqizo yezokwelapha. I-Member States ibizele ukwamukela nokwenza ubuchwepheshe bokulandelela nokubheka ukulawula imakethe nokubheka kanye nesidingo sokubambisana okusemthethweni ngabahlobene bendawo nababambisani bendawo njengabomthetho nokuphathwa wemikhuba. I-Member States igqugquzelwe ukuhambisana nezivumelwano ezihlose ukwenzangcono umthetho kanye nezikhundla zamasanishini angavunyelwe ngokwenza okungafanele emazingeni kanye nemikhiqizo yezokulapha eyamanga.
translations.hypothesis: I-Assembly yasungula i-MSM ngonyaka ka-2012 ukuze ibhekane nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa kahle, kususelwe kububanzi bezempilo yomphakathi, ngendlela eqondile futhi efakazele. Umgomo we-MSM uwukuvikela ububanzi bezempilo yomphakathi nokukhuthaza ukufinyelela kumikhiqizo yezokwelapha engabizi, ephephile, esebenzayo futhi eqinisekisiwe. Ngokubona izigameko zamuva zemithetho eyomile eyatholakala ezimakethe ezahlukene kanye nezifo ezibulawa ezivimbiswayo, izizwe ezilungile ziqinise kakhulu ngokusizo okudingekayo ukuze zithuthukise amandla abo okuvimbela, ukuthola kanye nokuphendula emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa kahle, ngokufinyelela kubuchwepheshe obufanele, okubalwa nezikhungo zokuhlola ezilabhorethri, kanye nokugadeka okuthuthukisiwe ezimakethe ezimelene nomthetho kanye nokukhangisa, kanye nokuthengiswa kwemikhiqizo yezokwelapha ku-inthanethi. Izizwe ezilungile zicele ukuthi kufakwe futhi kusetshenziswe ubuchwepheshe bokulandelela nokuthola ukuze kulawulwe imakethe futhi kuhlalele, kanye nesidingo sokubambisana ngokusemthethweni phakathi kwezakhiwo ezifanele zendawo kanye nomhlaba wonke, ezifana nezinhlaka zokuqeqeshwa nomthetho kanye nezinhlaka zamagama. Izizwe ezilungile zigqugquzelwe ukuthi zihambisane nemibandela ehlose ukuthuthukisa umthetho kanye nokubeka izivivinyo ezinzulu ngalokho okwenziwe ngendlela engalungile emikhiqizweni yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa kahle.

translations.source: The Secretariat is requested to report on progress in this area to the Executive Board in 2025. Related document: EB152/9 - Substandard and falsified medical products Related links WHO Member State Mechanism on incidents, substandard and falsified medical products WHO's work on substandard and falsified medical products
translations.reference: Unobhala ucele umbiko ngokuqhubekayo kulendawo ku-Executive Board ngo-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/9 - Amazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engamanga. Amalinki axhumene Indlelaye yeWHO Member State ezinkingeni, amazinga kanye nemikhiqizo yezokulapha okungeyiyo. Umsebenzi weWHO kumazinga nemikhiqizo yekwelapha okwamanga.
translations.hypothesis: Isikhungo esikhulu kucelwe ukuthi sibike ngobuhle kule ndawo eBhodi Eliqondile ngonyaka ka-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/9 - Imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa ngendlela efanele. Izixhumanisi ezihlobene: Uhlelo lwezizwe ezilunga ne-WHO mayelana nezimpointshi, imikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa ngendlela efanele. Umsebenzi we-WHO mayelana nemikhiqizo yezokwelapha engcono futhi engenziwa ngendlela efanele.

translations.source: First ever resolution on behavioural sciences for better health is adopted Today Member States adopted the behavioural sciences for better health resolution with Member States showing broad consensus towards the need for integrating systematically behavioural science theory, methods and approaches across health topics and public health functions. The resolution urges Member States to acknowledge the role of behavioural science in achieving better health outcomes, to identify opportunities for increased use and, to establish functions and units for generating and translating evidence to inform policies and programmes. It also requests the Director-General to mainstream the use of behavioural science within the organization and to provide support to Member States through the development of guidance and the provision of technical assistance. Member States recognized the achievement of the Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative led by the secretariat, congratulated Malaysia, sponsor of the resolution, as well as the other 19 countries that joined as co-sponsors, and thanked the Director-General for the report.
translations.reference: Isixazululo sokuqala samasayensi ezokuziphatha kwezempilo engcono iyathathwa. Namhlanje iMember States yamukele ukuziphatha kwamasayensizi kwesinqumo sezempilo esingcono neMember States okukhombisa isivumelwano esikhulu esiya kusidingo sokuhlanganisa ngokohlelo lwesayensi yokuziphatha injulalwazi,izindlela naye namaqhinga kuzona zonke izihloko zempilo nokusebenza kwezempilo zomphakathi. Isinqumo sinxenxa iMember States ukuthi ibone indima yesayensi yokuziphatha ekutholeni imiphumela yezempilo engcono amathuba okuhlonza kokunyusa ukusebenzisa nokwakha imisebenzi namayunithi okwakha nokuhumusha ubufakazi ukwazisa izinqubomgomo kanye nezinhlelo. Iphinde icele uMqondisi Jikelele ukuthi aveze ukusebenzisa isayensi yokuziphatha kunhlangano nokunikeza ukweseka iMember States ngokuthuthukisa ukulawulwa nokunikezwa usizo lwezobuchwepheshe. I-Member States ibone ukuthola kweSayensi yokuziphatha yomzamo wezempilo engcono eholwa ngonobhala, uhalalisele iMalaysia ngokuxhasa isinqumo kanye namanye amazwe angu-19 ajoyine abaxhasi futhi wabonga umbiko kaMqondisi Jikelele.
translations.hypothesis: Okuhlonipha okokuqala ngqo ngobunikazi bezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo ngcono kwamukelwa Namuhla, izizwe ezilungiselelwe zamukele ukuhlonipha mayelana nezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo ngcono, kanti izizwe ezilungiselelwe zikhombise ukuvumelana okukhulu mayelana nokudingeka ukuhlanganisa ngendlela ehlelekile izinqubo, izindlela kanye nezindlela zezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo kulo lonke uhla lwezihloko zempilo kanye nemisebenzi yezempilo zomphakathi. Lo mhlalulelo ucebisa izizwe ezilungiselelwe ukuthi ziqaphele indima yezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo ekufinyeleleni emiphumeleni engcono yempilo, ukuthola amathuba okwengeza ukusetshenziswa, kanye nokusungula imisebenzi kanye nezikhungo zokukhiqiza nokuguqula ulwazi ukuze kuxhaswe izinqubomgomo kanye nezinhlelo. Futhi, ucela uMqondisi-Jeneral ukuthi enze ukuthi ukusetshenziswa kwezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo kube yingxenye yohlelo lolu hlelo, futhi ahlinzeke ngosizo ezizweni ezilungiselelwe ngokuthuthukisa imihlahlandlela kanye nokuhlinzeka ngosizo lobuchwepheshe. Izizwe ezilungiselelwe ziqaphele impumelelo yeNqubomgomo yezifundo zombili ezihlobene nokunakekelwa kwempilo ngcono, eholwa uhlelo olusebenzayo, zibungaza iMalaysia, umxhumunji walolu mhlalulelo, kanye nezinye izifunda ezingu-19 ezibambe iqhaza njengomxhumunji, futhi zithokozele uMqondisi-Jeneral ngaleli phapheme.

translations.source: They stressed the importance of building capacity in this area, particularly in regional offices, and of creating a repository of evidence and synergies between sectors, including with academia and the private sector. Related documents: EB152(23) - Behavioural sciences for better health EB152/25 - Behavioural sciences for better health, Report by the Director-General Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative The above items were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General.
translations.reference: Ukubaluleka okugcizeleliwe kwamandla okwakha kulendawo, ikakhulukazi amahhovisi esifunda nokwakha inqolobane yobufakazi, kanye nezinto phakathi kwemikhakha okufaka nezemfundo nomkhakha ozimele. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152(23) - Amasayensi okuziphatha kwezempilo engcono EB152/25 - isayensi yokuziphatha yezempilo engcono, umbiko nguMqondisi Jikelele Isayensi yokuziphatha yempilo engcono yokuqaliwe.izinto ezingaphezulu zadingidwa njengengxenye yedokhumenti A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiswe nguMqondisi Jikelele.
translations.hypothesis: Baxwayise ukubaluleka kokwakha amakhono kule ndawo, ikakhulukazi ezikhungweni zendawo, kanye nokudala umthombo wolwazi kanye nokuxhumana phakathi kwezikhungo ezahlukene, okubalwa nakho izikhungo zemfundo kanye nezinkampani ezinkulu. Imibhalo ehlobene: EB152(23) - Izivivinywa zezobuntu zempilo engcono EB152/25 - Izivivinywa zezobuntu zempilo engcono, Umbiko kaMqondisi Jikelele Uhlelo Lwezivivinywa Zezobuntu Zempilo Engcono. Lezi zinto zixoxwe njengengxenye yomthetho i-A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiwe kaMqondisi Jikelele.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 27 May 2023 First global strategy on infection prevention and controlThe World Health Assembly agreed today on the first-ever global strategy on infection prevention and control (IPC), which builds on almost two decades of efforts led by WHO and partners. The strategy provides Member States with strategic directions to substantially reduce the ongoing risk of health care-associated infections (HAIs), including those that exhibit antimicrobial resistance. HAIs are among the most frequent adverse events occurring in the context of health service delivery. The COVID-19 pandemic and recent major disease outbreaks such as Ebola virus disease, the Middle East respiratory syndrome and the Sudan virus disease have clearly exposed the existing gaps in IPC programmes in all countries.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha - ukubuyekezwa kwansukuzonke: ngo-27 kuNhlaba 2023. Isu lokuqala lomhlaba lokuvikela kokuthelelana nokulawula uMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba uvumile namhlanje ukuthi isu lomhlaba lokuqala ngqa ekuthelelaneno nokubavikela nokulawula (IPC) Okwakha cishe amashumi nyaka amabili yemizamo eholwa yiWHO nababambisani,. Isu linikeza iMember States ngezindlela zamasu zokugcineka kokwehlisa ubungcuphe obuqhubekayo kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuhlobene nokuthelelana(HAIs) okufaka leyo mibukiso yokuvimba ama-antimicrobial. Ama-HAI akweminye imicimbi eyahlukene ejwayeleke kakhulu eyenzeka kungqikithi yokulethwa kwemisebenzi yezempilo. Ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 nokubheduka kwezifo ezinkulu kamuva nje njengesifo segciwane i-Ebola, isifo sokuphefumula saseMiddle East nesifo segciwane eSudan sekuveze ngokusobala izikhala kuzinhlelo ze-IPC kuwona wonke amazwe.
translations.hypothesis: Umhlangano we-76 wezokudlala kwezempilo yomhlaba - Isibuyekezo sansuku zonke: 27 Meyi 2023. Uhlelo lokuqala lomhlaba lokuqapha nokulawula ukwelapheka. Namuhla, i-World Health Assembly ivumile uhlelo lokuqala lomhlaba lokuqapha nokulawula ukwelapheka (IPC), olususelwa eminyakeni emibili edlule yomsebenzi oholwa yi-WHO kanye nabalingani bayo. Lolu hlelo linikeza izizwe ezilunga iziqondiso ezibalulekile zokunciphisa kakhulu ingozi eqhubekayo yokwelapheka okuvela ezinsizakalweni zezempilo (HAIs), okubalwa nakho okubonisa ukumelana nezinto ezilwa nokwelapheka. I-HAIs kungenye yezimo eziyingozi ezivame kakhulu ezenzeka kulo msebenzi wokunikeza izinsizakalo zezempilo. Igciwane le-COVID-19 kanye nezinkinga ezinkulu zamafu ezazenzile kwananini, njenge-Ebola virus disease, i-Middle East respiratory syndrome kanye ne-Sudan virus disease, zibonise ngokucacile ukuthi kunemigomo ekhona ezinhlelweni zokuqapha nokulawula ukwelapheka kuzo zonke izizwe.

translations.source: The strategy sets a clear vision: by 2030, everyone accessing or providing health care is safe from associated infections. Its three key objectives are: to prevent infection in health care; act to ensure IPC programmes are in place and implemented; and coordinate IPC activities with other areas and sectors. The strategy is focused on any setting where health care is delivered, across the health system; it is based on the principle of clean and safe care as a fundamental component of the right to health, which is equity driven, and which should ensure accountability and sustainability. The global IPC strategy will be complemented by, and used in conjunction with, an associated global action plan and monitoring framework, that will be developed in 2023–2024. Related document EB152/9 - Draft global strategy on infection prevention and control, Executive summary Report by the Director-General
translations.reference: Isu liveza umbono ocacile: ngo-2030 wonke umuntu oyothola noma ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okuphephile okusuka nokuhlobene nokutheleleka. Izinjongo ezintathu ezibalulekile: ukuvikela ukuthelelana kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo; isenzo sokuqinisekisa izinhlelo ze-IPC ezikhona nokwenza nokuxhumana nemisebenzi ye-IPC kwezinye izindawo kanye nemikhakha. Isu ligxile kunoma yikuphi ukuhlela lapho ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kulethwa, kuzona zonke izinhlelo zempilo, ligxile kumgomo wokuhlanzeka nokuphepha njengezinto ezibalulekile kubulungiswa bezempilo okulethwa ngokulingana futhi kuzoqinisekisa ukuzibophezela nokugcineka. Isu lomhlaba le-IPC lizohambisana noma lizosetshenziswa ngokuhlanganisa noma ukuhlobana nesu lokwenza lomhlaba nomhlahlandlela wokubheka,ozodevelophwa ngo-2023-2024. Idokhumenti ehlobene EB152/9 - Isu lomzamo womhlaba ekuvikelweni kokuthelelana nokulawula, okugoqiwe kombiko we-Executive nguMqondisi Jikelele.
translations.hypothesis: Lo mqondiso uqukatha umbono ocacile: ngonyaka ka-2030, wonke umuntu osebenzisa noma onikeza ukunakekelwa kwezempilo uzophephile ezinkingeni zokwelapheka ezihlobene. Izinhloso zayo ezintathu ezibalulekile zifana nokuthi: kuvinjwe ukwelapheka ezindaweni zokunakekelwa kwezempilo; kuthathwe izinyathelo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokuqapha ukwelapheka zikhona futhi zisebenza; kanye nokuhlela imisebenzi yokuqapha ukwelapheka nezinye izindawo nezikhungo. Lo mqondiso ugxile kunoma iyiphi indawo lapho kunikezwa khona ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, kulo lonke uhlelo lwezempilo; ususelwe kumthetho wokunakekelwa okuhlanzekile nokuphephile njengengxenye ebalulekile yelungelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo, eliyingxenye yokuqiniseka kokulinganiselwa, futhi okufanele kuqinisekise ukubaluleka nokuhlala phakade. Lo mqondiso womhlaba wonke wokunakekelwa kwezempilo uzophathelwa yikakhulukazi futhi usebenziswe kanye nohlelo lomsebenzi lomhlaba wonke kanye nohlelo lokulandela ukuthi lusebenza kangaki, oluzokuthuthwa ngonyaka ka-2023–2024. Idokhumenti ehlobene i-EB152/9 - Uhlelo oluhloselwe lomhlaba wonke lokuvimbela nokulawula ukwelapheka, Isishwankathelo sephini Report nguMqondisi Jikelele.

translations.source: WHO's work on infection prevention and control Historic resolution paves the way for strengthening rehabilitation in health systemsToday the World Health Assembly agreed a landmark resolution on strengthening rehabilitation in health systems. Rehabilitation services play a key role in ensuring the enjoyment of human rights including the highest attainable standard of physical and mental health. It also promotes sexual and reproductive health, and recognizes the right to work and the right to education. This landmark resolution aims to address the challenges in rehabilitation such as the need to: increase awareness of rehabilitation when setting health priorities and research agendas, allocating resources, promoting cooperation and enabling technology transfer;
translations.reference: Umsebenzi weWHO ekuvikeleni nokulawula ukutheleleka,kuyisinqumo esingumlando esivula indlela yokuqinisa ukuhlumelelisa isimilo kuzinhlelo zempilo namhlanje eMhlanganweni weZempilo woMhlaba kuvunyelenwe ngesikhonkwane sesinqumo ekuqiniseni ukuhlunyeleliswa kwezinhlelo zempilo. Imisebenzi yokuhlumelelisa isimilo idlala indima enkulu ukuqinisekisa ukujabulela amalungelo abantu okufaka izinga elitholakalayo eliphezulu lesiqu kanye nezempilo zengqondo. Kuphinde kugqugquzele ezocansi nezempilo yokuzala, kubona ilungelo lokusebenza kanye nelungelo lezemfundo. Lesi sinqumo sesikhonkwane ihlose ukubhekana nezingqinamba yokuhlumelelisa isimilo ngendlela edingeka ngayo: ukunyusa ukugqugquzela kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo uma kuhlelwa okuhamba phambili kwezempilo kanye nama-ajenda okucwaninga, ukufakwa kwezinsizakusebnza, ukugqugquzela ukusebenzisana nokuvumela ukudluliswela kwezobuchwepheshe;
translations.hypothesis: Umsebenzi we-WHO ekulweni nokulawulweni kwezifo. Isinqumo esibalulekile esenza indlela yokuthuthukiswa kwezokwelapha ezinhlelweni zezempilo. Namuhla, i-World Health Assembly ivumile isinqumo esibalulekile mayelana nokuthuthukiswa kwezokwelapha ezinhlelweni zezempilo. Izinsizakalo zokwelapha zidlala indima ebalulekile ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi abantu bayojabulela amalungelo abo, okubalwa nakho ukuba nezempilo ezinhle ngokomzimba nangengqondo. Futhi, kukhuthazwa impilo yobudlelwane kanye nempilo yokuzalwa, futhi kumanwa ilungelo lokusebenza kanye nelungelo lwemfundo. Lesi sinqumo esibalulekile sihlose ukulungisa izinselelo ezikulo lwazi, njengokuthi: ukwandisa ukuqwashwa mayelana nezokwelapha uma kukhonywa izinto ezibalulekile kwezempilo kanye nezinhloso zocwaningo, ukuhlinzeka ngemithombo, ukukhuthaza ukubambisana kanye nokwenza kube nokwenzeka ukudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe;

translations.source: ensure countries are better equipped to respond to the sudden increase in rehabilitation needs including assistive technology due to health emergencies; ensure persons in marginalized and vulnerable situations have access to affordable, quality and appropriate rehabilitation services including assistive technology; avoid high out-of-pocket costs for people to access rehabilitation services and assistive technology that can cause financial hardships; and address the current insufficient level of rehabilitation workforce to serve the needs of the population. The resolution lists a range of actions to be taken by the WHO Secretariat such as:
translations.reference: ukuqinisekisa amazwe acijiswe kangcono ukuphendula ngokusesha kokunyuka ezidingweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo okufaka ukusiza kobuchwepheshe ngenxa yokuphuthuma kwezempilo; ukuqinisekisa abantu abagcindezelekile nabasezinweni zokuhlupheka babenokungena okukhonekayo,okufanele nemisebenzi yokuhlumelelisa isimilo efanele okufaka ukusiza kwezobuchwepheshe; gwema ukubiza okungaphandle kwephakethe kubantu ukuthola imisebenzi yokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo kanye nokusizwa kwezobuchwepheshe okungadala ubunzima kwezezemali; futhi ukubhekana nezinga elinganele lamanje lokusebenza kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo ukusiza izidingo zesibalo sabantu. Uhla lwezinqumo lokwahlukana kwezenzo okumele zithathwe nguNobhala weWHO njenge:
translations.hypothesis: qinisekisa ukuthi izizwe zilungile ukuthi ziphendule ngokushesha ukwanda okukhulu kwezidingo zokulungiswa, okubalwa yikhambi lokusiza, ngenxa yezimo eziphilayo; qinisekisa ukuthi abantu abakhona ezimeni ezingamukelekile nezithintekayo bathole ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zokulungiswa ezifanele, ezisezingeni eliphezulu futhi ezifanelekile, okubalwa yikhambi lokusiza; gwema izindleko ezinkulu abantu abadinga ukuthi zikhokhelwe ukuze bathole izinsizakalo zokulungiswa kanye nokusiza, ezangabangela izinkinga zezimali; futhi xazulule izinga elamanje eliphansi labantu abasebenza ezinsizakalweni zokulungiswa ukuze kube nokunakekelwa kwabantu. Le risolushini ichaza izenzo eziningi okumele zenziwe yiBhodi Eliqondile ye-WHO, ezifana nokuthi:

translations.source: publishing a baseline report by the end of 2026 with information on the capacity of Member States to respond to rehabilitation needs; developing targets and indicators for effective coverage of rehabilitation services by 2030; ensuring appropriate resources are allocated at WHO to support Member States in implementing technical guidance and resources; and supporting Member States to integrate rehabilitation and assistive technology in their emergency preparedness and response plan. The WHO Secretariat will report on progress in the implementation of this resolution to the Health Assembly in 2026, 2028 and 2030.
translations.reference: Ukushicilela isizinda sombiko ekupheleni kuka-2026 ngolwazi ngamandla eMember States ukuphendula ezidingweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo; ukudevelopha okuqondiwe nezinkomba ngokukhava okufanele kokuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo ngo-2030; ukuqinisekisa izinsizakusebenza ezifanele ezizofakwa kuWHO ukweseka iMember States ekwenzeni ukulawula kwezobuchwepheshe kanye nezinsizakusebenza; futhi ukweseka iMember States ukuthi ihlanganise ukuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo nokusiza kwezobuchwepheshe ekuzilungiseleliseni okuphuthumayo kanye nohlelo lwempendulo. Unobhala weWHO uzobika ngokuqhubeka kokwenza kwalesisinqumo eMnhlanganweni weZempilo ngo-2026, 2028 kanye no-2030.
translations.hypothesis: Ukushicilela umbiko wokuqala ngaphezulu kokubalwa ngaphezu kuka-2026, oqinisekiswe ngolwazi mayelana nokwazi kwezizwe ezilunga ukuphendula izidingo zokulungiswa; ukuhlela izinhloso nezinkomba zokuqinisekisa ukuthi izinsizakalo zokulungiswa zifinyelelwe kahle ngaphezu kuka-2030; ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izinsiza ezifanele zahlanganiswe e-WHO ukuze kusizwe izizwe ezilunga ekwenzeni iziqondiso zobuchwepheshe kanye nezinsiza; kanye nokweseka izizwe ezilunga ukuthi zihlanganise ukulungiswa kanye nobuchwepheshe bokusiza ezihlelweni zazo zokulungiselela nezokuphendula izimo eziphuthumayo. Uhlelo lwe-WHO luzochaza ngendlela inqubekela ngayo ekwenzeni le ngxenye kuleli qiniso ehlanganweni lezempilo ngango-2026, 2028 kanye no-2030.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/8 - Strengthening rehabilitation in health systems, Report by the Director-General Related link WHO's work on rehabilitation The items above were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General. Resolution on strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/8 - ukuqinisa ukuhlunyeleliswa kwesimilo kuzinhlelo zezempilo, umbiko ngu Mqondisi Jikelele Ilinki ehlobene Umsebenzi weWHO ekuhlunyelelisweni kwezimilo Izinto ngasenhla zadingidwa njengengxenye yedokhumenti A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiwe nguMqondisi Jikelele. Isinqumo sokuqinisa amandla okuxilonga
translations.hypothesis:
Umbhalo ohlobene: EB152/8 - Ukukhuthaza ukulungiswa kwezempilo ezinhlelweni zezempilo, Umbiko kaMqondisi Jikelele.
Ikhonkolo elihlobene: Umsebenzi we-WHO wokulungiswa.
Okwakule ohlwini ngenhla kuxoxwe njengengxenye yombhalo u-A76/7 Rev.1 - Umbiko ohlanganisiwe kaMqondisi Jikelele.
Isinqumo mayelana nokukhuthaza amandla okuhlaziya.

translations.source: On 26 May Member States endorsed a resolution to strengthen diagnostics capacity in countres and to improve access to diagnostic services. The broad ranging resolution recognizes that diagnostic services are vital for the prevention, surveillance, diagnosis, case management, monitoring and treatment of communicable, noncommunicable, neglected tropical and rare diseases, injuries, and disabilities. Diagnostics allow for the precise identification of diseases, and therefore the timely initiation of the correct treatments for better health outcomes. The resolution considers the full spectrum of “diagnostics”, thus including both “in vitro” laboratory tests e.g. rapid diagnostic tests and polymerase chain reaction (PCR) and “non in vitro” diagnostics e.g. imaging or blood pressure measurement devices. It covers actions for research and development, manufacturing (including local production and technology transfer), regulation, selection and procurement, awareness, advocacy and addressing access barriers in general.
translations.reference: Ngomhlaka-26 kuNhlaba iMember States bavume isinqumo sokuqinisa amandla okuxilongaemazweni nokwenzangcono ukungena emisebenzini yokuxilonga. Ububanzi bokwahlukana kwezinqumo kubona ukuthi imisebenzi yokuxilonga ibalulekile ekuvikeleni, ukubheka nokuxilonga, ukuphathwa kwecala, ukubheka nokulapha okuxhunyanwa ngakho, okungaxhunyanwa ngakho izifo ezinganakiwenezifo ezingajwayelekile, ukulimala nokukhubazeka. Ukuxilonga kuvumela ukucaca kokuhlonza izifo,ngakho ke ukuqala ngesikhathi kokwelasha okufanele kwemiphumela yezempilo engcono. Isinqumo sithatha ukwahluka okuphelele kokuxilongwa ngakho kuhlanganisa kokubili vitro ukuhlolwa kwaselebhu, isibonelo ukuphindwa phindwa kokuhlolwa kokuxilongwa kanye nokuvela kwesheni lepholierase (PCR) kanye nokunyona ivitro, isibonelo, ukuhlanganisa nomaumfutho wgazi namadivayisi okukala. Kukhava izenzo zokucwaninga nokuthuthuka ukukhiqiza (okufaka umkhiqizo wendawo nokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe), ukulawula, ukukhetha nokuthenga, ukuqwashisa nokumela nokubhekana nezivimbo zokuthola ezijwayelekile.
translations.hypothesis: Ngomhla ka-26 Meyi, izizwe ezilungile zamukele isinqumo sokukhuthaza amandla okuhloliwa kwezifo ezweni ngalinye kanye nokuthuthukisa ukufinyelela kulezi zinsizakalo zokuhloliwa. Leso sinqumo esibanzi siyaphumela ukuthi izinsizakalo zokuhloliwa zibalulekile ekuphepheni, ekubhekwa, ekuhlolweni, ekulungisweni kwezifo, ekubhekwa, kanye nokwelashwa kwezifo ezisabalalayo, kwezifo ezingenalutho, kwezifo ezitholwa ezindaweni ezithile, kanye nezifo ezimanga ngezindlela eziningi, ukulimala, kanye nokukhubazeka. Ukuhloliwa kwenza kube nokwazi ukuthola ngokusheshisa izifo, ngaleyo ndlela kungenziwa ukuba kuqalwe ngokushesha ngokuphathwa okufanele ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo. Leso sinqumo lihlanganisa yonke "indlela yokuhlola," okuhlanganisa kokubili "ukuhlola ezilabhorethri" njengezivivinyo zokuhlola ezisheshayo kanye ne-polymerase chain reaction (PCR), kanye "nokuhlola okungenzi ezilabhorethri" njengamathuluzi okubonisa izithombe noma amadivayisi okulinganisa ingcungcwani yegazi. Kuhlanganisa izenzo zocwaningo nokuthuthukiswa, ukukhiqizwa (okuhlanganisa ukukhiqizwa endaweni kanye nokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe), ukulawulwa, ukukhethwa nokuthengwa, ukuvuselelwa, ukukhuthaza, kanye nokulungiswa kwezinselele zokufinyelela ngokujwayelekile.

translations.source: The implementation of the resolution will build and expand on previous and current work at three levels of WHO to help countries improve access to diagnostic services. The Secretariat is requested to report on implementation progress in 2025. Related document EB152/6 Strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Ukwenza kwesinqumo kuzokwakha nokwandisa emsebenzini eyedlule neyamanje kumazinga amathathu eWHO ukusiza amazwe enze kangcono ukuthola ezokuxilongwa. Unobhala ucelwe ukuthi abike ngokuqhubeka kokwenza ngo-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene EB152/6 Ukuqinisa amandla okuxilonga
translations.hypothesis: Ukusebenza kwegezlweni kuzokwakha futhi kukhuliswe emisebenzini edlule kanye namanje ezinkundleni ezintathu ze-WHO, ukuze kusizwe izizwe ukuthuthukisa ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zokuhlaziywa. Isikhungo esikhulu kucelwe ukuthi sibike ngobuhle bokusebenza kwegezlweni ngonyaka ka-2025. Idokhumenti ehlobene: EB152/6 Ukuthuthukisa amandla ezinsizakalo zokuhlaziywa.

translations.source: Awards for outstanding contributions to public health presented during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly During a moving ceremony at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly in Geneva, awards were presented to persons and institutions from around the world for their outstanding contributions to public health. “The 2023 public health prizes and awards celebrate people who have made a significant contribution to global health, and whose work has extended far beyond the call of normal duty,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “At a time when the world faces many challenges, each is an inspiration and a reminder of the progress that can be made to improve health and wellbeing for all.” The call for nominations of candidates for each prize is sent out each year after closure of the World Health Assembly.
translations.reference: Imiklomelo yokunikela okumangazayo lwezempilo lomphakathi eyethulwe NgoMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha. Ngesikhathi somcimbi wokuthutha woMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha obuseGeneva, imiklomelo yethulwe kubantu kanye nezikhungo emhlabeni wonke ngokunikela kwabo okumangazayo kwezempilo yomphakathi. "Imiklomelo yezempilo yomphakathi yango-2023 kanye nemiklomelo yokubungaza abantu baenze umehluko omkhulu kwezempilo yomhlaba, nomsebenzi wabo osudlule lokhu obekulindelekile," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO. Ngesikhathi umhlaba ubhekene nezingqinamba eziningi,ngayinye iyisikhuthazi futhi njengesikhumbuzi sokuqhubeka esingenziwe ukwenzangcono ezempilo nokuphila kuwona wonke umuntu. Isimemezelo sokukhethwa kwezihambeli ngomklomelo ngamunye siyakhishwa unyaka ngamunye ngemva kokuvalwa koMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba.
translations.hypothesis: Imiklomelo yezimpumelelo ezinkulu ezikhuthazayo empilweni yomphakathi ihanjisiwe ngesikhathi seMigadi Yomhlaba Wonke Yesi-76. Ngomcimbi omuhle kakhulu ngesikhathi seMigadi Yomhlaba Wonke Yesi-76 eGeneva, imiklomelo ihanjisiwe kubantu nezikhungo ezivela emhlabeni wonke ngenxa yezimpumelelo zazo ezinkulu empilweni yomphakathi. "Imiklomelo nemikhankaso yempilo yomphakathi ka-2023 igubha abantu abenze umnikelo omkhulu empilweni yomhlaba wonke, kanye nalabo okusebenza kwayo kuye ngaphezu kwalokho okudingekile," kusho uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele we-WHO. "Ngalesikhathi umhlaba ubheke izinselelo eziningi, ngakunye kubo kuyisikhuthazo futhi kukhumbuza ngenqubo engenziwa ukuthuthukisa impilo nokunethezeka kwabo bonke." Umbiko wokufaka izinhlu zabo abafanele ukufakwa kule miklomelo ngamunye uthunjwe minyaka yonke ngemuva kokuphothulwa kweMigadi Yomhlaba Wonke.

translations.source: Nominations can be made by national health administrations of a WHO Member State and by any former recipient of the prizes. At its 152nd session in January 2023, the Executive Board designated the 2023 winners of the prizes, on the basis of proposals made by the dedicated selection panels for each prize. The seven laureates have been selected to celebrate their unique role and contribution for public health in their countries and globally. They come from four WHO Regions – for the Americas, the Eastern-Mediterranean, South-East Asia and the Western Pacific. Five winners are individuals, and three among them are women.
translations.reference: Ukukhethwa kungenziwa abaphathi bezempilo bezwe beWHO Member State futhi noma yimuphi oke wathola umklomelo. Kuseshini yesi-152 yangoMasingana 2023, i-Executive Board yangesi-2023 abanqobi bemiklomelo, ngokwezimakamiso ezenziwe yiphaneli ekhethiwe ezimisele yomklomelo ngamunye. Abayisikhombisa abahlnishwe ngemiklomelo sebekhethiwe ukubungaza indima yabo ehlukile nokunikela kwezempilo yomphakathi emazweni abo nasemhlabeni wonke. Baqhamuka kuZifunda ezine zeWHO-kuma-America, Eastern-Mediterranean, South East Asia kanye neWestern Pacific. Abanqobile bahamba ngabodwa futhi abathathu babo ngabesifazane.
translations.hypothesis: Ukufakwa kwamagama kungenziwa ngohlelo lwezempilo lwezwe elilungu le-WHO, kanye nanoma yimuphi umuntu othole lezi zindondo ngaphambilini. Ngokuhlangana kwalo lesi-152 ngoJanuwari ka-2023, iBhodi Eliqondile ithole abawinile bezi zindondo zango-2023, ngesisekelo kwezinhlonzelo ezenziwe amaqembu okukhetha aqinile ngaleli zindondo ngalinye. Labawinile abayisikhombisa bakhethwe ukuze kugujwe ngendlela ehlukile kanye nomnikelo wabo kwezempilo zomphakathi ezweni labo kanye emhlabeni jikelele. Bavela ezindaweni ezine ze-WHO – iMelika, i-Eastern-Mediterranean, i-South-East Asia, kanye ne-Western Pacific. Abawinile abahlanu ngabantu, futhi kukhona abathathu kubo abafemuka.

translations.source: In addition, the two institutions that have received a 2023 award are led by women. Winners of the 2023 prizes Sasakawa Health PrizeThe 2023 laureates: The Nick Simons Institute from Nepal, and Professor Vichai Tienthavorn from Thailand The Nick Simons Institute is a nongovernmental organization aiming to improve health care in the rural areas of Nepal. Working closely with the Ministry of Health and Population of Nepal, the Institute has trained 7000 medical professionals (such as midwives and anaesthetic assistants) in rural areas, who now provide most-needed services to local communities in the absence of a sufficient pool of general practitioners and specialists. The Institute has supplied essential equipment and provided additional health personnel to alleviate the lack of medical professionals in 44 hospitals, and supported the design of an action plan for better quality services in more than 100 rural hospitals.
translations.reference: Ukwengeza izikhungo ezimbili sezithole umklomelo wango 2023 obuholwa ngabesifazane. Abanqobi bemiklomelo ya-2023 Sasakawa Health Preize The 2023: iNick Simons Institute yaseNepa, noSolwazi Vichai Tiethavorn waseThailand. Isikhungo iNick Simons inhlangano ezimele ehlose ukwenzangcono ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ezindaweni zasemakhaya eNepal. Ukusebenzisana noNgqongqoshe weZempilo nesibalo sabantu waseNepal, isikhungo sesiqeqeshe izifundiswa zokwelapha ezingu-7000 (okungabahlengikazi ababelethisayo kanye nabaszi bezokuhlinza) ezindaweni zasemakhaya, manje abanikezela ngemisebenzi edingeka kakhulu emiphakathini yendawo ekungabini khona kwephuli eyanele yabasebenzi abajwayelekile kanye nongoti. Isikhungo sesinikele ngempahlakusebenza ebalulekile nokunikela ngabasebenzi bezempilo abengeziwe ukuqeda ukwentuleka kwezifundiswa zokwelapha ezibhedlela ezingu-44, futhi beseka ukwakhiwa kohlelo kwenza ukuze kube nokusebenza okufanele okungcono ezibhedlela zasemakhaya ezingaphezu kuka-100.
translations.hypothesis: Ngaphezu kwalokho, izikhungo ezimbili ezithole umklomelo ka-2023 ziphathwe ngabafazi. Abawinile bemiklomelo ka-2023: I-Nick Simons Institute evela e-Nepal, kanye noProfessor Vichai Tienthavorn evela e-Thailand. I-Nick Simons Institute iyinhlangano engenhlangano ehloselwe ukuthuthukisa ukunakekelwa kwezempilo ezindaweni zasemakhaya e-Nepal. Ngokusebenzisana ngokuqinile neMinistri yeZempilo kanye noMphakathi yase-Nepal, le nhlangano uguqule ochwepheshe bezokwelapha abangu-7000 (njengezinsiza zokuzalwa kanye nabasizi bezilawuli) ezindaweni zasemakhaya, abafakelwa izinsizakalo ezidingekayo kulezi zindawo ngenxa yokuthi kunenani elincane kochwepheshe bezokwelapha abaqeqeshiwe. Le nhlangano ihlinzeke ngokubalwa kobufakazi obucindezelayo futhi ihlinzeke ngabantu abaningi bezokwelapha ukuze kuncishiswe ukuntuleka kochwepheshe bezokwelapha ezikhungweni zokwelapha ezingu-44, futhi isekele ukuhlelwa kohlelo lokusebenza oluqondiswe ekuthuthukiseni ikhwalithi yezinsizakalo ezikhungweni zokwelapha eziningi kune-100 ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

translations.source: The Institute also conducts research and advocacy activities to shape perceptions and influence policies that affect rural health workers in Nepal. Professor Vichai Tienthavorn is President of the Praboromarajchanok Institute at the Ministry of Public Health of Thailand. One of the nation-wide initiatives he has led is an innovative health promotion policy to help address thalassemia, with his work resulting in the adoption of an effective national policy for thalassemia prevention and control. He also designed an effective communications tool and screening method to help citizens to adapt their behaviours in order to prevent and control diabetes and hypertension. As a result of this work, a national policy was adopted with significant positive impact on the country’s disease burden.
translations.reference: Isikhungo siphinde senze ucwaningo nemisebenzi yokumela ukwakha imicabango nomthelela kwinqubomgomo enomthelela kubasebenzi bezempilo yasemakhaya eNepal. USolwazi Vichai Tienthavorn unguMongameli wePraborormarajchanok Institute NjengoNgqongqoshe weZempilo yoMphakathi eThailand. Eminye yemizamo esemhlabeni wonke isiholele ekwenzeni kabusha inqubomgomo yokugqugquzela ezempilo, ngalomsebenzi oletha umphumela wokuthatha inqubomgomo yezwe esebenzayo yokuvikela ithalassemia nokuyilawula. Uphinde wakha indlela enhle yethuluzi lokuxhumana nendlela yokuhlola ukusiza izakhamizi zijwayele ukuziphatha kwazo ukuze zivikele nokulawula ushukela nehayi hayi. Njengomphumela walomsebenzi, inqubomgomo yezwe yathathwa ngomthelela omuhle obalulekile emthwalweni wesifo sezwe.
translations.hypothesis: I-Institute iphinde yenze ucwaningo kanye nemisebenzi yokukhuthaza izinto ezifanele ukuze kushintsheke imibono futhi kukhukhulelwe izinqubomgomo ezithinta abasebenzi bezempilo ezifundazweni zase-Nepal. UProfessor Vichai Tienthavorn ungumongameli we-Praboromarajchanok Institute ekhaya kwiNhlangano yezempilo yase-Thailand. Enye yezinhlelo ezibanzi ezayo ezayikhokhelwa yiwo ukungqongqoshe ezintsha zokuphakamisa impilo ukuze kusizwe ukulungisa i-thalassemia, futhi umsebenzi wakhe uholele ekunqunyweni kwenqubomgomo kazwelonke enobungcweti yokwelapha kanye nokulawulwa kwe-thalassemia. Uphinde wadala ithuluzi lokuxhumana elisebenza kanye nenqubo yokuhlola ukusiza izakhamuzi ukuthi zishintshe izindlela zazo ukuze kuvinjwe futhi kulawulwe ukhuhlu kanye nomdlavuza. Ngenxa yalokhu msebenzi, kwathathwa inqubomgomo kazwelonke enomthelela omkhulu futhi omuhle ezweni kwiingxabane zezifo.

translations.source: Professor Tienthavorn also played an essential role in addressing the challenge of uneven distribution of the health workforce, especially in border and rural areas of Thailand. He led the establishment of partnerships with village schools to recruit high-school students, train them and help them settle back locally after having accomplished an accelerated medical curriculum. United Arab Emirates Health Foundation Prize2023 award laureate: Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre from the PhilippinesIn addition to being a renowned clinician and researcher, Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre is a passionate advocate for exclusive breastfeeding and the founder of Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Health of Mother and Child) – a Philippine non-governmental organization. Dr Silvestre has leveraged her experience as a community practitioner to conduct research and design a protocol to help improve the health of mothers and newborns. The pioneering protocol she created describes a simple set of actions to be undertaken by health workers attending a mother during delivery and her newborn after birth.
translations.reference: Usolwazi Tienthavorn iphinde yadlala indawo ebalulenkile ekubhekaneni nengqinamba yokuhanjiswa okungalingani komsebenzi wezempilo, ikakhulukazi kumngcele nasezindaweni zasemakhaya aseThailand. Wahola okwakuqaliwe kokubambisana nezikole zasemakhaya ukuheha abafundi basezikolweni zamazinga aphezulu, baqeqeshwe nokubasiza bazinze ezindaweni zasekhaya emva kokuqeda ukuqhutshekwa kohlelokusebenza lwezokulapha. Ukuhlonishwa ngemiklomelo kwemiklomelo 2023 eUnited Arab Emirates Health Foundation: uDkt Maria Asuncion Silverstre wasePhilippinesln wengeze ngabelaphayo abahloniphekayo nabacwaningi, uDkt Maria Asuncion Silverstre uyakuthokozela ukumela okwehlukile kokuncelisa ibele kanye nomsunguli weKalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Ezempilo zamama nengane) inhlangano ezimele yasePhilippine. UDkt Silvestre unamandla ngesipiliyonin sakhe njengomsebenzi womphakathi owenza ucwaningo futhi wenza indlela yokwenza ukusiza ukwenza ngcono ezempilo yomama kanye nezingane ezizelwe. Ingqalabutho yendlela yokwenza ayenzile uchaza isethi elula yokwenza okumele ithathwe ngabasebenzi bezempilo ababhekana nomama ngesikhathi sokubeletha nokunakekelwa kwengane yakhe emva kokuzalwa.
translations.hypothesis: UPhofu Tienthavorn ube negalelo elibalulekile ekulungiseni inkinga yokuthi abasebenzi bezempilo abafanisi kakhulu, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni zasemngeni nasezilalini zase-Thailand. Uhole ukusungulwa kwezakubambisana nezikole zamadolobha ukuze akhethe abafundi besikole samabanga aphakeme, abafundise, futhi abasize babuyele ezindaweni zabo ukuze bakwazi ukusebenza njengezodokotela ngemuva kokufinyelela uhlaka lwezifundo lwezokwelapha olusheshayo. Umklomelo we-United Arab Emirates Health Foundation wango-2023: UDkt. Maria Asuncion Silvestre wasePhilippines. Ngaphandle kokuba udokotela kanye nomfundi ocwaningi oazi kakhulu, uDkt. Maria Asuncion Silvestre ungumxhumaphathi onentshisekelo enkulu mayelana nokudluliswa kwegazi kuphela kwengane kanye nombhali we-Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Impilo Yomama Nezingane) - umgqugquzela ongaphansi kahulumeni wasePhilippines. UDkt. Silvestre usebenzise ulwazi lwakhe njengomsebenzi emphakathini ukwenza ucwaningo futhi wadala uhlelo olunzulu olusiza ukuthuthukisa impilo yomama nezinsizwa ezintsha. Uhlelo olusha oludale ubonisa izenzo ezilula okumele zenziwe abasebenzi bezempilo abaxhasa umama ngesikhathi lokubeletha kanye nengane entsha ngemuva kokubeletha.

translations.source: This protocol, which is applicable in all resource settings, helps to bridge the health equity gap in mother-and-child care. In partnership with the national government of the Philippines as well as 17 countries in the WHO Western Pacific Region, she has played a key role in scaling up the First Embrace campaign for Early Essential Newborn Care – a set of simple WHO-recommended and cost-effective interventions. His Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah Prize for Research in Health Care for the Elderly and in Health Promotion 2023 award laureates: The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention from China; and Dr Abla Mehio Sibai from Lebanon The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention, part of the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention (China CDC), has hosted a department focusing on the health of older people since 2013.
translations.reference: Indlela yokwenza esebenzayo kukhona konke ukuhlela kuzona zonke izinsizakusebenza,isiza ukudlula isikhala sokulingana kwezempilo ekunakekelweni kwamama nengane. Ekubambisaneni nohulumeni wezwe lasePhilippine kanye namazwe angu-17 Ewho Western Pacific Region, usedlale indima ebaluleke kakhulu ekunyuseni umkhankaso wokwamukela kuqala wokusheshe kunakekelwe umntwana ozelwe - isethi yesibonelo iWHO - eliphakamisile nokungenelela okubiza kahle. Ingonyama Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah umklomelo wokucwaninga kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo kwabantu abadala nokugqugquzela ezempilo. 2023 nomklomelo wabahlonishwe ngemiklomelo: Isizinda sezwe sokulawulwa kwezifo ezingamahlalakhona nezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo nokuvikelwa okuphuma eChina noDkt Abla Mehio Sabai waseLebanon. Isizinda sezwe sezifo ezingamahlalakhona nokulawula izifo okungaxoxwa ngazo nokuzivikela, ingxenye yesizinda samaChinese yokulawula nokuvikela izifo (China CDC) isisingathe umnyango wokugxila kwezempilo yabantu abadala kusukela ngo-2013.
translations.hypothesis: Lo mbuyiselo, olusebenziseka kuzo zonke izimo zokuthola izinsiza, usiza ukunciphisa umehluko kwezempilo ekunakekelweni kwabanye nabantwana. Ngokubambisana nohulumeni kazwelonke wase-Philippines kanye namazwe ayi-17 ekhisimende ye-WHO eNtshonalanga ye-Pacific, ube negalelo elikhulu ekwandiseni umkhankaso we-"First Embrace" wokunakekelwa kwentsha yokuqala yabantwana – okuyi-sethi yezindlela ezilula ezihlinzekwa yi-WHO futhi ezibanzi. Umklomelo kaHis Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah wocwaningo kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo kubantu abadala kanye nokukhuthazwa kwezempilo, owawuhlonishwa ngo-2023: I-National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention evela eChina; kanye noDkt Abla Mehio Sibai waseLebanon. I-National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention, eyingxenye ye-Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention (China CDC), ibe neshidi ezigxile ezempilweni zabantu abadala kusukela ngo-2013.

translations.source: It delivers a broad range of programmes and activities that advance health promotion for older people, ranging from better understanding the causes of morbidity and mortality through national surveillance for noncommunicable diseases, surveys, death registries and research, to tailored programmes to promote health literacy and evidence-based policies. Initiatives include a dedicated toolkit for older people, capacity‑building of 2000 primary care staff, a health advocacy week dedicated to older people, and an innovative project to improve the mental and cognitive health of more than half a million older persons in both urban and rural areas. Dr Abla Mehio Sibai is Professor of Epidemiology and Dean of the Faculty of Health Sciences at the American University of Beirut in Lebanon. She has made an outstanding contribution to older people’s health in Lebanon and the region, developing a holistic approach to the promotion of healthy ageing. She led the innovative initiative of enrolling close to 600 older people every year at the University for Seniors at the American University of Beirut, in addition to training public health professionals.
translations.reference: Kuletha izinhlelo eziningi ezahlukene kanye nemisebenzi eyenza ngcono ukugqugquzelwa kwempilo yabantu abadala, okusuka ekuqondeni kangcono izimbangela zemobhidithi, nokushona ngokubhekwa kwezwe kwezifo okungakhulunywa ngazo ukubhaliswa kokufa kanye nocwaningo, ukuhlangaisa izinhlelo zokugqugquzela ukufunda ngezempilo kanye nokuncike kubufakazi. Imizamo ifaka ukuzinikela isikhwama samathuluzi sabantu abadala,amandla okwakha sokunakekela abasenzi bezokuqala abangu-2000, ukumela ezempilo ngesonto kunikelwe kubantu abadala, kanye nephrojekthi yokwenza kabusha ukwenza kangcono kwezempilo yengqondo kwabantu abanguhhafu wesigidi abadala ezindaweni zasemadolobheni nasemakhaya. Udkt Abla Mehio Sibai unguSolwazi wobhubhane neDini yoMnyango weZesayensi yeZempilo eNyuvesi yase America yaseBeirut eLebanon. Usefake isandla okumangazayo kwezempilo yabantu abadala eLebanon nakusifunda, ukudevelopha indlela ephelele ekugqugquzeleni ezempilo zabagugile. Wahola umzamo wokwenza kabusha wokufundisa abalinganiselwa ku-600 abantu abadala unyaka ngamunye eNyuvesi yeSeniors eAmerica University yaseBeirut, ukwengeza ukuqeqeshwa kwezifundiswa kwezempilo zomphakathi.
translations.hypothesis: Lolu hlelo linikeza uhla olubanzi wezinhlelo nemisebenzi ekhuthaza ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kubantu abadala, kusukela ekubongeni kangcono imbangela yezifo nezifo ezibulalayo ngokusebenzisa ukuhlola ezweni mayelana nezifo ezingatholakali, ukuhlola, amarekhodi ezifo, kanye nencwadi yocwaningo, kuya ezinhlelweni ezenzelwe ngokukhethekile zokuqinisa ulwazi lwezempilo kanye nezinqubomgomo ezisekelwe kobufakazi. Lezi zinhlelo zihlanganisa ithuluzi elikhethekile labantu abadala, ukukhuthaza amakhono abasebenzi abangu-2000 basezikhungo zokunakekelwa ezimini, inkathi yamasonto okukhuthaza ezempilo egxile kubantu abadala, kanye nomkhakha omusha ongasiza ukuthuthukisa impilo yengqondo kanye nengqondo yabantu abadala abangaphezu kwenyanga eyodwa, bobabili ezindaweni zasemadolobheni nasezilalini. UDkt. Abla Mehio Sibai ungumfundisi we-Epidemiology kanye noMhlalukazi we-Faculty of Health Sciences e-American University of Beirut eLebanon. Uwenze umnikelo omkhulu kakhulu ekunakekelweni kwezempilo zabantu abadala eLebanon nasendaweni, futhi ugxile ekuthuthukiseni indlela ephelele yokukhuthaza ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kubantu abadala. Uhole umkhakha omusha wokubhalisa cishe abantu abadala abangu-600 ngonyaka eNyuvesi yabantu abadala e-American University of Beirut, ngaphandle kokufundisa ochwepheshe bezempilo zomphakathi.

translations.source: She co-led the landmark WHO Global Burden of Disease Study in Lebanon (2000) and conducted the first national survey on noncommunicable diseases and risk factors, informing advocacy, policy-making and programme planning for health promotion. Building on her numerous achievements, Dr Sibai has developed the “National Strategy for Older Persons” in Lebanon (2020–2030). Dr Sibai also created the Arab Ageing Network and the Centre for Studies on Ageing to create links between research and policy at the national, regional and international levels. Dr LEE Jong-wook Memorial Prize for Public Health 2023 award laureate: Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses from Guatemala
translations.reference: Uhole isikhonkwane seWHO womthwalo womhlaba wesifundo sesifo eLebanon (2000) futhi wenza isaveyi yezwe yokuqala ngezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo nezinto eziyingcuphe, ukumelwa kolwazi nokwenza inqubomgomo nokuhlela izinhlelo nokugqugquzela ezempilo. Uma sakhela kwakutholile okuningi, uDkt Sibai udevelophe iNational Strategy for Old Persons, eLebanon (2020-2030). UDkt Sibai uphinde enze i-Arab Ageing Network neSizinda seZemfundo seZalukwazi ukwenza ukuxhumana phakathi kocwaningo nenqubomgomo ezweni, esifundeni kanye nasemazingeni amazwe angaphandle. Umklomelo weSikhumbuzo kaDkt Lee Jong-wook weZempilo zoMphakathi. 2023 umklomelo wabahloniphiweyo: uDkt Jorge Francisco Meneses waseGuatemala.
translations.hypothesis: Ubuyelele uhola umhlahlandlela omkhulu we-WHO mayelana nobudlova bomhlaba wonke eLebanon (2000) futhi wenza ucwaningo lokuqala lwezwe mayelana nezifo ezingabonakali nokubaluleka kwezinto ezibangela izifo, okwazise ngokuphimiswa, ukwenziwa kwemithetho kanye nokuhlelwa kwamaphrojekthi okukhuthaza impilo. Ngokusekelwe ezimpumelelo zakhe eziningi, uDkt. Sibai uholele ukuthuthukiswa kwe-"National Strategy for Older Persons" eLebanon (2020–2030). U-Dkt. Sibai futhi wasungula i-Arab Ageing Network kanye ne-Centre for Studies on Ageing ukuze dxanise ucwaningo namaphothifu ezingeni lezwe, eliphakathi kanye nomhlaba wonke. Umphumeleli wephini lika-Dkt. LEE Jong-wook Memorial Prize for Public Health 2023: uDkt. Jorge Francisco Meneses waseGuatemala.

translations.source: Having promoted community participation in hospital care for over 20 years, Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses set up community-based committees focusing on the safety and satisfaction of patients, their families and the community. Given the positive impact of his work in improving the quality of patient care, the model of ethical and patient-centred care that he designed was scaled up at the national level. Nowadays, as the national supervisor for hospitals of Guatemala, he has designed a programme to improve the quality of services for hospital patients and their families. Dr Meneses has recently coordinated an innovative pilot project in the Guatemala South Health Area to build the first national integrated network of health services, with a priority focus on underserved communities. His work led to the adoption of a national strategy of integrated health services networks, the first in Central America.
translations.reference: Ukuba nomphakathi ogqugquzeliwe ekunakekelweni kwesibhedlela ngaphezu kweminyaka engu-20, uDkt Jorge Francisco Meneses uhlanganise amakomiti omphakathi agxile ekuphepheni nokwaneliseka kweziguli, imindeni yazo kanye nomphakathi. Uma ubheka umthelela omuhle womsebenzi wakhe wokwenza ngcono ukunakekelwa kweziguli okuhle, imodeli yobuqotho nokunakekelwa okuzinze ezigulini eyakhiwelwe ukunyusa izinga lezwe. Kulesikhathi samanje, njengenduna yezwe yezibhedlela zaseGuatemala,wenza uhlelo lokwenza ngcono ukwenziwa kahle kwemisebenzi kweziguli ezibhedlela kanye nemindeni. UDkt Meneses usanda kuxhumanisa ukuzama ngendlela entsha yephrojekthi eGuatemala South Area ukwakha uhlelokuxhumana lezwe oluhlanganisiwe lokuqala lwemisebenzi yezempilo, ngokuhambisa phambili ukugxila emphakathini ethola okuncane. Umsebenzi wakhe uholele ekuthathweni kwesu lezwe lokuhlanganisa izinhlelozokuxhumana emisebenzini yezempilo, okokuqala maphakathi ne-America.
translations.hypothesis: Ngemuva kokukhuthaza ukubamba iqhaza komphakathi ekunakekelweni ezibhedlela iminyaka engaphezu kwama-20, uDkt. Jorge Francisco Meneses wasungula amaqembu omphakathi agxile ekuphepheni nasekwanelisekeni kwikhambi, labo abathola ukunakekelwa, imindeni yabo kanye nomphakathi. Ngenxa yempumela emihle yemisebenzi yakhe ekuthuthukiseni ikhwalithi yokunakekelwa kwikhambi, uhlelo lokunakekelwa elihlanzekile futhi elibhekele umuntu esilokhu eliwuhlabele, lwandiswe ezingeni likazwelonke. Namuhla, njengomphathi kazwelonke wezibhedlela zaseGuatemala, udisayine uhlelo oluqondiswe ekuthuthukiseni ikhwalithi yezinsizakalo ezikhishwe kwikhambi kanye nemindeni yabo. UDr. Meneses, muva nje, uhambise iphrojekthi yokuqaliswa emisha kule ndawo yezempilo yaseGuatemala South, ekwakhiweni yenethiwekhi yokuqala kazwelonke yezinsizakalo zezempilo, egxile kakhulu ezikhungweni zomphakathi ezinganakekelwa kahle. Umsebenzi wakhe uholele ekwamukelweni kwezinhlelo zikazwelonke zenethiwekhi yezinsizakalo zezempilo ezihlanganisiwe, okokuqala kuleli dolobha laseCentral America.

translations.source: Nelson Mandela Award for Health Promotion 2023 award laureate: Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma from Bahrain In addition to being the Chief Executive Officer of the National Health Regulatory Authority of Bahrain, Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma has held various leadership positions in government and academic institutions in her country. Dr Al Jalahma has played a major role in the development of numerous national and region-wide strategies and plans in the field of primary healthcare, child and adolescent health, chronic diseases and antismoking. In her current role, Dr Al Jalahma has led major successful initiatives, such as the national accreditation system for health institutions, the digital transformation of the National Health Regulatory Authority, and several initiatives leading to increased efficiency and excellence in the health sector.
translations.reference: Umklomelo waNelson Mandela wokugqugquzela ezempilo 2023 umklomelo wabahlonishiwe: uDkt Mariam Athbi waseBahrain. Ukwengeza ekubeni nguChief Executive Office yeNational Health Regulatory Authority yaseBahrain, uDkt Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma usebambe izikhundla zokuhola eziningi kuhulumeni kanye nezikhungo zezemfundo ezweni lakhe. UDkt Al Jalahma udlale indima enkulu ekuthuthukiseni okukhulu kwamasu esifundeni sonke kanye nezinhlelo emkhakheni wokunakekela ezempilo zokuqala, ezempilo zamabhobhodlane nezingane,izifo ezingamahlalakhona nokuyeka ukubhema. Esikhundleni sakhe samanje, uDkt Al Jalahma usehole imizamo emikhulu ebalulekile, njengokwenza kahle ohlelweni lwezikhungo zezempilo, uguquko lwedijithali lweNational Helath Authority kanye nemizamo embalwa yokuhola ukunyusa ukwenza kahle nokuhle emkhakheni wezempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Umklomelo kaNelson Mandela wezokuthuthukisa impilo ka-2023 uhambiswe ku: uDkt. Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma wase-Bahrain. Ngaphandle kokuba nguMqondisi Omkhulu weBhodi Lokulawula Ezempilo yase-Bahrain, uDkt. Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma ubesebenzile ezikhundleni eziningi zokuhola ezinkampanini kahulumeni kanye nezikhungo zezifundo ezweni lakhe. UDkt. Al Jalahma udlale indima enkulu ekuthuthukisweni kwezinhlelo eziningi kazwelonke kanye nezifunda ezahlukene ezindaweni ezifana nokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezisemqoka, impilo yezingane kanye nabantu abasha, izifo ezihlala njalo, kanye nokulwa nokutshala uthu. Esikhundleni sakhe samanje, uDkt. Al Jalahma uhole izinhlelo ezinkulu eziphumelele, ezifana nohlelo lweziqu kazwelonke lwezikhungo zezempilo, ukuguqulwa kwezobuchwepheshe kweBhodi Lokulawula Ezempilo, kanye nezinhlelo eziningi eziholile ekuthuthukisweni kakhulu kanye nokwazi okukhulu kwasemkhakheni wezempilo.

translations.source: She is also a prominent voice for health promotion across various channels throughout all countries of the Gulf Cooperation Council.
translations.reference: Uphinde abe yizwi elidumile lokugqugquzelwa kwezempilo kumashaneli ahlukene ngamazwe onke eGulf Cooperation Council.
translations.hypothesis: Uphinde abe umholi obalulekile ekukhuthazeni impilo ngezindlela eziningi ezahlukene kuyo yonke izifunda zeZizwe ze-Gulf Cooperation Council.

translations.source: WHO and Republic of Korea sign landmark agreement to boost biomanufacturing capacity WHO and the Republic of Korea have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to establish a global training hub in biomanufacturing. This global training centre will serve all low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) to produce biologicals, such as vaccines, insulin, monoclonal antibodies, and cancer medicines. The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the need to expand the local and regional production of vaccines and other essential health products in LMICs to ensure equitable access. To provide countries with the know-how to rapidly produce mRNA vaccines, WHO, in collaboration with partners, established the mRNA Technology Transfer programme, with the formal inauguration of the Hub facility in South Africa in April 2023.
translations.reference: I-WHO neRepublic of Korea basayinde isikhonkwane sesivumelwano sokunyusa amandla okukhiqiza. I-WHO neRepublic of Korea basayinde iMemorandum of Understanding ukuqala ihabhu yokuqeqesha emhlabeni kwezokukhiqiza. Isizinda sokuqeqesha somhlaba sizosiza ukuvumela amazwe anemali engenanyo encane kuya kwephakathi nendawo (LMICs) ukukhiqiza okwebhayoliji, njengemigomo, insulin, amasosha emonoclonal nemithi yomdlavuza. Ubhubhane COVID-19 luveze isidingo sokwandisa ukukhiqizwa kwemigomo esifundeni nasendaweni kanye neminye imikhiqizo yezempilo ebalulekile kuLMICs ukuqinisekisa ukuthola ngokulingana. Ukunikeza amazwe ngokuthi benze kanjani ukukhiqiza imigomo yeMRNA ngokuphidekile,Iwho ngokubambisana nababambisani basungule Uhlelo lokudlulisela lwezobuchwepheshe beMRNA, nokulwethula ngokusemthethweni kwendawo yeHabhu eNingizimu Afrika ngoMbasa 2023.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO kanye neRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea bashayelwe inkontileka ebalulekile yokwandisa amandla okukhiqiza izinto ezivela kwezinto eziphilayo. I-WHO kanye neRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea bashayelwe inkontileka yokusebenzisana ukuze bakhe indawo yokufundisa kazwelonke mayelana nokukhiqiza izinto ezivela kwezinto eziphilayo. Lesi sikhungo sokufundisa kazwelonke sizosiza wonke amazwe anezimali ezincane nezamaphakathi (LMICs) ekukhiqizeni izinto ezivela kwezinto eziphilayo, ezifana nezivakashi, i-insulin, ama-antibody ahlukahlukene, kanye nezindlela zokwelapha ukugula kwe-cancer. Igciwane le-COVID-19 kubonise ukuthi kudingeka ukwandisa ukukhiqizwa kwezivakashi nezinye izinto ezibalulekile zempilo ezifana nalezi ezifundeni zase-LMICs ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukufinyelela okulinganayo. Ukuze kunikezwe amazwe ulwazi lokukhiqiza ngokushesha izivakashi ze-mRNA, i-WHO, ngokubambisana nabalingani, yasungula uhlelo lokuqondiswa kwetekhnoloji ye-mRNA, kanti ukugqudulwa okusemthethweni kwalesi sikhungo kwenzeke eNingizimu Afrika ngo-Ephreli 2023.

translations.source: This multilateral effort and other recent local production initiatives call for ambitious workforce development strategies to recruit, upskill and retain the staff working at these facilities, with unique competencies required in bioproduction. To address this gap, WHO and the Republic of Korea have engaged in closed collaboration for over a year and are now formalizing their commitment towards the establishment of a global training hub in biomanufacturing. “We are delighted to sign this Memorandum of Understanding to elevate our partnership to the next level and collaborate in the development of a comprehensive training curriculum. We hope this world-class training hub will help to build a skilled workforce and ensure quality health products can be manufactured around the world,” said Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General, Access to Medicines and Health Products. The Government of the Republic of Korea is offering a large range of national training facilities and programmes covering the full spectrum of biological manufacturing and is expanding its operations to accommodate more trainees from other countries with the construction of a Global Bio Education Campus to be launched in 2025.
translations.reference: Lomzamo wokuningi kanye neminye imizamo yokukhiqiza yendawo imemezela ugqozi lwamasu okuthuthukisa ukusebenza ukuthi athathwe, ukunyusa ikhono nokugcina abasebenzi abasebenza kulezizindawo, ngokwenza okuhlukile okudinga ukukhiqiza. Ukubhekana naleligebe, iWHO neRepubic of Korea sebexoxe ngokuhlanganisa ukubambisana esikhathini esingangonyaka futhi manje siqedela ukuzibophezela kwabo okuya ekwakheni ihabhu yokuqeqesha yomhlaba ekukhiqizeni. "Siyajabula ukusayina iMemorandum of Understanding ukunyusa ukubambisana kwethu kuye ezingeni elilandelayo nokubamnisana entuthukweni yohlelokufunda lokuqeqesha okukhulu. Siyathemba ukuthi lehabhu yokuqeqesha okusezingeni eliphezulu kuzosiza ukwakha abasebenzi abanekhono nokuqinisekisa imikhiqizo yezempilo efanele engakhiqizwa emhlabeni," kusho uDkt Yukiko Nakatani, Umsizi Mqondisi Jikelele weWHO, ukuthola imithi nemikhiqizo yezempilo. Uhulumeni waseRepublic of Korea unikela ngokwahlukene okuningi kwezindawo zokuqeqesha ezweni nezinhlelo zokukhava ukwahlukana okuphelele kokukhiqizwa kwebhayoloji kanye nokwandisa ukusebenza kwayo nokwamukela abaningi abazoqeqeshwa abavela kwamanye amazwe ngokwakha iGlobal Bio Education Campus ezokwethulwa ngo-2025.
translations.hypothesis: Lolu msebenzi ohlelweni olunzulu kanye nezinye izinhlelo zokukhiqiza zasemvelweni ezazenzeke kwananje zidinga izinhlelo ezinkulu zokuthuthukisa umsebenzi ukuze kukhishwe, kuthuthukiswe futhi kugcinwe abasebenzi abasebenzela kulezi zikhungo, ngoba kudingeka amakhono ahlukile ekukhiqizweni kwebhayoloji. Ukulungisa leli phutha, i-WHO kanye neRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea ziqhubekile ngokubambisana okubanzi iminyaka eminingi futhi manje zenza okwamanje ukwenza kube yiqiniso ukuzibophezela zazo ekusungulweni kwendawo yokufundisa kazwelonke mayelana nokukhiqiza kwebhayoloji. "Sijabule ukusayina leli Ngxenye Yomelano ukuze sithuthukise ubudlelwano bethu ezingeni elilandelayo futhi sibambisane ekuthuthukisweni kwekhulikhulamu yokufundisa ehleleke kakhulu. Sithemba ukuthi le ndawo yokufundisa ehamba phambili emhlabeni izosiza ekwakhiweni komsebenzi onobuchwepheshe futhi kuqiniseke ukuthi imikhiqizo yezempilo yekhwalithi ingakhiqizwa emhlabeni wonke," kusho uDkt. Yukiko Nakatani, uMphathi Omkhulu Omsekeli we-WHO, Mayelana Nokufinyelela Kwezokwelapha Nemikhiqizo Yezempilo. Uhulumeni weRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea unikeza izindawo eziningi zokufundisa kanye nezinhlelo ezinkulu ezifakazela yonke indawo yokukhiqiza kwebhayoloji futhi uyandisa imisebenzi yalo ukuze amukele abafundi abaningi ezweni elinye ngakho ukwakhiwa kwe-Global Bio Education Campus ezosungulwa ngo-2025.

translations.source: “I hope this Memorandum of Understanding will enhance cooperation between the Republic of Korea and WHO to strengthen biomanufacturing capacities of LMICs,” said Mr Hwang Seunghyun Director General, Global Vaccine Hub Office at the Ministry of Health and Welfare from Republic of Korea. In parallel, WHO is intensifying regulatory system strengthening to ensure the quality and safety of health products. Stronger regulatory agencies will also enhance confidence in locally produced products and counter misinformation and the availability of unsafe substandard or falsified medicines.
translations.reference: "Ngiyathemba ukuthi leMemorandum yokuqondisisa izokwengeza ukusebenzisana phakathi kweRepublic of Korea neWHO ukuqinisa amandla okukhiqiza yeLMICs," kusho uMnu. Hwang Seunghyun,uMqondisi Jikelele weGlobal Vaccine Hub Office kungqongqoshe wezempilo nokunakekelwa ovela eRepublic of Korea. Ngokuhambisana, iWHO inohlelo lokulawula olunzima ukuqinisa ukuqinisekisa ukulingana nokuphepha kwemikhiqizo yezempilo. Ama-ejensi okulawula aqinile azophinde engeze ukuzethemba ekukhiqizweni imikhiqizo yasendaweni nokumela ulwazi okungeyilo nokubakhona kwamazinga angaphephile noma imithi engumgunyathi.
translations.hypothesis: "Ngiyethemba ukuthi leli Memorandum of Understanding lizokhuthaza ukubambisana phakathi kweRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea kanye ne-WHO ukuze kukhuliswe amandla okukhiqiza izinto zebhayoloji ezifushane ezifanele ezifundeni ezincane nezinkululekile," kusho uMnuz Hwang Seunghyun, uMqondisi Jikelele weHhovisi le-Global Vaccine Hub eMnyangweni Wezempilo kanye Nezempilo yaseRiphabhlikhi yaseKorea. Ngokufanayo, i-WHO iyakhulisa ukwenza ngcono uhlelo lwezokulawula ukuqinisekisa ikhwalithi nokuphepha kwezinto zempilo. Izinhlaka zokulawula ezibanzi futhi zizokhuthaza ukuzethemba ngemikhiqizo edalwe endaweni futhi zivimbela ukusakazwa kwemilayezo engempela kanye nokutholakala kwezindlela zokwelapha ezingekephuleki, ezingcolile noma ezodwa.

translations.source: WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing life-threatening tobacco crops On World No Tobacco Day, WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing tobacco farming and support more sustainable crops that could feed millions. “Tobacco is responsible for 8 million deaths a year, yet governments across the world spend millions supporting tobacco farms,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and strengthen food security for all.” More than 300 million people globally are faced with acute food insecurity.
translations.reference: I-WHO inxenxa ohulumeni ukuthi bayeke ukuhlinzeka zezitshalo ezibulalayo zikagwayi. Usuku lokungabhenywa ugwayi eMhlabeni, iWHO inxenxa uhulumeni ukuthi ayeke ukuhlinzeka ukutshalwa kukagwayi nokweseka ukugcinwa kwezitshalo ezingondla izigidi zabantu. "Ugwayi usubulale izigidi ezingu-8 ngonyaka,kodwa ohulumeni emhlabeni wonke bachitha izigidi beseka amafamu agwayi," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Umqondisi Jikelele weWHO. "Ngokukhetha ukutshala ukudla esikhundleni sagwayi,siqhakambisa ezempilo,sigcina ekhosistimu futhi siqinisa ukuvikela ukudla kuwona wonke umuntu" Bangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-300 abantu emhlabeni ababhekene nokuntuleka kokudla okunzima.
translations.hypothesis: UHoli wezeHhovisi Likazwelonke Lempilo (WHO) ucele izikhumulo ukuthi ziyeke ukuxhasa ukulimwa kwezitshalo zotshaba ezingozi empilweni. Ngosuku Lomhlaba Olungenayo Utsheko, i-WHO icela izikhumulo ukuthi ziyeke ukuxhasa ukulimwa kotshaba futhi zisekele izitshalo ezithuthukisiwe kakhulu ezikwazi ukudla izigidi zabantu. "UTshaba lubanga ukufa kwezigidi ezingu-8 ngonyaka, kodwa izikhumulo kulo lonke elasekuphileni zichitha izigidi zamaRandi ezixhasa izifarmu zotshaba," kusho uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, umphathi omkhulu we-WHO. "Ngokukhetha ukulima ukudla esikhundleni kotshaba, siqala ukunakekelwa kwempilo, sivikele izindawo zemvelo, futhi sithuthukise ukuphepha kokudla kubo bonke." Abantu abangaphezu kuka-300 million emhlabeni wonke abhekene nokuntuleko kakhulu kokudla.

translations.source: Meanwhile more than 3 million hectares of land across more than 120 countries are being used to grow deadly tobacco, even in countries where people are starving. A new WHO report, “Grow food, not tobacco,” highlights the ills of tobacco growing and the benefits of switching to more sustainable food crops for farmers, communities, economies, the environment, and the world at large. The report also exposes the tobacco industry for trapping farmers in a vicious cycle of debt, propagating tobacco growing by exaggerating its economic benefits and lobbying through farming front groups. Tobacco farming causes diseases to the farmers themselves and more than 1 million child laborers are estimated to be working on tobacco farms, missing their opportunity for an education. “Tobacco is not only a massive threat to food insecurity, but health overall, including the health of tobacco farmers.
translations.reference: Ngesikhathi ngaphezu kwamahekitha ayizigidi ezingu-3 zendawo emazweni angaphezu kuka-120 asetshenziswayo ukutshala ugwayi obulalayo, ngisho nasemazweni lapho abantu belamba khona. Umbiko omusha weWHO, "Tshala ukudla ayi ugwayi," iveza izifo zikagwayi nezinzuzo zokushintshela ezitshalweni zokudla ezigcinekayo kubalimi, imiphakathi, ezomnotho, indawo kanye nomhlaba wonke. Umbiko uphinde uveze ukuthi imboni kagwayi ibamba abalimi ngezikweletu,ngokukhuluma ngogwayi benza ihaba ngezinzuzo zezomnotho nokukhankasa ezolimo ngamaqembu aphambili. Ukutshalwa kukagwayikudala izifo kubalimi futhi ngaphezu kwesigidi esisodwa sezisebenzi eziyizingane ezibalelwa ukuthi zisebenza emafamu kagwayi, bephuthwa yithuba labo lokufunda. "Ugwayi awuyona inkinga enkulu kuphela ekwentulekeni kokudla kodwa kwezempilo zonke okubandakanya ezempilo yabalimi bagwayi.
translations.hypothesis: Ngesikhathi esifanayo, izigidi ezingu-3 eziningi zamahilomitha ezempi ezweni elingaphezu kuka-120 zasetshenziselwa ukukhulwa kotobhakelo, ngisho nezifundazweni lapho abantu begula. Ingxenye entsha yephrofayela ye-WHO, ethi "Khulisa ukudla, hhayi utobhakelo," igcizelela izinkinga zokukhulwa kotobhakelo kanye nezinzuzo zokuguquka kwezinhlobo zokudla ezithuthukisiwe kubalimi, ezinkundleni, ezomnotho, emvelweni, kanye nomhlaba wonke. Leli phrofayela futhi lumbulula umkhakha wotobhakelo ngokubamba abalimi kulo chungechunge elibi lokubheqa, ngokukhuthaza ukukhulwa kotobhakelo ngokugqamisa izinzuzo zayo zomnotho, kanye ngokuxhasa ngamaqembu abalimi. Ukukhulwa kotobhakelo kubangela izifo kubalimi ngokwabo, futhi kulinganiselwa ukuthi izigidi ezingu-1 eziningi zezingane ezisebenza zisebenza emakhaya kotobhakelo, zishiye ithemba labo lokufunda. "UTobhakelo akuyona nje ingozi enkulu yokuntuleka kokudla, kodwa futhi yingozi yezempilo eziningi, okubalwa nezempilo zabalimi botobhakelo."

translations.source: Farmers are exposed to chemical pesticides, tobacco smoke and as much nicotine as found in 50 cigarettes – leading to illnesses like chronic lung conditions and nicotine poisoning,” said Dr Ruediger Krech, Director of Health Promotion at WHO. Tobacco growing is a global problem. The focus has so far been in Asia and South America, but the latest data show tobacco companies are expanding to Africa. Since 2005, there has been a nearly 20% increase in tobacco farming land across Africa. WHO, the Food and Agriculture Organization and the World Food Programme support the Tobacco Free Farms initiative that will provide help to more than 5000 farmers in Kenya and Zambia to grow sustainable food crops instead of tobacco.
translations.reference: Abalimi bavezeke kumakhemikhali ayizibulala nambuzane,intuthu yagwayi kanye nenikhothini njengoba itholakala kugwayi abangu-50 - okuholela ekuguleninjengosimo samahlalakhona samaphaphu noshevu kanikhothini," kusho uDkt Ruediger Krech, Umqondisi weZokugqugquzelwa kweZempilo eWHO. Ukukhula kukagwayi kuyinkinga yomhlaba wonke. Ukugxila okwamanje kusase-Asia naseNingizimu ne-America kodwa imininingo yakamuva ikhombisa ukuthi izinkampani zikagwayi ziyanda e-Afrika. Kusukela ngo-2005 singafinyelela ku-20% isibalo sokunyuka kokutshalwa kukagwayi e-Afrika yonke. I-WHO iNhlangano yezokudla nokulima kuhlelo lwezokudla emhlabeni ukweseka iTobacco Free Farms okungumzamo ozonikeza usizo kubalimi abangaphezu kuka-5000 eKenya naseZambia ukulima izitshalo zokudla okugcinekayo esikhundleni sikagwayi.
translations.hypothesis: Abafundi bayephathwa yimikhiqizo yamakhemikhali, umsila wotshaba, kanye nomlingo ofanayo nalowo obutholakala kumagrisi angama-50 – okubangela izifo ezifana nezinkinga zempilo zelungu kanye nokugaywa umlingo. "Lokhu kusho uDkt. Ruediger Krech, umphathi wezokukhuthazwa kwezempilo e-WHO. Ukulima kotshaba kuyinkinga emhlabeni jikelele. Kuze kube manje, kukhoma kakhulu e-Asia naseNingizimu Melika, kodwa idatha yakamuva ibonisa ukuthi izinkampani zotshaba zikhulayo kakhulu e-Afrika. Kusukela ngo-2005, kukhona ukukhuliswa okungenzeka cishe ngo-20% komhlaba wokulima kotshaba kulo lonke elase-Afrika. I-WHO, iHhovisi Lezokudla kanye Nokulima kanye neHlelo Lomhlaba Lokudla lisekela uhlelo lwe-"Tobacco Free Farms" oluzohlinzeka ngosizo kubafundi abangaphezu kuka-5000 eKenya naseZambia ukuze bakulime ukudla okulinganiselwe esikhathini eside esikhulu kunokulima kotshaba.

translations.source: Every year World No Tobacco Day honours those making a difference in tobacco control. This year one of the Awardees, Ms Sprina Robi Chacha, a female farmer from Kenya, is being recognized for not only switching from growing tobacco to high protein beans, but also training hundreds of other farmers on how to do this to create a healthier community. 182 Parties to the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control have committed to “...promote economically viable alternatives for tobacco workers and growers”. A crucial way that countries can fulfill this obligation is by ending subsidies for tobacco growing and supporting healthier crops. By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and increase food security.
translations.reference: Njalo ngonyaka World no Tobacco Day ihlonipha labo abenza umehluko ekulawuleni ugwayi. Lonyaka omunye wabaklonyelisiwe, uNksz Sprina Robi Chacha, umlimi wesifazane waseKenya ubonakele ayi ukushitsha esuka ekutshaleni ugwayi kuphela eya ekutshaleni ubhontshisi onezondla muzimba eziphezulu, kodwa nangokuqeqesha amakhulu abanye abalimi ukuthi ukwenza kanjani lokhu ukwakha umphakathi onempilo. Amaqembu angu-182 eWHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control asezibophezele,… ukugqugquzela ngokomnotho ezinye izindlela ezikhona zabasebenzi nabatshali bagwayi. Indlela ebucayi amazwe angagcina ngayo lo myalelo kungaba ukuqeda ukuhlinzeka kokutshalwa kukagwayi bese beseka izitshalo ezinempilo. Ngokukhetha ukutshala ukudla esikhundleni sikagwayi, siqhakambisa ezempilo, ukugcina ekhosistimu nokunyusa ukuphepha kokudla.
