translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) “There is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.”
translations.reference: uDkt Nahya Salim,waseTanzania: Ukusheshe uzalwe omunye wababhali nezwe eliholwa ngeNewborn Essentials Solutions and Technology 360 (NEST360) "Asisekho manje isizathu sokuthula. Manje sinamadivayisi ezandleni zethu kanye nolwazi lukushintsha imiphumela yezingane zethu ezihluphekile ezizelwe. Ngiyaziqhenya ukubona uhulumeni wethu manje etshala futhi ezibophezela ukwenza yonke indawo ngisho nasemakhaya. Ishuminyaka elizayo lingaba futhi kumele lihluke kulabo ababhekene zokusheshe bazale lana nakuyona yonke indawo."
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Nahya Salim, eTanzania: Umbhali wombhalo "Born Too Soon" kanye nomholi kazwelonke we-Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360). "Manje asikho isizathu sokulala. Sinezinto kanye nolwazi ezandleni zethu ukushintsha imiphumela yezingane ezincane ezithintekayo kakhulu. Ngiyajabula ukubona uhulumeni wami manje etshala imali futhi azibophezisa ekwenzeni lokhu kuyo yonke indawo, ngisho nezindawo zasemakhaya. Unyaka olandelayo ungaba futhi kufanele ube ngomunye ohlukile kulabo ababhekene nokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi, lapha kanye nomaphakathi.

translations.source: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO “Ensuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.” Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF “After every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: UDkt Anshu Banerjee, uMqondisi wabakhulelwe, abazelwe, izingane nentsha kwezempilo kanye nokuguga eWHO "Ukuqinisekisa ukunakekelwa okufanele kwabancane, abantekenteke nemindeni yabo kufanele impela nokwenzangcono ezempilo nokuphila komntwana. Inqubekela phambili iyadingeka futhi ukusiza ukuvikela ukusheshe bazale-lokhu kusho ukuthi wonke umuntu wesifazane kumele akwazi ukuthola ezempilo ezifanele ngaphambi nangesikhathi sokukhulelwa ukuze kuhlonzwe futhi kuphathwe izingcuphe." USteven Lauwerier, uMqondisi weZempilo (a.i.), e-UNICEF "Ngemva kokufa kokusheshe uzalwe njalo ukulandelana kokulahlekelwa nokuphuka kwenhliziyo.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Anshu Banerjee, umphathi wezempilo yomama, yezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, yezingane kanye namakhefu, e-WHO: "Ukuhlinzeka ngokunakekelo okuhle kulezi zingane ezincane kakhulu nezithintekayo kanye nemindeni yazo kubaluleke kakhulu ekuthuthukiseni impilo yezingane kanye nokuphila kwazo. Kufanele kwenziwe nokuphothula ukunciphisa ukuzalwa kwangaphambi kosuku oluhleliwe - lokhu kusho ukuthi wonke umfazi kufanele akwazi ukufinyelela izinsizakalo zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ngaphambi nangaphambi kokukhulelwa ukuze kutholwe futhi kulawulwe izingozi." U-Steven Lauwerier, umphathi wezempilo (owathatha indima eqondile), e-UNICEF: "Ngemuva kokufa ngakunye kwengane ezalwe ngaphambi kosuku oluhleliwe, kukhona umzila wokulahlekelwa nokukhathazeka."

translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. It’s time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.” Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH “Born too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth – the world’s largest cause of death of children under the age of five.
translations.reference: Ngaphandle kobungcono okuningi emhlabeni esikwenzile eshumininyaka eledlule, asikenzi nqubekela phambili ekwehliseni inamba yezingane ezincane ezisheshe zizalwe noma sivimbe ingcuphe ekuzalweni kwabo. Loluhambo luyakhubaza. Yisikhathi sokwenza ngcono ukuthola ukunakekelwa komama abakhulelwe kanye nezingane ezizalwe kungashayi isikhathi nokuqinisekisa ukuthi yonke ingane ithola ukuqala kwezempilo nokuphokophela empilweni." UHelga Fogstad, uMqondisi Omkhulu, wePMNCH Ukusheshe uzalwe kusho incazelo yokuthi kumele sinyuse utshalomali nesibophezelo kwabasheshe bazalwa - imbangela enkulu emhlabeni yokufa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu.
translations.hypothesis: Noma kunjalo, nakuba umhlaba ufezile ukuthuthuka okuningi kule minyaka eyishumi edlule, asikwenze noma yini ukuze sibusise inani labantfwana abancane abazalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi noma siphazamise izinazo zokufa kwabo. Umphumela uyakhukhuma. Sesikhathi sithuthukise ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zabazali abakhulelwe kanye nezingane ezazalwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi, futhi siqiniseke ukuthi wonke umntwana uthole ukuqalisa okunempilo futhi aphile impilo enhle.” – Helga Fogstad, Umphathi Omkhulu, PMNCH. "Ukuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kubonisa ukuthi kufanele sikhuliswe ukutshalwa kwezimali kanye nokuzimiswa kwemigomo mayelana nokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi – okuyimbangela enkulu kakhulu yokufa kwezingane ezincane kunezane.

translations.source: Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. “By working together in partnership – governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals – we can sound the alarm about this “silent emergency”, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. ”Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of Jalen’s Gift Foundation “Our foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and that’s when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Ukuqhubeka kokulinganisa kumama nezempilo zomntwana ozelwe, kanye nokuvikelwa kokuzalwa kwabantwana kungakashayi isikhathi, manje sekubekwe emuva ngokuhlanganiswa okukhathazayo kweCOVID-19, ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukwandisa izingxabano nokukhulisa izindleko zokuphila. Ngokusebenza ndawonye ngokubambisana - uhulumeni, abaxhasi, umkhakha ozimele, umphakathi, abazali, izifundiswa zempilo - singaveza inkinga ngokuthula kokuphuthuma nokuletha ukuvikelwa kokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi nemizamo yokunakelewa phambili kwezempilo yezwe nemizamo yokuthuthukisa, ukwakha amandla omuntu ngokweseka imindeni, imiphakathi nezomnotho yonke indawo. "UGabriela noJerome Foster, e-Las Vegas, e-United States: abazali baJalen Foster, abasunguli beJalen Gift Foundation "Indawo yethu yasungulwa ngemva kokushona komfana wethu, uJalen Foster, owasheshe wazalwa enamasonto angu-27 ngenxa yokusheshe ngisikwe ngegciwane elingaziwa njengeqoqo B streptococcus. Ukulahlekelwa yindodana yethu kwasifakela ingcindezi futhi kwakungekho ukwesekwa emphakathini nokuthi ngesikhathi sinquma ukunikezela ngendawo ukududuza nokunika ithemba emindenini elahlekelwe ngumntwana.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuthuthuka kwezempilo zabanye nabanye kanye nezempilo zezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, kanye nokuvimbela ukufa kwezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, kuye kwenza ukuthi kungabi nokuthuthuka, futhi manje kuye kwelashwa kakhulu ngenxa yobudlova obunzulu obubangelwa yi-COVID-19, ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukukhula kwezimpi kanye nokunyuka kwezindleko zokuphila. "Ngokusebenzisana njengobambisana – izikhumulo zombuso, abaxhasi, umkhakha wabadlali, umphakathi, abazali kanye nochwepheshe bezempilo – singenza isaziso mayelana "lesi simo esiyimfihlo," futhi sifeze ukuthi imizamo yokuvimbela ukuzalwa kwangaphambi kosuku lokuzalwa kanye nokunakekelwa kuyo kube yingxenye ebalulekile yezinhlelo zezempilo kanye nokuthuthukiswa ezweni lonke, ngokwakha impilo yabantu ngokusekela imindeni, ezakhamisa kanye nezomnotho kuwo wonke amapulazi. "UGabriela noJerome Foster, eLas Vegas, e-United States: abazali kaJalen Foster, kanye nosunguli we-Jalen's Gift Foundation. "Isisekelo sethu sasekwakhiwe ngemuva kokulahlekelwa kwethu ngendodana yethu, uJalen Foster, owafa ngaphambi kosuku lokuzalwa ngamawiki ayi-27 ngenxa yobungozi bebhakthiriya eyaziwa njenge-group B streptococcus. Ukulahlekelwa kwethu ngendodana yethu kwaba yinto engokufa, futhi akukho ukwesekwa emphakathini, ngaleyo ndlela sasinquma ukuhlinzeka indawo yokukhululeka kanye nethemba kwimindeni eyalwahlekelwa ngengane."

translations.source: We didn’t want other families to feel like we did – alone. So, we started Jalen’s Gift Foundation to help other families going through a loss, to provide multiple free services, such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” ***Download the Born too soon media resources
translations.reference: Besingafuni eminye imindeni izezwe njengba sazizwa - uwedwa. Ngakho, siqale iJalen's Gift Foundation ukusiza imindeni elahlekelwe, ukubanikeza usizo lwamahhala oluningi, njengezithombe, ukwesekwa kokuzila nokubasiza ezinhlelweni zesikhumbuzo." ***Landa usheshe wazalwa kuzinsizakusebenza zezindaba
translations.hypothesis: Asifuni ukuthi ezinye imindeni zizwe njengalokho esizwe sona – zihlale zodwa. Ngakho, sithumele i-Jalen's Gift Foundation ukuze sisisize ezinye imindeni ezidlule ekulahlekelweni, futhi sihlinzeke ngezinsizakalo eziningi zamahhala, ezifana nokuthwebula izithombe, ukusekela ngempilo yengqondo, kanye nosizo oluholene nemikhosi yokukhumbula." ***Landza izinsiza zeminye imidiya ezihlobene ne-"Born too soon."

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict.
translations.reference: I-UEA neWHO ihambise iziphakamisi moya zamasaplayi ezokwelapha ezibucayi eSudan United Arab Emirates (UAE) neNhlangano yeZempilo eMhlabeni (WHO) bahambise amathoni angu-30 amasaplayi ezokwelapha okuphuthumayo eSudan namhlanje. Ibhanoyi eliphethe amasaplayi yokwelapha abalimele, ukuhlinza okuphuthumayokanye nezidakamizwa eziphuthumayo lifike isikhumulweni samabhanoyi iPort Sudan ekuseni kakhulu. Ukuhanjswa kwenani elingu US$ 444 000, eyokuqala iWHO ekwazile ukuyihambisa ngezomoya iya eSudan kusukela kube nokubheduka kwengxabano. I-WHO ihambise amasaplayi ezindaweni zempilo ngaphambi kokunyuka kwengxabano.
translations.hypothesis: I-UAE kanye ne-WHO bahambise izinto ezibalulekile zokwelapha e-Sudan ngendiza. Namuhla, i-United Arab Emirates (UAE) kanye ne-World Health Organization bahambise ithoni ezinkulungwane ezingu-30 zezinto zokwelapha ezidingekayo e-Sudan. Indiza elithwala izinto zokwelapha ezisetshenziselwa ukwelapha amagazi, ukuhlinzwa okubalulekile, kanye nezidakamizwa ezibalulekile, ifike e-Port Sudan Airport kusasa kakhulu. Le nhlanganisela, enenani elingu-$444,000, yiyona yokuqala i-WHO ikwazile ukuyithumela ngendiza e-Sudan kusukela kokuqala kohlakazeko. I-WHO yabelwe izinto zokwelapha ezikhungweni zezempilo ngaphambi kokuba kukhuliswe uhlakaniphani.

translations.source: These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAE’s humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.
translations.reference: Babekhathele ngemva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa uma ubheka inamba yabalimele. Ukukhishwa kwendizamshini kuza njengengxenye ye-UAE imizamo yokuqhubeka nokukhulula ekwesekeni abantu baseSudanese nokuveza ubuhlobo obunzulu neSudan, ikakhulukazi ngokwesimo samanje esibhekene nezwe. Ukukhululwa kuphinde kube ukululwa kobuntu be-UAE umbono nesikalo sobudlelwano namanye amazwe ancike kubantu nouzibophezela kokusiza abanye ngezikhathi zezinkinga nezimo eziphuthumayo. UDkt Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Unqongqoshe wezwe leInternational Cooperation, uthe i-UAE izoqhubeka nokusebenzisana neNhlangano yezempilo emhlabeni ukuqinisekisa ukubekwa okuyimpumelelo kokusebenza kwelojistikhi ebucayi nokuthumela ezokwelapha ngokuphuthuma nosizo lokudla ukusiza ukubhekana nenkinga yamanje eSudan. Nokuhambisana nesimemezelo kuzona zonke izinngxenye zengxabano yamanje ukuyeka manje unya nokuqhuba isimo esidala ukuhlupheka okungashiwo kubantu baseSudan, i-UAE isheshile ekuzibophezelei kwayo ukunikeza usizo nokusiza mazwe ngesikhathi beludinga.
translations.hypothesis: Lezi zimoto zayo zasetshenziswa kancane ngemva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa ngenxa yobuningi babantu abalambileyo. Ukuthunyelwa kwale ndiza kuyingxenye yemizamelo eqhubekayo yosizo evela e-UAE ukuze kusizwe abantu baseSudan, futhi kubonisa ubuhlobo obuqinile phakathi kwe-UAE kanye ne-Sudan, ikakhulukazi ngenxa yesimo esikhona manje kuleli zwe. Lolu hlelo lomsizi futhi luyingxenye yombono womphakathi we-UAE, futhi kubalulekisa ubuhlobo bayo nezinye izizwe ngokususelwa ekubumbanweni komuntu, kanye nokuzibophezela kwayo ekusizeni abanye ngixesha lamahlehlakala nezimo eziphuthumayo. UDkt. Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, uMnyango Wezindaba Zamazwe Ngamazwe, uthe i-UAE "iyaqhubeka nokusebenzisana ngokuqinile ne-World Health Organization ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ukuhambiswa okubalulekile kwezinto ezidingekayo kuhlale kahle, ukuze kuthunyelwe usizo lwezokwelapha kanye nokudla ngokushesha ukuze kuxazululwe isimo esikhona manje e-Sudan. Ngokuyipela nezikhuthazo zokuthi zonke izingxenye ezihilele kulolu mpi zime ngokumasha futhi zanciphise ukukhukhuleka, ngoba leso simo kubanga ubuhlungu obungamakhali kubantu base-Sudan, i-UAE ihlale izibophezele ekuhlinzekeni ngosizo kanye nosizo ezweni ngixesha lokudingeka.

translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict – and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.” The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need.
translations.reference: I-UAE igxile kakhulu ekunikezeni amaqoqo abuthaka kakhulu akhahlamezekile kulesisimo saseSudan, ikakhulukazi abagulayo, izingane,nabadala nabesifazane abasengcupheni yokuqhubeka kwengxabano - futhi lamabhanoyi akhululayo azobhekana ngqo nezikhala eziphuthumayo kwezokulapha kanye nokuhlinzekwa ngokudla. I-UAE igcine ngokujula ubuntu kusho ukuthi isiqinisekisile iyaqhubeka nokuxhumana nokumhlaba okukhulu nokuzinikela kokuqinisa ukuthula, ukuphepha nozinzo, ayi esizindeni kuphela kodwa emhlabeni wonke ngesikhathi nababambisani nomphakathi wamazwe angaphandle, izwe liyaqhubeka nokusiza iSudanese ezikhathini ezinzima. Amasaplayi ezempiloafaka ukuthuka okwanele, amasaplayi okuhlinza okuphuthumayo nemithi ebalulekile ukuthi ifike manje kubantu abangu-165 000 abadinga kakhulu usizo lobuntu. Izindawo zezempilo ezweni lonke zibika ukuthi seziphelelwe masaplayi ayisisekelo sezempilo nokuthi izitolo zokwelapha zezwe akusafinyeleki kuzona ngenxa yezokuphepha ezweni. Kokunye ukwesekwa, iWHO izobeka amalojistikhi amabili okuphuthumayo ukuhamba ngebhanoyi ukuqinisekisa lamasaplayi asehanjiswa ezindaweni zempilo ezinkulu ezingu-13 ukweseka abasebenzi bezempilo nokwengeza ukunakekela kulabo abakudingayo.
translations.hypothesis: I-UAE igxile kakhulu ekuhlinzekeni ngempendulo ezikhungweni ezithintekayo kakhulu ezithintekile yalesi simo e-Sudan, ikakhulukazi labagulayo, izingane, abadala, kanye namabhokodwe abakhona engozi enkulu ngalolu mlilo ongokwesikhathi. Lezi zindiza zosizo zizobe zithinta ngqo izidingo ezinkulu kakhulu ezikhungweni zokwelapha kanye nokuhlinzekwa kokudla. Izindinganiso zika-UAE zokunakekelwa komphakathi zinqume ukuthi iqhubeke nokuxhumana nomhlaba wonke ngokuqinile kanye nokuzimisela kwayo ekuthuthukiseni ukuthula, ukuphepha kanye nokuzinzile, hhayi kuphela endaweni, kodwa futhi emhlabeni wonke, kuyilapho ihlanganyela nabalingani bayo kanye nomphakathi wase-international, leli lizwe liqhubeka nokusiza abantu base-Sudan ngezikhathi zengozi. Izimpahla zokwelapha zifaka okufanele ukwelashwa kweziguli ezithintekile, izimpahla zokwelashwa ezisheshayo, kanye nezidakamizwa ezibalulekile ezokwazi ukufinyelela ngokushesha abantu abangu-165 000 abadinga usizo olunzulu. Izikhungo zokwelapha ezweni lonke zibika ukuthi zishiywe yizimpahla ezibalulekile zokwelapha futhi ukuthi izitolo zokwelapha zikazwelonke azisakufinyeleki ngenxa yesimo lobugeyini. Phakathi kwezinye izindlela zokusiza, i-WHO ithumela abathathu abasebenza ezindleleni zokuthutha ezihamba nezimpahla ukuqinisekisa ukuthi lezi zimpahla zidakwe ngokushesha ezikhungweni ezinkulu zokwelapha ezingu-13 ukuze kusizwe abasebenzi bokunakekelwa kwezempilo futhi kwandiswe ukunakekelwa kulabo abadinga.

translations.source: WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, “The WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses – delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: WHO inamathoni amakhulu angu-30 amasaplayi amalalwveva nezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo njengehayihayi noshukela, izimo ezingabulala uma zishiywa zingalashiwe. Lokhu nezikhwama zegazi ezingu-23 000 sezilungisiwe nelojistikhi yomhlaba yeWHO uhabhu kuInternational Humanitarian City neWHO njengamanje ibheka zonke izindlela zokuletha lamasaplayi eSudan ngokushesha ekubambisaneni noNgqongqoshe weZempilo eSudan. UDkt Michael Ryan, uMqondisi omkhulu wohlelo lweziphuthumayo zempilo weWHO, uthe Iwho Global Logistic Hub e-UAE isibe okubalulekile kokuphindeka kwempendulo yesaplayi esigamekweni ezibucayi emhlabeni. Ukweseka amazwe angaphezu kuka-140 kuzona zonke izindawo zezifunda zweWHO, ihabhu inikezela ngempilo yonke yeMember States kusipiliyoni sokuphuthumayo kwezempilo okuvelayo ekubhedukeni kwezifo, izinhlekelele njengezikhukhula nokuzamazama komhlaba, nomthelela wengxabano ezinhlelweni zempilo. Ukwesekwa okunikeziwe yi-UAE ivumele iWHO ukuthi ibe phambili ekuphenduleni kweziphuthumayo zempilo-ukuhambisa usizo longoti bezokwelapha kulabo abadingayo lapho kudingeka khona.
translations.hypothesis: UHoliwe uthise utonoti ezingu-30 ezinkulu zempahla ezisetshenziselwa ukulaliswa kwe-malaria kanye nezifo ezingabonakali ezifana ne-diabetes kanye ne-hypertension, ezifo ezingaba nomthelela omkhulu uma zingalaliswa. Lezi impahla kanye nezikhwama zombambo ezimalunga nezingama-23,000 zilungiswe kwi-hub yezokuthutha kazwelonke ye-WHO, etholakala e-International Humanitarian City, futhi i-WHO manje iyahlola yonke imikhuba yokuletha lezi mpahla e-Sudan ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka, ngokubambisana neNhlangano yezempilo yase-Sudan. UDkt. Michael Ryan, umphathi omkhulu weHlelo lezi Zimo Eziphuthumayo zezempilo ze-WHO, uthe: "I-hub yezokuthutha kazwelonke ye-WHO e-UAE ibe yinto ebalulekile ekuphenduleni ngokushesha empahlandleni ezifweni ezinkulu kulo lonke elasezweni. Ngokusekela izifunda ezingama-140 kuyo yonke imikhakha eyi-6 ye-WHO, leli hub linikeza usizo ezizwelonke ezibhekene nezimo eziphuthumayo zezempilo ezivela kwi-outbreak yezifo, izinhlekelele ezifana nezifo zombili kanye nezindlu, kanye nomthelela wempi ezinhlelweni zezempilo. Ukusekwa okuhlinzekwe yi-UAE kubenza i-WHO ibe phambi kwaso kulezi zimpendulo zezimo eziphuthumayo zezempilo – ukuletha usizo lwezokwelapha olukhethekile kulabo abadinga, noma ngabe nini futhi kuphi.

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the world’s most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.” For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, “The World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies.
translations.reference: Njenge ngxenye yokuqinisa ezokwakha umhlaba kwezokulungiselela eziphuthumayo zempilo, ukuphendula nokubekezela Iuae, iWHO nokubambisana bayasebenzisana ukuhambisa amasaplayi ukufinyelela kwababuthaka kakhulu emhlabeni esikhathini sabo abadinga usizo ngayo. Ngengxenye yakhe, uDkt Ahmed Al-Mandhari, uMqondisi wesifunda seWHO wase-Eastern Mediterranean, uthe iNhlangano yeZempilo eMhlabeni izoqhubeka nokuxhumanisa nabasemagunyeni bezempilo eSudan ukuletha amasaplayi kulabo ababuthaka kakhulu emhlabeni esikhathi sokudinga usizo kakhulu. Ngenxa yokuxabana, izibhedlela, amakhemisi nezindawo zokunakekela ezempilo yokuqala seziphelelwe okubalulekile, okuyimithi yokusindisa izimpilo. Ukufika kwamathani amakhulu angeziwe awu-30 okukhathazeka namasaplayi ezokuhlinza okuphuthumayo kanye nemithi ebalulekile ukukwazi iWHO izokweseka izindawo zempilo ezinkulu ezingu-13 nokwenza kabusha kwezempilo umsebenzi wokunakekela kulabo abadingayo. Ilojistikhi yomhhlaba wethu kuhabhu yaseDubai idlala indawo ebaluleke kakhulu ukuqinisekisa ukungaphazamiseki kwesaplayi kwezempilo futhi siyajabula ukwesekwa esikunikiwe yi-United Arab Emirates ukusiza ishatha yokuqala bebhanoyi lalamasaplayi adingeka ngokushesha.
translations.hypothesis: Njengengxenye yomzamo wokwenza kube ngcono uhlelo lwemvelo lomhlaba wonke lokulungiselela, ukuphendula, kanye nokulondolozwa kwezimo eziphuthumayo kwezempilo, i-UAE, i-WHO, kanye nabameli bayo basebenzisana ukuletha izinto ezidingekayo ukuze zifike kubantu abangempela kakhulu emhlabeni ngaleso sikhathi lapho badinga kakhulu. UDr. Ahmed Al-Mandhari, umphathi we-WHO kuleli rekhi yaseMpumalanga ye-Mediterranean, uthe, "I-World Health Organization iyaqhubeka nokusebenzisana nezikhungo zezempilo zase-Sudan ukuletha izinto ezibalulekile zezempilo ngazo zonke izindlela ezitholakalayo. Ngenxa yempi, izibhedlela, amaphathika, kanye nezikhungo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezisemqoka zishone izinto ezibalulekile zokwelapha ezilondoloza impilo. Ukufika kwe-30 utonni wamathoni ezinto zokwelapha izilonda kanye nezimo eziphuthumayo, kanye nezinto zokwelapha ezibalulekile, kuzovumela i-WHO ukuthi isize izikhungo ezinkulu ezingu-13 zezempilo futhi ibuyise izinsizakalo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo kulabo abadinga. Isikhungo sethu sezokuthutha emhlabeni jikelele eDubai sidlala indima ebalulekile ekuguquleni kokuhlinzekwa ngamazinto ezempilo ngaphandle kokuvikelwa, futhi siyabonga ngesikhuthazo esinikezwe yi-United Arab Emirates ukuthi sikwazi ukuthuthisa indiza yethu yokuqala yalezi zinto ezidingekayo kakhulu.

translations.source: It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.” The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Kungukweseka okunjalo njengoba lokhu kukhombisa ukwenza kombono wethu eSifundeni wezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu yiwona wonke umuntu. Usizo lwezokwelapha olunikezwe Inhlangano yezempilo emhlabeni nge-UAE kubalelwe kwafinyelela ku-55% isamba samasaplayi okwelapha anikezwe iSudan asuka phesheya ngo-2022, ukuveza isikhundla seUAE njengehabhu enkulu yosizo loluntu emazweni angaphandle.
translations.hypothesis: Yileyo ukusekela okufana nalokhu okubonisa ngempela umbono wethu wesifunda mayelana nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kubo bonke, ngabantu bonke.” Ukunakekelwa kwezempilo okunikezwe yi-World Health Organization ngokuphathelene ne-UAE kwakuhilela cishe ama-55% yobubanzi bonke bezimpahla zezokwelapha ezihlinzekwe e-Sudan kusukela ngaphandle ngo-2022, okubonisa ukuthi i-UAE iyindawo ebalulekile yokunikeza usizo lwezomphakathi ngamazwe ngomhlaba.

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled “What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?” reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others.
translations.reference: Ukubambisana endaweni kubalulekile ekuqhubekeni emhlabeni okuya kokuhlobene nezempilo zamaSDG Umbiko wokuqhubeka omusha ukhishwe ngokuhlanganyela namhlanje kuma ejensi asayinile angu-13 eGlobal Action Plan for Helath Lives and Well being for All (SDG3 GAP). Umbiko usihloko esthi "What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?" uma kubhekwa iminyaka emine kusetshenzwa ndawonye ngama-ejensi ezindlela eziningi ezinkulu kuvezwa ukuthi yikuphi okusebenzile nokungasebenzanga ekuqinisweni ukubambisana nokwesekwa kwenqubeko yezwe okuuya nokuhlobene nezempilo zeSustainable Development Goals (amaSDG). Lo nyaka umaka iphuzu lahhafu eliya kumaSDG kodwa umhlaba usele ngemuva ukufika kuzinhloso zomhlaba. Kusukela ngokwethulwa kwayo ngo-2019, iSDG3 GAP yenze ukubambisana okusha kwezinhlaka phakathi kokusayina kwama ejensi ezindaweni ezibalulekile njengokugcineka kwezimali nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala kwabanye abantu.
translations.hypothesis: Ukusebenzisana endaweni yangakini kubalulekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ngempumelelo emhlabeni jikelele ngenhloso yokufeza izinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezihlobene nempilo. Ingxenye entsha yombiko wokuthuthuka iqokwe namuhla yi-11 izinhlaka ezibambe iqhaza kwi-Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). Lolu mbiko, obizwa ngokuthi "Yini eyasebenza? Yini engasebenzi? Yini ezayo?" ubonisa iminyaka emine yokusebenzisana phakathi kwezinhlaka ezinkulu zamazwe ngamazwe, echaza ukuthi yini eyasebenza futhi engasebenzi ekufakeleni ukubambisana nokusekela ukuze kukhuthazwe ukuthuthuka kwamahhovisi ngempumelelo ngenhloso yokufeza izinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezisengokwemvelo (SDGs) ezihlobene nempilo. Kulo nyaka, siye phakathi endleleni yokufeza izinhloso zama-SDGs, kodwa umhlaba usengxaleni yengqikithi ekufinyeleleni kulezo zinhloso zomhlaba jikelele. Kusukela ngasekupheleni konyaka ka-2019, i-SDG3 GAP isize ekwakhiweni kwezakhiwo ezintsha zokubambisana phakathi kwezinhlaka ezibambe iqhaza ezindaweni ezibalulekile ezifana nokuxhaswa kwezezimali ngendlela esisayo kanye nokunakekelwa kwempilo eyisisekelo, phakathi kwezinye.

translations.source: At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. “I thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Okungenani amazwe angu-67 akhulumile kanye noma ngaphezulu ngeSDG3 GAP ukuqhuba izingqikithi. Senze inqubeko ebalulekile, kodwa kusanendlela ende okumele siyihambe ukwenza ngcono indlela izinhlangano eziningi ezisebenzisana ngayo ukweseka amazwe. Kumele silalele esikutshelwa ngamazwe futhi silandele imiyalelo,kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO noSihlalo weSDG3 GAP kuzinhloko zeqoqo. "Ngibonga ababambisani ngokubambisana kwazo nokuzihlola ngokwethembeka okuqukethwe kulombiko. "Umbiko unikeza iziphakamiso eziyisithupha ezibalulekile ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amazwe ayazuza ekwesekweni okukhishiwe nokubona ukuzibophezela okwenziwe kuSDG3 GAP.
translations.hypothesis: Okungenani amazwe ayi-67 ayathintana nesisu elilodwa noma ngaphezulu sezingqikithi zokuqhubekisa ze-SDG3 GAP. "Sifezile ukuphakama okubalulekile, kodwa kusekhona indlela ende esiyidingayo ukuze sithuthukise indlela ezikhungo zamazwe ngamazwe ezisebenzisana ngayo ukuze zisize amazwe. Kufanele sizwe ukuthi amazwe asitshele yini futhi senze okuthile ngalokho abasikhombisa," kusho uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi-Jeneral we-WHO kanye noSihlalo weQembu Labaholi be-SDG3 GAP. "Ngiyabonga kubalingani ngomsebenzi wabo kanye nokuqinisekiswa kwabo ngabo bonke abantu, njengoba kuboniswe kuleli phaphostshi. "Leli phaphostshi linikeza iziphakamiso ezinhloko eziyisithupha ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amazwe azuzwe ngokusiza okwengeziwe futhi ukufeza izibopho ezwenziwe kwi-SDG3 GAP.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach;
translations.reference: Lokhu kufaka: Ukuqhubeka kokwenza ngcono kweSDG3 GAP kwezempilo ngokufuna imibono yeMember State ukuthi sibambisana kanjani ezingeni lezwe nokuphendula okuhlobene neziphakamiso; Ukugcina iGAP njengenkundla yokubambisana; ukulondoloza ukubambisana okuqinile ezingeni lezwe ekunakekelweni kwezempilo kokuqala nokubheka izindlela ezintsha njengesimo sezulu sokubekezela kuzinhlelo zempilo; Ngokuhlanganyela sebenzisa izindlela ezintsha ezingeni lezwe njengokuhambisa indlela yomthelela;
translations.hypothesis: Lokhu kufaka: qhubeka nokuthuthukiswa kwe-SDG3 GAP kwezempilo ngokufuna imibono kwezizwe ezilunga mayelana nokuthi singaxhumana kanjani ezingeni lezwe kanye nokuphonsela ukuthi kuzwelani neziphakamiso ezihlobene; gwema i-GAP njengendawo yokuxhumana; khuthaza ukuxhumana okukhulu ezingeni lezwe mayelana nokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezibalulekile futhi hlola izihloko ezintsha ezifana nezinhlelo zezempilo ezimele ukuguquka kwekilima; sebenzisana ekusetshenzisweni kwezindlela ezintsha ezingeni lezwe, njengezindlela zokwenza umthelela;

translations.source: engage more with civil society; and work with Member States to strengthen incentives for collaboration through political leadership, governance direction and funding to support collaboration. Key findings of the report will feed into discussions of the next United Nations General Assembly SDG Summit and the High-level Meeting on Universal Health Coverage in September 2023. The months leading up to these key events provide an opportunity for a joint push by Member States and multilateral agencies to identify ways on how to implement the recommendations and to prepare the ground to fully leverage stronger collaboration and accelerate progress towards the health-related SDGs in the second half of the SDG timeframe. Note to the editor:
translations.reference: ukukhuluma kakhulu nomphakathi; kanye nokusebenza neMember States ukuqinisa imiklomelo yokubambisana ngobuholi bezepolitiki,indlela yokubusa noxhasomali lokweseka ukubambisana. Imiphumela ebalulekile yombiko sizoyifaka ezingxoxweni kuUnited Nations General Assembly SDG Summit elandelayo nomhlangano wezinga eliphezulu kuUniversal Helath Coverage ngoMandulo 2023. Izinyanga eziholela kulezigameko ezibalulekile zinikeza ithuba ukuphusha ndawonye yiMember States kamaejensi ezindlela eziningi ukuhlonza izindlela ukuthi kuzokwenziwa kanjani iziphakamiso ukulungiselella indawo yesibambiso esiphelele ukuqina kokubambisana nokuqhuba inqubeko eya kokuhlobene nezempilo SDG kuhhafu wesibili weSDG wesikhathi esibekiwe. Inothi eliya kumhleli:
translations.hypothesis: xhumana kabanzi nomphakathi kazwelonke; futhi basebenzisane nezizwe ezilungile ukuqinisa izinsizakalo zokubambisana ngokuphatha kwezombusazwe, ukuqondiswa kwezinhlaka zokulawula, kanye nokuxhaswa ngemali ukuze kusize ukubambisana. Imiphumela ebalulekile yalo mbiko izosetshenziswa ezinkundlwazini zengxoxo yeSayithi Lomhlangano Jikelele weZizwe eziyinhloko we-SDG elandelayo kanye nomhlangano ophezulu mayelana nokufakelwa kwempilo yonke ngoSepthemba ka-2023. Izinyanga ezidlule kulezi zifundo ezibalulekile zihlinzeka ngithuba lokuzimisela okubambisene kwezizwe ezilungile kanye nezinhlangano zamazwe amaningi ukuthola izindlela zokusebenzisa izincomo kanye nokulungiselela ukuthi kungasetshenziswa kanjani ukubambisana okukhulu kanye nokusheshisa ukuqhubeka ngezinhloso ze-SDG ezihlobene nempilo ngokuphindaphindiwe lolu suku lwe-SDG. Isaziso kulabhulogi:

translations.source: The SDG3 GAP describes how the 13 signatory agencies will adopt new ways of working, building on existing successful collaborations, and jointly align their support around national plans and strategies that are country-owned and -led. The signatories to the SDG3 GAP are Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance; Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO);
translations.reference: I-SDG3 GAPichaza ukuthi ukusayina kwama ejensi angu-13 kuzithatha kanjani izindlela ezintsha zokusebenza, ukwakha phezu kokubambisana okukhona okuphumelele, ukubambisana okuhambisana nokweseka kwabo ezinhlelweni zezwe namasu okungawezwe futhi aholwa yilo. Ukusayidwa kuSDG3 GAP kuyiGavi ubudlelwane bomgomo; Indawo yezezimali zomhlaba yabesifazane izingane nenstha (GFF); uxhasomali lomhlaba lokulwa kengculaza,isifo sofuba nomalaleveva(Global Fund); I-International Labour Organisation (ILO);
translations.hypothesis: I-SDG3 GAP ichaza ukuthi amabhizinisi ayi-13 abangeniswe esigcawini zizosebenzisa izindlela ezintsha zokusebenza, zisekelwe ezibambiswaneni ezikhona eziphumelele, futhi zohambisane ngokuhlanganyelwe nokusekela kwazo ngamaplanethi kanye nezinhlelo zikazwelonke eziholwa futhi zinelwazi lendawo. Amabhizinisi abangeniswe kwi-SDG3 GAP afaka i-Gavi, i-Vaccine Alliance; i-Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); i-Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (Global Fund); kanye ne-International Labour Organization (ILO).

translations.source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); United Nations Development Programme (UNDP); United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA); United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF); Unitaid; United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN Women);
translations.reference: Uhlelo lokuhlanganyela lweUnited Nations lwe HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); I-United Nation Development Fund (UNDP); I-United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA); I-UnitedNations Children Fund(UNICEF); Unitaid; I-United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN Women);
translations.hypothesis: Uhlelo Oluhlanganyelwe lweZizwe Ezihlangene mayelana ne-HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); Uhlelo Lokuthuthukiswa lweZizwe Ezihlangene (UNDP); Ifundi Yezempilo Yezizwe Ezihlangene (UNFPA); Ifundi Yezingane yeZizwe Ezihlangene (UNICEF); I-Unitaid; Umnyango weZizwe Ezihlangene Wobulungiswa Bezokufaneleka Kwabantu kanye Nokukhuthazwa Kwabesifazane (UN Women);

translations.source: World Bank Group; World Food Programme (WFP); and World Health Organization (WHO). See full report, What Worked? What’s next?
translations.reference: Iqoqo lebhange lomhlaba; Uhlelo lwezokudla emhlabeni (WFP); kanye NeNhlangano Yezempilo Emhlabeni (WHO). Bona umbiko ogcwele, Yikuphi okusebenzile? Yikuphi okulandelayo?
translations.hypothesis: Ibhizinisi leBhange Lomhlaba (World Bank Group); Uhlelo Lwaphakathi Lomhlaba Lwokudla (World Food Programme - WFP); kanye noHlelo Lwamazwekazi Lompilo (World Health Organization - WHO). Bheka umbiko ogcwele, "Yini eyasebenza? Yini ezayo?"

translations.source: New survey results show health systems starting to recover from pandemic After three years of the COVID-19 pandemic, health systems in countries have started showing the first major signs of health system recovery, according to the WHO interim report on the “Fourth round of the global pulse survey on continuity of essential health services during the COVID-19 pandemic: November 2022–January 2023”. By early 2023, countries reported experiencing reduced disruptions in the delivery of routine health services, but highlighted the need to invest in recovery and stronger resilience for the future. Among the 139 countries that responded to the fourth round of WHO’s pulse survey, countries reported continued disruptions in almost one-quarter of services on average. In 84 countries where trend analysis is possible, the percentage of disrupted services declined on average from 56% in July-September 2020 to 23% in November 2022- January 2023.
translations.reference: Imiphumela yocwaningo olusha ikhombisa izinhlelo zempilo ziqala ukuba ngcono esikhathini sobhubhane Ngemva kweminyaka emithathu yobhubhane lweCOVID-19 izinhlelo zempilo emazweni seziqale ukukhombisa izinkomba ezinkulu zokuvuseleleka kwezinhlelo zempilo, ngokweWHO umbiko wesikhashana emzuliswaneni wesine wocwaningo lephalisi yomhlaba ekuqhubekeni kwemisebenzi yezempilo ebalulekile ngesikhathi sobhubhane lweCOVID-19: Lwezi 2022-Masingana 2023. Ngokuqala kuka-2023 amazwe abike ukwenzeka kokwehla kokuphazamiseka ekulethweni kwendlela yemisebenzi yezempilo,kodwa kwavezwa isidingo sokutshala kokungalungiswa nokubekezela kakhulu kwikusasa. Kulamazwe angu-139 aphendule kumzuliswane wesine wokuzwakala kocwaningo lweWHO, amazwe abike ukuqhubeka kokuphazamiseka emisebenzini yekota esilinganisweni. Emazweni angu-84 lapho ukuhlaziya okudumile kungenzeka,iphesenti lemisebenzi ephazamisekile yehlile ngesilinganiso esisuka ku-56% ngoNtulikazi kuya kuMandulo 2020 ngo-23 % ngoLwezi 2022-Masingana 2023.
translations.hypothesis: Imiphumela entsha yohlwaphulelo ibonisa ukuthi izinhlelo zezempilo ziqala ukuphulukiswa ngemuva kwecala. Ngemva kweminyaka emithathu yecalabashini lika-COVID-19, izinhlelo zezempilo ezweni liyena ziqale ukubonisa izimpawu ezinkulu zokuphulukiswa. Lokhu kungokwengxenye yombiko wokuqala we-WHO mayelana "nohlwaphulelo lwesigaba lesine lomhlaba wonke mayelana nokuhlala kusebenzi kwezinsizakalo ezibalulekile zezempilo ngesikhathi secala lika-COVID-19: Novemba 2022–Januwari 2023". Ekuqaleni kuka-2023, amazwe awoxwayise ukuthi bathole ukuthi kuncitshisiwe ukuhlazwa kwezinsizakalo zezempilo ezijwayelekile, kodwa kwagqanyiswe ukuthi kudingeka ukutshala imali ekululazini kanye nokwenza izinhlelo eziqinile ukuze kuthuthukiswe esikhathini esizayo. Phakathi kwezizwe ezingu-139 ezephendule ngohlwaphulelo lwesigaba lesine lwe-WHO, izizwe zibike ukuthi ukuhlazwa kuye kwandeka cishe kwamakota ambalwa yezinsizakalo. Kwezizwe ezingu-84 lapho ukuhlaziywa kwentengo kungenzeka, iphesenti yezinsizakalo ezihlazwe lincitshisiwe cishe kusukela ku-56% ngoJulayi-Septhemba ka-2020 kuya ku-23% ngoNovemba 2022-Januwari 2023.

translations.source: Persisting disruptions are due to both demand- and supply-side factors, including low levels of health care-seeking in communities as well as limited availability of health workers and other health-care resources such as open clinics or available stocks of medicines and products. “It is welcome news that health systems in the majority of countries are starting to restore essential health services for millions of people who missed them during the pandemic,” said Dr Rudi Eggers, WHO Director for Integrated Health Services. “But we need to ensure that all countries continue to close this gap to recover health services, and apply lessons learnt to build more prepared and resilient health systems for the future”. First notable signs of recovery In this new survey, fewer countries reported intentionally scaling back access across all service delivery platforms and essential public health functions since 2020-2021 reporting, showing an important step to return to pre-pandemic levels of service delivery and broader system functioning.
translations.reference: Ukuqhubeka kokuphazamiseka kungenxa yakho kokubili ukufuneka nokusaplaya izinkinga eziseceleni, okufaka amazinga aphansi okunakekelwa kwezempilo emphakathini okudingayo kanye nomkhawulo wokubakhona kwabasebenzi bezempilo nezinsizakusebenza ezinye zokunakekelwa kwezempilo njengokuvulwa kwemitholampilo noma ukubakhona kwesitoko semithi nemikhiqizo. "Izindaba ezamukelwayo ukuthi izinhlelozempilo emzaweni amaningi ziqala ukuvuselela imisebenzi yezempilo ebalulekile ezigidini zabantu abawugejile ngesikhathi sobhubhane," kusho uDkt Rudi Eggers, Umqondisi weWHO weMisebenzi yeZempilo yoKuhlanganisiwe. "Kodwa sidinga ukuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke amazwe ayaqhubeka nokuvala izikhala ukuvuselela imisebenzi yezempilo,nokusebenzisa izifundo abazifundile ukwakha izinhlelo zempilo ezizilungiselele nokubekezela kwekusasa". Izimpawu zokuqala eziqaphelekayo ekuvuseleleni Kulolu cwaningo olusha,amazwe ambalwa abike ngokungenhloso isikalo sasemuva sokuthola kuzinkundla zonke umsebenzi wokuletha nokusebenza kwezempilo yomphakathi okubalulekile kusukela 2020-2021 ukubikwa kukhombisa ukubaluleka kwegxathu kubuyelwe emazingeni angaphambi kobhubhane ukulethwa kokusebenza nokusebenza okukhulu kwezinhlelo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlazwa okuqhubekayo kudalwe yizinto ezimbili: ezihlobene nesidingo kanye nalezo ezihlobene nokutholakala. Lokhu kuhlanganisa amazinga aphansi okufuna usizo lwezempilo ezindaweni zendawo, kanye nokutholakala okulinganiselwe kwezisebenzi zezempilo kanye nezinye izinsiza zezempilo, njengamakhliniki avulekile noma izimpahla zezokwelapha nezinto ezitholakalayo. "Kuyenzuzo ukuthi izinhlelo zezempilo eziningi zezifunda eziningi ziqalile ukuvuselela izinsiza ezibalulekile zezempilo ezinkulungwane zabantu abazange zitholwe ngesikhathi sendlela yegciwane," kusho uDkt. Rudi Eggers, umphathi we-WHO wezinsizakalo ezihlanganisiwe zezempilo. "Kodwa kudingeka siqinisekise ukuthi wonke amazwe ayaqhubeka nokunciphisa leli gaphulelo ukuvuselela izinsiza zezempilo, futhi sisebenzise okufundwe ukuze sakhe izinhlelo zezempilo ezilungile futhi ezikwazi ukulwa nezinkinga zesikhathi esizayo." Okokuqala, izimpawu ezibalulekile zokuvuselela. Kulo hlaziyo elisha, imizamo emincane yamazwe ibikwe ngokuthi yenza ukunciphisa ukufinyelela kuzo zonke izindlela zokunikeza izinsizakalo kanye nemisebenzi ebalulekile yezempilo zomphakathi kusukela ngo-2020-2021, okubonisa isinyathelo esibalulekile sokubuyela ezingeni zokunikeza izinsizakalo kanye nokusebenza kahle kwesistimu ngaphambi kwegciwane.

translations.source: By the end of 2022, most countries reported partial signs of service recovery, including in services for sexual, reproductive, maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health; nutrition; immunization; communicable diseases (including malaria, HIV, TB, and other sexually-transmitted infections); neglected tropical diseases; noncommunicable diseases; management of mental, neurological and substance use disorders; care for older people; and traditional and/or complementary care. The number of countries reporting disruption to their national supply chain system reduced from nearly half (29 of 59 responding countries) to about a quarter (18 of 66 responding countries) within the last year. Despite signs of recovery, service disruptions persist across countries in all regions and income levels, and across most service delivery settings and tracer service areas. Countries are also dealing with increasing service backlogs – most frequently in services for screening, diagnosis and treatment of noncommunicable diseases – which can lead to negative consequences as people are delayed access to timely care. Recovering essential health service delivery is critical because disruptions – including to services for health promotion, disease prevention, diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation and palliation – may have even greater adverse health effects at population and individual level than the pandemic itself, especially among vulnerable populations.
translations.reference: Ekupheleni kuka-2022, amazwe amaningi abike izimpawu ezingacacile zokuvuselelwa kokusebenza okufaka ukusebenza kwezocansi, ukuzala, abakhullwe, abazelwe, izingane nezempilo yentsha, ukudla okunempilo ukugomma,izifo ezithelelanayo (okufaka umalaleveva, iHIV, iTB nezinye izifo ezithelelana ngokocansi) izifo ezidumile ezinganakiwe,izifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo,ukuphathwa kwengqondo, okwengqondo nesifo sokusebenzisa izidakamiza, ukunakekelwa kwabantu abadala nokunakekelwa okulekelelayo nokwesiko. Inombolo yamazwe abika ukuphazamiseka ohlelweni lwawo lesaplayi sheni ezweni okungafika kuhhafu (29 ka-59 wamazwe aphendulayo) okunganekota (18 wa-66 wamazwe) aphedulayo kulonyaka odlule. Ngaphandle kwezinkomba zokuvuselela,ukuphazamiseka komsebenzi kuyaqhubeka emazweni onke namazinga emali engenayo kuzona zonke izinhlelo soomsebenzi wokulatha nokulandelela umsebenzi ezindaweni. Amazwe aphinde abhekane nokunyuka komsebenzi okumele wenziwe - ikakhulukazi emisebenzini yokubheka, ukuxilonga nokwelapha izifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo - okungaholela kumiphumela engemihle uma abantu bebambezeleka ukuthola ukunakekelwa ngesikhathi. Ukuvuselelwa kwemisebenzi yezempilo ebalulekile kubucayi ngenxa yokuphazamiseka - okufaka imisebenzi yokugqugquzela ezempilo, ukuvinjwa kwezifo, ukwelapha, ukuvuselelwa kwesimilo nephaliyeshini - kungaba nokukhulu umthelela ohlukene wezempil nezinga lomuntu ukunobhubhane qobo ikakhulukazi kubantu babuthaka.
translations.hypothesis: Ngokuphela kuka-2022, izizwe eziningi zibike izimpawu ezithile zokubuyela esimweni esijwayelekile kwezinsizakalo, okubalwa kuzo izinsizakalo eziholile ezempilo yobudlova, yokuphila, yomama, yezingane ezisanda kuzalwa, yezingane kanye nabantu abasha; ukudla okunempilo; ukugaywa ngamathuba; izifo ezisabalalayo (okubalwa kuzo i-malaria, i-HIV, i-TB, kanye nezinye izifo ezisabalalayo ngokobudlova); izifo zendalo ezikhishwa; izifo ezingasabalalisi; ukuphathwa kwezinkinga zengqondo, zezakhiwo kanye nokusetshenziswa kwezinto; ukunakekelwa kwabantu abadala; kanye nokunakekelwa kwendabuko kanye/noma okunye ukunakekelwa. Inani lezizwe ezibike ukuthi uhlelo lwazo lokuphakelwa izinto ezibalulekile luyikhubazwe luyiwe kusuka cishe ku-half (izizwe ezingu-29 kwezingu-59 ezephendule) liye cishe ku-quarter (izizwe ezingu-18 kwezingu-66 ezephendule) ngonyaka odlule. Nakuba kunemithetho yokubuyela esimweni esijwayelekile, ukukhubazeka kwezinsizakalo kuqhubeka ezizweni eziningi kuzo zonke izifunda kanye nezinkinga zezomnotho, kanye ezindleleni eziningi zokuhlinzeka ngalezinsizakalo kanye ezindaweni ezibalulekile zokuhlinzekwa ngalezinsizakalo. Izizwe nazo zibhekene nokwanda kwezinkinga ezikhona kwezinsizakalo – kakhulu ezinsizakalweni zokuhlola, ukuxilongwa nokwelashwa kwezifo ezingasabalalisi – okungaholela ezimweni ezingalungile njengoba abantu banga ukuthola ukunakekelwa ngokushesha. Ukubuyisela ukuhlinzekwa kwezinsizakalo ezibalulekile ezempilo kubalulekile ngoba ukukhubazeka – okubalwa kuzo izinsizakalo zokukhuthaza impilo, ukuvimbela izifo, ukuxilongwa, ukwelashwa, ukulungiswa kanye nokuncishiswa kwamandla – kungaba nemiphumela emibi kakhulu empilweni kubantu ngabanye kanye kuyo yonke imiphakathi, ikakhulukazi phakathi kwabantu abangomelele.

translations.source: Integrating COVID-19 services into essential health services In another important step towards system recovery and transition, most countries have made progress in integrating COVID-19 services into routine health service delivery. About 80-90% of countries have fully integrated COVID-19 vaccination, diagnostic and case management services as well as services for post COVID-19 condition into routine service delivery. Still, most countries (80% of 83 responding countries) reported at least one bottleneck to scaling up access to essential COVID-19 tools (e.g. COVID-19 diagnostics, therapeutics, vaccines and personal protective equipment - PPE), with health workforce issues and lack of funding representing the most common barriers. Further support needed for recovery, resilience and preparedness Most countries have started to apply what they have learnt during the COVID-19 pandemic, including through the institutionalization of a number of innovative service disruption mitigation strategies into routine health service delivery.
translations.reference: Ukuhlanganisa imisebenzi yeCOVID-19 emisebenzini yezempilo ebalulekile elinye igxathu elibalulekile eliya ekuvuselelweni kohlelo noguquko,amazwe amaningi asebe nenqubekela phambili ekuhlanganiseni imisebenzi yeCOVID-19 endleleni yokuletha imisebenzi yezempilo. Cishe u-80%-90% wamazwe ahlanganyele ngokuphelele ekugonyweni kweCOVID-19 ukuxilonga nemisebenzi yokuphathwa kwecala kanye nemisebenzi yesimo sangemuva kweCOVID-19 endleleni yomsebenzi wokuletha. Kuyafana amazwe amaningi (u-80% wamazwe awu-83 aphendulile) abike okungenani okuncane ekukhuphukeni kokuthola amathuluzi abalulekile eCovid-19 (isibonelo ukuxilongwa kweCOVID-19, ukwelaphangxube, imigomo namathuluzi okuzivikela siqu - PPE), ngezinkinga zokusebenza kwezempilo nokwentuleka koxhasomali okumele izivimbo ezijwayeleke kakhulu. Ukuqhubeka kokusekwa kuyadingeka ukuvuselela,ukubekezela nokuzilungiselela Amazwe amaningi aseqalile asebenzisa asebekufundile ngesikhathi sobhubhane lweCOVID-19 okufaka ngezikhungo zenamba yokusbenza kokusha ukuphazamisa amasu endleleni yokulethwa kwezempilo.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuhlanganisa izinsizakalo ze-COVID-19 nezinsizakalo ezibalulekile zezempilo. Kwesinye isinyathelo esibalulekile ukuze uhlelelwe futhi utshintshe uhlelo, amazwe amaningi ende esithole impumelelo ekuhlanganiseni izinsizakalo ze-COVID-19 nezinsizakalo ezijwayelekile zezempilo. Cishe amaphesenti angu-80-90 amazwe asevele ahlanganise ngokuphelele ukugaywa kwe-COVID-19, ukuhlaziywa kanye nokulungiswa kwezifo, kanye nezinsizakalo zokwelashwa kwezimo ngemuva kwe-COVID-19, ezinsizakalweni ezijwayelekile. Kodwa-ke, iningi lama-zwe (amaphesenti angu-80 amazwe angama-83 aphikile) bishiwo ukuthi banenkinga engu-1 okungenani ekwandiseni ukufinyelela ezitholi ezibalulekile ze-COVID-19 (ngokwesibonelo, ukuhlaziywa kwe-COVID-19, ukwelashwa, izivakasi kanye nezinsiza zokuvikela umuntu - PPE), kanti izinkinga zabasebenzi bezempilo kanye nokuntuleka kwezimali ziwona okuvamile kakhulu. Kudingeka ukwesekwa okwengeziwe ukuze kulandeleke ukululama, ukuhlala kakhulu kanye nokulungiselela. Iningi lama-zwe sevele liqale ukusebenzisa lokho okufundile ngesikhathi somkhuhlane we-COVID-19, okuhlanganisa nokwenza kube yinto ejwayelekile izindlela eziningi ezintsha zokuqeda ukuhlazwa kwezinsizakalo ezijwayelekile zezempilo.

translations.source: These include deployment of telemedicine approaches, promotion of home-based care or self-care interventions, approaches for strengthening health workers availability, capacities and support mechanisms, innovations in procuring and delivering medicines and supplies, more routine community communications, and partnerships with private sector providers. Three quarters of countries reported additional funding allocation towards longer term system recovery, resilience and preparedness. Countries expressed need for WHO support to address remaining challenges in the COVID-19 context and beyond, most frequently related to health workforce strengthening, building the monitoring capacities of health services, designing primary health care -- oriented models of care, governance, policy and planning and financial planning and funding. Note to editors: In the fourth round of WHO’s global pulse survey, 222 countries, territories and areas were invited to respond to a standardized web-based survey between November 2022 and January 2023. The fourth survey followed up on WHO’s previous 2020 and 2021 pulse surveys: Round 1 (May-September 2020), Round 2 (January-March 2021), and Round 3 (November-December 2021) which showed the extent to which the pandemic was affecting the continuity of essential health services and how countries are taking action.
translations.reference: Lokhu kufaka ukubekwa kwezindlela zokwelapha ngefoni,ukugqugquzela ukunakekelwa usekhaya nokungenelela kokuzinakekela, izindlela zokuqinisa ukubakhona kwabasebenzi bezempilo, amandla nezindlela zokweseka, ukwenza kabusha ekuthengeni nokuletha imithi namasaplayi ezinye izindlela zokuxhumana nomphakathi ukubambisana nabanikezeli bomkhakha ozimele nowomphakathi. Amakota amathathu ezwe abaike ukufakwa koxhasomali olwengeziwe oluya ekuvuselelweni kohlelo lwesikhathi eside, ukubekezela nokuzilungiselela. Amazwe agcizelele isidingo sokwesekwa kweWHO ekubhekaneni nezinkinga ezisele ngokwengqikithi yeCOVID-19 nangale,ikakhulukazi okujwayele ukuhlobana nokuqinisa ukusebenza kwezempilo, ukwakha amandla okubheka imisebenzi yezempilo, ukwakha ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala okuncike kuzindlela zokunakekela, ukubusa, inqubomgomo nokuhlela nokuhlela ezezimali noxhasomali. Inothi kubahleli: Emzuliswaneni wesine wocwaningo lwephasile yomhlaba weWHO, amazwe angu-222, izindawo bamenywa ukuba baphendule kucwaningo oluncike kuwebhu eqinisikesiwe phakathi kukaLwezi 2022 noMasingana 2023. Ucwaningo lwesine lulandele kucwaningo lwephasile edlule yango-2020 no2021 lweWHO: uMzuliswano 1 (Nhlaba-Mandulo 2020) uMzuliswano 2 (Masingana-Ndasa 2021) noMzuliswano 3 (Lwezi-Zibandlela 2021) okwakhombisa ukukhulu bokuthi ubhubhane lalukhahlameza ukuqhubeka kwemisebenzi yezempilo ebalulekile nokuthi amazwe enza kanjani.
translations.hypothesis: Lezi zindlela zifaka ukusetshenziswa kwezindlela zokwelashwa kude, ukukhuthazwa kokunakekelwa kwezempilo emakhaya noma ukuzinakekela, izindlela zokuqinisa ukuthi abasebenzi bezempilo bayatholakala, ukwandisa amakhono abo kanye nokusekwa okutholwayo, izinto ezintsha ekuthenganeni nasekuhlinzekeni ngemithi nezinto ezidingekayo, ukuxhumana njalo nomphakathi, kanye nokubambisana nabahlinzeki ezinkampanini ezinkulu. Amaphahla amathathu ezweni laseNingizimu Afrika bawodwa bathole ukuxhaswe ngemali eyengeziwe ukuze bakwazi ukululama, ukuhlala njalo kanye nokulungiselela esikhathini eside. Izizwe zikhombise ukuthi zidinga ukwesekwa kwe-WHO ukuze zibhekane nezinkinga ezisele kuleli khono le-COVID-19 kanye nangaphandle, kakhulu ezihlobene nokuqinisa abasebenzi bezempilo, ukwakha amakhono okubheka izinsiza zempilo, ukuhlela izindlela zokunakekelwa ezikhethekile ezisebenzisweni ezisemthethweni, ukuphathwa, inqubomgomo nokuhlela kanye nokuhlela kwezezimali kanye nokuxhaswa ngemali. translations.source: While pulse surveys have limitations such as reporting bias and representativeness, the strength of this effort is that it is comprehensive and delivers information rapidly. The term “country” should be understood to include all countries, territories and areas. Trend analyses was completed based on responses from 84 countries, territories, or areas that responded to at least one survey section in all four pulse survey rounds.
translations.reference: Ngesikhathi ucwaningo lwephasile lunemikhawulo njengokubika ukuchema nokumela,amandla alomzamo ukuthi mukhulu futhi uletha ulwazi ngokuphindekile. Itemu "izwe" kumele liqondwe ukuthi lifaka wonke amazwe, imingcele nezindawo. Abahlaziya okudumile kwaqedwa kuncike ezimpendulweni eziphuma emazweni angu-84, abahlukumezi noma izindawo ezaphendula okungenani kusahluko socwaningo olulodwa kuyona yonke imizuliswano emine yocwaningo.
translations.hypothesis: Nakuba ukuhlaziywa okusheshayo kunemikhawulo efana nokubekwa phambili kokubika kanye nokubekwa kwabafundi, amandla alolu hlelo ukuthi luhlanganisiwe futhi linikeza ulwazi ngokushesha. Igama elithi "ilizwe" kufanele kuhlanganiswe wonke amazwe, izifunda kanye nezindawo. Ukuhlaziywa kwezindlela sekuqedwe ngokususelwa kuzimpendulo ezivela ezweni elingu-84, ezifundeni noma ezindaweni ezephendule kungenani eyodwa yezingxenye zohlaziyo kuyo yonke imikhakha emine yohlaziyo olusheshayo.

translations.source: Statement of celebration for HRP’s 50th anniversary: Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland To capture the spirit of Policy and Coordination Committee (PCC) members celebrating HRP’s 50th anniversary and its numerous achievements, Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland read the following note of appreciation and congratulations at the 36th meeting of the HRP PCC. Our generation has seen more progress in science and technology than all preceding generations together and witnessed several intellectual, technological, medical and social transformation spearheaded by the contraceptive revolution and followed by advances in reproductive health, health innovations as well as rights and gender equality. However, considerable challenges in the field of SRHR continue, and, arguably, some advances are in question again today. We applaud HRP-staff, partners and supporters on the numerous achievements to date and recognise the enormous strides accomplished during half a century in producing the evidence that supports full and equal access to sexual and reproductive health and rights.
translations.reference: Isitatimende sokubungaza ukuphela kweminyaka engu-50 yeHRP: iSweden ne-United Kingdom of Great Britain neNorthen Ireland Ukubamba isimo seNqubomgomo neKomidi lokuXhumana (PCC) Amalungu abungaza ukuphela kuka-50 HRP nokuzuza okuningi, iSweden neUnited Kingdom of Great Britain neNorthern Ireland ukufunda ukuqapheleka okulandelayo kokwamukela nokuhalalisa emhlanganweni wesi-36 weHRP PCC. Isizukulwane sethu sesibone inqubekela phambili enkulu kusayensi nezobuchwepheshe ukuthi konke okuqhubekayo kwesizukulwane ndawonye, nokubona okwemfundo okumbalwa,ezobuchwepheshe, ezokwelapha noguquko lwenhlalakahle luqhutshwa ukuguquka kokuvikela kulandelwa ukwenzangcono kwezempilo yokuzala, ukwenza kabusha kwezempilo kanye namalungelo nokulingana ngokobulili. Kepha ukucabanga izingqinamba emkhakheni weSRHR uqhubeke futhi kuphikiswane,okunye ukuqhubeka kusembuzweni futhi namhlanje. Sincoma abasebenzi beHRP ababambisani nabeseki kwabakutholile okuningi kuze kube yinamhlanje nokubona izinto ezinkulu ezenzekile ngesikhathi esinguhhafu wekhulunyaka ekukhiqizeni ubufakazi obeseka ukungena okuphelele nokulinganayo kwezempilo namalungelo ezocansi nokuzala.
translations.hypothesis: Isitatimende sokubungaza mayelana nomnyaka we-50 we-HRP: I-Sweden kanye ne-United Kingdom ye-Great Britain kanye ne-Northern Ireland. Ukugxilisa umoya wabo abalulekile beKomidi Lezinqubomgomo Nokuhlela (PCC) abubungaza umnyaka we-50 we-HRP kanye nezimpumelelo zayo eziningi, i-Sweden kanye ne-United Kingdom ye-Great Britain kanye ne-Northern Ireland bazifundisa leli phawu lokubonga kanye nokubungaza kuleli hlangothi le-36 ye-HRP PCC. Isizukulwane sethu sibonile ukuthuthuka okukhulu kakhulu kwezesayensi kanye nobuchwepheshe kunazo zonke izizukulwane ezedlule, futhi sabona ukuguquka okuningi kwezobuqapi, ubuchwepheshe, ezokwelapha kanye nomphakathi, okuyisikhathi esiqale ngomshuwalense wokuvimbela ukukhulelwa futhi kulandele ukuthuthuka kwezempilo zokuzala, izinto ezintsha kwezempilo, kanye nezimpahla kanye nokulingana ngamafu. Kodwa-ke, izinkinga ezinkulu kuleli khakha lezempilo zokuzala nezokuziphatha ziyaqhubeka, futhi, mhlawumbe, ezinye izithuthukisi zibuyiselwa emibuzweni namuhla. Sibonga abasebenzi be-HRP, ozakwabo kanye nabaxhasi ngempumelelo eziningi kuze kube manje, futhi siqaphela ukuthi kuye kwenziwa amanyathelo amakhulu kule minyaka engu-50 ekukhiqizeni ubufakazi obusekela ukufinyelela okugcwele kanye nokulingana kwezempilo nezokuziphatha ezihlobene nokuzala.

translations.source: We would like to outline three major categories of achievements: Firstly, the high-quality research by HRP has had tangible impact on public health policy, standards, and practice worldwide addressing the evolving needs of diverse populations. Secondly, HRP, notably through the HRP Alliance, has strengthened research institutions locally and globally, and, enabled numerous researchers to acquire the research skills that ensure that high-quality SRHR research can continue, and indeed increase, into the future. Thirdly, in a world beset by crisis, conflict and increasing resistance to gender equality, HRP has facilitated the upholding of the basic rights of women and girls and vulnerable populations. HRP remains the main instrument within the United Nations system for research in human reproduction and continues to be an exceptional leader in global sexual and reproductive health.
translations.reference: Singathanda ukuveza imikhakha emikhulu emithathu yokuzuziwe Okokuqala ucwaningo olusezingeni eliphezulu lweHRP lube nomthelela obonakalayo kunqubomgomo yezempilo yomphakathi,amazinga, nokwenza emhlabeni wonke okubhekene nezidingo zokuguquka kusibalo sabantu esahlukene. Okwesibili HRP iqapheleke ngeHRP Alliance, isiqinise izikhungo zocwaningpo endaweni nasemhlabeni,kwavumela abacwaningi abaningi ukuthi bathole amakhono okucwabinga ukuqinisekisa ubunhalo obuphezulu bocwaningo lweSRHR ukuthi liqhubeke futhi lunyuke esikhathini esizayo. Okwesithathu,umhlaba uhlelwa yizinkinga, ukuxabana nokunyusa ukuqaba ekulinganeni kobulili, iHRP isize ukubamba isisekelo samalungelo abasefazane nezingane nabantu ababuthaka. I-HRP ihlala iyithuluzi elibalulekile kuhlelo lweUnited Nations yocwaningo lokhukhiqiza kubantu nokuqhubeka nokuba umholi ovelele kwezempilo yezocansi nokuzala emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: Sifisa ukuchaza izigaba ezintathu ezinkulu zempumelelo: Okokuqala, ucwaningo lwekhwalithi ephezulu olwenziwe yi-HRP lunephincu eliqinile ezinhlelweni zezempilo zomphakathi, ezimithethweni, kanye nendlela yokwenza izinto emhlabeni wonke, elunikeza izixazululo ezifanele izidingo eziguqukayo zabanengi abahlukene. Okwesibili, i-HRP, ikakhulukazi nge-HRP Alliance, iguqule amabhizinisi ocwaningo endaweni yangakini nasemhlabeni jikelele, futhi, yenze ukuthi ochwepheshe abaningi bathole amakhono ocwaningo okwenza ukuthi ucwaningo olusezingeni eliphezulu kwezempilo yobudlova kanye nokuzalwa uqhubeke, futhi ngempela ukhule, esikhathini esizayo. Okwesithathu, emhlabeni obhekene nezinkinga, izinqubo, kanye nokungathandeki okukhulayo kokuphakanyiswe kwenguquko yengadi, i-HRP isize ekugcineni amalungelo ayisisekelo abesifazane kanye nezintombi kanye nabantu abangamakhambi. I-HRP isasikhathi isinsiza esikhulu ngaphakathi kohlelo lweZizwe eziyinhloko mayelana nocwaningo lwezokuzala komuntu, futhi iyaqhubeka nokuba umholi ongajwayelekile kwezempilo zombulawa kanye nokuzalwa emhlabeni jikelele.

translations.source: HRP and its partners have brought us closer to the promise of the 1994 International Conference on Population and Development and its call to put the rights of individuals, especially women and girls, at the heart of sustainable development. We want to express our appreciation and gratitude to the HRP secretariat, its partners, co-sponsors and the global network of collaborating centres and experts helping to ensure its efforts contribute to making a difference to the women, men, children, adolescents and various communities HRP is committed to serve. On behalf of PCC members, allow us to reaffirm our partnership with you to support the achievements of HRP, upon which the success of the 2030 Agenda depends.
translations.reference: HRP nababambisani bayo sebesisondeze kusithembiso sango-1994 KuNkomfa Yamazwe angaphandle Esibalweni Sabantu neNtuthuko, futhi isimemezelo sibeka amalungelo abantu ikakhulukazi abesifazane namantombazane phakathi nokugcineka kwentuthuko. Sifisa ukuzwakalisa ukubonga nokujabula kwethu kunobhala weHRP, ababambisani, kanye nabaxhasi kanye nohlelokuxhumana lomhlaba ezizindeni zokubambisana nongoti abasiza ukwenza isiqiniseko ukuthi imizamo inikela ekwenzeni umehluko kubantu besifazane, amadoda, izingane, intsha, nemiphakathini eyahlukene iHRP izimisele ngokusiza. Ngokubambela amalunga ePCC sivumeleni siqinisekise ukubambisana kwethu nani ukweseka okuzuziwe kweHRP ekuphumeleleni okuncike ku-ajenda 2030.
translations.hypothesis: I-HRP kanye nabalingani bayo besondise kakhulu kule nqubo yenhlanhla eyayishiwo kwiNdwebono Yamazwe Ngamazwe ye-1994 mayelana Nobuntu kanye Nokuthuthukiswa, kanye nokubaluleka kokuqapha amalungelo wabantu, ikakhulukazi abesifazane kanye nezintombi, njengengxenye ebalulekile yokuthuthukiswa okusimeme. Sifisa ukubonisa ukubonga kwethu kanye nokubonga kuleli komidi le-HRP, kubalingani bayo, kubaxhasayo, kanye nenethiwekhi yamazwe ngamazwe yezikhungo ezisebenzisana kanye nochwepheshe abasiza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imizamo yayo inokwenza umehluko kubesifazane, amadoda, izingane, izintshikazi kanye nezakhamuzi ezahlukene eziku-HRP. Ngigquge abalungu be-PCC, sivumele ukuthi siqinise ukubambisana kwethu nawe ukuze sisekele izimpumelelo ze-HRP, okuthi ngazo kuncike impumelelo ye-Agenda ka-2030.

translations.source: WHO launches new initiative to improve pandemic preparedness To help countries better prepare for future pandemics, WHO launched a new initiative today that provides guidance on integrated planning for responding to any respiratory pathogen such as influenza or coronaviruses. The new Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats Initiative, or PRET, incorporates the latest tools and approaches for shared learning and collective action established during the COVID-19 pandemic and other recent public health emergencies. Through the initiative, WHO will use a mode of transmission approach to guide countries in pandemic planning, given that many capacities and capabilities are common among groups of pathogens. PRET answers the call for technical guidance and support for promoting and strengthening integrated preparedness and response, as outlined in World Health Assembly resolutions.
translations.reference: I-WHO yethula umzamo omusha wokwenza ngcono ukuzilungiselela kobhubhane Ukusiza amazwe ukuthi azilungisele okungcono kwekusasa lobhubhane,WHO yethule umzamo namahlanje ozonikeza imiyalelo yokuhlela ngokuhlanganisa ngokuphendula kunoma iyiphi iphathojini yokuphefumula njengomkhuhlane noma ikhorona. I-Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats Initiative, noma iPRET, ihlanganisa amathuluzi akamuva nezindlela zokufunda okwabelwana ngazo kanye nesenzo esiyiqoqo esisungulwe phakathi nobhadane lweCOVID-19 nezinye izimo eziphuthumayo zakamuva zezempilo zomphakathi. Ngomzamo iWHO izosebenzisa indlela yokudlulisela ukuyala amazwe ekuhleleni ubhubhane,ngoba kukhona amandla amaningi namandla amaningi afanayo kumaqoqo ephathojini. I-PRET iphendula isimemezelo somuyalelo wezobuchwepheshe nokwesekwa kokugqugquzelwa nokuqiniswa kokuhlanganisa ukuzilungiselela nokuphendula,njengova kuveziwe kuzinqumo zeWorld Health Assembly.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO iqalise uhlelo olusha ukuze ithuthukise ukulungiselela izifo ezibulalayo. Ukuze isize izizwe ukuthi zilungele kangcono izifo ezibulalayo ezizayo, i-WHO iqalise uhlelo olusha namuhla oluhlinzeka ngomcebhelo mayelana nokuhlela okuhlanganisiwe lokuphendula noma yiluphi uhlobo lwe-pathogen (ugesi) ezimpilweni, njenge-influenza noma ama-coronavirus. Lolu hlelo olusha, oluthi "Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats Initiative" (PRET), luhlanganisa amathuluzi nezindlela zakamuva zokufunda ngokuhlanganyela kanye nokusebenza ndawonye ezakhiwe ngesikhathi se-COVID-19 kanye nezinye izimo zempilo zomphakathi ezazikhona kwanoma yimanje. Ngale nhlangano, i-WHO izosebenzisa indlela yokudluliswa kwezifo ukuholisa izizwe ekuhleleni izifo ezibulalayo, ngoba amaningi amakhono kanye nezindlela zokwenza izinto afana phakathi kwezinhlobo ezahlukene zama-pathogen. I-PRET iphendula isicelo somcebhelo wobufakazi kanye nokwesekwa ukuze kukhuthazwe futhi kukhuliswe ukulungiselela nokuphendula okuhlanganisiwe, njengoba kuchaziwe ezinqumweni ze-World Health Assembly.

translations.source: The COVID-19 pandemic and other health emergencies have shown that countries need to be operationally ready to respond to infectious disease threats, with tailored preparedness plans in hand and better coordination and collaboration with other sectors such as agriculture. “Preparedness, prevention, and response activities must not be the province of the health sector alone,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Just as health emergencies have impacts across many sectors, so must our preparedness and response efforts span sectors, disciplines and pathogens. It is critical, too, that community engagement and equity are the centre of our efforts, especially for those populations that are marginalized and most at risk.” PRET is an evolution in WHO’s approach to pandemic preparedness through the application of a mode of transmission lens, rather than a focus on specific diseases.
translations.reference: Ububhane lweCOVID-19 nezinye izimo eziphuthumayo zezempilo zikhombisile ukuthi amazwe adinga ukuthi alungele ukubhekana nezinsongo zezifo ezithathelwanayo, ngezinhlelo zokuzilungiselela ezilungiselelwe ngesandla kanye nokuxhumana okungcono nokusebenzisana neminye imikhakha efana nezolimo. "Ukuzilungiselela, ukuvikela nemisebenzi yokuphendula akumele kube yisifundazwe somkhakha wezempilo kuphela," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO. "Njengeziphuthumayo zempilo zinomthelela kumikhakha eminingi, ngakho nokuzilungiselela kwethu nemizamo yokuphendula mayilingane nemikhakah, izinhlobo namagciwane. Kubucayi futhi ukuthi ukukhuluma komphakathi nokulingana kuphakathi kwemizamo yethu, ikakhulukazi kulabo bantu abagcindezelekile futhi abasengcupheni enkulu." I-PRET iwuguquko endleleni yeWHO ekuzilungiseleni kobhubhane ngokusebenzisa indlela yelensi yokudlulisela, ukunokugxila ezifweni ezithile.
translations.hypothesis: ULuhlu lwe-COVID-19 kanye nezinye izimo eziphilayo zibonise ukuthi amazwe kumele alungele ukuthatha izinyathelo ezifanele uma kukhona ingozi yezifo ezisatshalaliswayo, futhi kufanele abe nezinhlelo ezilungiselelwe lokho, kanye nokuxhumanisa nokubambisana okungcono nezinye izikhungo ezifana nezolimo. "Ukulungiselela, ukuvimbela, kanye nezindlela zokusabela kumele kube yinto ebalulekile ezikhungweni eziningi, hhayi ezikhungweni zezempilo kuphela," kusho uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele we-WHO. "Njengoba izimo eziphilayo ziba nemiphumela ezikhungweni eziningi, ngakho-ke ukulungiselela kwethu nokusabela kufanele kuhlanganise izikhungo eziningi, izifundo ezahlukene, kanye nezifo ezahlukene. Kubalulekile futhi ukuthi ukubandakanywa komphakathi nokulingana kube yinto ebalulekile ezindleleni zethu, ikakhulu kubantu abahlukene futhi abakhona engozini enkulu." I-PRET iyindlela entsha ye-WHO ekulungiseleleni izimo zokwelashwa, ngokusebenzisa indlela yokuhlaziywa yokusabalalisa kwezifo, kunokugxila ezifweni ezithile.

translations.source: WHO will continue to develop and disseminate guidance on specific diseases as needed. The launch of the initiative is taking place on the last day of meetings with over 120 individuals representing Member States, partners, and the WHO secretariat, to define the path forward for PRET, including the development of a global implementation roadmap for respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. The PRET Initiative’s first module focuses on respiratory pathogens, including influenza, coronaviruses, and respiratory syncytial virus. Given the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and the possible threat of avian influenza, this module will enable countries to critically review, test, and update their respiratory pandemic planning efforts to ensure they have the functional capacities and capabilities in place. A process is underway to identify the next group of pathogens, such as arboviruses, to be addressed under this initiative.
translations.reference: I-WHO izoqhubeka nokuthuthukisa nokusabalalisa imiyalelo ezifweni ezithile njengoba kudingeka. Ukwethulwa komzamo kuzokwenzeka ngosuku lokugcina lwemihlangano abangaphezu kuka-120 abamele Member State, ababambisani, noNobhala weWHO, ukuchaza indlela eya phambili yePRET okufaka ukuthuthuka kwebalazwe lokwenza lomhlaba kokuzilungiselela lobhubhane lwegciwane lokuphefumula. Imizamo yePRET isifundo sokuqala sigxile kumagciwane pokuphefumula, okufaka umkhuhlane, igciwane lekhorona namagciwane ezokuphefumula. Ngokunikezwa ubhubhane oluqhubekayo nokwesabisa okungenzeka emkhuhlaneni, lemojuli izokwenza amazwe abheke ngokucophelela, ukuhlola, ukubuyekeza imizamo yokuhlela ubhubhane lwezokuphefumula ukuqinisekisa banamandla okusebenzayo, namandla akhona. Uhlelo lusendleleni lokuhlonza iqoqo elilandelayo lamagciwane, njengama-arbovirus, ukuthi kubhekwane nawo ngaphansi kwalomzamo.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO izoqhubeka nokuthuthukisa nokusabalalisa imiyalelo mayelana nezifo ezithile njengoba kudingeka. Ukwethulwa kwalesi zinhlelo kuzo kwenzeka ngosuku lokugcina komhlangano, lapho kuzobe kukhona abantu abangaphezu kuka-120 abamele izizwe ezilunga, ozakwethu, kanye nomnyango we-WHO, ukuze kukhonjwe indlela esizayo ye-PRET, okubalwa kulo ukuthuthukiswa kohlelo lokusebenza lomhlaba wonke lokulungiselela ukwelashwa kwezifo ezisabalalayo ezihlobene nezindlebe. Umqulu wokuqala we-PRET Initiative ugxile ezindlebeni ezisabalalayo, okubalwa kuzo i-influenza, ama-coronavirus, kanye ne-respiratory syncytial virus. Ngenxa yalesi sikathi esiqhubekayo se-COVID-19 kanye nezingozi ezingaba khona ze-avian influenza, lo mqulu uzosiza izizwe ukuthi zihlale-hlale, zihlolisise, futhi zibuyekeze izinhlelo zazo zokulungiselela ukwelashwa kwezifo ezisabalalayo ezihlobene nezindlebe ukuze ziqinisekise ukuthi zinezikhungo kanye namakhono afanele. Kukhona inqubo esenzekayo yokuthola igama leqembu elilandelayo lezindlebe, ezifana ne-arboviruses, ezizokwelashwa ngale nhlelo.

translations.source: This will follow priorities identified through the ten proposals to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience (HEPR). The PRET Initiative ushers in a new era for pandemic preparedness and represents an evolution of WHO’s core activities to support all Member States in strengthening health emergency preparedness, prevention, and response capacities and capabilities. The initiative can also serve to operationalize the objectives and provisions of the Pandemic Accord, which is currently being negotiated by WHO Member States. Following inputs and discussions among meeting participants, WHO invites stakeholders to this global call to action to advance respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. Call to Action
translations.reference: Lokhu kuzolandela okuhamba phambili okuhlonziwe ngeziphakamiso eziyishumi zokuqinisa ukwakhiwa komhlaba kokuzilungiselela kokuphuthuma kwezempilo, ukuphendula nokubekezela (HEPR). Umzamo wePRET ukuyisa esikhathini esisha sokuzilungiselela kobhubhane nokumela uguquko lwemisebenzi ngqo yeWHO ukweseka wonke amaMember State ekuqiniseni ezempilo zokuzilungiselela okuphuthumayo, ukuvikela namandla okuphendula nokukwazi. Umzamo ungaphinde usize ukusebenzisa izinjongo nokuhlinzekwa kwePandemic Accord okwamanje okusaxoxwa ngayo yiWHO Member State. Kulandela lokho okufakiwe nezingxoxo emihlanganweni yababambe iqhaza, iWHO imema ababambisani kulesimemezelo somhlaba sokwenza ukuwandisa ukuzilungiselela kobhubhane legciwane lokuphefumula. Kufuneka ukwenza
