translations.hypothesis: Lokhu kuzolandela izinto ezibalulekile ezitholwe ngama-phrojekthi ayisikhombisa okuhloswe ukwenza kube ngcono ukulungiselela, ukuphendula, kanye nokulondolozwa kwezimo eziphuthumayo kwezempilo emhlabeni jikelele (HEPR). Uhlelo lwe-PRET uqala inkathi entsha yokulungiselela izifo ezithathelana, futhi ubumane nobudlelwane obusha emisebenzini eyinhloko ye-WHO, okuhloswe ukuxhasa wonke amazwe angamalungu ukuze kwenziwe kube ngcono ukulungiselela, ukuvimbela, kanye nokuphendula kwezimo eziphuthumayo kwezempilo. Le nhlelo ingasetshenziswa futhi ukwenza kube yiqiniso izinhloso nezimiso ze-Pandemic Accord, okwamanje kugxilwe kuzo amazwe angamalungu e-WHO. Ngemva kokufakwa kanye nokuxoxa phakathi kwabathathile iqhaza emihlanganweni, i-WHO imema ababambiqhaza kuleli cala lomsebenzi lomhlaba wonke ukuze kwenziwe kube ngcono ukulungiselela izifo ezithathelana ezibangelwa izinto ezibulalayo zempilo. Ucalo Lomsebenzi.

translations.source: WHO, Member States, and partners are working together to identify and implement priority actions to strengthen national, regional, and global preparedness for pandemics and emerging infectious disease threats. We recognize the role of communities and all sectors, and the need for harmonized and sustained momentum to end the cycle of panic and neglect that is all too common in pandemic preparedness and response. We recall lessons from previous epidemics and pandemics, especially those caused by respiratory pathogens. These pathogens have and will continue to pose a significant global threat with the potential to cause tremendous morbidity and mortality, overwhelm health systems, de-stabilize the global economy, and exacerbate inequities, which exist in the access to both the tools to prevent pandemics and health care for all people. This is a Call to Action to accelerate preparedness for pandemics and emerging threats globally.
translations.reference: AmaMember State eWHO, nababambisani basebenza ndawonye ukuhlonza nokuhambisa phambili ukwenza izenzo zokuqinisa izwe, isifunda, nokuzilungiselela komhlaba kwezobhubhane nokuvela kwezifo ezithelelanayo ezisabisayo. Siyayibona indima yomphakathi nayo yonke imikhakha sidinga ukulinganisa nokugcina umfutho ekupheleni kwesakile yokusaba nokunganaki lokho kujwayelekile ekuzilungiseleni kobhubhane nokuphendula. Sikhumbula izifundo zobhubhane olwedlule ne-ephidemikhi, ikakhulukazi lezo ezidalwa amagciwane okuphefumula. Lawo magciwane azoqhubeka nokuletha ukusabisa komhlaba okukhulu ngamandla okudala izinkinga ezinkulu nokufa, izinhlelo zempilo ezingaphezu kwamandla, ukwehlisa ezomnotho zomhlaba, ukwengeza ukungalingani, okukhona ekungeneni kumathuluzi omabili okuvikela ubhubhane nokunakekelwa ezempilo kubona bonke abantu. Lesi yisimemezelo sokwenza ukuqhubeza ukuzilungiselela kobhubhane nokuvela kokwesaba emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: I-WHO, izizwe ezilungiselelwe, kanye nabamukeli basebenzisana ukuthola nokusebenzisa izinyathelo ezibalulekile zokuqinisa ukulungiselela kwezizwe, ezifunda, kanye nomhlaba wonke ngokuphazamiseka kwezifo ezinkulu kanye nezingozi zezifo ezisatshalaliswa ezifihlwe. Siyaqaphela indima yomphakathi kanye nayo yonke imikhakha, kanye nesidingo sokuhambisana nokuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo ukuze kudalwe ukuphepha ekubangeleni ukuba khona kwezinkinga kanye nokungabheki okujwayelekile ekulungiseleleni kanye nempendulo kokuphazamiseka kwezifo ezinkulu. Sikhumbula izifundo ezivela ezinkingeni zezifo ezidlule kanye nezifo ezinkulu, ikakhulukazi lezo ezibangelwe izinto ezisatshalaliswa ngomoya. Lezi zinto zidlala indima enkulu kakhulu emhlabeni wonke futhi ngokuqhubekayo zidlala indima enkulu, zinekhono lokubangela ukugula okukhulu kanye nokufa, ukudluleka kwezinhlelo zezempilo, ukungqubuzana komnotho womhlaba wonke, kanye nokwanda kwezinkinga ezikhona ekufinyeleleni kokubili: amathuluzi okuvimbela ukuphazamiseka kwezifo ezinkulu kanye nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kubantu bonke. Lesi yisikhumbuzo sokuthi kumele senze okwengeziwe ukuze sikhulise ukulungiselela ukuphazamiseka kwezifo ezinkulu kanye nezingozi ezifihlwe kulo lonke elasekuphileni.

translations.source: Effective preparedness relies on robust planning and coordinated action. A collective commitment on the following actions will see progress achieved by December 2025 as will be described in the (Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET) monitoring framework: Update preparedness plans that affirm priority actions and that have considered learnings from past events. Recognizing the risk posed by respiratory pathogens, planning for a respiratory pathogen pandemic based on the themes identified in the PRET Module #1: Planning for Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics is a priority
translations.reference: Ukusebenza kokuzilungiselela kuncike kubukhulu bokuhlela nokwenza kokuxhumana. Ukuzimisela kweqoqo kuzenze ezilandelayo kuzobonisa ukuqhubeka okutholakele ngoZibandlela 2025 futhi kuzochazwa (Ukuzilungiselela nokubekezela kokusabisayo okuvelayo (PRET) ukubheka umhlahlandlela: Ukulungiselelwa kokubuyekeziwe ukuhlela okuqinisekisa izenzo zokuhamba phambili nokucabanga izifundo zezigemegeme ezedlule. Ukubona ingcuphe efakwe amagciwane ezokuphefumula, ukuhlela kobhubhane lamagciwane ezokuphefumula ancike kuzingqikithi ezihlonzwe kusifundo sePRET #1: Ukuhlelela ubhubhane lwamagciwane ezokuphefumula kuhamba phambili
translations.hypothesis: Ukulungiselela kahle kuxhomekile ekuhlelweni okuqinile kanye nokusebenzisana. Ukuzibophezela ngokuhlanganyelwe kulawa masinyano kuzokwenza ukuthi kwenziwe ukuphumelela ngokuqeda unyaka ka-2025, njengoba kuchazwe kwi-framework yokulalela i-"Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET)": Buyekeza izinhlelo zokulungiselela ezibeka phambili izinyathelo ezibalulekile futhi ezilungele ukuthola izifundo ezivela ezimweni ezidlule. Ukwazi ingozi ezibangelwa izinto ezibangela ukugula zokuphefumula, ukuhlela ukubheka ubhubhane lwezinto ezibangela ukugula zokuphefumula, kususelwe ezindimeni ezikhonjwe kwi-PRET Module #1: Ukuhlela Ukubheka Ubhubhane Lwezinto Ezibangela Ukugula Zokuphefumula, kubalulekile.

translations.source: Increase connectivity among stakeholders in pandemic preparedness planning through systematic coordination and cooperation. This includes building equitable systems; conducting joint exercises; and sharing information on good practices, challenges, and opportunities. Dedicate sustained investments, financing and monitoring of pandemic preparedness with a particular focus on addressing the gaps identified during past pandemics and epidemics. The COVID-19 pandemic response has demonstrated what can be achieved with political commitment, community engagement and funding.
translations.reference: Ukunyusa ukuxhumana kubabambisani ekuzilungiseleni kobhubhane ukuhlela ngezinhlelo zokuxhumana nokusebenzisana. Lokhu kufaka ukwakha izinhlelo ezilinganayo ukwenza imisebenzi ngokuhlanganyela; Nokwabelana ngolwazi ekwenzeni okuhle, izingqinamba kanye namathuba. Ukunikela ngotshalomali olugcinekile, izimali nokubheka kokulungela ubhubhane ngokugxila ekubhekeni izikhala ezihlonze ngesikhathi sobhubhane olwedlule. Ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 luphendule ukukhombisa ukuthi yikuphi okungazuzwa ngokuzibophezela kwezepolitiki, ukukhuluma komphakathi kanye noxhasomali.
translations.hypothesis: Khulisa ukuxhumana phakathi kwabaxhasi ezihlelweni zokulungiselela izifo ezibulalayo ngokuhlela okuhle kanye nokubambisana. Lokhu kufaka ukwakha izinhlelo ezilinganayo; ukwenziwa kwezinhlelo ezihlangene; kanye nokwabelana ngolwazi mayelana nezindlela ezihle, izinkinga, kanye nezithuba. Faka izimali ezikhunjulwe, ukuxhaso, kanye nokulaleliswa kwezinhlelo zokulungiselela izifo ezibulalayo, kakhulu ngokugxila ekulungisweni kwezinkinga ezibonwe ngesikhathi sezifo ezibulalayo nezinkinga zangaphambilini. Impendulo kwi-COVID-19 ibonise ukuthi yini engenziwa ngomthelela kazwelonke, ukubandakanywa komphakathi, kanye nokuxhaso kwezimali.

translations.source: At the heart of this work is to ensure equity to be ready for the next pandemic together. Whole-of-society action is needed to make the progress outlined in this Call to Action. Implementation should therefore strengthen the resilience of communities; maintain, sustain, and build on routine systems; and leverage broader capacities for emergency preparedness and response. This Call to Action was released at the Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET): Global Meeting for Future Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics held on 24-26 April 2023 in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Phakathi nalomsebenzi ukuqinisekisa ukulingana ukulungela obhubhane olulandelayo ndawonye. Ukwenza komphakathi wonke kuyadingeka ukwenza inqubekela phambili evezwe kule simemezelo sokwenza. Ukwenza kumele kuqinise imiphakathi ebekezelayo; egcinayo nokugcineka nokwakha izindlela zezinhlelo; nokubambisa kwamandla amakhulu kokuzilungiselela okuphuthumayo nokuphendula. Lesi simemezelo sokwenza sakhishwa eKuzilungiseleni nokubekezela kokuvela kokusabisayo (PRET): Umhlangano womhlaba wekusasa lobhubhane lwamagciwane ezokuphefumula obanjwe ngo-24-26 Mbasa 2023 eGeneva, eSwitzerland.
translations.hypothesis: Inhloso enkulu yalesi msebenzi ukwenza ukuthi wonke umuntu abe namalungelo afanayo ukuze sikwazi ukulwela ukwelapheka kwezifo ezinkulu ezizayo ndawonye. Kudingeka ukuthi wonke umphakathi ube nokuzimisela ukuze kuthuthukiswe lokho okuchaziwe kuleli Ngxoxo Lokwenza Okuthile. Ngakho-ke, ukusebenza kufanele kuqinise ukuthi imiphakathi ikwazi ukubhekana nezinkinga; kugcinwe, kugcinwe, futhi kukhuliswe izinhlelo ezijwayelekile; futhi kusetshenziswe amandla amaningi ekulungiseleleni kanye nokuphendula ezimweni eziyingozi. Leli Ngxoxo Lokwenza Okuthile lwakhiwa ngesikhathi komhlangano womhlaba wonke obizwa nge-Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET): Global Meeting for Future Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics, owawuseGeneva, eSwitzerland, ngomhlaka 24-26 Ephreli 2023.

translations.source: WHO urges increased implementation of recommended tools to combat malaria Marking World Malaria Day, the World Health Organization (WHO) is issuing a call for increased implementation of new and existing interventions to save lives from malaria. Nearly 1.5 million children at high risk of illness and death from malaria in Ghana, Kenya and Malawi have now received their first dose of the first malaria vaccine, RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S), thanks to an ongoing pilot programme coordinated by WHO. The malaria vaccine pilots, launched in 2019, are increasing equity in access to malaria prevention for the most vulnerable and are saving lives. If implemented broadly, WHO estimates that malaria vaccines could save the lives of tens of thousands of children each year.
translations.reference: I-WHO inxenxa ukunyuswa kokwenza ngamathuluzi aphakanyisiwe ukulwa nomalaleveva Ukumaka uSuku lukaMalaleveva eMhlabeni, Inhlangano Yezempilo Yomhlaba (WHO) izokhipha isimememzelo sokunyusa ukwenza kokungenelela okukhona nokusha ukusindisa izimpilo kumalaleveva. Okungafika kuzigidi ezingu-1.5 izingane ezisengcupheni enkulu yokugula nokufa okusuka kumalaleveva eGhana, eKenya naseMalawi manje sebethole umgomo wokuqala kamalaleveva, RTS, S/AS01 (RTS,S), siyabonga kuhlelo lokuhlola oluqhubekayo oluxhunyaniswa yiWHO. Ukuhlolwa komgomo wamalaleveva, owethulwe ngo-2019,kwenyusa ukulingana kokuthola ukuvikelwa kumalaleveva kulabo ababuthaka kakhulu futhi kusindisa izimpilo. Ukwenziwe kakhulu, iWHO ilinganisela ukuthi umgomo kamalaleveva ungasingisa izimpilo eziyizinkulungwane eziyishumi zezingane ngonyaka.
translations.hypothesis: UHLO uthi kukhuthazwe ukusetshenziswa okwengeziwe kwamathuluzi anconyiwe ukulwa nesifo sase-malaria. Ngenkathi kukhunjulwa Ngosuku Lomhlaba Lwesifo sase-Malaria, iHhovisi Lomhlaba Lempilo (WHO) lithi kukhuthazwe ukusetshenziswa okwengeziwe kwezindlela ezintsha nezidala zokusiza ukugcina impilo yabantu esigcawini sesifo sase-malaria. Cishe abantwana abayi-1.5 million abanezinkinga ezinkulu zokugula nokufa ngesifo sase-malaria eGhana, eKenya naseMalawi manje sebezithole idosi yokuqala yevini yokuqala yokulwa nesifo sase-malaria, i-RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S), ngoba kunohlelo oluqhubekayo oluholwa yi-WHO. Izivivinyo zevini yokulwa nesifo sase-malaria, eziqalwe ngo-2019, zenza ukuthi kube lula ukufinyelela ezindleleni zokuvimbela lesi sifo kubantu abanezinkinga ezinkulu, futhi zenza ukuthi abantu bagcine impilo. Uma kususwa ngokubanzi, i-WHO icabanga ukuthi iveni yokulwa nesifo sase-malaria ingenza ukuthi abantwana abayi-awukhulu ngabambili bagcine impilo ngonyaka ngamunye.

translations.source: “We have the tools to drive down malaria, a package of interventions that includes vector control, preventive medicines, testing, and treatment,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General of WHO. “These are joined by a safe and effective malaria vaccine, which could save the lives of tens of thousands children every year. With sustained investment and scaled-up efforts to reach those most at risk, malaria elimination in many countries is in reach. "World Malaria Day 2023 is being marked under the theme “Time to deliver zero malaria: invest, innovate, implement”. Within this theme, WHO is urging more effective implementation of available tools and strategies to prevent, diagnose and treat malaria, particularly among marginalized populations.
translations.reference: "Sinamathuluzi ukwehlisa umalaleveva,iphekheji yokungenenela ebandakanya ukulawula ivektha,imithi yokuvikela, ukuhlola nokwelapha," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO. "Lokhu kulandelwa ngumgomo ophephile nosebenzayo kamalaleveva, ongasindisa izimpilo eziyizinkulungwane eziyishumi zezingane unyaka ngamunye. Ngotshalomali olugcinekile nokunyuka kwemizamo ukufika kulabo abasengcupheni kakhulu, ukuqedwa kwamalaleveva emazweni amaningi sekuyafika. "Usuku lukaMalaleveva eMhlabeni 2023 lumakwe ngaphansi kwengqikithi, "Isikhathi sokuwqeda umalaleveva, tshala, yenza kabusha yenza". Kule ngqikithi, iWHO inxenxa okunye ukwenza okusebenzayo kwamathuluzi akhona namasu okuvikela, ukuxilonga nokwelapha umalaleveva, ikakhulukazi kulesosibalo esingcindezelekile.
translations.hypothesis: "Sinezinsiza ezisetshenziselwa ukunciphisa ukugula ngobungozi, okuhlanganisa ukulawulwa kwezindlu zokudla, imithi yokuvikela, ukuhlaziywa, kanye nokwelashwa," kusho uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi-Jeneral we-WHO. "Lokhu kuhlanganiswe notshiko oluphephile futhi olusebenza kakhulu lokwelashwa ngobungozi, olangabe usindisa impilo yezingane ezinkulungwane eziningi ngonyaka. Ngokutshalwa kwezimali okuqhubekayo kanye nemizamo ekhulisiwe yokufinyelela kulabo abakhulu kakhulu ekugibeni, ukususwa kobungozi ezweni eliningi kungenzeka. Usuku Lomhlaba Lwebungozi ka-2023 kugujwe ngaphansi kwenthemu ethi "Isikhathi sokuletha ukuthi akukho ukugula ngobungozi: tshalela, mbulula, futhi sebenzise". Ngaphakathi kwale ntema, i-WHO uyachaza ukuthi kufanele kukhuthazwe ukusebenza kahle kwalezi zinsiza kanye nezindlela ezitholakalayo zokuvikela, ukuhlaziya, kanye nokwelashwa kobungozi, ikakhulukazi phakathi kwabantu abahlukile.

translations.source: According to the latest World malaria report, published in December 2022, there were an estimated 247 million new cases of malaria in 2021. The WHO African Region continues to shoulder the heaviest burden of the disease – accounting for an estimated 95% of all malaria cases (234 million) and 96% of all deaths (593 000) in 2021. Nearly 80% of malaria deaths in the African Region were among children under the age of five. New strategies and tools Countries have made some progress in expanding access to malaria services for most-at-risk populations.
translations.reference: Ngokombiko wokugcina wamalaleveva emhlabeni,oshicilelwe ngoZibandlela 2022, bekunesilinganiso sika-247 wezigidi zamacala amasha kamalaleveva ngo-2021. I-WHO African Region iyaqhubeka ukuthwala umthwalo onzima wesifo- okuballelwa esilinganiswenisa ku-95% wamacala kamalaleveva (u-234 wezigidi) no-96% wokufa (593 000) ngo-2021. Kungafika ku-80% ukufa okudalwa umalaleveva eSifundeni se-Afrika obukukubantwana abangaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu. Amasu amasha namathuluzi Amazweasenze inqubekela phambili ekwandiseni ukungena kumisebenzi yamalaleveva kusibalo sabantu esisengcupheni kakhulu.
translations.hypothesis: Ngokubonswa kwephrofayela yakamuva yomhlalaphansi yomhlaza, eyayikhishiwe ngoDisemba ka-2022, kwakukhulumene ukuthi ngo-2021 kwakunezimo ezintsha zomhlaza ezimalini eziyizigidi ezingu-247. Ikhontinenthi yase-Afrika ye-WHO iyaqhubeka nokubamba umthwalo omkhulu kakhulu walesi sifo – kukhishwa ukuthi iyangena emazingeni angu-95% yazo zonke izingozi zomhlaza (ezimalini eziyizigidi ezingu-234) kanye namaphesenti angu-96 yazo zonke izingozi zokufa (ezingu-593 000) ngo-2021. Cishe amaphesenti angu-80% yezingozi zokufa ngomhlaza kuleli khontinenthi yase-Afrika kwabe kuwabadlule abantwana abangaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu. Izinhlelo ezintsha nezinsiza Izizwe zithole ukuthuthuka okuthile ekwandiseni ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zomhlaza kubantu abanezimpikiselo ezinkulu.

translations.source: Despite some progress, many people at high risk of malaria still lack access to services that can prevent, detect and treat the disease. Challenges in expanding access to malaria services have been compounded, particularly in sub-Saharan Africa, by the COVID-19 pandemic, converging humanitarian crises, restricted funding, weak surveillance systems, and declines in the effectiveness of core malaria-fighting tools. To address these threats and support countries in building more resilient malaria programmes, WHO recently published new strategies and frameworks, including: a new strategy to contain antimalarial drug resistance in Africa; a new initiative to stop the spread of Anopheles stephensi in urban environments;
translations.reference: Ngaphandle kokuqhubeka abantu abaningi abasengcupheni yamalaleveva basantula ukungena emisebenzini engavimba, noma itthole bese yelapha isifo. Izingqinamba ekwandeni kokungena kumisebenzi kamalaleveva sezihlanganisisiwe,ikakhulukazi esu-Saharan Afrika, ngobhubhane lweCOVID-19, ukujika izinkinga zobuntu, uxhasomali olunezivimbo, izinhlelo zokubheka ezintekenteke, ukwehla ekwenzeni kwamathuluzi okulwa ngqo nomalaleveva. Ukubhekana nalokhu okusabisayo nokweseka amazwe ekwakheni izinhlelo zokubekezela zamalaleveva, iWHO isanda kushicilela amasu amasha nomhlahlandlela: isu elisha lelinesidakamizwa esingenamalaleveva ukuvika eAfrika; umzamo omusha wokumisa ukusabalala kweAnophelesi stephensi ezindaweni zasemadolobheni;
translations.hypothesis: Noma kunjalo, nakuba kukhona ukuthuthuka okuthile, abaningi abantu abanezinkinga ezinkulu zokugula ngobungozi bayo bayasala ngaphandle kokufinyelela ezinsizakalweni ezikwazi ukuvimbela, ukuthola kanye nokwelapha lesi sifo. Izinkinga zokwandisa ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zokulwa nobungozi ziwomile, ikakhulukazi e-Afrika eseningizimu ye-Sahara, ngenxa yobhubhane lwe-COVID-19, izimangaliso zensiza yangomuntu ezihlanganisiwe, ukunciphiswa kwezimali, izinhlelo zokugada ezingunaphakade, kanye nokwehla ekusebenzelweni kwezinsiza ezibalulekile zokulwa nobungozi. Ukuze kuxazululwe lezi zingozi futhi kusizwe izifunda ekwakhiweni kwezinhlelo zokulwa nobungozi ezibukhali, i-WHO ngesikhathi esifushane ishicilele izinqubo ezintsha nezihluzo, okubalwa kuzo: inqubo entsha yokulawula ukumelana kwamithi okwelapha ubungozi e-Afrika; uhlelo olusha lokumisa ukusasazeka kwe-Anopheles stephensi ezindaweni zasemadolobheni.

translations.source: a new framework, developed jointly by WHO and UN-Habitat, to guide city leaders in urban malaria control. a new toolkit to help countries assess their malaria surveillance systems and identify areas for investment WHO has also increased the transparency, flexibility and access to its malaria recommendations. The consolidated WHO Guidelines for malaria are now available through two digital platforms: MAGICapp and the “Malaria Toolkit” app. WHO encourages countries to tailor the recommendations to local disease settings for maximum impact.
translations.reference: umhlahlandlela omusha, uthuthukiswe ndawonye yiWHO neUN-Habitat, ukuyalela babaholi bedolobha ekulawulweni kwemalalaeveva edolobheni. ithuluzi elisha ukusiza amazwe ahlola umalaleveva wabio wezinhlelo zokubheka nokuhlonza izindawo zotshalomali I-WHO iphinde yanyusa ukwethembeka, ukubalula nokuthola iziphakamiso zemalaleveva. Ukuhlanganiswa kwemiyalelo yeWHO kwamalaleveva sekukhona manje ngezinkundla ezimbili zedijithali: iMAGICapp kanye ne-"MalariaToolkit" isisetshenziswa. I-WHO igqugquzela amazwe ukuthi ahlanganise kuziphakamiso ekuhlelweni kwezifo zendawo kumthelela omkhulu.
translations.hypothesis: Uhlelo olusha, olwenziwe ngokubambisana yi-WHO kanye ne-UN-Habitat, olenzelwe ukuhlonza abaholi bamadolobha ekulawuleni kwe-malaria edolobheni. Ithulwe ithuluzi elisha elisiza izizwe ukuhlola izinhlelo zazo zokugada nge-malaria futhi zithole izindawo ezifanele ukutshalwa kwezimali. I-WHO nayo ikhulisile ukubonakala, ukuguquguquka kanye nokufinyelela kwezincomo zayo mayelana ne-malaria. Imibhalo ehlanganisiwe ye-WHO mayelana ne-malaria manje iyatholakala ngezindlela ezimbili zedijithali: i-MAGICapp kanye nohlelo lokusebenza oluthi "Malaria Toolkit". I-WHO yenza ngcono ukuthi izizwe zilungise izincomo zazo ngokuya ngesimo sezifo endaweni yango.

translations.source: Prospects for new interventions Continued investment in the development and deployment of new malaria vaccines and next-generation tools will be key to achieving the 2030 global malaria targets. A second malaria vaccine, the R21/Matrix-M (R21) vaccine, if approved, could help close the sizable gap between supply and demand and further reduce child illness and death from malaria. It is a priority for WHO to continue the thorough and efficient expert review of the R21 malaria vaccine once additional key safety and efficacy data from the ongoing R21 phase 3 trial are available and provided to WHO. Phased introductions of the RTS,S malaria vaccine in additional countries in Africa are expected to begin in early 2024.
translations.reference: Izindlela zokungenelela okusha Ukuqhubeka kotshalomali ekuthuthukisweni nokubekwa kwemigomo emisha kamalaleveva namathuluzi esizukulwane esilandelayo kuzobalulekaukuthola okuqondwe ngomalaleveva emhlabeni 2030. Umgomo wesibili kamalaleveva, umgomo iR21/Matrix-M (R21), uma ugunyaziwe ungasiza ukuvala isikhala esikalekayo phakathi kwesaplayi mokufuneka nokuqhubeka ukwehlisa ukugula kwezingane nokufa okudalwa umalaleveva. Kuhamba phambili kuWHO ukuqhubeka ngokubheka kangoti kweR21 malaleveva ngesikhathi sekwengezwe okuphepha okubalulekile,nemininingo kusuka ekuqhubekeni kukaR21 isigaba 3 sesikhona nokinikezelwa kuWHO. Isigaba sokukhiqiza iRTS,S umgomo wamalaleveva emazweni engeziwe eAfrika kulindeleke ukuthi aqale ngokuqala kuka-2024.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuthuthuka kwezindlela ezintsha. Ukutshalwa kwezimali okuqhubekayo ekuthuthukisweni nasekusebenzisweni kwezivini ezintsha zokulwa ne-malaria kanye nezinsiza ezizayo kuzoba yinto ebalulekile ekufinyelelweni kwezinhloso zamazwe ngamazwe zokuqeda i-malaria ngo-2030. Isivini sesibili se-malaria, i-R21/Matrix-M (i-R21), uma ivunyelwe, ingasiza ukunciphisa umehluko omkhulu phakathi kokutholakala kanye nesidingo, futhi futhi inciphise ukugula nokufa kwezingane okuphathelene ne-malaria. Kuyinto ebalulekile kwe-WHO ukuqhubeka nokuhlolwa okucophelele nangokusebenzayo ngabahloli abanolwazi nge-R21 sivini se-malaria uma imininingwane eyengeziwe ebalulekile mayelana nokuphepha kanye nokusebenza, etholwe kwi-R21 phase 3 trial, iyatholakala futhi inikezwe ku-WHO. Okuyisinqumo sokwethulwa kwe-RTS,S sivini se-malaria ezweni elinye ngalinye e-Afrika kulindeleke ukuqala ngokuqala kuka-2024.

translations.source: In the vector control space, there are 28 new products in the R&D pipeline. Tools under evaluation include, for example, new types of insecticide-treated nets, targeted baits that attract mosquitoes, spatial repellents, lethal house lures (eaves tubes) and genetic engineering of mosquitoes. Researchers are prioritizing the development of non-ACT treatments in the field of antimalarial medicines due to the emergence and spread of partial artemisinin resistance. The development of next-generation medicines, such as "triple ACTs," which use a combination of artemisinin and two partner drugs, is underway to reduce the risk of drug resistance. Notes to the editor:For more information on the WHO World Malaria Day campaign, visit: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023
translations.reference: Endaweni yokulawula ivekitha,kukhona imikhiqizoemisha engu-28 kokuzayo kweR&D. Amathuluzi asabhekisiswa afka, isibonelo, izinhlobo ezintsha zamanethi okulapha izinambuzane, izicuphomziqonde ukudonsa omiyane, isipeshali ripheleli, okwasendlini, (i-eaves tubes) nobunjiniyela bofuzo lwemiyane. Abacwaningi bahambisa phambili ukuthuthuka kokulashwa okungeyona i-ACTS emikhakheni wemithi omele umalaleveva ngenxa yokuphuthuma nokusabalala kokungavuminokuncane kwe-artemisinin. Ukdevelophwa kwemithi yesizukulwane esilandelayo, njenge ACTS, okusebenzisa ukuhlanganiswa kwe-artemisinin nezidakamizwa zimbili, kusendleleni kuzokwehlisa ingcuphe yokungavumi kwesidakamizwa. Amanothi aya kumhleli: ngolwazi olwengeziwe ekukhankaseni ngoSuku lukamalaleveva eMhlabeni lweWHO, vakashela u-http://www.who.int/campains/world-malaria-day/2023
translations.hypothesis: Kule ndawo yokulawula izindiza, kunemikhiqizo emisha engama-28 esungulwe kwi-pipeline yocwaningo nolwazimo. Izinsiza ezihloliwe zifaka, ngokwesibonelo, izinhlobo ezintsha zamakhithi ezindiza agcwele izidize, amagilavu aqondiswe ukudonsa izindiza, izinto zokugwema ezisabalalisa endaweni, amagilavu agcina izindiza ezindlini (amathubhu ezindlu) kanye nokuhlelelwa kwezinto zombili zezindiza. Abacwaningi baziqophele ekuthuthukisweni kwezokwelapha ezingasetshenzisi i-ACT (artemisinin-based combination therapy) kule ndawo yezokwelapha ezilwa ne-malaria, ngenxa yokuvuswa nokusabalala kokumelwa kwe-artemisinin okuyingxenye. Ukuthuthukiswa kwezokwelapha zesizukulwane esilandelayo, njenge-"triple ACTs," ezisebenzisa uhlanganiswe lwe-artemisinin kanye nezidokotela ezimbili ezisiza, seseqhubekile ukuze kuncishiswe ingozi yokumelwa kwezokwelapha. Amanothi kubabhali: Ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe ngempi ye-WHO yosuku lomhlaba lonke lwe-Malaria, vakashela: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023.

translations.source: mRNA Technology Transfer Programme moves to the next phase of its development Inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen, South Africa. Partners gather in Cape Town to discuss the next phase of the mRNA vaccine development and knowledge sharing. Over 200 international participants working with the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme met in Cape Town this week for their first face-to-face meeting. Joined by World Health Organization (WHO) Director General, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus and Dr. Joe Phaahla, Minister of Health and Minister of Trade and Industry, Mr. Ebrahim Patel of South Africa together with high-level officials from funding countries, this unique meeting reviewed the progress since WHO and Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) launched it in June 2021.
translations.reference: Uhlelo loKudlulisela ezobuchwepheshe i-mRNA iya esigabeni esilandelayo ekuthuthukeni kwayo Ukwethulwa kwehabhu yezobuchwepheshe imRNA indawo e-Afrigen, eNingizimu Afrika. Ababambisani bahlangane eKapa ukuxoxa ngesigaba esilandelayo semRNA umgomo ngokuthuthukisa nokwabelana ngolwazi. Ngaphezu kwababambiqhaza abangu-200 bamazwe angaphandle abasebenza ngoHlelo loKudlulisela lezoBuchwepheshe beMRNA abahlangane eKapa kulelisonto ukuze bahlangane bebonana. Ukujoyinwa iNhlangano yeZempilo eMhlabeni (WHO) uMqondisi Jikelele uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus noDkt Joe Phaahla uNgqongqoshe weZempilo noNgqongqoshe Wezimboni nokuhweba uMnumzane Ebrahim waseNingizimu Afrika ndawonye nezikhulu ezisezingeni eliphezulu eziphuma emazweni axhasile, lomhlangano owehlukile ubheke ukuqhubeka kusukela ukwethula kweWHO neMedicines Patent Pool (MPP) ngoNhlangulana 2021.
translations.hypothesis: Uhlelo Lokudluliselwa Kobuchwepheshe be-mRNA luyathuthuka kuqophelo elilandelayo. Ukugqudulelwa kwesikhungo sobuchwepheshe be-mRNA e-Afrigen, eNingizimu Afrika. Abalingani bahlangene eKapa ukuze xoxe ngokuqophelo elilandelayo ekuthuthukisweni kwezivakamo ze-mRNA kanye nokwabelana ngolwazi. Ababambiqhaza abangaphezu kuka-200 abasebenzisana nohlelo lokuDluliselwa Kobuchwepheshe be-mRNA bahlangene eKapa kuleli phakathi ukuze babe umhlangano wabo wokuqala obukhoma. Abahlangene noMqondisi Jikelele weHhovisi Lezempilo Yezwe (WHO), uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, kanye noDkt. Joe Phaahla, uMnyango Wezempilo kanye noMnyango Wezohwebo Nezindala, uMnuz. Ebrahim Patel waseNingizimu Afrika, kanye nochwepheshe abaphezulu ezweni elixhasa, lo mhlangano okhethekile ubuyekeze intuthuko kusukela ngaleso sikhathi i-WHO kanye ne-Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) yaqala kulo Juni ka-2021.

translations.source: “I am delighted to be here in Cape Town with our partners to support a sustainable model for mRNA technology transfer to give low- and middle-income countries equitable access to vaccines and other lifesaving health products,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “I am immensely proud of the achievement of all those involved in this project; in less than two years we have shown that when we work collaboratively, we succeed collectively.” The meeting participants include biomanufacturing partners from 15 countries in the Programme, leading experts, industry, civil society representatives, and funders. During the five-day meeting, participants will share progress and discuss critical enablers for the sustainability of the Programme such as intellectual property issues and regulatory aspects, as well as the science of mRNA technologies and key applications relevant to LMICs in other disease areas such as HIV and tuberculosis. The COVID-19 pandemic has underscored that gross inequity exists in access to health products, especially vaccines.
translations.reference: "Ngiyajabula ukuba lapha eKapa kanye nababambisani bethu ukuzokweseka imodeli egcinekayo yokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe mRNA ukunikeza amazwe anemali engenayo encane kuya kwephakathi nendawo ukuthola ngokulingana umgomo kanye neminye imikhiqizo yezempilo esindisa izimpilo zabantu," kusho uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Ngijabule kakhulu ngokuzuziwe kubona bonke ababambe iqhaza kulephrojekthi,ngaphansi kweminyaka emibili sesikhombisile ukuthi uma sisebenza ngokubambisana, siphumelela sonke." Ababambiqhaza bomhlangano kufaka ababambisani bomkhiqizo wasemazweni angu-15 oHlelweni, ongoti abaphambili, imboni abameli bomphakathi kanye nabaxhasimali. Ngesikhathi somhlangano wezinsuku esinhlanu, ababambiqhaza bazokwabelana ngokuqhubeka baxoxe ngokubucayi kwezinto zokugcineka koHlelo njengezinkinga zegunyabunikazi nezindlela zokulawula kanyenesayensi yezobuchwepheshe be-mRNA nokusebenza okubalulekile okuhlobene neLMIC kwezinye izndawo zezifo njengeHIV nesifo sofuba. Ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 sekukale ngaphansi ukuthi ukungalingani okuphelele kukhona ekutholeni imikhiqizo yezempilo, ikakhulukazi imigomo.
translations.hypothesis: "Ngijabule kakhulu ukuba lapha eCape Town nomabhizinisi ethu ukuze sisekele uhlelo oluqhubekayo lokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe be-mRNA, ukuze izizwe ezinezimali ezincane nezinde ezikhulu zithole ukufinyelela okulungile kwezigebengu nezinye izinto zempilo ezilondoloza impilo," kusho uMqondisi Jikelele we-WHO, uDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Ngiyaziqhenya kakhulu ngempumelelo yabo bonke ababambe iqhaza kuleli phrojekthi; kungakapheli iminyaka emibili, sibonise ukuthi uma sisebenzisana, siyaphumelela ndawonye." Ababambiqhaza kule nkhundla bathola abaxhasi bokukhiqiza izinto zebhayoloji abavela ezweni elingu-15 kule Program, ochwepheshe abakhulu, izinkampani, abamele iinhlangano zomphakathi, kanye nabaxhasi. Phakathi kwaleli nkhundla elilanga elihlanu, ababambiqhaza bazohlanganyela ngempumelelo futhi bazoxoxa ngezinto ezibalulekile ezisiza ukuqhubeka kwale Program, njengengxenye yobunikazi kanye nezindinganiso, kanye nesayensi yobuchwepheshe be-mRNA kanye nezicelo ezibalulekile ezihlobene nezizwe ezinezimali ezincane nezinde ezikhulu kwezinye izigcineka ezifana ne-HIV kanye ne-tuberculosis. Igciwane le-COVID-19 ligqugquzele ukuthi kukhona ukungalingani okukhulu ekufinyeleleni ezintweni zempilo, ikakhulukazi izigebengu.

translations.source: As of March 2023, more than three years after WHO declared COVID-19 a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC), 69.7% of the global population had received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. Notably, this proportion still remains below 30% in low-income countries (LICs) . This Programme aims to contribute to equitable access to mRNA vaccines by increasing the distribution of sustainable manufacturing capacity across LMICs, enhancing regional and inter-regional collaborations, and developing and empowering a local workforce through tailored and inclusive training and expert support. What is unique in the mRNA Technology Transfer model is the multilateral process that allows sharing of technologies to multiple recipients so that through local and regional production those in need can be reached rapidly. Dr Phaahla, Minister of Health South Africa, said: “What we see here today, is a moment in history, a Programme that is aimed at empowering LMICs through a global collaborative network.
translations.reference: Kusukela ngoNdasa 2023, ngaphezu kweminyaka emithathu ngemva kokuthi Iwho imemezele iCOVID-19 njengePublic Health of International Concern (PHEIC), u-69.7% wesibalo sabantu emhlabeni sebethole okungenani idosi eyodwa yomgomo weCOVID-19. Okuqaphelekayo lengxenye izohlala ingaphansi kuka-30% emazweni anemali engenayo encane (amaLIC). Loli Hlelo luhlose ukuxhasa ekutholeno okulinganayo emigomweni ye-mRNA ngokunyusa ukuhambisa kwamandla okukhiqiza okugcinekayo kuwona wonke amaLMIC, ukwandisa okwesifunda nokubambisana kwaphakathi nezifunda nokudevelopha nokusiza ukusebenza kwasendaweni ngokwenziwa kokuqeqeshwa nokwesekwa ngongoti. Yikuphi okwehlukile kumodeli yoKudluliselwa kweZobuchwepheshe kwe-mRNA kuhlelo olunezinto eziningi oluvumela ukwabelana ngobuchwepheshe,ukuthola okuningi ukuze ukukhiqizwa ngokwesifunda nendawo kulabo abadingayo kungafinyelela ngokuphindiwe. UDkt Phaahla, uNgqongqoshe weZempilo eNingizimu Afrika, uthe: "Esikubona namhlanje lapha,umzumzu womlando, uHlelo oluhlose ukusiza iLMIC ngohlelokuxhumana lokubambisana emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: Njengoba kwakungokunye ngoMashi ka-2023, eminyakeni emithathu ngaphezulu ngemuva kokuba i-WHO yasho ukuthi i-COVID-19 iyinkinga yezempilo yomphakathi yamazwe ngamazwe, u-69.7% wabantu bomhlaba wonke bathole okungenani idosi eyodwa yevini yokuqedela i-COVID-19. Okubalulekile, leli nani liyasebenza kakhulu ezweni elingu-30% ezweni elinamandla ezomnotho aphansi (LICs). Lolu Hlelo luhlose ukusiza ukuthi kufinyelelwe ngendlela elinganiselweyo kwi-vaccines ze-mRNA ngokwandisa ukusatshalaliswa kwamandla okukhiqiza aqhubekayo ezweni elinamandla ezomnotho aphansi (LMICs), ukuthuthukisa ukubambisana kwasendaweni nakwezinye izifunda, kanye nokuthuthukisa nokunika amandla umsebenzi wasendaweni ngokuqeqeshwa okuhlukile nokufaka wonke umuntu kanye nokusekelwa kwezobuchwepheshe. Okuhlukile ngohlelo lokuqaliswa kobuchwepheshe be-mRNA ukuthi kukhona inqubo yobambiswano phakathi kwezizwe evumela ukwabiwa kobuchwepheshe ezinkampanini eziningi ukuze, ngokuqashiswe ukukhiqizwa kwendawo nasemiphakathini, labo abadinga kutholakale ngokushesha. UDkt. Phaahla, uMnyango weZempilo waseNingizimu Afrika, uthe: "Lokho sibubona lapha namuhla, yisikhathi emlandweni, uhlelo oluhlose ukunika amandla amazwe anamandla ezomnotho aphansi ngobambiswano lomhlaba wonke."

translations.source: I am thrilled to see the progress made in such a relatively short time and welcome the support from so many different countries - countries like South Africa that have a strong vibrant biomanufacturing capacity and that are willing to work together, learn from and share with each other.” Minister Blade Nzimande of Higher Education and Science, said: “Ours is the vision of the mRNA Technology Transfer Hub beyond just COVID-19. The capabilities we are building are looking to empower us to deal with other future pandemics whose vaccines could use the same mRNA technology platform. It is a vision that has set its eyes on diseases that are prevalent in our environments such as Malaria, Tuberculosis and HIV and AIDS.” This occasion also marks an important milestone for the Programme with the inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen in Cape Town in the presence of Dr. Tedros and Dr. Matshidiso Moeti WHO Regional Director for Africa, Charles Gore Executive Director of MPP and the Honorable Ministers who took part in a ribbon cutting ceremony at Afrigen.
translations.reference: Ngiyajabula ukubona inqubekela phambili eyenziwe esikhathini esifishane kangaka, siyakwamukela ukwesekwa okusuka emazweni amaningi ahlukene-amazwe afana neNingizimu Afrika anokukhiqizwa okuqinile anamandla, futhi sizimisele ukusebenza ndawonye, ukufunda nokwabelana kuthina sonke." Ungqongqoshe Blade Nzimande weMfundo ePhakeme neSayensi, uthe: "Umbono wethu weHabhu yoKudlulisela ubuchwepheshe be-mRNA kungaphezu kweCOVID-19 nje. Amandla okuthi siyakha afuna usizo kuthina ukubhekana nobhubhane lwesikhathi esizayo imigomo yalo engasebenzisa inkundla efanayo yobuchwepheshe be-mRNA. Kungumbono osubeke amehlo awo ekubhekaneni nezifo ezivamile ezindaweni zethu njengoMalaleveva, isifo sofuba, iHIV ne-AIDS." Lomcimbi uphinde umake uhambo olubalulekile loHlelo nokwethulwa kwendawo yeHabhu yobuchwepheshe ne-mRNA e-Afrigen eKapa kukhona uDkt Tedros noDkt Matshidiso Moeti weWHO Regional Director for Afrika, Charles Gore uMqondisi oMkhulu weMPP kanye noNgqongqoshe abahlonishwayo ababamba iqhaza ekusikweni kweribhini emcimbini e-Afrigen.
translations.hypothesis: Ngijabule kakhulu ukubona ukuthuthuka okwenziwe ngalesi sikhathi esifushane, futhi ngiyawumukela ukwesekwa okuvela ezweni eziningi ezihlukene - izizwe ezifana neNingizimu Afrika ezinezikhungo ezikhulu zokukhiqiza izinto zempilo futhi ezikwazi ukusebenzisana, ukufunda kwelinye ilungu kanye nokwabelana. UMnyango weMfundo Ephakeme kanye Nesayensi, uMnuz. Blade Nzimande, uthe: "Umbono wethu walesi Hhubi lobuchwepheshe be-mRNA awuqedi nje kuphela kwi-COVID-19. Amakhono esakhiayo siyazama ukusenza sibe namandla ukubhekana nezinye izifo ezinkulu zesikhathi esizayo, lapho izivini zazo zingasebenzisa le teknoloji efanayo ye-mRNA. Kungumbono onomthelela ezifweni ezitholakala ezindaweni zethu, ezifana ne-Malaria, i-Tuberculosis kanye ne-HIV kanye ne-AIDS." Leli nkomba futhi imakaza umkhakha obalulekile ohlelweni, ngokuvulwa kwesikhungo sobuchwepheshe be-mRNA e-Afrigen e-Cape Town, khona lapho uDkt. Tedros noDkt. Matshidiso Moeti, oyiSikhulu Sezindaba Se-WHO eMelika, kanye noCharles Gore, iSikhulu Esiphezulu se-MPP, kanye noMnyango oHloniphekile ababambe iqembu lokugqiba umoya e-Afrigen.

translations.source: Professor Petro Terblanche, Executive Director of Afrigen said: “The entire Afrigen team are thrilled to reach this important milestone with the completion of the mRNA technology platform. This platform is housed within the end-to-end mRNA vaccine development and production facility where the mRNA Hub Covid 19 vaccine candidate AfriVac 2121 is currently in scale-up phase. Over the last 18 months, Afrigen has undergone an incredible transformation with the support of a network of partners and mentors enabled by this Programme. We have grown our capability and capacity to meet the highest quality standards of mRNA vaccine development, serving the objective to build sustainable capacity in LMICs to produce mRNA vaccines”. Afrigen has successfully established a COVID-19 vaccine manufacturing process at a laboratory scale and is currently scaling up that process to a level suitable for manufacturing vaccine batches to be used in Phase I/ II clinical trials to GMP standards.
translations.reference: USolwazi Petro Terblance, uMqondisi oMkhulu we-Afrigen, uthe: "Iqembu lonke le-Afrigen liyajabula ukufika kulokhu okubalulekile nokuqedwa kwenkundla yezobuchwepheshe be-mRNA. Lenkundla inendawo ekupheleni kokuthuthukiswa komgomo mRNA nokukhiqizwa kwendawo lapho ihabhu ye-mRNA yomgomo weCOVID-19 ikhandidethi AfriVac 2121 njengamanje isezingeni lesikalo esiphezulu. Ngaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-18 Afrigen isihambe uguquko olukhulu ngokwesekwa kohlelokuxhumana lababambisani nabeluleki abenza loluHlelo. Sesikhulise amandla ethu nokukwazi ukuhlangabezana nezinga elihle eliphezulu lokuthuthukiswa komgomo we-mRNA, ukusiza injongo yokwakha ukukwazi okugcinekile kumaLMIC ukukhiqiza imigomo ye-mRNA.". I-Afrigen isisungulwe ngempumelelo uhlelo lokukhiqizwa kwemigomo yeCOVID-19 ngesikalo selebhu njengamanje kuyanyuka uhlelo ngezinga elifanele lokukhiqiza ngezigaba imigomo ukuthi isetshenziswe ngesigaba sesibili noma sokuqala sokuhlola kwezokwelapha kumazinga eGMP.
translations.hypothesis: UMprofesa Petro Terblanche, uMqondisi Omkhulu we-Afrigen, uthe: "UQembu lonke lwe-Afrigen lujabule kakhulu ngokufinyelela kuleli zinto ezibalulekile ngokugcwaliseka kwephulathomu yobuchwepheshe be-mRNA. Le phulathomu itholakala ngaphakathi kwegeyini yokuqeqeshwa nokukhiqizwa kwezivakamo ze-mRNA, lapho okukhiqizwa kwayo okuyi-AfriVac 2121, okuyiphutha lesivakamo se-Covid-19, manje sisesigabeni sokukhuliswa. Kulezi zinyanga ezingu-18 ezidlule, i-Afrigen ibe nokuguquka okumangalisayo ngosizo lwenethiwekhi yobambiswano kanye nabaxhasi, okwenzelwe yile Program. Sikukhulisile amakhono ethu kanye namandla ethu ukuze sihlelele izindinganiso eziphezulu zekhwalithi zokuqeqeshwa kwezivakamo ze-mRNA, ngokusiza ukwakha amandla aqhubekayo ezweni elingaphansi kwezomnotho (LMIC) ukuze kukhiqizwe izivakamo ze-mRNA." I-Afrigen isungule ngempumelelo inqubo yokuveliswa kwezivakamo ze-COVID-19 endaweni yaselebhu, futhi manje ikhuliswa leyo inqubo ukuze ifanele ukukhiqiza izingqikithi zezivakamo ezosetshenziswa ezivivinyweni zocwaningo zama-Phase I/II ngokuya ngemithetho ye-GMP.

translations.source: In a parallel process, Afrigen will continue to carry out training and technology transfer to the network partners. The funders play a crucial role in supporting the Programme with total funding to date at US$ 117 million and France being the first to fund the mRNA technology transfer work. Present at the meeting were representatives from the European Commission, Belgium, Germany, as well as Norway, Canada, African Union, South Africa, and the ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, GlobalAffairs Canada’s Director General for Southern and Eastern Africa said: “Canada reaffirms its continued support of the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme and we are delighted to announce a further contribution of 15 million Canadian dollars at the meeting today. This brings Canada’s total contribution to the Programme up to 45 million Canadian dollars.
translations.reference: Kuhlelo oluhambisanayo, i-Afrigen izoqhubeka nokwenza ukuqeqesha nokudlulisela ezobuchwepheshe kubabambisani bohlelokuxhumana. Abaxhasi badlala indima ebalulekile ekwesekeni uHlelo ngesamba soxhaso kuze kube yimanje ngezigidi ezingu-117 neFrance ekubeni ngeyokuqala ukuxhasa umsebenzi wokudlulisela ezobuchwepheshe be-mRNA. Ababekhona emhlanganweni bekungabamele abaphuma e-European Commission, iBelgium, iGermany kanye neNorway, iCanada, i-Africa Union, iNingizimu Afrika kanye ne-ELMA Foundation. UCaroline Delany, uMqondisi Jikelele weGlobal Affairs Canada waseSouthern and Eastern Afrika, uthe: "iCanada iqinisekisa ukuqgubeka nokweseka kwe-mRNA Technology Transfer Programme futhi siyajabula ukumemezela ukuqhubeka kokunikelwa kwezigidi ezingu-15 ngamadola aseCanada emhlanganweni namhlanje. Lokhu kuletha iminikelo eyisamba yeCanada kuHlelo lwezigidi ezingu-45 kumadola aseCanada.
translations.hypothesis: Nengxenye yomkhuba ohlukene, i-Afrigen izoqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngokuqeqeshwa kanye nokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe kubalingani bayo. Abaxhasi badlala indima obalulekile ekuxhaseni le Phrojekthi, kanti kuze kube manje, imali esetshenzisiwe ingu-$117 million, kanti iFrance ibaluleke kakhulu ekuxhaseni umsebenzi wokudluliselwa kobuchwepheshe be-mRNA. Kwileli hlangothi, kwaba khona abamele iKhomishini yaseYurophu, iBelgiyamu, iJalimane, kanye neNorway, iCanada, i-African Union, iNingizimu Afrika, kanye ne-ELMA Foundation. U-Caroline Delany, oyiSikhulu Jikelele we-GlobalAffairs Canada waseNingizimu neNtshonalanga ye-Afrika, uthe: "I-Canada iqinisekisa ukuthi izoqhubeka nokuxhasa iPhrojekthi Yokudluliselwa Kwezobuchwepheshe ze-mRNA, futhi sijabule ukumemezela ukufakwa kwemali eyengeziwe engu-$15 million ye-Canadian kuleli hlangothi namuhla. Lokhu kenza ukuthi umnikelo wonke we-Canada kule Phrojekthi ube ngu-$45 million ye-Canadian."

translations.source: These funds support the running of the Hub in South Africa as well as network partners around the world. We firmly believe in the importance of building capacity at local and regional level”. Mr Martin Seychell, Deputy Executive Director European Commission, said. “The EC has already contributed €40 million to the establishment of the mRNA technology transfer Hub and has recently signed another grant with the EIB for €15,5 million to facilitate the expansion of vaccines manufacturing capacity. This is part of the overall investment under the EU Global Gateway strategy, where more than €1 Billion have been mobilised under the Team Europe Initiative on Manufacturing health products. It is now particularly important to also address possible regulatory and demand bottlenecks, to ensure not only production of vaccines of the highest standard in all regions of the world, but also rapid and equitable access to those vaccines.”
translations.reference: Lokhu kwesekwa koxhasomali ekusebenzeni kweHabhu eNingizimu Afrika kanye nababambisani bohlelokuxhumana emhlabeni wonke. Siyakhulwa kakhulu ekubalulekeni kokwakha ukukwazi ezingeni lendawo nelesifunda". UMnu Martin Seychell, uSekela Mqondisi omkhulu we-European Commission esho. "I-EC isivele ixhase ngezigidi ezingu-€40 ukusungula ihabhu yokudlulisela yezobuchwepheshe kweMRNA futhi isanda kusayina esinye isibonelelo nge-EIB kwezigidi ezingu-€15.5 ukusiza ukwandisa amandla okukhiqizwa kwemigomo. Lokhu yingxenye yotshalomali lonke ngaphansi kwesu le EU Global Gateway, lapho ngaphezu kwesigidigidi esisodwa sama-euro selihlanganisiwe ngaphansi komzamo weTeam Europe ekukhiqizweni kwemikhiqizo yezempilo. Manje sekubalulekile ukuphinde sibhekane nokulawula okungenzeka nokukhona okufunakalyo, ukuqinisekisa ukuthiakukhona ukukhiqiza kuphela kwemigomo esezingeni eliphezulu kuzona zonke izifunda emhlabeni kodwa nokuphindeka kokutholakala okulinganayo kwaleyo migomo."
translations.hypothesis: Lezi zimali zisebenzisa ukwenza umsebenzi we-Hub eNingizimu Afrika kanye nabalingani beminikelo emhlabeni wonke. Siyakholwa kakhulu kububudlelwano bokwakha amandla endaweni yangakini kanye nasemiphakathini edolobhaneni. UMnuz Martin Seychell, iPhini likaMqondisi Omkhulu weKhomishini yaseYurophu, uthe: "I-EC isivele inikele ngemali engu-€40 million ekwakhiweni le-mRNA technology transfer Hub futhi kumanje isinebhiziniso elisha elinesikhungo se-EIB engu-€15,5 million ukuze kusize ekwandiseni amandla okukhiqiza izivakamo. Lokhu kuyingxenye yomzuzo omkhulu ngaphansi kohlelo lwe-EU Global Gateway, lapho imali engaphezu kuka-€1 Billion isetshenzisiwe ngaphansi kohlelo lwe-Team Europe Initiative ekukhiqizweni kwezinto zempilo. Manje kubaluleke kakhulu ukuthi futhi sibhekane nezinkinga ezidingekayo ezinkolo kanye nezidingo, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukhiqizwa kuphela izivakamo zizinga eliphezulu kuzo zonke izifunda zomhlaba, kodwa futhi ukuthi kufinyelelwe kuzo ngokushesha futhi ngendlela elinganiselwe."

translations.source: Key leadership appointments made to drive WHO strategic direction and initiatives The World Health Organization (WHO) has appointed five new senior figures to its headquarters leadership team in Geneva. The new appointments follow the reappointment of Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus to his second five-year term as Director-General. The overall leadership team has been consolidated to align with the Organization’s priorities for the next five years and will work closely with the Director-General to drive forward these priorities and WHO’s ambitious transformation agenda. To accelerate progress on implementation of WHO’s 13th General Programme of Work (GPW13), and achievement of its “triple billion” targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals, WHO’s work for the coming five years is focused on five priorities:
translations.reference: Ukuqokwa kobuholi oubalulekile okwenziwelwe ukuhambisa indlela yesu nemizamo yeWHO Inhlangano yeZempilo yoMhlaba (WHO) sebeqoke izikhulu eziphezulu iminyaka emihlanu ukuba ngabaholi eqembini labaholi ekomkhulu eGeneva. Ukuqokwa okusha kulandela ukuphinde kuqokwe uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus kuhlandla lesibili leminyaka emihlanu njengoMqondisi Jikelele. Ubuholi bonkebeqembu buhlanganiswe ukuhambisana nokuhamba phambili kweNhlangano kuleminyaka emihlanu ezayo nokusebenzisana noMqondisi Jikelele ukuhambisa okuya kukhona okuhamba phambili ne-ajenda yentshisekelo yoguquko lweWHO. Ukuqhuba inqubekela phambili yokwenza kweWHO 13th General Programme of WORK (GPW13) ukuthola okuqondiwe "okungezigidigidi ezintathu" nokuhlobene nezempilo zeSuatainable Development Goals, umsebenzi weWHO kuleminyaka emihlanu ezayo egxile kokuhamba phambili okuhlanu:
translations.hypothesis: Izikhulu ezibalulekile zikoqokwe ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi i-WHO iyalandela izinhloso nezinhlelo zayo. Uhlelo Lwezempilo Lasezingeni Lomhlaba (WHO) uqoke izikhulu ezintsha ezinhlanu ukuze zibe yingxenye yeqembu labaholi kule nhlanganisela yayo eGeneva. Lezi zikoqokwe ezintsha zalandela ukuvuselelwa kukaDkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus esikhundleni sakhe njengoMlawuli-Jeneral, okuyisikhathi esingu-5. Eqembeni lonke labaholi, kwenziwe ukuguqulwa ukuze kuhambisane nezinto ezibalulekile zenhlangano kule minyaka emihlanu ezayo, futhi leli qembu lizosebenzisana ngokuqinile noMlawuli-Jeneral ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lezi zinto ezibalulekile kanye nohlelo lokuguquka olukhulu lwe-WHO zithuthukiswa. Ukuze kukhuthazwe ukuthuthuka ekwenzeni izinhlelo ze-WHO, ikakhulu uhlelo lwayo loku-13 (GPW13), kanye nokufinyelela ezinhlotshweni zayo ezithi "izigidi ezintathu," kanye nezinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezisengozini yezempilo, umsebenzi we-WHO kule minyaka emihlanu ezayo ugxile kulezi zinto ezintathu ezibalulekile:

translations.source: making a paradigm shift towards promoting health and preventing disease by addressing its root causes; radically reorienting health systems towards primary health care; strengthening the systems for health emergency preparedness and response; harnessing the power of science, innovation, data and technologies to advance health; and strengthening WHO as the leading authority on global health and to achieve impact in countries.
translations.reference: ukwenza ukulandelana ngendlela okuya ekugqugquzeleni ezempilo nokuvikela isifo ngokubhekana nomsuka ozidalayo; ushintsho olwenzekayo kuzinhlelo zezempilo okuya ekunakekelweni kwezempilo zokuqala; ukuqinisa izinhlelo zokuzilungiselela okuphuthumayo nokuphendula; amahhanisi amandla esayensi,ukwenza kabusha,idatha nezobuchwepheshe ukwenzangcono ezempilo; kanye nokuqinisa iWHO njengabanegunya lokuhola kwezempilo zomhlaba nokuthola umthelela emazweni.
translations.hypothesis: Ukuguqula indlela esiqondene ngayo ezempilo, ngokugxila ekukhuthazeni impilo nokuqapha izifo ngokubhekana nezimbangela zazo; ukuguqula ngokuphelele izinhlelo zezempilo ukuze zibe ngokuqondile ezempilo yomphakathi; ukuqinisa izinhlelo zokulungiselela nezempendulo ezinkingeni zezempilo; ukusebenzisa amandla esayensi, ubuciko, idatha kanye nezobuchwepheshe ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo; kanye nokwenza i-WHO ibe ngumphakathi oholayo ezempilweni emhlabeni jikelele, ukuze kukhuthazwe ukuguquka ezweni ngalunye.

translations.source: The headquarters leadership team, comprising equal numbers of women and men, will work jointly with WHO regional and country offices. New members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Jeremy Farrar will become WHO’s Chief Scientist as of 8 May 2023. The appointment of Dr Farrar was previously announced in December 2022. In this role Dr Farrar will oversee the Science Division, bringing together the best experts and networks in science and innovation from around the world to guide, develop and deliver high quality health policies and services to the people who need them most. Prior to joining WHO Dr Farrar was Director of the Wellcome Trust.
translations.reference: Qembu labaholi ekomkhulu, linenamba elinganayo kubantu besifazane nabesilisa, bazosebenza ngokuhlanganyela nesifunda seWHO namahhovisi emazweni. Amalungu amasha eqembu lobuholi ekomkhulu:uDkt Jeremy Farrar ozoba nguSosayensi omkhulu weWHO kusukela ngomhlaka-8 kuNhlaba 2023. Ukuqokwa kukaDkt Farrar kwamenyezelwa ngoZibandlela 2022. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Farrar uzobheka umkhakha wezesayensi, ukuhlanganisa ndawonye ngoti abaphambili nohlelokuxhumana kwezesayensi nokwenza kabusha emhlabeni wonke ukuyalela, ukudevelopha nokuhambisa ezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu inqubomgomo nemisebenzi kubantu abayidinga kakhulu. Ngaphambi kokujoyina iWHO uDkt Farrar ubenguMqondisi weWellcome Trust.
translations.hypothesis: Iqembu labaholi elikhulu, elinezikhulu ezilinganayo zabesifazane namadoda, lizosebenzisana ngokuqhubekayo nezikhungo zendawo kanye nezifunda ze-WHO. Amalungu amasha eqembu labaholi elikhulu: UDkt. Jeremy Farrar uzoba umphathi wezesayensi we-WHO kusukela ngomhlaka 8 Meyi 2023. Ukubekwa kukaDkt. Farrar kukhishwe ngaphambilini ngoDisemba 2022. Kule ndima, uDkt. Farrar uzobe ephatha umnyango wezesayensi, ahlanganise ochwepheshe abahamba phambili kanye nezikhungo zezemfundo emhlabeni jikelele ukuze abafundise, bathuthukise futhi bahlinzeke ngeminikelo kanye nezinsizakalo zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu kubantu abadinga kakhulu. Ngaphambi kokujoyina i-WHO, uDkt. Farrar wayeyilungu lebhodi le-Wellcome Trust.

translations.source: Before joining Wellcome in 2013 Dr Farrar spent 17 years as Director of the Clinical Research Unit at the Hospital for Tropical Diseases in Vietnam where his research interests were in global health with a focus on emerging infectious diseases. Dr Farrar is a clinician researcher with a medical degree and a PhD. Dr Ailan Li will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Healthier Populations as of 8 May 2023. In this role Dr Li will oversee the Organization’s efforts to promote better health and well-being through interventions relating to the environmental, social, and economic determinants of health, including climate change, tobacco control, chemical safety, road safety, food systems and nutrition, physical activity, air pollution and radiation, through a One Health approach. Dr Li has been serving as the WHO Representative to the Kingdom of Cambodia since 15 July 2019.
translations.reference: Ngaphambi kokujoyina Wellcome ngo-2013 uDkt Farrar uchithe iminyaka engu-17 njengoMqondisi weClinical Reaserch Unit esiBhadlela seTropical Diseases eVietnam lapho ukucwaninga kwakhe kwakugxile kwezempilo emhlabeni ngokugxila ekuveleni kwezifo ezithelelanayo. UDkt Farrar ungumcwaningi wezokwelapha neziqu zobudokotela kanye nePHD. UDkt Ailan Li uzoba nguMsizi Mqondisi Jikelele weUniversal Health Coverage,Healthier Populations kusukela ngomhlaka-8 kuNhlaba 2023. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Li izobheka imizamo yeNhlangano ukugqugquzela ukubangcono kwezempilo nokuphila ngokungenelela okuhlobene nezendawo ezenhlalakahle, ezempilo zokubhekene nezomnotho okufaka ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukulawula ugwayi, ukuphepha kwamakhemikhali, ukuphepha komgwaqo, izinhlelo zokudla nokunomsoco, ukusebenza siqu, ukungcoliswa komoya nokwemisebe yelana ngendlela ye-One Health. UDkt Li ubelokhu esebenza njengomele iWHO eKingdom of Cambodia kusukela ngomhlaka-15 kuNtulikazi 2019.
translations.hypothesis: Ngaphambi kokujoyina i-Wellcome ngonyaka ka-2013, uDkt. Farrar ube ngumphathi weYunithi Yokucwaninga Kliniki eSikhumuleni Sezifo ZamaPulazi eVietnam, lapho izifiso zakhe zocwaningo zabe zikhoma empilweni yomhlaba wonke, kakhulu ezifo ezisatshalaliswa ezintsha. UDkt. Farrar ungumucwaningi onobungcweti bezokwelapha, oneziqu zezokwelapha kanye nedokotela yezinkolo (PhD). UDkt. Ailan Li uzoba umphathi omkhulu osizayo wezokwelapha kubo bonke abantu, kanye nempilo yabantu, kusukela ngomhlaka 8 Meyi 2inhloko 2023. Kule ndima, uDkt. Li uzobe ebhekele imizamo yenhlangano yokuthuthukisa impilo nokukhululeka, ngokusebenzisa izindlela ezihlobene nezinto ezithinta impilo, ezifana nezimo zemvelo, ezomphakathi, kanye nezezomnotho, okubalwa ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukulawulwa komu, ukuphepha kwezakhamisi, ukuphepha emigwaqweni, izinhlelo zokudla kanye nokudla, ukuzivocavoca, ukungcola komoya kanye nokutshekelwa, ngendlela eyodwa yomhlaba wonke. UDkt. Li usebenze njengoMelozi we-WHO eMbusweni waseCambodia kusukela ngomhlaka 15 Julayi 2019.

translations.source: Prior to this role, Dr Li served as Regional Emergency Director for the WHO Health Emergencies Programme in the WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific. Dr Li holds a medical degree and degree in health social sciences. Dr Yukiko Nakatani will become Assistant Director-General for Access to Medicines and Health Products as of 2 May 2023. In this role Dr Nakatani will oversee the development and implementation of WHO’s norms and policies to ensure equitable access to quality medicines, vaccines and diagnostics for all populations everywhere, including for preventing and responding to epidemics. Dr Nakatani has been serving as the Director of the Cancer and Disease Control Division of the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare and as the Technical Advisor to the Minister of State for the COVID-19 Vaccination Task Force in Japan.
translations.reference: Ngaphambi kwalesisikhundla, uDkt Li wasebenza njenge Regional Emergency Director weWHO Health Emergencies Programme eHhovisi leSifunda leWHO eWestern Pacific. UDkt Li uneziqu zobudokotela neziqu kwezesayensi yenhlalakahle yezempilo. UDkt Yukiko Nakatani uzoba nguMszi woMqondisi Jikelele wokungena kwezemithi nokukhiqizwa nemikhiqizo yezempilo. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Nakatani uzobheka ukuthuthuka nokwenza kwemigomo yeWHO nezinqubomgomo ukuqinisekisa ukutola ukulingana kumithi efanele, imigomo kanye nokuxilongwa kusona sonke isibalo sabantu yonke indawo okufaka ukuvikela nokuphendula ku-ephidemikhi. UDKt Nakatani ususebenze njengoMqondisi woMdlavuza nedivishini yokulawula izifo eJapanese uNgqongqoshe weZmpilo,ezokusebenza nenhlalakahle njengoTechnica Advisory kuMinister of State wezokusebenza zokugoma iCOVID-19 eJapan.
translations.hypothesis: Ngaphambi kwalesi sikhala, uDkt. Li ubesebenzela njengoMqondisi Wezimo Eziphuthumayo kwiHlelo Lezimo Eziphuthumayo Zezempilo ze-WHO kwiHhovisi LeliNtshonalanga Ye-WHO yase-Pacific. UDkt. Li unomnyango wezokwelapha kanye nomnyango kwezifundo zezempilo nomphakathi. U-Dkt. Yukiko Nakatani uzoba umqondisi omkhulu osizayo kwezokufinyelela ezimpahleni zokwelapha nezinto zezempilo, kusukela ngomhlaka 2 Meyi 2023. Kulesi sikhala, uDkt. Nakatani uzobe ebhekele ukuthuthukiswa nokusebenzelwa kwemithetho nezinqubomgomo ze-WHO ukuqinisekisa ukufinyelela okulinganiselwe ezimpahleni zokwelapha ezisezingeni eliphezulu, izivakashi kanye nezinsiza zokuhlola kubantu bonke, kuwo wonke amapulazi, okubalwa nokuvimbela kanye nokuphendula izifo ezithathelwayo. U-Dkt. Nakatani usebenze njengoMqondisi weSigaba Sezifo Zokugula kanye Nokulawulwa Kwezifo seMinistri yezempilo, Umsebenzi kanye Nokunakekelwa yaseJapan, kanye njengoMahlalisi Wobuchwepheshe kumelikhithi likaMnuz. iNgqongqoshe Wezomthetho weQembu Lokusebenza Lokugcwalisa Izivakashi ze-COVID-19 eJapan.

translations.source: Dr Nakatani holds a medical degree and a PhD in public health. Dr Razia Pendse will become the Chef de Cabinet as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Pendse will head the Director-General’s Office, helping to drive the Organization’s priorities and initiatives, and will ensure alignment within the WHO leadership team and across the three levels of WHO. Dr Pendse has been serving as the Director of Healthier Populations and Noncommunicable Diseases in the WHO Regional Office for South-East Asia and was previously the WHO Representative to Sri Lanka. Dr Pendse holds a medical degree and master's degree in public health.
translations.reference: UDkt Nakatani uneziqu zobudokotela nePhD kwezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt Razia Pendse uzoba nguChef deCabinet kusukela ngomhlaka-4 kuNhlaba 2023. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Pendse uzohola iHhovisi loMqondisi Jikelele, esiza ukuhambisa iNhlangano kokuhamba phambili nemizamo, futhi uzoqinisekisa ukuhambisana neqembu lobuholi beWHO kuwona womathathu amazinga eWHO. UDkt Pendse ubesebenza njengoMqondisi weHealthier Populations and Noncommunicable Diseases kuHhovisi leSifunda leWHO eSouth-East Asia futhi wayemele iWHO eSri Lanka. UDkt Pendse uneziqu zobudokotela neziqu zemastazi kwezempilo yomphakathi.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Nakatani unomnyango wezomtholampilo kanye nediploma ye-PhD kwezokunakekelwa komphakathi. UDkt. Razia Pendse uzoba yi-Chef de Cabinet kusukela ngomhlaka 4 Meyi 2023. Kule ndima, uDkt. Pendse uzobamba iqhaza ekuholeni ihhovisi likaMqondisi-Jeneral, ezosiza ekukhuthazeni izinhloso kanye nezinhlelo zomgijima zenhlangano, futhi uzoqinisekisa ukuhambisana phakathi kweqembu abaholi be-WHO kanye nezinkundla ezintathu ze-WHO. UDkt. Pendse usebenze njengoMlawuli wezokunakekelwa Kwabantu Abanempilo kanye nezifo ezingabonakali kwiHhovisi lendawo ye-WHO yase-South-East Asia, futhi ngaphambilini wayengummeleli we-WHO eSri Lanka. UDkt. Pendse unomnyango wezomtholampilo kanye nediploma yamasikhombiso kwezokunakekelwa komphakathi.

translations.source: Dr Jérôme Salomon will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Communicable and Noncommunicable Diseases as of 17 April 2023. In this role Dr Salomon will oversee a broad portfolio of technical programmes covering HIV, viral hepatitis, sexually-transmitted infections, tuberculosis, malaria, neglected tropical diseases, mental health, substance use disorders, and noncommunicable diseases such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, chronic respiratory diseases and cancer. Dr Salomon has been serving as the Director-General for Health at the Ministry of Health and Prevention of France. He was a Member of the WHO Executive Board prior to his appointment and has extensive experience in health systems management, communicable diseases and international public health. Dr Salomon holds a medical degree, a master’s degree in public health and a PhD in epidemiology.
translations.reference: UDkt Jerome Salomon uzoba Ngumsizi waMqondisi Jikelele wezokukhavwa kweZempilo eMhlabeni, izifo okuxhunyanwa ngazo nokungaxhunyanwa ngazo kusukela ngomhlaka-17 Mbasa 2023. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Salamon uzobheka iphothifoliyo enkulu yezinhlelo zezobuchwepheshe ezibheka iHIV, igciwane lehephathithisi, ukuthelelana kwezifo zocansi, isifo sofuba, umalalaeveva, izifo ezidumile ezinganakiwe, ezempilo zengqondo, isifo sokusebenzisa izidakamizwa izifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo njengezifo zenhliziyo, ushukena, izifo zondendende zokuphefumua kanye nomdlavuza. UDkt Salomon ubesebenza njengoMqondisi Jikelele weZempilo kubungqongqoshe beZempilo nokuvikela eFrance. Wayeyilungu leBhodi labaphathi beWHO ngaphambi kokuqokwa kwakhe futhi nesipiliyoni sakhe esikhulu ekuphathweni kwezinhlelo zempilo,izifo okuxhunyanwa ngazo nezempilo yomphakathi kumazwe angaphandle. UDkt Salomon uneziqu zobudokotela,izqu zemastazi kwezempilo yomphakathi kanye nePHD ku-ephidemiloji.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Jérôme Salomon uzoba umphathi omkhulu osizayo kwezempilo ezibanzi, kanye nezifo ezisabalalayo nezengqondo, kusukela ngomhlaka 17 Ephreli 2023. Kule ndima, uDkt. Salomon uzobe ebhekele uhlelo olubanzi lwezinhlelo zochwepheshe ezihlanganisa i-HIV, i-hepatitis eyomile, izifo ezisabalalayo ngokoxinwa, i-tuberculosis, i-malaria, izifo zendalo ezihlulekile, ezempilo yengqondo, ukusetshenziswa kwezinto eziyingozi, kanye nezifo ezingabonakali ezifana nezifo zekhadiyakhadi, ukhoma, izifo zokuphefumula ezihlala njalo kanye nokugula kwe-cancer. UDkt. Salomon usebenze njengoMphathi Omkhulu Wezempilo eMnyangweni Wezempilo kanye Nokuvikelwa waseFrance. Ngaphambi kokufakwa kwakhe, wayeyilungu leBhodi Eliqondile le-WHO futhi unolwazi olunzulu ekulawulweni kwezinhlelo zezempilo, ezisabalalayo kanye nezempilo yomphakathi yamazwe ngamazwe. UDkt. Salomon unomnyango wezokwelapha, udegri yomfanyelwa kwezempilo yomphakathi kanye nedokotri yomnyango kwe-epidemiology.

translations.source: The portfolios of existing members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Samira Asma will continue as the Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact. Dr Asma oversees a portfolio which ensures that health data are reliable and accessible, and are used to improve health outcomes worldwide, including tracking and accelerating progress towards the triple billion targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals. Prior to joining WHO in 2018, Dr Asma held leadership positions at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) for over two decades. She holds a doctorate degree in dental surgery and a master's degree in public health. Dr Bruce Aylward has been appointed Assistant Director-General of the Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division as of 4 May 2023.
translations.reference: Lamaphothifolo amalungu akhona eqembu lobuholi ekomkhulu: uDkt Samira Asma uzoqhubeka njengoMsizi Mqondisi Jikelele weMininingo, ukuhlaziya nokulethwa kwemithelela. UDkt Asma ubheke iphothifoliyo eqinisekisa ukuthi idatha yezempilo ikhona futhi iyatholakala, futhi isetshenziswa ukwenzangcono imiphumela yezempilo emhlabeni wonke, okufaka ukulandelela nokuqhuba ukuqhubeka okubheke kokuqondiwe okungamabhiliyoni amathathu futhi okuhlobene nesempilo yeSustainable Development Goals. Ngaphambi kokujoyina iWHO ngo-2018, uDkt Asma ubambe izikhundla zobuholi e-U.S. Centers for Disease Contrel and Prevention (CDC) iminyaka engaphezu kwamashumi amabili. Uneziqu zobudokotela kwezokuhlinza amazinyo kanye neziqu kwezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt Bruce Alyward useqokelwe ukuba nguMsizi aMqondisi Jikelele weze-Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division kusuka ngomhlaka-4 kuNhlaba 2023.
translations.hypothesis: Izikhundla zabamalungu ajwayelekile eqenjini lokuhola elikulo hhovisi likapulo: UDkt. Samira Asma uzohlala esikhundleni sakhe njengoMngani omdlali weMeya Jikelele oculetshe ngolwazi, ukuhlaziywa kanye nokwethulwa kwezinqubo ezithinta impilo. UDkt. Asma unengxenye yomsebenzi eqinisekisa ukuthi ulwazi lwezempilo luyathembekile futhi lufinyeleleka, futhi lusebenziswe ukuvuselela imiphumela yezempilo emhlabeni wonke, okubalwa ukulandela nokusheshisa ukuqhubeka nokufezeka kwezinhloso ezintathu ezinkulu kanye nezinhloso zokuthuthukiswa ezisindayo ezihlobene nezempilo. Ngaphambi kokujoyina i-WHO ngo-2018, uDkt. Asma ube nezikhundla zokuhola e-U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) iminyaka engaphezu kwemibili. Unomdoko wezifundo ezinkolo zamazinyo kanye negama lendlela kwezokwelapha komphakathi. UDkt. Bruce Aylward uqokiwe njengoMngani omdlali weMeya Jikelele kwiHhovisi lezokwelapha kubo bonke abantu, kanye nohlelo lokuphila, kusukela ngomhlaka 4 Meyi 2023.

translations.source: Dr Aylward has been leading WHO’s Transformation Agenda and the Organization’s work on the multi-agency Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator (ACT-A) Hub. In his new role, Dr Aylward will drive the Organization’s agenda to transform primary health care as central to universal health coverage, as well as overseeing WHO’s work on health systems, immunization and reproductive, maternal and child health. Dr Aylward holds a medical degree and a master’s degree in public health.Dr Hanan Balkhy will continue as Assistant Director-General for Antimicrobial Resistance. Dr Balkhy provides technical and political leadership to curb the health and economic burdens of drug resistance, including through multi-sectoral collaboration with the Food and Agriculture Organization, the World Organization for Animal Health, and the United Nations Environment Programme. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Balkhy was Executive Director for Infection Prevention and Control at Saudi Arabia’s Ministry of National Guard.
translations.reference: UDkt Aylward ubehola iTransformation Agenda yeWHO kanye nomsebenzi wenhlangano kuma-ejensi amaningi okuthola amathuluzi eCOVID-19 okuqhubeka kuhabhu (ACT-A). Kundima yakhe, uDkt Aylward uzohambisa ajenda yeNhlangano yokuguqula ezokunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala njengemaphakathi lezokukhavwa kwezempilo emhlabeni kanye nokubheka umsebenzi weWHO wokusebenza kwezinhlelo zempilo, ukugoma, ukuzala, abakhulelwe kanye nezempilo yezingane. UDkt Alyward uneziqu zobudokotela kanye nemastazi yezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt Hanan Balykhy uzoqhubeka nokuba nguMszi waMqondisi Jikelele weAntimicrobial Resistance. UDkt Balkhy uzonikezela ngobuchwepheshe nobuholi bezepolitiki ukubheka ezempilo nomthwalo wezomnotho ekungavumini kwesidakamizwa,okufaka ngokubambisana kwemikhakha eminingi neNhlangano yeZolimo noKudla Inhlangano yoMhlaba yezeMpilo yeZilwane kanye neUnited Nations Environment Programme. Ngaphambi kokujoyina iWHO, uDkt Balkhy ubenguMqondisi omkhulu weWokuvikela ukuthelelana nokulawula eSaudi Arabia Ministry of Nationa Guard.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Aylward ubephinde waqondisa Uhlelo Lokuguquka lwe-WHO kanye nomsebenzi weHhovisi kuleli Hhovisi le-ACT-A, elihlose ukwenza ukufinyelela ezinsiza ezivikela kwi-COVID-19 kube lula. Endabeni yakhe entsha, uDkt. Aylward uzokhuthaza uhlelo lwe-WHO lokuguquka kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo ezisemqoka, okubalwa njengengxenye ebalulekile yokunakekelwa kwezempilo kubo bonke. Uzophinde alawule umsebenzi we-WHO ezinhlelweni zezempilo, ekugayeni, kanye nokunakekelwa kwezokuzala, kwezinsuku zokubeletha kanye nezempilo zabantwana. UDkt. Aylward unomnyango wezokwelapha kanye negama lendlela yobunhlakaniphi kwezokunakekelwa kwezempilo. UDkt. Hanan Balkhy uzolandela njengoMphathi Omkhulu Omngcwamu kwezokulwa nokuhlomisa ngamakhambi. UDkt. Balkhy unikeza ubuholi obuchwepheshe kanye nobuholi obusemthethweni ukuze kuncishiswe umthelela kwezempilo kanye nomthelela wezomnotho okubangelwa ukuhlomisa ngamakhambi, okubalwa nokubambisana nezikhungo eziningi, okuhlanganisa i-Food and Agriculture Organization, i-World Organization for Animal Health, kanye ne-United Nations Environment Programme. Ngaphambi kokujoyina i-WHO, uDkt. Balkhy wayengumphathi omkhulu wezokuvimbela nokulawula ukwelapheka kwezifo eMnyangweni Wezombusazwe waseSaudi Arabia.

translations.source: Dr Balkhy holds a medical degree with specialization in paediatric infectious diseases. Dr Catharina Boehme will become Assistant Director-General, External Relations and Governance as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Boehme will lead WHO’s strategic engagement in the areas of governance, resource mobilization and partner relations. Her portfolio will include critical Member States processes, such as their negotiation of a pandemic accord, the reform of WHO’s governance and the implementation of recommendations on sustainable financing. Dr Boehme has been serving as the Director-General’s Chef de Cabinet during which time she drove the leadership’s strategic vision, ensuring alignment across the Organization and with Member States and partners.
translations.reference: UDkt Balkhy uneziqu zobudokotela nokugxila ezifweni ezithelelanayo ezinganeni. UDkt Catharina Boehme uzoba nguMsizi kaMqondisi Jikelele weExternal Relations and Government kusukela mhlaka-4 kuNhlaba 2023. Kulesisikhundla uDkt Boehme uzohola ukuphathwa kwamasu kweWHO ezindaweni zokuphatha,ukuhlanganisa izinsizakusebenza nobudlelwano bokubambisana. Iphothifoliyo yakhe izofaka ubucayi bohlelo lweMember State, njengokuxoxisana kwabo kusivumelwano sobhubhane, ukwenza kabusha ukubusa kweWHO nokwenza kweziphakamiso ekugcinekeni kwezezimali. UDkt Boehme ubelokhu esebenza njengoMqondisi Jikelele weChef de Cabinet ngaleso sikhathi wahambisa ubuholi kumbono wesu,eqinisekisa ukuhambisana kuzona zonke izinhlangano namaMember State nababambisani.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Balkhy unomnyango wezokwelapha futhi unobungcweti ezindalini zezingane ezithintekile. UDkt. Catharina Boehme uzoba iPhini Lomphathi-Jeneral, kwezokuxhumana ngaphandle kanye nokulawulwa, kusukela ngomhlaka 4 Meyi 2023. Kule ndima, uDkt. Boehme uzokhokha ukuhlela kobunikazi be-WHO ezindaweni zokulawulwa, ukuhlanganisa izinsiza kanye nokuxhumana nabalingani. Umsebenzi wakhe uzofaka nendlela yokusebenza ezweni elibalulekile lamalungu, njengokuxoxisana kwabo ngesivumelwano sendlala-mlotha, ukuguqulwa kwendlela yokulawulwa ye-WHO kanye nokusebenza kwezincomo mayelana nokuxhaswa kwezezimali. UDkt. Boehme usebenze njengoMlawuli Omkhulu weSikhulu Lomphathi-Jeneral, ngalesi sikhathi ukhokhele umbono wobunikazi webhungqa, equkethwe ukuhambisana ngaphakathi komhlangano kanye namalungu kanye nabalingani.

translations.source: She joined WHO in 2021, having been the Chief Executive Officer of FIND, the international alliance for diagnostics. Dr Boehme holds a medical degree and diplomas in public health and management. Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu will continue as Assistant Director-General for the Division of Health Emergency Intelligence and Surveillance Systems in the Emergencies Programme. As part of his portfolio, Dr Ihekweazu leads the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, bringing together partners to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, analytical capacities, and tools for decision-making. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Ihekweazu was the first Director General of the Nigeria Centre for Disease Control (NCDC), from 2016 to 2021.
translations.reference: Ujoyine iWHO ngo-2021, ubelokhu enguChief Executive Officer weFIND, owezobudlelwane bamazwe angaphandle kwezokuxilonga. UDkt Boehme uneziqu zobudokotela nediploma ekuphatheni nezempilo yomphakathi. UDKt chikwe Ihekweazu uzoqhubeka nokuba nguMszi waMqondisi Jikelele weDivision of Health Emergency Interlligence and Survillance Systems kuHlelo lwezokuohuthumayo. Njengengxenye yephothifoliyo yakhe, uDkt Ihekweazu uhola iHabhu yeWHO yePandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, ukuhlanganisa ndawonye ababambisani ukubhekana nobhubhane lwekusasa nezingcuphe ze-ephidemikhi ngokungena kangcono kumininingo amandla okuhlaziya namathuluzi okuthatha izinqumo. Ngaphambi kokujoyina iWHO uDkT Ihekweazu waba nguMqondisi Jikelele wokuqala weNigeria Centre fo Disease Control NCDC) kusuka ngo-2016 kuya ku-2021.
translations.hypothesis: Ujoyine i-WHO ngonyaka ka-2021, ngemuva kokuba ngumphathi omkhulu we-FIND, umphakathi wamazwe ngamazwe ogxile ekuhlaziyweni kwezifo. UDkt. Boehme unomnyango wezokwelapha kanye namadokhumenti ezempilo zomphakathi kanye nokuphathwa. UDkt. Chikwe Ihekweazu uzolandela njengoMphathi Omzanyana Wezigaba Zokuhlaziywa Kwezimo Eziphuthumayo kanye Nezinhlelo Zokugadazwa kwiHlelo Lezimo Eziphuthumayo. Njengengxenye yomsebenzi wakhe, uDkt. Ihekweazu uholwa i-WHO Hub yezokuhlaziywa kwezifo ezibulalayo nezinkolo, ehlanganisa abalingani ukulungisa izingozi ezizayo zezifo ezibulalayo nezinkolo ngokuthola ulwazi olungcono, amandla okuhlaziya, kanye nezinsiza zokwenza izinqumo. Ngaphambi kokujoyina i-WHO, uDkt. Ihekweazu wayengumphathi omkhulu wokuqala we-Nigeria Centre for Disease Control (NCDC), kusukela ngo-2016 kuya ku-2021.

translations.source: Dr Ihekweazu holds a medical degree, with specialization as an infectious disease epidemiologist, and a master’s degree in public health. Dr Michael Ryan will continue as Executive Director of WHO’s Health Emergencies Programme. Dr Ryan has been managing health emergencies in WHO for the past 25 years and most recently led WHO’s emergency response to the COVID-19 pandemic. He leads WHO’s response to disease outbreaks, humanitarian crises and other public health emergencies. Dr Ryan is a founding member of the Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), which has aided the response to hundreds of disease outbreaks around the world.
translations.reference: UDkt Ihekweazu uneziqu zobudokotela ngokugxila ku-ephidomoloji yezifo ezithelelanayo kanye neziqu zemastazi kwezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt Michael Ryan uzoqhubeka nokuba nguMqondisi omkhulu woHlelo lweZiphuthumayo zeMpilo kuWHO. UDkt Ryan ubephethe ezokuphuthumayo zezempilo kuWHO eminyakeni engu-25 eyedlule futhi usanda kuhola ukuphendula kweziphuthumayo kweWHO ngokobhubhane lweCOVID-19. Uhola ukuphendula kweWHO ekubhedukeni kwezifo izinkinga zabantu kanye nokunye ukuphuthuma kwezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt Ryan uyilungu elingumsunguli leGlobal Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN) esisize ukuphendula kumakhulu okubheduka kwezifo emhlabeni wonke.
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Ihekweazu unomnyango wezokwelapha, enobungcweti kwezifo ezisabalalayo kanye nobuchwepheshe be-epidemiology, kanye negama lendlela yomnyango wezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt. Michael Ryan uzolandela ukuba nguMqondisi Omkhulu weHlelo Lezimo Eziphuthumayo Zezempilo ze-WHO. UDkt. Ryan ubephatha izimo eziphuthumayo zezempilo e-WHO iminyaka engama-25 edlule, futhi kakhulu kuleli nkululeko, uhole ukuphendula kwe-WHO kuleli qembu le-COVID-19. Uphatha ukuphendula kwe-WHO kwezifo ezisabalalayo, izimo zomsoco, kanye nezinye izimo eziphuthumayo zezempilo yomphakathi. UDkt. Ryan ungumlandeli we-Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), okusizo kakhulu ekuphenduleni kwezinkululeko zezifo eziningi emhlabeni jikelele.

translations.source: Dr Ryan holds a degree in medicine and a master’s degree in public health. Mr Raul Thomas will continue as Assistant Director-General for Business Operations. Mr Thomas has overall responsibility for WHO’s business functions, including budget, finance, human resources, administration, audit, risk management, accountability and compliance, and general management. He is responsible for implementing many of the initiatives under the Organization’s transformation agenda and creating a respectful, inclusive workplace. During his 20 years of employment with WHO, Mr Thomas has served in the regions of Africa, the Americas, the Eastern Mediterranean and the Western Pacific, as well as with the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC).
translations.reference: UDkt Ryan uneziqu kwezobudokotela kanye neziqu zemastazi kwezempilo yomphakathi. UMnumzane Raul Thomas uzoqhubeka njengoMsizi waMqondisi Jikelele weZokusebenza zamaBhizinisi. UMnumzane Thomas unomsebenzi wonke wokusebenza kwebhizinisi leWHO, okufaka uhlelomali, ezezimali, ezokusebenza zabantu, ukuphatha, ukucwaninga, ukuphatha ingcuphe, ukuzibophezela nokulandela kanye nokuphatha okujwayelekile. Umsebenzi wakhe ukwenza imizamo eminingi ngaphansi koguquko lwenhlangano nokwenza indawo yokusebenza ehloniphekayo. Ngesikhathi seminyaka yakhe engu-20 esebenza neWHO uMnumzane Thomas usesebenze kuzifunda zase-Afrika, e-Americas kanye nase-Eastern Mediterranean neWestern Pacific kanye ne-International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC).
translations.hypothesis: UDkt. Ryan unomnyango wezomitholampilo kanye negama lendlela yobunhlakaniphi kwezempilo zomphakathi. UMnu. Raul Thomas uzolandela ukuba ngumphathi omkhulu wesigaba sezabasebenzi. UMnu.
